<?php
/*
Plugin Name: DoorMatrix Company Portal
Description: DoorMatrix portal with admin left menu, front-end portal dashboard, quotes, supplier quote requests, invoices, inspections, customers, staff, and parts library.
Version: 5.4.58
Author: DoorMatrix
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class DoorMatrix_Company_Portal {

    const VERSION = '5.4.58';
    const OWNER_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL = 'admin@doormatrix.ca';
    const SUPPORT_EMAIL = 'info@doormatrix.ca';
    const STAFF_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_staff';
    const MANAGER_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_manager';
    const ACCOUNTING_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_accounting';
    const SALES_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_sales';
    const COORDINATOR_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_coordinator';
    const TECHNICIAN_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_technician';
    const WAREHOUSE_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_warehouse';
    const PARTS_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_parts';
    const RECEPTIONIST_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_receptionist';
    const SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE = 'doormatrix_company_subcontractor';
    const MENU_SLUG = 'doormatrix-portal';
    const ADMIN_INVENTORY_COMPANY_KEY = 'doormatrix-admin-inventory';
    const PART_POST_TYPE = 'dm_part';
    const PART_TAXONOMY = 'dm_part_category';
    const SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE = 'dm_saved_item';
    const SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY = 'dm_saved_item_category';
    const HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE = 'dm_hazard_assessment';

    private $dmx_admin_live_preview_mode = false;
    private $dmx_admin_live_preview_company_name = 'DoorMatrix Demo Company';
    private $dmx_admin_live_preview_company_key = 'doormatrix-demo-preview';


    public function __construct() {
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate_plugin'));
        register_deactivation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'deactivate_plugin'));

        add_action('after_setup_theme', array($this, 'enable_part_thumbnails'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'register_post_types'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'register_taxonomies'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'register_shortcodes'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_form_actions'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_public_auth_actions'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'maybe_run_plugin_upgrade'), 30);
        add_action('template_redirect', array($this, 'handle_public_document_views'), 1);
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'maybe_redirect_portal_users_from_backend'));
        add_filter('authenticate', array($this, 'block_unapproved_portal_login'), 30, 3);
        add_filter('show_admin_bar', array($this, 'maybe_hide_front_admin_bar'), 20);
        add_filter('pre_get_document_title', array($this, 'filter_portal_document_title'), 20);
        add_filter('document_title_parts', array($this, 'filter_portal_document_title_parts'), 20);
        add_action('wp_head', array($this, 'render_portal_browser_branding_head'), 5);

        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'register_admin_menu'));
        add_action('pre_get_users', array($this, 'filter_wordpress_users_hide_portal_users'));
        add_filter('views_users', array($this, 'add_wordpress_users_portal_filter_links'));
        add_filter('parent_file', array($this, 'fix_admin_preview_menu_parent'));
        add_filter('submenu_file', array($this, 'fix_admin_preview_submenu_file'));
        add_action('admin_head', array($this, 'hide_hidden_inspection_preview_submenus'));
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'normalize_admin_portal_default_landing'));
        add_filter('manage_users_columns', array($this, 'add_company_column_to_users_list'));
        add_filter('manage_users_custom_column', array($this, 'render_company_column_on_users_list'), 10, 3);
        add_action('admin_post_dmx_create_supplier_request', array($this, 'handle_admin_supplier_request'));

        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_front_assets'));
        add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_admin_assets'));
        add_action('admin_head', array($this, 'render_parts_admin_styles'));
        add_action('admin_head', array($this, 'hide_admin_notices_on_portal_pages'));
        add_filter('admin_footer_text', array($this, 'filter_admin_footer_text'), 20);
        add_filter('update_footer', array($this, 'filter_admin_update_footer'), 20);

        add_action('add_meta_boxes', array($this, 'add_meta_boxes'));
        add_action('add_meta_boxes', array($this, 'add_saved_item_meta_boxes'));
        add_action('save_post_dm_quote', array($this, 'save_quote_meta'));
        add_action('save_post_dm_supplier_request', array($this, 'save_supplier_request_meta'));
        add_action('save_post_dm_invoice', array($this, 'save_invoice_meta'));
        add_action('save_post_dm_inspection', array($this, 'save_inspection_meta'));
        add_action('save_post_' . self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE, array($this, 'save_hazard_assessment_meta'));
        add_action('save_post_dm_customer', array($this, 'save_customer_meta'));
        add_action('save_post_dm_subcontractor_po', array($this, 'save_subcontractor_po_meta'));
        add_action('save_post_dm_subcontractor_invoice', array($this, 'save_subcontractor_invoice_meta'));
        add_action('save_post_' . self::PART_POST_TYPE, array($this, 'save_part_meta'));
        add_action('save_post_' . self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE, array($this, 'save_saved_item_meta'));

        add_filter('template_redirect', array($this, 'protect_single_records'));

        add_filter('manage_' . self::PART_POST_TYPE . '_posts_columns', array($this, 'part_admin_columns'));
        add_action('manage_' . self::PART_POST_TYPE . '_posts_custom_column', array($this, 'render_part_admin_columns'), 10, 2);
        add_filter('manage_edit-' . self::PART_POST_TYPE . '_sortable_columns', array($this, 'part_sortable_columns'));
        add_action('pre_get_posts', array($this, 'handle_part_admin_sorting'));
        add_action('restrict_manage_posts', array($this, 'add_part_admin_filters'));
        add_filter('parse_query', array($this, 'apply_part_admin_filters'));

        add_action('init', array($this, 'register_saved_item_post_type'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'register_saved_item_taxonomy'));
        add_filter('manage_' . self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE . '_posts_columns', array($this, 'saved_item_admin_columns'));
        add_action('manage_' . self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE . '_posts_custom_column', array($this, 'render_saved_item_admin_columns'), 10, 2);
        add_filter('manage_edit-' . self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE . '_sortable_columns', array($this, 'saved_item_sortable_columns'));
        add_action('pre_get_posts', array($this, 'handle_saved_item_admin_sorting'));
        add_action('restrict_manage_posts', array($this, 'add_saved_item_admin_filters'));
        add_filter('parse_query', array($this, 'apply_saved_item_admin_filters'));
    }

    private function is_frontend_portal_page() {
        if (is_admin()) {
            return false;
        }

        if (!empty($_GET['dmx_tab']) || !empty($_GET['dmx_auth'])) {
            return array('has_exceptions' => false, 'exceptions_count' => 0);
        }

        global $post;
        if ($post instanceof WP_Post && has_shortcode((string) $post->post_content, 'doormatrix_portal')) {
            return array('has_exceptions' => false, 'exceptions_count' => 0);
        }

        return false;
    }

    private function is_dmx_admin_screen() {
        if (!is_admin()) {
            return false;
        }

        $page = isset($_GET['page']) ? sanitize_key((string) wp_unslash($_GET['page'])) : '';
        if ($page !== '' && strpos($page, 'doormatrix') === 0) {
            return true;
        }

        $post_type = '';
        if (isset($_GET['post_type'])) {
            $post_type = sanitize_key((string) wp_unslash($_GET['post_type']));
        } elseif (isset($_GET['post'])) {
            $post_type = sanitize_key((string) get_post_type((int) $_GET['post']));
        }

        if ($post_type !== '' && (strpos($post_type, 'dm_') === 0 || $post_type === self::PART_POST_TYPE || $post_type === self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE || $post_type === self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE)) {
            return true;
        }

        $screen = function_exists('get_current_screen') ? get_current_screen() : null;
        if ($screen) {
            $screen_id = isset($screen->id) ? (string) $screen->id : '';
            $screen_post_type = isset($screen->post_type) ? (string) $screen->post_type : '';

            if ($screen_id !== '' && (strpos($screen_id, 'doormatrix') !== false || strpos($screen_id, 'dm_') !== false)) {
                return true;
            }

            if ($screen_post_type !== '' && strpos($screen_post_type, 'dm_') === 0) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    public function filter_admin_footer_text($text) {
        if ($this->is_dmx_admin_screen()) {
            return '';
        }

        return $text;
    }

    public function filter_admin_update_footer($text) {
        if ($this->is_dmx_admin_screen()) {
            return '';
        }

        return $text;
    }
    private function get_portal_browser_title() {
        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $company_name = trim((string) ($company['company_name'] ?? ''));

        if ($company_name === '') {
            $company_name = trim((string) get_bloginfo('name'));
        }

        if ($company_name === '') {
            $company_name = 'Company';
        }

        return $company_name . ' Portal';
    }

    public function filter_portal_document_title($title) {
        if (!$this->is_frontend_portal_page()) {
            return $title;
        }

        return $this->get_portal_browser_title();
    }

    public function filter_portal_document_title_parts($parts) {
        if (!$this->is_frontend_portal_page()) {
            return $parts;
        }

        $parts['title'] = $this->get_portal_browser_title();

        if (isset($parts['site'])) {
            unset($parts['site']);
        }

        if (isset($parts['tagline'])) {
            unset($parts['tagline']);
        }

        return $parts;
    }

    public function render_portal_browser_branding_head() {
        if (!$this->is_frontend_portal_page()) {
            return;
        }

        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $title = $this->get_portal_browser_title();
        $logo_url = trim((string) ($company['logo_url'] ?? ''));

        echo "\n" . '<script>document.title = ' . wp_json_encode($title) . ';</script>' . "\n";

        if ($logo_url !== '') {
            echo '<link rel="icon" href="' . esc_url($logo_url) . '" />' . "\n";
            echo '<link rel="shortcut icon" href="' . esc_url($logo_url) . '" />' . "\n";
            echo '<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="' . esc_url($logo_url) . '" />' . "\n";
        }
    }

    public function activate_plugin() {
        add_role(
            self::STAFF_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Helper',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        add_role(
            self::MANAGER_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Company Manager',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        add_role(
            self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Accounting',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        add_role(
            self::SALES_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Sales',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        add_role(
            self::COORDINATOR_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Coordinator',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        add_role(
            self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Technician',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        add_role(
            self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Warehouse / Shipper Receiver',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        add_role(
            self::PARTS_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Parts',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        add_role(
            self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Receptionist',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        add_role(
            self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE,
            'DoorMatrix Subcontractor',
            array(
                'read' => true,
                'upload_files' => true,
            )
        );

        $this->create_message_tables();

        $this->register_post_types();
        $this->register_taxonomies();
        $this->register_saved_item_post_type();
        $this->register_saved_item_taxonomy();
        $this->seed_part_categories();
        $this->seed_saved_item_categories();
        $this->seed_preloaded_parts_library();
        $this->seed_preloaded_saved_items_library();
        $this->backfill_existing_customer_numbers();
        update_option('dmx_company_portal_version', self::VERSION);
        flush_rewrite_rules();
    }

    public function deactivate_plugin() {
        flush_rewrite_rules();
    }

    public function maybe_run_plugin_upgrade() {
        $installed_version = get_option('dmx_company_portal_version', '');

        if ($installed_version === self::VERSION) {
            return;
        }

        add_role(self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, 'DoorMatrix Accounting', array('read' => true, 'upload_files' => true));
        add_role(self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, 'DoorMatrix Receptionist', array('read' => true, 'upload_files' => true));
        add_role(self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE, 'DoorMatrix Subcontractor', array('read' => true, 'upload_files' => true));
        $this->create_message_tables();
        $this->seed_part_categories();
        $this->seed_saved_item_categories();
        $this->seed_preloaded_parts_library();
        $this->backfill_existing_document_numbers();
        $this->backfill_existing_customer_numbers();
        $this->backfill_existing_company_keys();
        $this->repair_document_layout_settings();
        update_option('dmx_company_portal_version', self::VERSION);
    }

    public function enable_part_thumbnails() {
        add_theme_support('post-thumbnails', array(self::PART_POST_TYPE));
    }

    public function register_taxonomies() {
        register_taxonomy(self::PART_TAXONOMY, array(self::PART_POST_TYPE), array(
            'labels' => array(
                'name' => 'Part Categories',
                'singular_name' => 'Part Category',
                'search_items' => 'Search Part Categories',
                'all_items' => 'All Part Categories',
                'edit_item' => 'Edit Part Category',
                'update_item' => 'Update Part Category',
                'add_new_item' => 'Add New Part Category',
                'new_item_name' => 'New Part Category',
                'menu_name' => 'Part Categories',
            ),
            'public' => false,
            'show_ui' => true,
            'show_admin_column' => true,
            'hierarchical' => true,
            'rewrite' => false,
        ));

        $this->seed_part_categories();
    }

    private function seed_part_categories() {
        $categories = array(
            'cables' => 'Cables',
            'springs' => 'Springs',
            'drums' => 'Drums',
            'rollers' => 'Rollers',
            'door-hardware' => 'Door Hardware',
            'shaft' => 'Shaft',
            'bearing-bearing-plate' => 'Bearing / Bearing Plate',
            'weatherstrip' => 'Weatherstrip',
            'retainers' => 'Retainers',
            'track' => 'Track',
            'struts' => 'Struts',
            'operators-openers' => 'Operators / Openers',
            'panels-sections' => 'Panels / Sections',
            'windows-inserts' => 'Windows / Inserts',
            'locks-latches-handles' => 'Locks / Latches / Handles',
            'sensors-safety-devices' => 'Sensors / Safety Devices',
            'remote-controls-wall-stations-access-controls' => 'Remote Controls / Wall Stations / Access Controls',
            'accessories-operator-add-ons' => 'Accessories / Operator Add-ons',
            'fasteners-hardware-consumables' => 'Fasteners / Hardware Consumables',
            'sealants-lubricants-shop-supplies' => 'Sealants / Lubricants / Shop Supplies',
        );

        foreach ($categories as $slug => $label) {
            if (!term_exists($slug, self::PART_TAXONOMY)) {
                wp_insert_term($label, self::PART_TAXONOMY, array('slug' => $slug));
            }
        }
    }

    private function seed_preloaded_parts_library() {
        if (!post_type_exists(self::PART_POST_TYPE) || !taxonomy_exists(self::PART_TAXONOMY)) {
            return;
        }

        $parts = $this->get_preloaded_parts_catalog();

        foreach ($parts as $part) {
            $this->upsert_preloaded_part($part);
        }
    }

    private function upsert_preloaded_part($part) {
        $part = wp_parse_args($part, array(
            'preload_key' => '',
            'title' => '',
            'category' => '',
            'notes' => '',
            'meta' => array(),
        ));

        if ($part['preload_key'] === '' || $part['title'] === '' || $part['category'] === '') {
            return;
        }

        $existing = get_posts(array(
            'post_type' => self::PART_POST_TYPE,
            'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
            'posts_per_page' => 1,
            'fields' => 'ids',
            'meta_key' => '_dmx_preload_key',
            'meta_value' => $part['preload_key'],
        ));

        if (!empty($existing)) {
            $post_id = (int) $existing[0];
            wp_update_post(array(
                'ID' => $post_id,
                'post_title' => $part['title'],
                'post_content' => $part['notes'],
                'post_status' => 'publish',
            ));
        } else {
            $post_id = wp_insert_post(array(
                'post_type' => self::PART_POST_TYPE,
                'post_status' => 'publish',
                'post_title' => $part['title'],
                'post_content' => $part['notes'],
            ));
        }

        if (!$post_id || is_wp_error($post_id)) {
            return;
        }

        wp_set_object_terms($post_id, array($part['category']), self::PART_TAXONOMY, false);

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_preload_key', $part['preload_key']);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_part_active', 'yes');
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_part_taxable', 'yes');

        foreach ($part['meta'] as $meta_key => $meta_value) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_' . $meta_key, $meta_value);
        }
    }

                'title' => 'Bottom Retainer - Plastic - ' . $length . "\'",
                'category' => 'retainers',
                'notes' => 'Preloaded retainer item.',
                'meta' => array(
                    'dmx_retainer_type' => 'bottom retainer',
                    'dmx_retainer_shape' => 'flat',
                    'dmx_retainer_material' => 'plastic',
                    'dmx_retainer_size' => '2"',
                    'dmx_retainer_length' => $length . "\'",
                ),
            );

            $parts[] = array(
                'preload_key' => 'track-high-lift-2in-' . $length . 'ft',
                'title' => 'High Lift Track - 2" - ' . $length . "\'",
                'category' => 'track',
                'notes' => 'Preloaded high lift track item.',
                'meta' => array(
                    'dmx_track_type' => 'high lift track',
                    'dmx_track_size' => '2"',
                    'dmx_track_gauge' => '15 gauge',
                    'dmx_vertical_track_length' => $length . "\'",
                    'dmx_track_application' => 'residential',
                ),
            );

            $parts[] = array(
                'preload_key' => 'track-full-vertical-2in-' . $length . 'ft',
                'title' => 'Full Vertical Track - 2" - ' . $length . "\'",
                'category' => 'track',
                'notes' => 'Preloaded full vertical track item.',
                'meta' => array(
                    'dmx_track_type' => 'full vertical track',
                    'dmx_track_size' => '2"',
                    'dmx_track_gauge' => '15 gauge',
                    'dmx_vertical_track_length' => $length . "\'",
                    'dmx_track_application' => 'residential',
                ),
            );

            $parts[] = array(
                'preload_key' => 'track-low-headroom-front-2in-' . $length . 'ft',
                'title' => 'Low Headroom Front Track - 2" - ' . $length . "\'",
                'category' => 'track',
                'notes' => 'Preloaded low headroom front track item.',
                'meta' => array(
                    'dmx_track_type' => 'low headroom front track',
                    'dmx_track_size' => '2"',
                    'dmx_track_gauge' => '15 gauge',
                    'dmx_horizontal_track_length' => $length . "\'",
                    'dmx_track_application' => 'residential',
                ),
            );

            $parts[] = array(
                'preload_key' => 'track-low-headroom-rear-2in-' . $length . 'ft',
                'title' => 'Low Headroom Rear Track - 2" - ' . $length . "\'",
                'category' => 'track',
                'notes' => 'Preloaded low headroom rear track item.',
                'meta' => array(
                    'dmx_track_type' => 'low headroom rear track',
                    'dmx_track_size' => '2"',
                    'dmx_track_gauge' => '15 gauge',
                    'dmx_horizontal_track_length' => $length . "\'",
                    'dmx_track_application' => 'residential',
                ),
            );
        }

        foreach (array('400-8','400-9','400-12','400-18','400-24','400-32','400-54','400-72','400-96','400-144') as $drum_model) {
            $lift_type = in_array($drum_model, array('400-8','400-9','400-12'), true) ? 'Standard lift' : 'High lift';
            foreach (array('1"', '1 1/4"') as $shaft_size) {
                $parts[] = array(
                    'preload_key' => 'drum-' . strtolower(str_replace(array('-', ' ', '"'), array('-', '', ''), $drum_model . '-' . $shaft_size)),
                    'title' => 'Cable Drum Pair - ' . $drum_model . ' - ' . $shaft_size . ' Shaft',
                    'category' => 'drums',
                    'notes' => 'Preloaded drum set.',
                    'meta' => array(
                        'dmx_drum_model' => $drum_model,
                        'dmx_drum_lift_type' => $lift_type,
                        'dmx_drum_shaft_size' => $shaft_size,
                        'dmx_drum_side' => 'pair',
                    ),
                );
            }
        }

        foreach (array('2"' => array('steel','nylon','sealed nylon'), '3"' => array('steel','nylon')) as $roller_size => $materials) {
            foreach ($materials as $material) {
                foreach (array('short stem', 'long stem') as $stem_type) {
                    $slug = strtolower(str_replace(array('"',' '), array('', '-'), $roller_size . '-' . $material . '-' . $stem_type));
                    $parts[] = array(
                        'preload_key' => 'roller-' . $slug,
                        'title' => $roller_size . ' ' . ucwords($material) . ' Roller - ' . ucwords($stem_type),
                        'category' => 'rollers',
                        'notes' => 'Preloaded roller item.',
                        'meta' => array(
                            'dmx_roller_size' => $roller_size,

                            'dmx_roller_application' => $roller_size === '2"' ? 'residential' : 'commercial',
                        ),
                    );
                }
            }
        }

        foreach (array(
            'commercial adjustable top fixture',
            'low headroom top fixture',
            'OEM sled low headroom fixture'
        ) as $top_fixture_type) {
            $slug = strtolower(str_replace(array(' / ', ' ', '"'), array('-', '-', ''), $top_fixture_type));
            $parts[] = array(

            );
        }

        foreach (array(
            'standard bottom fixture' => '2"',
            'heavy duty bottom fixture' => '3"',
            'adjustable bottom fixture' => '2"'
        ) as $bottom_fixture_type => $track_size) {
            $slug = strtolower(str_replace(' ', '-', $bottom_fixture_type));
            $parts[] = array(
                'preload_key' => 'bottom-fixture-' . $slug . '-' . str_replace('"', 'in', $track_size),
                'title' => 'Bottom Fixture - ' . ucwords($bottom_fixture_type) . ' - ' . $track_size,
                'category' => 'door-hardware',
                'notes' => 'Preloaded bottom fixture item.',
                'meta' => array(
                    'dmx_hardware_type' => 'bottom fixture',
                    'dmx_bottom_fixture_type' => $bottom_fixture_type,
                    'dmx_hardware_track_size' => $track_size,
                    'dmx_hardware_application' => $track_size === '2"' ? 'residential' : 'commercial',
                ),
            );
        }

        foreach (array(
            array('.192','1 3/4"', '21"'),
            array('.207','2"', '24"'),
            array('.218','2"', '25"'),
            array('.225','2"', '27"'),
            array('.234','2"', '29"'),
            array('.243','2"', '32"'),
            array('.250','2 1/4"', '36"'),
            array('.262','2 5/8"', '40"')
        ) as $spring_set) {
            foreach (array('RH','LH') as $wind) {
                list($wire_size, $inside_diameter, $spring_length) = $spring_set;
                $slug = strtolower(str_replace(array('.', ' ', '"', '/'), array('', '-', '', '-'), $wire_size . '-' . $inside_diameter . '-' . $spring_length . '-' . $wind));
                $parts[] = array(
                    'preload_key' => 'spring-' . $slug,
                    'title' => 'Torsion Spring ' . $wire_size . ' x ' . $inside_diameter . ' x ' . $spring_length . ' ' . $wind,
                    'category' => 'springs',
                    'notes' => 'Preloaded torsion spring item.',
                    'meta' => array(
                        'dmx_spring_wire_size' => $wire_size,
                        'dmx_spring_inside_diameter' => $inside_diameter,
                        'dmx_spring_length' => $spring_length,
                        'dmx_spring_finish' => 'oil tempered',
                        'dmx_spring_wire_type' => 'round wire',
                        'dmx_spring_wind' => $wind,
                    ),
                );
            }
        }

        foreach (array('Short panel','Long panel') as $panel_fit) {
            foreach (array('plain','stockton','arched stockton','cascade','prairie','waterton') as $insert_style) {
                foreach (array('plain','frosted') as $glass_type) {
                    foreach (array('White','Black','Brown','Almond') as $frame_color) {
                        $slug = strtolower(str_replace(array(' ', '"'), array('-', ''), $panel_fit . '-' . $insert_style . '-' . $glass_type . '-' . $frame_color));
                        $parts[] = array(
                            'preload_key' => 'window-' . $slug,
                            'title' => $panel_fit . ' Window Insert - ' . ucwords($insert_style) . ' - ' . ucwords($glass_type) . ' - ' . $frame_color,
                            'category' => 'windows-inserts',
                            'notes' => 'Preloaded window insert item.',
                            'meta' => array(
                                'dmx_window_type' => 'decorative insert window',
                                'dmx_panel_fit' => strtolower($panel_fit),
                                'dmx_insert_style' => $insert_style,
                                'dmx_glass_type' => $glass_type,
                                'dmx_frame_color' => $frame_color,
                                'dmx_window_layout' => $panel_fit . ' insert',
                            ),
                        );
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        $parts[] = array(
            'preload_key' => 'punched-angle-per-foot-galvanized',
            'title' => 'Punched Angle - Galvanized - Per Foot',
            'category' => 'fasteners-hardware-consumables',
            'notes' => 'Preloaded punched angle item. Sold by the foot for installs, framing, bracing, and service work.',
            'meta' => array(
                'dmx_fastener_type' => 'Punched angle',
                'dmx_fastener_size' => 'Slotted angle',
                'dmx_fastener_length' => 'Per foot',
                'dmx_fastener_material_finish' => 'Galvanized',
                'dmx_fastener_head_type' => 'N/A',
                'dmx_fastener_thread_type' => 'N/A',
                'dmx_fastener_application_type' => 'Backframing / bracing / install support',
            ),
        );


        $parts[] = array(
            'preload_key' => 'fastener-garage-door-nut-bolt-assortment',
            'title' => 'Garage Door Nuts and Bolts Assortment',
            'category' => 'fasteners-hardware-consumables',
            'notes' => 'Preloaded shop hardware item for common garage door service and install fasteners.',
            'meta' => array(
                'dmx_fastener_type' => 'Nuts and bolts assortment',
                'dmx_fastener_size' => 'Assorted',
                'dmx_fastener_length' => 'Assorted',
                'dmx_fastener_material_finish' => 'Zinc',

                'dmx_fastener_application_type' => 'General garage door service / installation',

        );

        $parts[] = array(
            'preload_key' => 'fastener-track-bolt-1-4-20-x-5-8',

    public function register_shortcodes() {
        add_shortcode('doormatrix_portal', array($this, 'render_portal_shortcode'));
    }

    public function normalize_admin_portal_default_landing() {
        if (!is_admin() || !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return;
        }

        /*
         * v5.4.14:
         * WordPress admin should have a neutral DoorMatrix control-center dashboard.
         * Do not auto-load a customer company workspace when the platform owner clicks
         * the DoorMatrix plugin menu. Company context should only appear when a specific
         * company is selected from Door Companies.
         */
        return;
    }

    public function filter_wordpress_users_hide_portal_users($query) {
        if (!is_admin() || !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return;
        }

        global $pagenow;
        if ($pagenow !== 'users.php') {
            return;
        }

        $show_dmx_portal_users = isset($_GET['dmx_show_portal_users']) && $_GET['dmx_show_portal_users'] === '1';
        if ($show_dmx_portal_users) {
            return;
        }

        $meta_query = $query->get('meta_query');
        if (!is_array($meta_query)) {
            $meta_query = array();
        }

        $meta_query[] = array(
            'key' => '_dmx_company_key',
            'compare' => 'NOT EXISTS',
        );

        $query->set('meta_query', $meta_query);
    }

    public function add_wordpress_users_portal_filter_links($views) {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return $views;
        }

        $portal_count = count(get_users(array(
            'role__in' => $this->get_portal_role_keys(),
            'fields' => 'ID',
            'number' => 9999,
        )));

        $views['dmx_portal_users_hidden'] = '<a href="' . esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-portal-team-members')) . '">DoorMatrix portal users are managed in Team Members</a>';
        $views['dmx_show_portal_users'] = '<a href="' . esc_url(add_query_arg('dmx_show_portal_users', '1', admin_url('users.php'))) . '">Show DoorMatrix portal users in WordPress (' . esc_html((string) $portal_count) . ')</a>';

        return $views;
    }

    public function fix_admin_preview_menu_parent($parent_file) {
        $page = sanitize_key((string) ($_GET['page'] ?? ''));

        if ($page === self::MENU_SLUG || strpos($page, 'doormatrix-') === 0) {
            return self::MENU_SLUG;
        }

        return $parent_file;
    }

    public function fix_admin_preview_submenu_file($submenu_file) {
        $page = sanitize_key((string) ($_GET['page'] ?? ''));

        $submenu_map = array(
            'doormatrix-preview-inspection-detailed' => 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
            'doormatrix-preview-inspection-quick' => 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
            'doormatrix-preview-hazard-assessments' => 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
            'doormatrix-preview-site-check' => 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
            'doormatrix-preview-inspections' => 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
            'doormatrix-preview-inventory' => 'doormatrix-preview-inventory',
            'doormatrix-preview-parts-library' => 'doormatrix-preview-parts-library',
            'doormatrix-door-companies' => 'doormatrix-door-companies',
            'doormatrix-preview-quotes' => 'doormatrix-preview-quotes',
            'doormatrix-preview-supplier-requests' => 'doormatrix-preview-supplier-requests',
            'doormatrix-preview-invoices' => 'doormatrix-preview-invoices',
            'doormatrix-preview-work-orders' => 'doormatrix-preview-work-orders',
            'doormatrix-preview-sales-schedule' => 'doormatrix-preview-sales-schedule',
            'doormatrix-preview-technician-schedule' => 'doormatrix-preview-technician-schedule',
            'doormatrix-preview-tools' => 'doormatrix-preview-tools',
            'doormatrix-preview-customers' => 'doormatrix-preview-customers',
            'doormatrix-role-previews' => 'doormatrix-role-previews',
            'doormatrix-portal-settings' => 'doormatrix-portal-settings',
        );

        if (isset($submenu_map[$page])) {
            return $submenu_map[$page];
        }

        return $submenu_file;
    }

    public function hide_hidden_inspection_preview_submenus() {
        if (!is_admin()) {
            return;
        }
        ?>
        <style>
            /* v5.4.27:
               Detailed/Quick inspection preview pages are registered under DoorMatrix Portal
               so WordPress keeps the DoorMatrix submenu open. These two utility pages are
               hidden from the visual sidebar because they are opened from the Inspections screen. */
            #adminmenu a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-inspection-detailed"],
            #adminmenu a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-inspection-quick"],
            #adminmenu a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-hazard-assessments"],
            #adminmenu a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-site-check"],
            #adminmenu a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-team"] {
                display: none !important;
            }

            #adminmenu li:has(> a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-inspection-detailed"]),
            #adminmenu li:has(> a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-inspection-quick"]),
            #adminmenu li:has(> a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-hazard-assessments"]),
            #adminmenu li:has(> a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-site-check"]),
            #adminmenu li:has(> a[href$="page=doormatrix-preview-team"]) {
                display: none !important;
            }

            body.admin_page_doormatrix-preview-inspection-detailed #adminmenu li.wp-has-current-submenu.toplevel_page_doormatrix-portal .wp-submenu,
            body.admin_page_doormatrix-preview-inspection-quick #adminmenu li.wp-has-current-submenu.toplevel_page_doormatrix-portal .wp-submenu,
            body.doormatrix_page_doormatrix-preview-inspections #adminmenu li.wp-has-current-submenu.toplevel_page_doormatrix-portal .wp-submenu {
                display: block !important;
            }
        </style>
        <script>
            (function(){
                function keepDoorMatrixMenuOpen(){
                    var top = document.querySelector('#adminmenu li.toplevel_page_doormatrix-portal');
                    if (!top) return;

                    top.classList.add('wp-has-current-submenu');
                    top.classList.add('wp-menu-open');
                    top.classList.remove('wp-not-current-submenu');

                    var submenu = top.querySelector('.wp-submenu');
                    if (submenu) {
                        submenu.style.display = 'block';
                    }

                    // Keep the DoorMatrix parent menu open, but only mark the actual current submenu as selected.
                    var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search || '');
                    var page = params.get('page') || '';
                    var submenuMap = {
                        'doormatrix-portal': 'doormatrix-portal',
                        'doormatrix-door-companies': 'doormatrix-door-companies',
                        'doormatrix-preview-quotes': 'doormatrix-preview-quotes',
                        'doormatrix-preview-supplier-requests': 'doormatrix-preview-supplier-requests',
                        'doormatrix-preview-invoices': 'doormatrix-preview-invoices',
                        'doormatrix-preview-work-orders': 'doormatrix-preview-work-orders',
                        'doormatrix-preview-sales-schedule': 'doormatrix-preview-sales-schedule',
                        'doormatrix-preview-technician-schedule': 'doormatrix-preview-technician-schedule',
                        'doormatrix-preview-tools': 'doormatrix-preview-tools',
                        'doormatrix-preview-inspections': 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
                        'doormatrix-preview-inspection-detailed': 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
                        'doormatrix-preview-inspection-quick': 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
                        'doormatrix-preview-hazard-assessments': 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
                        'doormatrix-preview-site-check': 'doormatrix-preview-inspections',
                        'doormatrix-preview-customers': 'doormatrix-preview-customers',
                        'doormatrix-preview-inventory': 'doormatrix-preview-inventory',
                        'doormatrix-preview-parts-library': 'doormatrix-preview-parts-library',
                        'doormatrix-role-previews': 'doormatrix-role-previews',
                        'doormatrix-portal-settings': 'doormatrix-portal-settings'
                    };

                    var targetPage = submenuMap[page] || page;
                    top.querySelectorAll('.wp-submenu li').forEach(function(item){
                        item.classList.remove('current');
                    });
                    top.querySelectorAll('.wp-submenu a').forEach(function(link){
                        link.classList.remove('current');
                    });

                    if (targetPage) {
                        var currentLink = top.querySelector('a[href*="page=' + targetPage + '"]');
                        if (currentLink) {
                            currentLink.classList.add('current');
                            var li = currentLink.closest('li');
                            if (li) {
                                li.classList.add('current');
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', keepDoorMatrixMenuOpen);
                window.addEventListener('load', keepDoorMatrixMenuOpen);
                setTimeout(keepDoorMatrixMenuOpen, 300);
            })();
        </script>
        <?php
    }

    public function register_admin_menu() {
        $cap = 'manage_options';

        add_menu_page(
            'DoorMatrix Portal',
            'DoorMatrix Portal',
            $cap,
            self::MENU_SLUG,
            array($this, 'render_admin_dashboard_page'),
            'dashicons-screenoptions',
            26
        );

        add_submenu_page(
            self::MENU_SLUG,
            'Dashboard',
            'Dashboard',
            $cap,
            self::MENU_SLUG,
            array($this, 'render_admin_dashboard_page')
        );

        add_submenu_page(
            self::MENU_SLUG,
            'Door Companies',
            'Door Companies',
            $cap,
            'doormatrix-door-companies',

        );

        add_submenu_page(

        $hidden_menu_parent = null;

        /*

        add_submenu_page(

    public function enqueue_front_assets() {
        $css = $this->get_shared_css();
        wp_register_style('doormatrix-portal-inline-front', false);
        wp_enqueue_style('doormatrix-portal-inline-front');
        wp_add_inline_style('doormatrix-portal-inline-front', $css);
    }

    public function enqueue_admin_assets($hook) {
        $post_type = '';
        if (isset($_GET['post_type'])) {
            $post_type = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['post_type']));
        } elseif (isset($_GET['post'])) {
            $post_type = get_post_type((int) $_GET['post']);
        }

        if (strpos($hook, self::MENU_SLUG) === false && strpos($hook, 'doormatrix-door-companies') === false && strpos($hook, 'dm_') === false && $post_type !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
            return;
        }

        $css = $this->get_shared_css() . '
        .wrap.doormatrix-admin-wrap{
            margin:20px 20px 0 0;
        }
        .doormatrix-admin-wrap .dmx-portal-wrap{
            max-width:none;
            margin:0;
            padding:0;
        }
        /* v5.4.49: WordPress admin already has the DoorMatrix menu.
           Hide the customer portal in-app sidebar on admin preview/edit screens
           so admins only use one navigation menu while editing screens. */
        .doormatrix-admin-wrap .dmx-sidebar{
            display:none !important;
        }
        .doormatrix-admin-wrap .dmx-main{
            display:block !important;
            grid-template-columns:none !important;
            min-height:0;
        }
        .doormatrix-admin-wrap .dmx-content{
            width:100%;
            max-width:100%;
            box-sizing:border-box;
        }
        /* v5.4.57: DoorMatrix admin screens use the plugin UI, so hide the native WordPress footer copy/version. */
        #wpfooter{
            display:none !important;
        }
        #wpbody-content{
            padding-bottom:24px !important;
        }';
        wp_register_style('doormatrix-portal-inline-admin', false);
        wp_enqueue_style('doormatrix-portal-inline-admin');
        wp_add_inline_style('doormatrix-portal-inline-admin', $css);
    }


    public function hide_admin_notices_on_portal_pages() {
        if (!is_admin()) {
            return;
        }

        if (!$this->is_dmx_admin_screen()) {
            return;
        }

        echo '<style>
'
            . '#wpbody-content > .notice,
'
            . '#wpbody-content > .updated,
'
            . '#wpbody-content > .error,
'
            . '#wpbody-content > .is-dismissible,
'
            . '#wpbody-content .monsterinsights-notice,
'
            . '#wpbody-content .monsterinsights-inline-notice,
'
            . '#wpbody-content .aioseo-notification,
'
            . '#wpbody-content .rank-math-notice,
'
            . '#wpbody-content .sui-notice,
'
            . '#wpbody-content .components-snackbar-list,
'
            . '#wpfooter,
'
            . '#footer-left,
'
            . '#footer-upgrade {display:none !important;}
'
            . '#wpbody-content {padding-bottom:24px !important;}
'
            . '</style>';
    }

    public function render_parts_admin_styles() {
        $screen = get_current_screen();
        if (!$screen || $screen->post_type !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
            return;
        }
        ?>
        <style>
            .dmx-parts-grid{
                display:grid;
                grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));
                gap:14px 18px;
            }
            .dmx-parts-grid-3{
                display:grid;
                grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));
                gap:14px 18px;
            }
            .dmx-part-field label{
                display:block;
                font-weight:700;
                margin-bottom:6px;
            }
            .dmx-part-field input,
            .dmx-part-field select,
            .dmx-part-field textarea{
                width:100%;
                max-width:100%;
                line-height:1.45;
                height:auto;
                box-sizing:border-box;
            }
            .dmx-part-field input:not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"]):not([type="hidden"]),
            .dmx-part-field select{
                min-height:44px;
                padding-top:8px;
                padding-bottom:8px;
            }
            .dmx-part-field textarea{
                min-height:100px;
                padding-top:10px;
                padding-bottom:10px;
                line-height:1.5;
            }
            .dmx-part-panel{
                display:none;
                border-top:1px solid #dbe4ee;
                margin-top:14px;
                padding-top:14px;
            }
            .dmx-part-panel.active{
                display:block;
            }
            .dmx-part-help{
                color:#66788f;
                font-size:12px;
                margin-top:6px;
            }
            .column_dmx_part_image{width:72px;}
            .column_dmx_part_brand{width:160px;}
            .column_dmx_part_sku{width:130px;}
            .column_dmx_part_active{width:90px;}
            @media (max-width: 900px){
                .dmx-parts-grid,
                .dmx-parts-grid-3{
                    grid-template-columns:1fr;
                }
            }
        </style>
        <?php
    }

    public function add_meta_boxes() {
        add_meta_box('dmx_quote_meta', 'Quote Details', array($this, 'quote_meta_box'), 'dm_quote', 'normal', 'default');
        add_meta_box('dmx_supplier_request_meta', 'Supplier Quote Request Details', array($this, 'supplier_request_meta_box'), 'dm_supplier_request', 'normal', 'default');
        add_meta_box('dmx_invoice_meta', 'Invoice Details', array($this, 'invoice_meta_box'), 'dm_invoice', 'normal', 'default');
        add_meta_box('dmx_inspection_meta', 'Inspection Details', array($this, 'inspection_meta_box'), 'dm_inspection', 'normal', 'default');
        add_meta_box('dmx_hazard_assessment_meta', 'Hazard Assessment Details', array($this, 'hazard_assessment_meta_box'), self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE, 'normal', 'default');
        add_meta_box('dmx_customer_meta', 'Customer Details', array($this, 'customer_meta_box'), 'dm_customer', 'normal', 'default');
        add_meta_box('dmx_subcontractor_po_meta', 'Subcontractor PO Details', array($this, 'subcontractor_po_meta_box'), 'dm_subcontractor_po', 'normal', 'default');
        add_meta_box('dmx_subcontractor_invoice_meta', 'Subcontractor Invoice Details', array($this, 'subcontractor_invoice_meta_box'), 'dm_subcontractor_invoice', 'normal', 'default');

        add_meta_box('dmx_part_core_meta', 'Part Details', array($this, 'part_core_meta_box'), self::PART_POST_TYPE, 'normal', 'high');
        add_meta_box('dmx_part_category_meta', 'Category-Specific Fields', array($this, 'part_category_meta_box'), self::PART_POST_TYPE, 'normal', 'default');
    }

    public function quote_meta_box($post) {
        wp_nonce_field('dmx_quote_meta_nonce', 'dmx_quote_meta_nonce_field');
        ?>
        <p><label><strong>Customer</strong></label><br><input type="text" name="dmx_customer_name" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
        <p><label><strong>Status</strong></label><br>
            <select name="dmx_status" style="width:100%;">
                <?php $this->render_status_options(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_status', true), array('draft','pending','open','complete','cancelled')); ?>
            </select>
        </p>
        <p><label><strong>Amount</strong></label><br><input type="text" name="dmx_amount" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_amount', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
        <p><label><strong>Supplier Request Linked</strong></label><br><input type="text" name="dmx_supplier_request_ref" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_supplier_request_ref', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
        <p><label><strong>Site Location / Install Address</strong></label><br><textarea name="dmx_site_location" rows="3" style="width:100%;"><?php echo esc_textarea(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_site_location', true)); ?></textarea></p>
        <p><label><strong>Markup Percent</strong></label><br><input type="text" name="dmx_markup_percent" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_markup_percent', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
        <?php
    }

    public function supplier_request_meta_box($post) {
        wp_nonce_field('dmx_supplier_request_meta_nonce', 'dmx_supplier_request_meta_nonce_field');
        ?>
        <p><label><strong>Supplier Name</strong></label><br><input type="text" name="dmx_supplier_name" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_supplier_name', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
