        <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            function getSelectedPartCategorySlug() {
                const checked = document.querySelector('input[name="tax_input[<?php echo esc_js(self::PART_TAXONOMY); ?>][]"]:checked');
                if (checked) {
                    return checked.value;
                }
                const select = document.querySelector('#taxonomy-<?php echo esc_js(self::PART_TAXONOMY); ?> select');
                if (select && select.value) {
                    return select.value;
                }
                return '';
            }

            function refreshPartPanels() {
                var slug = getSelectedPartCategorySlug();
                document.querySelectorAll('.dmx-part-panel').forEach(function(panel) {
                    panel.classList.remove('active');
                });
                if (!slug) {
                    return;
                }
                var activePanel = document.querySelector('.dmx-part-panel[data-category="' + slug + '"]');
                if (activePanel) {
                    activePanel.classList.add('active');
                }
            }

            document.querySelectorAll('input[name="tax_input[<?php echo esc_js(self::PART_TAXONOMY); ?>][]"]').forEach(function(el) {
                el.addEventListener('change', refreshPartPanels);
            });

            var select = document.querySelector('#taxonomy-<?php echo esc_js(self::PART_TAXONOMY); ?> select');
            if (select) {
                select.addEventListener('change', refreshPartPanels);
            }

            refreshPartPanels();
        });
        </script>
        <?php
    }

    private function part_panel_start($slug, $title, $selected_category) {
        $active = ($slug === $selected_category) ? ' active' : '';
        return '<div class="dmx-part-panel' . esc_attr($active) . '" data-category="' . esc_attr($slug) . '"><h4 style="margin:0 0 14px;">' . esc_html($title) . '</h4>';
    }

    private function part_panel_end() {
        return '</div>';
    }

    private function render_part_text_input($name, $label, $value) {
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-part-field">
            <label for="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></label>
            <input type="text" id="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>" name="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>" value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>">
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_part_number_input($name, $label, $value) {
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-part-field">
            <label for="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></label>
            <input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" id="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>" name="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>" value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>">
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_part_select_input($name, $label, $selected, $options) {
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-part-field">
            <label for="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></label>
            <select id="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>" name="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>">
                <option value="">Select</option>
                <?php foreach ($options as $value => $text) : ?>
                    <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>" <?php selected($selected, $value); ?>>
                        <?php echo esc_html($text); ?>
                    </option>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </select>
                    </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_length_options($start, $end) {
        $options = array();
        for ($i = $start; $i <= $end; $i++) {
            $label = $i . "'";
            $options[$label] = $label;
        }
        return $options;
    }

    private function get_part_meta($post_id, $key, $default = '') {
        $value = get_post_meta($post_id, '_' . $key, true);
        if ($value === '') {
            return $default;
        }
        return $value;
    }

    private function get_part_category_slug($post_id) {
        $terms = wp_get_post_terms($post_id, self::PART_TAXONOMY);
        if (!empty($terms) && !is_wp_error($terms)) {
            return $terms[0]->slug;
        }
        return '';
    }

    private function render_status_options($selected, $statuses) {
        foreach ($statuses as $status) {
            echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($status) . '" ' . selected($selected, $status, false) . '>' . esc_html(ucfirst($status)) . '</option>';
        }
    }

    private function get_invoice_payment_status_label($status) {
        $status = sanitize_key((string) $status);
        if ($status === 'partial') {
            return 'Partial Payment';
        }
        if ($status === 'paid') {
            return 'Paid';
        }
        if ($status === 'pending') {
            return 'Payment Due';
        }
        if ($status === 'draft') {
            return 'Draft';
        }
        if ($status === 'cancelled') {
            return 'Cancelled';
        }
        if ($status === 'sent') {
            return 'Sent';
        }
        return $status !== '' ? ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $status)) : 'Draft';
    }

    public function save_quote_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_quote_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_quote_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_name'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_status'] ?? 'draft'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_amount', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_amount'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', sanitize_email($_POST['dmx_customer_email'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site_location', sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_site_location'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_request_ref', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_supplier_request_ref'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_markup_percent', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_markup_percent'] ?? ''));
        $this->ensure_document_number('quote', $post_id);
    }

    public function save_supplier_request_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_supplier_request_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_supplier_request_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_name', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_supplier_name'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_email', sanitize_email($_POST['dmx_supplier_email'] ?? ''));
        if (!get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_requested_by_user_id', true)) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_requested_by_user_id', get_post_field('post_author', $post_id));
        }
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_name'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_door_type', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_door_type'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_door_size', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_door_size'] ?? ''));
        if (isset($_POST['supplier_doors']) && is_array($_POST['supplier_doors'])) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_door_packages', $this->sanitize_supplier_door_packages_from_request());
        }
        $supplier_status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_status'] ?? 'draft');
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', $supplier_status);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_receiving_status', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_receiving_status'] ?? ($supplier_status === 'received' ? 'received' : 'waiting')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_received_notes', sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_received_notes'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_price', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_supplier_price'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_markup_percent', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_markup_percent'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sell_price', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_sell_price'] ?? ''));
    }

    public function save_invoice_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_invoice_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_invoice_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_name'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_status'] ?? 'draft'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_amount', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_amount'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site_location', sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_site_location'] ?? '')));
        $this->ensure_document_number('invoice', $post_id);
    }

    public function save_inspection_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_inspection_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_inspection_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_name'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_site'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_status'] ?? 'draft'));
    }

    public function save_hazard_assessment_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_hazard_assessment_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_hazard_assessment_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_customer_name', sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_hazard_customer_name'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_site_address', sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_hazard_site_address'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_work_to_be_done', sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_hazard_work_to_be_done'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_work_order_id', absint($_POST['dmx_hazard_work_order_id'] ?? 0));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_highest_risk', sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_hazard_highest_risk'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_hazards_remaining_explanation', sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_hazard_hazards_remaining_explanation'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_incidents_injuries_explanation', sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_hazard_incidents_injuries_explanation'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_notes', sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_hazard_notes'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_status'] ?? 'draft')));
    }

    public function save_customer_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_customer_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_customer_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_company_name', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_name'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', sanitize_email($_POST['dmx_customer_email'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_phone', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_phone'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_address_1', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_address_1'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_address_2', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_address_2'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_city', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_city'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_province', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_province'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_postal_code', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_customer_postal_code'] ?? ''));
        $this->ensure_customer_number($post_id);
    }

    public function save_part_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_part_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_part_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }

        $fields = array(
            'dmx_part_brand','dmx_part_model','dmx_part_internal_sku','dmx_part_supplier_sku','dmx_part_taxable','dmx_part_active','dmx_part_notes','dmx_inventory_low_stock_threshold',
            'dmx_cable_length','dmx_cable_diameter','dmx_cable_construction','dmx_cable_end_type',
            'dmx_spring_wire_size','dmx_spring_inside_diameter','dmx_spring_length','dmx_spring_finish','dmx_spring_wire_type','dmx_spring_wind',
            'dmx_drum_model','dmx_drum_lift_type','dmx_drum_weight_rating','dmx_drum_shaft_size','dmx_drum_side',
            'dmx_roller_size','dmx_roller_material','dmx_roller_stem_type','dmx_roller_application',
            'dmx_hardware_type','dmx_hinge_number','dmx_hinge_type','dmx_top_fixture_type','dmx_bottom_fixture_type','dmx_hardware_track_size','dmx_hardware_application',
            'dmx_shaft_size','dmx_shaft_type','dmx_shaft_finish','dmx_shaft_length','dmx_shaft_application',
            'dmx_bearing_part_type','dmx_bearing_shaft_size','dmx_universal_plate_type','dmx_bearing_application',
            'dmx_weatherstrip_type','dmx_weatherstrip_material','dmx_weatherstrip_color','dmx_weatherstrip_length',
            'dmx_retainer_type','dmx_retainer_shape','dmx_retainer_material','dmx_retainer_size','dmx_retainer_length',
            'dmx_track_type','dmx_track_size','dmx_track_radius','dmx_track_gauge','dmx_vertical_track_length','dmx_horizontal_track_length','dmx_track_application',
            'dmx_strut_type','dmx_strut_size','dmx_strut_gauge','dmx_strut_length','dmx_strut_application',
            'dmx_operator_type','dmx_drive_type','dmx_mounting_style','dmx_horsepower','dmx_voltage','dmx_phase','dmx_duty_type',
            'dmx_door_section_type','dmx_panel_style','dmx_panel_height','dmx_panel_width','dmx_panel_thickness','dmx_door_material_construction','dmx_finish_appearance','dmx_insulation_type','dmx_r_value','dmx_panel_color','dmx_window_configuration',
            'dmx_window_type','dmx_panel_fit','dmx_insert_style','dmx_glass_type','dmx_frame_color','dmx_window_layout','dmx_model_compatibility',
            'dmx_lock_hardware_type','dmx_lock_type','dmx_handle_type','dmx_finish_color','dmx_lock_application_type',
            'dmx_device_type','dmx_sensor_type','dmx_sensor_compatibility','dmx_sensor_voltage','dmx_mounting_type',
            'dmx_rc_device_type','dmx_rc_control_type','dmx_rc_compatibility','dmx_rc_button_configuration','dmx_rc_communication_type','dmx_rc_voltage','dmx_rc_mounting_type',
            'dmx_accessory_type','dmx_accessory_function','dmx_accessory_compatibility','dmx_accessory_voltage','dmx_accessory_mounting_type',
            'dmx_fastener_type','dmx_fastener_size','dmx_fastener_length','dmx_fastener_material_finish','dmx_fastener_head_type','dmx_fastener_thread_type','dmx_fastener_application_type',
            'dmx_product_type','dmx_product_category','dmx_product_size','dmx_product_application',
        );

        foreach ($fields as $field) {
            $value = isset($_POST[$field]) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST[$field])) : '';
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_' . $field, $value);
        }

        /*
         * v5.4.39:
         * Do not save cost/sell price on the master part record. Those values are
         * company-specific and are stored through the company part pricing helpers
         * below. This keeps the WordPress Parts Library neutral and prevents one
         * company, such as GDI Operators, from changing another company's pricing.
         */
    }

    private function get_company_part_prices_store() {
        $all = get_option('dmx_company_part_prices', array());
        return is_array($all) ? $all : array();
    }

    private function get_company_part_price_company_key($company_key = '') {
        $company_key = $company_key !== '' ? sanitize_title((string) $company_key) : sanitize_title((string) $this->get_current_user_company_key());

        if ($company_key === '') {
            $company_key = 'global';
        }

        return $company_key;
    }

    private function get_company_part_price_row($part_id, $company_key = '') {
        $part_id = absint($part_id);
        if ($part_id <= 0) {
            return array();
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_company_part_price_company_key($company_key);
        $all = $this->get_company_part_prices_store();

        return (!empty($all[$company_key][$part_id]) && is_array($all[$company_key][$part_id])) ? $all[$company_key][$part_id] : array();
    }

    private function get_company_part_price_value($part_id, $field = 'sell_price', $default = '') {
        $field = $field === 'cost' ? 'cost' : 'sell_price';
        $row = $this->get_company_part_price_row($part_id);

        if (isset($row[$field]) && $row[$field] !== '') {
            return $row[$field];
        }

        return $default;
    }

    private function update_company_part_price_value($part_id, $field, $value, $company_key = '') {
        $part_id = absint($part_id);
        $field = $field === 'cost' ? 'cost' : 'sell_price';
        $value = $this->sanitize_decimal($value);

        if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE || $value === '') {
            return false;
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_company_part_price_company_key($company_key);
        $all = $this->get_company_part_prices_store();

        if (empty($all[$company_key]) || !is_array($all[$company_key])) {
            $all[$company_key] = array();
        }

        if (empty($all[$company_key][$part_id]) || !is_array($all[$company_key][$part_id])) {
            $all[$company_key][$part_id] = array();
        }

        $all[$company_key][$part_id][$field] = $value;
        $all[$company_key][$part_id]['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
        $all[$company_key][$part_id]['updated_by'] = get_current_user_id();

        update_option('dmx_company_part_prices', $all, false);
        return true;
    }

    private function sanitize_decimal($value) {
        $value = is_string($value) ? str_replace(',', '', wp_unslash($value)) : $value;
        if ($value === '' || $value === null) {
            return '';
        }
        if (!is_numeric($value)) {
            return '';
        }
        return number_format((float) $value, 2, '.', '');
    }


    private function get_quote_site_check_defaults() {
        return array(
            'status' => 'not_started',
            'checked_by' => '',
            'date' => '',
            'ready_to_order' => 'no',
            'dimensions_verified' => 'no',
            'framing_confirmed' => 'no',
            'follow_up_required' => 'no',
            'opening_width' => '',
            'opening_height' => '',
            'confirmed_width' => '',
            'confirmed_height' => '',
            'headroom_left' => '',
            'headroom_center' => '',
            'headroom_right' => '',
            'headroom_lowest' => '',
            'sideroom_left' => '',
            'sideroom_right' => '',
            'backroom' => '',
            'framing_suitable' => 'no',
            'obstructions_present' => 'no',
            'obstruction_notes' => '',
            'door_type_required' => '',
            'track_type_required' => '',
            'lift_type_required' => '',
            'changes_needed' => 'no',
            'required_changes' => '',
            'notes' => '',
        );
    }

    private function get_quote_site_check_request_data() {
        $defaults = $this->get_quote_site_check_defaults();
        $data = array();

        foreach ($defaults as $key => $default) {
            $request_key = 'site_check_' . $key;
            $value = isset($_POST[$request_key]) ? wp_unslash($_POST[$request_key]) : $default;
            if ($key === 'date') {
                $value = preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', (string) $value) ? $value : '';
            } else {
                $value = sanitize_text_field($value);
            }
            $data[$key] = $value;
        }

        foreach (array('ready_to_order', 'dimensions_verified', 'framing_confirmed', 'follow_up_required', 'framing_suitable', 'obstructions_present', 'changes_needed') as $yes_no_key) {
            $data[$yes_no_key] = ($data[$yes_no_key] === 'yes') ? 'yes' : 'no';
        }

        if (!in_array($data['status'], array('not_started', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'review_needed'), true)) {
            $data['status'] = 'not_started';
        }

        return $data;
    }

    private function save_quote_site_check_meta($post_id, $site_check) {
        if (!is_array($site_check)) {
            $site_check = $this->get_quote_site_check_defaults();
        }

        foreach ($this->get_quote_site_check_defaults() as $key => $default) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_quote_site_check_' . $key, isset($site_check[$key]) ? $site_check[$key] : $default);
        }
    }

    private function get_quote_site_check_meta($post_id) {
        $data = $this->get_quote_site_check_defaults();

        foreach ($data as $key => $default) {
            $value = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_quote_site_check_' . $key, true);
            if ($value !== '') {
                $data[$key] = $value;
            }
        }

        return $data;
    }

    private function can_save_meta($post_id, $nonce_field, $nonce_action) {
        if (!isset($_POST[$nonce_field])) {
            return false;
        }

        if (!wp_verify_nonce($_POST[$nonce_field], $nonce_action)) {
            return false;
        }

        if (defined('DOING_AUTOSAVE') && DOING_AUTOSAVE) {
            return false;
        }

        if (!current_user_can('edit_post', $post_id)) {
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    public function protect_single_records() {
        if (is_singular(array('dm_quote', 'dm_supplier_request', 'dm_invoice', 'dm_work_order', 'dm_sales_appointment', 'dm_inspection', 'dm_customer', self::PART_POST_TYPE, self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE))) {
            if (!current_user_can('read')) {
                wp_die('Access denied.');
            }
        }
    }

    private function user_can_access_portal() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options')
            || current_user_can('administrator')
            || current_user_can(self::STAFF_ROLE)
            || current_user_can(self::MANAGER_ROLE)
            || current_user_can(self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE)
            || current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE)
            || current_user_can(self::COORDINATOR_ROLE)
            || current_user_can(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE)
            || current_user_can(self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE)
            || current_user_can(self::PARTS_ROLE)
            || current_user_can(self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE)
            || current_user_can(self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE);
    }

    public function maybe_hide_front_admin_bar($show) {
        if (is_admin() || !is_user_logged_in()) {
            return $show;
        }

        if ($this->user_can_access_portal()) {
            return false;
        }

        return $show;
    }

    private function current_user_is_portal_manager() {
        return current_user_can('administrator') || current_user_can(self::MANAGER_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_is_accounting() {
        return current_user_can(self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_can_manage_team() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || current_user_can(self::MANAGER_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_is_coordinator() {
        return current_user_can(self::COORDINATOR_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_is_sales() {
        return current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_is_helper() {
        return current_user_can(self::STAFF_ROLE) && !current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_has_role_or_requested_role($role) {
        $role = (string) $role;
        if ($role === '') {
            return false;
        }

        $user = wp_get_current_user();
        if ($user && $user->exists()) {
            $roles = isset($user->roles) ? (array) $user->roles : array();
            if (in_array($role, $roles, true)) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        if (current_user_can($role)) {
            return true;
        }

        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
        if ($current_user_id <= 0 || !$this->is_user_portal_approved($current_user_id)) {
            return false;
        }

        return get_user_meta($current_user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', true) === $role;
    }

    private function current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep() {
        return $this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::SALES_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_supplier_requests() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options')
            || $this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::MANAGER_ROLE)
            || $this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep();
    }

    private function current_user_is_technician() {
        return current_user_can(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_is_warehouse() {
        return current_user_can(self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_is_parts() {
        return current_user_can(self::PARTS_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_is_receptionist() {
        return current_user_can(self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_is_subcontractor() {
        return current_user_can(self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_reports() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_accounting();
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_accounting() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options')
            || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()
            || $this->current_user_is_accounting()
            || $this->user_can_create_subcontractor_pos(0, false);
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_settings() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager();
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_sales_workflow() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator() || $this->current_user_is_sales() || $this->current_user_is_technician() || $this->current_user_is_receptionist();
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_scheduler() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options')
            || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()
            || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()
            || $this->current_user_is_receptionist()
            || $this->current_user_is_technician()
            || $this->current_user_is_subcontractor()
            || $this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep();
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_dashboard_technician_schedule() {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_scheduler()) {
            return false;
        }

        $is_sales_only_schedule_viewer = $this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep()
            && !current_user_can('manage_options')
            && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()
            && !$this->current_user_is_coordinator()
            && !$this->current_user_is_technician()
            && !$this->current_user_is_subcontractor();

        return !$is_sales_only_schedule_viewer;
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_sales_scheduler() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator() || $this->current_user_is_receptionist() || current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_can_manage_sales_appointments() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator() || current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_can_reschedule_sales_appointments() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator() || current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_inventory_and_costs() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options')
            || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()
            || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()
            || $this->current_user_is_technician()
            || $this->current_user_is_accounting()
            || $this->current_user_is_warehouse()
            || $this->current_user_is_parts();
    }

    private function get_inventory_menu_label() {
        return 'Inventory';
    }


    private function current_user_can_view_customers_tab() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_accounting() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator() || $this->current_user_is_receptionist() || $this->current_user_is_sales() || $this->current_user_is_technician() || $this->current_user_is_warehouse() || $this->current_user_is_parts();
    }

    private function current_user_can_add_customers() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options')
            || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()
            || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()
            || $this->current_user_is_sales()
            || $this->current_user_is_technician();
    }

    private function current_user_can_manage_customers() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options')
            || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()
            || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()
            || $this->current_user_is_sales();
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_messages() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->user_can_access_portal();
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_tab($tab) {
        switch ($tab) {
            case 'overview':
            case 'calculators':
            case 'inspections':
            case 'help':
                return true;
            case 'messages':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_messages();
            case 'subcontractors':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_subcontractors();
            case 'sales':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_sales_workflow();
            case 'sales_scheduler':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_sales_scheduler() && $this->company_has_feature('scheduler');
            case 'scheduler':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_scheduler() && $this->company_has_feature('scheduler');
            case 'costs':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_inventory_and_costs();
            case 'accounting':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_accounting();
            case 'reports':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_reports();
            case 'customers':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_customers_tab();
            case 'staff':
                return $this->can_view_team_tab();
            case 'settings':
                return $this->current_user_can_view_settings();
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }

    private function current_user_can_create_work_orders() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator();
    }

    private function current_user_can_reschedule_work_orders() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator();
    }

    private function post_matches_current_company($post_id) {
        $post_id = absint($post_id);
        if ($post_id <= 0) {
            return false;
        }

        $current_company_key = (string) $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($current_company_key === '') {
            return true;
        }

        $post_company_key = (string) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_company_key', true);
        if ($post_company_key === '') {
            return true;
        }

        return $post_company_key === $current_company_key;
    }

    private function current_user_can_access_work_order($work_order_id) {
        $work_order_id = absint($work_order_id);
        if ($work_order_id <= 0 || get_post_type($work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order') {
            return false;
        }

        if (!$this->post_matches_current_company($work_order_id)) {
            return false;
        }

        if (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()) {
            return true;
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $primary_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
        $additional = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
        if (!is_array($additional)) {
            $additional = array();
        }
        if ($primary_id === $user_id || in_array($user_id, array_map('absint', $additional), true)) {
            return true;
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_technician()) {
            $user_id = get_current_user_id();
            $primary_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
            if ($primary_id === $user_id) {
                return true;
            }

            $additional = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
            if (!is_array($additional)) {
                $additional = array();
            }

            return in_array($user_id, array_map('absint', $additional), true);
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_warehouse()) {
            return get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_requires_warehouse_pull', true) === 'yes';
        }

        return (int) get_post_field('post_author', $work_order_id) === get_current_user_id();
    }

    private function current_user_can_access_invoice($invoice_id) {
        $invoice_id = absint($invoice_id);
        if ($invoice_id <= 0 || get_post_type($invoice_id) !== 'dm_invoice') {
            return false;
        }

        if (!$this->post_matches_current_company($invoice_id)) {
            return false;
        }

        if (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator() || $this->current_user_is_receptionist() || $this->current_user_is_sales()) {
            return true;
        }

        if ((int) get_post_field('post_author', $invoice_id) === get_current_user_id()) {
            return true;
        }

        $source_work_order_id = absint(get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', true));
        if ($source_work_order_id > 0 && $this->current_user_can_access_work_order($source_work_order_id)) {
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_assigned_work_orders() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator() || $this->current_user_is_technician();
    }

    private function current_user_can_see_sales_work_order_tiles() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator();
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_sales_subtab($subtab) {
        $subtab = sanitize_key((string) $subtab);
        if ($subtab === '') {
            return $this->current_user_can_view_sales_workflow();
        }

        if ($subtab === 'supplier_requests') {
            return $this->current_user_can_view_supplier_requests();
        }

        if (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return true;
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_coordinator()) {
            return in_array($subtab, array('work_orders', 'quotes', 'invoices'), true);
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_accounting()) {
            return in_array($subtab, array('invoices', 'payments'), true);
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_receptionist()) {
            return in_array($subtab, array('invoices', 'payments'), true);
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep()) {
            return in_array($subtab, array('quotes', 'invoices', 'supplier_requests'), true);
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_sales()) {
            return in_array($subtab, array('quotes', 'invoices'), true);
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_technician()) {
            return in_array($subtab, array('work_orders', 'quotes', 'invoices'), true);
        }

        return false;
    }

    private function current_user_can_view_costs_subtab($subtab) {
        $subtab = sanitize_key((string) $subtab);
        if ($subtab === '') {
            return $this->current_user_can_view_inventory_and_costs();
        }

        if (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return true;
        }

        return $subtab === 'inventory' && $this->current_user_can_view_inventory_and_costs();
    }

    private function can_manage_inventory() {
        return current_user_can('administrator')
            || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()
            || $this->current_user_is_warehouse()
            || $this->current_user_is_parts();
    }

    private function can_view_team_tab() {
        return $this->current_user_can_manage_team();
    }

    public function maybe_redirect_portal_users_from_backend() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in() || !is_admin()) {
            return;
        }

        if (wp_doing_ajax()) {
            return;
        }

        if (current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return;
        }

        if (!$this->user_can_access_portal()) {
            return;
        }

        wp_safe_redirect($this->get_portal_page_url());
        exit;
    }

    public function handle_public_auth_actions() {
        if (!empty($_POST['dmx_public_action'])) {
            $action = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_public_action']));
            if ($action === 'register_company_account') {
                $this->handle_company_signup();
            } elseif ($action === 'register_team_account') {
                $this->handle_team_signup();
            }
        }
    }


    private function handle_company_signup() {
        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('success', 'You are already logged in.', 'company');
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['dmx_public_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_public_nonce']), 'dmx_public_signup')) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Security check failed. Please try again.', 'company');
        }

        $company_name = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_signup_company_name'] ?? ''));
        $full_name = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_signup_full_name'] ?? ''));
        $email = sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_signup_email'] ?? ''));
        $phone = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_signup_phone'] ?? ''));
        $password = (string) ($_POST['dmx_signup_password'] ?? '');
        $confirm_password = (string) ($_POST['dmx_signup_password_confirm'] ?? '');

        if ($company_name === '' || $full_name === '' || $email === '' || $password === '') {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Company name, full name, email, and password are required.', 'company');
        }

        if (!is_email($email)) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Please enter a valid email address.', 'company');
        }

        if (email_exists($email)) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'That email address is already in use.', 'company');
        }

        if (strlen($password) < 8) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Password must be at least 8 characters long.', 'company');
        }

        if ($password !== $confirm_password) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Passwords do not match.', 'company');
        }

        if ($this->get_company_manager_by_name($company_name)) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'That company already has a manager account. Please log in, or have your company manager create any additional team accounts.', 'company');
        }

        $user_id = $this->create_portal_user_account($company_name, $full_name, $email, $phone, $password, self::MANAGER_ROLE);

        if (is_wp_error($user_id)) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', $user_id->get_error_message(), 'company');
        }

        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_account_status', 'pending');
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', self::MANAGER_ROLE);
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_is_company_owner', 'yes');
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_needs_company_setup', 'yes');
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_at', '');
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_by', '');

        $this->notify_owner_of_pending_account_request($user_id);
        $this->notify_user_account_request_received($user_id, true);

        $this->redirect_to_signup_target('success', 'Your company account request was received. DoorMatrix admin approval is required before you can log in. Your 14-day free trial with full DoorMatrix access will start once approved.', 'company');
    }

    private function handle_team_signup() {
        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('success', 'You are already logged in.', 'join');
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['dmx_public_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_public_nonce']), 'dmx_public_signup')) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Security check failed. Please try again.', 'join');
        }

        $company_name = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_signup_company_name'] ?? ''));
        $full_name = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_signup_full_name'] ?? ''));
        $email = sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_signup_email'] ?? ''));
        $phone = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_signup_phone'] ?? ''));
        $requested_role = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_signup_requested_role'] ?? self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE));
        $password = (string) ($_POST['dmx_signup_password'] ?? '');
        $confirm_password = (string) ($_POST['dmx_signup_password_confirm'] ?? '');

        $allowed_requested_roles = array(self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE, self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE);
        if (!in_array($requested_role, $allowed_requested_roles, true)) {
            $requested_role = self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE;
        }

        if ($company_name === '' || $full_name === '' || $email === '' || $password === '') {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Company name, full name, email, and password are required.', 'join');
        }

        if (!is_email($email)) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Please enter a valid email address.', 'join');
        }

        if (email_exists($email)) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'That email address is already in use.', 'join');
        }

        if (strlen($password) < 8) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Password must be at least 8 characters long.', 'join');
        }

        if ($password !== $confirm_password) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'Passwords do not match.', 'join');
        }

        $manager = $this->get_company_manager_by_name($company_name);
        if (!$manager) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', 'No company account exists for that company yet. Have the company request its first company manager account first.', 'join');
        }

        $user_id = $this->create_portal_user_account($company_name, $full_name, $email, $phone, $password, self::STAFF_ROLE);

        if (is_wp_error($user_id)) {
            $this->redirect_to_signup_target('error', $user_id->get_error_message(), 'join');
        }

        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_account_status', 'pending');
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', $requested_role);
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_manager_user_id', $manager->ID);
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_at', '');
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_by', '');

        $this->notify_owner_of_pending_account_request($user_id);
        $this->notify_user_account_request_received($user_id, false);

        $role_label = $this->get_role_label_from_key($requested_role);
        $this->redirect_to_signup_target('success', 'Your ' . $role_label . ' account request was received. DoorMatrix admin approval is required before you can log in.', 'join');
    }

    private function create_portal_user_account($company_name, $full_name, $email, $phone, $password, $role) {
        $username_base = sanitize_user(current(explode('@', $email)), true);
        if ($username_base === '') {
            $username_base = 'doormatrixuser';
        }
        $username = $username_base;
        $counter = 1;
        while (username_exists($username)) {
            $counter++;
            $username = $username_base . $counter;
        }

        $user_id = wp_create_user($username, $password, $email);
        if (is_wp_error($user_id)) {
            return $user_id;
        }

        wp_update_user(array(
            'ID' => $user_id,
            'display_name' => $full_name,
            'first_name' => $full_name,
            'nickname' => $full_name,
        ));

        $user = new WP_User($user_id);
        $user->set_role($role);

        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_signup_company_name', $company_name);
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_key', $this->normalize_company_name($company_name));
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_signup_phone', $phone);

        return $user_id;
    }

    private function normalize_company_name($company_name) {
        $company_name = sanitize_title($company_name);
        return (string) $company_name;
    }

    private function get_portal_role_keys() {
        return array(
            self::MANAGER_ROLE,
            self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE,
            self::STAFF_ROLE,
            self::SALES_ROLE,
            self::COORDINATOR_ROLE,
            self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE,
            self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE,
            self::PARTS_ROLE,
            self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE,
            self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE,
        );
    }

    private function get_portal_owner_email() {
        $email = self::OWNER_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL;
        $filtered = apply_filters('dmx_portal_owner_email', $email);
        if (is_string($filtered) && $filtered !== '') {
            $email = $filtered;
        }
        return sanitize_email($email);
    }

    private function get_portal_approval_url() {
        return admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '-staff');
    }

    private function get_pending_portal_users($company_key = '') {
        $users = get_users(array(
            'orderby' => 'registered',
            'order' => 'DESC',
            'role__in' => $this->get_portal_role_keys(),
        ));

        return array_values(array_filter($users, function($user) use ($company_key) {
            $status = (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_account_status', true);
            if ($status !== 'pending') {
                return false;
            }

            if ($company_key !== '' && (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_company_key', true) !== $company_key) {
                return false;
            }

            return true;
        }));
    }

    private function get_account_request_type_label($user_id) {
        if ((string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_is_company_owner', true) === 'yes') {
            return 'New Company';
        }

        return 'Team Member';
    }

    private function get_company_trials() {
        $trials = get_option('dmx_company_trials', array());
        return is_array($trials) ? $trials : array();
    }

    private function save_company_trials($trials) {
        update_option('dmx_company_trials', is_array($trials) ? $trials : array());
    }

    private function maybe_start_company_trial($company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title($company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return;
        }

        $trials = $this->get_company_trials();
        if (!empty($trials[$company_key]['started_at']) && !empty($trials[$company_key]['ends_at'])) {
            return;
        }

        $start_ts = current_time('timestamp');
        $end_ts = strtotime('+14 days', $start_ts);

        $trials[$company_key] = array(
            'status' => 'trial',
            'started_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s', $start_ts),
            'ends_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s', $end_ts),
            'length_days' => 14,
        );

        if (empty($this->get_company_plans()[$company_key])) {
            $this->set_company_active_plan($company_key, 'starter');
        }

        $this->save_company_trials($trials);
    }

    private function get_company_trial_data($company_key = '') {
        $company_key = $company_key !== '' ? sanitize_title($company_key) : $this->get_current_user_company_key();

        $default = array(
            'status' => 'legacy',
            'started_at' => '',
            'ends_at' => '',
            'days_remaining' => null,
            'expired' => false,
            'activated_at' => '',
            'status_updated_at' => '',
            'status_note' => '',
            'extension_history' => array(),
        );

        if ($company_key === '') {
            $default['status'] = 'none';
            return $default;
        }

        $trials = $this->get_company_trials();
        if (empty($trials[$company_key]) || !is_array($trials[$company_key])) {
            return $default;
        }

        $trial = wp_parse_args($trials[$company_key], array(
            'status' => 'trial',
            'started_at' => '',
            'ends_at' => '',
            'length_days' => 14,
            'activated_at' => '',
            'status_updated_at' => '',
            'status_note' => '',
            'extension_history' => array(),
        ));

        $status = sanitize_key((string) $trial['status']);
        if ($status === '') {
            $status = 'trial';
        }

        $allowed_statuses = array_keys($this->get_company_access_status_options());
        if (!in_array($status, $allowed_statuses, true)) {
            $status = 'trial';
        }

        $data = array(
            'status' => $status,
            'started_at' => (string) $trial['started_at'],
            'ends_at' => (string) $trial['ends_at'],
            'days_remaining' => null,
            'expired' => false,
            'activated_at' => (string) $trial['activated_at'],
            'status_updated_at' => (string) $trial['status_updated_at'],
            'status_note' => (string) $trial['status_note'],
            'extension_history' => is_array($trial['extension_history']) ? $trial['extension_history'] : array(),
        );

        if ($status !== 'trial') {
            return $data;
        }

        $start_ts = $trial['started_at'] ? strtotime($trial['started_at']) : 0;
        $end_ts = $trial['ends_at'] ? strtotime($trial['ends_at']) : 0;
        if ($start_ts <= 0 || $end_ts <= 0) {
            return $default;
        }

        $now_ts = current_time('timestamp');
        $expired = $now_ts > $end_ts;
        $days_remaining = $expired ? 0 : max(0, (int) ceil(($end_ts - $now_ts) / DAY_IN_SECONDS));

        $data['days_remaining'] = $days_remaining;
        $data['expired'] = $expired;

        return $data;
    }

    private function get_company_access_status_options() {
        return array(
            'trial' => 'Trial',
            'active' => 'Active / Paid',
            'past_due' => 'Past Due',
            'suspended' => 'Suspended',
            'cancelled' => 'Cancelled',
        );
    }

    private function normalize_company_access_status($status) {
        $status = sanitize_key((string) $status);
        $allowed = array_keys($this->get_company_access_status_options());
        if (!in_array($status, $allowed, true)) {
            return 'trial';
        }

        return $status;
    }

    private function get_company_access_status_label($status) {
        $status = $this->normalize_company_access_status($status);
        $options = $this->get_company_access_status_options();
        return $options[$status] ?? 'Trial';
    }

    private function company_access_is_locked($company_key = '') {
        $trial = $this->get_company_trial_data($company_key);

        if ($trial['status'] === 'trial') {
            return !empty($trial['expired']);
        }

        return in_array($trial['status'], array('past_due', 'suspended', 'cancelled'), true);
    }

    private function get_company_access_summary($company_key) {
        $trial = $this->get_company_trial_data($company_key);

        if ($trial['status'] === 'trial' && !empty($trial['ends_at'])) {
            $date = date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($trial['ends_at']));
            if (!empty($trial['expired'])) {
                return 'Trial expired • ended ' . $date;
            }

            return 'Trial active • ' . intval($trial['days_remaining']) . ' days left • ends ' . $date;
        }

        if ($trial['status'] === 'legacy') {
            return 'Legacy / not started';
        }

        if ($trial['status'] === 'none') {
            return 'No company';
        }

        $summary = $this->get_company_access_status_label($trial['status']);
        if (!empty($trial['activated_at']) && $trial['status'] === 'active') {
            $summary .= ' • activated ' . date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($trial['activated_at']));
        }

        return $summary;
    }

    private function set_company_access_status($company_key, $status, $trial_end_date = '', $note = '') {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return;
        }

        $status = $this->normalize_company_access_status($status);
        $trials = $this->get_company_trials();
        $existing = (!empty($trials[$company_key]) && is_array($trials[$company_key])) ? $trials[$company_key] : array();

        $now_ts = current_time('timestamp');
        $now_mysql = current_time('mysql');
        $existing = wp_parse_args($existing, array(
            'status' => 'trial',
            'started_at' => '',
            'ends_at' => '',
            'length_days' => 14,
            'activated_at' => '',
            'status_updated_at' => '',
            'status_updated_by' => '',
            'status_note' => '',
            'extension_history' => array(),
        ));

        $existing['status'] = $status;
        $existing['status_updated_at'] = $now_mysql;
        $existing['status_updated_by'] = get_current_user_id();

        if ($note !== '') {
            $existing['status_note'] = sanitize_textarea_field($note);
        }

        if ($status === 'trial') {
            if (empty($existing['started_at'])) {
                $existing['started_at'] = $now_mysql;
            }

            $end_ts = 0;
            $trial_end_date = sanitize_text_field((string) $trial_end_date);
            if ($trial_end_date !== '') {
                $end_ts = strtotime($trial_end_date . ' 23:59:59');
            }

            if ($end_ts <= 0 && !empty($existing['ends_at'])) {
                $end_ts = strtotime($existing['ends_at']);
            }

            if ($end_ts <= $now_ts) {
                $end_ts = strtotime('+14 days', $now_ts);
            }

            $start_ts = strtotime($existing['started_at']);
            $existing['ends_at'] = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', $end_ts);
            $existing['length_days'] = ($start_ts > 0) ? max(1, (int) ceil(($end_ts - $start_ts) / DAY_IN_SECONDS)) : 14;
        } elseif ($status === 'active') {
            if (empty($existing['activated_at'])) {
                $existing['activated_at'] = $now_mysql;
            }
        }

        $trials[$company_key] = $existing;
        $this->save_company_trials($trials);
    }

    private function extend_company_trial_record($company_key, $days, $note = '') {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        $days = absint($days);
        if ($company_key === '' || $days <= 0) {
            return false;
        }

        if ($days > 365) {
            $days = 365;
        }

        $trials = $this->get_company_trials();
        $existing = (!empty($trials[$company_key]) && is_array($trials[$company_key])) ? $trials[$company_key] : array();

        $now_ts = current_time('timestamp');
        $now_mysql = current_time('mysql');
        $existing = wp_parse_args($existing, array(
            'status' => 'trial',
            'started_at' => '',
            'ends_at' => '',
            'length_days' => 14,
            'activated_at' => '',
            'status_updated_at' => '',
            'status_updated_by' => '',
            'status_note' => '',
            'extension_history' => array(),
        ));

        if (empty($existing['started_at'])) {
            $existing['started_at'] = $now_mysql;
        }

        $current_end_ts = !empty($existing['ends_at']) ? strtotime($existing['ends_at']) : 0;
        $base_ts = $current_end_ts > $now_ts ? $current_end_ts : $now_ts;
        $new_end_ts = strtotime('+' . $days . ' days', $base_ts);

        $history = is_array($existing['extension_history']) ? $existing['extension_history'] : array();
        $history[] = array(
            'days' => $days,
            'previous_ends_at' => !empty($existing['ends_at']) ? (string) $existing['ends_at'] : '',
            'new_ends_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s', $new_end_ts),
            'note' => sanitize_textarea_field($note),
            'extended_at' => $now_mysql,
            'extended_by' => get_current_user_id(),
        );

        $start_ts = strtotime($existing['started_at']);
        $existing['status'] = 'trial';
        $existing['ends_at'] = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', $new_end_ts);
        $existing['length_days'] = ($start_ts > 0) ? max(1, (int) ceil(($new_end_ts - $start_ts) / DAY_IN_SECONDS)) : $days;
        $existing['status_updated_at'] = $now_mysql;
        $existing['status_updated_by'] = get_current_user_id();
        $existing['extension_history'] = $history;
        if ($note !== '') {
            $existing['status_note'] = sanitize_textarea_field($note);
        }

        $trials[$company_key] = $existing;
        $this->save_company_trials($trials);

        return true;
    }


    private function get_company_plan_options() {
        return array(
            'starter' => 'Starter',
            'growth' => 'Growth',
            'operations' => 'Operations',
            'enterprise' => 'Enterprise',
        );
    }

    private function normalize_company_plan_key($plan_key) {
        $plan_key = sanitize_key((string) $plan_key);

        // Legacy compatibility: older installs used the Operations key for the $199 plan.
        if ($plan_key === 'full_platform') {
            $plan_key = 'operations';
        }

        $allowed = array_keys($this->get_company_plan_options());
        if (!in_array($plan_key, $allowed, true)) {
            return 'starter';
        }
        return $plan_key;
    }

    private function get_company_plans() {
        $plans = get_option('dmx_company_plans', array());
        return is_array($plans) ? $plans : array();
    }

    private function save_company_plans($plans) {
        update_option('dmx_company_plans', is_array($plans) ? $plans : array());
    }

    private function set_company_active_plan($company_key, $plan_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return;
        }

        $plans = $this->get_company_plans();
        $plans[$company_key] = array(
            'plan' => $this->normalize_company_plan_key($plan_key),
            'updated_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        );
        $this->save_company_plans($plans);
    }

    private function get_company_active_plan($company_key = '') {
        $company_key = $company_key !== '' ? sanitize_title((string) $company_key) : $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return current_user_can('manage_options') ? 'enterprise' : 'starter';
        }

        $plans = $this->get_company_plans();
        if (empty($plans[$company_key]) || !is_array($plans[$company_key])) {
            return 'starter';
        }

        return $this->normalize_company_plan_key($plans[$company_key]['plan'] ?? 'starter');
    }

    private function get_company_effective_plan($company_key = '') {
        $assigned_plan = $this->get_company_active_plan($company_key);
        $trial = $this->get_company_trial_data($company_key);

        if ($trial['status'] === 'trial' && empty($trial['expired'])) {
            return 'enterprise';
        }

        return $assigned_plan;
    }

    private function get_company_plan_label($plan_key) {
        $options = $this->get_company_plan_options();
        $plan_key = $this->normalize_company_plan_key($plan_key);
        return $options[$plan_key] ?? 'Starter';
    }

    private function company_has_feature($feature_key, $company_key = '') {
        if (current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return true;
        }

        $plan_key = $this->get_company_effective_plan($company_key);

        switch ($feature_key) {
            case 'scheduler':
                return in_array($plan_key, array('growth', 'operations', 'enterprise'), true);
            default:
                return true;
        }
    }

    private function get_companies_for_plan_management() {
        $managers = get_users(array(
            'orderby' => 'display_name',
            'order' => 'ASC',
            'role' => self::MANAGER_ROLE,
        ));

        $companies = array();
        foreach ($managers as $manager) {
            $company_key = (string) get_user_meta($manager->ID, '_dmx_company_key', true);
            if ($company_key === '') {
                continue;
            }

            if (isset($companies[$company_key])) {
                continue;
            }

            $companies[$company_key] = array(
                'company_key' => $company_key,
                'company_name' => (string) get_user_meta($manager->ID, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true),
                'manager_name' => $manager->display_name,
                'manager_email' => $manager->user_email,
                'plan' => $this->get_company_active_plan($company_key),
            );
        }

        return array_values($companies);
    }

    private function current_company_trial_is_expired() {
        return $this->company_access_is_locked();
    }

    private function render_current_company_trial_banner() {
        if (current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return '';
        }

        $trial = $this->get_company_trial_data();
        if ($trial['status'] !== 'trial' || empty($trial['ends_at'])) {
            return '';
        }

        $type = ((int) $trial['days_remaining'] <= 3) ? 'error' : 'success';
        $message = '14-day free trial: ' . intval($trial['days_remaining']) . ' day';
        $message .= (intval($trial['days_remaining']) === 1) ? '' : 's';
        $message .= ' left. Full DoorMatrix access is active until ' . date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($trial['ends_at'])) . '.';

        return '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-' . esc_attr($type) . '">' . esc_html($message) . '</div>';
    }

    private function render_trial_expired_screen() {
        $trial = $this->get_company_trial_data();
        $company_name = $this->get_current_user_company_name();
        $owner_email = $this->get_portal_owner_email();

        $headline = ($company_name !== '' ? $company_name . "'s" : 'Your') . ' DoorMatrix access needs attention.';
        $details = 'Your company data is safely saved. Once the account is activated again, you can continue from where you left off.';

        if ($trial['status'] === 'trial' && !empty($trial['expired'])) {
            $headline = ($company_name !== '' ? $company_name . "'s" : 'Your') . ' 14-day free trial has ended';
            if (!empty($trial['ends_at'])) {
                $headline .= ' on ' . date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($trial['ends_at']));
            }
            $details = 'Choose a paid DoorMatrix plan to continue. Your quotes, invoices, customers, inventory, schedules, settings, and files are still saved.';
        } elseif ($trial['status'] === 'past_due') {
            $headline = 'This DoorMatrix account is past due.';
            $details = 'Your company data is still saved. Please update payment or contact DoorMatrix to reactivate access.';
        } elseif ($trial['status'] === 'suspended') {
            $headline = 'This DoorMatrix account is currently suspended.';
            $details = 'Your company data is still saved. Please contact DoorMatrix to restore access.';
        } elseif ($trial['status'] === 'cancelled') {
            $headline = 'This DoorMatrix account is currently cancelled.';
            $details = 'Your company data is still saved for reactivation according to the DoorMatrix retention process.';
        }

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-portal-wrap">
            <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">
                <?php echo esc_html($headline); ?>.
                <?php if ($owner_email !== '') : ?>
                    Contact <?php echo esc_html($owner_email); ?> to activate or update the account.
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-help-box" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
                <p><?php echo esc_html($details); ?></p>
            </div>
            <?php echo $this->render_public_plan_cards(); ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
