    private function render_public_plan_cards() {
        $plans = $this->get_public_plan_definitions();
        if (empty($plans)) {
            return '';
        }

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-auth-plan-grid">
            <?php foreach ($plans as $plan) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-auth-plan-card">
                    <div class="dmx-auth-plan-name"><?php echo esc_html($plan['name']); ?></div>
                    <div class="dmx-auth-plan-price"><?php echo esc_html($plan['price']); ?></div>
                    <div class="dmx-auth-plan-users"><?php echo esc_html($plan['users']); ?></div>
                    <ul class="dmx-auth-plan-list">
                        <?php foreach ($plan['features'] as $feature) : ?>
                            <li><?php echo esc_html($feature); ?></li>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function send_portal_notification_email($to_email, $subject, $body) {
        $to_email = sanitize_email($to_email);
        if ($to_email === '') {
            return false;
        }

        $from_email = $this->get_portal_owner_email();
        $headers = array('Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8');

        if ($from_email !== '') {
            $headers[] = 'From: DoorMatrix <' . $from_email . '>';
            $headers[] = 'Reply-To: DoorMatrix <' . $from_email . '>';
        }

        return wp_mail($to_email, $subject, $body, $headers);
    }

    private function notify_owner_of_pending_account_request($user_id) {
        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            return;
        }

        $owner_email = $this->get_portal_owner_email();
        if ($owner_email === '') {
            return;
        }

        $company_name = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true);
        $request_type = $this->get_account_request_type_label($user_id);
        $requested_role = $this->get_role_label_from_key((string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', true));

        $subject = 'DoorMatrix approval needed - ' . ($company_name !== '' ? $company_name : $user->display_name);
        $body = "A DoorMatrix portal account is pending owner approval.\n\n";
        $body .= "Request Type: " . $request_type . "\n";
        $body .= "Company: " . $company_name . "\n";
        $body .= "Name: " . $user->display_name . "\n";
        $body .= "Email: " . $user->user_email . "\n";
        $body .= "Requested Role: " . $requested_role . "\n\n";
        $body .= "Review here: " . $this->get_portal_approval_url();

        $this->send_portal_notification_email($owner_email, $subject, $body);
    }

    private function notify_company_manager_of_team_request($manager_user_id, $user_id) {
        $manager = get_userdata($manager_user_id);
        $user = get_userdata($user_id);

        if (!$manager || !$user) {
            return;
        }

        $company_name = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true);
        $requested_role = $this->get_role_label_from_key((string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', true));

        $subject = 'DoorMatrix team request received - ' . ($company_name !== '' ? $company_name : 'Your Company');
        $body = "A team access request was submitted for your company.\n\n";
        $body .= "Company: " . $company_name . "\n";
        $body .= "Name: " . $user->display_name . "\n";
        $body .= "Email: " . $user->user_email . "\n";
        $body .= "Requested Role: " . $requested_role . "\n\n";
        $body .= "DoorMatrix admin will review this request before the user can log in.";

        $this->send_portal_notification_email($manager->user_email, $subject, $body);
    }

    private function notify_user_account_request_received($user_id, $is_company_request = false) {
        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            return;
        }

        $company_name = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true);
        $owner_email = $this->get_portal_owner_email();
        $subject = 'DoorMatrix account request received';
        $body = "We received your DoorMatrix portal request.\n\n";
        $body .= "Company: " . $company_name . "\n";
        $body .= "Name: " . $user->display_name . "\n";

        if ($is_company_request) {
            $body .= "\nDoorMatrix admin approval is required before your company can access the portal. Your 14-day free trial with full DoorMatrix access will start after approval.";
        } else {
            $body .= "\nDoorMatrix admin approval is required before you can log in.";
        }

        if ($owner_email !== '') {
            $body .= "\n\nApproval contact: " . $owner_email;
        }

        $this->send_portal_notification_email($user->user_email, $subject, $body);
    }

    private function notify_user_account_approved($user_id) {
        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            return;
        }

        $company_name = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true);
        $role_label = $this->get_role_label_from_key((string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', true));
        $trial = $this->get_company_trial_data((string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_key', true));

        $subject = 'DoorMatrix account approved';
        $body = "Your DoorMatrix portal account has been approved.\n\n";
        $body .= "Company: " . $company_name . "\n";
        $body .= "Role: " . $role_label . "\n";
        $body .= "Portal: " . $this->get_portal_page_url() . "\n";

        if ((string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_is_company_owner', true) === 'yes' && $trial['status'] === 'trial' && !empty($trial['ends_at'])) {
            $body .= "\nYour 14-day free trial is now active and includes full DoorMatrix access until " . date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($trial['ends_at'])) . ".";
        }

        $this->send_portal_notification_email($user->user_email, $subject, $body);
    }

    private function notify_user_account_denied($user_id) {
        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            return;
        }

        $company_name = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true);
        $owner_email = $this->get_portal_owner_email();
        $subject = 'DoorMatrix account request not approved';
        $body = "Your DoorMatrix portal request was not approved at this time.\n\n";
        $body .= "Company: " . $company_name . "\n";
        $body .= "If you believe this was a mistake, please contact " . ($owner_email !== '' ? $owner_email : 'DoorMatrix') . ".";

        $this->send_portal_notification_email($user->user_email, $subject, $body);
    }

    private function get_company_manager_by_name($company_name) {
        $users = get_users(array(
            'number' => 1,
            'role' => self::MANAGER_ROLE,
            'meta_key' => '_dmx_company_key',
            'meta_value' => $this->normalize_company_name($company_name),
        ));
        return !empty($users) ? $users[0] : null;
    }

    private function get_current_user_company_key() {
        if ($this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode) {
            return $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_key;
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        if (!$user_id) {
            return '';
        }
        return (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_key', true);
    }

    private function get_current_user_company_name() {
        if ($this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode) {
            return $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_name;
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        if (!$user_id) {
            return '';
        }
        return (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true);
    }

    private function get_company_owned_post_types() {
        return array(
            'dm_quote',
            'dm_supplier_request',
            'dm_invoice',
            'dm_work_order',
            'dm_sales_appointment',
            'dm_inspection',
            self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE,
            'dm_customer',
            'dm_subcontractor_po',
            'dm_subcontractor_invoice',
        );
    }

    private function apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, $post_type = '') {
        if ($this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode) {
            if ($post_type === '') {
                $post_type = $args['post_type'] ?? '';
            }

            $post_types = is_array($post_type) ? $post_type : array($post_type);
            $company_owned_post_types = $this->get_company_owned_post_types();
            foreach ($post_types as $single_post_type) {
                if (in_array($single_post_type, $company_owned_post_types, true)) {
                    $args['post__in'] = array(0);
                    return $args;
                }
            }
        }

        if (current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return $args;
        }

        if ($post_type === '') {
            $post_type = $args['post_type'] ?? '';
        }

        $post_types = is_array($post_type) ? $post_type : array($post_type);
        $company_owned_post_types = $this->get_company_owned_post_types();
        $needs_company_scope = false;

        foreach ($post_types as $single_post_type) {
            if (in_array($single_post_type, $company_owned_post_types, true)) {
                $needs_company_scope = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (!$needs_company_scope) {
            return $args;
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($company_key === '') {
            $args['post__in'] = array(0);
            return $args;
        }

        $company_clause = array(
            'key' => '_dmx_company_key',
            'value' => $company_key,
            'compare' => '=',
        );

        if (empty($args['meta_query']) || !is_array($args['meta_query'])) {
            $args['meta_query'] = array($company_clause);
            return $args;
        }

        $existing_meta_query = $args['meta_query'];
        $args['meta_query'] = array(
            'relation' => 'AND',
            $company_clause,
            $existing_meta_query,
        );

        return $args;
    }

    private function current_user_can_edit_quote_record($quote_id) {
        $quote_id = absint($quote_id);
        if ($quote_id <= 0 || get_post_type($quote_id) !== 'dm_quote') {
            return false;
        }

        if (current_user_can('manage_options') || current_user_can('edit_post', $quote_id)) {
            return true;
        }

        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('quotes')) {
            return false;
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return false;
        }

        return (string) get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_company_key', true) === $company_key;
    }

    private function stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id) {
        $post_id = absint($post_id);
        if ($post_id <= 0) {
            return;
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return;
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_company_key', $company_key);
    }

    private function backfill_existing_company_keys() {
        foreach ($this->get_company_owned_post_types() as $post_type) {
            $post_ids = get_posts(array(
                'post_type' => $post_type,
                'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
                'posts_per_page' => -1,
                'fields' => 'ids',
            ));

            if (empty($post_ids)) {
                continue;
            }

            foreach ($post_ids as $post_id) {
                if (get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_company_key', true) !== '') {
                    continue;
                }

                $author_id = (int) get_post_field('post_author', $post_id);
                if ($author_id <= 0) {
                    continue;
                }

                $company_key = (string) get_user_meta($author_id, '_dmx_company_key', true);
                if ($company_key === '') {
                    continue;
                }

                update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_company_key', $company_key);
            }
        }
    }

    private function get_company_users($company_key, $roles = array(), $status = '') {
        $args = array(
            'orderby' => 'display_name',
            'order' => 'ASC',
            'meta_key' => '_dmx_company_key',
            'meta_value' => $company_key,
        );

        if (!empty($roles)) {
            $args['role__in'] = $roles;
        }

        $users = get_users($args);

        if ($status !== '') {
            $users = array_values(array_filter($users, function($user) use ($status) {
                return get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_account_status', true) === $status;
            }));
        }

        return $users;
    }

    private function is_user_portal_approved($user_id) {
        if (!$user_id) {
            return false;
        }
        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            return false;
        }
        if (user_can($user, 'manage_options')) {
            return true;
        }
        $status = get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_account_status', true);
        if ($status === '') {
            return true;
        }
        return $status === 'approved';
    }

    public function block_unapproved_portal_login($user, $username, $password) {
        if ($user instanceof WP_User) {
            $is_portal_user = array_intersect((array) $user->roles, array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE, self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE));
            if (!empty($is_portal_user) && !$this->is_user_portal_approved($user->ID)) {
                $status = (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_account_status', true);
                $message = 'Your DoorMatrix account is pending DoorMatrix admin approval.';
                if ($status === 'inactive') {
                    $message = 'Your DoorMatrix account is inactive. Please contact your company manager.';
                } elseif ($status === 'rejected') {
                    $message = 'Your DoorMatrix account is not approved. Please contact DoorMatrix support.';
                }
                return new WP_Error('dmx_account_pending', $message);
            }
        }
        return $user;
    }

    private function redirect_to_signup_target($type, $message, $auth_view = 'company') {
        if (!in_array($auth_view, array('login', 'company', 'join'), true)) {
            $auth_view = 'company';
        }

        $target = add_query_arg(array(
            'dmx_auth' => $auth_view,
            'dmx_msg_type' => $type,
            'dmx_msg' => rawurlencode($message),
        ), $this->get_portal_page_url());
        wp_safe_redirect($target);
        exit;
    }

    private function get_portal_page_url() {
        global $post;
        if ($post instanceof WP_Post) {
            return get_permalink($post);
        }

        $pages = get_posts(array(
            'post_type' => 'page',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => 1,
            's' => '[doormatrix_portal]',
        ));

        if (!empty($pages)) {
            return get_permalink($pages[0]->ID);
        }

        return home_url('/');
    }

    public function handle_form_actions() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in() || empty($_POST['dmx_portal_action'])) {
            return;
        }

        $action = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_portal_action']);
        $tab = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_tab'] ?? 'overview');
        $subtab = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_subtab'] ?? '');

        if (!isset($_POST['dmx_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST['dmx_nonce'], 'dmx_portal_submit')) {
            return;
        }

        if (!$this->user_can_access_portal()) {
            return;
        }

        switch ($action) {
            case 'create_quote':
                $this->create_quote($tab);
                break;
            case 'update_quote':
                $this->update_quote($tab);
                break;
            case 'delete_quote_document':
                $this->delete_quote_document($tab);
                break;
            case 'create_inventory_location':
                $this->create_inventory_location($tab);
                break;
            case 'receive_inventory_stock':
                $this->receive_inventory_stock($tab);
                break;
            case 'transfer_inventory_stock':
                $this->transfer_inventory_stock($tab);
                break;
            case 'adjust_inventory_stock':
                $this->adjust_inventory_stock($tab);
                break;
            case 'use_inventory_stock':
                $this->use_inventory_stock($tab);
                break;
            case 'submit_truck_inventory_request':
                $this->submit_truck_inventory_request($tab);
                break;
            case 'process_truck_inventory_request':
                $this->process_truck_inventory_request($tab);
                break;
            case 'create_supplier_request':
                $this->create_supplier_request($tab);
                break;
            case 'create_generic_purchase_order':
                $this->create_generic_purchase_order($tab);
                break;
            case 'create_invoice':
                $this->create_invoice($tab);
                break;
            case 'update_invoice':
                $this->update_invoice($tab);
                break;
            case 'convert_quote_to_invoice':
                $this->convert_quote_to_invoice($tab);
                break;
            case 'send_quote':
                $this->send_document_email('quote', $tab);
                break;
            case 'send_invoice':
                $this->send_document_email('invoice', $tab);
                break;
            case 'mark_invoice_paid':
                $this->mark_invoice_paid($tab);
                break;
            case 'create_company_expense':
                $this->create_company_expense($tab);
                break;
            case 'timecard_check_in':
                $this->handle_my_timecard_check_in($tab);
                break;

                $this->handle_my_timecard_check_out($tab);

                $this->submit_my_timesheet($tab);

    private function handle_document_photo_uploads($post_id, $input_name) {
        if ($post_id <= 0 || empty($_FILES[$input_name])) {
            return;
        }

        $existing = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_document_photos', true);
        if (!is_array($existing)) {
            $existing = array();
        }

        $files = $_FILES[$input_name];
        $uploaded_rows = array();

        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/media.php';
        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';

        $allowed_mimes = array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png' => 'image/png',
            'gif' => 'image/gif',
            'webp' => 'image/webp',
        );

        if (is_array($files['name'])) {
            $file_count = count($files['name']);
            for ($i = 0; $i < $file_count; $i++) {
                if (empty($files['name'][$i]) || (int) $files['error'][$i] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
                    continue;
                }

                $single = array(
                    'name' => $files['name'][$i],
                    'type' => $files['type'][$i],
                    'tmp_name' => $files['tmp_name'][$i],
                    'error' => $files['error'][$i],
                    'size' => $files['size'][$i],
                );

                $upload = wp_handle_upload($single, array(
                    'test_form' => false,
                    'mimes' => $allowed_mimes,
                ));

                if (!empty($upload['error']) || empty($upload['file'])) {
                    continue;
                }

                $attachment = array(
                    'post_mime_type' => $upload['type'],
                    'post_title' => sanitize_file_name(pathinfo($single['name'], PATHINFO_FILENAME)),
                    'post_status' => 'inherit',
                );

                $attachment_id = wp_insert_attachment($attachment, $upload['file'], $post_id);
                if ($attachment_id && !is_wp_error($attachment_id)) {
                    $metadata = wp_generate_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $upload['file']);
                    if (!is_wp_error($metadata)) {
                        wp_update_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $metadata);
                    }

                    $uploaded_rows[] = array(
                        'id' => (int) $attachment_id,
                        'name' => sanitize_file_name($single['name']),
                        'url' => wp_get_attachment_url($attachment_id),
                    );
                }
            }
        }

        if (!empty($uploaded_rows)) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_document_photos', array_merge($existing, $uploaded_rows));
        }
    }

    private function get_document_photos($post_id) {
        $photos = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_document_photos', true);
        return is_array($photos) ? $photos : array();
    }

    private function render_document_photo_upload_field($post_id, $input_name, $label = 'Attach Photos') {
        $photos = $post_id > 0 ? $this->get_document_photos($post_id) : array();

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-field">
            <label><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></label>
            <input type="file" name="<?php echo esc_attr($input_name); ?>[]" accept="image/*" multiple>
            <div class="dmx-inline-note">Upload site photos, damage photos, or reference images. JPG, PNG, GIF, and WEBP supported.</div>
            <?php if (!empty($photos)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-mini-links" style="margin-top:10px;">
                    <?php foreach ($photos as $photo) : ?>
                        <a href="<?php echo esc_url($photo['url'] ?? ''); ?>" target="_blank"><?php echo esc_html($photo['name'] ?? 'Photo'); ?></a>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }



    private function get_quote_document_categories() {
        return array(
            'autocad_drawing' => 'AutoCAD Drawing',
            'customer_drawing' => 'Customer Drawing',
            'site_photo' => 'Site Photo',
            'spec_sheet' => 'Specification Sheet',
            'supplier_quote' => 'Supplier Quote',
            'manufacturer_document' => 'Manufacturer Document',
            'installation_detail' => 'Installation Detail',
            'other' => 'Other',
        );
    }

    private function handle_quote_document_uploads($post_id) {
        if ($post_id <= 0 || empty($_FILES['quote_documents'])) {
            return;
        }

        $existing = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_quote_documents', true);
        if (!is_array($existing)) {
            $existing = array();
        }

        $notes = isset($_POST['quote_document_notes']) ? wp_unslash($_POST['quote_document_notes']) : array();
        $categories = isset($_POST['quote_document_category']) ? wp_unslash($_POST['quote_document_category']) : array();
        $files = $_FILES['quote_documents'];

        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/media.php';
        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';

        $allowed_mimes = array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png' => 'image/png',
            'pdf' => 'application/pdf',
            'doc' => 'application/msword',
            'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'xls' => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
            'xlsx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
            'dwg' => 'application/acad',
            'dxf' => 'application/dxf',
        );

        $uploaded_rows = array();

        if (is_array($files['name'])) {
            $file_count = count($files['name']);
            for ($i = 0; $i < $file_count; $i++) {
                if (empty($files['name'][$i]) || (int) $files['error'][$i] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
                    continue;
                }

                $single = array(
                    'name' => $files['name'][$i],
                    'type' => $files['type'][$i],
                    'tmp_name' => $files['tmp_name'][$i],
                    'error' => $files['error'][$i],
                    'size' => $files['size'][$i],
                );

                $upload = wp_handle_upload($single, array(
                    'test_form' => false,
                    'mimes' => $allowed_mimes,
                ));

                if (!empty($upload['error']) || empty($upload['file'])) {
                    continue;
                }

                $attachment = array(
                    'post_mime_type' => $upload['type'],
                    'post_title' => sanitize_file_name(pathinfo($single['name'], PATHINFO_FILENAME)),
                    'post_status' => 'inherit',
                );

                $attachment_id = wp_insert_attachment($attachment, $upload['file'], $post_id);
                if ($attachment_id && !is_wp_error($attachment_id)) {
                    $metadata = wp_generate_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $upload['file']);
                    if (!is_wp_error($metadata)) {
                        wp_update_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $metadata);
                    }

                    $uploaded_rows[] = array(
                        'id' => (int) $attachment_id,
                        'name' => sanitize_file_name($single['name']),
                        'url' => wp_get_attachment_url($attachment_id),
                        'category' => sanitize_key($categories[$i] ?? 'other'),
                        'notes' => sanitize_textarea_field($notes[$i] ?? ''),
                        'uploaded_by' => get_current_user_id(),
                        'uploaded_at' => current_time('mysql'),
                    );
                }
            }
        }

        if (!empty($uploaded_rows)) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_quote_documents', array_merge($existing, $uploaded_rows));
        }
    }

    private function get_quote_documents($post_id) {
        $documents = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_quote_documents', true);
        return is_array($documents) ? $documents : array();
    }

    private function render_quote_documents_field($post_id) {
        $documents = $post_id > 0 ? $this->get_quote_documents($post_id) : array();
        $categories = $this->get_quote_document_categories();

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Quote Documents</h4>
            <div class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-bottom:12px;">Upload AutoCAD drawings, PDFs, site photos, spec sheets, and other files related to this quote.</div>
            <div id="dmx-quote-documents-rows">
                <div class="dmx-quote-document-row" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;">
                    <div class="dmx-field" style="margin-bottom:0;">
                        <label>File</label>
                        <input type="file" name="quote_documents[]">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field" style="margin-bottom:0;">
                        <label>Category</label>
                        <select name="quote_document_category[]">
                            <?php foreach ($categories as $value => $label) : ?>
                                <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field" style="margin-bottom:0;">
                        <label>Notes</label>
                        <input type="text" name="quote_document_notes[]" placeholder="Optional note">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-mini-links" style="margin-top:0;">
                <a href="#" id="dmx-add-quote-document-row">Add Another Document</a>
            </div>
            <?php if (!empty($documents)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-table-wrap" style="margin-top:14px;">
                    <table class="dmx-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>File</th>
                                <th>Category</th>
                                <th>Notes</th>
                                <th>Uploaded</th>
                                <th>Actions</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            <?php foreach ($documents as $index => $document) : ?>
                                <tr>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($document['name'] ?? 'Document'); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($categories[$document['category'] ?? 'other'] ?? 'Other'); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($document['notes'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html(!empty($document['uploaded_at']) ? date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($document['uploaded_at'])) : ''); ?></td>
                                    <td>
                                        <?php if (!empty($document['url'])) : ?>
                                            <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" style="padding:8px 10px;font-size:12px;" href="<?php echo esc_url($document['url']); ?>" target="_blank">Download</a>
                                        <?php endif; ?>
                                        <form method="post" style="display:inline-block;margin-left:6px;">
                                            <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="delete_quote_document">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="quotes">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="quote_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($post_id); ?>">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="quote_document_index" value="<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>">
                                            <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" style="padding:8px 10px;font-size:12px;">Delete</button>
                                        </form>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            <script>
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
                var addBtn = document.getElementById('dmx-add-quote-document-row');
                var rows = document.getElementById('dmx-quote-documents-rows');
                if (!addBtn || !rows || addBtn.dataset.bound === 'yes') {
                    return;
                }
                addBtn.dataset.bound = 'yes';
                addBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    var firstRow = rows.querySelector('.dmx-quote-document-row');
                    if (!firstRow) {
                        return;
                    }
                    var clone = firstRow.cloneNode(true);
                    clone.querySelectorAll('input').forEach(function(input) {
                        input.value = '';
                    });
                    clone.querySelectorAll('select').forEach(function(select) {
                        select.selectedIndex = 0;
                    });
                    rows.appendChild(clone);
                });
            });
            </script>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function delete_quote_document($tab) {
        $quote_id = absint($_POST['quote_id'] ?? 0);
        $document_index = isset($_POST['quote_document_index']) ? absint($_POST['quote_document_index']) : -1;

        if (!$quote_id || !$this->current_user_can_edit_quote_record($quote_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that quote document.');
        }

        $documents = $this->get_quote_documents($quote_id);
        if (!isset($documents[$document_index])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that quote document.');
        }

        $document = $documents[$document_index];
        if (!empty($document['id'])) {
            wp_delete_attachment((int) $document['id'], true);
        }

        unset($documents[$document_index]);
        update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_quote_documents', array_values($documents));

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Quote document deleted.');
    }

    private function approve_team_member($tab) {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Only DoorMatrix admin can approve new portal accounts.');
        }

        $user_id = absint($_POST['team_user_id'] ?? 0);
        if (!$user_id) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Could not find that account.');
        }

        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Could not find that account.');
        }

        $requested_role = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', true);
        $allowed = array(self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE, self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, self::MANAGER_ROLE);
        if (!in_array($requested_role, $allowed, true)) {
            $requested_role = self::STAFF_ROLE;
        }

        $company_key = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_key', true);
        $selected_plan = $this->normalize_company_plan_key($_POST['company_plan'] ?? $this->get_company_active_plan($company_key));
        if ($company_key !== '') {
            $this->set_company_active_plan($company_key, $selected_plan);
        }

        $wp_user = new WP_User($user_id);
        $wp_user->set_role($requested_role);

        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_account_status', 'approved');
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_at', current_time('mysql'));
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_by', get_current_user_id());

        if ((string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_is_company_owner', true) === 'yes') {
            $this->maybe_start_company_trial((string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_key', true));
        }

        $this->notify_user_account_approved($user_id);

        $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'success', 'Portal account approved.');
    }

    private function deny_team_member($tab) {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Only DoorMatrix admin can deny new portal accounts.');
        }

        $user_id = absint($_POST['team_user_id'] ?? 0);
        if (!$user_id) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Could not find that account.');
        }

        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_account_status', 'rejected');
        $wp_user = new WP_User($user_id);
        $wp_user->set_role(self::STAFF_ROLE);

        $this->notify_user_account_denied($user_id);

        $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'success', 'Portal account request rejected.');
    }

    private function save_company_plan($tab) {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Only DoorMatrix admin can change company plans.');
        }

        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_POST['company_key'] ?? ''));
        if ($company_key === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Could not find that company.');
        }

        $plan_key = $this->normalize_company_plan_key($_POST['company_plan'] ?? 'starter');
        $this->set_company_active_plan($company_key, $plan_key);

        $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'success', 'Company plan updated to ' . $this->get_company_plan_label($plan_key) . '.');
    }

    private function redirect_to_admin_companies($company_key = '', $type = 'success', $message = '') {
        $args = array(
            'page' => 'doormatrix-door-companies',
            'dmx_msg_type' => $type,
            'dmx_msg' => $message,
        );

        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key !== '') {
            $args['company_key'] = $company_key;
        }

        wp_safe_redirect(add_query_arg($args, admin_url('admin.php')));
        exit;
    }

    private function save_company_admin_controls($tab) {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $this->redirect_to_admin_companies('', 'error', 'Only DoorMatrix admin can update company controls.');
        }

        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_POST['company_key'] ?? ''));
        if ($company_key === '') {
            $this->redirect_to_admin_companies('', 'error', 'Could not find that company.');
        }

        $plan_key = $this->normalize_company_plan_key($_POST['company_plan'] ?? 'starter');
        $status = $this->normalize_company_access_status($_POST['company_access_status'] ?? 'trial');
        $trial_end_date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['company_trial_end_date'] ?? ''));
        $note = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['company_admin_note'] ?? ''));

        $this->set_company_active_plan($company_key, $plan_key);
        $this->set_company_access_status($company_key, $status, $trial_end_date, $note);

        $this->redirect_to_admin_companies($company_key, 'success', 'Company controls updated.');
    }

    private function extend_company_trial($tab) {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $this->redirect_to_admin_companies('', 'error', 'Only DoorMatrix admin can extend trials.');
        }

        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_POST['company_key'] ?? ''));
        if ($company_key === '') {
            $this->redirect_to_admin_companies('', 'error', 'Could not find that company.');
        }

        $days = absint($_POST['extend_trial_days'] ?? 0);
        if ($days <= 0) {
            $days = 14;
        }

        $note = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['trial_extension_note'] ?? ''));
        $extended = $this->extend_company_trial_record($company_key, $days, $note);

        if (!$extended) {
            $this->redirect_to_admin_companies($company_key, 'error', 'Could not extend that trial.');
        }

        $this->redirect_to_admin_companies($company_key, 'success', 'Company trial extended by ' . $days . ' days.');
    }

    private function create_quote($tab) {
        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_title'] ?? '');
        $customer = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_customer'] ?? '');
        $amount = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_amount'] ?? '');
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_status'] ?? 'draft');
        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['quote_notes'] ?? '');
        $supplier_ref = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_supplier_request_ref'] ?? '');
        $markup_percent = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_markup_percent'] ?? '');
        $customer_email = sanitize_email($_POST['quote_customer_email'] ?? '');
        $site_location = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['quote_site_location'] ?? ''));
        $job_description = wp_kses_post($_POST['quote_job_description'] ?? '');
        $salesperson_name = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_salesperson_name'] ?? $this->get_current_team_member_name());

        $line_items = $this->get_clean_quote_line_items_from_request();
        $site_check = $this->get_quote_site_check_request_data();
        $tax_profile = $this->get_document_tax_profile_from_request('quote');
        $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($line_items, $tax_profile);
        $calculated_amount = $totals['grand_total'];

        if ($amount === '' && $calculated_amount > 0) {
            $amount = number_format($calculated_amount, 2, '.', '');
        }

        if (empty($title)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Quote title is required.');
        }

        $post_id = wp_insert_post(array(
            'post_type'   => 'dm_quote',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_title'  => $title,
            'post_content'=> $notes,
            'post_author' => get_current_user_id()
        ));

        if ($post_id) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', $customer);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_amount', $amount);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', $customer_email);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site_location', $site_location);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_request_ref', $supplier_ref);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_markup_percent', $markup_percent);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_job_description', $job_description);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', $salesperson_name);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_quote_line_items', $line_items);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_tax_profile', $tax_profile);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_subtotal', number_format($totals['subtotal'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_tax_total', number_format($totals['tax_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_total', number_format($totals['grand_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_quote_line_items_total', $calculated_amount);
            $this->save_quote_site_check_meta($post_id, $site_check);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_company_key', $this->get_current_user_company_key());
            $this->ensure_document_number('quote', $post_id);
            $this->handle_document_photo_uploads($post_id, 'quote_photos');
            $this->handle_quote_document_uploads($post_id);
            $this->update_quote_builder_source_prices($line_items);
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Quote created successfully.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not create quote.');
    }

    private function update_quote($tab) {
        $quote_id = absint($_POST['quote_id'] ?? 0);

        if (!$quote_id || !$this->current_user_can_edit_quote_record($quote_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that quote to update.');
        }

        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_title'] ?? '');
        $customer = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_customer'] ?? '');
        $amount = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_amount'] ?? '');
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_status'] ?? 'draft');
        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['quote_notes'] ?? '');
        $supplier_ref = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_supplier_request_ref'] ?? '');
        $markup_percent = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_markup_percent'] ?? '');
        $customer_email = sanitize_email($_POST['quote_customer_email'] ?? '');
        $site_location = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['quote_site_location'] ?? ''));
        $job_description = wp_kses_post($_POST['quote_job_description'] ?? '');
        $salesperson_name = sanitize_text_field($_POST['quote_salesperson_name'] ?? $this->get_document_salesperson_name($quote_id));

        $line_items = $this->get_clean_quote_line_items_from_request();
        $site_check = $this->get_quote_site_check_request_data();
        $tax_profile = $this->get_document_tax_profile_from_request('quote');
        $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($line_items, $tax_profile);
        $calculated_amount = $totals['grand_total'];

        if ($amount === '' && $calculated_amount > 0) {
            $amount = number_format($calculated_amount, 2, '.', '');
        }

        if (empty($title)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Quote title is required.');
        }

        $updated = wp_update_post(array(
            'ID'           => $quote_id,
            'post_title'   => $title,
            'post_content' => $notes,
        ), true);

        if (!is_wp_error($updated)) {
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_customer_name', $customer);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_amount', $amount);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_customer_email', $customer_email);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_site_location', $site_location);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_supplier_request_ref', $supplier_ref);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_markup_percent', $markup_percent);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_job_description', $job_description);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', $salesperson_name);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_quote_line_items', $line_items);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_tax_profile', $tax_profile);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_subtotal', number_format($totals['subtotal'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_tax_total', number_format($totals['tax_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_total', number_format($totals['grand_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_quote_line_items_total', $calculated_amount);
            $this->save_quote_site_check_meta($quote_id, $site_check);
            $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($quote_id);
            $this->handle_document_photo_uploads($quote_id, 'quote_photos');
            $this->handle_quote_document_uploads($quote_id);
            $this->update_quote_builder_source_prices($line_items);
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Quote updated successfully.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not update quote.');
    }

    private function sanitize_supplier_door_packages_from_request() {
        $raw = $_POST['supplier_doors'] ?? array();
        if (!is_array($raw)) {
            return array();
        }

        $lift_options = $this->get_supplier_door_lift_type_options();
        $door_type_options = $this->get_supplier_door_type_options();
        $track_size_options = $this->get_supplier_track_size_options();
        $roof_pitch_options = $this->get_supplier_roof_pitch_options();
        $spring_cycle_options = $this->get_supplier_spring_cycle_options();
        $powder_track_options = $this->get_supplier_powder_coated_track_options();
        $roller_type_options = $this->get_supplier_roller_type_options();
        $window_options = $this->get_supplier_window_type_options();
        $pattern_options = $this->get_supplier_window_frame_pattern_options();
        $weatherstrip_options = $this->get_supplier_weatherstrip_options();
        $weatherstrip_color_options = $this->get_supplier_weatherstrip_color_options();

        $packages = array();
        foreach ($raw as $door) {
            if (!is_array($door)) {
                continue;
            }

            $label = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($door['label'] ?? ''));
            $qty = absint($door['quantity'] ?? 1);
            if ($qty <= 0) {
                $qty = 1;
            }

            $width = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($door['width'] ?? ''));
            $height = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($door['height'] ?? ''));
            $make = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($door['make'] ?? ''));
            $model = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($door['model'] ?? ''));
            $color = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($door['color'] ?? ''));
            $r_value = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($door['r_value'] ?? ''));
            $high_lift_amount = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($door['high_lift_amount'] ?? ''));
            $door_type = sanitize_key($door['door_type'] ?? 'residential_sectional');
            if (!isset($door_type_options[$door_type])) {
                $door_type = 'other';
            }
            $track_size = sanitize_key($door['track_size'] ?? '2_inch');
            if (!isset($track_size_options[$track_size])) {
                $track_size = 'supplier_confirm';
            }
            $roof_pitch = sanitize_key($door['roof_pitch'] ?? '');
            if ($roof_pitch !== '' && !isset($roof_pitch_options[$roof_pitch])) {
                $roof_pitch = 'supplier_confirm';
            }
            $spring_cycle = sanitize_key($door['spring_cycle'] ?? 'standard_10k');
            if (!isset($spring_cycle_options[$spring_cycle])) {
                $spring_cycle = 'supplier_recommend';
            }
            $powder_coated_track = sanitize_key($door['powder_coated_track'] ?? 'no');
            if (!isset($powder_track_options[$powder_coated_track])) {
                $powder_coated_track = 'supplier_confirm';
            }
            $roller_type = sanitize_key($door['roller_type'] ?? 'standard_2_nylon');
            if (!isset($roller_type_options[$roller_type])) {
                $roller_type = 'supplier_recommend';
            }
            $notes = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($door['notes'] ?? ''));

            $window_type = sanitize_key($door['window_type'] ?? 'none');
            if (!isset($window_options[$window_type])) {
                $window_type = 'custom';
            }

            $window_pattern = sanitize_key($door['window_pattern'] ?? 'none');
            if (!isset($pattern_options[$window_pattern])) {
                $window_pattern = 'custom';
            }

            $weatherstrip = sanitize_key($door['weatherstrip'] ?? 'standard');
            if (!isset($weatherstrip_options[$weatherstrip])) {
                $weatherstrip = 'custom';
            }

            $weatherstrip_color = sanitize_key($door['weatherstrip_color'] ?? 'white');
            if (!isset($weatherstrip_color_options[$weatherstrip_color])) {
                $weatherstrip_color = 'custom';
            }

            $lift_type = sanitize_key($door['lift_type'] ?? 'standard_lift');
            if (!isset($lift_options[$lift_type])) {
                $lift_type = 'custom';
            }

            $has_content = trim($label . $width . $height . $make . $model . $color . $r_value . $high_lift_amount . $roof_pitch . $notes) !== ''
                || $door_type !== 'residential_sectional'
                || $track_size !== '2_inch'
                || $spring_cycle !== 'standard_10k'
                || $powder_coated_track !== 'no'
                || $roller_type !== 'standard_2_nylon'
                || $window_type !== 'none'
                || $window_pattern !== 'none'
                || $weatherstrip !== 'standard'
                || $lift_type !== 'standard_lift';

            if (!$has_content) {
                continue;
            }

            $packages[] = array(
                'label' => $label,
                'quantity' => $qty,
                'width' => $width,
                'height' => $height,
                'make' => $make,
                'model' => $model,
                'color' => $color,
                'door_type' => $door_type,
                'door_type_label' => $door_type_options[$door_type],
                'track_size' => $track_size,
                'track_size_label' => $track_size_options[$track_size],
                'roof_pitch' => $roof_pitch,
                'roof_pitch_label' => $roof_pitch !== '' ? $roof_pitch_options[$roof_pitch] : '',
                'spring_cycle' => $spring_cycle,
                'spring_cycle_label' => $spring_cycle_options[$spring_cycle],
                'powder_coated_track' => $powder_coated_track,
                'powder_coated_track_label' => $powder_track_options[$powder_coated_track],
                'roller_type' => $roller_type,
                'roller_type_label' => $roller_type_options[$roller_type],
                'window_type' => $window_type,
                'window_type_label' => $window_options[$window_type],
                'window_pattern' => $window_pattern,
                'window_pattern_label' => $pattern_options[$window_pattern],
                'r_value' => $r_value,
                'weatherstrip' => $weatherstrip,
                'weatherstrip_label' => $weatherstrip_options[$weatherstrip],
                'weatherstrip_color' => $weatherstrip_color,
                'weatherstrip_color_label' => $weatherstrip_color_options[$weatherstrip_color],
                'lift_type' => $lift_type,
                'lift_type_label' => $lift_options[$lift_type],
                'high_lift_amount' => $high_lift_amount,
                'notes' => $notes,
            );
        }

        return $packages;
    }

    private function get_supplier_request_door_packages($request_id) {
        $packages = get_post_meta($request_id, '_dmx_supplier_door_packages', true);
        return is_array($packages) ? $packages : array();
    }

    private function get_supplier_request_door_summary($request_id) {
        $packages = $this->get_supplier_request_door_packages($request_id);
        if (empty($packages)) {
            $type = trim((string) get_post_meta($request_id, '_dmx_door_type', true));
            $size = trim((string) get_post_meta($request_id, '_dmx_door_size', true));
            return trim($type . ($type && $size ? ' - ' : '') . $size);
        }

        $parts = array();
        foreach ($packages as $index => $door) {
            $label = trim((string) ($door['label'] ?? 'Door ' . ($index + 1)));
            if ($label === '') {
                $label = 'Door ' . ($index + 1);
            }
            $size = trim((string) ($door['width'] ?? '') . ' x ' . (string) ($door['height'] ?? ''));
            $size = trim($size, " x\t\n\r\0\x0B");
            $qty = max(1, absint($door['quantity'] ?? 1));
            $parts[] = $label . ($size !== '' ? ' (' . $size . ')' : '') . ' x ' . $qty;
        }

        return implode(' | ', $parts);
    }

    private function build_supplier_request_email_body($request_id, $door_packages) {
        $lines = array();
        $lines[] = 'Supplier Quote Request';
        $lines[] = '';
        $lines[] = 'Request: ' . get_the_title($request_id);
        $lines[] = 'Supplier: ' . get_post_meta($request_id, '_dmx_supplier_name', true);
        $lines[] = '';
        $lines[] = 'Doors / Openings:';

        foreach ($door_packages as $index => $door) {
            $lines[] = '';
            $lines[] = 'Door ' . ($index + 1);
            $lines[] = 'Quantity: ' . ($door['quantity'] ?? 1);
            if (!empty($door['label'])) { $lines[] = 'Opening / Label: ' . $door['label']; }
            if (!empty($door['door_type_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Door Type: ' . $door['door_type_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['width']) || !empty($door['height'])) { $lines[] = 'Size: ' . trim(($door['width'] ?? '') . ' W x ' . ($door['height'] ?? '') . ' H'); }
            if (!empty($door['make'])) { $lines[] = 'Make / Manufacturer: ' . $door['make']; }
            if (!empty($door['model'])) { $lines[] = 'Model / Series: ' . $door['model']; }
            if (!empty($door['color'])) { $lines[] = 'Door Color: ' . $door['color']; }
            if (!empty($door['r_value'])) { $lines[] = 'R-Value: ' . $door['r_value']; }
            if (!empty($door['track_size_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Track Size: ' . $door['track_size_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['lift_type_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Lift / Track Type: ' . $door['lift_type_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['high_lift_amount'])) { $lines[] = 'High Lift Amount: ' . $door['high_lift_amount']; }
            if (!empty($door['roof_pitch_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Roof Pitch: ' . $door['roof_pitch_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['spring_cycle_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Spring Cycle: ' . $door['spring_cycle_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['powder_coated_track_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Powder Coated Track: ' . $door['powder_coated_track_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['roller_type_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Roller Type: ' . $door['roller_type_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['window_type_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Window / Glass: ' . $door['window_type_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['window_pattern_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Window Frame Pattern: ' . $door['window_pattern_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['weatherstrip_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Weatherstripping: ' . $door['weatherstrip_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['weatherstrip_color_label'])) { $lines[] = 'Weatherstrip Color: ' . $door['weatherstrip_color_label']; }
            if (!empty($door['notes'])) { $lines[] = 'Door Notes: ' . $door['notes']; }
        }

        $general_notes = trim(wp_strip_all_tags((string) get_post_field('post_content', $request_id)));
        if ($general_notes !== '') {
            $lines[] = '';
            $lines[] = 'General Notes / Specs:';
            $lines[] = $general_notes;
        }

        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
        $dmx_admin_preview_mode = $this->is_wordpress_admin_portal_preview();
        $dmx_admin_preview_company = $dmx_admin_preview_mode ? $this->get_admin_preview_company_label() : '';
        if ($current_user && $current_user->exists()) {
            $lines[] = '';
            $lines[] = 'Requested By: ' . $current_user->display_name;
            $lines[] = 'Reply Email: ' . $current_user->user_email;
        }

        return implode("\n", $lines);
    }

    private function send_supplier_request_email($request_id, $supplier_email, $door_packages) {
        $supplier_email = sanitize_email($supplier_email);
        if ($supplier_email === '') {
            return false;
        }

        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
        $reply_to_email = ($current_user && $current_user->exists()) ? sanitize_email($current_user->user_email) : '';
        $reply_to_name = ($current_user && $current_user->exists()) ? $current_user->display_name : '';

        $company = $this->get_current_company_profile();
        $company_name = !empty($company['company_name']) ? $company['company_name'] : get_bloginfo('name');
        $company_email = !empty($company['email']) ? sanitize_email($company['email']) : get_option('admin_email');

        $headers = array('Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8');
        if ($company_email !== '') {
            $headers[] = 'From: ' . $company_name . ' <' . $company_email . '>';
        }
        if ($reply_to_email !== '') {
            $headers[] = 'Reply-To: ' . ($reply_to_name !== '' ? $reply_to_name . ' ' : '') . '<' . $reply_to_email . '>';
        }

        $subject = 'Supplier Quote Request - ' . get_the_title($request_id);
        $body = $this->build_supplier_request_email_body($request_id, $door_packages);

        return wp_mail($supplier_email, $subject, $body, $headers);
    }

    private function create_supplier_request($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_supplier_requests()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('sales', 'error', 'You are not allowed to create supplier quote requests.');
        }
        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['supplier_request_title'] ?? '');
        $supplier_name = sanitize_text_field($_POST['supplier_name'] ?? '');
        $supplier_email = sanitize_email($_POST['supplier_email'] ?? '');
        $send_to_supplier = !empty($_POST['supplier_send_email']);
        $customer = '';
        $status = 'requested';
        $supplier_price = '';
        $markup_percent = '';
        $sell_price = '';
        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['supplier_notes'] ?? '');
        $door_packages = $this->sanitize_supplier_door_packages_from_request();

        if (empty($title)) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Supplier request title is required.'); }
        if (empty($door_packages)) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please add at least one door package/specification.'); }

        $first_door = $door_packages[0];
        $door_type = trim(($first_door['make'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($first_door['model'] ?? ''));
        $door_size = trim(($first_door['width'] ?? '') . ' x ' . ($first_door['height'] ?? ''));
        $door_size = trim($door_size, " x\t\n\r\0\x0B");

        $post_id = wp_insert_post(array('post_type' => 'dm_supplier_request','post_status' => 'publish','post_title' => $title,'post_content' => $notes,'post_author' => get_current_user_id()));
        if ($post_id) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_name', $supplier_name);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_email', $supplier_email);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_requested_by_user_id', get_current_user_id());
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_requested_by_email', wp_get_current_user()->user_email);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', $customer);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_door_type', $door_type);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_door_size', $door_size);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_door_packages', $door_packages);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_receiving_status', 'waiting');
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_supplier_price', $supplier_price);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_markup_percent', $markup_percent);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sell_price', $sell_price);
            $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
            if ($send_to_supplier && $supplier_email !== '') {
                $sent = $this->send_supplier_request_email($post_id, $supplier_email, $door_packages);
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, $sent ? 'success' : 'error', $sent ? 'Supplier quote request created and emailed to supplier.' : 'Supplier quote request was saved, but the email could not be sent.');
            }
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Supplier quote request created successfully.');
        }
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not create supplier quote request.');
    }

    private function create_invoice($tab) {
        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_title'] ?? '');
        $customer = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_customer'] ?? '');
        $amount = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_amount'] ?? '');
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_status'] ?? 'draft');
        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['invoice_notes'] ?? '');
        $customer_email = sanitize_email($_POST['invoice_customer_email'] ?? '');
        $site_location = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['invoice_site_location'] ?? ''));
        $job_description = wp_kses_post($_POST['invoice_job_description'] ?? '');
        $salesperson_name = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_salesperson_name'] ?? $this->get_current_team_member_name());
        $line_items = $this->get_clean_line_items_from_request('invoice_line_items');
        $tax_profile = $this->get_document_tax_profile_from_request('invoice');
        $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($line_items, $tax_profile);
        $calculated_amount = $totals['grand_total'];
        $source_quote_id = absint($_POST['invoice_source_quote_id'] ?? 0);
        $source_work_order_id = absint($_POST['invoice_source_work_order_id'] ?? 0);

        if (in_array($status, array('paid', 'partial'), true)) {
            $posted_payment_method = sanitize_key($_POST['invoice_payment_method'] ?? '');
            $payment_method_labels = $this->get_payment_method_labels();
            if ($posted_payment_method === '' || !isset($payment_method_labels[$posted_payment_method])) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please select how the customer paid before marking the invoice paid or partially paid.');
            }
            if ($status === 'partial') {
                $posted_paid_amount = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['invoice_paid_amount'] ?? '');
                if ($posted_paid_amount === '' || (float) $posted_paid_amount <= 0) {
                    $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please enter the deposit or partial payment amount collected.');
                }
            }
        }

        if ($amount === '' && $calculated_amount > 0) {
            $amount = number_format($calculated_amount, 2, '.', '');
        }

        if (empty($title)) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Invoice title is required.'); }
        $post_id = wp_insert_post(array('post_type' => 'dm_invoice','post_status' => 'publish','post_title' => $title,'post_content' => $notes,'post_author' => get_current_user_id()));
        if ($post_id) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', $customer);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_amount', $amount);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', $customer_email);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site_location', $site_location);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_job_description', $job_description);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', $salesperson_name);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_invoice_line_items', $line_items);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_tax_profile', $tax_profile);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_subtotal', number_format($totals['subtotal'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_tax_total', number_format($totals['tax_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_total', number_format($totals['grand_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_invoice_line_items_total', $calculated_amount);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_company_key', $this->get_current_user_company_key());
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_source_quote_id', $source_quote_id);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', $source_work_order_id);
            $this->sync_invoice_involvement_tracking($post_id, $source_work_order_id, $salesperson_name);
            $this->save_invoice_payment_and_work_order_closeout($post_id, $source_work_order_id, $status, $calculated_amount);
            $this->sync_invoice_involvement_tracking($post_id, $source_work_order_id, $salesperson_name);
            $this->ensure_document_number('invoice', $post_id);
            $inventory_result = $this->sync_invoice_inventory_usage($post_id, $line_items);
            if (is_wp_error($inventory_result)) {
                wp_delete_post($post_id, true);
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', $inventory_result->get_error_message());
            }
            $this->handle_document_photo_uploads($post_id, 'invoice_photos');
            $this->update_quote_builder_source_prices($line_items);
            if (!empty($inventory_result['has_exceptions'])) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Invoice saved, but one or more parts need inventory review because assigned truck stock was missing or too low.');
            }
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Invoice created successfully.');
        }
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not create invoice.');
    }

    private function update_invoice($tab) {
        $invoice_id = absint($_POST['invoice_id'] ?? 0);

        if (!$invoice_id || get_post_type($invoice_id) !== 'dm_invoice' || !$this->current_user_can_access_invoice($invoice_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that invoice to update.');
        }

        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_title'] ?? '');
        $customer = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_customer'] ?? '');
        $amount = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_amount'] ?? '');
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_status'] ?? 'draft');
        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['invoice_notes'] ?? '');
        $customer_email = sanitize_email($_POST['invoice_customer_email'] ?? '');
        $site_location = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['invoice_site_location'] ?? ''));
        $job_description = wp_kses_post($_POST['invoice_job_description'] ?? '');
        $salesperson_name = sanitize_text_field($_POST['invoice_salesperson_name'] ?? $this->get_document_salesperson_name($invoice_id));
        $line_items = $this->get_clean_line_items_from_request('invoice_line_items');
        $tax_profile = $this->get_document_tax_profile_from_request('invoice');
        $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($line_items, $tax_profile);
        $calculated_amount = $totals['grand_total'];
        $source_quote_id = absint($_POST['invoice_source_quote_id'] ?? 0);
        $source_work_order_id = absint($_POST['invoice_source_work_order_id'] ?? get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', true));

        if (in_array($status, array('paid', 'partial'), true)) {
            $posted_payment_method = sanitize_key($_POST['invoice_payment_method'] ?? '');
            $payment_method_labels = $this->get_payment_method_labels();
            if ($posted_payment_method === '' || !isset($payment_method_labels[$posted_payment_method])) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please select how the customer paid before marking the invoice paid or partially paid.');
            }
            if ($status === 'partial') {
                $posted_paid_amount = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['invoice_paid_amount'] ?? '');
                if ($posted_paid_amount === '' || (float) $posted_paid_amount <= 0) {
                    $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please enter the deposit or partial payment amount collected.');
                }
            }
        }

        if ($amount === '' && $calculated_amount > 0) {
            $amount = number_format($calculated_amount, 2, '.', '');
        }

        if (empty($title)) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Invoice title is required.'); }

        $updated = wp_update_post(array(
            'ID'           => $invoice_id,
            'post_title'   => $title,
            'post_content' => $notes,
        ), true);

        if (!is_wp_error($updated)) {
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_customer_name', $customer);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_amount', $amount);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_customer_email', $customer_email);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_site_location', $site_location);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_job_description', $job_description);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', $salesperson_name);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_line_items', $line_items);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_tax_profile', $tax_profile);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_subtotal', number_format($totals['subtotal'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_tax_total', number_format($totals['tax_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_total', number_format($totals['grand_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_line_items_total', $calculated_amount);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_source_quote_id', $source_quote_id);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', $source_work_order_id);
            $this->sync_invoice_involvement_tracking($invoice_id, $source_work_order_id, $salesperson_name);
            $this->save_invoice_payment_and_work_order_closeout($invoice_id, $source_work_order_id, $status, $calculated_amount);
            $this->sync_invoice_involvement_tracking($invoice_id, $source_work_order_id, $salesperson_name);
            $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($invoice_id);
            $inventory_result = $this->sync_invoice_inventory_usage($invoice_id, $line_items);
            if (is_wp_error($inventory_result)) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', $inventory_result->get_error_message());
            }
            $this->handle_document_photo_uploads($invoice_id, 'invoice_photos');
            $this->update_quote_builder_source_prices($line_items);
            if (!empty($inventory_result['has_exceptions'])) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Invoice saved, but one or more parts need inventory review because assigned truck stock was missing or too low.');
            }
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Invoice updated successfully.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not update invoice.');
    }

    private function convert_quote_to_invoice($tab) {
        $quote_id = absint($_POST['quote_id'] ?? 0);

        if ($quote_id <= 0 || get_post_type($quote_id) !== 'dm_quote') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('quotes', 'error', 'Could not find that quote to convert.');
        }

        $quote = get_post($quote_id);
        if (!$quote) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('quotes', 'error', 'Could not find that quote to convert.');
        }

        $line_items = get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_quote_line_items', true);
        if (!is_array($line_items)) {
            $line_items = array();
        }

        $tax_profile = $this->get_saved_document_tax_profile($quote_id, 'quote');
        $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($line_items, $tax_profile);
        $amount = get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_total', true);
        if ($amount === '') {
            $amount = number_format($totals['grand_total'], 2, '.', '');
        }

        $invoice_title = 'Invoice - ' . $quote->post_title;
        $invoice_id = wp_insert_post(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_invoice',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_title' => $invoice_title,
            'post_content' => $quote->post_content,
            'post_author' => get_current_user_id(),
        ));

        if ($invoice_id) {
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_customer_name', get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_customer_name', true));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_customer_email', get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_customer_email', true));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_site_location', get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_site_location', true));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_job_description', get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_job_description', true));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', true));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_original_salesperson_name', get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', true));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_amount', $amount);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_status', 'draft');
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_line_items', $line_items);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_tax_profile', $tax_profile);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_subtotal', number_format($totals['subtotal'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_tax_total', number_format($totals['tax_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_total', number_format($totals['grand_total'], 2, '.', ''));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_line_items_total', $totals['grand_total']);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_source_quote_id', $quote_id);
            $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($invoice_id);
            $this->ensure_document_number('invoice', $invoice_id);
            update_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_converted_invoice_id', $invoice_id);
            $this->redirect_with_message('invoices', 'success', 'Quote converted to invoice successfully.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message('quotes', 'error', 'Could not convert quote to invoice.');
    }


    private function send_document_email($document_type, $tab) {
        $post_id = absint($_POST['document_id'] ?? 0);
        $target_tab = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? 'invoices' : 'quotes';

        if ($post_id <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($target_tab, 'error', 'Could not find that record to send.');
        }

        $post_type = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? 'dm_invoice' : 'dm_quote';
        if (get_post_type($post_id) !== $post_type) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($target_tab, 'error', 'Could not find that record to send.');
        }

        $post = get_post($post_id);
        if (!$post) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($target_tab, 'error', 'Could not find that record to send.');
        }

        $customer_name = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
        $recipient = sanitize_email($_POST['document_email'] ?? '');
        if ($recipient === '') {
            $recipient = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', true);
        }
        if ($recipient === '' && $customer_name !== '') {
            $customer_post = $this->find_customer_by_name($customer_name);
            if ($customer_post) {
                $recipient = get_post_meta($customer_post->ID, '_dmx_customer_email', true);
                if ($recipient !== '') {
                    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', $recipient);
                }
            }
        }

        if ($recipient === '' || !is_email($recipient)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($target_tab, 'error', 'Customer email is missing or invalid.');
        }

        $preview_url = $this->get_document_view_url($document_type, $post_id, true);
        $public_url = $this->get_document_view_url($document_type, $post_id, false);
