        $document_number = $this->get_document_number($document_type, $post_id);
        $default_subject = ($document_type === 'invoice' ? 'Invoice ' : 'Quote ') . $document_number . ': ' . $post->post_title;
        $subject = sanitize_text_field($_POST['document_subject'] ?? $default_subject);
        if ($subject === '') {
            $subject = $default_subject;
        }

        $custom_message = wp_kses_post($_POST['document_message'] ?? '');
        if ($custom_message === '') {
            $custom_message = 'Hello ' . ($customer_name !== '' ? esc_html($customer_name) : 'there') . ',<br><br>'
                . 'Please review your ' . ($document_type === 'invoice' ? 'invoice' : 'quote') . ' using the secure link below.<br><br>';
        } else {
            $custom_message = nl2br(wp_kses_post($custom_message));
        }

        $tracking_pixel = $this->get_document_tracking_pixel_url($document_type, $post_id);

        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $company_display_name = trim((string) ($company['company_name'] !== '' ? $company['company_name'] : get_bloginfo('name')));
        if ($company_display_name === '') {
            $company_display_name = 'Door Company';
        }
        $company_display_name = str_replace(array("\r", "\n"), '', $company_display_name);

        /*
         * IMPORTANT: do not use the customer's garage door company email as the actual From address.
         * Many SMTP services reject that as spoofing when the domain is not authenticated, which can make
         * quote/invoice email stop delivering. We keep the inbox display name as the garage door company,
         * and use Reply-To for the garage door company's email so customers can still reply correctly.
         */
        $reply_to_email = !empty($company['email']) && is_email($company['email']) ? $company['email'] : get_option('admin_email');
        if (!$reply_to_email || !is_email($reply_to_email)) {
            $reply_to_email = self::SUPPORT_EMAIL;
        }

        $pdf_attachment = $this->create_document_pdf_attachment($document_type, $post_id);
        $attachments = ($pdf_attachment !== '' && file_exists($pdf_attachment) && is_readable($pdf_attachment)) ? array($pdf_attachment) : array();

        $body = '<html><body style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;color:#15253f;">'
            . '<div style="max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;padding:24px;border:1px solid #dbe5f0;border-radius:16px;">'
            . '<h2 style="margin:0 0 12px;color:#102844;">' . esc_html($subject) . '</h2>'
            . '<p style="margin:0 0 12px;font-size:13px;color:#5d7088;">From: ' . esc_html($company_display_name) . '</p>'
            . '<div style="font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#304763;">' . $custom_message . '</div>'
            . '<p style="font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#304763;"><strong>A printable PDF copy is attached to this email.</strong></p>'
            . '<p style="margin:20px 0;"><a href="' . esc_url($public_url) . '" style="display:inline-block;background:#173b68;color:#ffffff;text-decoration:none;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;">View ' . esc_html(ucfirst($document_type)) . '</a></p>'
            . '<p style="font-size:13px;color:#5d7088;">Internal preview link: <a href="' . esc_url($preview_url) . '">' . esc_html($preview_url) . '</a></p>'
            . '<img src="' . esc_url($tracking_pixel) . '" alt="" width="1" height="1" style="display:block;border:0;width:1px;height:1px;">'
            . '</div></body></html>';

        $headers = array(
            'Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8',
            'Reply-To: ' . $company_display_name . ' <' . $reply_to_email . '>',
        );

        $mail_error_message = '';
        $mail_failed_handler = function($wp_error) use (&$mail_error_message) {
            if (is_wp_error($wp_error)) {
                $mail_error_message = $wp_error->get_error_message();
            }
        };
        add_action('wp_mail_failed', $mail_failed_handler, 10, 1);

        $from_name_filter = function() use ($company_display_name) { return $company_display_name; };
        add_filter('wp_mail_from_name', $from_name_filter, 99);
        $sent = wp_mail($recipient, $subject, $body, $headers, $attachments);

        /*
         * Some hosts/SMTP providers reject attachments even when normal mail works. If that happens,
         * send the email without the attachment so the customer still receives the secure printable link.
         */
        $sent_without_pdf_attachment = false;
        if (!$sent && !empty($attachments)) {
            $fallback_body = str_replace(
                '<p style="font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#304763;"><strong>A printable PDF copy is attached to this email.</strong></p>',
                '<p style="font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#304763;"><strong>Use the secure link below to view and print this document.</strong></p>',
                $body
            );
            $mail_error_message = '';
            $sent = wp_mail($recipient, $subject, $fallback_body, $headers, array());
            $sent_without_pdf_attachment = $sent;
        }

        remove_filter('wp_mail_from_name', $from_name_filter, 99);
        remove_action('wp_mail_failed', $mail_failed_handler, 10);

        if ($pdf_attachment !== '' && file_exists($pdf_attachment)) {
            @unlink($pdf_attachment);
        }

        if (!$sent) {
            $error_tail = $mail_error_message !== '' ? ' Mail error: ' . $mail_error_message : '';
            $this->redirect_with_message($target_tab, 'error', 'Email could not be sent from the app. Please check WP Mail SMTP sender settings.' . $error_tail);
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', $recipient);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_last_sent_to', $recipient);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_last_sent_subject', $subject);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_last_sent_at', current_time('mysql'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', 'sent');

        if (!empty($sent_without_pdf_attachment)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($target_tab, 'success', ucfirst($document_type) . ' sent successfully. The mail server rejected the PDF attachment, so the customer received the secure printable link instead.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message($target_tab, 'success', ucfirst($document_type) . ' sent successfully with printable PDF attached.');
    }

    private function create_document_pdf_attachment($document_type, $post_id) {
        $post_id = absint($post_id);
        if ($post_id <= 0 || !in_array($document_type, array('quote', 'invoice'), true)) {
            return '';
        }

        $pdf_bytes = $this->generate_document_pdf_bytes($document_type, $post_id);
        if ($pdf_bytes === '') {
            return '';
        }

        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        if (!empty($upload_dir['error']) || empty($upload_dir['basedir'])) {
            return '';
        }

        $dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . 'doormatrix-temp';
        if (!wp_mkdir_p($dir)) {
            return '';
        }

        $document_number = sanitize_file_name($this->get_document_number($document_type, $post_id));
        if ($document_number === '') {
            $document_number = $document_type . '-' . $post_id;
        }
        $filename = wp_unique_filename($dir, strtoupper($document_type) . '-' . $document_number . '.pdf');
        $path = trailingslashit($dir) . $filename;

        $written = file_put_contents($path, $pdf_bytes);
        if (!$written) {
            return '';
        }

        return $path;
    }

    private function generate_document_pdf_bytes($document_type, $post_id) {
        if (class_exists('\\Dompdf\\Dompdf')) {
            try {
                $html = $this->render_customer_facing_document($document_type, $post_id, true);
                if (class_exists('\\Dompdf\\Options')) {
                    $options = new \Dompdf\Options();
                    $options->set('isRemoteEnabled', true);
                    $options->set('isHtml5ParserEnabled', true);
                    $dompdf = new \Dompdf\Dompdf($options);
                } else {
                    $dompdf = new \Dompdf\Dompdf();
                }
                $dompdf->loadHtml($html);
                $dompdf->setPaper('letter', 'portrait');
                $dompdf->render();
                $html_pdf = $dompdf->output();
                if (is_string($html_pdf) && $html_pdf !== '') {
                    return $html_pdf;
                }
            } catch (Throwable $e) {
                // Fall back to the built-in DoorMatrix visual PDF engine below.
            }
        }

        $data = $this->get_document_visual_pdf_data($document_type, $post_id);
        if (empty($data)) {
            return '';
        }

        $page_width = 612;
        $page_height = 792;
        $margin = 38;
        $content_width = $page_width - ($margin * 2);
        $pages = array();
        $content = '';
        $y = 748;

        $add_page = function() use (&$pages, &$content, &$y, $page_width, $page_height, $margin, $content_width, $data) {
            if ($content !== '') {
                $pages[] = $content;
            }
            $content = '';
            $y = 748;
            $content .= $this->pdf_set_color($data['body_bg'], false) . "0 0 " . $page_width . " " . $page_height . " re f\n";
            $content .= $this->pdf_set_color('#ffffff', false) . $margin . " 42 " . $content_width . " 708 re f\n";
            $content .= $this->pdf_set_color($data['accent'], false) . $margin . " 742 " . $content_width . " 8 re f\n";
        };

        $draw_text = function($text, $x, $line_y, $size = 10, $color = '#334155', $font = 'F1') use (&$content) {
            $content .= $this->pdf_text_command($text, $x, $line_y, $size, $color, $font);
        };
        $draw_wrapped = function($text, $x, &$line_y, $width_chars, $size = 9, $color = '#334155', $leading = 12, $max_lines = 0) use (&$content) {
            $lines = $this->wrap_pdf_text_line($text, $width_chars);
            if ($max_lines > 0) {
                $lines = array_slice($lines, 0, $max_lines);
            }
            foreach ($lines as $wrapped_line) {
                $content .= $this->pdf_text_command($wrapped_line, $x, $line_y, $size, $color, 'F1');
                $line_y -= $leading;
            }
        };
        $draw_box = function($x, $box_y, $w, $h, $fill = '#ffffff', $stroke = '#e6ebf2') use (&$content) {
            $content .= $this->pdf_set_color($fill, false) . $x . " " . $box_y . " " . $w . " " . $h . " re f\n";
            $content .= $this->pdf_set_color($stroke, true) . "0.7 w " . $x . " " . $box_y . " " . $w . " " . $h . " re S\n";
        };

        $add_page();

        $logo_box_w = min(92, max(56, (float) $data['logo_size'] * 0.55));
        $logo_box_h = 54;
        if (!empty($data['logo_url'])) {
            $draw_box($margin + 20, 672, $logo_box_w, $logo_box_h, '#ffffff', '#e6ebf2');
            $draw_text('LOGO', $margin + 32, 697, 13, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
            $brand_x = $margin + 32 + $logo_box_w;
        } else {
            $brand_x = $margin + 20;
        }

        $draw_text($data['company_name'], $brand_x, 720, min(22, max(16, (int) $data['heading_font'])), $data['header_color'], 'F2');
        $meta_y = 702;
        foreach ($data['company_meta'] as $line) {
            if ($line !== '') {
                $draw_text($line, $brand_x, $meta_y, 9, '#64748b');
                $meta_y -= 11;
            }
        }

        $badge_x = 422;
        $draw_box($badge_x, 654, 130, 80, '#ffffff', '#e6ebf2');
        $draw_text(strtoupper($data['title_label']) . ' NUMBER', $badge_x + 12, 716, 7.5, '#64748b', 'F2');
        $draw_text($data['document_number'], $badge_x + 12, 698, 14, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
        $draw_text('Date: ' . $data['date'], $badge_x + 12, 682, 8.5, '#334155');
        $draw_text('Status: ' . $data['status'], $badge_x + 12, 668, 8.5, '#334155');
        if (!empty($data['team_member'])) {
            $draw_text('Team: ' . $data['team_member'], $badge_x + 12, 656, 8, '#334155');
        }

        if (($data['doc_settings']['show_title'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes' && $data['display_title'] !== '') {
            $draw_text($data['display_title'], $brand_x, 646, 11, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
        }

        $box_y = 548;
        $box_h = 78;
        $left_x = $margin + 20;
        $right_x = $margin + 282;
        $draw_box($left_x, $box_y, 238, $box_h, '#ffffff', '#e6ebf2');
        $content .= $this->pdf_set_color($data['accent'], false) . $left_x . " " . $box_y . " 5 " . $box_h . " re f\n";
        $draw_text('CUSTOMER / BUSINESS DETAILS', $left_x + 15, $box_y + 58, 7.8, '#64748b', 'F2');
        $cy = $box_y + 43;
        foreach ($data['customer_lines'] as $i => $line) {
            $draw_text($line, $left_x + 15, $cy, $i === 0 ? 9.5 : 8.5, $i === 0 ? $data['header_color'] : '#334155', $i === 0 ? 'F2' : 'F1');
            $cy -= 11;
        }

        $draw_box($right_x, $box_y, 238, $box_h, '#ffffff', '#e6ebf2');
        $content .= $this->pdf_set_color($data['accent'], false) . $right_x . " " . $box_y . " 5 " . $box_h . " re f\n";
        $draw_text('SITE LOCATION DETAILS', $right_x + 15, $box_y + 58, 7.8, '#64748b', 'F2');
        $sy = $box_y + 43;
        $draw_text('Job Site / Install Address', $right_x + 15, $sy, 9, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
        $sy -= 11;
        $draw_wrapped($data['site_location'] !== '' ? $data['site_location'] : 'Site location not provided.', $right_x + 15, $sy, 34, 8.5, '#334155', 10, 4);

        $y = 520;
        if (($data['doc_settings']['show_job_description'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes' && $data['job_description'] !== '') {
            $draw_box($left_x, $y - 56, 500, 48, '#ffffff', '#e6ebf2');
            $draw_text('Job Description', $left_x + 14, $y - 24, 10, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
            $jy = $y - 38;
            $draw_wrapped($data['job_description'], $left_x + 14, $jy, 88, 8.5, '#334155', 10, 3);
            $y -= 72;
        }

        $columns = $this->get_visual_pdf_columns($data['visible_cols']);
        $draw_table_header = function() use (&$content, &$y, $columns, $left_x, $data, $draw_text) {
            $content .= $this->pdf_set_color('#f8fafc', false) . $left_x . " " . ($y - 24) . " 500 24 re f\n";
            $content .= $this->pdf_set_color('#e6ebf2', true) . "0.6 w " . $left_x . " " . ($y - 24) . " 500 24 re S\n";
            $cx = $left_x;
            foreach ($columns as $col) {
                $draw_text(strtoupper($col['label']), $cx + 6, $y - 16, 7.5, '#64748b', 'F2');
                $cx += $col['width'];
            }
            $y -= 24;
        };

        $draw_table_header();
        if (empty($data['line_items'])) {
            $draw_text('No line items added.', $left_x + 10, $y - 18, 9, '#64748b');
            $y -= 34;
        } else {
            foreach ($data['line_items'] as $item) {
                $row_h = 34;
                $desc_lines = $this->wrap_pdf_text_line($item['description'], 30);
                if (count($desc_lines) > 1) {
                    $row_h += min(3, count($desc_lines) - 1) * 10;
                }
                if ($y - $row_h < 150) {
                    $add_page();
                    $draw_text($data['company_name'], $margin + 20, 718, 14, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
                    $draw_text(strtoupper($data['title_label']) . ' ' . $data['document_number'] . ' - continued', $margin + 20, 700, 10, '#64748b');
                    $y = 660;
                    $draw_table_header();
                }
                $content .= $this->pdf_set_color('#ffffff', false) . $left_x . " " . ($y - $row_h) . " 500 " . $row_h . " re f\n";
                $content .= $this->pdf_set_color('#e6ebf2', true) . "0.45 w " . $left_x . " " . ($y - $row_h) . " 500 " . $row_h . " re S\n";
                $cx = $left_x;
                foreach ($columns as $col) {
                    $key = $col['key'];
                    $value = isset($item[$key]) ? $item[$key] : '';
                    if ($key === 'description') {
                        $ty = $y - 14;
                        $lines = array_slice($this->wrap_pdf_text_line($value, 30), 0, 4);
                        foreach ($lines as $idx => $desc_line) {
                            $draw_text($desc_line, $cx + 6, $ty, 8.5, $idx === 0 ? $data['header_color'] : '#334155', $idx === 0 ? 'F2' : 'F1');
                            $ty -= 10;
                        }
                    } else {
                        $draw_text($value, $cx + 6, $y - 18, 8.3, '#334155');
                    }
                    $cx += $col['width'];
                }
                $y -= $row_h;
            }
        }

        if ($y < 245) {
            $add_page();
            $draw_text($data['company_name'], $margin + 20, 718, 14, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
            $draw_text(strtoupper($data['title_label']) . ' ' . $data['document_number'] . ' - summary', $margin + 20, 700, 10, '#64748b');
            $y = 660;
        }

        $bottom_y = $y - 120;
        $draw_box($left_x, $bottom_y, 300, 104, '#ffffff', '#e6ebf2');
        $draw_text('Terms', $left_x + 14, $bottom_y + 82, 10, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
        $terms_y = $bottom_y + 66;
        $draw_wrapped($data['terms'], $left_x + 14, $terms_y, 48, 8.4, '#334155', 10, 5);

        $totals_x = $left_x + 318;
        $draw_box($totals_x, $bottom_y, 182, 104, '#ffffff', '#e6ebf2');
        $content .= $this->pdf_set_color($data['accent'], false) . $totals_x . " " . ($bottom_y + 78) . " 182 4 re f\n";
        $draw_text(strtoupper($data['title_label']) . ' SUMMARY', $totals_x + 12, $bottom_y + 86, 8, '#64748b', 'F2');
        $draw_text($data['document_type'] === 'invoice' ? 'Amount Due' : 'Quote Total', $totals_x + 12, $bottom_y + 68, 12, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
        $ty = $bottom_y + 48;
        foreach ($data['summary_rows'] as $row) {
            $draw_text($row['label'], $totals_x + 12, $ty, 8.5, '#64748b');
            $draw_text($row['value'], $totals_x + 104, $ty, 8.5, $data['header_color'], 'F2');
            $ty -= 15;
        }

        $pages[] = $content;

        $objects = array();
        $objects[1] = '<< /Type /Catalog /Pages 2 0 R >>';
        $objects[3] = '<< /Type /Font /Subtype /Type1 /BaseFont /Helvetica >>';
        $objects[4] = '<< /Type /Font /Subtype /Type1 /BaseFont /Helvetica-Bold >>';

        $kids = array();
        $object_number = 5;
        foreach ($pages as $page_content) {
            $page_object = $object_number;
            $content_object = $object_number + 1;
            $kids[] = $page_object . ' 0 R';
            $objects[$page_object] = '<< /Type /Page /Parent 2 0 R /MediaBox [0 0 ' . $page_width . ' ' . $page_height . '] /Resources << /Font << /F1 3 0 R /F2 4 0 R >> >> /Contents ' . $content_object . ' 0 R >>';
            $objects[$content_object] = '<< /Length ' . strlen($page_content) . " >>\nstream\n" . $page_content . "endstream";
            $object_number += 2;
        }

        $objects[2] = '<< /Type /Pages /Kids [' . implode(' ', $kids) . '] /Count ' . count($pages) . ' >>';
        ksort($objects);

        $pdf = "%PDF-1.4\n";
        $offsets = array(0);
        foreach ($objects as $num => $body) {
            $offsets[$num] = strlen($pdf);
            $pdf .= $num . " 0 obj\n" . $body . "\nendobj\n";
        }

        $xref_offset = strlen($pdf);
        $max_object = max(array_keys($objects));
        $pdf .= "xref\n0 " . ($max_object + 1) . "\n";
        $pdf .= "0000000000 65535 f \n";
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $max_object; $i++) {
            $offset = isset($offsets[$i]) ? $offsets[$i] : 0;
            $pdf .= sprintf('%010d 00000 n ', $offset) . "\n";
        }
        $pdf .= "trailer\n<< /Size " . ($max_object + 1) . " /Root 1 0 R >>\nstartxref\n" . $xref_offset . "\n%%EOF";

        return $pdf;
    }

    private function get_document_visual_pdf_data($document_type, $post_id) {
        $post = get_post($post_id);
        if (!$post || !in_array($document_type, array('quote', 'invoice'), true)) {
            return array();
        }

        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $layout_settings = $this->get_document_layout_settings();
        $doc_settings = !empty($layout_settings[$document_type]) && is_array($layout_settings[$document_type]) ? $layout_settings[$document_type] : array();
        $doc_settings = $this->normalize_document_settings_for_customer_document($doc_settings, $document_type);
        $customer_name = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
        $customer_email = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', true);
        $customer_post = $this->find_customer_by_name($customer_name);
        $customer_company = $customer_post ? get_post_meta($customer_post->ID, '_dmx_company_name', true) : '';
        $customer_phone = $customer_post ? get_post_meta($customer_post->ID, '_dmx_customer_phone', true) : '';
        $customer_address = $customer_post ? $this->get_customer_address_summary($customer_post->ID) : '';
        $site_location = trim((string) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site_location', true));
        if ($site_location === '') {
            $site_location = $customer_address;
        }

        $tax_profile = $this->get_saved_document_tax_profile($post_id, $document_type);
        $line_items = get_post_meta($post_id, ($document_type === 'invoice') ? '_dmx_invoice_line_items' : '_dmx_quote_line_items', true);
        if (!is_array($line_items)) {
            $line_items = array();
        }
        $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($line_items, $tax_profile);
        $primary_label = $tax_profile['primary_label'] ?? '';
        $secondary_label = $tax_profile['secondary_label'] ?? '';
        $tax_label = trim(implode(' & ', array_filter(array($primary_label, $secondary_label))));
        if ($tax_label === '') {
            $tax_label = 'Tax';
        }
        $combined_tax_rate = 0;
        if (!empty($tax_profile['primary_rate'])) {
            $combined_tax_rate += (float) $tax_profile['primary_rate'];
        }
        if (!empty($tax_profile['secondary_rate'])) {
            $combined_tax_rate += (float) $tax_profile['secondary_rate'];
        }

        $visible_cols = array();
        if (($doc_settings['show_description'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') { $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'description', 'label' => 'Description'); }
        if (($doc_settings['show_sku'] ?? 'no') === 'yes') { $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'sku', 'label' => 'SKU'); }
        if (($doc_settings['show_qty'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') { $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'qty', 'label' => 'Qty'); }
        if (($doc_settings['show_unit_cost'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') { $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'unit_cost', 'label' => 'Unit Price'); }
        if (($doc_settings['show_amount'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') { $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'amount', 'label' => 'Amount'); }
        if (($doc_settings['show_tax'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') { $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'tax', 'label' => $tax_label); }
        if (($doc_settings['show_total'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') { $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'total', 'label' => 'Total'); }
        if (empty($visible_cols)) {
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'description', 'label' => 'Description');
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'amount', 'label' => 'Amount');
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'total', 'label' => 'Total');
        }

        $items = array();
        foreach ($line_items as $item) {
            $qty = isset($item['qty']) ? (float) $item['qty'] : 0;
            $unit_price = isset($item['unit_price']) ? (float) $item['unit_price'] : 0;
            $amount = $qty * $unit_price;
            $is_taxable = !isset($item['taxable']) || $item['taxable'] !== 'no';
            $tax = $is_taxable ? ($amount * ($combined_tax_rate / 100)) : 0;
            $total = $amount + $tax;
            $description = trim((string) ($item['description'] ?? ''));
            if ($description === '') {
                $description = trim((string) ($item['name'] ?? 'Line item'));
            }
            $items[] = array(
                'description' => $description,
                'sku' => trim((string) ($item['sku'] ?? '')),
                'qty' => $qty ? rtrim(rtrim(number_format($qty, 2, '.', ''), '0'), '.') : '0',
                'unit_cost' => $this->format_money($unit_price),
                'amount' => $this->format_money($amount),
                'tax' => $this->format_money($tax),
                'total' => $this->format_money($total),
            );
        }

        $status = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', true);
        $title_label = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? 'Invoice' : 'Quote';
        $document_display_title = trim((string) $post->post_title);
        if ($document_display_title !== '') {
            $document_display_title = preg_replace('/^' . preg_quote($title_label, '/') . '\s*[:-]?\s*/i', '', $document_display_title);
            $document_display_title = trim((string) $document_display_title);
        }
        $salesperson_name = $this->get_document_salesperson_name($post_id);
        $technician_name = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? $this->get_document_technician_name($post_id) : '';
        $team_member = $document_type === 'invoice' && $technician_name !== '' ? $technician_name : $salesperson_name;
        $invoice_paid_amount = $document_type === 'invoice' ? max(0, (float) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_invoice_paid_amount', true)) : 0;
        $invoice_balance_due = $document_type === 'invoice' ? max(0, (float) $totals['grand_total'] - $invoice_paid_amount) : 0;

        $summary_rows = array(
            array('label' => 'Subtotal', 'value' => $this->format_money($totals['subtotal'])),
        );
        if (($doc_settings['show_tax'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') {
            $summary_rows[] = array('label' => $tax_label, 'value' => $this->format_money($totals['tax_total']));
        }
        if ($document_type === 'invoice' && $invoice_paid_amount > 0) {
            $summary_rows[] = array('label' => 'Paid', 'value' => $this->format_money($invoice_paid_amount));
            $summary_rows[] = array('label' => 'Balance Due', 'value' => $this->format_money($invoice_balance_due));
        } else {
            $summary_rows[] = array('label' => $document_type === 'invoice' ? 'Amount Due' : 'Total', 'value' => $this->format_money($totals['grand_total']));
        }

        $company_meta = array();
        if (!empty($company['email'])) { $company_meta[] = $company['email']; }
        if (!empty($company['phone'])) { $company_meta[] = $company['phone']; }
        $company_address = $this->get_company_address_summary();
        if ($company_address !== '') { $company_meta[] = $company_address; }
        if (!empty($company['website'])) { $company_meta[] = $company['website']; }

        $customer_lines = array_values(array_filter(array($customer_company, $customer_name, $customer_address, $customer_phone, $customer_email)));
        if (empty($customer_lines)) {
            $customer_lines[] = 'Customer details not provided.';
        }

        return array(
            'document_type' => $document_type,
            'title_label' => $title_label,
            'document_number' => $this->get_document_number($document_type, $post_id),
            'display_title' => $document_display_title,
            'date' => date_i18n('M j, Y', get_post_timestamp($post)),
            'status' => $document_type === 'invoice' ? $this->get_invoice_payment_status_label($status) : ($status !== '' ? ucfirst($status) : 'Draft'),
            'team_member' => $team_member,
            'company_name' => $company['company_name'] !== '' ? $company['company_name'] : 'Door Company',
            'company_meta' => $company_meta,
            'customer_lines' => $customer_lines,
            'site_location' => $site_location,
            'job_description' => trim(wp_strip_all_tags((string) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_job_description', true))),
            'terms' => trim(wp_strip_all_tags((string) (($document_type === 'invoice') ? $company['default_invoice_terms'] : $company['default_quote_terms']))),
            'line_items' => $items,
            'visible_cols' => $visible_cols,
            'doc_settings' => $doc_settings,
            'summary_rows' => $summary_rows,
            'accent' => !empty($company['document_accent_color']) ? $company['document_accent_color'] : '#f3d400',
            'header_color' => !empty($company['document_header_color']) ? $company['document_header_color'] : '#1f2937',
            'body_bg' => !empty($company['document_body_bg']) ? $company['document_body_bg'] : '#f4f6f8',
            'base_font' => !empty($company['document_base_font_size']) ? (int) $company['document_base_font_size'] : 14,
            'heading_font' => !empty($company['document_heading_font_size']) ? (int) $company['document_heading_font_size'] : 28,
            'logo_size' => !empty($company['document_logo_size']) ? max(60, min(260, (int) $company['document_logo_size'])) : 150,
            'logo_url' => !empty($company['logo_url']) ? (string) $company['logo_url'] : '',
        );
    }

    private function get_visual_pdf_columns($visible_cols) {
        $visible_cols = is_array($visible_cols) ? $visible_cols : array();
        $weights = array(
            'description' => 3.2,
            'sku' => 1.0,
            'qty' => 0.7,
            'unit_cost' => 1.1,
            'amount' => 1.1,
            'tax' => 1.0,
            'total' => 1.1,
        );
        $total_weight = 0;
        foreach ($visible_cols as $col) {
            $total_weight += isset($weights[$col['key']]) ? $weights[$col['key']] : 1;
        }
        if ($total_weight <= 0) {
            $total_weight = 1;
        }
        $columns = array();
        $remaining = 500;
        foreach ($visible_cols as $index => $col) {
            if ($index === count($visible_cols) - 1) {
                $width = $remaining;
            } else {
                $width = round(500 * ((isset($weights[$col['key']]) ? $weights[$col['key']] : 1) / $total_weight), 2);
                $remaining -= $width;
            }
            $columns[] = array('key' => $col['key'], 'label' => $col['label'], 'width' => $width);
        }
        return $columns;
    }

    private function pdf_text_command($text, $x, $y, $size = 10, $color = '#334155', $font = 'F1') {
        return $this->pdf_set_color($color, false) . 'BT /' . $font . ' ' . ((float) $size) . ' Tf ' . ((float) $x) . ' ' . ((float) $y) . ' Td (' . $this->escape_pdf_text($text) . ") Tj ET\n";
    }

    private function pdf_set_color($hex, $stroke = false) {
        $rgb = $this->pdf_hex_to_rgb($hex);
        return sprintf('%.3F %.3F %.3F %s', $rgb[0] / 255, $rgb[1] / 255, $rgb[2] / 255, $stroke ? 'RG' : 'rg') . "\n";
    }

    private function pdf_hex_to_rgb($hex) {
        $hex = trim((string) $hex);
        if (preg_match('/^#?([a-f0-9]{6})$/i', $hex, $m)) {
            $h = $m[1];
            return array(hexdec(substr($h, 0, 2)), hexdec(substr($h, 2, 2)), hexdec(substr($h, 4, 2)));
        }
        return array(51, 65, 85);
    }

    private function get_document_pdf_lines($document_type, $post_id) {
        $post = get_post($post_id);
        if (!$post) {
            return array();
        }

        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $company_name = $company['company_name'] !== '' ? $company['company_name'] : get_bloginfo('name');
        $company_address = $this->get_company_address_summary();
        $customer_name = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
        $customer_email = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', true);
        $customer_post = $this->find_customer_by_name($customer_name);
        $customer_company = $customer_post ? get_post_meta($customer_post->ID, '_dmx_company_name', true) : '';
        $customer_phone = $customer_post ? get_post_meta($customer_post->ID, '_dmx_customer_phone', true) : '';
        $customer_address = $customer_post ? $this->get_customer_address_summary($customer_post->ID) : '';
        $site_location = trim((string) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site_location', true));
        if ($site_location === '') {
            $site_location = $customer_address;
        }

        $document_number = $this->get_document_number($document_type, $post_id);
        $title_label = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? 'Invoice' : 'Quote';
        $status = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', true);
        $line_items = get_post_meta($post_id, ($document_type === 'invoice') ? '_dmx_invoice_line_items' : '_dmx_quote_line_items', true);
        if (!is_array($line_items)) {
            $line_items = array();
        }
        $tax_profile = $this->get_saved_document_tax_profile($post_id, $document_type);
        $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($line_items, $tax_profile);
        $primary_label = $tax_profile['primary_label'] ?? 'Tax';
        $secondary_label = $tax_profile['secondary_label'] ?? '';
        $tax_label = trim(implode(' & ', array_filter(array($primary_label, $secondary_label))));
        if ($tax_label === '') {
            $tax_label = 'Tax';
        }
        $combined_tax_rate = 0;
        if (!empty($tax_profile['primary_rate'])) {
            $combined_tax_rate += (float) $tax_profile['primary_rate'];
        }
        if (!empty($tax_profile['secondary_rate'])) {
            $combined_tax_rate += (float) $tax_profile['secondary_rate'];
        }
        $invoice_paid_amount_for_document = 0.0;
        $invoice_balance_due_for_document = 0.0;
        if ($document_type === 'invoice') {
            $invoice_paid_amount_for_document = (float) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_invoice_paid_amount', true);
            if ($invoice_paid_amount_for_document < 0) {
                $invoice_paid_amount_for_document = 0.0;
            }
            $invoice_balance_due_for_document = max(0, (float) $totals['grand_total'] - $invoice_paid_amount_for_document);
        }
        $salesperson_name = $this->get_document_salesperson_name($post_id);
        $technician_name = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? $this->get_document_technician_name($post_id) : '';
        $job_description = trim(wp_strip_all_tags((string) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_job_description', true)));
        $terms = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? $company['default_invoice_terms'] : $company['default_quote_terms'];
        $document_display_title = trim((string) $post->post_title);
        if ($document_display_title !== '') {
            $document_display_title = preg_replace('/^' . preg_quote($title_label, '/') . '\s*[:-]?\s*/i', '', $document_display_title);
            $document_display_title = trim((string) $document_display_title);
        }

        $lines = array();
        $lines[] = strtoupper($title_label) . ' ' . $document_number;
        $lines[] = $document_display_title !== '' ? $document_display_title : $title_label;
        $lines[] = 'Date: ' . date_i18n('F j, Y', get_post_timestamp($post));
        $lines[] = 'Status: ' . (($document_type === 'invoice') ? $this->get_invoice_payment_status_label($status) : ($status !== '' ? ucfirst($status) : 'Draft'));
        if ($document_type === 'invoice' && $salesperson_name !== '') {
            $lines[] = 'Sales / Created By: ' . $salesperson_name;
        }
        if ($document_type === 'invoice' && $technician_name !== '') {
            $lines[] = 'Technician: ' . $technician_name;
        } elseif ($document_type !== 'invoice' && $salesperson_name !== '') {
            $lines[] = 'Team Member: ' . $salesperson_name;
        }
        $lines[] = '';
        $lines[] = 'FROM';
        $lines[] = $company_name;
        if (!empty($company['email'])) { $lines[] = $company['email']; }
        if (!empty($company['phone'])) { $lines[] = $company['phone']; }
        if ($company_address !== '') { $lines[] = $company_address; }
        $lines[] = '';
        $lines[] = 'CUSTOMER DETAILS';
        if ($customer_company !== '') { $lines[] = $customer_company; }
        if ($customer_name !== '') { $lines[] = $customer_name; }
        if ($customer_address !== '') { $lines[] = $customer_address; }
        if ($customer_phone !== '') { $lines[] = $customer_phone; }
        if ($customer_email !== '') { $lines[] = $customer_email; }
        $lines[] = '';
        $lines[] = 'SITE LOCATION DETAILS';
        $lines[] = $site_location !== '' ? $site_location : 'Site location not provided.';
        if ($job_description !== '') {
            $lines[] = '';
            $lines[] = 'JOB DESCRIPTION';
            $lines[] = $job_description;
        }
        $lines[] = '';
        $lines[] = 'LINE ITEMS';
        $lines[] = 'Description | Qty | Unit Price | Amount | ' . $tax_label . ' | Total';

        foreach ($line_items as $item) {
            $qty = isset($item['qty']) ? (float) $item['qty'] : 0;
            $unit_price = isset($item['unit_price']) ? (float) $item['unit_price'] : 0;
            $line_total = $qty * $unit_price;
            $is_taxable = !isset($item['taxable']) || $item['taxable'] !== 'no';
            $line_tax = $is_taxable ? ($line_total * ($combined_tax_rate / 100)) : 0;
            $line_grand = $line_total + $line_tax;
            $description = trim((string) ($item['description'] ?? ''));
            if ($description === '') {
                $description = trim((string) ($item['name'] ?? 'Line item'));
            }
            $qty_text = $qty ? rtrim(rtrim(number_format($qty, 2, '.', ''), '0'), '.') : '0';
            $lines[] = $description . ' | ' . $qty_text . ' | ' . $this->format_money($unit_price) . ' | ' . $this->format_money($line_total) . ' | ' . $this->format_money($line_tax) . ' | ' . $this->format_money($line_grand);
        }

        $lines[] = '';
        $lines[] = strtoupper($title_label) . ' SUMMARY';
        $lines[] = 'Subtotal: ' . $this->format_money($totals['subtotal']);
        $lines[] = $tax_label . ': ' . $this->format_money($totals['tax_total']);
        if ($document_type === 'invoice') {
            if ($invoice_paid_amount_for_document > 0) {
                $lines[] = 'Payments / Deposits Applied: ' . $this->format_money($invoice_paid_amount_for_document);
                $lines[] = 'Balance Due: ' . $this->format_money($invoice_balance_due_for_document);
            } else {
                $lines[] = 'Amount Due: ' . $this->format_money($totals['grand_total']);
            }
        } else {
            $lines[] = 'Total: ' . $this->format_money($totals['grand_total']);
        }
        if (trim(wp_strip_all_tags((string) $terms)) !== '') {
            $lines[] = '';
            $lines[] = 'TERMS';
            $lines[] = trim(wp_strip_all_tags((string) $terms));
        }

        return $lines;
    }

    private function wrap_pdf_text_line($text, $width = 88) {
        $text = trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', (string) $text));
        if ($text === '') {
            return array('');
        }
        $wrapped = wordwrap($text, $width, "\n", true);
        return explode("\n", $wrapped);
    }

    private function escape_pdf_text($text) {
        $text = html_entity_decode((string) $text, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        $text = wp_strip_all_tags($text);
        if (function_exists('iconv')) {
            $converted = @iconv('UTF-8', 'ISO-8859-1//TRANSLIT//IGNORE', $text);
            if ($converted !== false) {
                $text = $converted;
            }
        }
        $text = str_replace(array("\\", "(", ")", "\r", "\n", "\t"), array("\\\\", "\\(", "\\)", ' ', ' ', ' '), $text);
        return $text;
    }

    private function find_customer_by_name($customer_name) {
        if ($customer_name === '') {
            return null;
        }

        $exact_match_args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_customer',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => 1,
            'title' => $customer_name,
            'orderby' => 'date',
            'order' => 'DESC',
        ), 'dm_customer');

        $matches = get_posts($exact_match_args);

        if (!empty($matches)) {
            return $matches[0];
        }

        $search_args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_customer',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => 1,
            's' => $customer_name,
            'orderby' => 'date',
            'order' => 'DESC',
        ), 'dm_customer');

        $matches = get_posts($search_args);

        return !empty($matches) ? $matches[0] : null;
    }

    private function get_document_view_url($document_type, $post_id, $preview = false) {
        $args = array(
            'dmx_view' => $document_type,
            'dmx_id' => $post_id,
        );

        if ($preview) {
            $args['dmx_preview'] = 1;
        } else {
            $args['dmx_token'] = $this->get_document_token($document_type, $post_id);
        }

        return add_query_arg($args, home_url('/'));
    }

    private function get_document_tracking_pixel_url($document_type, $post_id) {
        return add_query_arg(array(
            'dmx_track_open' => 1,
            'dmx_view' => $document_type,
            'dmx_id' => $post_id,
            'dmx_token' => $this->get_document_token($document_type, $post_id),
        ), home_url('/'));
    }

    private function get_document_token($document_type, $post_id) {
        $meta_key = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? '_dmx_invoice_public_token' : '_dmx_quote_public_token';
        $token = get_post_meta($post_id, $meta_key, true);

        if ($token === '') {
            $token = wp_generate_password(32, false, false);
            update_post_meta($post_id, $meta_key, $token);
        }

        return $token;
    }

    public function handle_public_document_views() {
        if (empty($_GET['dmx_view']) || empty($_GET['dmx_id'])) {
            return;
        }

        $document_type = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_view']));
        $post_id = absint($_GET['dmx_id']);
        $is_preview = !empty($_GET['dmx_preview']);
        $is_track_open = !empty($_GET['dmx_track_open']);

        if (!in_array($document_type, array('quote', 'invoice'), true) || $post_id <= 0) {
            return;
        }

        $expected_post_type = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? 'dm_invoice' : 'dm_quote';
        if (get_post_type($post_id) !== $expected_post_type) {
            return;
        }

        if ($is_preview) {
            if (!is_user_logged_in() || !$this->user_can_access_portal()) {
                wp_die('Access denied.');
            }
        } else {
            $token = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_token'] ?? ''));
            if ($token === '' || !hash_equals($this->get_document_token($document_type, $post_id), $token)) {
                wp_die('Invalid or expired link.');
            }
        }

        if ($is_track_open) {
            $this->track_document_open($document_type, $post_id, false);
            nocache_headers();
            header('Content-Type: image/gif');
            echo base64_decode('R0lGODlhAQABAPAAAAAAAAAAACH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAICRAEAOw==');
            exit;
        }

        if (!$is_preview) {
            $this->track_document_open($document_type, $post_id, true);
        }

        nocache_headers();
        echo $this->render_customer_facing_document($document_type, $post_id, $is_preview);
        exit;
    }

    private function track_document_open($document_type, $post_id, $count_view = true) {
        $open_count_key = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? '_dmx_invoice_open_count' : '_dmx_quote_open_count';
        $first_open_key = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? '_dmx_invoice_first_opened_at' : '_dmx_quote_first_opened_at';
        $last_open_key = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? '_dmx_invoice_last_opened_at' : '_dmx_quote_last_opened_at';
        $view_count_key = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? '_dmx_invoice_view_count' : '_dmx_quote_view_count';

        $open_count = (int) get_post_meta($post_id, $open_count_key, true);
        update_post_meta($post_id, $open_count_key, $open_count + 1);

        if (get_post_meta($post_id, $first_open_key, true) === '') {
            update_post_meta($post_id, $first_open_key, current_time('mysql'));
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, $last_open_key, current_time('mysql'));

        if ($count_view) {
            $view_count = (int) get_post_meta($post_id, $view_count_key, true);
            update_post_meta($post_id, $view_count_key, $view_count + 1);
            if (get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', true) === 'sent') {
                update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', 'open');
            }
        }
    }

    private function render_customer_facing_document($document_type, $post_id, $is_preview = false) {
        $post = get_post($post_id);
        $customer_name = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
        $customer_email = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', true);
        $customer_post = $this->find_customer_by_name($customer_name);
        $customer_company = $customer_post ? get_post_meta($customer_post->ID, '_dmx_company_name', true) : '';
        $customer_phone = $customer_post ? get_post_meta($customer_post->ID, '_dmx_customer_phone', true) : '';
        $customer_address = $customer_post ? $this->get_customer_address_summary($customer_post->ID) : '';
        $site_location_raw = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site_location', true);
        $site_location = trim((string) $site_location_raw);
        if ($site_location === '') {
            $site_location = $customer_address;
        }
        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $layout_settings = $this->get_document_layout_settings();
        $doc_settings = !empty($layout_settings[$document_type]) && is_array($layout_settings[$document_type]) ? $layout_settings[$document_type] : array();
        $doc_settings = $this->normalize_document_settings_for_customer_document($doc_settings, $document_type);
        $amount = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_total', true);
        if ($amount === '') {
            $amount = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_amount', true);
        }
        $status = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', true);
        $line_items = get_post_meta($post_id, ($document_type === 'invoice') ? '_dmx_invoice_line_items' : '_dmx_quote_line_items', true);
        if (!is_array($line_items)) {
            $line_items = array();
        }

        $tax_profile = $this->get_saved_document_tax_profile($post_id, $document_type);
        $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($line_items, $tax_profile);
        $subtotal = $totals['subtotal'];
        $notes = wpautop(wp_kses_post($post->post_content));
        $job_description_raw = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_job_description', true);
        $job_description = wpautop(wp_kses_post($job_description_raw));
        $salesperson_name = $this->get_document_salesperson_name($post_id);
        $source_work_order_id_for_document = absint(get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', true));
        $technician_name = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? $this->get_document_technician_name($post_id) : '';
        $title_label = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? 'Invoice' : 'Quote';
        $document_number = $this->get_document_number($document_type, $post_id);
        $document_terms = ($document_type === 'invoice') ? $company['default_invoice_terms'] : $company['default_quote_terms'];

        $accent = !empty($company['document_accent_color']) ? $company['document_accent_color'] : '#f3d400';
        $header_color = !empty($company['document_header_color']) ? $company['document_header_color'] : '#1f2937';
        $body_bg = !empty($company['document_body_bg']) ? $company['document_body_bg'] : '#f4f6f8';
        $base_font = !empty($company['document_base_font_size']) ? (int) $company['document_base_font_size'] : 14;
        $heading_font = !empty($company['document_heading_font_size']) ? (int) $company['document_heading_font_size'] : 28;
        $logo_size = !empty($company['document_logo_size']) ? max(60, min(260, (int) $company['document_logo_size'])) : 150;
        $company_name = $company['company_name'] !== '' ? $company['company_name'] : 'Door Company';
        $company_address = $this->get_company_address_summary();
        $primary_label = $tax_profile['primary_label'] ?? '';
        $secondary_label = $tax_profile['secondary_label'] ?? '';
        $tax_label = trim(implode(' & ', array_filter(array($primary_label, $secondary_label))));
        if ($tax_label === '') {
            $tax_label = 'Tax';
        }
        $combined_tax_rate = 0;
        if (!empty($tax_profile['primary_rate'])) {
            $combined_tax_rate += (float) $tax_profile['primary_rate'];
        }
        if (!empty($tax_profile['secondary_rate'])) {
            $combined_tax_rate += (float) $tax_profile['secondary_rate'];
        }

        $visible_cols = array();
        if (($doc_settings['show_description'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') {
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'description', 'label' => 'Description');
        }
        if (($doc_settings['show_sku'] ?? 'no') === 'yes') {
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'sku', 'label' => 'SKU');
        }
        if (($doc_settings['show_qty'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') {
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'qty', 'label' => 'Qty');
        }
        if (($doc_settings['show_unit_cost'] ?? 'no') === 'yes') {
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'unit_cost', 'label' => 'Unit Price');
        }
        if (($doc_settings['show_amount'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') {
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'amount', 'label' => 'Amount');
        }
        if (($doc_settings['show_tax'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') {
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'tax', 'label' => $tax_label); 
        }
        if (($doc_settings['show_total'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') {
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'total', 'label' => 'Total');
        }
        if (empty($visible_cols)) {
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'description', 'label' => 'Description');
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'amount', 'label' => 'Amount');
            $visible_cols[] = array('key' => 'total', 'label' => 'Total');
        }

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html>
        <head>
            <meta charset="utf-8">
            <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
            <title><?php echo esc_html($title_label . ' - ' . $post->post_title); ?></title>
            <style>
                :root{
                    --dmx-accent: <?php echo esc_html($accent); ?>;
                    --dmx-header: <?php echo esc_html($header_color); ?>;
                    --dmx-page: <?php echo esc_html($body_bg); ?>;
                    --dmx-card: #ffffff;
                    --dmx-border: #e6ebf2;
                    --dmx-muted: #64748b;
                    --dmx-text: #334155;
                    --dmx-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(15,23,42,.10);
                    --dmx-radius: 22px;
                }
                *{box-sizing:border-box}
                body{margin:0;padding:24px;background:var(--dmx-page);font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;color:var(--dmx-text);font-size:<?php echo (int) $base_font; ?>px;line-height:1.55}
                .dmx-doc-shell{max-width:1040px;margin:0 auto}
                .dmx-preview-banner{background:#fff4db;color:#8a5a00;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid #f3deaa;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:18px}
                .dmx-doc-card{background:var(--dmx-card);border-radius:28px;box-shadow:var(--dmx-shadow);overflow:hidden}
                .dmx-doc-topbar{height:8px;background:var(--dmx-accent)}
                .dmx-doc-header{padding:30px 34px 18px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:24px;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap}
                .dmx-brand{display:flex;gap:18px;align-items:flex-start;min-width:0}
                .dmx-brand-logo{max-height:<?php echo max(42, (int) round($logo_size * 0.55)); ?>px;max-width:<?php echo (int) $logo_size; ?>px;width:auto;display:block;object-fit:contain}
                .dmx-brand-title{font-size:<?php echo (int) $heading_font; ?>px;line-height:1.05;font-weight:800;color:var(--dmx-header);margin:0}
                .dmx-brand-sub{margin-top:8px;color:var(--dmx-muted);font-size:<?php echo max(12, (int) $base_font - 1); ?>px}
                .dmx-doc-badge{min-width:220px;padding:18px 20px;border:1px solid var(--dmx-border);border-radius:18px;background:#fff}
                .dmx-doc-badge-label{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dmx-muted);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px}
                .dmx-doc-badge-title{font-size:<?php echo max(18, (int) $heading_font - 4); ?>px;font-weight:800;color:var(--dmx-header);margin:0 0 10px}.dmx-doc-badge-subtitle{font-size:<?php echo max(13, (int) $base_font); ?>px;font-weight:700;color:var(--dmx-text);margin:0 0 10px}
                .dmx-doc-badge-meta{display:grid;gap:6px;color:var(--dmx-text);font-size:<?php echo (int) $base_font; ?>px}
                .dmx-doc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px;padding:0 34px 24px}
                .dmx-info-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--dmx-border);border-radius:20px;padding:20px 22px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
                .dmx-info-card:before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:5px;background:var(--dmx-accent)}
                .dmx-info-kicker{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dmx-muted);margin-bottom:10px}
                .dmx-info-lines strong{display:block;color:var(--dmx-header);font-size:<?php echo max(15, (int) $base_font + 1); ?>px;margin-bottom:6px}
                .dmx-info-lines div{margin:2px 0}
                .dmx-section{padding:0 34px 24px}
                .dmx-team-bar{margin:0 34px 24px;padding:14px 18px;border:1px solid var(--dmx-border);border-radius:18px;background:#f8fafc;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:14px}
                .dmx-team-bar span{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dmx-muted)}
                .dmx-team-bar strong{font-size:<?php echo max(14, (int) $base_font + 1); ?>px;color:var(--dmx-header)}
                .dmx-table-wrap{border:1px solid var(--dmx-border);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;background:#fff}
                .dmx-doc-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
                .dmx-doc-table thead th{background:#f8fafc;color:var(--dmx-muted);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:left;padding:16px 18px;font-weight:800;border-bottom:1px solid var(--dmx-border)}
                .dmx-doc-table tbody td{padding:18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--dmx-border);vertical-align:top;color:var(--dmx-text)}
                .dmx-doc-table tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
                .dmx-doc-table .is-center{text-align:center}
                .dmx-doc-table .is-right{text-align:right}
                .dmx-doc-empty{padding:22px 18px;color:var(--dmx-muted)}
                .dmx-item-desc{font-weight:700;color:var(--dmx-header)}
                .dmx-item-sub{display:block;font-size:12px;color:var(--dmx-muted);margin-top:5px}
                .dmx-doc-bottom{padding:0 34px 30px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 340px;gap:20px;align-items:start}
                .dmx-notes-stack{display:grid;gap:18px}
                .dmx-copy-card{border:1px solid var(--dmx-border);border-radius:20px;background:#fff;padding:20px 22px}
                .dmx-copy-card h3{margin:0 0 10px;font-size:18px;color:var(--dmx-header)}
                .dmx-copy-card p,.dmx-copy-card div{margin:0;color:var(--dmx-text)}
                .dmx-total-card{border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#fbfcfd 100%);border:1px solid var(--dmx-border);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 8px 26px rgba(15,23,42,.06)}
                .dmx-total-head{padding:18px 22px;border-bottom:4px solid var(--dmx-accent)}
                .dmx-total-head small{display:block;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dmx-muted);font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px}
                .dmx-total-head strong{display:block;font-size:20px;color:var(--dmx-header)}
                .dmx-total-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;padding:16px 22px;border-top:1px solid var(--dmx-border);font-size:<?php echo max(14, (int) $base_font + 1); ?>px}
                .dmx-total-row span:first-child{color:var(--dmx-muted)}
                .dmx-total-row strong{color:var(--dmx-header)}
                .dmx-total-row.is-grand{background:var(--dmx-accent);font-size:<?php echo max(18, (int) $base_font + 4); ?>px;font-weight:800}
                .dmx-total-row.is-grand span,.dmx-total-row.is-grand strong{color:var(--dmx-header)}
                .dmx-status-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:999px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid var(--dmx-border);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--dmx-header);text-transform:capitalize}
                @media print{body{background:#fff;padding:0}.dmx-doc-shell{max-width:none}.dmx-doc-card{box-shadow:none;border-radius:0}.dmx-preview-banner{display:none}}
                @media (max-width: 820px){
                    body{padding:14px}
                    .dmx-doc-header,.dmx-doc-grid,.dmx-section,.dmx-doc-bottom{padding-left:18px;padding-right:18px}
                    .dmx-team-bar{margin-left:18px;margin-right:18px;align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column}
                    .dmx-doc-grid,.dmx-doc-bottom{grid-template-columns:1fr}
                    .dmx-doc-badge{min-width:0;width:100%}
                    .dmx-brand{flex-direction:column}
                    .dmx-brand-logo{max-height:56px}
                    .dmx-doc-table{display:block;overflow-x:auto;white-space:nowrap}
                }
            </style>
        </head>
        <body>
            <div class="dmx-doc-shell">
                <?php if ($is_preview) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-preview-banner">Preview Mode — internal staff preview</div>
                <?php endif; ?>

                <div class="dmx-doc-card">
                    <div class="dmx-doc-topbar"></div>

                    <div class="dmx-doc-header">
                        <div class="dmx-brand">
                            <?php if (!empty($company['logo_url'])) : ?>
                                <img class="dmx-brand-logo" src="<?php echo esc_url($company['logo_url']); ?>" alt="<?php echo esc_attr($company_name); ?> logo">
                            <?php endif; ?>
                            <div>
                                <h1 class="dmx-brand-title"><?php echo esc_html($company_name); ?></h1>
                                <div class="dmx-brand-sub">
                                    <?php if ($company['email'] !== '') : ?><div><?php echo esc_html($company['email']); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                    <?php if ($company['phone'] !== '') : ?><div><?php echo esc_html($company['phone']); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                    <?php if ($company_address !== '') : ?><div><?php echo esc_html($company_address); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                    <?php if ($company['website'] !== '') : ?><div><?php echo esc_html($company['website']); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                    <?php if ($company['tax_registration_number'] !== '') : ?><div><?php echo esc_html($company['tax_registration_number']); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-doc-badge">
                            <div class="dmx-doc-badge-label"><?php echo esc_html($title_label); ?></div>
                            <div class="dmx-doc-badge-title"><?php echo esc_html($document_number); ?></div>
                            <?php if (($doc_settings['show_title'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes' && $document_display_title !== '') : ?><div class="dmx-doc-badge-subtitle"><?php echo esc_html($document_display_title); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                            <div class="dmx-doc-badge-meta">
                                <div><strong>Date:</strong> <?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('F j, Y', get_post_timestamp($post))); ?></div>
                                <div><strong>Status:</strong> <span class="dmx-status-pill"><?php echo esc_html($document_type === 'invoice' ? $this->get_invoice_payment_status_label($status) : ($status !== '' ? $status : 'draft')); ?></span></div>
                                <?php if ($document_type === 'invoice' && $source_work_order_id_for_document > 0) : ?>
                                    <?php if ($salesperson_name !== '') : ?><div><strong>Sales / Created By:</strong> <?php echo esc_html($salesperson_name); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                    <?php if ($technician_name !== '') : ?><div><strong>Technician:</strong> <?php echo esc_html($technician_name); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                <?php elseif ($document_type === 'invoice' && $technician_name !== '') : ?>
                                    <div><strong>Technician:</strong> <?php echo esc_html($technician_name); ?></div>
                                <?php elseif ($salesperson_name !== '') : ?>
                                    <div><strong>Team Member:</strong> <?php echo esc_html($salesperson_name); ?></div>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-doc-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-info-card">
                            <div class="dmx-info-kicker">Customer Details</div>
                            <div class="dmx-info-lines">
                                <?php if ($customer_company !== '') : ?><strong><?php echo esc_html($customer_company); ?></strong><?php endif; ?>
                                <?php if ($customer_name !== '') : ?><div><?php echo esc_html($customer_name); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                <?php if ($customer_address !== '') : ?><div><?php echo esc_html($customer_address); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                <?php if ($customer_phone !== '') : ?><div><?php echo esc_html($customer_phone); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                                <?php if ($customer_email !== '') : ?><div><?php echo esc_html($customer_email); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-info-card">
                            <div class="dmx-info-kicker">Site Location Details</div>
                            <div class="dmx-info-lines">
                                <strong>Job Site / Install Address</strong>
                                <?php if ($site_location !== '') : ?>
                                    <div><?php echo nl2br(esc_html($site_location)); ?></div>
                                <?php else : ?>
                                    <div>Site location not provided.</div>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <?php if (($doc_settings['show_job_description'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes' && trim(wp_strip_all_tags($job_description_raw)) !== '') : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-section dmx-job-description-section">
                            <div class="dmx-copy-card">
                                <h3>Job Description</h3>
                                <div><?php echo $job_description; ?></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    <?php endif; ?>

                    <div class="dmx-section">
                        <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                            <table class="dmx-doc-table">
                                <?php if (($doc_settings['show_headers'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') : ?>
                                <thead>
                                    <tr>
                                        <?php foreach ($visible_cols as $col) : ?>
                                            <?php
                                            $class = '';
                                            if (in_array($col['key'], array('qty'), true)) {
                                                $class = ' class="is-center"';
                                            } elseif (in_array($col['key'], array('unit_cost','amount','tax','total'), true)) {
                                                $class = ' class="is-right"';
                                            }
                                            ?>
                                            <th<?php echo $class; ?>><?php echo esc_html($col['label']); ?></th>
                                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                                <tbody>
                                    <?php if (!empty($line_items)) : ?>
                                        <?php foreach ($line_items as $item) : ?>
                                            <?php
                                            $qty = isset($item['qty']) ? (float) $item['qty'] : 0;
                                            $unit_price = isset($item['unit_price']) ? (float) $item['unit_price'] : 0;
                                            $line_total = $qty * $unit_price;
                                            $is_taxable = !isset($item['taxable']) || $item['taxable'] !== 'no';
                                            $line_tax = $is_taxable ? ($line_total * ($combined_tax_rate / 100)) : 0;
                                            $line_grand = $line_total + $line_tax;
                                            $item_sku = $item['item_number'] ?? ($item['sku'] ?? '');
                                            ?>
                                            <tr>
                                                <?php foreach ($visible_cols as $col) : ?>
                                                    <?php if ($col['key'] === 'description') : ?>
                                                        <td>
                                                            <span class="dmx-item-desc"><?php echo esc_html($item['description'] ?? ''); ?></span>
                                                            <?php if ($item_sku !== '' && ($doc_settings['show_sku'] ?? 'no') !== 'yes') : ?>
                                                                <span class="dmx-item-sub">SKU: <?php echo esc_html($item_sku); ?></span>
                                                            <?php endif; ?>
                                                        </td>
                                                    <?php elseif ($col['key'] === 'sku') : ?>
                                                        <td><?php echo esc_html($item_sku); ?></td>
                                                    <?php elseif ($col['key'] === 'qty') : ?>
                                                        <td class="is-center"><?php echo esc_html($qty ? rtrim(rtrim(number_format($qty, 2, '.', ''), '0'), '.') : '0'); ?></td>
                                                    <?php elseif ($col['key'] === 'unit_cost') : ?>
                                                        <td class="is-right"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($unit_price)); ?></td>
                                                    <?php elseif ($col['key'] === 'amount') : ?>
                                                        <td class="is-right"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($line_total)); ?></td>
                                                    <?php elseif ($col['key'] === 'tax') : ?>
                                                        <td class="is-right"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($line_tax)); ?></td>
                                                    <?php elseif ($col['key'] === 'total') : ?>
                                                        <td class="is-right"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($line_grand)); ?></td>
                                                    <?php endif; ?>
                                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                                            </tr>
                                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                                    <?php else : ?>
                                        <tr><td class="dmx-doc-empty" colspan="<?php echo esc_attr(count($visible_cols)); ?>">No line items added.</td></tr>
                                    <?php endif; ?>
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-doc-bottom">
                        <div class="dmx-notes-stack">
                            <?php if (trim(wp_strip_all_tags($document_terms)) !== '') : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-copy-card">
                                    <h3>Terms</h3>
                                    <div><?php echo wp_kses_post(wpautop($document_terms)); ?></div>
                                </div>
                            <?php endif; ?>

                            <?php if (trim(wp_strip_all_tags($post->post_content)) !== '') : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-copy-card">
                                    <h3>Notes</h3>
                                    <div><?php echo $notes; ?></div>
                                </div>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-total-card">
                            <div class="dmx-total-head">
                                <small><?php echo esc_html($title_label); ?> Summary</small>
                                <strong><?php echo esc_html($title_label === 'Invoice' ? 'Amount Due' : 'Quote Total'); ?></strong>
                            </div>
                            <?php if (($doc_settings['show_subtotal'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-total-row"><span>Subtotal</span><strong><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($subtotal)); ?></strong></div>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                            <?php if (($doc_settings['show_tax'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-total-row"><span><?php echo esc_html($tax_label); ?></span><strong><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($totals['tax_total'])); ?></strong></div>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                            <?php if (($doc_settings['show_total'] ?? 'yes') === 'yes') : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-total-row is-grand"><span><?php echo esc_html($title_label === 'Invoice' ? 'Total' : 'Quote Total'); ?></span><strong><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($amount !== '' ? $amount : $totals['grand_total'])); ?></strong></div>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </body>
        </html>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_clean_work_order_item_rows_from_request($linked_quote_id = 0) {
        $item_rows = array();

        if (!empty($_POST['work_order_item_rows']) && is_array($_POST['work_order_item_rows'])) {
            foreach ($_POST['work_order_item_rows'] as $row) {
                $part_id = absint($row['part_id'] ?? 0);
                $item_number = sanitize_text_field($row['item_number'] ?? '');
                $description = sanitize_textarea_field($row['description'] ?? '');

                if ($part_id > 0 && get_post_type($part_id) === self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
                    $part_sku = $this->get_part_meta($part_id, 'dmx_part_internal_sku');
                    if ($part_sku === '') {
                        $part_sku = $this->get_part_meta($part_id, 'dmx_part_supplier_sku');
                    }
                    if ($item_number === '') {
                        $item_number = $part_sku;
                    }
                    if ($description === '') {
                        $description = get_the_title($part_id);
                    }
                }

                $search = sanitize_text_field($row['search'] ?? '');

                $clean = array(
                    'part_id' => $part_id,
                    'search' => $search,
                    'qty_ord' => sanitize_text_field($row['qty_ord'] ?? ''),
                    'uom' => sanitize_text_field($row['uom'] ?? ''),
                    'qty_ship' => sanitize_text_field($row['qty_ship'] ?? ''),
                    'item_number' => $item_number,
                    'description' => $description,
                );

                $row_has_data = ($part_id > 0);
                foreach (array('search', 'qty_ord', 'uom', 'qty_ship', 'item_number', 'description') as $field_key) {
                    if ($clean[$field_key] !== '') {
                        $row_has_data = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }

                if ($row_has_data) {
                    $item_rows[] = $clean;
                }
            }
        }

        if (empty($item_rows) && $linked_quote_id > 0 && get_post_type($linked_quote_id) === 'dm_quote') {
            $quote_items = get_post_meta($linked_quote_id, '_dmx_quote_line_items', true);
            if (is_array($quote_items)) {
                foreach ($quote_items as $quote_item) {
                    $part_id = absint($quote_item['part_id'] ?? 0);
                    $item_number = sanitize_text_field($quote_item['source_sku'] ?? '');
                    $description = sanitize_textarea_field($quote_item['description'] ?? '');

                    if ($part_id > 0 && get_post_type($part_id) === self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
                        $part_sku = $this->get_part_meta($part_id, 'dmx_part_internal_sku');
                        if ($part_sku === '') {
                            $part_sku = $this->get_part_meta($part_id, 'dmx_part_supplier_sku');
                        }
                        if ($item_number === '') {
                            $item_number = $part_sku;
                        }
                        if ($description === '') {
                            $description = get_the_title($part_id);
                        }
                    }

                    $item_rows[] = array(
                        'part_id' => $part_id,
                        'qty_ord' => sanitize_text_field($quote_item['qty'] ?? '1'),
                        'uom' => sanitize_text_field($quote_item['unit'] ?? ''),
                        'qty_ship' => sanitize_text_field($quote_item['qty'] ?? '1'),
                        'item_number' => $item_number,
                        'description' => $description,
                    );
                }
            }
        }

        return $item_rows;
    }

    private function create_work_order($tab) {
        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_title'] ?? '');
        if ($title === '') {
            $title = 'Work Order';
        }

        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_status'] ?? 'draft');
        $service_location = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_service_location_name'] ?? '');
        $onsite_comments = wp_kses_post($_POST['work_order_onsite_comments'] ?? '');
        $linked_quote_id = absint($_POST['work_order_linked_quote_id'] ?? 0);
        $schedule_date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_schedule_date'] ?? '');
        $requires_pull = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_requires_warehouse_pull'] ?? 'yes');
        $additional_technicians = isset($_POST['work_order_additional_technicians']) && is_array($_POST['work_order_additional_technicians']) ? array_map('absint', wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_additional_technicians'])) : array();

        $item_rows = $this->get_clean_work_order_item_rows_from_request($linked_quote_id);

        $labour_rows = array();
        if (!empty($_POST['work_order_labour_rows']) && is_array($_POST['work_order_labour_rows'])) {
            foreach ($_POST['work_order_labour_rows'] as $row) {
                $clean = array(
                    'date' => sanitize_text_field($row['date'] ?? ''),
                    'employee' => sanitize_text_field($row['employee'] ?? ''),
                    'hours' => sanitize_text_field($row['hours'] ?? ''),
                    'reg' => sanitize_text_field($row['reg'] ?? ''),
                    'ot' => sanitize_text_field($row['ot'] ?? ''),
                );
                if (implode('', $clean) !== '') {
                    $labour_rows[] = $clean;
                }
            }
        }

        $post_id = wp_insert_post(array(
            'post_type'   => 'dm_work_order',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_title'  => $title,
            'post_content'=> $onsite_comments,
            'post_author' => get_current_user_id(),
        ));

        if ($post_id) {
            $fields = array(
                'work_order_date' => 'work_order_date',
                'work_order_customer_id' => 'work_order_customer_id',
                'work_order_bill_to_company' => 'work_order_bill_to_company',
                'work_order_bill_to_address' => 'work_order_bill_to_address',
                'work_order_bill_to_phone' => 'work_order_bill_to_phone',
                'work_order_bill_to_attention' => 'work_order_bill_to_attention',
                'work_order_service_location_name' => 'work_order_service_location_name',
                'work_order_service_location_address' => 'work_order_service_location_address',
                'work_order_service_location_phone' => 'work_order_service_location_phone',
                'work_order_service_location_attention' => 'work_order_service_location_attention',
                'work_order_pre_visit_comments' => 'work_order_pre_visit_comments',
                'work_order_customer_issue' => 'work_order_customer_issue',
                'work_order_po_number' => 'work_order_po_number',
                'work_order_customer_number' => 'work_order_customer_number',
                'work_order_salesperson' => 'work_order_salesperson',
                'work_order_order_date' => 'work_order_order_date',
                'work_order_ship_via' => 'work_order_ship_via',
                'work_order_terms' => 'work_order_terms',
                'work_order_customer_signature' => 'work_order_customer_signature',
                'work_order_status' => 'work_order_status',
