                'work_order_job_type' => 'work_order_job_type',
                'work_order_billing_type' => 'work_order_billing_type',
                'work_order_schedule_date' => 'work_order_schedule_date',
                'work_order_schedule_start_time' => 'work_order_schedule_start_time',
                'work_order_schedule_end_time' => 'work_order_schedule_end_time',
                'work_order_schedule_note' => 'work_order_schedule_note',
                'work_order_equipment_required' => 'work_order_equipment_required',
                'work_order_equipment_type' => 'work_order_equipment_type',
                'work_order_equipment_source' => 'work_order_equipment_source',
                'work_order_equipment_unit' => 'work_order_equipment_unit',
                'work_order_equipment_vendor' => 'work_order_equipment_vendor',
                'work_order_equipment_notes' => 'work_order_equipment_notes',
                'work_order_primary_technician' => 'work_order_primary_technician',
            );

            foreach ($fields as $post_key => $meta_key) {
                update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_' . $meta_key, sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST[$post_key] ?? '')));
            }
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_work_order_customer_id', absint($_POST['work_order_customer_id'] ?? 0));

            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_bill_to_company'] ?? ''));
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site', $service_location);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_work_order_item_rows', $item_rows);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_work_order_labour_rows', $labour_rows);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_work_order_onsite_comments', wp_kses_post($_POST['work_order_onsite_comments'] ?? ''));
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', array_values(array_filter($additional_technicians)));
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_work_order_linked_quote_id', $linked_quote_id);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_work_order_requires_warehouse_pull', $requires_pull === 'no' ? 'no' : 'yes');
            $this->save_work_order_equipment_meta($post_id);
            if ($schedule_date !== '' && $requires_pull !== 'no') {
                $pull_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime($schedule_date . ' -1 day'));
                update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_work_order_warehouse_pull_date', $pull_date);
            }
            $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
            $this->handle_document_photo_uploads($post_id, 'work_order_photos');
            $this->ensure_document_number('work_order', $post_id);
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Work order created successfully.');
        }


        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not create work order.');
    }

    private function update_work_order($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_create_work_orders()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You are not allowed to update work orders.');
        }

        $work_order_id = absint($_POST['work_order_id'] ?? 0);

        if ($work_order_id <= 0 || get_post_type($work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order' || !current_user_can('edit_post', $work_order_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that work order to update.');
        }

        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_title'] ?? '');
        if ($title === '') {
            $title = 'Work Order';
        }

        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_status'] ?? 'draft');
        $service_location = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_service_location_name'] ?? '');
        $onsite_comments = wp_kses_post($_POST['work_order_onsite_comments'] ?? '');
        $linked_quote_id = absint($_POST['work_order_linked_quote_id'] ?? 0);
        $schedule_date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_schedule_date'] ?? '');
        $requires_pull = sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_requires_warehouse_pull'] ?? 'yes');
        $additional_technicians = isset($_POST['work_order_additional_technicians']) && is_array($_POST['work_order_additional_technicians']) ? array_map('absint', wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_additional_technicians'])) : array();

        $item_rows = $this->get_clean_work_order_item_rows_from_request($linked_quote_id);

        $labour_rows = array();
        if (!empty($_POST['work_order_labour_rows']) && is_array($_POST['work_order_labour_rows'])) {
            foreach ($_POST['work_order_labour_rows'] as $row) {
                $clean = array(
                    'date' => sanitize_text_field($row['date'] ?? ''),
                    'employee' => sanitize_text_field($row['employee'] ?? ''),
                    'hours' => sanitize_text_field($row['hours'] ?? ''),
                    'reg' => sanitize_text_field($row['reg'] ?? ''),
                    'ot' => sanitize_text_field($row['ot'] ?? ''),
                );
                if (implode('', $clean) !== '') {
                    $labour_rows[] = $clean;
                }
            }
        }

        $updated = wp_update_post(array(
            'ID'           => $work_order_id,
            'post_title'   => $title,
            'post_content' => $onsite_comments,
        ), true);

        if (!is_wp_error($updated)) {
            $fields = array(
                'work_order_date' => 'work_order_date',
                'work_order_customer_id' => 'work_order_customer_id',
                'work_order_bill_to_company' => 'work_order_bill_to_company',
                'work_order_bill_to_address' => 'work_order_bill_to_address',
                'work_order_bill_to_phone' => 'work_order_bill_to_phone',
                'work_order_bill_to_attention' => 'work_order_bill_to_attention',
                'work_order_service_location_name' => 'work_order_service_location_name',
                'work_order_service_location_address' => 'work_order_service_location_address',
                'work_order_service_location_phone' => 'work_order_service_location_phone',
                'work_order_service_location_attention' => 'work_order_service_location_attention',
                'work_order_pre_visit_comments' => 'work_order_pre_visit_comments',
                'work_order_customer_issue' => 'work_order_customer_issue',
                'work_order_po_number' => 'work_order_po_number',
                'work_order_customer_number' => 'work_order_customer_number',
                'work_order_salesperson' => 'work_order_salesperson',
                'work_order_order_date' => 'work_order_order_date',
                'work_order_ship_via' => 'work_order_ship_via',
                'work_order_terms' => 'work_order_terms',
                'work_order_customer_signature' => 'work_order_customer_signature',
                'work_order_status' => 'work_order_status',
                'work_order_job_type' => 'work_order_job_type',
                'work_order_billing_type' => 'work_order_billing_type',
                'work_order_schedule_date' => 'work_order_schedule_date',
                'work_order_schedule_start_time' => 'work_order_schedule_start_time',
                'work_order_schedule_end_time' => 'work_order_schedule_end_time',
                'work_order_schedule_note' => 'work_order_schedule_note',
                'work_order_equipment_required' => 'work_order_equipment_required',
                'work_order_equipment_type' => 'work_order_equipment_type',
                'work_order_equipment_source' => 'work_order_equipment_source',
                'work_order_equipment_unit' => 'work_order_equipment_unit',
                'work_order_equipment_vendor' => 'work_order_equipment_vendor',
                'work_order_equipment_notes' => 'work_order_equipment_notes',
                'work_order_primary_technician' => 'work_order_primary_technician',
            );

            foreach ($fields as $post_key => $meta_key) {
                update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_' . $meta_key, sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST[$post_key] ?? '')));
            }
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_customer_id', absint($_POST['work_order_customer_id'] ?? 0));

            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_customer_name', sanitize_text_field($_POST['work_order_bill_to_company'] ?? ''));
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_site', $service_location);
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_item_rows', $item_rows);
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_labour_rows', $labour_rows);
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_onsite_comments', wp_kses_post($_POST['work_order_onsite_comments'] ?? ''));
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', array_values(array_filter($additional_technicians)));
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_linked_quote_id', $linked_quote_id);
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_requires_warehouse_pull', $requires_pull === 'no' ? 'no' : 'yes');
            $this->save_work_order_equipment_meta($work_order_id);

            if ($schedule_date !== '' && $requires_pull !== 'no') {
                $pull_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime($schedule_date . ' -1 day'));
                update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_warehouse_pull_date', $pull_date);
            } else {
                delete_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_warehouse_pull_date');
            }

            $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($work_order_id);
            $this->handle_document_photo_uploads($work_order_id, 'work_order_photos');
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Work order updated successfully.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not update work order.');
    }



private function reschedule_work_order($tab) {
    if (!$this->current_user_can_reschedule_work_orders()) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You are not allowed to reschedule work orders.');
    }

    $work_order_id = absint($_POST['work_order_id'] ?? 0);
    if ($work_order_id <= 0 || get_post_type($work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order' || !$this->current_user_can_access_work_order($work_order_id)) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that work order to reschedule.');
    }

    $schedule_date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_schedule_date'] ?? ''));
    $schedule_start_time = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_schedule_start_time'] ?? ''));
    $schedule_end_time = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_schedule_end_time'] ?? ''));
    $new_primary_technician = absint($_POST['work_order_primary_technician'] ?? 0);

    if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $schedule_date)) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'A valid schedule date is required.');
    }

    if ($schedule_start_time !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $schedule_start_time)) {
        $schedule_start_time = '';
    }

    if ($schedule_end_time !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $schedule_end_time)) {
        $schedule_end_time = '';
    }

    update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', $schedule_date);
    update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_status', 'scheduled');
    update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_status', 'scheduled');

    if ($new_primary_technician > 0) {
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', $new_primary_technician);
    }

    if ($schedule_start_time !== '') {
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', $schedule_start_time);
    }

    if ($schedule_end_time !== '') {
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_end_time', $schedule_end_time);
    }

    if (get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_requires_warehouse_pull', true) !== 'no') {
        $pull_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime($schedule_date . ' -1 day'));
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_warehouse_pull_date', $pull_date);
    }

    $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Work order rescheduled.');
}

private function mark_work_order_scheduled_complete($tab) {
    $work_order_id = absint($_POST['work_order_id'] ?? 0);

    if ($work_order_id <= 0 || get_post_type($work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order') {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that work order.');
    }

    update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_status', 'complete');
    update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_status', 'complete');
    $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Work order marked complete.');
}

    private function get_payment_method_labels() {
        return array(
            'cash' => 'Cash',
            'debit_card' => 'Debit Card',
            'credit_card' => 'Credit Card',
            'etransfer' => 'E-Transfer',
            'cheque' => 'Cheque / Check',
            'bank_transfer' => 'Bank Transfer',
            'paypal' => 'PayPal',
        );
    }

    private function get_enabled_sales_payment_method_labels() {
        $labels = $this->get_payment_method_labels();
        $settings = $this->get_currency_payment_settings();
        $enabled = array();

        foreach ($labels as $key => $label) {
            $sales_enabled = isset($settings['payment_methods'][$key]['sales']) ? $settings['payment_methods'][$key]['sales'] : 'yes';
            if ($sales_enabled === 'yes') {
                $enabled[$key] = $label;
            }
        }

        if (empty($enabled)) {
            $enabled = array(
                'cash' => $labels['cash'],
                'debit_card' => $labels['debit_card'],
                'credit_card' => $labels['credit_card'],
                'etransfer' => $labels['etransfer'],
            );
        }

        return $enabled;
    }

    private function technician_complete_work_order($tab) {
        $work_order_id = absint($_POST['work_order_id'] ?? 0);

        if ($work_order_id <= 0 || get_post_type($work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order' || !$this->current_user_can_access_work_order($work_order_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that assigned work order.');
        }

        $actual_hours = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['work_order_actual_hours'] ?? '');
        if ($actual_hours === '' || (float) $actual_hours <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please enter the actual time it took to complete the work order.');
        }

        $completion_date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_completion_date'] ?? current_time('Y-m-d')));
        if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $completion_date)) {
            $completion_date = current_time('Y-m-d');
        }

        $completion_notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['work_order_completion_notes'] ?? '');
        $create_invoice = !empty($_POST['work_order_create_invoice']);
        $customer_paid = !empty($_POST['work_order_customer_paid']);
        if ($customer_paid) {
            $create_invoice = true;
        }

        $payment_methods = $this->get_payment_method_labels();
        $payment_method = sanitize_key($_POST['work_order_payment_method'] ?? '');
        $payment_reference = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_payment_reference'] ?? ''));
        $payment_amount = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['work_order_payment_amount'] ?? '');

        if ($customer_paid && ($payment_method === '' || !isset($payment_methods[$payment_method]))) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please select how the customer paid.');
        }

        if ($customer_paid && ($payment_amount === '' || (float) $payment_amount < 0)) {
            $payment_amount = '0.00';
        }

        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_status', 'complete');
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_status', 'complete');
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_actual_hours', $actual_hours);
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completed_at', $completion_date);
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completed_by', get_current_user_id());
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completion_notes', $completion_notes);

        $labour_rows = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_labour_rows', true);
        if (!is_array($labour_rows)) {
            $labour_rows = array();
        }
        $labour_rows[] = array(
            'date' => $completion_date,
            'employee' => $this->get_current_team_member_name(),
            'hours' => $actual_hours,
            'reg' => $actual_hours,
            'ot' => '',
        );
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_labour_rows', $labour_rows);

        $invoice_id = 0;
        if ($create_invoice) {
            $invoice_id = $this->create_invoice_from_work_order($work_order_id, $customer_paid, $payment_method, $payment_amount, $payment_reference, $completion_notes);
            if (!$invoice_id) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Work order was completed, but the invoice could not be created.');
            }
        }

        if ($invoice_id > 0 && $customer_paid) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Work order completed, invoice created, and payment recorded.');
        }

        if ($invoice_id > 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Work order completed and invoice created.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Work order completed and actual time saved.');
    }

    private function build_invoice_line_items_from_work_order($work_order_id, $payment_amount = '') {
        $line_items = array();
        $linked_quote_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_linked_quote_id', true));

        if ($linked_quote_id > 0 && get_post_type($linked_quote_id) === 'dm_quote') {
            $quote_items = get_post_meta($linked_quote_id, '_dmx_quote_line_items', true);
            if (is_array($quote_items) && !empty($quote_items)) {
                return $quote_items;
            }
        }

        $item_rows = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_item_rows', true);
        if (!is_array($item_rows)) {
            $item_rows = array();
        }

        foreach ($item_rows as $row) {
            if (!is_array($row)) {
                continue;
            }

            $part_id = absint($row['part_id'] ?? 0);
            $description = trim((string) ($row['description'] ?? ''));
            if ($description === '') {
                $description = trim((string) ($row['search'] ?? ''));
            }
            if ($description === '' && $part_id > 0) {
                $description = get_the_title($part_id);
            }
            if ($description === '') {
                $description = trim((string) ($row['item_number'] ?? ''));
            }
            if ($description === '') {
                continue;
            }

            $qty_raw = $row['qty_ship'] ?? ($row['qty_ord'] ?? 1);
            $qty = is_numeric($qty_raw) ? (float) $qty_raw : 1;
            if ($qty <= 0) {
                $qty = 1;
            }

            $unit_price = 0;
            $true_unit_cost = 0;
            if ($part_id > 0) {
                $sell_price = $this->get_company_part_price_value($part_id, 'sell_price', '');
                if (is_numeric($sell_price)) {
                    $unit_price = (float) $sell_price;
                }
                $part_cost = $this->get_company_part_price_value($part_id, 'cost', '');
                if (is_numeric($part_cost)) {
                    $true_unit_cost = (float) $part_cost;
                }
            }

            $line_items[] = array(
                'type' => ($part_id > 0 ? 'part' : 'custom'),
                'part_id' => $part_id,
                'source_type' => ($part_id > 0 ? 'part' : ''),
                'source_id' => $part_id,
                'update_default' => 'no',
                'search' => ($part_id > 0 ? get_the_title($part_id) : $description),
                'description' => $description,
                'qty' => $qty,
                'unit_price' => number_format($unit_price, 2, '.', ''),
                'line_total' => number_format($qty * $unit_price, 2, '.', ''),
                'true_unit_cost' => number_format($true_unit_cost, 2, '.', ''),
                'line_true_cost' => number_format($qty * $true_unit_cost, 2, '.', ''),
                'taxable' => 'yes',
            );
        }

        $subtotal = 0;
        foreach ($line_items as $item) {
            $subtotal += (float) ($item['line_total'] ?? 0);
        }

        if (($subtotal <= 0) && is_numeric($payment_amount) && (float) $payment_amount > 0) {
            $work_order = get_post($work_order_id);
            $description = $work_order ? ('Completed work - ' . $work_order->post_title) : 'Completed work';
            $line_items = array(array(
                'type' => 'custom',
                'part_id' => 0,
                'source_type' => '',
                'source_id' => 0,
                'update_default' => 'no',
                'search' => $description,
                'description' => $description,
                'qty' => 1,
                'unit_price' => number_format((float) $payment_amount, 2, '.', ''),
                'line_total' => number_format((float) $payment_amount, 2, '.', ''),
                'true_unit_cost' => '0.00',
                'line_true_cost' => '0.00',
                'taxable' => 'yes',
            ));
        }

        return $line_items;
    }

    private function create_invoice_from_work_order($work_order_id, $customer_paid = false, $payment_method = '', $payment_amount = '', $payment_reference = '', $completion_notes = '') {
        $work_order = get_post($work_order_id);
        if (!$work_order || get_post_type($work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order') {
            return 0;
        }

        $existing_invoice_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_converted_invoice_id', true));
        if ($existing_invoice_id > 0 && get_post_type($existing_invoice_id) === 'dm_invoice') {
            $this->sync_invoice_involvement_tracking($existing_invoice_id, $work_order_id, '');
            if ($customer_paid) {
                $existing_total = get_post_meta($existing_invoice_id, '_dmx_total', true);
                update_post_meta($existing_invoice_id, '_dmx_status', 'paid');
                update_post_meta($existing_invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_at', current_time('mysql'));
                update_post_meta($existing_invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_amount', ($payment_amount !== '' ? $payment_amount : $existing_total));
                update_post_meta($existing_invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_method', sanitize_key($payment_method));
                update_post_meta($existing_invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_reference', sanitize_text_field($payment_reference));
                update_post_meta($existing_invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_received_by', get_current_user_id());
            }
            return $existing_invoice_id;
        }

        $line_items = $this->build_invoice_line_items_from_work_order($work_order_id, $payment_amount);
        $tax_profile = $this->get_document_tax_profile_from_request('invoice');
        $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($line_items, $tax_profile);
        $amount = number_format($totals['grand_total'], 2, '.', '');
        $customer = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true);
        $customer_email = '';
        if ($customer !== '') {
            $customer_post = $this->find_customer_by_name($customer);
            if ($customer_post) {
                $customer_email = get_post_meta($customer_post->ID, '_dmx_customer_email', true);
            }
        }

        $site_location = trim((string) get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_name', true));
        $site_address = trim((string) get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_address', true));
        if ($site_address !== '') {
            $site_location = trim($site_location . "\n" . $site_address);
        }

        $job_description_parts = array_filter(array(
            get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_customer_issue', true),
            get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_onsite_comments', true),
            $completion_notes,
        ));
        $job_description = implode("\n\n", $job_description_parts);

        $invoice_id = wp_insert_post(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_invoice',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_title' => 'Invoice - ' . $work_order->post_title,
            'post_content' => $completion_notes,
            'post_author' => get_current_user_id(),
        ));

        if (!$invoice_id || is_wp_error($invoice_id)) {
            return 0;
        }

        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_customer_name', $customer);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_customer_email', $customer_email);
        $original_salesperson_name = $this->get_work_order_original_salesperson_name($work_order_id);
        if ($original_salesperson_name === '') {
            $original_salesperson_name = $this->get_current_team_member_name();
        }
        $technician_name = $this->get_current_team_member_name();

        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_site_location', $site_location);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_job_description', $job_description);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', $original_salesperson_name);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_original_salesperson_name', $original_salesperson_name);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_technician_name', $technician_name);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_amount', $amount);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_status', $customer_paid ? 'paid' : 'draft');
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_line_items', $line_items);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_tax_profile', $tax_profile);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_subtotal', number_format($totals['subtotal'], 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_tax_total', number_format($totals['tax_total'], 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_total', $amount);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_line_items_total', $totals['grand_total']);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', $work_order_id);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_company_key', $this->get_current_user_company_key());
        $this->sync_invoice_involvement_tracking($invoice_id, $work_order_id, $original_salesperson_name);
        $this->ensure_document_number('invoice', $invoice_id);

        if ($customer_paid) {
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_at', current_time('mysql'));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_amount', ($payment_amount !== '' ? $payment_amount : $amount));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_method', sanitize_key($payment_method));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_reference', sanitize_text_field($payment_reference));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_received_by', get_current_user_id());
        }

        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_converted_invoice_id', $invoice_id);
        return $invoice_id;
    }

    private function save_invoice_payment_and_work_order_closeout($invoice_id, $source_work_order_id, $invoice_status, $calculated_amount = 0) {
        $invoice_id = absint($invoice_id);
        $source_work_order_id = absint($source_work_order_id);
        $invoice_status = sanitize_key((string) $invoice_status);

        $payment_methods = $this->get_payment_method_labels();
        $payment_method = sanitize_key($_POST['invoice_payment_method'] ?? '');
        $payment_reference = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['invoice_payment_reference'] ?? ''));
        $paid_amount = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['invoice_paid_amount'] ?? '');

        if ($payment_method !== '' && !isset($payment_methods[$payment_method])) {
            $payment_method = '';
        }

        if (in_array($invoice_status, array('paid', 'partial'), true)) {
            if ($paid_amount === '') {
                if ($invoice_status === 'paid') {
                    $paid_amount = get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_total', true);
                    if ($paid_amount === '') {
                        $paid_amount = number_format((float) $calculated_amount, 2, '.', '');
                    }
                } else {
                    $paid_amount = '0.00';
                }
            }
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_at', get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_at', true) ?: current_time('mysql'));
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_amount', $paid_amount);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_method', $payment_method);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_reference', $payment_reference);
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_received_by', get_current_user_id());
        } else {
            delete_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_at');
            delete_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_amount');
            delete_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_method');
            delete_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_reference');
            delete_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_received_by');
        }

        if ($source_work_order_id > 0 && $this->current_user_can_access_work_order($source_work_order_id)) {
            $actual_hours = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['invoice_work_order_actual_hours'] ?? '');
            $completion_date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['invoice_work_order_completion_date'] ?? current_time('Y-m-d')));
            if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $completion_date)) {
                $completion_date = current_time('Y-m-d');
            }
            $completion_notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['invoice_work_order_completion_notes'] ?? '');

            if ($actual_hours !== '' && (float) $actual_hours > 0) {
                update_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_actual_hours', $actual_hours);
                update_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completed_at', $completion_date);
                update_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completed_by', get_current_user_id());
                update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_technician_name', $this->get_current_team_member_name());
                update_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completion_notes', $completion_notes);
                update_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_status', 'complete');
                update_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_status', 'complete');

                $labour_rows = get_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_labour_rows', true);
                if (!is_array($labour_rows)) {
                    $labour_rows = array();
                }

                $updated_row = false;
                foreach ($labour_rows as $index => $row) {
                    if (is_array($row) && ($row['source'] ?? '') === 'invoice_closeout' && absint($row['invoice_id'] ?? 0) === $invoice_id) {
                        $labour_rows[$index] = array(
                            'date' => $completion_date,
                            'employee' => $this->get_current_team_member_name(),
                            'hours' => $actual_hours,
                            'reg' => $actual_hours,
                            'ot' => '',
                            'source' => 'invoice_closeout',
                            'invoice_id' => $invoice_id,
                        );
                        $updated_row = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }

                if (!$updated_row) {
                    $labour_rows[] = array(
                        'date' => $completion_date,
                        'employee' => $this->get_current_team_member_name(),
                        'hours' => $actual_hours,
                        'reg' => $actual_hours,
                        'ot' => '',
                        'source' => 'invoice_closeout',
                        'invoice_id' => $invoice_id,
                    );
                }

                update_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_labour_rows', $labour_rows);
            }
        }
    }

    private function get_sales_invoice_edit_url($invoice_id) {
        return add_query_arg(array(
            'dmx_tab' => 'sales',
            'dmx_subtab' => 'invoices',
            'dmx_edit_invoice' => absint($invoice_id),
        ), $this->get_portal_page_url());
    }

    private function convert_work_order_to_invoice($tab) {
        $work_order_id = absint($_POST['work_order_id'] ?? 0);

        if ($work_order_id <= 0 || get_post_type($work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order' || !$this->current_user_can_access_work_order($work_order_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that assigned work order.');
        }

        $invoice_id = $this->create_invoice_from_work_order($work_order_id, false, '', '', '', '');
        if (!$invoice_id) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not convert this work order into an invoice.');
        }

        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_status', 'invoicing');
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_status', 'invoicing');

        $url = add_query_arg(array(
            'dmx_msg_type' => 'success',
            'dmx_msg' => rawurlencode('Work order converted to invoice. Add final parts, actual time, and payment status here.'),
        ), $this->get_sales_invoice_edit_url($invoice_id));

        wp_safe_redirect($url);
        exit;
    }

    private function mark_work_order_return_required($tab) {
        $work_order_id = absint($_POST['work_order_id'] ?? 0);

        if ($work_order_id <= 0 || get_post_type($work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order' || !$this->current_user_can_access_work_order($work_order_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that assigned work order.');
        }

        $reason = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_return_reason'] ?? ''));
        $parts_needed = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_return_parts_needed'] ?? ''));
        $notes = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_return_notes'] ?? ''));
        $suggested_date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_return_suggested_date'] ?? ''));
        $suggested_time = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_return_suggested_time'] ?? ''));

        if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $suggested_date)) {
            $suggested_date = '';
        }
        if (!preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $suggested_time)) {
            $suggested_time = '';
        }

        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_status', 'return_required');
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_status', 'return_required');
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_required', 'yes');
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_reason', $reason);
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_parts_needed', $parts_needed);
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_notes', $notes);
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_suggested_date', $suggested_date);
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_suggested_time', $suggested_time);
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_requested_by', get_current_user_id());
        update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_requested_at', current_time('mysql'));

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Return visit flagged. The office can reschedule this work order when ready.');
    }

    private function mark_invoice_paid($tab) {
        $invoice_id = absint($_POST['invoice_id'] ?? 0);

        if ($invoice_id <= 0 || get_post_type($invoice_id) !== 'dm_invoice' || !$this->post_matches_current_company($invoice_id) || !$this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('payments')) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('payments', 'error', 'Could not find that invoice to mark as paid.');
        }

        $payment_methods = $this->get_payment_method_labels();
        $payment_method = sanitize_key($_POST['payment_method'] ?? '');
        $payment_reference = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['payment_reference'] ?? ''));
        $paid_amount = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['paid_amount'] ?? '');

        if ($payment_method !== '' && !isset($payment_methods[$payment_method])) {
            $payment_method = '';
        }

        if ($paid_amount === '') {
            $paid_amount = get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_total', true);
            if ($paid_amount === '') {
                $paid_amount = get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_amount', true);
            }
        }

        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_status', 'paid');
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_at', current_time('mysql'));
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_amount', $paid_amount);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_method', $payment_method);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_reference', $payment_reference);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_received_by', get_current_user_id());

        $this->redirect_with_message('payments', 'success', 'Invoice marked as paid.');
    }

    private function sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request($key) {
        $raw = $_POST[$key] ?? array();
        if (!is_array($raw)) {
            return array();
        }
        $clean = array();
        foreach ($raw as $value) {
            $value = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($value));
            if ($value !== '') {
                $clean[] = $value;
            }
        }
        return array_values(array_unique($clean));
    }

    private function sanitize_hazard_signature_data_url_from_request($key) {
        if (!isset($_POST[$key])) {
            return '';
        }

        $value = trim((string) wp_unslash($_POST[$key]));
        if ($value === '') {
            return '';
        }

        if (strlen($value) > 750000) {
            return '';
        }

        if (!preg_match('/^data:image\/png;base64,[A-Za-z0-9+\/=]+$/', $value)) {
            return '';
        }

        return $value;
    }

    private function sanitize_hazard_task_rows_from_request() {
        $raw_rows = $_POST['hazard_task_rows'] ?? array();
        if (!is_array($raw_rows)) {
            return array();
        }

        $clean_rows = array();
        foreach ($raw_rows as $row) {
            if (!is_array($row)) {
                continue;
            }
            $task = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($row['task'] ?? ''));
            $task_custom = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($row['task_custom'] ?? ''));
            if ($task === '__custom__') {
                $task = $task_custom;
            }
            $hazards = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($row['hazards'] ?? ''));
            $risk = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($row['risk'] ?? ''));
            $plan = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($row['plan'] ?? ''));
            if ($task === '' && $hazards === '' && $risk === '' && $plan === '') {
                continue;
            }
            $clean_rows[] = array(
                'task' => $task,
                'hazards' => $hazards,
                'risk' => $risk,
                'plan' => $plan,
            );
        }
        return $clean_rows;
    }

    private function create_hazard_assessment($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_tab('calculators')) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have access to create hazard assessments.');
        }

        $title = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_title'] ?? ''));
        $customer = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_customer'] ?? ''));
        $site_address = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_site_address'] ?? ''));
        $work_to_be_done = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_work_to_be_done'] ?? ''));
        $task_location = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_task_location'] ?? ''));
        $permit_job_number = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_permit_job_number'] ?? ''));
        $muster_point = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_muster_point'] ?? ''));
        $emergency_number = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_emergency_number'] ?? ''));
        $stars_number = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_stars_number'] ?? ''));
        $linked_work_order_id = absint($_POST['hazard_work_order_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($linked_work_order_id > 0 && (get_post_type($linked_work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order' || !$this->current_user_can_access_work_order($linked_work_order_id))) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'The selected work order could not be linked.');
        }
        $status = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_status'] ?? 'draft'));
        $highest_risk = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_highest_risk'] ?? ''));
        $notes = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_notes'] ?? ''));
        $hazards_remaining = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_hazards_remaining'] ?? 'no'));
        $hazards_remaining_explanation = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_hazards_remaining_explanation'] ?? ''));
        $incidents_injuries = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_incidents_injuries'] ?? 'no'));
        $incidents_injuries_explanation = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_incidents_injuries_explanation'] ?? ''));

        if ($hazards_remaining === 'yes' && $hazards_remaining_explanation === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please explain the hazards remaining before saving.');
        }

        if ($incidents_injuries === 'yes' && $incidents_injuries_explanation === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please explain the incidents or injuries before saving.');
        }

        if ($title === '') {
            $title = $customer !== '' ? 'Hazard Assessment - ' . $customer : 'Hazard Assessment - ' . current_time('Y-m-d');
        }
        if (!in_array($status, array('draft', 'complete', 'review_required', 'unsafe'), true)) {
            $status = 'draft';
        }

        $post_id = wp_insert_post(array(
            'post_type' => self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE,
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_title' => $title,
            'post_content' => $notes,
            'post_author' => get_current_user_id(),
        ));

        if (!$post_id || is_wp_error($post_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not save the hazard assessment.');
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_customer_name', $customer);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_site_address', $site_address);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_work_to_be_done', $work_to_be_done);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_task_location', $task_location);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_permit_job_number', $permit_job_number);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_muster_point', $muster_point);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_emergency_number', $emergency_number);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_stars_number', $stars_number);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_work_order_id', $linked_work_order_id);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_ppe_inspected', sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_ppe_inspected'] ?? 'no')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_items_inspected', sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_items_inspected'] ?? 'no')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_equipment_inspection', $this->sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request('hazard_equipment_inspection'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_working_alone', sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_working_alone'] ?? 'no')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_warning_ribbon_needed', sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_warning_ribbon_needed'] ?? 'no')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_permits_closed_out', sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_permits_closed_out'] ?? 'no')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_hazards_remaining', $hazards_remaining);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_hazards_remaining_explanation', $hazards_remaining_explanation);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_area_cleaned', sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_area_cleaned'] ?? 'no')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_incidents_injuries', $incidents_injuries);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_incidents_injuries_explanation', $incidents_injuries_explanation);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_worker_signatures', sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_worker_signatures'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_worker_signature_image', $this->sanitize_hazard_signature_data_url_from_request('hazard_worker_signature_image'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_supervisor_signature', sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_supervisor_signature'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_supervisor_signature_image', $this->sanitize_hazard_signature_data_url_from_request('hazard_supervisor_signature_image'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_client_signature', sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_client_signature'] ?? '')));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_client_signature_image', $this->sanitize_hazard_signature_data_url_from_request('hazard_client_signature_image'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_highest_risk', $highest_risk);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_notes', $notes);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_environmental', $this->sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request('hazard_environmental'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_ergonomic', $this->sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request('hazard_ergonomic'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_access_egress', $this->sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request('hazard_access_egress'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_overhead', $this->sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request('hazard_overhead'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_rigging_hoisting', $this->sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request('hazard_rigging_hoisting'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_electrical', $this->sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request('hazard_electrical'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_personal_limitations', $this->sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request('hazard_personal_limitations'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_garage_door', $this->sanitize_hazard_checkbox_group_from_request('hazard_garage_door'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_task_rows', $this->sanitize_hazard_task_rows_from_request());
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_assessed_by', $this->get_current_team_member_name());
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_hazard_created_at', current_time('mysql'));

        $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
        if ($linked_work_order_id > 0) {
            $linked_hazard_ids = get_post_meta($linked_work_order_id, '_dmx_linked_hazard_assessments', true);
            if (!is_array($linked_hazard_ids)) {
                $linked_hazard_ids = array();
            }
            $linked_hazard_ids[] = (int) $post_id;
            $linked_hazard_ids = array_values(array_unique(array_map('absint', $linked_hazard_ids)));
            update_post_meta($linked_work_order_id, '_dmx_linked_hazard_assessments', $linked_hazard_ids);
        }
        $this->handle_document_photo_uploads($post_id, 'hazard_photos');

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Hazard assessment saved successfully.');
    }

    private function create_inspection($tab) {
        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['inspection_title'] ?? '');
        $customer = sanitize_text_field($_POST['inspection_customer'] ?? '');
        $site = sanitize_text_field($_POST['inspection_site'] ?? '');
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['inspection_status'] ?? 'draft');
        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['inspection_notes'] ?? '');
        if (empty($title)) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Inspection title is required.'); }
        $post_id = wp_insert_post(array('post_type' => 'dm_inspection','post_status' => 'publish','post_title' => $title,'post_content' => $notes,'post_author' => get_current_user_id()));
        if ($post_id) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', $customer);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site', $site);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
            $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Inspection created successfully.');
        }
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not create inspection.');
    }

    private function create_customer($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_add_customers()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to add customers.');
        }

        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_title'] ?? '');
        $company = sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_company'] ?? '');
        $email = sanitize_email($_POST['customer_email'] ?? '');
        $phone = sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_phone'] ?? '');
        $address_1 = sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_address_1'] ?? '');
        $address_2 = sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_address_2'] ?? '');
        $city = sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_city'] ?? '');
        $province = sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_province'] ?? '');
        $postal_code = sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_postal_code'] ?? '');
        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['customer_notes'] ?? '');
        if (empty($title)) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Customer name is required.'); }
        $post_id = wp_insert_post(array('post_type' => 'dm_customer','post_status' => 'publish','post_title' => $title,'post_content' => $notes,'post_author' => get_current_user_id()));
        if ($post_id) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_company_name', $company);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_email', $email);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_phone', $phone);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_address_1', $address_1);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_address_2', $address_2);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_city', $city);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_province', $province);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_postal_code', $postal_code);
            $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
            $this->ensure_customer_number($post_id);
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Customer created successfully.');
        }
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not create customer.');
    }


    private function update_customer($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_customers()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to edit customers.');
        }

        $customer_id = absint($_POST['customer_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($customer_id <= 0 || get_post_type($customer_id) !== 'dm_customer' || !$this->post_matches_current_company($customer_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Customer record could not be found.');
        }

        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_title'] ?? '');
        if (empty($title)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Customer name is required.');
        }

        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['customer_notes'] ?? '');
        wp_update_post(array(
            'ID' => $customer_id,
            'post_title' => $title,
            'post_content' => $notes,
        ));

        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_company_name', sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_company'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_email', sanitize_email($_POST['customer_email'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_phone', sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_phone'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_address_1', sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_address_1'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_address_2', sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_address_2'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_city', sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_city'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_province', sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_province'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_postal_code', sanitize_text_field($_POST['customer_postal_code'] ?? ''));
        $this->ensure_customer_number($customer_id);

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Customer updated successfully.');
    }

    private function delete_customer($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_customers()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to delete customers.');
        }

        $customer_id = absint($_POST['customer_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($customer_id <= 0 || get_post_type($customer_id) !== 'dm_customer' || !$this->post_matches_current_company($customer_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Customer record could not be found.');
        }

        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_deleted_by_user_id', get_current_user_id());
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_deleted_by_user_name', wp_get_current_user()->display_name);
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_deleted_at', current_time('mysql'));
        update_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_recovery_type', 'customer');

        wp_trash_post($customer_id);
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Customer moved to Recovery Bin. Managers can restore it from Settings > Backup & Recovery.');
    }
    private function redirect_with_message($tab, $type, $message) {
        $args = array(
            'dmx_tab' => sanitize_key($tab),
            'dmx_msg_type' => sanitize_key($type),
            'dmx_msg' => rawurlencode($message),
        );

        $subtab = isset($_REQUEST['dmx_subtab']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_REQUEST['dmx_subtab'])) : '';
        if ($subtab !== '') {
            $args['dmx_subtab'] = $subtab;
        }

        $tool = isset($_REQUEST['dmx_tool']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_REQUEST['dmx_tool'])) : '';
        if ($tool !== '') {
            $args['dmx_tool'] = $tool;
        }

        $setup_step = isset($_REQUEST['dmx_setup_step']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_REQUEST['dmx_setup_step'])) : '';
        if ($setup_step !== '') {
            $args['dmx_setup_step'] = $setup_step;
        }

        $doc_type = isset($_REQUEST['dmx_doc_type']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_REQUEST['dmx_doc_type'])) : '';
        if (in_array($doc_type, array('quote', 'invoice'), true)) {
            $args['dmx_doc_type'] = $doc_type;
        }

        $scheduler_request_keys = array(
            'dmx_schedule_view' => 'key',
            'dmx_schedule_date' => 'text',
            'dmx_schedule_team' => 'key',
            'dmx_schedule_technician' => 'absint',
            'dmx_schedule_status' => 'key',
            'dmx_schedule_job_type' => 'key',
            'dmx_schedule_search' => 'text',
        );

        foreach ($scheduler_request_keys as $request_key => $sanitize_type) {
            if (!isset($_REQUEST[$request_key])) {
                continue;
            }

            $raw_value = wp_unslash($_REQUEST[$request_key]);
            switch ($sanitize_type) {
                case 'absint':
                    $value = absint($raw_value);
                    if ($value > 0) {
                        $args[$request_key] = $value;
                    }
                    break;
                case 'key':
                    $value = sanitize_key($raw_value);
                    if ($value !== '') {
                        $args[$request_key] = $value;
                    }
                    break;
                default:
                    $value = sanitize_text_field($raw_value);
                    if ($value !== '') {
                        $args[$request_key] = $value;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }

        $is_admin_request = is_admin() && current_user_can('manage_options');

        if ($is_admin_request) {
            $admin_page = self::MENU_SLUG;
            if (sanitize_key($tab) === 'settings') {
                $admin_page = self::MENU_SLUG . '-settings';
            } elseif (sanitize_key($tab) === 'costs' && $subtab === 'inventory') {
                $admin_page = 'doormatrix-preview-inventory';
            }
            $redirect_url = add_query_arg($args, admin_url('admin.php?page=' . $admin_page));
        } else {
            $redirect_url = add_query_arg($args, $this->get_portal_page_url());
        }

        $redirect_url = remove_query_arg(array('dmx_edit_quote', 'dmx_edit_invoice', 'dmx_edit_work_order'), $redirect_url);

        wp_safe_redirect($redirect_url);
        exit;
    }

    private function count_admin_posts_by_type($post_type) {
        $post_type = sanitize_key((string) $post_type);
        if ($post_type === '') {
            return 0;
        }

        $counts = wp_count_posts($post_type);
        if (!$counts) {
            return 0;
        }

        $total = 0;
        foreach (array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private') as $status) {
            if (isset($counts->{$status})) {
                $total += (int) $counts->{$status};
            }
        }

        return $total;
    }

    private function render_admin_control_card($title, $description, $url, $count = null, $tag = '') {
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <a class="dmx-admin-control-card" href="<?php echo esc_url($url); ?>">
            <span class="dmx-admin-control-tag"><?php echo esc_html($tag !== '' ? $tag : 'Open'); ?></span>
            <strong><?php echo esc_html($title); ?></strong>
            <span><?php echo esc_html($description); ?></span>
            <?php if ($count !== null) : ?>
                <em><?php echo esc_html((string) $count); ?></em>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </a>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_admin_platform_dashboard() {
        $companies = $this->get_door_company_admin_records();
        $company_count = is_array($companies) ? count($companies) : 0;

        $portal_users = get_users(array(
            'role__in' => $this->get_portal_role_keys(),
            'fields' => 'ID',
            'number' => 9999,

        $portal_user_count = is_array($portal_users) ? count($portal_users) : 0;

        $quote_count = $this->count_admin_posts_by_type('dm_quote');
        $invoice_count = $this->count_admin_posts_by_type('dm_invoice');
        $work_order_count = $this->count_admin_posts_by_type('dm_work_order');
        $customer_count = $this->count_admin_posts_by_type('dm_customer');

        $admin_email = get_option('admin_email');
        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();

        ob_start();
        ?>

                padding: 16px;
            }

            .dmx-admin-note strong {
                display: block;
                color: var(--dmx-admin-blue);
                margin-bottom: 6px;
                font-size: 15px;
            }

                color: var(--dmx-admin-muted);
                font-size: 13px;
                line-height: 1.45;
            }

                }
            }

                .dmx-admin-note-grid {
                    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                }

                .dmx-admin-hero,
                .dmx-admin-section {
                    margin-right: 10px;
                }
            }
        </style>

        <div class="wrap doormatrix-admin-wrap dmx-admin-control-center">
            <div class="dmx-admin-hero">

                </div>
            </div>

                <div class="dmx-admin-stat"><span>Invoices</span><strong><?php echo esc_html((string) $invoice_count); ?></strong></div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-admin-section">

                    echo $this->render_admin_control_card('Team Members & Account Approvals', 'Review team members, account requests, roles, plan access, and login status.', admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-portal-team-members'), $portal_user_count, 'Users'); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
                    echo $this->render_admin_control_card('Role Previews', 'Review DoorMatrix role dashboards, quick-tab access, permissions, and restricted areas.', admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-role-previews'), null, 'Roles'); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
                    echo $this->render_admin_control_card('Portal Settings', 'Manage plugin-wide admin settings, defaults, support settings, and platform configuration.', admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-portal-settings'), null, 'Settings'); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
                    echo $this->render_admin_control_card('Public Portal Login', 'Open the front-end company portal login page in a new tab to test normal customer access.', home_url('/portal/'), null, 'Portal'); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
                    ?>

            </div>

    private function render_admin_role_preview_card($role_key, $role) {
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-role-preview-card">
            <div class="dmx-role-preview-head">
                <span><?php echo esc_html(strtoupper((string) $role_key)); ?></span>
                <h3><?php echo esc_html((string) $role['label']); ?></h3>
                <p><?php echo esc_html((string) $role['dashboard']); ?></p>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-role-preview-cols">
                <div>
                    <h4>Dashboard / Modules</h4>
                    <ul>
                        <?php foreach ((array) $role['modules'] as $item) : ?>
                            <li><?php echo esc_html((string) $item); ?></li>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h4>Core Permissions</h4>
                    <ul>
                        <?php foreach ((array) $role['permissions'] as $item) : ?>
                            <li><?php echo esc_html((string) $item); ?></li>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h4>Restricted / Protected</h4>
                    <ul>
                        <?php foreach ((array) $role['restricted'] as $item) : ?>
                            <li><?php echo esc_html((string) $item); ?></li>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_admin_team_members_screen() {
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="wrap dmx-preview-admin-wrap">';
        echo $this->get_admin_preview_css(); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-preview-hero">
            <h1>DoorMatrix Team Members</h1>
            <p>This is the neutral team and role preview area for the DoorMatrix plugin. It does not show GDI Operators or any other company users unless you open that company from Door Companies.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-preview-section">
            <h2>Team Member Admin Options</h2>
            <p>Use these controls to understand and manage the team structure without loading live customer-company data by default.</p>
            <div class="dmx-preview-grid">
                <a class="dmx-preview-card" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-role-previews')); ?>"><span>Roles</span><strong>Role Previews</strong><em>See each role dashboard, permissions, quick tabs, and restrictions.</em></a>
                <a class="dmx-preview-card" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-door-companies')); ?>"><span>Companies</span><strong>Company Team Members</strong><em>Select a company first, then view that company’s real users and team access.</em></a>
                <a class="dmx-preview-card" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('users.php')); ?>"><span>WP Users</span><strong>WordPress Users</strong><em>Open the native WordPress users list for lower-level account administration.</em></a>
                <a class="dmx-preview-card" href="<?php echo esc_url(home_url('/portal/')); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span>Portal</span><strong>Public Portal Login</strong><em>Open the front-end portal used by actual company team members.</em></a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-preview-section">
            <h2>Team Member Roles</h2>
            <p>DoorMatrix is organized around role-based dashboards. These are the roles available for company team members.</p>
            <div class="dmx-preview-grid">
                <?php foreach ($this->get_dmx_role_preview_data() as $role_key => $role) : ?>
                    <a class="dmx-preview-card" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-role-previews')); ?>">
                        <span><?php echo esc_html(strtoupper((string) $role_key)); ?></span>
                        <strong><?php echo esc_html((string) $role['label']); ?></strong>
                        <em><?php echo esc_html((string) $role['dashboard']); ?></em>
                    </a>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-preview-section">
            <h2>Live Company Users Stay Inside Door Companies</h2>
            <p>To prevent one door company’s information from showing in the neutral admin portal, real users are reviewed by first choosing a company.</p>
            <div class="dmx-preview-grid">
                <a class="dmx-preview-card" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-door-companies')); ?>"><span>Step 1</span><strong>Open Door Companies</strong><em>Choose GDI Operators or another company only when you want to manage that company.</em></a>
                <div class="dmx-preview-card"><span>Step 2</span><strong>Open Selected Company</strong><em>That company detail screen shows the company users, plan, trial, backup status, saved records, and restore controls.</em></div>
                <div class="dmx-preview-card"><span>Protected</span><strong>No Default Company Data</strong><em>This neutral screen should not list GDI users, GDI customers, GDI invoices, or any other company records.</em></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_admin_role_dashboard_preview($role_key) {
        $roles = $this->get_dmx_role_preview_data();
        $role_key = sanitize_key((string) $role_key);
        if (!isset($roles[$role_key])) {
            $role_key = 'manager';
        }

        $role = $roles[$role_key];
        $quick_cards = (array) ($role['modules'] ?? array());

        $role_switcher = '';
        foreach ($roles as $switch_key => $switch_role) {
            $role_switcher .= '<a class="' . ($switch_key === $role_key ? 'is-active' : '') . '" href="' . esc_url(add_query_arg(array('page' => 'doormatrix-role-previews', 'preview_role' => $switch_key), admin_url('admin.php'))) . '">' . esc_html((string) $switch_role['label']) . '</a>';
        }

        $card_descriptions = array(
            'Messages' => 'Team messages and company updates.',
            'Sales Workflow' => 'Customers, quotes, invoices, supplier requests, and job flow where allowed.',
            'Sales Schedule' => 'Sales appointments, site checks, and customer follow-up.',
            'Technician Schedule' => 'Assigned work, dispatch visibility, and schedule coordination.',
            'Technician Schedule View-Only' => 'Schedule visibility for sales and field coordination.',
            'Tools' => 'Calculator tools for spring sizing, IPPT, weight, conversion, and cable length.',
            'Inspections' => 'Door reports, safety assessments, hazard forms, and site checks.',

            'Assigned Schedule' => 'schedule',
            'Inspection Support' => 'inspections',
            'Receiving' => 'receiving',
            'Transfers' => 'transfers',
            'Parts Library' => 'inventory',
            'Warehouse Stock' => 'inventory',
            'Truck Transfers' => 'transfers',

            'Assigned Purchase Orders' => 'po',
            'Invoice Submission' => 'invoices',

        );

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-role-dashboard-preview">';
        echo '<style>
            .dmx-role-dashboard-preview{margin:0 20px 20px 0}
            .dmx-role-dash-hero{padding:24px;border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0c2340,#173b63);color:#fff;margin-bottom:14px}

            .dmx-role-dash-card.sales-schedule,.dmx-role-dash-card.site,.dmx-role-dash-card.po{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#b87500)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.schedule,.dmx-role-dash-card.workorders{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1f6fb2,#143f68)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.tools,.dmx-role-dash-card.time,.dmx-role-dash-card.team{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#356be8,#1d3e99)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.inspections{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0284c7,#075985)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.inventory,.dmx-role-dash-card.receiving,.dmx-role-dash-card.transfers{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#65a30d,#3f6212)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.reports,.dmx-role-dash-card.efficiency{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0891b2,#155e75)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.timesheets,.dmx-role-dash-card.subs,.dmx-role-dash-card.files{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#334155,#0f172a)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.payments{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#16a34a,#166534)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.expenses,.dmx-role-dash-card.hazard{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ef4444,#991b1b)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.receipts,.dmx-role-dash-card.commissions{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706,#92400e)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.supplier,.dmx-role-dash-card.customers,.dmx-role-dash-card.status{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f766e,#115e59)}
            .dmx-role-dash-card.invoices{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2f80ed,#155bb5)}
            .dmx-role-dash-panels{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:14px}
            .dmx-role-dash-panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #dce8f3;border-radius:18px;padding:18px}
            .dmx-role-dash-panel h3{margin:0 0 10px;color:#0c2340}
            .dmx-role-dash-panel ul{margin:0;padding-left:18px;color:#61738b}
            @media(max-width:1100px){.dmx-role-dash-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));}.dmx-role-dash-panels{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
            @media(max-width:650px){.dmx-role-dash-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
        </style>';

        echo '<div class="dmx-role-dash-hero"><h2>' . esc_html($role['label']) . ' Dashboard Preview</h2><p>' . esc_html($role['dashboard']) . '</p></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-role-switcher">' . $role_switcher . '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-role-dash-grid">';
        foreach ($quick_cards as $card) {
            $card_label = (string) $card;
            $description = $card_descriptions[$card_label] ?? 'Dashboard quick tab for this role preview.';
            $class = $card_classes[$card_label] ?? '';
            echo '<div class="dmx-role-dash-card ' . esc_attr($class) . '"><strong>' . esc_html($card_label) . '</strong><span>' . esc_html($description) . '</span></div>';
        }
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-role-dash-panels">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-role-dash-panel"><h3>Core Permissions</h3><ul>';
        foreach ((array) $role['permissions'] as $item) {
            echo '<li>' . esc_html((string) $item) . '</li>';
        }
        echo '</ul></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-role-dash-panel"><h3>Restricted / Protected</h3><ul>';
        foreach ((array) $role['restricted'] as $item) {
            echo '<li>' . esc_html((string) $item) . '</li>';
        }
        echo '</ul></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-role-dash-panel"><h3>Preview Note</h3><ul><li>No company records are loaded.</li><li>This is a visual dashboard preview only.</li><li>These are dashboard quick tabs, not sidebar menu items.</li></ul></div>';
        echo '</div></div>';

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_admin_role_previews_screen() {
        $roles = $this->get_dmx_role_preview_data();
        $selected_role = sanitize_key((string) ($_GET['preview_role'] ?? 'manager'));
        if (!isset($roles[$selected_role])) {
            $selected_role = 'manager';
        }

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="wrap dmx-preview-admin-wrap">';
        echo $this->get_admin_preview_css(); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo $this->render_admin_role_dashboard_preview($selected_role); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function render_admin_preview_quotes_page() { echo $this->render_admin_live_portal_preview('sales', 'quotes', 'Quotes Preview'); }

    public function render_admin_preview_sales_schedule_page() {
        echo $this->render_admin_standalone_scheduler_preview_page('sales'); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
    }
    public function render_admin_preview_technician_schedule_page() {

    }

    public function render_admin_preview_inspections_page() {

    }

    public function render_admin_preview_customers_page() { echo $this->render_admin_live_portal_preview('customers', '', 'Customers Preview'); }
    public function render_admin_preview_inventory_page() { echo $this->render_admin_functional_inventory_page(); }
    public function render_admin_preview_parts_library_page() { echo $this->render_admin_parts_library_manager_preview(); }
    public function render_admin_preview_tools_page() { echo $this->render_admin_live_portal_preview('calculators', '', 'Tools Preview'); }
    public function render_admin_preview_team_page() { echo $this->render_admin_live_portal_preview('staff', '', 'Manage Team'); }
