    private function get_admin_feature_preview_css() {
        return '<style>
            .dmx-admin-feature-preview{margin:20px 20px 22px 0;color:#10233d}
            .dmx-admin-feature-hero{padding:24px;border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0c2340,#173b63);color:#fff;margin-bottom:14px;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(8,28,51,.12)}
            .dmx-admin-feature-hero h1{margin:0 0 8px;color:#fff;font-size:30px;font-weight:900;line-height:1.1}
            .dmx-admin-feature-hero p{margin:0;color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);max-width:980px;font-size:15px;line-height:1.55}
            .dmx-admin-feature-banner{margin:0 0 18px;padding:13px 16px;border:1px solid #b9d4eb;border-radius:14px;background:#eef7ff;color:#143456;font-weight:800}
            .dmx-admin-feature-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:16px;margin:0 0 18px}
            .dmx-admin-feature-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #dce8f3;border-radius:20px;padding:20px;box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(8,28,51,.06);min-height:150px}
            .dmx-admin-feature-card h3{margin:0 0 10px;color:#0c2340;font-size:20px;font-weight:900;line-height:1.15}
            .dmx-admin-feature-card p{margin:0;color:#5f728b;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5}
            .dmx-admin-feature-card strong{color:#0c2340}
            .dmx-admin-action-row{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:16px 0 0}
            .dmx-admin-action-row a,.dmx-admin-action-row button{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:42px;padding:0 16px;border-radius:12px;border:0;background:#0c3b70;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer}
            .dmx-admin-action-row a.secondary,.dmx-admin-action-row button.secondary{background:#eef4fb;color:#0c2340;border:1px solid #dce8f3}
            .dmx-admin-parts-table-wrap{background:#fff;border:1px solid #dce8f3;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(8,28,51,.06)}
            .dmx-admin-parts-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
            .dmx-admin-parts-table th{background:#f4f8fc;color:#51657f;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;font-size:12px;text-align:left;padding:13px 14px}
            .dmx-admin-parts-table td{border-top:1px solid #edf3f8;padding:13px 14px;vertical-align:top;color:#10233d}
            .dmx-admin-parts-table td.muted{color:#6b7d93}
            .dmx-admin-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:26px;padding:0 10px;border-radius:999px;background:#eef4fb;color:#173b63;font-weight:900;font-size:12px}
            .dmx-admin-empty{background:#fff;border:1px dashed #c8d8e8;border-radius:18px;padding:28px;text-align:center;color:#61738b}
            @media(max-width:1100px){.dmx-admin-feature-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}
            @media(max-width:760px){.dmx-admin-feature-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.dmx-admin-parts-table{display:block;overflow-x:auto;white-space:nowrap}}
        </style>';
    }

    private function render_admin_inventory_feature_preview() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to view DoorMatrix inventory preview.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="wrap doormatrix-admin-wrap dmx-admin-feature-preview">';
        echo $this->get_admin_feature_preview_css(); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-hero"><h1>Inventory Preview</h1><p>Inventory is the company stock-control system. It shows how DoorMatrix tracks warehouse stock, technician truck stock, receiving, transfers, low-stock visibility, and inventory history without loading a customer company account.</p></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-banner">Admin Preview Mode: this explains the Inventory workflow. Real company inventory records are managed only after opening Door Companies &gt; selected company or inside that company portal.</div>';

        $cards = array(
            array('Warehouse Inventory', 'Track parts and product held in warehouse locations, including counts, receiving history, and low-stock visibility.'),
            array('Technician Truck Inventory', 'Connect truck inventory to assigned technicians so stock can be deducted from jobs, invoices, and work orders.'),
            array('Receiving Workflow', 'Receive supplier/customer orders, record partial shipments, notes, missing product, and ready-to-schedule product.'),
            array('Transfers', 'Move inventory from warehouse stock to technician/service trucks with a clear movement history.'),
            array('Low-Stock Visibility', 'Show parts that need attention before technicians run short in the field.'),
            array('Inventory History / Ledger', 'Maintain an accountability trail for stock received, transferred, adjusted, used, or restored.'),
            array('Coordinator Read-Only View', 'Coordinators can search warehouse/truck inventory for scheduling without receiving, adjusting, or deducting stock.'),
            array('Customer Door Orders', 'Track product that is ordered, soon to arrive, partially received, waiting on remaining product, or ready to schedule.'),
            array('Backup / Recovery Support', 'Inventory transaction history supports future restore and audit workflows if records are accidentally damaged.'),
        );

        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-grid">';
        foreach ($cards as $card) {
            echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-card"><h3>' . esc_html($card[0]) . '</h3><p>' . esc_html($card[1]) . '</p></div>';
        }
        echo '</div>';

        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-card">';
        echo '<h3>How Inventory Connects to DoorMatrix</h3>';
        echo '<p><strong>Parts Library</strong> is the master catalog of parts and items. <strong>Inventory</strong> is the stock-count system that uses those parts inside warehouses, trucks, receiving, transfers, work orders, quotes, invoices, and reports.</p>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-action-row">';
        echo '<a href="' . esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-parts-library')) . '">Open Parts Library</a>';
        echo '<a class="secondary" href="' . esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-role-previews&preview_role=parts')) . '">Preview Parts Role</a>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '</div>';

        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_admin_parts_library_manager_preview() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to view DoorMatrix parts library.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $parts = get_posts(array(
            'post_type' => self::PART_POST_TYPE,
            'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
            'posts_per_page' => -1,
            'orderby' => 'title',
            'order' => 'ASC',
        ));

        $part_counts = wp_count_posts(self::PART_POST_TYPE);
        $published_count = isset($part_counts->publish) ? (int) $part_counts->publish : 0;
        $draft_count = 0;
        foreach (array('draft', 'pending', 'private') as $part_status) {
            if (isset($part_counts->{$part_status})) {
                $draft_count += (int) $part_counts->{$part_status};
            }
        }

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="wrap doormatrix-admin-wrap dmx-admin-feature-preview">';
        echo $this->get_admin_feature_preview_css(); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-hero"><h1>Parts Library</h1><p>The Parts Library is the master DoorMatrix catalog for preloaded garage door parts and company-added items. WordPress admins can review preloaded parts, add new parts, edit part details, add images, or remove/retire obsolete items.</p></div>';

        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-grid">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-card"><h3>Preloaded Parts</h3><p><strong>' . esc_html((string) $published_count) . '</strong> active part records are available to quote, invoice, inventory, and work order workflows.</p></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-card"><h3>Draft / Obsolete</h3><p><strong>' . esc_html((string) $draft_count) . '</strong> non-published part records can be reviewed, restored, updated, or removed from active use.</p></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-card"><h3>Part Images</h3><p>Each individual part/item record can store an image for the product library and future inventory screens.</p></div>';
        echo '</div>';

        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-feature-card">';
        echo '<h3>Admin Parts Management</h3>';
        echo '<p>Use this area to manage the DoorMatrix master parts catalog. Add extra parts, edit existing preloaded part details, add images, or move obsolete parts to draft/trash so they stop appearing in active workflows.</p>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-action-row">';
        echo '<a href="' . esc_url(admin_url('post-new.php?post_type=' . self::PART_POST_TYPE)) . '">Add New Part</a>';
        echo '<a class="secondary" href="' . esc_url(admin_url('edit.php?post_type=' . self::PART_POST_TYPE)) . '">Open Full WordPress Parts List</a>';
        echo '<a class="secondary" href="' . esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-inventory')) . '">Open Inventory Preview</a>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '</div>';

        if (empty($parts)) {
            echo '<div class="dmx-admin-empty">No parts are currently stored in the Parts Library. Use Add New Part to start building the catalog.</div>';
        } else {
            echo '<div class="dmx-admin-parts-table-wrap" style="margin-top:18px;">';
            echo '<table class="dmx-admin-parts-table">';
            echo '<thead><tr><th>Part / Item</th><th>Status</th><th>Category</th><th>Current Use</th><th>Actions</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
            foreach ($parts as $part) {
                $category_terms = get_the_terms($part->ID, 'dm_part_category');
                $category_label = '';
                if (!is_wp_error($category_terms) && !empty($category_terms)) {
                    $names = wp_list_pluck($category_terms, 'name');
                    $category_label = implode(', ', array_map('sanitize_text_field', $names));
                }
                if ($category_label === '') {
                    $category_label = 'Uncategorized';
                }

                $status_label = $part->post_status === 'publish' ? 'Active' : ucfirst($part->post_status);
                $edit_url = get_edit_post_link($part->ID, '');
                $trash_url = get_delete_post_link($part->ID);

                echo '<tr>';
                echo '<td><strong>' . esc_html(get_the_title($part)) . '</strong><br><span class="muted">Part ID: ' . esc_html((string) $part->ID) . '</span></td>';
                echo '<td><span class="dmx-admin-pill">' . esc_html($status_label) . '</span></td>';
                echo '<td class="muted">' . esc_html($category_label) . '</td>';
                echo '<td class="muted">Available for quotes, invoices, work orders, and inventory stock tracking when active.</td>';
                echo '<td>';
                echo '<div class="dmx-admin-action-row" style="margin:0;">';
                if ($edit_url) {
                    echo '<a class="secondary" href="' . esc_url($edit_url) . '">Edit</a>';
                }
                if ($trash_url && current_user_can('delete_post', $part->ID)) {
                    echo '<a class="secondary" href="' . esc_url($trash_url) . '">Move to Trash</a>';
                }
                echo '</div>';
                echo '</td>';
                echo '</tr>';
            }
            echo '</tbody></table></div>';
        }

        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

private function render_admin_standalone_inspections_preview_page($mode = 'menu') {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to view DoorMatrix inspection previews.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $mode = sanitize_key((string) $mode);
        $base_url = admin_url('admin.php');
        $menu_url = add_query_arg(array('page' => 'doormatrix-preview-inspections'), $base_url);
        $detailed_url = add_query_arg(array('page' => 'doormatrix-preview-inspection-detailed'), $base_url);
        $quick_url = add_query_arg(array('page' => 'doormatrix-preview-inspection-quick'), $base_url);

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="wrap doormatrix-admin-wrap dmx-admin-live-preview-wrap">';
        echo '<style>
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head{margin:20px 20px 14px 0;padding:18px 22px;border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0c2340,#173b63);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(8,28,51,.14)}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head h1{margin:0;color:#fff;font-size:26px;font-weight:900}
            .dmx-admin-inspection-preview-wrap{margin-right:20px;color:#10233d}
            .dmx-inspection-preview-menu{background:#fff;border:1px solid #dce8f3;border-radius:22px;padding:22px;margin:0 0 18px;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(8,28,51,.06)}
            .dmx-inspection-preview-menu h2{margin:0 0 8px;color:#0c2340;font-size:26px;font-weight:900}
            .dmx-inspection-preview-menu p{margin:0 0 16px;color:#61738b}
            .dmx-inspection-options{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:16px}
            .dmx-inspection-option{display:grid;gap:10px;min-height:190px;padding:22px;border-radius:20px;text-decoration:none;color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#143f68,#0c2340);box-shadow:0 15px 30px rgba(8,28,51,.12)}

            .dmx-native-inspection-shell .wrap{max-width:none;margin:0}
            .dmx-admin-inspection-actions{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:0 0 14px}
            .dmx-admin-inspection-actions a{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:900;background:#0c3b70;color:#fff}
            .dmx-admin-inspection-actions a.secondary{background:#eef4fb;color:#0c2340}

            /* v5.4.26: protect the WordPress admin shell when standalone inspection-form CSS is loaded inside admin preview. */
            body.wp-admin.toplevel_page_doormatrix-portal,

            body.wp-admin.toplevel_page_doormatrix-portal #adminmenuwrap,
            body.wp-admin.toplevel_page_doormatrix-portal #adminmenuback,
            body.wp-admin.doormatrix_page_doormatrix-preview-inspections #adminmenuwrap,
            body.wp-admin.doormatrix_page_doormatrix-preview-inspections #adminmenuback,

            body.wp-admin.folded.admin_page_doormatrix-preview-inspection-quick #wpcontent,
            body.wp-admin.folded.doormatrix_page_doormatrix-preview-inspections #wpcontent {
                margin-left: 36px !important;

            body.wp-admin.folded.admin_page_doormatrix-preview-inspection-detailed #adminmenuback,

                width: 36px !important;
                min-width: 36px !important;
            }

            .dmx-admin-inspection-preview-wrap,
            .dmx-native-inspection-shell {
                position: relative !important;
                z-index: 1 !important;
                width: 100% !important;
                max-width: 100% !important;
                box-sizing: border-box !important;
                contain: layout style !important;
            }

            .dmx-native-inspection-shell * {
                box-sizing: border-box;
            }

            .dmx-native-inspection-shell .wrap,
            .dmx-native-inspection-shell .container,
            .dmx-native-inspection-shell main,
            .dmx-native-inspection-shell section {
                max-width: 100% !important;
            }

            @media(max-width:900px){.dmx-inspection-options{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
        </style>';

        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-live-preview-head"><h1>Inspection Forms Preview</h1><p>Admin preview for the actual DoorMatrix inspection forms. This uses the real Detailed Door Report and Quick Safety Assessment code.</p></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-preview-banner">Admin Preview Mode: use this to test the inspection screens from WordPress admin. Use a real company portal when testing live emails, saved records, and customer workflow.</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-inspection-preview-wrap">';

        if ($mode === 'detailed') {
            echo '<div class="dmx-admin-inspection-actions">';
            echo '<a class="secondary" href="' . esc_url($menu_url) . '">Back to Inspection Options</a>';
            echo '<a href="https://garagedoorinspection.com/detailed-door-report/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Open Full Page Backup</a>';
            echo '</div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-native-inspection-shell">';
            if (shortcode_exists('garage_door_inspection_form')) {
                echo do_shortcode('[garage_door_inspection_form]'); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
            } else {
                echo '<div class="notice notice-error" style="margin:20px;"><p>Detailed Door Report shortcode is not available in this plugin build.</p></div>';
            }
            echo '</div>';
        } elseif ($mode === 'quick') {
            echo '<div class="dmx-admin-inspection-actions">';
            echo '<a class="secondary" href="' . esc_url($menu_url) . '">Back to Inspection Options</a>';
            echo '<a href="https://garagedoorinspection.com/quick-safety-assessment/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Open Full Page Backup</a>';
            echo '</div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-native-inspection-shell">';
            if (shortcode_exists('garage_door_quick_assessment_form')) {
                echo do_shortcode('[garage_door_quick_assessment_form]'); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
            } else {
                echo '<div class="notice notice-error" style="margin:20px;"><p>Quick Safety Assessment shortcode is not available in this plugin build.</p></div>';
            }
            echo '</div>';
        } else {
            $hazard_url = admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-hazard-assessments');
            $site_check_admin_url = admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-site-check');

            echo '<div class="dmx-inspection-preview-menu">';
            echo '<h2>Choose Inspection Type</h2>';
            echo '<p>Open the DoorMatrix inspection or field form you want to test. Calculator tools are kept separately under Tools.</p>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-inspection-options dmx-inspection-options-four">';
            echo '<a class="dmx-inspection-option" href="' . esc_url($detailed_url) . '"><strong>Detailed Door Report</strong><span>Full 10-step technician workflow with component review, photos, summary, PDF generation, and email workflow.</span></a>';
            echo '<a class="dmx-inspection-option" href="' . esc_url($quick_url) . '"><strong>Quick Safety Assessment</strong><span>Fast 5-step safety-focused workflow for hazards, safety notes, recommendations, PDF generation, and email workflow.</span></a>';
            echo '<a class="dmx-inspection-option dmx-inspection-option-hazard" href="' . esc_url($hazard_url) . '"><strong>Hazard Assessment</strong><span>Field level hazard assessment for jobsite risks, controls, signatures, and saved safety records.</span></a>';
            echo '<a class="dmx-inspection-option dmx-inspection-option-site" href="' . esc_url($site_check_admin_url) . '"><strong>Site Check Form</strong><span>Opening size, headroom, framing, backroom, photos, and install notes before quoting or ordering.</span></a>';
            echo '</div></div>';
        }

        echo '</div>';
        echo '<script>
        (function(){
            function protectWpAdminMenu(){
                var body = document.body;
                var menu = document.getElementById("adminmenuwrap");
                var back = document.getElementById("adminmenuback");
                var content = document.getElementById("wpcontent");

                if (body && body.classList.contains("auto-fold")) {
                    body.classList.remove("auto-fold");
                }

                if (menu) {
                    menu.style.display = "block";
                    menu.style.visibility = "visible";
                    menu.style.opacity = "1";
                    menu.style.transform = "none";
                }

                if (back) {
                    back.style.display = "block";
                    back.style.visibility = "visible";
                    back.style.opacity = "1";
                    back.style.transform = "none";
                }

                if (content && window.innerWidth > 960 && body && !body.classList.contains("folded")) {
                    content.style.marginLeft = "160px";
                }
            }

            protectWpAdminMenu();
            window.addEventListener("load", protectWpAdminMenu);
            window.addEventListener("resize", protectWpAdminMenu);
            setTimeout(protectWpAdminMenu, 300);
            setTimeout(protectWpAdminMenu, 1200);
        })();
        </script>';
        echo '</div>';

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_admin_standalone_scheduler_preview_page($mode = 'technician') {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to view DoorMatrix scheduler previews.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $mode = sanitize_key((string) $mode);
        $title = $mode === 'sales' ? 'Sales Schedule Preview' : 'Technician Schedule Preview';

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="wrap doormatrix-admin-wrap dmx-admin-live-preview-wrap">';
        echo '<style>
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head{margin:20px 20px 14px 0;padding:18px 22px;border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0c2340,#173b63);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(8,28,51,.14)}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head h1{margin:0 0 6px;color:#fff;font-size:26px;font-weight:900}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head p{margin:0;color:rgba(255,255,255,.82)}
            .dmx-admin-preview-banner{margin:0 20px 14px 0;padding:13px 16px;border:1px solid #b9d4eb;border-radius:14px;background:#eef7ff;color:#143456;font-weight:800}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-content{margin-right:20px}
        </style>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-live-preview-head"><h1>' . esc_html($title) . '</h1><p>Safe demo-only scheduler preview. This does not call live company scheduler data, WordPress users, or GDI records.</p></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-preview-banner">Admin Preview Mode: demo-only scheduler. No customer company data is loaded and nothing can be saved from this preview.</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-live-preview-content">';
        echo $this->render_admin_safe_scheduler_preview($mode); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo '</div></div>';

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_admin_safe_scheduler_preview($mode = 'technician') {
        $mode = sanitize_key((string) $mode);
        $is_sales = $mode === 'sales';

        $people = $is_sales
            ? array(
                array('name' => 'Demo Sales Rep', 'role' => 'Sales Rep'),
                array('name' => 'Demo Manager', 'role' => 'Manager'),
            )
            : array(
                array('name' => 'Demo Technician', 'role' => 'Technician'),
                array('name' => 'Demo Helper', 'role' => 'Helper'),
                array('name' => 'Demo Installer', 'role' => 'Technician'),
            );

        $title = $is_sales ? 'Sales Schedule Preview' : 'Technician Schedule Preview';
        $subtitle = $is_sales
            ? 'Preview sales appointments, site checks, customer meetings, and sales rep availability using demo data only.'
            : 'Preview technician scheduling, assigned field work, helper availability, and open time slots using demo data only.';

        $days = array(
            array('label' => 'Mon', 'date' => 'May 4'),
            array('label' => 'Tue', 'date' => 'May 5'),
            array('label' => 'Wed', 'date' => 'May 6'),
            array('label' => 'Thu', 'date' => 'May 7'),
            array('label' => 'Fri', 'date' => 'May 8'),
        );

        $times = array('7:00 AM', '7:30 AM', '8:00 AM', '8:30 AM', '9:00 AM', '9:30 AM', '10:00 AM', '10:30 AM', '11:00 AM', '11:30 AM');

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-preview">
            <style>
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-preview {
                    color: #10233d;
                }
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-card {
                    background: #fff;
                    border: 1px solid #dce8f3;
                    border-radius: 22px;
                    padding: 22px;
                    margin: 0 0 18px;
                    box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(8, 28, 51, 0.06);
                }
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-card h2 {
                    margin: 0 0 6px;
                    color: #0c2340;
                    font-size: 26px;
                    font-weight: 900;
                }
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-card p {
                    margin: 0;
                    color: #61738b;
                }
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-form {
                    display: grid;
                    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
                    gap: 14px;
                    margin-top: 18px;
                }
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-field label {
                    display: block;
                    font-weight: 900;
                    color: #0c2340;
                    margin-bottom: 7px;
                    font-size: 13px;
                }
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-field input,
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-field textarea,
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-field select {
                    width: 100%;
                    min-height: 48px;
                    border: 1px solid #dce8f3;
                    border-radius: 14px;
                    padding: 10px 12px;
                    background: #fff;
                    color: #10233d;
                    box-sizing: border-box;
                }
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-field textarea {
                    min-height: 96px;
                    resize: vertical;
                }
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-field.dmx-wide {
                    grid-column: span 2;
                }
                .dmx-admin-scheduler-btn {
                    display: inline-flex;
                    align-items: center;
                    justify-content: center;
                    min-height: 46px;
                    padding: 0 18px;
                    border: 0;
                    border-radius: 14px;
                    background: #0c3b70;
                    color: #fff;
                    font-weight: 900;
                    text-decoration: none;
                    margin-top: 14px;
                }
                .dmx-admin-schedule-toolbar {
                    display: flex;
                    justify-content: space-between;
                    gap: 12px;
                    align-items: center;
                    margin-bottom: 14px;
                }
                .dmx-admin-schedule-nav {
                    display: flex;
                    gap: 8px;
                    align-items: center;
                }
                .dmx-admin-schedule-pill {
                    border: 1px solid #dce8f3;
                    background: #f4f8fc;
                    color: #0c2340;
                    border-radius: 10px;
                    padding: 10px 13px;
                    font-weight: 900;
                    font-size: 13px;
                }
                .dmx-admin-schedule-pill.active {
                    background: #0c3b70;
                    color: #fff;
                    border-color: #0c3b70;
                }
                .dmx-admin-schedule-title {
                    font-size: 22px;
                    color: #0c2340;
                    font-weight: 900;
                    text-align: center;
                    flex: 1;
                }
                .dmx-admin-schedule-grid {
                    display: grid;
                    grid-template-columns: 170px repeat(5, minmax(135px, 1fr));
                    gap: 10px;
                    overflow-x: auto;
                }
                .dmx-admin-schedule-head,

                    border: 1px dashed #dce8f3;
                    border-radius: 14px;
                    min-height: 44px;
                    padding: 10px;

                    border-style: solid;
                    background: #eaf7f3;
                    border-color: #b9e2d4;
                    color: #0c6859;
                }

                    color: inherit;
                    font-size: 12px;
                }
                @media (max-width: 1000px) {
                    .dmx-admin-scheduler-form {
                        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                    }
                    .dmx-admin-scheduler-field.dmx-wide {
                        grid-column: auto;
                    }

                        grid-template-columns: 150px repeat(5, 135px);
                    }
                }
            </style>

            <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-card">
                <h2><?php echo esc_html($title); ?></h2>
                <p><?php echo esc_html($subtitle); ?></p>

                <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-form">
                    <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-field">
                        <label><?php echo $is_sales ? 'Sales Rep' : 'Technician'; ?></label>
                        <select>
                            <?php foreach ($people as $person) : ?>
                                <option><?php echo esc_html($person['name']); ?></option>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-field">
                        <label>Date</label>
                        <input type="date" value="2026-05-04">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-field">
                        <label>Start Time</label>
                        <input type="time" value="09:00">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-field">
                        <label>End Time</label>
                        <input type="time" value="10:00">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-field">
                        <label><?php echo $is_sales ? 'Customer / Lead Name' : 'Customer / Job Name'; ?></label>
                        <input type="text" placeholder="Demo customer name">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-field">
                        <label>Customer Phone</label>
                        <input type="text" placeholder="555-000-0000">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-field dmx-wide">
                        <label>Site Location / Address</label>
                        <textarea placeholder="Install address, bay number, door number, meeting location, or site notes."></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-field">
                        <label>Status</label>
                        <select>
                            <option>Scheduled</option>
                            <option>Needs Confirmation</option>
                            <option>Completed</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <a class="dmx-admin-scheduler-btn" href="#" onclick="return false;"><?php echo $is_sales ? 'Create Appointment' : 'Create Schedule Block'; ?></a>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-admin-scheduler-card">
                <div class="dmx-admin-schedule-toolbar">
                    <div class="dmx-admin-schedule-nav">
                        <span class="dmx-admin-schedule-pill">‹</span>
                        <span class="dmx-admin-schedule-pill">›</span>
                        <span class="dmx-admin-schedule-pill">today</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-admin-schedule-title">May 4 - May 8, 2026</div>
                    <div class="dmx-admin-schedule-nav">
                        <span class="dmx-admin-schedule-pill">month</span>
                        <span class="dmx-admin-schedule-pill active">week</span>
                        <span class="dmx-admin-schedule-pill">3 day</span>
                        <span class="dmx-admin-schedule-pill">day</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-admin-schedule-grid">
                    <div class="dmx-admin-schedule-head"><?php echo $is_sales ? 'Sales Rep' : 'Technician'; ?></div>
                    <?php foreach ($days as $day) : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-admin-schedule-head"><?php echo esc_html($day['label']); ?><small><?php echo esc_html($day['date']); ?></small></div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>

                    <?php foreach ($people as $row_index => $person) : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-admin-schedule-person">
                            <?php echo esc_html($person['name']); ?>
                            <span><?php echo esc_html($person['role']); ?></span>
                        </div>

                        <?php foreach ($days as $day_index => $day) : ?>
                            <div>
                                <?php foreach ($times as $time_index => $time) :
                                    $booked = (($row_index + $day_index + $time_index) % 11 === 0);
                                    ?>
                                    <div class="dmx-admin-schedule-slot <?php echo $booked ? 'booked' : ''; ?>">
                                        <strong><?php echo esc_html($time); ?></strong>
                                        <span><?php echo $booked ? esc_html($is_sales ? 'Demo Site Check' : 'Demo Job') : 'Open'; ?></span>
                                    </div>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </div>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_admin_live_portal_preview($tab, $subtab = '', $title = 'DoorMatrix Preview') {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to view DoorMatrix previews.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $old_get = $_GET;
        $old_preview = $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode;

        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode = true;
        $_GET['dmx_tab'] = sanitize_key($tab);
        if ($subtab !== '') {
            $_GET['dmx_subtab'] = sanitize_key($subtab);
        } else {
            unset($_GET['dmx_subtab']);
        }

        $content = '';
        switch (sanitize_key($tab)) {
            case 'sales':
                switch (sanitize_key($subtab)) {
                    case 'invoices':
                        $content = $this->render_invoices_tab(true);
                        break;
                    case 'work_orders':
                        $content = $this->render_sales_work_orders();
                        break;
                    case 'supplier_requests':
                        $content = $this->render_sales_supplier_requests_tab(true);
                        break;
                    case 'payments':
                        $content = $this->render_sales_payments();
                        break;
                    case 'quotes':
                    default:
                        $content = $this->render_quotes_tab(true);
                        break;
                }
                break;
            case 'sales_scheduler':
                $content = $this->render_admin_safe_scheduler_preview('sales');
                break;
            case 'scheduler':
                $content = $this->render_admin_safe_scheduler_preview('technician');
                break;
            case 'inspections':
                $content = $this->render_inspections_tab(true);
                break;
            case 'calculators':
                $content = $this->render_calculators_tab(true);
                break;
            case 'customers':
                $content = method_exists($this, 'render_customers_tab') ? $this->render_customers_tab(true) : $this->render_admin_module_preview_fallback('Customers');
                break;
            case 'costs':
                $content = $this->render_costs_section(true);
                break;
            case 'accounting':
                $content = $this->render_accounting_section(true);
                break;
            case 'reports':
                $content = $this->render_reports_section(true);
                break;
            case 'messages':
                $content = $this->render_messages_section(true);
                break;
            case 'staff':
                $content = $this->render_staff_tab(true);
                break;
            case 'settings':
                $content = $this->render_settings_section(true);
                break;
            default:
                $content = $this->render_overview_tab(true);
                break;
        }

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="wrap doormatrix-admin-wrap dmx-admin-live-preview-wrap">';
        echo '<style>
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head{margin:20px 20px 14px 0;padding:18px 22px;border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0c2340,#173b63);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(8,28,51,.14)}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head h1{margin:0 0 6px;color:#fff;font-size:26px;font-weight:900}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head p{margin:0;color:rgba(255,255,255,.82)}
            .dmx-admin-preview-banner{margin:0 20px 14px 0;padding:13px 16px;border:1px solid #b9d4eb;border-radius:14px;background:#eef7ff;color:#143456;font-weight:800}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-content{margin-right:20px}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-content .dmx-app-section{margin:0}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-content .dmx-app-sidebar,.dmx-admin-live-preview-content .dmx-app-topbar,.dmx-admin-live-preview-content .dmx-mobile-app-nav{display:none!important}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-content .dmx-app-shell{display:block!important;min-height:auto!important;background:transparent!important}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-content .dmx-app-main{display:block!important;margin:0!important;width:100%!important}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-content .dmx-app-content{padding:0!important;background:transparent!important}
        </style>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-live-preview-head"><h1>' . esc_html($title) . '</h1></div>';
        echo '<script>document.addEventListener("submit",function(e){if(e.target.closest(".dmx-admin-live-preview-content")){e.preventDefault();alert("This preview screen is for layout testing only. Nothing is saved here.");}});</script>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-live-preview-content">';
        echo $content; // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo '</div>';
        echo '</div>';

        $html = ob_get_clean();

        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode = $old_preview;
        $_GET = $old_get;

        return $html;
    }

    private function render_admin_functional_inventory_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to manage DoorMatrix inventory.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $old_get = $_GET;
        $old_preview = $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode;
        $old_preview_company_name = $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_name;
        $old_preview_company_key = $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_key;

        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode = true;
        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_name = 'DoorMatrix Admin Inventory';
        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_key = self::ADMIN_INVENTORY_COMPANY_KEY;
        $_GET['dmx_tab'] = 'costs';
        $_GET['dmx_subtab'] = 'inventory';

        $message = '';
        $message_type = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_msg_type'] ?? '');
        $message_text = isset($_GET['dmx_msg']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_msg'])) : '';
        if ($message_text !== '' && in_array($message_type, array('success', 'error'), true)) {
            $message = '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-' . esc_attr($message_type) . '">' . esc_html($message_text) . '</div>';
        }

        $content = $this->render_costs_section(true);

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="wrap doormatrix-admin-wrap dmx-admin-live-preview-wrap">';
        echo '<style>
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head{margin:20px 20px 14px 0;padding:18px 22px;border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0c2340,#173b63);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(8,28,51,.14)}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head h1{margin:0 0 6px;color:#fff;font-size:26px;font-weight:900}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-head p{margin:0;color:rgba(255,255,255,.82)}
            .dmx-admin-preview-banner{margin:0 20px 14px 0;padding:13px 16px;border:1px solid #b9d4eb;border-radius:14px;background:#eef7ff;color:#143456;font-weight:800}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-content{margin-right:20px}
            .dmx-admin-live-preview-content .dmx-app-section{margin:0}
        </style>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-live-preview-head"><h1>Inventory</h1><p>Functional DoorMatrix inventory screen for WordPress admin testing and platform setup.</p></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-preview-banner">Admin Inventory Mode: saves to a separate DoorMatrix admin testing workspace only. It does not load or change GDI Operators inventory, pricing, or any other customer company data.</div>';
        echo $message; // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo '<div class="dmx-admin-live-preview-content">';
        echo $content; // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo '</div></div>';

        $html = ob_get_clean();

        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode = $old_preview;
        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_name = $old_preview_company_name;
        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_key = $old_preview_company_key;
        $_GET = $old_get;

        return $html;
    }

    private function render_admin_module_preview_fallback($title) {
        return '<div class="dmx-card"><h3>' . esc_html($title) . '</h3><p>This live preview screen is being prepared.</p></div>';
    }

        }

        echo $this->render_admin_platform_dashboard(); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
    }
    public function render_admin_staff_page() { $this->render_admin_team_members_page(); }

        if (!current_user_can('list_users')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to view DoorMatrix team members.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        echo $this->render_admin_team_members_screen(); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
    }
    public function render_admin_role_previews_page() {
