            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to view DoorMatrix role previews.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        echo $this->render_admin_role_previews_screen(); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
    }

    public function render_admin_companies_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to manage DoorMatrix companies.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $message = '';
        $message_type = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_msg_type'] ?? '');
        $message_text = isset($_GET['dmx_msg']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_msg'])) : '';
        if ($message_text !== '' && in_array($message_type, array('success', 'error'), true)) {
            $message = '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-' . esc_attr($message_type) . '">' . esc_html($message_text) . '</div>';
        }

        $selected_company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_GET['company_key'] ?? ''));
        $companies = $this->get_door_company_admin_records();

        echo '<div class="wrap doormatrix-admin-wrap"><div class="dmx-portal-wrap"><div class="dmx-portal-shell"><div class="dmx-content">';
        echo $message; // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped

        if ($selected_company_key !== '') {
            echo $this->render_admin_company_detail_screen($selected_company_key, $companies); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        } else {
            echo $this->render_admin_company_list_screen($companies); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        }

        echo '</div></div></div></div>';
    }

    public function add_company_column_to_users_list($columns) {
        $columns['dmx_company'] = 'DoorMatrix Company';
        $columns['dmx_portal_role'] = 'DoorMatrix Role';
        return $columns;
    }

    public function render_company_column_on_users_list($value, $column_name, $user_id) {
        if ($column_name === 'dmx_company') {
            $company_name = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true);
            $company_key = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_key', true);

            if ($company_name === '' && $company_key !== '') {
                $company_name = $this->format_company_name_from_key($company_key);
            }

            if ($company_name === '') {
                return '—';
            }

            if ($company_key !== '' && current_user_can('manage_options')) {
                return '<a href="' . esc_url($this->get_admin_company_url($company_key)) . '">' . esc_html($company_name) . '</a>';
            }

            return esc_html($company_name);
        }

        if ($column_name === 'dmx_portal_role') {
            $user = get_userdata($user_id);
            if (!$user) {
                return '—';
            }

            return esc_html($this->get_portal_role_label($user));
        }

        return $value;
    }

    private function get_admin_company_url($company_key = '') {
        $args = array('page' => 'doormatrix-door-companies');
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key !== '') {
            $args['company_key'] = $company_key;
        }

        return add_query_arg($args, admin_url('admin.php'));
    }

    private function format_company_name_from_key($company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return '';
        }

        return ucwords(str_replace('-', ' ', $company_key));
    }

    private function get_company_name_for_key($company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return '';
        }

        $users = get_users(array(
            'number' => 1,
            'meta_key' => '_dmx_company_key',
            'meta_value' => $company_key,
        ));

        if (!empty($users)) {
            $company_name = (string) get_user_meta($users[0]->ID, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true);
            if ($company_name !== '') {
                return $company_name;
            }
        }

        return $this->format_company_name_from_key($company_key);
    }

    private function get_door_company_admin_records() {
        $users = get_users(array(
            'orderby' => 'display_name',
            'order' => 'ASC',
            'role__in' => $this->get_portal_role_keys(),
        ));

        $companies = array();

        foreach ($users as $user) {
            $company_key = sanitize_title((string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_company_key', true));
            $company_name = (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true);

            if ($company_key === '' && $company_name !== '') {
                $company_key = $this->normalize_company_name($company_name);
                update_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_company_key', $company_key);
            }

            if ($company_key === '') {
                continue;
            }

            if (!isset($companies[$company_key])) {
                $companies[$company_key] = array(
                    'company_key' => $company_key,
                    'company_name' => $company_name !== '' ? $company_name : $this->format_company_name_from_key($company_key),
                    'manager_name' => '—',
                    'manager_email' => '—',
                    'manager_user_id' => 0,
                    'users_total' => 0,
                    'users_pending' => 0,
                    'plan' => $this->get_company_active_plan($company_key),
                    'trial' => $this->get_company_trial_data($company_key),
                    'record_counts' => array(),
                    'records_total' => 0,
                );
            }

            $companies[$company_key]['users_total']++;

            $status = (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_account_status', true);
            if ($status === 'pending') {
                $companies[$company_key]['users_pending']++;
            }

            $is_manager = in_array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true) || (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_is_company_owner', true) === 'yes';
            if ($is_manager && (int) $companies[$company_key]['manager_user_id'] === 0) {
                $companies[$company_key]['manager_name'] = $user->display_name;
                $companies[$company_key]['manager_email'] = $user->user_email;
                $companies[$company_key]['manager_user_id'] = (int) $user->ID;
            }
        }

        foreach ($companies as $company_key => &$company) {
            foreach ($this->get_company_owned_post_types() as $post_type) {
                $count = $this->count_company_records($company_key, $post_type);
                $company['record_counts'][$post_type] = $count;
                $company['records_total'] += $count;
            }
        }
        unset($company);

        uasort($companies, function($a, $b) {
            return strcasecmp($a['company_name'], $b['company_name']);
        });

        return array_values($companies);
    }

    private function count_company_records($company_key, $post_type) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '' || $post_type === '') {
            return 0;
        }

        $query = new WP_Query(array(
            'post_type' => $post_type,
            'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
            'posts_per_page' => 1,
            'fields' => 'ids',
            'meta_key' => '_dmx_company_key',
            'meta_value' => $company_key,
            'no_found_rows' => false,
        ));

        return (int) $query->found_posts;
    }

    private function get_company_record_type_labels() {
        return array(
            'dm_quote' => 'Quotes',
            'dm_supplier_request' => 'Supplier Requests',
            'dm_invoice' => 'Invoices',
            'dm_work_order' => 'Work Orders',
            'dm_sales_appointment' => 'Sales Appointments',
            'dm_inspection' => 'Inspections',
            self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE => 'Hazard Assessments',
            'dm_customer' => 'Customers',
            'dm_subcontractor_po' => 'Subcontractor POs',
            'dm_subcontractor_invoice' => 'Subcontractor Invoices',
        );
    }

    private function find_admin_company_record($company_key, $companies = array()) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        foreach ($companies as $company) {
            if ((string) $company['company_key'] === $company_key) {
                return $company;
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    private function render_admin_company_list_screen($companies) {
        $total_companies = count($companies);
        $active_count = 0;
        $trial_count = 0;
        $locked_count = 0;

        foreach ($companies as $company) {
            $trial = $company['trial'];
            if ($trial['status'] === 'active') {
                $active_count++;
            } elseif ($trial['status'] === 'trial' && empty($trial['expired'])) {
                $trial_count++;
            }

            if ($this->company_access_is_locked($company['company_key'])) {
                $locked_count++;
            }
        }

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Door Companies</h3>
                <p>Manage company accounts first. Each door company opens into its own users, plan, trial, and saved company data.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('users.php')); ?>">Open WordPress Users</a>
                <a class="dmx-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-portal-team-members')); ?>">Account Approvals</a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-grid">
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Door Companies</div><div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo esc_html($total_companies); ?></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Active / Paid</div><div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo esc_html($active_count); ?></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Trial Active</div><div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo esc_html($trial_count); ?></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Needs Attention</div><div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo esc_html($locked_count); ?></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Data Retention</div><div class="dmx-stat-number">Saved</div></div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-help-box" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
            <p><strong>Trial data is not deleted when a trial ends.</strong> If a company pays days or months later, set the company status to <strong>Active / Paid</strong> and they can continue from the quotes, invoices, customers, schedules, inventory, files, and settings they already created.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Company Accounts</h4>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                <table class="dmx-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Company</th>
                            <th>Manager</th>
                            <th>Plan</th>
                            <th>Account / Trial</th>
                            <th>Users</th>
                            <th>Saved Records</th>
                            <th>Action</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                    <?php if (!empty($companies)) : foreach ($companies as $company) : ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td>
                                <strong><?php echo esc_html($company['company_name']); ?></strong><br>
                                <span><?php echo esc_html($company['company_key']); ?></span>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <?php echo esc_html($company['manager_name']); ?><br>
                                <span><?php echo esc_html($company['manager_email']); ?></span>
                            </td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_company_plan_label($company['plan'])); ?></td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="dmx-pill <?php echo $this->company_access_is_locked($company['company_key']) ? 'dmx-pill-cancelled' : 'dmx-pill-paid'; ?>">
                                    <?php echo esc_html($this->get_company_access_summary($company['company_key'])); ?>
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <?php echo esc_html((string) $company['users_total']); ?>
                                <?php if ((int) $company['users_pending'] > 0) : ?>
                                    <br><span><?php echo esc_html((string) $company['users_pending']); ?> pending</span>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html((string) $company['records_total']); ?></td>
                            <td><a class="dmx-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_admin_company_url($company['company_key'])); ?>">View Company</a></td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; else : ?>
                        <tr><td colspan="7"><div class="dmx-empty">No DoorMatrix companies found yet. New company signups will appear here after they request an account.</div></td></tr>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_admin_company_recovery_items($company_key, $limit = 25) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return array();
        }

        $post_types = array_keys($this->get_recovery_post_type_labels());

        return get_posts(array(
            'post_type' => $post_types,
            'post_status' => 'trash',
            'posts_per_page' => absint($limit),
            'orderby' => 'modified',
            'order' => 'DESC',
            'meta_key' => '_dmx_company_key',
            'meta_value' => $company_key,
        ));
    }

    private function get_admin_company_recovery_count($company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return 0;
        }

        $query = new WP_Query(array(
            'post_type' => array_keys($this->get_recovery_post_type_labels()),
            'post_status' => 'trash',
            'posts_per_page' => 1,
            'fields' => 'ids',
            'meta_key' => '_dmx_company_key',
            'meta_value' => $company_key,
            'no_found_rows' => false,
        ));

        return (int) $query->found_posts;
    }

    private function redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, $type, $message) {
        $redirect_url = add_query_arg(array(
            'dmx_msg_type' => sanitize_key($type),
            'dmx_msg' => rawurlencode((string) $message),
        ), $this->get_admin_company_url($company_key));

        wp_safe_redirect($redirect_url);
        exit;
    }

    private function admin_restore_company_recovery_record() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to restore DoorMatrix company records.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_POST['company_key'] ?? ''));
        $record_id = absint($_POST['recovery_record_id'] ?? 0);

        if ($company_key === '' || $record_id <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'The recovery record could not be found.');
        }

        $post = get_post($record_id);
        if (!$post || $post->post_status !== 'trash') {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'That record is not currently in the Recovery Bin.');
        }

        $labels = $this->get_recovery_post_type_labels();
        if (!isset($labels[$post->post_type])) {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'That record type is not supported by the Recovery Bin.');
        }

        $record_company_key = sanitize_title((string) get_post_meta($record_id, '_dmx_company_key', true));
        if ($record_company_key !== $company_key) {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'That record does not belong to the selected company.');
        }

        $restored = wp_untrash_post($record_id);
        if (!$restored || is_wp_error($restored)) {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'The selected record could not be restored.');
        }

        update_post_meta($record_id, '_dmx_admin_restored_by_user_id', get_current_user_id());
        update_post_meta($record_id, '_dmx_admin_restored_by_user_name', wp_get_current_user()->display_name);
        update_post_meta($record_id, '_dmx_admin_restored_at', current_time('mysql'));

        $this->add_company_restore_audit_log($company_key, array(
            'action' => 'Record restored from Recovery Bin',
            'details' => 'Restored ' . get_the_title($record_id) . ' (record ID #' . $record_id . ') from company Recovery Bin.',
        ));

        $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'success', 'Record restored from the company Recovery Bin.');
    }

    private function get_company_backup_status_settings($company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        $defaults = array(
            'protection_status' => 'active',
            'backup_provider' => 'SiteGround / DoorMatrix managed',
            'last_platform_backup' => '',
            'last_company_data_backup' => '',
            'last_file_backup' => '',
            'last_restore_test' => '',
            'backup_health' => 'good',
            'restore_contact' => self::OWNER_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL,
            'backup_notes' => '',
            'restore_notes' => '',
            'updated_at' => '',
            'updated_by' => '',
        );

        if ($company_key === '') {
            return $defaults;
        }

        $saved = get_option('dmx_company_backup_status_' . $company_key, array());
        if (!is_array($saved)) {
            $saved = array();
        }

        return wp_parse_args($saved, $defaults);
    }

    private function save_company_backup_status_settings($company_key, $settings) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return false;
        }

        $settings = wp_parse_args((array) $settings, $this->get_company_backup_status_settings($company_key));
        $settings['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
        $settings['updated_by'] = wp_get_current_user()->display_name;

        update_option('dmx_company_backup_status_' . $company_key, $settings, false);
        return true;
    }

    private function get_company_restore_audit_log($company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return array();
        }

        $log = get_option('dmx_restore_audit_log_' . $company_key, array());
        if (!is_array($log)) {
            return array();
        }

        return $log;
    }

    private function add_company_restore_audit_log($company_key, $entry) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return false;
        }

        $log = $this->get_company_restore_audit_log($company_key);
        array_unshift($log, wp_parse_args((array) $entry, array(
            'logged_at' => current_time('mysql'),
            'logged_by' => wp_get_current_user()->display_name,
            'action' => '',
            'details' => '',
        )));

        $log = array_slice($log, 0, 50);
        update_option('dmx_restore_audit_log_' . $company_key, $log, false);
        return true;
    }

    private function admin_save_company_backup_status() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to update DoorMatrix backup status.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_POST['company_key'] ?? ''));
        if ($company_key === '') {
            wp_safe_redirect(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-door-companies'));
            exit;
        }

        $settings = array(
            'protection_status' => sanitize_key((string) ($_POST['protection_status'] ?? 'active')),
            'backup_provider' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['backup_provider'] ?? '')),
            'last_platform_backup' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['last_platform_backup'] ?? '')),
            'last_company_data_backup' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['last_company_data_backup'] ?? '')),
            'last_file_backup' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['last_file_backup'] ?? '')),
            'last_restore_test' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['last_restore_test'] ?? '')),
            'backup_health' => sanitize_key((string) ($_POST['backup_health'] ?? 'good')),
            'restore_contact' => sanitize_email((string) ($_POST['restore_contact'] ?? self::OWNER_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL)),
            'backup_notes' => sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['backup_notes'] ?? '')),
            'restore_notes' => sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['restore_notes'] ?? '')),
        );

        $this->save_company_backup_status_settings($company_key, $settings);
        $this->add_company_restore_audit_log($company_key, array(
            'action' => 'Backup status updated',
            'details' => 'DoorMatrix admin updated backup protection/status tracking fields.',
        ));

        $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'success', 'Backup protection status saved.');
    }

    private function admin_update_restore_request() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to update restore requests.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_POST['company_key'] ?? ''));
        $request_id = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['restore_request_id'] ?? ''));

        if ($company_key === '' || $request_id === '') {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'Restore request could not be found.');
        }

        $requests = $this->get_company_restore_requests($company_key);
        $found = false;
        $new_status = sanitize_key((string) ($_POST['restore_status'] ?? 'submitted'));
        $admin_notes = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['restore_admin_notes'] ?? ''));

        foreach ($requests as $index => $request) {
            if ((string) ($request['id'] ?? '') !== $request_id) {
                continue;
            }

            $requests[$index]['status'] = $new_status;
            $requests[$index]['admin_notes'] = $admin_notes;
            $requests[$index]['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $requests[$index]['updated_by_name'] = wp_get_current_user()->display_name;
            $found = true;
            break;
        }

        if (!$found) {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'Restore request could not be found.');
        }

        update_option('dmx_restore_requests_' . $company_key, $requests, false);
        $this->add_company_restore_audit_log($company_key, array(
            'action' => 'Restore request updated',
            'details' => 'Restore request ' . $request_id . ' status changed to ' . ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $new_status)) . '.',
        ));

        $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'success', 'Restore request updated.');
    }

    private function render_backup_status_select($name, $selected, $options) {
        $html = '<select name="' . esc_attr($name) . '">';
        foreach ($options as $value => $label) {
            $html .= '<option value="' . esc_attr($value) . '"' . selected($selected, $value, false) . '>' . esc_html($label) . '</option>';
        }
        $html .= '</select>';
        return $html;
    }

    private function get_company_backup_snapshots($company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return array();
        }

        $snapshots = get_option('dmx_company_backup_snapshots_' . $company_key, array());
        if (!is_array($snapshots)) {
            return array();
        }

        return array_values($snapshots);
    }

    private function save_company_backup_snapshots($company_key, $snapshots) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return false;
        }

        if (!is_array($snapshots)) {
            $snapshots = array();
        }

        $snapshots = array_slice(array_values($snapshots), 0, 10);
        update_option('dmx_company_backup_snapshots_' . $company_key, $snapshots, false);
        return true;
    }

    private function build_admin_company_backup_snapshot_data($company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        $records = array();
        $record_count = 0;
        $file_index = array();

        foreach ($this->get_company_owned_post_types() as $post_type) {
            $posts = get_posts(array(
                'post_type' => $post_type,
                'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
                'posts_per_page' => -1,
                'orderby' => 'ID',
                'order' => 'ASC',
                'meta_query' => array(
                    array(
                        'key' => '_dmx_company_key',
                        'value' => $company_key,
                        'compare' => '=',
                    ),
                ),
            ));

            $records[$post_type] = array();
            foreach ($posts as $post) {
                $row = $this->serialize_backup_post_record($post);
                $records[$post_type][] = $row;
                $file_index = array_merge($file_index, $this->extract_backup_file_references_from_meta($post->ID, $row['meta']));
            }

            $record_count += count($posts);
        }

        $file_index = $this->dedupe_backup_file_index($file_index);

        return array(
            'snapshot_id' => uniqid('dmx_snapshot_', true),
            'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
            'created_by_user_id' => get_current_user_id(),
            'created_by_name' => wp_get_current_user()->display_name,
            'company_key' => $company_key,
            'plugin_version' => self::VERSION,
            'snapshot_type' => 'admin_company_snapshot',
            'settings' => array(
                'backup_status' => $this->get_company_backup_status_settings($company_key),
                'company_plan' => $this->get_company_active_plan($company_key),
            ),
            'records' => $records,
            'file_index' => $file_index,
            'counts' => array(
                'records' => $record_count,
                'files' => count($file_index),
            ),
        );
    }

    private function admin_create_company_backup_snapshot() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to create DoorMatrix backup snapshots.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_POST['company_key'] ?? ''));
        if ($company_key === '') {
            wp_safe_redirect(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-door-companies'));
            exit;
        }

        $snapshot = $this->build_admin_company_backup_snapshot_data($company_key);
        $snapshots = $this->get_company_backup_snapshots($company_key);
        array_unshift($snapshots, $snapshot);
        $this->save_company_backup_snapshots($company_key, $snapshots);

        $backup_status = $this->get_company_backup_status_settings($company_key);
        $backup_status['last_company_data_backup'] = (string) $snapshot['created_at'];
        $backup_status['last_file_backup'] = (string) $snapshot['created_at'];
        $backup_status['backup_health'] = 'good';
        $backup_status['protection_status'] = 'active';
        $this->save_company_backup_status_settings($company_key, $backup_status);

        $this->add_company_restore_audit_log($company_key, array(
            'action' => 'Company backup snapshot created',
            'details' => 'Created admin backup snapshot with ' . (int) $snapshot['counts']['records'] . ' records and ' . (int) $snapshot['counts']['files'] . ' file references.',
        ));

        $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'success', 'Company backup snapshot created.');
    }

    private function admin_restore_company_backup_snapshot() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to restore DoorMatrix backup snapshots.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_POST['company_key'] ?? ''));
        $snapshot_id = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['snapshot_id'] ?? ''));

        if ($company_key === '' || $snapshot_id === '') {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'Backup snapshot could not be found.');
        }

        $snapshots = $this->get_company_backup_snapshots($company_key);
        $selected_snapshot = null;

        foreach ($snapshots as $snapshot) {
            if ((string) ($snapshot['snapshot_id'] ?? '') === $snapshot_id) {
                $selected_snapshot = $snapshot;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (!is_array($selected_snapshot)) {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'Backup snapshot could not be found.');
        }

        if (sanitize_title((string) ($selected_snapshot['company_key'] ?? '')) !== $company_key) {
            $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'error', 'This snapshot does not belong to the selected company.');
        }

        $restored_count = 0;
        $created_count = 0;
        $updated_count = 0;
        $failed_count = 0;

        $records = isset($selected_snapshot['records']) && is_array($selected_snapshot['records']) ? $selected_snapshot['records'] : array();
        foreach ($records as $post_type => $rows) {
            if (!is_array($rows)) {
                continue;
            }

            foreach ($rows as $row) {
                $result = $this->restore_company_snapshot_post_record($row, $company_key);
                if ($result['status'] === 'created') {
                    $created_count++;
                    $restored_count++;
                } elseif ($result['status'] === 'updated') {
                    $updated_count++;
                    $restored_count++;
                } else {
                    $failed_count++;
                }
            }
        }

        $this->add_company_restore_audit_log($company_key, array(
            'action' => 'Company backup snapshot restored',
            'details' => 'Restored snapshot from ' . (string) ($selected_snapshot['created_at'] ?? '') . '. Updated: ' . $updated_count . ', created: ' . $created_count . ', failed: ' . $failed_count . '.',
        ));

        $this->redirect_admin_company_with_message($company_key, 'success', 'Backup snapshot restore completed. Restored/updated ' . $restored_count . ' records.');
    }

    private function restore_company_snapshot_post_record($row, $company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if (!is_array($row) || $company_key === '') {
            return array('status' => 'failed', 'post_id' => 0);
        }

        $post_type = sanitize_key((string) ($row['post_type'] ?? ''));
        if (!in_array($post_type, $this->get_company_owned_post_types(), true)) {
            return array('status' => 'failed', 'post_id' => 0);
        }

        $original_id = absint($row['id'] ?? 0);
        $meta = isset($row['meta']) && is_array($row['meta']) ? $row['meta'] : array();
        $row_company_key = '';

        if (isset($meta['_dmx_company_key'][0])) {
            $row_company_key = sanitize_title((string) $meta['_dmx_company_key'][0]);
        }

        if ($row_company_key !== '' && $row_company_key !== $company_key) {
            return array('status' => 'failed', 'post_id' => 0);
        }

        $postarr = array(
            'post_type' => $post_type,
            'post_status' => sanitize_key((string) ($row['post_status'] ?? 'publish')),
            'post_title' => sanitize_text_field((string) ($row['post_title'] ?? 'Restored Record')),
            'post_content' => wp_kses_post((string) ($row['post_content'] ?? '')),
            'post_excerpt' => sanitize_textarea_field((string) ($row['post_excerpt'] ?? '')),
        );

        if (!in_array($postarr['post_status'], array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'), true)) {
            $postarr['post_status'] = 'publish';
        }

        $existing_id = 0;
        if ($original_id > 0 && get_post($original_id)) {
            $existing_post = get_post($original_id);
            if ($existing_post && $existing_post->post_type === $post_type) {
                $existing_company_key = sanitize_title((string) get_post_meta($original_id, '_dmx_company_key', true));
                if ($existing_company_key === $company_key || $existing_company_key === '') {
                    if ($existing_post->post_status === 'trash') {
                        wp_untrash_post($original_id);
                    }
                    $existing_id = $original_id;
                }
            }
        }

        if ($existing_id <= 0 && $original_id > 0) {
            $found = get_posts(array(
                'post_type' => $post_type,
                'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private', 'trash'),
                'posts_per_page' => 1,
                'fields' => 'ids',
                'meta_query' => array(
                    array(
                        'key' => '_dmx_restored_from_snapshot_original_id',
                        'value' => $original_id,
                        'compare' => '=',
                    ),
                    array(
                        'key' => '_dmx_company_key',
                        'value' => $company_key,
                        'compare' => '=',
                    ),
                ),
            ));

            if (!empty($found)) {
                $existing_id = absint($found[0]);
                $found_post = get_post($existing_id);
                if ($found_post && $found_post->post_status === 'trash') {
                    wp_untrash_post($existing_id);
                }
            }
        }

        if ($existing_id > 0) {
            $postarr['ID'] = $existing_id;
            $new_id = wp_update_post($postarr, true);
            $status = 'updated';
        } else {
            $new_id = wp_insert_post($postarr, true);
            $status = 'created';
        }

        if (is_wp_error($new_id) || !$new_id) {
            return array('status' => 'failed', 'post_id' => 0);
        }

        foreach ($meta as $meta_key => $values) {
            $meta_key = sanitize_key((string) $meta_key);
            if ($meta_key === '') {
                continue;
            }

            delete_post_meta($new_id, $meta_key);
            foreach ((array) $values as $value) {
                add_post_meta($new_id, $meta_key, maybe_unserialize($value));
            }
        }

        update_post_meta($new_id, '_dmx_company_key', $company_key);
        update_post_meta($new_id, '_dmx_restored_from_snapshot_original_id', $original_id);
        update_post_meta($new_id, '_dmx_restored_from_snapshot_at', current_time('mysql'));
        update_post_meta($new_id, '_dmx_restored_from_snapshot_by', wp_get_current_user()->display_name);

        return array('status' => $status, 'post_id' => (int) $new_id);
    }

    private function render_admin_company_backup_snapshots_panel($company_key) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        $snapshots = $this->get_company_backup_snapshots($company_key);

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
            <div class="dmx-page-head" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Company Backup Snapshots</h4>
                    <p>Create protected DoorMatrix record snapshots for this company and restore from them if records are deleted or damaged.</p>
                </div>
                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="admin_create_company_backup_snapshot">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="companies">
                    <input type="hidden" name="company_key" value="<?php echo esc_attr($company_key); ?>">
                    <button class="dmx-btn" type="submit">Create Backup Snapshot</button>
                </form>
            </div>

            <?php if (empty($snapshots)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty">No backup snapshots have been created for this company yet.</div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                    <table class="dmx-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Created</th>
                                <th>Records</th>
                                <th>File References</th>
                                <th>Created By</th>
                                <th>Restore</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            <?php foreach ($snapshots as $snapshot) : ?>
                                <tr>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($snapshot['created_at'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($snapshot['counts']['records'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($snapshot['counts']['files'] ?? 0)); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($snapshot['created_by_name'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                                    <td>
                                        <form method="post" style="display:grid;gap:8px;min-width:230px;">
                                            <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="admin_restore_company_backup_snapshot">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="companies">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="company_key" value="<?php echo esc_attr($company_key); ?>">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="snapshot_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr((string) ($snapshot['snapshot_id'] ?? '')); ?>">
                                            <button class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" type="submit" onclick="return confirm('Restore this company snapshot? This can update existing records and recreate missing records from the selected snapshot.');">Restore From Snapshot</button>
                                        </form>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-inline-note">Snapshots are stored inside WordPress for admin recovery support. Offsite encrypted backup storage is still the next larger backup step.</div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_admin_company_backup_restore_panel($company_key, $company) {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        $recovery_items = $this->get_admin_company_recovery_items($company_key, 20);
        $recovery_count = $this->get_admin_company_recovery_count($company_key);
        $restore_requests = $this->get_company_restore_requests($company_key);
        $backup_status = $this->get_company_backup_status_settings($company_key);
        $audit_log = $this->get_company_restore_audit_log($company_key);
        $open_restore_count = 0;

        foreach ($restore_requests as $request) {
            $status = sanitize_key((string) ($request['status'] ?? 'submitted'));
            if (!in_array($status, array('complete', 'completed', 'closed', 'cancelled', 'rejected', 'not_recoverable'), true)) {
                $open_restore_count++;
            }
        }

        $labels = $this->get_recovery_post_type_labels();

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
            <div class="dmx-page-head" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Backup &amp; Restore Admin Controls</h4>
                    <p>DoorMatrix admin view for backup tracking, recovery support, restore requests, deleted records, and restore audit history.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-grid" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));">
                <div class="dmx-card">
                    <div class="dmx-stat-label">Backup Health</div>
                    <div class="dmx-stat-number" style="font-size:22px;"><?php echo esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', (string) $backup_status['backup_health']))); ?></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-card">
                    <div class="dmx-stat-label">Recovery Bin</div>
                    <div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo esc_html((string) $recovery_count); ?></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-card">
                    <div class="dmx-stat-label">Open Restore Requests</div>
                    <div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo esc_html((string) $open_restore_count); ?></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-card">
                    <div class="dmx-stat-label">Saved Records</div>
                    <div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo esc_html((string) ($company['records_total'] ?? 0)); ?></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Backup Protection Status</h4>
                <p>Internal DoorMatrix tracking for each company backup setup. These fields are admin-only and prepare the system for automated backup status reporting later.</p>

                <form method="post" style="margin-top:14px;">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="admin_save_company_backup_status">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="companies">
                    <input type="hidden" name="company_key" value="<?php echo esc_attr($company_key); ?>">

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Backup Protection</label>
                            <?php echo $this->render_backup_status_select('protection_status', $backup_status['protection_status'], array(
                                'active' => 'Active',
                                'needs_review' => 'Needs Review',
                                'issue' => 'Issue',
                                'paused' => 'Paused',
                            )); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped ?>
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Backup Health</label>
                            <?php echo $this->render_backup_status_select('backup_health', $backup_status['backup_health'], array(
                                'good' => 'Good',
                                'needs_review' => 'Needs Review',
                                'issue' => 'Issue',
                                'not_configured' => 'Not Configured',
                            )); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped ?>
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Backup Provider</label>
                            <input type="text" name="backup_provider" value="<?php echo esc_attr((string) $backup_status['backup_provider']); ?>" placeholder="SiteGround / Offsite Cloud / Managed backup">
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Restore Contact</label>
                            <input type="email" name="restore_contact" value="<?php echo esc_attr((string) $backup_status['restore_contact']); ?>" placeholder="<?php echo esc_attr(self::OWNER_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL); ?>">
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Last Platform Backup</label>
                            <input type="text" name="last_platform_backup" value="<?php echo esc_attr((string) $backup_status['last_platform_backup']); ?>" placeholder="Example: 2026-04-28 02:00">
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Last Company Data Backup</label>
                            <input type="text" name="last_company_data_backup" value="<?php echo esc_attr((string) $backup_status['last_company_data_backup']); ?>" placeholder="Example: 2026-04-28 02:15">
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Last File Backup / Index</label>
                            <input type="text" name="last_file_backup" value="<?php echo esc_attr((string) $backup_status['last_file_backup']); ?>" placeholder="Example: 2026-04-28 02:30">
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Last Restore Test</label>
                            <input type="text" name="last_restore_test" value="<?php echo esc_attr((string) $backup_status['last_restore_test']); ?>" placeholder="Example: Not tested yet">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Backup Notes</label>
                            <textarea name="backup_notes" rows="4" placeholder="Internal backup setup/status notes."><?php echo esc_textarea((string) $backup_status['backup_notes']); ?></textarea>
                        </div>

                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Restore Notes</label>
                            <textarea name="restore_notes" rows="4" placeholder="Internal restore notes, special handling, or customer-specific recovery details."><?php echo esc_textarea((string) $backup_status['restore_notes']); ?></textarea>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <button class="dmx-btn" type="submit">Save Backup Status</button>

                    <?php if (!empty($backup_status['updated_at'])) : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-inline-note">Last updated <?php echo esc_html((string) $backup_status['updated_at']); ?> by <?php echo esc_html((string) $backup_status['updated_by']); ?>.</div>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </form>
            </div>

            <?php echo $this->render_admin_company_backup_snapshots_panel($company_key); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped ?>

            <div class="dmx-form-grid" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <div class="dmx-help-box">
                    <h4>Admin Recovery Notes</h4>
                    <p>This area is for DoorMatrix owner/admin recovery support. Door companies should use their portal Backup &amp; Recovery screen to restore small accidental deletions or request larger recovery help.</p>
                    <p>Use this admin area when a manager requests help after a customer, invoice, work order, file, or larger group of records has been deleted or damaged.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-help-box">
                    <h4>Restore Safety</h4>
                    <p>Small deleted records can be restored from the Recovery Bin while they remain in WordPress trash. Larger restore requests should be reviewed before applying changes so good records are not overwritten by mistake.</p>
                    <p>Future automated backups should add actual last backup time, full file backup status, protected snapshots, and deeper restore tools here.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Company Recovery Bin</h4>
                <p>Deleted company records that are still recoverable from WordPress trash appear here.</p>

                <?php if (empty($recovery_items)) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-empty" style="margin-top:14px;">No deleted records are currently recoverable for this company.</div>
                <?php else : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-table-wrap" style="margin-top:14px;">
                        <table class="dmx-table">
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Deleted Record</th>
                                    <th>Type</th>
                                    <th>Deleted</th>
                                    <th>Deleted By</th>
                                    <th>Admin Restore</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <?php foreach ($recovery_items as $item) :
                                    $type_label = $labels[$item->post_type] ?? $item->post_type;
                                    $deleted_at = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_deleted_at', true);
                                    if ($deleted_at === '') {
                                        $deleted_at = $item->post_modified;
                                    }

                                    $deleted_by = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_deleted_by_user_name', true);
                                    if ($deleted_by === '') {
                                        $deleted_by = 'Unknown / WordPress Trash';
                                    }
                                    ?>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><strong><?php echo esc_html(get_the_title($item)); ?></strong><br><span style="color:#61738b;">ID #<?php echo esc_html((string) $item->ID); ?></span></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html($type_label); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html($deleted_at); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html($deleted_by); ?></td>
                                        <td>
                                            <form method="post">
                                                <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="admin_restore_company_recovery_record">
                                                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="companies">
                                                <input type="hidden" name="company_key" value="<?php echo esc_attr($company_key); ?>">
                                                <input type="hidden" name="recovery_record_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($item->ID); ?>">
                                                <button class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" type="submit">Restore Record</button>
                                            </form>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Company Restore Requests</h4>
                <p>Restore requests submitted from the company portal appear here for DoorMatrix admin review and status management.</p>

                <?php if (empty($restore_requests)) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-empty" style="margin-top:14px;">No restore requests have been submitted by this company yet.</div>
                <?php else : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-table-wrap" style="margin-top:14px;">
                        <table class="dmx-table">
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Submitted</th>
                                    <th>Type</th>
                                    <th>Urgency</th>
                                    <th>Submitted By</th>
                                    <th>Details</th>
                                    <th>Status / Admin Notes</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <?php foreach (array_slice($restore_requests, 0, 10) as $request) :
                                    $request_id = (string) ($request['id'] ?? '');
                                    if ($request_id === '') {
                                        $request_id = md5(wp_json_encode($request));
                                    }
                                    ?>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($request['submitted_at'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', (string) ($request['restore_type'] ?? '')))); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst((string) ($request['urgency'] ?? 'normal'))); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($request['submitted_by_name'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($request['details'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                                        <td>
                                            <form method="post" style="display:grid;gap:8px;min-width:260px;">
                                                <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="admin_update_restore_request">
                                                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="companies">
                                                <input type="hidden" name="company_key" value="<?php echo esc_attr($company_key); ?>">
                                                <input type="hidden" name="restore_request_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($request_id); ?>">
                                                <?php echo $this->render_backup_status_select('restore_status', sanitize_key((string) ($request['status'] ?? 'submitted')), array(
                                                    'submitted' => 'Submitted',
                                                    'under_review' => 'Under Review',
                                                    'waiting_on_customer' => 'Waiting on Customer Info',
                                                    'restore_scheduled' => 'Restore Scheduled',
                                                    'restored' => 'Restored',
                                                    'closed' => 'Closed',
                                                    'rejected' => 'Rejected',
                                                    'not_recoverable' => 'Not Recoverable',
                                                )); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped ?>
                                                <textarea name="restore_admin_notes" rows="3" placeholder="Admin restore notes..."><?php echo esc_textarea((string) ($request['admin_notes'] ?? '')); ?></textarea>
                                                <button class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" type="submit">Update Request</button>
                                            </form>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Restore Audit Log</h4>
                <p>Internal log of backup status changes, restore request updates, and admin restore actions.</p>

                <?php if (empty($audit_log)) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-empty" style="margin-top:14px;">No restore audit activity has been logged yet.</div>
                <?php else : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-table-wrap" style="margin-top:14px;">
                        <table class="dmx-table">
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Date</th>
                                    <th>Action</th>
                                    <th>Details</th>
                                    <th>By</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                <?php foreach (array_slice($audit_log, 0, 15) as $entry) : ?>
                                    <tr>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($entry['logged_at'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($entry['action'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($entry['details'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                                        <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($entry['logged_by'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                                    </tr>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function is_wordpress_admin_portal_preview() {
        return is_admin() && current_user_can('manage_options');
    }

    private function get_admin_preview_company_label() {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) ($_GET['company_key'] ?? ''));
        if ($company_key !== '' && method_exists($this, 'get_registered_companies')) {
            $companies = $this->get_registered_companies();
            if (isset($companies[$company_key]['name']) && trim((string) $companies[$company_key]['name']) !== '') {
                return trim((string) $companies[$company_key]['name']);
            }
        }

        if (method_exists($this, 'get_current_company_key')) {
            $current_key = sanitize_title((string) $this->get_current_company_key());
            if ($current_key !== '' && method_exists($this, 'get_registered_companies')) {
                $companies = $this->get_registered_companies();
                if (isset($companies[$current_key]['name']) && trim((string) $companies[$current_key]['name']) !== '') {
                    return trim((string) $companies[$current_key]['name']);
                }
            }
        }

        return 'Company Account';
    }

    private function render_admin_company_detail_screen($company_key, $companies) {
        $company = $this->find_admin_company_record($company_key, $companies);
        if (!$company) {
            return '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">Could not find that DoorMatrix company.</div><p><a class="dmx-btn" href="' . esc_url($this->get_admin_company_url()) . '">Back to Door Companies</a></p>';
        }

        $trial = $this->get_company_trial_data($company_key);
        $trial_end_value = '';
        if (!empty($trial['ends_at'])) {
            $trial_end_value = date('Y-m-d', strtotime($trial['ends_at']));
        }

        $company_users = $this->get_company_users($company_key, $this->get_portal_role_keys());
        $record_labels = $this->get_company_record_type_labels();

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3><?php echo esc_html($company['company_name']); ?></h3>
                <p>Company account, trial, plan, saved records, and company users.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_admin_company_url()); ?>">Back to Door Companies</a>
                <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('users.php')); ?>">Open WordPress Users</a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-grid">
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Plan</div><div class="dmx-stat-number" style="font-size:26px;"><?php echo esc_html($this->get_company_plan_label($company['plan'])); ?></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Account Status</div><div class="dmx-stat-number" style="font-size:22px;"><?php echo esc_html($this->get_company_access_status_label($trial['status'] === 'legacy' ? 'active' : $trial['status'])); ?></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Trial</div><div class="dmx-stat-number" style="font-size:20px;"><?php echo esc_html($this->get_company_access_summary($company_key)); ?></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Users</div><div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo esc_html((string) $company['users_total']); ?></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">Saved Records</div><div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo esc_html((string) $company['records_total']); ?></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-panels">
            <div class="dmx-form-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Plan, Trial, and Access Controls</h4>
                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="save_company_admin_controls">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="companies">
                    <input type="hidden" name="company_key" value="<?php echo esc_attr($company_key); ?>">

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Plan</label>
                            <select name="company_plan">
                                <?php foreach ($this->get_company_plan_options() as $plan_key => $plan_label) : ?>
                                    <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($plan_key); ?>" <?php selected($company['plan'], $plan_key); ?>><?php echo esc_html($plan_label); ?></option>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Account Status</label>
                            <select name="company_access_status">
                                <?php foreach ($this->get_company_access_status_options() as $status_key => $status_label) : ?>
                                    <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($status_key); ?>" <?php selected($trial['status'] === 'legacy' ? 'active' : $trial['status'], $status_key); ?>><?php echo esc_html($status_label); ?></option>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Trial End Date</label>
                            <input type="date" name="company_trial_end_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($trial_end_value); ?>">
                            <div class="dmx-inline-note">Only used when Account Status is set to Trial. Expired trials keep all company data saved.</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Admin Note</label>
                            <input type="text" name="company_admin_note" value="<?php echo esc_attr($trial['status_note']); ?>" placeholder="Example: Extended trial for onboarding support">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Company Controls</button>
                </form>

                <hr style="border:none;border-top:1px solid #e1e9f2;margin:20px 0;">

                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Extend Trial</h4>
                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="extend_company_trial">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="companies">
                    <input type="hidden" name="company_key" value="<?php echo esc_attr($company_key); ?>">

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Extend By</label>
                            <select name="extend_trial_days">
                                <option value="7">7 days</option>
                                <option value="14" selected>14 days</option>
                                <option value="30">30 days</option>
                                <option value="60">60 days</option>
                                <option value="90">90 days</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Extension Note</label>
                            <input type="text" name="trial_extension_note" placeholder="Reason for extension">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary">Extend Trial</button>
                </form>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Saved Company Data</h4>
                <div class="dmx-help-box" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
                    <p>Nothing here is deleted when the trial expires. This makes it safe for a company to come back later, pay for a plan, and continue from where they left off.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-list">
                    <?php foreach ($record_labels as $post_type => $label) : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-list-item">
                            <div><strong><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></strong><span>Company-owned records</span></div>
                            <strong><?php echo esc_html((string) ($company['record_counts'][$post_type] ?? 0)); ?></strong>
                        </div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php echo $this->render_admin_company_backup_restore_panel($company_key, $company); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped ?>

        <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Company Users</h4>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                <table class="dmx-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Name</th>
                            <th>Email / Login</th>
                            <th>Role</th>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <th>Approved</th>
                            <th>Truck</th>
                            <th>Action</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                    <?php if (!empty($company_users)) : foreach ($company_users as $company_user) : ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($company_user->display_name); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($company_user->user_email); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_portal_role_label($company_user)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst((string) get_user_meta($company_user->ID, '_dmx_account_status', true) ?: 'approved')); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html((string) get_user_meta($company_user->ID, '_dmx_role_approved_at', true) ?: '—'); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_user_assigned_truck_label($company_user->ID)); ?></td>
                            <td><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('user-edit.php?user_id=' . absint($company_user->ID))); ?>">Edit User</a></td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; else : ?>
                        <tr><td colspan="7"><div class="dmx-empty">No users are attached to this company yet.</div></td></tr>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php if (!empty($trial['extension_history'])) : ?>
        <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Trial Extension History</h4>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                <table class="dmx-table">
                    <thead><tr><th>Extended</th><th>Days</th><th>Previous End</th><th>New End</th><th>Note</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                    <?php foreach (array_reverse($trial['extension_history']) as $history) : ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($history['extended_at'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($history['days'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($history['previous_ends_at'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($history['new_ends_at'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html((string) ($history['note'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }



    private function get_default_company_profile_settings() {
        return array(
            'setup_complete' => 'no',
            'company_name' => '',
            'legal_name' => '',
            'logo_url' => 'http://doormatrix.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ChatGPT-Image-Apr-1-2026-07_43_49-PM-e1775148933417.png',
            'logo_attachment_id' => 0,
            'email' => '',
            'phone' => '',
            'website' => '',
            'address_1' => '',
            'address_2' => '',
            'city' => '',
            'province_state' => '',
            'postal_zip' => '',
            'country' => 'Canada',
            'currency' => 'CAD',
            'company_timezone' => 'America/Edmonton',
            'tax_registration_number' => '',
            'default_quote_terms' => "Quotes are valid for 30 days unless otherwise stated.",
            'default_invoice_terms' => "Payment due on receipt unless otherwise stated.",
            'document_accent_color' => '#f3d400',
            'document_header_color' => '#595959',
            'document_body_bg' => '#efefef',
            'document_base_font_size' => '14',
            'document_heading_font_size' => '20',
            'document_logo_size' => '150',
            'document_preview_notes' => 'Thank you for the opportunity to quote this project. Please review the details and let us know if you would like to move forward.',
            'default_tax_mode' => 'canada',
            'default_tax_country' => 'Canada',
            'default_tax_region' => 'AB',
            'default_tax_primary_label' => 'GST',
            'default_tax_primary_rate' => '5',
            'default_tax_secondary_label' => '',
            'default_tax_secondary_rate' => '',
            'default_us_sales_tax_rate' => '',
        );
    }

    private function get_company_profile_settings() {
        if ($this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode) {
            $defaults = $this->get_default_company_profile_settings();

            $preview = wp_parse_args(array(
                'company_name' => 'DoorMatrix',
                'legal_name' => 'DoorMatrix',
                'logo_url' => 'http://doormatrix.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ChatGPT-Image-Apr-1-2026-07_43_49-PM-e1775148933417.png',
                'company_email' => self::SUPPORT_EMAIL,
                'support_email' => self::SUPPORT_EMAIL,
                'phone' => '',
                'address' => '',
                'website' => 'https://doormatrix.ca',
                'default_invoice_terms' => '',
                'default_quote_terms' => '',
            ), $defaults);

            return $preview;
        }

        $settings = get_option('dmx_company_profile_settings', array());
        if (!is_array($settings)) {
            $settings = array();
        }
        return wp_parse_args($settings, $this->get_default_company_profile_settings());
    }

    private function get_current_company_profile() {
        return $this->get_company_profile_settings();
    }

    private function update_company_profile_settings($settings) {
        update_option('dmx_company_profile_settings', wp_parse_args($settings, $this->get_default_company_profile_settings()));
    }

            'default_hourly_rate' => '',

            'commission_tracking_enabled' => 'yes',
            'quote_prefix' => 'Q-',
            'invoice_prefix' => 'INV-',
            'work_order_prefix' => 'WO-',
            'customer_prefix' => 'CUST-',
            'main_warehouse_name' => 'Main Warehouse',
            'truck_inventory_required' => 'yes',
            'equipment_scheduler_required' => 'yes',
            'equipment_notes' => '',
            'supplier_notes' => '',
            'supplier_contacts' => array(),
            'manager_notification_email' => self::OWNER_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL,
            'accounting_notification_email' => self::SUPPORT_EMAIL,
            'dispatch_notification_email' => self::SUPPORT_EMAIL,
            'company_profile_ack' => 'no',
            'geography_ack' => 'no',
            'tax_accounting_ack' => 'no',
            'team_roles_ack' => 'no',
            'payroll_ack' => 'no',
            'commissions_ack' => 'no',
            'documents_ack' => 'no',
            'numbering_ack' => 'no',

            'equipment_ack' => 'no',
            'suppliers_ack' => 'no',
            'notifications_ack' => 'no',
            'backup_security_ack' => 'no',
            'wizard_complete' => 'no',
            'updated_at' => '',
            'completed_at' => '',
