    }

    private function get_startup_setup_option_key() {
        $company_key = (string) $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $company_key = sanitize_key($company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            $company_key = 'default';
        }
        return 'dmx_startup_setup_settings_' . $company_key;
    }

    private function get_startup_setup_settings() {
        $settings = get_option($this->get_startup_setup_option_key(), array());
        if (!is_array($settings)) {
            $settings = array();
        }
        return wp_parse_args($settings, $this->get_startup_setup_defaults());
    }

    private function update_startup_setup_settings($settings) {
        update_option($this->get_startup_setup_option_key(), wp_parse_args($settings, $this->get_startup_setup_defaults()));
    }

    private function yes_no_from_post($key) {
        return !empty($_POST[$key]) ? 'yes' : 'no';
    }

    private function get_startup_setup_steps() {
        $setup = $this->get_startup_setup_settings();
        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $team_count = 0;
        if ($company_key !== '') {
            $team_count = count($this->get_company_users($company_key, array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE, self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE)));
        }

        $has_base_location = trim((string) $setup['base_location']) !== '' || trim((string) $company['city']) !== '' || trim((string) $company['province_state']) !== '';
        $has_tax_ready = trim((string) $setup['invoice_due_days']) !== '' && trim((string) $company['default_tax_mode']) !== '' && trim((string) $company['default_tax_country']) !== '';

        $steps = array(
            'company_profile' => array(
                'label' => 'Company Profile',
                'desc' => 'Business name, email, phone, address, website, and logo are filled in.',
                'complete' => ($company['company_name'] !== '' && $company['email'] !== ''),
            ),
            'geography_timezone' => array(
                'label' => 'Geography & Time Zone',
                'desc' => 'Company base location, timezone, currency, distance units, and date/time display are confirmed.',
                'complete' => (!empty($company['company_timezone']) && !empty($company['country']) && $has_base_location),
            ),
            'tax_accounting' => array(
                'label' => 'Tax & Invoice Terms',
                'desc' => 'Tax setup, invoice due days, and customer-facing invoice terms are confirmed.',
                'complete' => ($has_tax_ready || $setup['tax_accounting_ack'] === 'yes'),
            ),
            'team_roles' => array(
                'label' => 'Users & Roles',
                'desc' => 'Managers, coordinators, sales, technicians, helpers, warehouse, parts, accounting, and subcontractor access are reviewed.',
                'complete' => (($team_count > 0 || current_user_can('manage_options')) && ($setup['team_roles_ack'] === 'yes' || $team_count > 0)),
            ),
            'payroll_rules' => array(
                'label' => 'Time Card Rules',
                'desc' => 'Time card approval, overtime trigger, and break-time defaults are reviewed. Employee wages are set later on each team member profile.',
                'complete' => ((float) $setup['overtime_after_hours'] > 0 && ($setup['payroll_ack'] === 'yes' || trim((string) $setup['overtime_after_hours']) !== '')),
            ),
            'sales_commissions' => array(
                'label' => 'Sales Commission Rules',
                'desc' => 'Commission tracking is reviewed. Individual commission percentages are set later when sales team members are added or edited.',
                'complete' => ($setup['commissions_ack'] === 'yes' || in_array($setup['commission_tracking_enabled'], array('yes', 'no'), true)),
            ),
            'branding_documents' => array(
                'label' => 'Branding & Customer Documents',
                'desc' => 'Quote, invoice, logo, colors, terms, and customer-facing document settings are reviewed.',
                'complete' => ($setup['documents_ack'] === 'yes' || ($company['document_accent_color'] !== '' && $company['document_header_color'] !== '')),
            ),
            'numbering' => array(
                'label' => 'Customer / Job Numbering',
                'desc' => 'Quote, invoice, work order, and customer prefixes are set.',
                'complete' => ($setup['quote_prefix'] !== '' && $setup['invoice_prefix'] !== '' && $setup['work_order_prefix'] !== ''),
            ),
            'inventory_trucks' => array(
                'label' => 'Inventory, Warehouse & Trucks',
                'desc' => 'Warehouse, truck inventory, technician truck assignment, transfers, receiving, and low-stock workflow are reviewed.',
                'complete' => (trim((string) $setup['main_warehouse_name']) !== ''),
            ),
            'equipment_scheduler' => array(
                'label' => 'Equipment Scheduler',
                'desc' => 'Owned equipment, rental equipment contacts, and equipment conflict workflow are reviewed.',
                'complete' => ($setup['equipment_ack'] === 'yes'),
            ),
            'suppliers' => array(
                'label' => 'Suppliers & Vendor Contacts',
                'desc' => 'Supplier contacts and quote request routing are reviewed.',
                'complete' => ($setup['suppliers_ack'] === 'yes' || !empty($setup['supplier_contacts']) || trim((string) $setup['supplier_notes']) !== ''),
            ),
        );

        return $steps;
    }

    private function get_startup_setup_progress() {
        $steps = $this->get_startup_setup_steps();
        $total = count($steps);
        $complete = 0;
        foreach ($steps as $step) {
            if (!empty($step['complete'])) {
                $complete++;
            }
        }
        $percent = $total > 0 ? round(($complete / $total) * 100) : 0;
        return array('steps' => $steps, 'total' => $total, 'complete' => $complete, 'percent' => $percent, 'is_complete' => ($total > 0 && $complete >= $total));
    }

    private function is_startup_setup_complete() {
        $setup = $this->get_startup_setup_settings();
        $progress = $this->get_startup_setup_progress();
        return $setup['wizard_complete'] === 'yes' && !empty($progress['is_complete']);
    }

    private function render_startup_setup_status_banner($is_admin = false) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            return '';
        }
        $progress = $this->get_startup_setup_progress();
        if (!empty($progress['is_complete']) && $this->is_startup_setup_complete()) {
            return '';
        }
        $url = $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'settings', 'dmx_subtab' => 'settings_startup'));
        $html = '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error dmx-startup-banner" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">';
        $html .= '<span><strong>Start-Up Setup is not complete.</strong> ' . esc_html($progress['complete']) . ' of ' . esc_html($progress['total']) . ' required setup steps are complete. Finish this before fully using time cards, quotes, invoices, scheduling, inventory, and equipment scheduling.</span>';
        $html .= '<a class="dmx-btn" href="' . esc_url($url) . '">Open Start-Up Setup</a>';
        $html .= '</div>';
        return $html;
    }

    private function save_startup_setup_wizard($tab = 'settings') {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to update the start-up setup wizard.');
        }

        $current = $this->get_startup_setup_settings();
        $settings = $current;
        $step = $this->sanitize_startup_setup_step($_POST['dmx_setup_step'] ?? 'company_profile');
        $nav = isset($_POST['dmx_startup_nav']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_nav'])) : 'stay';
        $ack_map = $this->get_startup_setup_ack_map();
        $ack_field = $ack_map[$step] ?? '';

        // A setup wizard should not make the manager tick a second checkbox just to track progress.
        // Saving the screen means the step was reviewed. Validation below can still force a step incomplete.
        if ($ack_field !== '') {
            $settings[$ack_field] = 'yes';
        }

        switch ($step) {
            case 'company_profile':
                $company_current = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
                $posted_logo_url = isset($_POST['dmx_company_logo_url']) ? esc_url_raw(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_logo_url'])) : '';
                $logo_url = $posted_logo_url !== '' ? $posted_logo_url : $company_current['logo_url'];
                $logo_url = $this->handle_company_logo_upload($logo_url);

                $company_settings = $company_current;
                $company_settings['setup_complete'] = 'yes';
                $company_settings['company_name'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_name'])) : $company_current['company_name'];
                $company_settings['legal_name'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_legal_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_legal_name'])) : $company_current['legal_name'];
                $company_settings['logo_url'] = $logo_url;
                $company_settings['logo_attachment_id'] = absint(get_option('dmx_company_logo_attachment_id', $company_current['logo_attachment_id'] ?? 0));
                $company_settings['email'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_email']) ? sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_email'])) : $company_current['email'];
                $company_settings['phone'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_phone']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_phone'])) : $company_current['phone'];
                $company_settings['website'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_website']) ? esc_url_raw(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_website'])) : $company_current['website'];
                $company_settings['address_1'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_address_1']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_address_1'])) : $company_current['address_1'];
                $company_settings['address_2'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_address_2']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_address_2'])) : $company_current['address_2'];
                $company_settings['city'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_city']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_city'])) : $company_current['city'];
                $company_settings['province_state'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_province_state']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_province_state'])) : $company_current['province_state'];
                $company_settings['postal_zip'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_postal_zip']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_postal_zip'])) : $company_current['postal_zip'];

                if ($company_settings['company_name'] === '' || $company_settings['email'] === '') {
                    $company_settings['setup_complete'] = 'no';
                    $settings['company_profile_ack'] = 'no';
                }

                $this->update_company_profile_settings($company_settings);
                break;

            case 'geography_timezone':
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_base_location'])) {
                    $settings['base_location'] = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_base_location']));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_distance_unit'])) {
                    $settings['distance_unit'] = in_array(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_distance_unit']), array('km', 'mi'), true) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_distance_unit'])) : $current['distance_unit'];
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_date_time_format'])) {
                    $settings['date_time_format'] = in_array(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_date_time_format']), array('12h', '24h'), true) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_date_time_format'])) : $current['date_time_format'];
                }

                $company_current = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
                $company_current['country'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_country']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_country'])) : $company_current['country'];
                $company_current['currency'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_currency']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_currency'])) : $company_current['currency'];
                $company_current['company_timezone'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_timezone']) ? $this->sanitize_company_timezone(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_timezone'])) : $this->sanitize_company_timezone($company_current['company_timezone'] ?? 'America/Edmonton');

                $effective_tax_country = $this->get_effective_startup_tax_country($company_current);
                $company_current['default_tax_country'] = $effective_tax_country;
                $company_current['default_tax_region'] = $this->get_smart_tax_region_from_company($company_current, $effective_tax_country);
                if ($effective_tax_country === 'Canada' && $company_current['default_tax_mode'] === 'usa') {
                    $company_current['default_tax_mode'] = 'canada';
                }
                if ($effective_tax_country === 'USA' && $company_current['default_tax_mode'] === 'canada') {
                    $company_current['default_tax_mode'] = 'usa';
                }

                $preset = $this->get_tax_preset_for_mode($company_current['default_tax_mode'], $company_current['default_tax_country'], $company_current['default_tax_region'], $company_current['default_us_sales_tax_rate']);
                if ($company_current['default_tax_mode'] !== 'custom') {
                    $company_current['default_tax_primary_label'] = $preset['primary_label'];
                    $company_current['default_tax_primary_rate'] = $preset['primary_rate'];
                    $company_current['default_tax_secondary_label'] = $preset['secondary_label'];
                    $company_current['default_tax_secondary_rate'] = $preset['secondary_rate'];
                }

                $this->update_company_profile_settings($company_current);
                break;

            case 'tax_accounting':
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_invoice_due_days'])) {
                    $settings['invoice_due_days'] = (string) max(0, min(365, (int) wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_invoice_due_days'])));
                }

                $company_current = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
                $country = $this->get_effective_startup_tax_country($company_current);
                $mode_options = $this->get_contextual_tax_mode_options($country);
                $mode = isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_mode']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_mode'])) : $company_current['default_tax_mode'];
                if (!array_key_exists($mode, $mode_options)) {
                    $mode = ($country === 'USA') ? 'usa' : 'canada';
                }

                $region = isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_region']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_region'])) : $this->get_smart_tax_region_from_company($company_current, $country);
                if ($country === 'USA') {
                    $region = $this->normalize_usa_tax_region($region);
                    if ($region === '') {
                        $region = $this->get_smart_tax_region_from_company($company_current, $country);
                    }
                } else {
                    $region = $this->normalize_canada_tax_region($region);
                    if ($region === '') {
                        $region = $this->get_smart_tax_region_from_company($company_current, $country);
                    }
                }

                $us_rate = ($country === 'USA' && isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_us_sales_tax_rate'])) ? $this->sanitize_percentage(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_us_sales_tax_rate'])) : $company_current['default_us_sales_tax_rate'];
                $custom_primary_label = isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_primary_label']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_primary_label'])) : $company_current['default_tax_primary_label'];
                $custom_primary_rate = isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_primary_rate']) ? $this->sanitize_percentage(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_primary_rate'])) : $company_current['default_tax_primary_rate'];
                $custom_secondary_label = isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_secondary_label']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_secondary_label'])) : $company_current['default_tax_secondary_label'];
                $custom_secondary_rate = isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_secondary_rate']) ? $this->sanitize_percentage(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_secondary_rate'])) : $company_current['default_tax_secondary_rate'];

                $preset = $this->get_tax_preset_for_mode($mode, $country, $region, $us_rate);

                $company_current['tax_registration_number'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_tax_registration_number']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_tax_registration_number'])) : $company_current['tax_registration_number'];
                $company_current['default_invoice_terms'] = isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_invoice_terms']) ? wp_kses_post(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_invoice_terms'])) : $company_current['default_invoice_terms'];
                $company_current['default_tax_mode'] = $mode;
                $company_current['default_tax_country'] = $preset['country'];
                $company_current['default_tax_region'] = $preset['region'];
                $company_current['default_tax_primary_label'] = ($mode === 'custom') ? $custom_primary_label : $preset['primary_label'];
                $company_current['default_tax_primary_rate'] = ($mode === 'custom') ? $custom_primary_rate : $preset['primary_rate'];
                $company_current['default_tax_secondary_label'] = ($mode === 'custom') ? $custom_secondary_label : $preset['secondary_label'];
                $company_current['default_tax_secondary_rate'] = ($mode === 'custom') ? $custom_secondary_rate : $preset['secondary_rate'];
                $company_current['default_us_sales_tax_rate'] = $us_rate;
                $this->update_company_profile_settings($company_current);
                break;

            case 'team_roles':
                if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_team()) {
                    $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Only managers can add or update team members during start-up setup.');
                }

                $team_name = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['team_member_name'] ?? ''));
                $team_email = sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['team_member_email'] ?? ''));
                $team_phone = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['team_member_phone'] ?? ''));
                $team_password = (string) ($_POST['team_member_password'] ?? '');
                $team_role = sanitize_text_field($_POST['team_member_role_create'] ?? self::STAFF_ROLE);
                $team_status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['team_member_status_create'] ?? 'approved');
                $team_truck_key = sanitize_key($_POST['team_member_truck_key_create'] ?? '');
                $team_note = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['team_member_note'] ?? ''));
                $team_can_create_pos = (isset($_POST['team_member_can_create_pos']) && $_POST['team_member_can_create_pos'] === 'yes') ? 'yes' : 'no';

                $adding_team_member = ($team_name !== '' || $team_email !== '' || $team_password !== '' || $team_phone !== '');
                if ($adding_team_member) {
                    $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
                    $company_name = $this->get_current_user_company_name();
                    if ($company_key === '' && !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
                        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Complete the company profile before adding team members.');
                    }
                    if ($team_name === '' || $team_email === '' || $team_password === '') {
                        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Full name, email/login, and password are required when adding a team member.');
                    }
                    if (!is_email($team_email)) {
                        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please enter a valid team member email/login.');
                    }
                    if (email_exists($team_email)) {
                        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'That team member email/login is already being used.');
                    }
                    if (strlen($team_password) < 8) {
                        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Team member password must be at least 8 characters long.');
                    }

                    $allowed_roles = array_keys($this->get_editable_team_roles());
                    if (!in_array($team_role, $allowed_roles, true)) {
                        $team_role = self::STAFF_ROLE;
                    }
                    if (!in_array($team_status, array('approved', 'inactive'), true)) {
                        $team_status = 'approved';
                    }

                    $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
                    if ($team_truck_key !== '' && (empty($location_map[$team_truck_key]) || ($location_map[$team_truck_key]['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck')) {
                        $team_truck_key = '';
                    }
                    if ($team_role !== self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE) {
                        $team_truck_key = '';
                    }

                    $new_user_id = $this->create_portal_user_account($company_name !== '' ? $company_name : $company_key, $team_name, $team_email, $team_phone, $team_password, $team_role);
                    if (is_wp_error($new_user_id)) {
                        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', $new_user_id->get_error_message());
                    }

                    update_user_meta($new_user_id, '_dmx_account_status', $team_status);
                    update_user_meta($new_user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', $team_role);
                    update_user_meta($new_user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_at', $this->get_company_current_mysql());
                    update_user_meta($new_user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_by', get_current_user_id());
                    $this->save_user_po_permission($new_user_id, $team_role, $team_can_create_pos);
                    if ($team_note !== '') {
                        update_user_meta($new_user_id, '_dmx_manager_note', $team_note);
                    }
                    if ($team_truck_key !== '') {
                        update_user_meta($new_user_id, '_dmx_assigned_truck_key', $team_truck_key);
                        $locations = $this->get_inventory_locations();
                        foreach ($locations as &$location) {
                            if (($location['type'] ?? '') === 'truck' && ($location['key'] ?? '') === $team_truck_key) {
                                $location['assigned_user_id'] = $new_user_id;
                            }
                        }
                        unset($location);
                        $this->save_inventory_locations($locations);
                    }
                }
                break;

            case 'branding_documents':
                $layout_settings = $this->get_document_layout_settings();
                $submitted_doc = sanitize_key($_POST['dmx_doc_type'] ?? 'quote');
                $docs_to_save = in_array($submitted_doc, array('quote', 'invoice'), true) ? array($submitted_doc) : array('quote', 'invoice');
                foreach ($docs_to_save as $doc_type_to_save) {
                    foreach (array('show_title','show_description','show_job_description','show_headers','show_sku','show_qty','show_unit_cost','show_amount','show_subtotal','show_tax','show_total') as $field) {
                        $layout_settings[$doc_type_to_save][$field] = !empty($_POST['dmx_doc'][$doc_type_to_save][$field]) ? 'yes' : 'no';
                    }
                }
                update_option('dmx_document_layout_settings', $layout_settings);

                $company_current = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_document_accent_color'])) {
                    $company_current['document_accent_color'] = sanitize_hex_color(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_document_accent_color'])) ?: $company_current['document_accent_color'];
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_document_header_color'])) {
                    $company_current['document_header_color'] = sanitize_hex_color(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_document_header_color'])) ?: $company_current['document_header_color'];
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_document_body_bg'])) {
                    $company_current['document_body_bg'] = sanitize_hex_color(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_document_body_bg'])) ?: $company_current['document_body_bg'];
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_document_base_font_size'])) {
                    $company_current['document_base_font_size'] = max(12, min(18, (int) wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_document_base_font_size'])));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_document_heading_font_size'])) {
                    $company_current['document_heading_font_size'] = max(18, min(34, (int) wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_document_heading_font_size'])));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_document_logo_size'])) {
                    $company_current['document_logo_size'] = max(60, min(260, (int) wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_document_logo_size'])));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_quote_terms'])) {
                    $company_current['default_quote_terms'] = wp_kses_post(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_quote_terms']));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_invoice_terms'])) {
                    $company_current['default_invoice_terms'] = wp_kses_post(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_invoice_terms']));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_default_invoice_terms_document'])) {
                    $company_current['default_invoice_terms'] = wp_kses_post(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_default_invoice_terms_document']));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_company_document_preview_notes'])) {
                    $company_current['document_preview_notes'] = wp_kses_post(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_company_document_preview_notes']));
                }
                $this->update_company_profile_settings($company_current);
                break;

            case 'payroll_rules':
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_overtime_after_hours'])) {
                    $settings['overtime_after_hours'] = (string) max(0, min(24, (float) wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_overtime_after_hours'])));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_default_break_minutes'])) {
                    $settings['default_break_minutes'] = (string) max(0, min(240, (int) wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_default_break_minutes'])));
                }
                $settings['time_cards_manager_approval_required'] = !empty($_POST['dmx_startup_time_cards_manager_approval_required']) ? 'yes' : 'no';
                break;

            case 'sales_commissions':
                $settings['commission_tracking_enabled'] = !empty($_POST['dmx_startup_commission_tracking_enabled']) ? 'yes' : 'no';
                break;

            case 'numbering':
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_quote_prefix'])) {
                    $settings['quote_prefix'] = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_quote_prefix']));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_invoice_prefix'])) {
                    $settings['invoice_prefix'] = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_invoice_prefix']));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_work_order_prefix'])) {
                    $settings['work_order_prefix'] = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_work_order_prefix']));
                }
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_customer_prefix'])) {
                    $settings['customer_prefix'] = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_customer_prefix']));
                }
                break;

            case 'inventory_trucks':
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_main_warehouse_name'])) {
                    $settings['main_warehouse_name'] = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_main_warehouse_name']));
                }
                $settings['truck_inventory_required'] = !empty($_POST['dmx_startup_truck_inventory_required']) ? 'yes' : 'no';
                break;

            case 'equipment_scheduler':
                $settings['equipment_scheduler_required'] = !empty($_POST['dmx_startup_equipment_scheduler_required']) ? 'yes' : 'no';
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_equipment_notes'])) {
                    $settings['equipment_notes'] = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_equipment_notes']));
                }
                break;

            case 'suppliers':
                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_supplier_notes'])) {
                    $settings['supplier_notes'] = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_supplier_notes']));
                }

                $supplier_contacts = isset($settings['supplier_contacts']) && is_array($settings['supplier_contacts']) ? $settings['supplier_contacts'] : array();
                $normalized_supplier_contacts = array();
                foreach ($supplier_contacts as $existing_contact) {
                    if (!is_array($existing_contact)) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    $contact = array(
                        'name' => isset($existing_contact['name']) ? sanitize_text_field($existing_contact['name']) : '',
                        'contact' => isset($existing_contact['contact']) ? sanitize_text_field($existing_contact['contact']) : '',
                        'email' => isset($existing_contact['email']) ? sanitize_email($existing_contact['email']) : '',
                        'phone' => isset($existing_contact['phone']) ? sanitize_text_field($existing_contact['phone']) : '',
                        'category' => isset($existing_contact['category']) ? sanitize_text_field($existing_contact['category']) : '',
                        'notes' => isset($existing_contact['notes']) ? sanitize_textarea_field($existing_contact['notes']) : '',
                    );
                    if (implode('', array_map('trim', $contact)) !== '') {
                        $normalized_supplier_contacts[] = $contact;
                    }
                }

                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_remove_supplier_indexes']) && is_array($_POST['dmx_startup_remove_supplier_indexes'])) {
                    $remove_indexes = array_map('absint', wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_remove_supplier_indexes']));
                    if (!empty($remove_indexes)) {
                        $normalized_supplier_contacts = array_values(array_filter($normalized_supplier_contacts, function($contact, $index) use ($remove_indexes) {
                            return !in_array((int) $index, $remove_indexes, true);
                        }, ARRAY_FILTER_USE_BOTH));
                    }
                }

                if (isset($_POST['dmx_startup_supplier_new']) && is_array($_POST['dmx_startup_supplier_new'])) {
                    $raw_contact = wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_startup_supplier_new']);
                    $new_contact = array(
                        'name' => isset($raw_contact['name']) ? sanitize_text_field($raw_contact['name']) : '',
                        'contact' => isset($raw_contact['contact']) ? sanitize_text_field($raw_contact['contact']) : '',
                        'email' => isset($raw_contact['email']) ? sanitize_email($raw_contact['email']) : '',
                        'phone' => isset($raw_contact['phone']) ? sanitize_text_field($raw_contact['phone']) : '',
                        'category' => isset($raw_contact['category']) ? sanitize_text_field($raw_contact['category']) : '',
                        'notes' => isset($raw_contact['notes']) ? sanitize_textarea_field($raw_contact['notes']) : '',
                    );
                    if (implode('', array_map('trim', $new_contact)) !== '') {
                        $normalized_supplier_contacts[] = $new_contact;
                    }
                }

                $settings['supplier_contacts'] = array_values($normalized_supplier_contacts);
                break;

        }

        $settings['updated_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
        $this->update_startup_setup_settings($settings);
        $progress = $this->get_startup_setup_progress();

        $redirect_step = $step;
        $message = 'Start-up setup step saved.';

        if ($step === 'final_review' && !empty($_POST['dmx_startup_mark_complete'])) {
            if (!empty($progress['is_complete'])) {
                $settings['wizard_complete'] = 'yes';
                $settings['completed_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
                $settings['updated_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
                $this->update_startup_setup_settings($settings);
                $message = 'Start-up setup completed. DoorMatrix is ready for full company use.';
            } else {
                $settings['wizard_complete'] = 'no';
                $this->update_startup_setup_settings($settings);
                $message = 'Final review saved, but some required setup steps are still incomplete.';
            }
        } elseif ($nav === 'add_supplier' && $step === 'suppliers') {
            $redirect_step = 'suppliers';
            $message = 'Supplier step saved. Add another supplier when ready.';
        } elseif ($nav === 'next') {
            $next_step = $this->get_startup_setup_adjacent_step($step, 'next');
            if ($next_step !== '') {
                $redirect_step = $next_step;
            }
            $message = 'Step saved. Continue to the next setup step.';
        }

        $_REQUEST['dmx_setup_step'] = $redirect_step;
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', $message);
    }

    private function get_startup_setup_ack_map() {
        return array(
            'company_profile' => 'company_profile_ack',
            'geography_timezone' => 'geography_ack',
            'tax_accounting' => 'tax_accounting_ack',
            'team_roles' => 'team_roles_ack',
            'payroll_rules' => 'payroll_ack',
            'sales_commissions' => 'commissions_ack',
            'branding_documents' => 'documents_ack',
            'numbering' => 'numbering_ack',
            'inventory_trucks' => 'inventory_ack',
            'equipment_scheduler' => 'equipment_ack',
            'suppliers' => 'suppliers_ack',
        );
    }

    private function get_startup_setup_wizard_steps() {
        return array(
            'company_profile' => array('label' => 'Company Profile', 'intro' => 'Let’s confirm the company details that will appear across DoorMatrix and customer-facing documents.'),
            'geography_timezone' => array('label' => 'Geography & Time Zone', 'intro' => 'Set the company location and local display settings so schedules and time cards match the real local time.'),
            'tax_accounting' => array('label' => 'Tax & Invoice Terms', 'intro' => 'Set the tax rules and invoice terms used on customer-facing quotes and invoices.'),
            'team_roles' => array('label' => 'Users & Roles', 'intro' => 'Make sure the right people and roles are set up before the team starts using the portal.'),
            'payroll_rules' => array('label' => 'Time Card Rules', 'intro' => 'Set simple company-level time card rules. Individual employee wages are set later when team members are added or edited.'),
            'sales_commissions' => array('label' => 'Sales Commissions', 'intro' => 'Decide whether this company will track commissions. Percentages are set later on each sales team member, not during startup.'),
            'branding_documents' => array('label' => 'Branding & Documents', 'intro' => 'Review the quote and invoice appearance so customer-facing documents feel polished and on-brand.'),
            'numbering' => array('label' => 'Numbering', 'intro' => 'Set the prefixes that will be used for quotes, invoices, work orders, and customer records.'),
            'inventory_trucks' => array('label' => 'Inventory & Trucks', 'intro' => 'Confirm your warehouse and truck inventory workflow before staff begin using parts and costs.'),
            'equipment_scheduler' => array('label' => 'Equipment Scheduler', 'intro' => 'Decide whether equipment bookings should be managed in DoorMatrix and note any special rules.'),
            'suppliers' => array('label' => 'Suppliers', 'intro' => 'Add the main supplier and vendor contacts your sales team will use for quote requests and purchasing.'),
            'final_review' => array('label' => 'Final Review', 'intro' => 'Review the setup screens and launch DoorMatrix for full company use once the required information is complete.'),
        );
    }

    private function sanitize_startup_setup_step($step) {
        $step = sanitize_key($step);
        $steps = $this->get_startup_setup_wizard_steps();
        if (!isset($steps[$step])) {
            $keys = array_keys($steps);
            return (string) reset($keys);
        }
        return $step;
    }

    private function get_startup_setup_adjacent_step($current_step, $direction = 'next') {
        $order = array_keys($this->get_startup_setup_wizard_steps());
        $current_step = $this->sanitize_startup_setup_step($current_step);
        $index = array_search($current_step, $order, true);
        if ($index === false) {
            return '';
        }
        if ($direction === 'prev') {
            return isset($order[$index - 1]) ? $order[$index - 1] : '';
        }
        return isset($order[$index + 1]) ? $order[$index + 1] : '';
    }

    private function get_startup_setup_step_number($current_step) {
        $order = array_keys($this->get_startup_setup_wizard_steps());
        $current_step = $this->sanitize_startup_setup_step($current_step);
        $index = array_search($current_step, $order, true);
        return $index === false ? 1 : ((int) $index + 1);
    }

    private function render_startup_step_card($step, $checked_name) {
        $setup = $this->get_startup_setup_settings();
        $is_complete = !empty($step['complete']);
        $status = $is_complete ? 'Complete' : 'Required';
        $status_color = $is_complete ? '#1f7a42' : '#9b6415';
        $bg = $is_complete ? '#e8f7ef' : '#fff3df';
        $checked = checked($setup[$checked_name] ?? 'no', 'yes', false);
        $html = '<div class="dmx-startup-step-card ' . ($is_complete ? 'is-complete' : 'is-required') . '">';
        $html .= '<div class="dmx-startup-step-head"><strong>' . esc_html($step['label']) . '</strong><span style="background:' . esc_attr($bg) . ';color:' . esc_attr($status_color) . ';">' . esc_html($status) . '</span></div>';
        $html .= '<p>' . esc_html($step['desc']) . '</p>';
        $html .= '<label class="dmx-startup-check"><input type="checkbox" name="dmx_startup_' . esc_attr($checked_name) . '" value="yes" ' . $checked . '> Reviewed / complete</label>';
        $html .= '</div>';
        return $html;
    }

    private function render_settings_startup_page() {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            return '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">Only managers can update the DoorMatrix start-up setup wizard.</div>';
        }

        $setup = $this->get_startup_setup_settings();
        $progress = $this->get_startup_setup_progress();
        $steps = $progress['steps'];
        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $wizard_steps = $this->get_startup_setup_wizard_steps();
        $current_step = $this->sanitize_startup_setup_step($_GET['dmx_setup_step'] ?? 'company_profile');
        $current_meta = $wizard_steps[$current_step];
        $current_number = $this->get_startup_setup_step_number($current_step);
        $wizard_total = count($wizard_steps);
        $previous_step = $this->get_startup_setup_adjacent_step($current_step, 'prev');
        $next_step = $this->get_startup_setup_adjacent_step($current_step, 'next');
        $percent = max(0, min(100, (int) $progress['percent']));
        $base_url = $this->get_settings_base_url(is_admin());
        $portal_base_url = is_admin() ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG) : $this->get_portal_page_url();
        $wizard_base_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'settings', 'dmx_subtab' => 'settings_startup'), $base_url);
        $company_setup_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'settings', 'dmx_subtab' => 'settings_company'), $base_url);
        $document_settings_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'settings', 'dmx_subtab' => 'settings_documents'), $base_url);
        $team_url = is_admin() ? admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-door-companies') : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'staff'), $portal_base_url);
        $accounting_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting'), $portal_base_url);
        $inventory_url = is_admin() ? admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-inventory') : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'costs', 'dmx_subtab' => 'inventory'), $portal_base_url);
        $team_users = array();
        $team_count = 0;
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($company_key !== '') {
            $team_users = $this->get_company_users($company_key, array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE, self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE));
            $team_count = count($team_users);
        }
        $ack_map = $this->get_startup_setup_ack_map();
        $ack_field = $ack_map[$current_step] ?? '';
        $ack_checked = ($ack_field !== '' && (($setup[$ack_field] ?? 'no') === 'yes'));
        $effective_tax_country = $this->get_effective_startup_tax_country($company);
        $effective_tax_region = $this->get_smart_tax_region_from_company($company, $effective_tax_country);
        $contextual_tax_modes = $this->get_contextual_tax_mode_options($effective_tax_country);
        $display_tax_mode = $company['default_tax_mode'];
        if (!array_key_exists($display_tax_mode, $contextual_tax_modes)) {
            $display_tax_mode = ($effective_tax_country === 'USA') ? 'usa' : 'canada';
        }
        $startup_tax_preview = $this->get_tax_preset_for_mode($display_tax_mode, $effective_tax_country, $effective_tax_region, $company['default_us_sales_tax_rate']);
        $tax_country_label = ($effective_tax_country === 'USA') ? 'United States' : 'Canada';
        $tax_region_options = ($effective_tax_country === 'USA') ? $this->get_usa_region_options() : $this->get_canada_region_options();
        $tax_region_label = isset($tax_region_options[$effective_tax_region]) ? $tax_region_options[$effective_tax_region] : $effective_tax_region;

        ob_start(); ?>
        <style>
            .dmx-startup-shell{border:1px solid #dbe6f2;border-radius:24px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f9fbff 0%,#ffffff 100%);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 18px 36px rgba(15,39,74,.06);}

                        <h3>DoorMatrix Start-Up Setup</h3>
                        <p>A simple guided setup for managers. Each screen covers one topic so new users can move through DoorMatrix step by step without feeling overwhelmed.</p>

                    <span class="dmx-startup-hero-pill"><?php echo esc_html($progress['complete']); ?> / <?php echo esc_html($progress['total']); ?> complete</span>

                    <div class="dmx-startup-nav">
                        <?php foreach ($wizard_steps as $step_key => $meta) :
                            $step_status_complete = ($step_key === 'final_review') ? $this->is_startup_setup_complete() : !empty($steps[$step_key]['complete']);
                            $item_classes = 'dmx-startup-nav-item';
                            if ($step_key === $current_step) {
                                $item_classes .= ' is-active';
                            }
                            if ($step_status_complete) {
                                $item_classes .= ' is-complete';
                            }
                            $item_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'settings', 'dmx_subtab' => 'settings_startup', 'dmx_setup_step' => $step_key), $base_url);
                        ?>
                            <a class="<?php echo esc_attr($item_classes); ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url($item_url); ?>">
                                <span class="dmx-startup-nav-number"><?php echo esc_html($this->get_startup_setup_step_number($step_key)); ?></span>
                                <span class="dmx-startup-nav-copy">
                                    <strong><?php echo esc_html($meta['label']); ?></strong>
                                    <span><?php echo esc_html($step_status_complete ? 'Complete' : 'Open step'); ?></span>
                                </span>
                            </a>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </div>
                </aside>

                            <?php else : $is_step_complete = !empty($steps[$current_step]['complete']); ?>
                                <span class="dmx-startup-status-chip <?php echo $is_step_complete ? 'is-complete' : ''; ?>"><?php echo $is_step_complete ? 'Step complete' : 'Needs review'; ?></span>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </div>

                                    <div class="dmx-startup-info-card"><strong><?php echo $effective_tax_country === 'Canada' ? 'Canada preset' : 'USA setup'; ?></strong><p><?php echo $effective_tax_country === 'Canada' ? 'For Alberta, DoorMatrix uses GST 5%. USA sales tax fields are hidden because this company is set up in Canada.' : 'USA sales tax fields are shown because this company is set up in the United States.'; ?></p></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="dmx-startup-link-row"><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'settings', 'dmx_subtab' => 'settings_startup', 'dmx_setup_step' => 'geography_timezone'), $base_url)); ?>">Change Geography</a><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($company_setup_url); ?>">Open Full Company Settings</a></div>
                            <?php elseif ($current_step === 'team_roles') : ?>
