    private function get_company_timezone_options() {
        return array(
            'America/Vancouver' => 'Pacific Time - BC / Yukon / Pacific',
            'America/Edmonton' => 'Mountain Time - Alberta / NWT / Mountain',
            'America/Regina' => 'Saskatchewan Time - Saskatchewan',
            'America/Winnipeg' => 'Central Time - Manitoba / Central',
            'America/Toronto' => 'Eastern Time - Ontario / Eastern',
            'America/Montreal' => 'Eastern Time - Quebec / Eastern',
            'America/Halifax' => 'Atlantic Time - New Brunswick / Nova Scotia / PEI',
            'America/St_Johns' => 'Newfoundland Time - Newfoundland and Labrador',
            'America/Los_Angeles' => 'US Pacific Time',
            'America/Denver' => 'US Mountain Time',
            'America/Chicago' => 'US Central Time',
            'America/New_York' => 'US Eastern Time',
            'America/Anchorage' => 'Alaska Time',
            'Pacific/Honolulu' => 'Hawaii Time',
            'UTC' => 'UTC / GMT',
        );
    }

    private function sanitize_company_timezone($timezone) {
        $timezone = trim((string) $timezone);
        if ($timezone === '') {
            return 'America/Edmonton';
        }

        try {
            new DateTimeZone($timezone);
            return $timezone;
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            return 'America/Edmonton';
        }
    }

    private function get_company_timezone_string() {
        $settings = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        return $this->sanitize_company_timezone($settings['company_timezone'] ?? 'America/Edmonton');
    }

    private function get_company_timezone() {
        return new DateTimeZone($this->get_company_timezone_string());
    }

    private function get_company_timestamp() {
        return time();
    }

    private function format_company_timestamp($timestamp = null, $format = 'M j, Y g:i A', $timezone_string = '') {
        $timestamp = $timestamp === null || $timestamp === '' ? time() : (int) $timestamp;
        if ($timestamp <= 0) {
            $timestamp = time();
        }

        $timezone_string = $timezone_string !== '' ? $this->sanitize_company_timezone($timezone_string) : $this->get_company_timezone_string();
        try {
            $timezone = new DateTimeZone($timezone_string);
            $datetime = new DateTimeImmutable('@' . $timestamp);
            return $datetime->setTimezone($timezone)->format($format);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            return date_i18n($format, $timestamp);
        }
    }

    private function get_company_current_date($format = 'Y-m-d') {
        return $this->format_company_timestamp(time(), $format);
    }

    private function get_company_current_time($format = 'H:i') {
        return $this->format_company_timestamp(time(), $format);
    }

    private function get_company_current_mysql($timestamp = null) {
        return $this->format_company_timestamp($timestamp === null ? time() : (int) $timestamp, 'Y-m-d H:i:s');
    }

    private function format_company_date_string($date_string, $format = 'M j, Y') {
        $date_string = trim((string) $date_string);
        if ($date_string === '') {
            return $this->format_company_timestamp(time(), $format);
        }

        try {
            $datetime = new DateTimeImmutable($date_string, $this->get_company_timezone());
            return $datetime->format($format);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $timestamp = strtotime($date_string);
            return $timestamp ? $this->format_company_timestamp($timestamp, $format) : $date_string;
        }
    }

    private function get_current_team_member_name() {
        $user = wp_get_current_user();
        if ($user && !empty($user->ID)) {
            $name = trim((string) $user->display_name);
            if ($name === '') {
                $name = trim((string) $user->user_login);
            }
            return $name;
        }
        return '';
    }

    private function get_document_salesperson_name($post_id) {
        $name = trim((string) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', true));
        if ($name !== '') {
            return $name;
        }

        $post = get_post($post_id);
        if ($post && !empty($post->post_author)) {
            $author = get_userdata((int) $post->post_author);
            if ($author) {
                $author_name = trim((string) $author->display_name);
                if ($author_name === '') {
                    $author_name = trim((string) $author->user_login);
                }
                return $author_name;
            }
        }

        return '';
    }

    private function get_user_display_name_for_document($user_id) {
        $user_id = absint($user_id);
        if ($user_id <= 0) {
            return '';
        }

        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            return '';
        }

        $name = trim((string) $user->display_name);
        if ($name === '') {
            $name = trim((string) $user->user_login);
        }
        return $name;
    }

    private function get_work_order_original_salesperson_name($work_order_id) {
        $work_order_id = absint($work_order_id);
        if ($work_order_id <= 0 || get_post_type($work_order_id) !== 'dm_work_order') {
            return '';
        }

        $name = trim((string) get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_salesperson', true));
        if ($name !== '') {
            return $name;
        }

        $linked_quote_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_linked_quote_id', true));
        if ($linked_quote_id > 0 && get_post_type($linked_quote_id) === 'dm_quote') {
            $name = trim((string) get_post_meta($linked_quote_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', true));
            if ($name !== '') {
                return $name;
            }
        }

        $author_id = absint(get_post_field('post_author', $work_order_id));
        return $this->get_user_display_name_for_document($author_id);
    }

    private function get_document_technician_name($post_id) {
        $post_id = absint($post_id);
        if ($post_id <= 0) {
            return '';
        }

        $name = trim((string) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_invoice_technician_name', true));
        if ($name !== '') {
            return $name;
        }

        $source_work_order_id = absint(get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', true));
        if ($source_work_order_id > 0 && get_post_type($source_work_order_id) === 'dm_work_order') {
            $completed_by = absint(get_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completed_by', true));
            $name = $this->get_user_display_name_for_document($completed_by);
            if ($name !== '') {
                return $name;
            }

            $primary_technician = absint(get_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
            $name = $this->get_user_display_name_for_document($primary_technician);
            if ($name !== '') {
                return $name;
            }
        }

        $post = get_post($post_id);
        if ($post && !empty($post->post_author)) {
            $author = get_userdata((int) $post->post_author);
            if ($author && in_array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, (array) $author->roles, true)) {
                return $this->get_user_display_name_for_document((int) $post->post_author);
            }
        }

        return '';
    }

    private function sync_invoice_involvement_tracking($invoice_id, $source_work_order_id = 0, $posted_salesperson_name = '') {
        $invoice_id = absint($invoice_id);
        $source_work_order_id = absint($source_work_order_id);
        if ($invoice_id <= 0 || get_post_type($invoice_id) !== 'dm_invoice') {
            return;
        }

        if ($source_work_order_id > 0 && get_post_type($source_work_order_id) === 'dm_work_order') {
            $original_salesperson = $this->get_work_order_original_salesperson_name($source_work_order_id);
            if ($original_salesperson !== '') {
                update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', $original_salesperson);
                update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_original_salesperson_name', $original_salesperson);
            }

            $completed_by = absint(get_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completed_by', true));
            $technician_name = $this->get_user_display_name_for_document($completed_by);
            if ($technician_name === '') {
                $primary_technician = absint(get_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
                $technician_name = $this->get_user_display_name_for_document($primary_technician);
            }
            if ($technician_name === '') {
                $technician_name = $this->get_current_team_member_name();
            }
            if ($technician_name !== '') {
                update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_technician_name', $technician_name);
            }
            return;
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_technician()) {
            $technician_name = $this->get_current_team_member_name();
            if ($technician_name !== '') {
                update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_technician_name', $technician_name);
            }
        }

        $posted_salesperson_name = trim((string) $posted_salesperson_name);
        if ($posted_salesperson_name !== '') {
            update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_original_salesperson_name', $posted_salesperson_name);
        }
    }

    private function handle_company_logo_upload($current_logo_url = '') {
        $current_logo_url = esc_url_raw((string) $current_logo_url);

        if (empty($_FILES['dmx_company_logo_file']) || empty($_FILES['dmx_company_logo_file']['name'])) {
            return $current_logo_url;
        }

        if (!current_user_can('upload_files')) {
            return $current_logo_url;
        }

        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/media.php';
        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';

        $attachment_id = media_handle_upload('dmx_company_logo_file', 0);

        if (is_wp_error($attachment_id)) {
            return $current_logo_url;
        }

        $uploaded_url = wp_get_attachment_url($attachment_id);
        if (!$uploaded_url) {
            return $current_logo_url;
        }

        update_option('dmx_company_logo_attachment_id', (int) $attachment_id);
        return esc_url_raw($uploaded_url);
    }

    private function is_company_setup_complete() {
        $settings = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        return !empty($settings['setup_complete']) && $settings['setup_complete'] === 'yes' && $settings['company_name'] !== '' && $settings['email'] !== '';
    }

    private function save_company_profile_settings($tab = 'overview') {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'You do not have permission to save company settings.');
        }

        $current = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $mode = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_mode'] ?? $current['default_tax_mode']);
        $country = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_country'] ?? $current['default_tax_country']);
        $region = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_region'] ?? $current['default_tax_region']);
        $custom_primary_label = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_primary_label'] ?? '');
        $custom_primary_rate = $this->sanitize_percentage($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_primary_rate'] ?? '');
        $custom_secondary_label = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_secondary_label'] ?? '');
        $custom_secondary_rate = $this->sanitize_percentage($_POST['dmx_company_default_tax_secondary_rate'] ?? '');
        $us_rate = $this->sanitize_percentage($_POST['dmx_company_default_us_sales_tax_rate'] ?? '');

        $preset = $this->get_tax_preset_for_mode($mode, $country, $region, $us_rate);

        $posted_logo_url = esc_url_raw($_POST['dmx_company_logo_url'] ?? '');
        $logo_url = $posted_logo_url !== '' ? $posted_logo_url : $current['logo_url'];
        $logo_url = $this->handle_company_logo_upload($logo_url);

        $settings = array(
            'setup_complete' => 'yes',
            'company_name' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_name'] ?? ''),
            'legal_name' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_legal_name'] ?? ''),
            'logo_url' => $logo_url,
            'logo_attachment_id' => absint(get_option('dmx_company_logo_attachment_id', $current['logo_attachment_id'] ?? 0)),
            'email' => sanitize_email($_POST['dmx_company_email'] ?? ''),
            'phone' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_phone'] ?? ''),
            'website' => esc_url_raw($_POST['dmx_company_website'] ?? ''),
            'address_1' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_address_1'] ?? ''),
            'address_2' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_address_2'] ?? ''),
            'city' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_city'] ?? ''),
            'province_state' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_province_state'] ?? ''),
            'postal_zip' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_postal_zip'] ?? ''),
            'country' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_country'] ?? 'Canada'),
            'currency' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_currency'] ?? 'CAD'),
            'company_timezone' => $this->sanitize_company_timezone($_POST['dmx_company_timezone'] ?? ($current['company_timezone'] ?? 'America/Edmonton')),
            'tax_registration_number' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_company_tax_registration_number'] ?? ''),
            'default_quote_terms' => wp_kses_post($_POST['dmx_company_default_quote_terms'] ?? ''),
            'default_invoice_terms' => wp_kses_post($_POST['dmx_company_default_invoice_terms'] ?? ''),
            'document_accent_color' => sanitize_hex_color($_POST['dmx_company_document_accent_color'] ?? '') ?: $current['document_accent_color'],
            'document_header_color' => sanitize_hex_color($_POST['dmx_company_document_header_color'] ?? '') ?: $current['document_header_color'],
            'document_body_bg' => sanitize_hex_color($_POST['dmx_company_document_body_bg'] ?? '') ?: $current['document_body_bg'],
            'document_base_font_size' => max(12, min(18, (int) ($_POST['dmx_company_document_base_font_size'] ?? $current['document_base_font_size']))),
            'document_heading_font_size' => max(18, min(32, (int) ($_POST['dmx_company_document_heading_font_size'] ?? $current['document_heading_font_size']))),
            'document_logo_size' => max(60, min(260, (int) ($_POST['dmx_company_document_logo_size'] ?? $current['document_logo_size']))),
            'default_tax_mode' => $mode,
            'default_tax_country' => $country,
            'default_tax_region' => $region,
            'default_tax_primary_label' => ($mode === 'custom') ? $custom_primary_label : $preset['primary_label'],
            'default_tax_primary_rate' => ($mode === 'custom') ? $custom_primary_rate : $preset['primary_rate'],
            'default_tax_secondary_label' => ($mode === 'custom') ? $custom_secondary_label : $preset['secondary_label'],
            'default_tax_secondary_rate' => ($mode === 'custom') ? $custom_secondary_rate : $preset['secondary_rate'],
            'default_us_sales_tax_rate' => $us_rate,
        );

        if ($settings['company_name'] === '' || $settings['email'] === '') {
            $settings['setup_complete'] = 'no';
            $this->update_company_profile_settings($settings);
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Company name and company email are required for setup.');
        }

        $this->update_company_profile_settings($settings);
        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            update_user_meta(get_current_user_id(), '_dmx_needs_company_setup', 'no');
        }
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Company setup saved successfully.');
    }

    private function get_effective_startup_tax_country($company) {
        $country = isset($company['country']) ? trim((string) $company['country']) : '';
        if ($country === '') {
            $country = isset($company['default_tax_country']) ? trim((string) $company['default_tax_country']) : 'Canada';
        }
        $country_lower = strtolower($country);
        if (in_array($country_lower, array('usa', 'us', 'u.s.', 'u.s.a.', 'united states', 'united states of america'), true)) {
            return 'USA';
        }
        return 'Canada';
    }

    private function normalize_canada_tax_region($value) {
        $value = strtoupper(trim((string) $value));
        $map = array(
            'ALBERTA' => 'AB', 'AB' => 'AB',
            'BRITISH COLUMBIA' => 'BC', 'BC' => 'BC',
            'MANITOBA' => 'MB', 'MB' => 'MB',
            'NEW BRUNSWICK' => 'NB', 'NB' => 'NB',
            'NEWFOUNDLAND AND LABRADOR' => 'NL', 'NEWFOUNDLAND' => 'NL', 'NL' => 'NL',
            'NOVA SCOTIA' => 'NS', 'NS' => 'NS',
            'NORTHWEST TERRITORIES' => 'NT', 'NWT' => 'NT', 'NT' => 'NT',
            'NUNAVUT' => 'NU', 'NU' => 'NU',
            'ONTARIO' => 'ON', 'ON' => 'ON',
            'PRINCE EDWARD ISLAND' => 'PE', 'PEI' => 'PE', 'PE' => 'PE',
            'QUEBEC' => 'QC', 'QUÉBEC' => 'QC', 'QC' => 'QC',
            'SASKATCHEWAN' => 'SK', 'SK' => 'SK',
            'YUKON' => 'YT', 'YT' => 'YT',
        );
        return isset($map[$value]) ? $map[$value] : '';
    }

    private function normalize_usa_tax_region($value) {
        $value = strtoupper(trim((string) $value));
        $states = $this->get_usa_region_options();
        if (isset($states[$value])) {
            return $value;
        }
        foreach ($states as $code => $label) {
            if (strtoupper($label) === $value) {
                return $code;
            }
        }
        return '';
    }

    private function get_smart_tax_region_from_company($company, $tax_country = '') {
        $tax_country = $tax_country !== '' ? $tax_country : $this->get_effective_startup_tax_country($company);
        $region = isset($company['default_tax_region']) ? trim((string) $company['default_tax_region']) : '';
        $province_state = isset($company['province_state']) ? trim((string) $company['province_state']) : '';

        if ($tax_country === 'USA') {
            $normalized = $this->normalize_usa_tax_region($province_state);
            if ($normalized !== '') {
                return $normalized;
            }
            $normalized = $this->normalize_usa_tax_region($region);
            return $normalized !== '' ? $normalized : 'CA';
        }

        $normalized = $this->normalize_canada_tax_region($province_state);
        if ($normalized !== '') {
            return $normalized;
        }
        $normalized = $this->normalize_canada_tax_region($region);
        return $normalized !== '' ? $normalized : 'AB';
    }

    private function get_contextual_tax_mode_options($tax_country) {
        if ($tax_country === 'USA') {
            return array(
                'usa' => 'USA Sales Tax',
                'none' => 'No Tax',
                'custom' => 'Custom Tax',
            );
        }

        return array(
            'canada' => 'Canada Preset Taxes',
            'none' => 'No Tax',
            'custom' => 'Custom Tax',
        );
    }

    private function get_tax_mode_options() {
        return array(
            'none' => 'No Tax',
            'canada' => 'Canada Preset Taxes',
            'usa' => 'USA Sales Tax',
            'custom' => 'Custom Tax',
        );
    }

    private function get_tax_country_options() {
        return array(
            'Canada' => 'Canada',
            'USA' => 'USA',
        );
    }

    private function get_canada_region_options() {
        return array(
            'AB' => 'Alberta',
            'BC' => 'British Columbia',
            'MB' => 'Manitoba',
            'NB' => 'New Brunswick',
            'NL' => 'Newfoundland and Labrador',
            'NS' => 'Nova Scotia',
            'NT' => 'Northwest Territories',
            'NU' => 'Nunavut',
            'ON' => 'Ontario',
            'PE' => 'Prince Edward Island',
            'QC' => 'Quebec',
            'SK' => 'Saskatchewan',
            'YT' => 'Yukon',
        );
    }

    private function get_usa_region_options() {
        return array(
            'AL' => 'Alabama','AK' => 'Alaska','AZ' => 'Arizona','AR' => 'Arkansas','CA' => 'California','CO' => 'Colorado','CT' => 'Connecticut','DE' => 'Delaware','FL' => 'Florida','GA' => 'Georgia',
            'HI' => 'Hawaii','ID' => 'Idaho','IL' => 'Illinois','IN' => 'Indiana','IA' => 'Iowa','KS' => 'Kansas','KY' => 'Kentucky','LA' => 'Louisiana','ME' => 'Maine','MD' => 'Maryland',
            'MA' => 'Massachusetts','MI' => 'Michigan','MN' => 'Minnesota','MS' => 'Mississippi','MO' => 'Missouri','MT' => 'Montana','NE' => 'Nebraska','NV' => 'Nevada','NH' => 'New Hampshire','NJ' => 'New Jersey',
            'NM' => 'New Mexico','NY' => 'New York','NC' => 'North Carolina','ND' => 'North Dakota','OH' => 'Ohio','OK' => 'Oklahoma','OR' => 'Oregon','PA' => 'Pennsylvania','RI' => 'Rhode Island','SC' => 'South Carolina',
            'SD' => 'South Dakota','TN' => 'Tennessee','TX' => 'Texas','UT' => 'Utah','VT' => 'Vermont','VA' => 'Virginia','WA' => 'Washington','WV' => 'West Virginia','WI' => 'Wisconsin','WY' => 'Wyoming','DC' => 'District of Columbia',
        );
    }

    private function get_tax_preset_for_mode($mode, $country, $region, $us_rate = '') {
        $canada = array(
            'AB' => array('primary_label' => 'GST', 'primary_rate' => '5', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => ''),
            'BC' => array('primary_label' => 'GST', 'primary_rate' => '5', 'secondary_label' => 'PST', 'secondary_rate' => '7'),
            'MB' => array('primary_label' => 'GST', 'primary_rate' => '5', 'secondary_label' => 'PST', 'secondary_rate' => '7'),
            'NB' => array('primary_label' => 'HST', 'primary_rate' => '15', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => ''),
            'NL' => array('primary_label' => 'HST', 'primary_rate' => '15', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => ''),
            'NS' => array('primary_label' => 'HST', 'primary_rate' => '15', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => ''),
            'NT' => array('primary_label' => 'GST', 'primary_rate' => '5', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => ''),
            'NU' => array('primary_label' => 'GST', 'primary_rate' => '5', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => ''),
            'ON' => array('primary_label' => 'HST', 'primary_rate' => '13', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => ''),
            'PE' => array('primary_label' => 'HST', 'primary_rate' => '15', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => ''),
            'QC' => array('primary_label' => 'GST', 'primary_rate' => '5', 'secondary_label' => 'QST', 'secondary_rate' => '9.975'),
            'SK' => array('primary_label' => 'GST', 'primary_rate' => '5', 'secondary_label' => 'PST', 'secondary_rate' => '6'),
            'YT' => array('primary_label' => 'GST', 'primary_rate' => '5', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => ''),
        );

        if ($mode === 'none') {
            return array('country' => $country, 'region' => $region, 'primary_label' => '', 'primary_rate' => '', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => '');
        }

        if ($mode === 'canada') {
            $preset = isset($canada[$region]) ? $canada[$region] : $canada['AB'];
            return array_merge(array('country' => 'Canada', 'region' => $region), $preset);
        }

        if ($mode === 'usa') {
            return array(
                'country' => 'USA',
                'region' => $region,
                'primary_label' => 'Sales Tax',
                'primary_rate' => ($us_rate !== '' ? $us_rate : '0'),
                'secondary_label' => '',
                'secondary_rate' => '',
            );
        }

        return array('country' => $country, 'region' => $region, 'primary_label' => '', 'primary_rate' => '', 'secondary_label' => '', 'secondary_rate' => '');
    }

    private function sanitize_percentage($value) {
        $value = is_string($value) ? str_replace(array('%', ','), '', wp_unslash($value)) : $value;
        if ($value === '' || $value === null) {
            return '';
        }
        if (!is_numeric($value)) {
            return '';
        }
        return rtrim(rtrim(number_format((float) $value, 3, '.', ''), '0'), '.');
    }

    private function get_document_tax_profile_from_request($prefix) {
        $mode = sanitize_text_field($_POST[$prefix . '_tax_mode'] ?? 'company_default');

        if ($mode === 'company_default') {
            $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
            return array(
                'mode' => 'company_default',
                'country' => $company['default_tax_country'],
                'region' => $company['default_tax_region'],
                'primary_label' => $company['default_tax_primary_label'],
                'primary_rate' => $company['default_tax_primary_rate'],
                'secondary_label' => $company['default_tax_secondary_label'],
                'secondary_rate' => $company['default_tax_secondary_rate'],
            );
        }

        if ($mode === 'tax_exempt') {
            return array(
                'mode' => 'tax_exempt',
                'country' => '',
                'region' => '',
                'primary_label' => '',
                'primary_rate' => '',
                'secondary_label' => '',
                'secondary_rate' => '',
            );
        }

        $custom_mode = sanitize_text_field($_POST[$prefix . '_tax_custom_mode'] ?? 'custom');
        $country = sanitize_text_field($_POST[$prefix . '_tax_country'] ?? 'Canada');
        $region = sanitize_text_field($_POST[$prefix . '_tax_region'] ?? '');
        $primary_label = sanitize_text_field($_POST[$prefix . '_tax_primary_label'] ?? '');
        $primary_rate = $this->sanitize_percentage($_POST[$prefix . '_tax_primary_rate'] ?? '');
        $secondary_label = sanitize_text_field($_POST[$prefix . '_tax_secondary_label'] ?? '');
        $secondary_rate = $this->sanitize_percentage($_POST[$prefix . '_tax_secondary_rate'] ?? '');
        $us_rate = $this->sanitize_percentage($_POST[$prefix . '_tax_us_rate'] ?? '');

        if (in_array($custom_mode, array('canada', 'usa'), true)) {
            $preset = $this->get_tax_preset_for_mode($custom_mode, $country, $region, $us_rate);
            return array_merge(array('mode' => 'custom'), $preset);
        }

        return array(
            'mode' => 'custom',
            'country' => $country,
            'region' => $region,
            'primary_label' => $primary_label,
            'primary_rate' => $primary_rate,
            'secondary_label' => $secondary_label,
            'secondary_rate' => $secondary_rate,
        );
    }

    private function calculate_document_totals($items, $tax_profile = array()) {
        $subtotal = 0;
        $taxable_subtotal = 0;

        if (is_array($items)) {
            foreach ($items as $item) {
                $qty = isset($item['qty']) ? (float) $item['qty'] : 0;
                $unit_price = isset($item['unit_price']) ? (float) $item['unit_price'] : 0;
                $line_total = $qty * $unit_price;
                $subtotal += $line_total;
                $is_taxable = !isset($item['taxable']) || $item['taxable'] !== 'no';
                if ($is_taxable) {
                    $taxable_subtotal += $line_total;
                }
            }
        }

        $primary_rate = isset($tax_profile['primary_rate']) && $tax_profile['primary_rate'] !== '' ? (float) $tax_profile['primary_rate'] : 0;
        $secondary_rate = isset($tax_profile['secondary_rate']) && $tax_profile['secondary_rate'] !== '' ? (float) $tax_profile['secondary_rate'] : 0;
        $primary_tax = $taxable_subtotal * ($primary_rate / 100);
        $secondary_tax = $taxable_subtotal * ($secondary_rate / 100);
        $tax_total = $primary_tax + $secondary_tax;
        $grand_total = $subtotal + $tax_total;

        return array(
            'subtotal' => $subtotal,
            'taxable_subtotal' => $taxable_subtotal,
            'primary_tax' => $primary_tax,
            'secondary_tax' => $secondary_tax,
            'tax_total' => $tax_total,
            'grand_total' => $grand_total,
        );
    }

    private function get_saved_document_tax_profile($post_id, $document_type = 'quote') {
        $profile = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_tax_profile', true);
        if (is_array($profile) && (!empty($profile['primary_label']) || !empty($profile['secondary_label']) || !empty($profile['mode']))) {
            return $profile;
        }

        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        return array(
            'mode' => 'company_default',
            'country' => $company['default_tax_country'],
            'region' => $company['default_tax_region'],
            'primary_label' => $company['default_tax_primary_label'],
            'primary_rate' => $company['default_tax_primary_rate'],
            'secondary_label' => $company['default_tax_secondary_label'],
            'secondary_rate' => $company['default_tax_secondary_rate'],
        );
    }

    private function render_tax_setup_fields($prefix, $label = 'Tax Setup', $current_profile = array()) {
        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $profile = array_merge(array(
            'mode' => 'company_default',
            'custom_mode' => $company['default_tax_mode'],
            'country' => $company['default_tax_country'],
            'region' => $company['default_tax_region'],
            'primary_label' => $company['default_tax_primary_label'],
            'primary_rate' => $company['default_tax_primary_rate'],
            'secondary_label' => $company['default_tax_secondary_label'],
            'secondary_rate' => $company['default_tax_secondary_rate'],
            'us_rate' => $company['default_us_sales_tax_rate'],
        ), is_array($current_profile) ? $current_profile : array());

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:0;">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></h4>
            <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Tax Mode</label>
                    <select name="<?php echo esc_attr($prefix); ?>_tax_mode">
                        <option value="company_default" <?php selected($profile['mode'], 'company_default'); ?>>Use Company Default</option>
                        <option value="tax_exempt" <?php selected($profile['mode'], 'tax_exempt'); ?>>Tax Exempt / No Tax</option>
                        <option value="custom" <?php selected($profile['mode'], 'custom'); ?>>Custom for this document</option>
                    </select>
                    </div>
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Custom Preset Type</label>
                    <select name="<?php echo esc_attr($prefix); ?>_tax_custom_mode">
                        <?php foreach ($this->get_tax_mode_options() as $mode_value => $mode_label) : ?>
                            <?php if ($mode_value === 'none') { continue; } ?>
                            <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($mode_value); ?>" <?php selected($mode_value, $profile['custom_mode']); ?>><?php echo esc_html($mode_label); ?></option>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </select>
                    </div>
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Tax Country</label>
                    <select name="<?php echo esc_attr($prefix); ?>_tax_country">
                        <?php foreach ($this->get_tax_country_options() as $value => $text) : ?>
                            <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>" <?php selected($value, $profile['country']); ?>><?php echo esc_html($text); ?></option>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </select>
                    </div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Province / State Code</label>
                    <input type="text" name="<?php echo esc_attr($prefix); ?>_tax_region" value="<?php echo esc_attr($profile['region']); ?>" placeholder="AB, BC, TX, CA">
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Primary Tax Label</label>
                    <input type="text" name="<?php echo esc_attr($prefix); ?>_tax_primary_label" value="<?php echo esc_attr($profile['primary_label']); ?>" placeholder="GST, HST, Sales Tax">
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Primary Tax Rate %</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.001" min="0" name="<?php echo esc_attr($prefix); ?>_tax_primary_rate" value="<?php echo esc_attr($profile['primary_rate']); ?>" placeholder="5">
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Secondary Tax Label</label>
                    <input type="text" name="<?php echo esc_attr($prefix); ?>_tax_secondary_label" value="<?php echo esc_attr($profile['secondary_label']); ?>" placeholder="PST / QST">
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Secondary Tax Rate %</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.001" min="0" name="<?php echo esc_attr($prefix); ?>_tax_secondary_rate" value="<?php echo esc_attr($profile['secondary_rate']); ?>" placeholder="7">
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>U.S. Combined Sales Tax %</label>
                    <input type="number" step="0.001" min="0" name="<?php echo esc_attr($prefix); ?>_tax_us_rate" value="<?php echo esc_attr($profile['us_rate']); ?>" placeholder="8.25">
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-inline-note">Canada preset taxes support GST, HST, PST, and QST. U.S. mode lets the company set its combined state/local sales tax rate. Use Company Default for normal jobs and Custom only for one-off exceptions.</div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_company_address_summary() {
        $settings = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $parts = array_filter(array(
            $settings['address_1'],
            $settings['address_2'],
            $settings['city'],
            $settings['province_state'],
            $settings['postal_zip'],
            $settings['country'],
        ));
        return implode(', ', $parts);
    }


    public function render_admin_settings_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(esc_html__('You do not have permission to view DoorMatrix portal settings.', 'doormatrix'));
        }

        $old_preview = $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode;
        $old_get = $_GET;

        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode = true;
        $_GET['dmx_tab'] = 'settings';
        $_GET['dmx_subtab'] = sanitize_key((string) ($_GET['dmx_subtab'] ?? 'settings_home'));

        echo '<div class="wrap doormatrix-admin-wrap dmx-admin-settings-neutral-preview">'; // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo '<style>
            /* v5.4.53: WordPress admin already has the DoorMatrix WP menu.
               Hide the customer-facing in-app portal navigation here so Portal Settings
               is not shown with two side menus. */
            .dmx-admin-settings-neutral-preview .dmx-app-sidebar,
            .dmx-admin-settings-neutral-preview .dmx-mobile-app-nav {
                display: none !important;
            }
            .dmx-admin-settings-neutral-preview .dmx-app-shell {
                display: block !important;
                grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
                min-height: auto !important;
            }
            .dmx-admin-settings-neutral-preview .dmx-app-main {
                width: 100% !important;
                margin: 0 !important;
            }
            .dmx-admin-settings-neutral-preview .dmx-app-content > .dmx-message-info:first-child {
                display: none !important;
            }
        </style>';
        echo $this->render_portal_screen(true, 'settings'); // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
        echo '</div>'; // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped

        $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode = $old_preview;
        $_GET = $old_get;
    }

    public function render_portal_shortcode() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) { return $this->render_login_required(); }
        if (!$this->user_can_access_portal()) { return '<div class="dmx-portal-wrap"><div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">You do not have permission to access this portal.</div></div>'; }
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && $this->current_company_trial_is_expired()) { return $this->render_trial_expired_screen(); }
        return $this->render_portal_screen(false);
    }

    private function render_portal_screen($is_admin = false, $forced_tab = '') {
        $tab = $forced_tab ? $forced_tab : sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_tab'] ?? 'overview');
        $allowed_tabs = array('overview', 'calculators', 'inspections', 'help');

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_workflow() || $this->current_user_is_accounting()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'sales';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_scheduler()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'sales_scheduler';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_scheduler()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'scheduler';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_inventory_and_costs()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'costs';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_messages()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'messages';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_subcontractors()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'subcontractors';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_accounting()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'accounting';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_reports()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'reports';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_customers_tab()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'customers';
        }
        if ($this->can_view_team_tab()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'staff';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $allowed_tabs[] = 'settings';
        }
        if (!in_array($tab, $allowed_tabs, true)) {
            $tab = 'overview';
        }

        $user = wp_get_current_user();
        $company_settings = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $portal_logo_url = !empty($company_settings['logo_url']) ? $company_settings['logo_url'] : 'http://doormatrix.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ChatGPT-Image-Apr-1-2026-07_43_49-PM-e1775148933417.png';
        $portal_company_name = trim((string) ($company_settings['company_name'] ?? ''));
        if ($portal_company_name === '') {
            $portal_company_name = trim((string) ($company_settings['legal_name'] ?? ''));
        }
        if ($portal_company_name === '') {
            $portal_company_name = 'Company Portal';
        }
        $message = '';
        $messages_label = 'Messages';
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_messages()) {
            $unread_message_count = $this->get_unread_message_count();
            if ($unread_message_count > 0) {
                $messages_label .= ' (' . $unread_message_count . ')';
            }
        }
        $message_type = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_msg_type'] ?? '');
        $message_text = isset($_GET['dmx_msg']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_msg'])) : '';
        if ($message_text && in_array($message_type, array('success', 'error'), true)) {
            $message = '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-' . esc_attr($message_type) . '">' . esc_html($message_text) . '</div>';
        }
        $has_scheduler_access = $this->company_has_feature('scheduler');
        $current_user_role_label = $this->get_portal_role_label($user);
        $dmx_preview_user_name = $user->display_name;
        if ($this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode) {
            $portal_company_name = $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_name;
            $portal_logo_url = 'http://doormatrix.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ChatGPT-Image-Apr-1-2026-07_43_49-PM-e1775148933417.png';
            $current_user_role_label = 'Admin Preview Mode';
            $dmx_preview_user_name = 'DoorMatrix Preview';
        }

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-portal-wrap dmx-app-wrap">
            <style><?php echo $this->get_app_shell_css(); ?></style>
            <div class="dmx-app-shell">
                <aside class="dmx-app-sidebar">
                    <div class="dmx-app-logo">
                        <img class="dmx-app-logo-image" src="<?php echo esc_url($portal_logo_url); ?>" alt="<?php echo esc_attr($portal_company_name); ?> logo">
                        <div class="dmx-app-logo-text dmx-app-logo-text-powered-only">
                            <span class="dmx-powered-by">Powered by DoorMatrix</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <nav class="dmx-app-nav">
                        <?php echo $this->nav_link('overview', 'Dashboard', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?>
                        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_messages()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('messages', $messages_label, $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_workflow()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('sales', 'Sales Workflow', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_scheduler()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('sales_scheduler', 'Sales Schedule', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_scheduler()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('scheduler', 'Technician Schedule', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php echo $this->nav_link('calculators', 'Tools', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?>
                        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_inventory_and_costs()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('costs', 'Inventory', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_accounting()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('accounting', 'Accounting', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_reports()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('reports', 'Reports', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php if ($this->can_view_team_tab()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('staff', 'Team', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_subcontractors()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('subcontractors', 'Subcontractors', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_settings()) : ?><?php echo $this->nav_link('settings', 'Settings', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?><?php endif; ?>
                        <?php echo $this->nav_link('help', 'Help', $tab, $is_admin, 'app'); ?>
                    </nav>
                    <?php if ($is_admin) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-app-sidebar-footer">
                        <a class="dmx-app-mini-link" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-parts-library')); ?>">Parts Library</a>
                    </div>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </aside>

                <div class="dmx-app-main">
                    <?php echo $this->render_mobile_app_nav($tab, $is_admin, $has_scheduler_access); ?>
                    <div class="dmx-app-topbar">
                        <div>
                            <h2><?php echo esc_html($this->get_app_section_title($tab)); ?></h2>
                            <p><?php echo esc_html($this->get_app_section_subtitle($tab)); ?></p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-userbar">
                            <div class="dmx-badge dmx-user-identity">
                                <span class="dmx-user-name"><?php echo esc_html($dmx_preview_user_name); ?></span>
                                <small class="dmx-user-role"><?php echo esc_html($current_user_role_label); ?></small>
                            </div>
                            <?php if (!$is_admin): ?><a class="dmx-logout" href="<?php echo esc_url(wp_logout_url(home_url('/'))); ?>">Log Out</a><?php endif; ?>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-app-content">
                        <?php if ($this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode) : ?>
                            <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-info"><strong>Admin Preview Mode:</strong> This is a live visual preview of the DoorMatrix customer portal screen using demo context. No door company records are loaded by default.</div>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                        <?php echo $message; ?>
                        <?php echo $this->render_current_company_trial_banner(); ?>
                        <?php
                        switch ($tab) {
                            case 'sales':
                                echo $this->render_sales_section($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'sales_scheduler':
                                echo $this->render_sales_scheduler_tab($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'scheduler':
                                echo $this->render_scheduler_tab($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'costs':
                                echo $this->render_costs_section($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'accounting':
                                echo $this->render_accounting_section($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'reports':
                                echo $this->render_reports_section($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'messages':
                                echo $this->render_messages_section($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'subcontractors':
                                echo $this->render_subcontractors_section($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'calculators':
                                echo $this->render_calculators_tab($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'settings':
                                echo $this->render_settings_section($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'inspections':
                                echo $this->render_inspections_tab($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'customers':
                                echo $this->render_customers_tab($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'help':
                                echo $this->render_help_tab($is_admin);
                                break;
                            case 'staff':
                                echo $this->render_staff_tab($is_admin);
                                break;
                            default:
                                echo $this->render_overview_tab($is_admin);
                                break;
                        }
                        ?>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_login_required() {
        $message = '';
        $message_type = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_msg_type'] ?? '');
        $message_text = isset($_GET['dmx_msg']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_msg'])) : '';
        if ($message_text && in_array($message_type, array('success', 'error'), true)) {
            $message = '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-' . esc_attr($message_type) . '">' . esc_html($message_text) . '</div>';
        }

        $auth_view = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_auth'] ?? 'login');
        if ($auth_view === 'signup') {
            $auth_view = 'company';
        }
        if ($auth_view === 'join') {
            $auth_view = 'login';
        }
        if (!in_array($auth_view, array('login', 'company'), true)) {
            $auth_view = 'login';
        }

        $portal_url = $this->get_portal_page_url();

        ob_start(); ?>
        <?php echo $this->render_public_site_header(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-portal-wrap dmx-auth-wrap">
            <div class="dmx-auth-shell">
                <div class="dmx-auth-stage">
                    <div class="dmx-auth-grid">
                        <section class="dmx-auth-intro">
                            <span class="dmx-auth-kicker">Secure company access</span>
                            <h1>Access your DoorMatrix company portal.</h1>
                            <p>
                                Sign in or request the first company manager account from one clean portal entry point. Additional team users are created by your company manager.
                            </p>

                            <div class="dmx-auth-feature-list">
                                <div class="dmx-auth-feature-item">
                                    <strong>Branded company portal</strong>
                                    <span>Access your company's quotes, invoices, inspections, and customer records in one place.</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="dmx-auth-feature-item">
                                    <strong>Connected business workflow</strong>
                                    <span>Move from quote to invoice with a cleaner, more organized process.</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="dmx-auth-feature-item">
                                    <strong>Built for garage door companies</strong>
                                    <span>Designed for real garage door sales, service, inspections, and customer management.</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <?php echo $this->render_public_plan_cards(); ?>
                        </section>

                        <section class="dmx-auth-panel">
                            <?php echo $message; ?>

                            <div class="dmx-auth-toggle">
                                <a class="dmx-auth-toggle-btn <?php echo $auth_view === 'login' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(remove_query_arg(array('dmx_msg_type', 'dmx_msg'), add_query_arg('dmx_auth', 'login', $portal_url))); ?>">Company Login</a>
                                <a class="dmx-auth-toggle-btn <?php echo $auth_view === 'company' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(remove_query_arg(array('dmx_msg_type', 'dmx_msg'), add_query_arg('dmx_auth', 'company', $portal_url))); ?>">Create Company Account</a>
                            </div>

                            <?php if ($auth_view === 'company') : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-auth-panel-head">
                                    <h3>Request your company account</h3>
                                    <p>Use this once to request the first manager login for a new DoorMatrix company. After approval, that manager can create the rest of the team accounts.</p>
                                </div>
                                <form method="post" class="dmx-auth-form">
                                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_public_signup', 'dmx_public_nonce'); ?>
                                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_public_action" value="register_company_account">

                                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                                        <div class="dmx-field">
                                            <label>Company Name</label>
                                            <input type="text" name="dmx_signup_company_name" required>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="dmx-field">
                                            <label>Your Full Name</label>
                                            <input type="text" name="dmx_signup_full_name" required>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>

                                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                                        <div class="dmx-field">
                                            <label>Email Address</label>
                                            <input type="email" name="dmx_signup_email" required>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="dmx-field">
                                            <label>Phone Number</label>
                                            <input type="text" name="dmx_signup_phone">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>

                                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                                        <div class="dmx-field">
                                            <label>Password</label>
                                            <input type="password" name="dmx_signup_password" required>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="dmx-field">
                                            <label>Confirm Password</label>
                                            <input type="password" name="dmx_signup_password_confirm" required>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>

                                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-auth-submit">Request Company Account</button>
                                    <p class="dmx-auth-footnote">DoorMatrix admin must approve this account first. Your 14-day free trial with full DoorMatrix access starts after approval. Approval emails come from admin@doormatrix.ca.</p>
                                </form>

                            <?php else : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-auth-panel-head">
                                    <h3>Sign in to your company portal</h3>
                                    <p>Access your quotes, invoices, inspections, customers, and settings.</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="dmx-auth-form dmx-auth-login-form">
                                    <?php wp_login_form(array(
                                        'echo' => true,
                                        'redirect' => $portal_url,
                                        'label_username' => 'Email or Username',
                                        'label_password' => 'Password',
                                        'label_remember' => 'Keep me signed in',
                                        'label_log_in' => 'Company Login',
                                        'remember' => true,
                                    )); ?>
                                    <p class="dmx-auth-footnote">Need access? New companies can use <strong>Create Company Account</strong>. Team members must be added by their company manager.</p>
                                </div>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </section>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }


    private function render_public_site_header() {
        $portal_url = $this->get_portal_page_url();
        $logo_url = 'https://doormatrix.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ChatGPT-Image-Apr-1-2026-07_43_49-PM-e1775148933417.png';

        ob_start(); ?>
        <style>
            #masthead,
            .site-header,
            .entry-header,
            .ast-page-title-wrap,
            .ast-page-title-bar,
            .page-header,
            .wp-block-post-title,
            .entry-title {
                display: none !important;
            }
            .site-content,
            .ast-container,
            .entry-content,
            .site-main {
                max-width: 100% !important;
                width: 100% !important;
            }
            .entry-content > .wp-block-group,
            .entry-content > .wp-block-cover,
            .entry-content > .wp-block-columns,
            .entry-content > .wp-block-html,
            .entry-content > div {
                margin-top: 0;
            }
            .dm-header {
                position: sticky;
                top: 0;
                z-index: 999;
                background: rgba(12, 35, 64, 0.94);
                backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
                border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
            }
            .dm-container {
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 1240px;
                margin: 0 auto;
                padding: 0 24px;
                box-sizing: border-box;
            }
            .dm-header-inner {
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: space-between;
                min-height: 92px;
                gap: 24px;
            }
            .dm-logo {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 16px;
                min-width: 0;
                text-decoration: none;
            }
            .dm-logo-image-wrap {
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
            }
            .dm-logo-image {
                display: block;
                max-height: 62px;
                width: auto;
                object-fit: contain;
            }
            .dm-logo-text {
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                line-height: 1.05;
            }
            .dm-logo-title {
                color: #ffffff;
                font-size: 24px;
                font-weight: 800;
                letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            }
            .dm-logo-sub {
                color: rgba(255,255,255,0.62);
                font-size: 11px;
                font-weight: 700;
                letter-spacing: 0.12em;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                margin-top: 3px;
            }
            .dm-nav {
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 16px;
                flex: 1;
                justify-content: center;
            }
            .dm-nav a {
                color: rgba(255,255,255,0.84);
                font-size: 14px;
                font-weight: 800;
                transition: color 0.2s ease;
                text-decoration: none;
            }
            .dm-nav a:hover {
                color: #ffffff;
            }
            .dm-header-actions {
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 12px;
            }
            .dm-btn {
                display: inline-flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: center;
                min-height: 52px;
                padding: 0 24px;
                border-radius: 999px;
                font-size: 15px;
                font-weight: 700;
                transition: all 0.25s ease;
                cursor: pointer;
                text-decoration: none;
            }
            .dm-btn-outline-light {
                border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.22);
                color: #ffffff;
                background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
            }

            }

        <?php
