    }

    private function nav_link($tab_key, $label, $current_tab, $is_admin = false, $variant = 'default') {
        if ($is_admin && sanitize_key($tab_key) === 'settings') {
            $url = $this->get_admin_settings_page_url();
        } else {
            $url = $is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=' . $tab_key) : add_query_arg('dmx_tab', $tab_key, get_permalink());
        }
        $active = $current_tab === $tab_key ? 'active' : '';
        if ($variant === 'app') {
            return '<a class="dmx-app-nav-link ' . esc_attr($active) . '" href="' . esc_url($url) . '">' . esc_html($label) . '</a>';
        }
        return '<a class="' . esc_attr($active) . '" href="' . esc_url($url) . '">' . esc_html($label) . '</a>';
    }

    private function render_overview_tab($is_admin = false) {
        ob_start();
        if (!$this->is_company_setup_complete()) :
            $company_setup_url = $is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '-settings') : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'settings', 'dmx_subtab' => 'settings_company'), $this->get_portal_page_url());
            echo '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">Company setup is not finished yet. Add the door company business details and default tax settings before sending customer-facing quotes or invoices. <a href="' . esc_url($company_setup_url) . '">Open Company Setup</a></div>';
        endif;

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            echo $this->render_startup_setup_status_banner($is_admin);
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_accounting() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !current_user_can(self::MANAGER_ROLE)) {
            echo $this->render_accounting_dashboard($is_admin);
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_subcontractor() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            echo $this->render_subcontractor_role_dashboard($is_admin);
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        if (($this->current_user_is_warehouse() || $this->current_user_is_parts()) && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            echo $this->render_inventory_role_dashboard($is_admin);
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_coordinator() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            echo $this->render_coordinator_dashboard($is_admin);
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_receptionist() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            echo $this->render_receptionist_dashboard($is_admin);
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        if (($this->current_user_is_technician() || $this->current_user_is_helper()) && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            echo $this->render_technician_dashboard($is_admin);
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        if (($this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep() || current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE)) && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            echo $this->render_sales_role_dashboard($is_admin);
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        echo $this->render_manager_dashboard($is_admin);
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_role_dashboard_subtitle() {
        if ($this->current_user_is_accounting() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !current_user_can(self::MANAGER_ROLE)) {
            return 'Accounting dashboard for expenses, receivables, recurring costs, payments, and financial review.';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_is_coordinator() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return 'Coordinator dashboard for scheduling, dispatch, work order flow, and customer/job coordination.';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_is_receptionist() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return 'Receptionist dashboard for messages, sales schedule, technician schedule, on-call visibility, invoices, and customer payment lookup.';
        }
        if (($this->current_user_is_technician() || $this->current_user_is_helper()) && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return 'Field dashboard for assigned jobs, technician schedule, tools, hazard assessments, inspections, photos, and job completion.';
        }
        if (($this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep() || current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE)) && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return 'Sales dashboard for quotes, site checks, supplier requests, customers, appointments, and follow-up.';
        }
        if (($this->current_user_is_warehouse() || $this->current_user_is_parts()) && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return 'Inventory dashboard for warehouse stock, truck stock, receiving, transfers, and low-stock work.';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_is_subcontractor() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return 'Subcontractor dashboard for assigned work, purchase orders, invoice submission, messages, and files.';
        }
        return 'Manager dashboard for company-wide garage door operations.';
    }

    private function render_manager_dashboard($is_admin = false) {
        $current_plan = $this->get_company_active_plan();
        $has_scheduler_access = $this->company_has_feature('scheduler');
        $base_url = $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin);

        $cards = array(
            array('title' => 'Messages', 'desc' => 'Team messages and company updates.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'messages')), 'badge_count' => $this->get_unread_message_count()),
            array('title' => 'Tools', 'desc' => 'Spring calculator, hazard assessments, and field tools.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'calculators'))),
            array('title' => 'Inventory', 'desc' => 'Warehouse, truck stock, transfers, and low-stock alerts.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'costs', 'dmx_subtab' => 'inventory'))),
            array('title' => 'Purchase Orders', 'desc' => 'Create and review supplier and subcontractor POs.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'purchase_orders'))),
            array('title' => 'Sales Graphs', 'desc' => 'Sales charts, quote trends, and invoice activity.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'reports', 'dmx_report_tab' => 'business'))),
            array('title' => 'Manage Team', 'desc' => 'Team members, roles, trucks, and login access.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'staff'))),
            array('title' => 'Timesheet Approvals', 'desc' => 'Approve employee hours before accounting uses them for payroll preparation.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'timesheets')), 'badge_count' => $this->count_timesheets_pending_manager_approval()),
            array('title' => 'Technician Efficiency', 'desc' => 'Productivity, job flow, and field performance.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'reports', 'dmx_report_tab' => 'charts'))),
        );

        $stats = array(
            array('label' => 'Open Work Orders', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_work_order', array('open', 'scheduled', 'in_progress', 'return_required')), 'note' => 'Jobs needing attention', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'))),
            array('label' => 'Open Quotes', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_quote', array('draft', 'pending', 'open')), 'note' => 'Quotes in progress', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'quotes'))),
            array('label' => 'Open Invoices', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_invoice', array('draft', 'pending', 'partial', 'open')), 'note' => 'Unpaid or not complete', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'invoices'))),
            array('label' => 'Supplier Requests', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_supplier_request', array('draft', 'requested', 'pending')), 'note' => 'Waiting or in progress', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'supplier_requests'))),
            array('label' => 'Hazard Assessments', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records(self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE, array()), 'note' => 'Saved safety records', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'inspections', 'dmx_subtab' => 'hazard_assessments'))),
            array('label' => 'Unscheduled Jobs', 'value' => $this->count_unscheduled_work_orders(), 'note' => 'Need date/time assigned', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'scheduler', 'dmx_schedule_team' => 'unscheduled'))),
        );

        ob_start(); ?>
        <?php echo $this->render_mobile_dashboard_feature_blocks($is_admin); ?>
        <div class="dmx-overview-standard dmx-overview-clean-dashboard dmx-role-dashboard dmx-manager-dashboard">
            <?php echo $this->render_role_dashboard_cards($cards); ?>

            <?php if ($has_scheduler_access) : ?>
                <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_scheduler()) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-card dmx-dashboard-scheduler-widget dmx-dashboard-scheduler-fullwidth dmx-dashboard-sales-schedule-widget">
                        <?php echo $this->render_dashboard_sales_scheduler_widget($is_admin); ?>
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>
                <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_dashboard_technician_schedule()) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-card dmx-dashboard-scheduler-widget dmx-dashboard-scheduler-fullwidth">
                        <?php echo $this->render_dashboard_scheduler_widget($is_admin); ?>
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-card dmx-dashboard-scheduler-widget dmx-dashboard-scheduler-fullwidth">
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Current Plan</h4>
                    <div class="dmx-help-box">
                        <p><strong><?php echo esc_html($this->get_company_plan_label($current_plan)); ?></strong> is active for your company.</p>
                        <p>The Scheduler is available on the Growth, Operations, and Enterprise plans.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <div class="dmx-role-dashboard-panels dmx-manager-dashboard-panels">
                <?php echo $this->render_role_dashboard_record_panel('Hazards Needing Attention', $this->get_manager_concerning_hazard_assessments(5), 'Hazard Assessment', 'No unsafe or blocked hazard assessments need manager attention right now.', $is_admin); ?>
                <?php echo $this->render_manager_employee_schedule_panel($is_admin); ?>
            </div>

            <?php echo $this->render_dashboard_active_work_orders($is_admin); ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_role_dashboard_card_color_class($card) {
        if (!empty($card['class'])) {
            return sanitize_html_class($card['class']);
        }

        $title = isset($card['title']) ? sanitize_title($card['title']) : '';
        $map = array(
            'start-up-setup'       => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-settings',
            'new-quote'            => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-quotes',
            'quotes'               => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-quotes',
            'quotes-invoices'      => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-quotes',
            'invoices'             => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-receivables',
            'new-work-order'       => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-work-orders',
            'work-orders'          => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-work-orders',
            'new-customer'         => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-customers',
            'customers'            => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-customers',
            'hazard-assessment'    => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-hazard',
            'accounting'           => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-accounting',
            'expenses'             => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-expenses',
            'receivables'          => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-receivables',
            'payments'             => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-payments',
            'upcoming'             => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-payments',
            'reports'              => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-reports',
            'site-check'           => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-site-check',
            'supplier-requests'    => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-suppliers',
            'sales-schedule'       => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-sales-schedule',
            'technician-schedule'  => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-technician-schedule',
            'equipment-scheduler'  => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-equipment-scheduler',
            'my-schedule'          => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-technician-schedule',
            'messages'             => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-messages',
            'daily-time-card'      => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-timecard',
            'inspection-forms'     => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-inspections',
            'tools'                => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-tools',
            'inventory'            => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-inventory',
            'parts-library'        => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-parts-library',
            'technician-efficiency'=> 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-efficiency',
            'sales-graphs'         => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-sales-graphs',
            'team'                 => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-team',
            'manage-team'          => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-team',
            'assigned-jobs'        => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-work-orders',
            'purchase-orders'      => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-purchase-orders',
            'timesheets'           => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-timesheets',
            'timesheet-approvals'  => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-timesheets',
            'employee-timesheets'  => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-timesheets',
            'commissions'          => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-commissions',
            'submit-invoice'       => 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-expenses',
        );

        return isset($map[$title]) ? $map[$title] : 'dmx-role-dashboard-tile-default';
    }

    private function render_role_dashboard_cards($cards) {
        if (empty($cards)) {
            return '';
        }
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-dashboard-hub dmx-role-dashboard-hub">
            <div class="dmx-dashboard-sales-grid dmx-role-dashboard-grid">
                <?php foreach ($cards as $card) : ?>
                    <?php $tile_class = $this->get_role_dashboard_card_color_class($card); ?>
                    <a class="dmx-dashboard-sales-tile dmx-role-dashboard-tile <?php echo esc_attr($tile_class); ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url($card['url']); ?>">
                        <?php if (!empty($card['badge_count'])) : ?>
                            <span class="dmx-role-dashboard-alert-dot" aria-label="Unread messages"></span>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                        <span class="dmx-dashboard-sales-title"><?php echo esc_html($card['title']); ?></span>
                        <span class="dmx-dashboard-sales-desc"><?php echo esc_html($card['desc']); ?></span>
                    </a>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_role_dashboard_stat_grid($stats) {
        if (empty($stats)) {
            return '';
        }
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-role-dashboard-stats">
            <?php foreach ($stats as $stat) :
                $tag = !empty($stat['url']) ? 'a' : 'div';
                $href = !empty($stat['url']) ? ' href="' . esc_url($stat['url']) . '"' : '';
            ?>
                <<?php echo $tag; ?> class="dmx-role-stat-card"<?php echo $href; ?>>
                    <span><?php echo esc_html($stat['label']); ?></span>
                    <strong><?php echo esc_html((string) $stat['value']); ?></strong>
                    <?php if (!empty($stat['note'])) : ?><em><?php echo esc_html($stat['note']); ?></em><?php endif; ?>
                </<?php echo $tag; ?>>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_role_dashboard_record_panel($title, $records, $type_label, $empty_message, $is_admin = false) {
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-card dmx-role-dashboard-panel">
            <div class="dmx-dashboard-active-workorders-head">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title"><?php echo esc_html($title); ?></h4>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Quick view for this role’s most important follow-up items.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <?php if (!empty($records)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-list">
                    <?php foreach ($records as $record) :
                        $url = $this->get_role_dashboard_record_url($record, $is_admin);
                        $subtitle = $this->get_role_dashboard_record_subtitle($record, $type_label);
                        $status = $this->get_role_dashboard_record_status($record);
                    ?>
                        <div class="dmx-list-item dmx-role-dashboard-record">
                            <div>
                                <strong><?php echo $url ? '<a href="' . esc_url($url) . '">' . esc_html($record->post_title) . '</a>' : esc_html($record->post_title); ?></strong>
                                <span><?php echo esc_html($subtitle); ?></span>
                            </div>
                            <div><?php echo $this->status_pill($status); ?></div>
                        </div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty"><?php echo esc_html($empty_message); ?></div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_admin_settings_page_url() {
        return admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '-settings');
    }

    private function get_settings_base_url($is_admin = null) {
        if ($is_admin === null) {
            $is_admin = is_admin();
        }

        return $is_admin ? $this->get_admin_settings_page_url() : $this->get_portal_page_url();
    }

    private function get_dashboard_url($is_admin, $args = array()) {
        $args = is_array($args) ? $args : array();
        $tab = isset($args['dmx_tab']) ? sanitize_key((string) $args['dmx_tab']) : '';

        if ($is_admin && $tab === 'settings') {
            $base_url = $this->get_admin_settings_page_url();
        } else {
            $base_url = $is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG) : $this->get_portal_page_url();
        }

        return add_query_arg($args, $base_url);
    }

    private function get_role_dashboard_records($post_type, $limit = 5, $statuses = array()) {
        $records = $this->get_posts_for_user($post_type, 200);
        $filtered = array();
        $statuses = array_map('sanitize_key', (array) $statuses);

        foreach ($records as $record) {
            if (!$record) {
                continue;
            }
            $record_status = sanitize_key($this->get_role_dashboard_record_status($record));
            if (!empty($statuses) && !in_array($record_status, $statuses, true)) {
                continue;
            }
            $filtered[] = $record;
            if (count($filtered) >= $limit) {
                break;
            }
        }

        return $filtered;
    }

    private function count_role_dashboard_records($post_type, $statuses = array()) {
        return count($this->get_role_dashboard_records($post_type, 200, $statuses));
    }

    private function hazard_assessment_needs_manager_attention($assessment) {
        if (!$assessment || $assessment->post_type !== self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE) {
            return false;
        }

        $status = sanitize_key((string) (get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_status', true) ?: get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_status', true)));
        $highest_risk = strtolower((string) get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_highest_risk', true));
        $hazards_remaining = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_hazards_remaining', true));
        $incidents_injuries = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_incidents_injuries', true));
        $notes = strtolower((string) get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_notes', true) . ' ' . $assessment->post_content);

        if (in_array($status, array('unsafe', 'review_required', 'blocked', 'stop_work'), true)) {
            return true;
        }
        if (strpos($highest_risk, 'high') !== false || strpos($highest_risk, 'critical') !== false || strpos($highest_risk, 'unsafe') !== false || in_array(strtoupper($highest_risk), array('1A','1B','2A'), true)) {
            return true;
        }
        if ($hazards_remaining === 'yes' || $incidents_injuries === 'yes') {
            return true;
        }

        foreach (array('unsafe', 'cannot proceed', 'can not proceed', 'do not proceed', 'stop work', 'lock out', 'lockout', 'tagged out') as $needle) {
            if (strpos($notes, $needle) !== false) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        $task_rows = get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_task_rows', true);
        if (is_array($task_rows)) {
            foreach ($task_rows as $row) {
                $row_risk = strtoupper((string) ($row['risk'] ?? ''));
                if (in_array($row_risk, array('1A','1B','2A'), true)) {
                    return true;
                }
                $row_text = strtolower(wp_json_encode($row));
                foreach (array('unsafe', 'cannot proceed', 'can not proceed', 'do not proceed', 'stop work', 'lock out', 'lockout', 'tagged out') as $needle) {
                    if (strpos($row_text, $needle) !== false) {
                        return true;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    private function get_manager_concerning_hazard_assessments($limit = 5) {
        $records = $this->get_posts_for_user(self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE, 100);
        $attention = array();
        foreach ($records as $record) {
            if ($this->hazard_assessment_needs_manager_attention($record)) {
                $attention[] = $record;
                if (count($attention) >= $limit) {
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        return $attention;
    }

    private function get_employee_schedule_option_key() {
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($company_key === '') {
            $company_key = 'global';
        }
        return 'dmx_employee_schedule_' . sanitize_key($company_key);
    }

    private function get_week_start_date($date = '') {
        $date = $date !== '' ? sanitize_text_field($date) : current_time('Y-m-d');
        $timestamp = strtotime($date);
        if (!$timestamp) {
            $timestamp = current_time('timestamp');
        }
        $day_number = (int) date('N', $timestamp);
        return date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-' . ($day_number - 1) . ' days', $timestamp));
    }

    private function get_employee_schedule_data() {
        $data = get_option($this->get_employee_schedule_option_key(), array());
        if (!is_array($data)) {
            $data = array();
        }
        if (empty($data['on_call']) || !is_array($data['on_call'])) {
            $data['on_call'] = array();
        }
        if (empty($data['time_off']) || !is_array($data['time_off'])) {
            $data['time_off'] = array();
        }
        return $data;
    }

    private function save_employee_schedule($tab) {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Only managers can update the employee schedule.');
        }

        $data = $this->get_employee_schedule_data();

        if (isset($_POST['employee_on_call']) && is_array($_POST['employee_on_call'])) {
            $on_call = array();
            $raw_on_call = $_POST['employee_on_call'];
            foreach ($raw_on_call as $week_start => $user_id) {
                $week = $this->get_week_start_date(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($week_start)));
                $user_id = absint($user_id);
                if ($week !== '' && $user_id > 0) {
                    $on_call[$week] = $user_id;
                }
            }
            $data['on_call'] = $on_call;
        }

        if (isset($_POST['employee_time_off']) && is_array($_POST['employee_time_off'])) {
            $time_off = array();
            $raw_time_off = $_POST['employee_time_off'];
            foreach ($raw_time_off as $row) {
                if (!is_array($row)) {
                    continue;
                }
                $user_id = absint($row['user_id'] ?? 0);
                $type = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($row['type'] ?? 'time_off'));
                $start_date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($row['start_date'] ?? ''));
                $end_date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($row['end_date'] ?? ''));
                $status = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($row['status'] ?? 'approved'));
                $notes = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($row['notes'] ?? ''));

                if ($user_id <= 0 || $start_date === '') {
                    continue;
                }
                if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $start_date)) {
                    continue;
                }
                if ($end_date === '' || !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $end_date)) {
                    $end_date = $start_date;
                }
                if (!in_array($type, array('time_off', 'vacation', 'sick', 'unavailable'), true)) {
                    $type = 'time_off';
                }
                if (!in_array($status, array('requested', 'approved', 'declined'), true)) {
                    $status = 'approved';
                }
                $time_off[] = array(
                    'user_id' => $user_id,
                    'type' => $type,
                    'start_date' => $start_date,
                    'end_date' => $end_date,
                    'status' => $status,
                    'notes' => $notes,
                );
            }

            usort($time_off, function($a, $b) {
                return strcmp($a['start_date'], $b['start_date']);
            });
            $data['time_off'] = $time_off;
        }

        $data['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
        $data['updated_by'] = get_current_user_id();
        update_option($this->get_employee_schedule_option_key(), $data, false);

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Schedule updated.');
    }

    private function get_work_order_equipment_type_options() {
        return array(
            '' => 'Select equipment',
            'none' => 'No equipment needed',
            'scissor_lift' => 'Scissor Lift',
            'forklift' => 'Forklift',
            'articulating_boom_lift' => 'Articulating Boom Lift',
            'scaffolding' => 'Scaffolding',
            'other' => 'Other Equipment',
        );
    }

    private function get_work_order_equipment_source_options() {
        return array(
            'owned' => 'Company Owned',
            'rental' => 'Rental Required',
            'customer_supplied' => 'Customer Supplied',
            'to_confirm' => 'To Be Confirmed',
        );
    }

    private function get_clean_work_order_equipment_meta_from_request() {
        $required = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_equipment_required'] ?? 'no'));
        $type = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_equipment_type'] ?? ''));
        $source = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_equipment_source'] ?? 'owned'));
        $unit = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_equipment_unit'] ?? ''));
        $vendor = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_equipment_vendor'] ?? ''));
        $notes = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['work_order_equipment_notes'] ?? ''));

        if (!in_array($required, array('yes', 'no'), true)) {
            $required = 'no';
        }
        if (!array_key_exists($type, $this->get_work_order_equipment_type_options())) {
            $type = '';
        }
        if ($type === 'none') {
            $required = 'no';
        }
        if (!array_key_exists($source, $this->get_work_order_equipment_source_options())) {
            $source = 'owned';
        }

        return array(
            'work_order_equipment_required' => $required,
            'work_order_equipment_type' => $type,
            'work_order_equipment_source' => $source,
            'work_order_equipment_unit' => $unit,
            'work_order_equipment_vendor' => $vendor,
            'work_order_equipment_notes' => $notes,
        );
    }

    private function save_work_order_equipment_meta($work_order_id, $equipment_meta = array()) {
        $work_order_id = absint($work_order_id);
        if ($work_order_id <= 0) {
            return;
        }
        if (empty($equipment_meta) || !is_array($equipment_meta)) {
            $equipment_meta = $this->get_clean_work_order_equipment_meta_from_request();
        }
        foreach ($equipment_meta as $key => $value) {
            update_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_' . $key, $value);
        }
    }

    private function get_work_order_equipment_meta($work_order_id) {
        $defaults = array(
            'work_order_equipment_required' => 'no',
            'work_order_equipment_type' => '',
            'work_order_equipment_source' => 'owned',
            'work_order_equipment_unit' => '',
            'work_order_equipment_vendor' => '',
            'work_order_equipment_notes' => '',
        );
        $work_order_id = absint($work_order_id);
        if ($work_order_id <= 0) {
            return $defaults;
        }
        foreach ($defaults as $key => $default) {
            $value = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_' . $key, true);
            if (!is_array($value) && $value !== '') {
                $defaults[$key] = $value;
            }
        }
        return $defaults;
    }

    private function format_work_order_equipment_label($work_order_id, $include_source = true) {
        $equipment = $this->get_work_order_equipment_meta($work_order_id);
        if (($equipment['work_order_equipment_required'] ?? 'no') !== 'yes') {
            return '';
        }
        $types = $this->get_work_order_equipment_type_options();
        $sources = $this->get_work_order_equipment_source_options();
        $type_label = $types[$equipment['work_order_equipment_type']] ?? 'Equipment';
        $source_label = $sources[$equipment['work_order_equipment_source']] ?? '';
        $bits = array($type_label);
        if ($include_source && $source_label !== '') {
            $bits[] = $source_label;
        }
        if (!empty($equipment['work_order_equipment_unit'])) {
            $bits[] = $equipment['work_order_equipment_unit'];
        } elseif (!empty($equipment['work_order_equipment_vendor']) && ($equipment['work_order_equipment_source'] ?? '') === 'rental') {
            $bits[] = $equipment['work_order_equipment_vendor'];
        }
        return implode(' • ', array_filter($bits));
    }

    private function get_equipment_schedule_work_orders($limit = 200) {
        $work_orders = $this->get_scheduler_visible_work_orders($limit);
        $items = array();
        foreach ($work_orders as $work_order) {
            $equipment = $this->get_work_order_equipment_meta($work_order->ID);
            if (($equipment['work_order_equipment_required'] ?? 'no') !== 'yes') {
                continue;
            }
            $items[] = $work_order;
        }
        usort($items, function($a, $b) {
            $ad = get_post_meta($a->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true) ?: '9999-12-31';
            $bd = get_post_meta($b->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true) ?: '9999-12-31';
            if ($ad === $bd) {
                return strcmp((string) get_post_meta($a->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true), (string) get_post_meta($b->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true));
            }
            return strcmp((string) $ad, (string) $bd);
        });
        return $items;
    }

    private function get_equipment_schedule_conflict_counts($items) {
        $counts = array();
        foreach ($items as $work_order) {
            $equipment = $this->get_work_order_equipment_meta($work_order->ID);
            $source = $equipment['work_order_equipment_source'] ?? 'owned';
            if ($source !== 'owned') {
                continue;
            }
            $date = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
            if ($date === '') {
                continue;
            }
            $type = $equipment['work_order_equipment_type'] ?: 'equipment';
            $unit = sanitize_title($equipment['work_order_equipment_unit'] ?: $type);
            $key = $date . '|' . $type . '|' . $unit;
            if (!isset($counts[$key])) {
                $counts[$key] = 0;
            }
            $counts[$key]++;
        }
        return $counts;
    }

    private function count_equipment_schedule_action_items() {
        $count = 0;
        foreach ($this->get_equipment_schedule_work_orders(200) as $work_order) {
            $equipment = $this->get_work_order_equipment_meta($work_order->ID);
            $source = $equipment['work_order_equipment_source'] ?? 'owned';
            if (in_array($source, array('rental', 'to_confirm'), true)) {
                $count++;
            }
        }
        return $count;
    }

    private function render_equipment_schedule_panel($is_admin = false) {
        $items = $this->get_equipment_schedule_work_orders(200);
        $conflicts = $this->get_equipment_schedule_conflict_counts($items);
        $type_options = $this->get_work_order_equipment_type_options();
        $source_options = $this->get_work_order_equipment_source_options();
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div id="dmx-equipment-schedule" class="dmx-card dmx-equipment-schedule-card">
            <div class="dmx-dashboard-active-workorders-head">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Equipment Scheduler</h4>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Track company equipment, rental needs, upcoming equipment moves, and possible double bookings before jobs are confirmed.</p>
                </div>
                <?php if ($this->current_user_can_create_work_orders()) : ?>
                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'))); ?>">Add / Update Equipment</a>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
            <?php if (empty($items)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty">No scheduled work orders require equipment yet.</div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-mobile-line-stack dmx-equipment-schedule-table-wrap">
                    <table class="dmx-table dmx-equipment-schedule-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Time</th><th>Equipment</th><th>Source</th><th>Unit / Vendor</th><th>Work Order</th><th>Customer / Site</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            <?php foreach ($items as $work_order) :
                                $equipment = $this->get_work_order_equipment_meta($work_order->ID);
                                $date = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
                                $start_time = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true);
                                $end_time = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_end_time', true);
                                $source = $equipment['work_order_equipment_source'] ?? 'owned';
                                $type = $equipment['work_order_equipment_type'] ?: '';
                                $unit_key = sanitize_title($equipment['work_order_equipment_unit'] ?: ($type ?: 'equipment'));
                                $conflict_key = $date . '|' . ($type ?: 'equipment') . '|' . $unit_key;
                                $has_conflict = $source === 'owned' && $date !== '' && !empty($conflicts[$conflict_key]) && $conflicts[$conflict_key] > 1;
                                $url = $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders', 'dmx_edit_work_order' => $work_order->ID));
                                $time_label = trim($start_time . ' - ' . $end_time, ' -');
                                if ($time_label === '') { $time_label = 'Time not set'; }
                                $unit_vendor = trim((string) ($equipment['work_order_equipment_unit'] ?: $equipment['work_order_equipment_vendor']));
                                if ($unit_vendor === '') { $unit_vendor = $source === 'rental' ? 'Rental vendor not set' : 'Unit not set'; }
                                $customer_site = trim((string) get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true));
                                $site = trim((string) get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_name', true));
                                if ($site !== '' && $site !== $customer_site) { $customer_site = trim($customer_site . ' • ' . $site, ' •'); }
                            ?>
                                <tr class="<?php echo $has_conflict ? 'dmx-equipment-conflict-row' : ''; ?>">
                                    <td data-label="Date"><?php echo esc_html($date !== '' ? date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($date)) : 'Not scheduled'); ?></td>
                                    <td data-label="Time"><?php echo esc_html($time_label); ?></td>
                                    <td data-label="Equipment"><strong><?php echo esc_html($type_options[$type] ?? 'Equipment'); ?></strong><?php if ($has_conflict) : ?><span class="dmx-equipment-conflict-badge">Potential double booking</span><?php endif; ?></td>
                                    <td data-label="Source"><?php echo esc_html($source_options[$source] ?? ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $source))); ?><?php if (in_array($source, array('rental', 'to_confirm'), true)) : ?><span class="dmx-equipment-rental-badge"><?php echo $source === 'rental' ? 'Call rental company' : 'Confirm source'; ?></span><?php endif; ?></td>
                                    <td data-label="Unit / Vendor"><?php echo esc_html($unit_vendor); ?></td>
                                    <td data-label="Work Order"><a href="<?php echo esc_url($url); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order->ID) . ' - ' . $work_order->post_title); ?></a></td>
                                    <td data-label="Customer / Site"><?php echo esc_html($customer_site); ?></td>
                                    <td data-label="Status"><?php echo $this->status_pill(get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_status', true)); ?></td>
                                </tr>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_on_call_user_for_week($week_start = '') {
        $week_start = $this->get_week_start_date($week_start);
        $data = $this->get_employee_schedule_data();
        $user_id = isset($data['on_call'][$week_start]) ? absint($data['on_call'][$week_start]) : 0;
        return $user_id > 0 ? get_user_by('id', $user_id) : false;
    }

    private function get_upcoming_employee_time_off($limit = 8) {
        $data = $this->get_employee_schedule_data();
        $today = current_time('Y-m-d');
        $upcoming = array();
        foreach ($data['time_off'] as $row) {
            $end_date = $row['end_date'] ?? $row['start_date'];
            if ($end_date < $today) {
                continue;
            }
            $upcoming[] = $row;
        }
        usort($upcoming, function($a, $b) {
            return strcmp($a['start_date'], $b['start_date']);
        });
        return array_slice($upcoming, 0, $limit);
    }

    private function render_on_call_schedule_notice($is_admin = false) {
        $data = $this->get_employee_schedule_data();
        $technicians = $this->get_schedule_team_users(array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE));
        $current_week = $this->get_week_start_date();
        $next_week = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+7 days', strtotime($current_week)));
        $current_user = $this->get_on_call_user_for_week($current_week);
        $next_user = $this->get_on_call_user_for_week($next_week);
        $can_manage = current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager();
        $target_tab = isset($_GET['dmx_tab']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_tab'])) : 'overview';
        if ($target_tab === '') {
            $target_tab = 'overview';
        }

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-card dmx-on-call-notice">
            <div class="dmx-on-call-head">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Emergency On-Call</h4>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">This is separate from employee time off. It only shows who is covering emergency calls.</p>
                </div>
                <?php if ($can_manage) : ?>
                    <details class="dmx-on-call-manager-panel">
                        <summary class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary">Manage On-Call</summary>
                        <form method="post" class="dmx-employee-schedule-form dmx-on-call-form">
                            <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="save_employee_schedule">
                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="<?php echo esc_attr($target_tab); ?>">
                            <h5 class="dmx-employee-schedule-subtitle">On-Call Rotation</h5>
                            <p class="dmx-inline-note">Choose the technician covering emergency calls for each week. Employee vacation/time-off is managed separately.</p>
                            <div class="dmx-employee-oncall-grid">
                                <?php for ($i = 0; $i < 8; $i++) :
                                    $week = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+' . ($i * 7) . ' days', strtotime($current_week)));
                                    $selected = isset($data['on_call'][$week]) ? absint($data['on_call'][$week]) : 0;
                                ?>
                                    <div class="dmx-field">
                                        <label><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('M j', strtotime($week)) . ' - ' . date_i18n('M j', strtotime('+6 days', strtotime($week)))); ?></label>
                                        <select name="employee_on_call[<?php echo esc_attr($week); ?>]">
                                            <option value="0">Not assigned</option>
                                            <?php foreach ($technicians as $tech) : ?>
                                                <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($tech->ID); ?>" <?php selected($selected, $tech->ID); ?>><?php echo esc_html($tech->display_name); ?></option>
                                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                <?php endfor; ?>
                            </div>
                            <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save On-Call Rotation</button>
                        </form>
                    </details>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-on-call-grid">
                <div class="dmx-on-call-card"><span>This Week</span><strong><?php echo esc_html($current_user ? $current_user->display_name : 'Not assigned'); ?></strong><em><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('M j', strtotime($current_week)) . ' - ' . date_i18n('M j', strtotime('+6 days', strtotime($current_week)))); ?></em></div>
                <div class="dmx-on-call-card"><span>Next Week</span><strong><?php echo esc_html($next_user ? $next_user->display_name : 'Not assigned'); ?></strong><em><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('M j', strtotime($next_week)) . ' - ' . date_i18n('M j', strtotime('+6 days', strtotime($next_week)))); ?></em></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_manager_employee_schedule_panel($is_admin = false) {
        $data = $this->get_employee_schedule_data();
        $team_users = $this->get_schedule_team_users(array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE));
        $upcoming_time_off = $this->get_upcoming_employee_time_off(6);
        $can_manage = current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager();
        $target_tab = isset($_GET['dmx_tab']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_tab'])) : 'overview';
        if ($target_tab === '') {
            $target_tab = 'overview';
        }
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-card dmx-role-dashboard-panel dmx-employee-schedule-panel dmx-time-off-schedule-panel">
            <div class="dmx-dashboard-active-workorders-head">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Team Time Off / Vacation</h4>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Track requested time off, vacation, sick days, and unavailable dates. Emergency on-call is managed separately from the schedule widget.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <?php if (!empty($upcoming_time_off)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-list dmx-employee-timeoff-list">
                    <?php foreach ($upcoming_time_off as $row) : $user = get_user_by('id', absint($row['user_id'])); ?>
                        <div class="dmx-list-item"><div><strong><?php echo esc_html($user ? $user->display_name : 'Team member'); ?></strong><span><?php echo esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $row['type'])) . ' • ' . date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($row['start_date'])) . ' - ' . date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($row['end_date']))); ?></span></div><div><?php echo $this->status_pill($row['status']); ?></div></div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty">No upcoming time off has been entered yet.</div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <?php if ($can_manage) : ?>
                <details class="dmx-employee-schedule-editor dmx-time-off-editor">
                    <summary>Manage team time off / vacation</summary>
                    <form method="post" class="dmx-employee-schedule-form">
                        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="save_employee_schedule">
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="<?php echo esc_attr($target_tab); ?>">
                        <h5 class="dmx-employee-schedule-subtitle">Time Off / Vacation</h5>
                        <p class="dmx-inline-note">This is for employee availability only. It does not change the emergency on-call rotation.</p>
                        <div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-mobile-line-stack">
                            <table class="dmx-table dmx-employee-timeoff-table">
                                <thead><tr><th>Team Member</th><th>Type</th><th>Start</th><th>End</th><th>Status</th><th>Notes</th></tr></thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    <?php $rows = array_merge($data['time_off'], array(array('user_id' => 0, 'type' => 'time_off', 'start_date' => '', 'end_date' => '', 'status' => 'requested', 'notes' => ''))); ?>
                                    <?php foreach ($rows as $index => $row) : ?>
                                        <tr>
                                            <td data-label="Team Member"><select name="employee_time_off[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][user_id]"><option value="0">Select</option><?php foreach ($team_users as $team_user) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($team_user->ID); ?>" <?php selected(absint($row['user_id']), $team_user->ID); ?>><?php echo esc_html($team_user->display_name); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></td>
                                            <td data-label="Type"><select name="employee_time_off[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][type]"><option value="time_off" <?php selected($row['type'], 'time_off'); ?>>Time Off</option><option value="vacation" <?php selected($row['type'], 'vacation'); ?>>Vacation</option><option value="sick" <?php selected($row['type'], 'sick'); ?>>Sick</option><option value="unavailable" <?php selected($row['type'], 'unavailable'); ?>>Unavailable</option></select></td>
                                            <td data-label="Start"><input type="date" name="employee_time_off[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][start_date]" value="<?php echo esc_attr($row['start_date']); ?>"></td>
                                            <td data-label="End"><input type="date" name="employee_time_off[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][end_date]" value="<?php echo esc_attr($row['end_date']); ?>"></td>
                                            <td data-label="Status"><select name="employee_time_off[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][status]"><option value="requested" <?php selected($row['status'], 'requested'); ?>>Requested</option><option value="approved" <?php selected($row['status'], 'approved'); ?>>Approved</option><option value="declined" <?php selected($row['status'], 'declined'); ?>>Declined</option></select></td>
                                            <td data-label="Notes"><input type="text" name="employee_time_off[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][notes]" value="<?php echo esc_attr($row['notes']); ?>" placeholder="Optional note"></td>
                                        </tr>
                                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                                </tbody>
                            </table>
                        </div>
                        <p class="dmx-inline-note">To add more than one new time-off request, save once and a new blank row will appear.</p>
                        <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Time Off</button>
                    </form>
                </details>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_employee_time_off_summary_panel($limit = 6) {
        $upcoming_time_off = $this->get_upcoming_employee_time_off($limit);
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-card dmx-role-dashboard-panel dmx-employee-timeoff-summary-panel">
            <div class="dmx-dashboard-active-workorders-head">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Team Time Off / Vacation</h4>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Quick view of approved or requested time off so scheduling is easier.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <?php if (!empty($upcoming_time_off)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-list dmx-employee-timeoff-list">
                    <?php foreach ($upcoming_time_off as $row) : $user = get_user_by('id', absint($row['user_id'])); ?>
                        <div class="dmx-list-item"><div><strong><?php echo esc_html($user ? $user->display_name : 'Team member'); ?></strong><span><?php echo esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $row['type'])) . ' • ' . date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($row['start_date'])) . ' - ' . date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($row['end_date']))); ?></span></div><div><?php echo $this->status_pill($row['status']); ?></div></div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty">No upcoming time off or vacation has been entered yet.</div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_role_dashboard_record_status($record) {
        if (!$record) {
            return 'draft';
        }
        switch ($record->post_type) {
            case 'dm_work_order':
                return get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_work_order_status', true) ?: get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_status', true) ?: 'open';
            case self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE:
                return get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_status', true) ?: get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_hazard_status', true) ?: 'complete';
            case 'dm_sales_appointment':
                return get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_status', true) ?: 'scheduled';
            default:
                return get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_status', true) ?: 'draft';
        }
    }

    private function get_role_dashboard_record_subtitle($record, $type_label = '') {
        if (!$record) {
            return '';
        }
        $parts = array();
        if ($type_label !== '') {
            $parts[] = $type_label;
        }

        switch ($record->post_type) {
            case 'dm_quote':
            case 'dm_invoice':
                $customer = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
                $total = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_total', true) ?: get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_amount', true);
                if ($customer !== '') { $parts[] = $customer; }
                if ($total !== '') { $parts[] = $this->format_money($total); }
                break;
            case 'dm_work_order':
                $customer = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true) ?: get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
                $date = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
                if ($customer !== '') { $parts[] = $customer; }
                $parts[] = $date !== '' ? date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($date)) : 'Unscheduled';
                break;
            case 'dm_supplier_request':
                $supplier = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_supplier_name', true);
                $customer = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
                if ($supplier !== '') { $parts[] = $supplier; }
                if ($customer !== '') { $parts[] = $customer; }
                break;
            case self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE:
                $customer = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_hazard_customer_name', true);
                $risk = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_hazard_highest_risk', true);
                if ($customer !== '') { $parts[] = $customer; }
                if ($risk !== '') { $parts[] = $risk; }
                break;
            case 'dm_sales_appointment':
                $customer = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_customer', true);
                $date = get_post_meta($record->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', true);
                if ($customer !== '') { $parts[] = $customer; }
                if ($date !== '') { $parts[] = date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($date)); }
                break;
            default:
                $parts[] = get_the_date('', $record);
                break;
        }

        return implode(' • ', array_filter($parts));
    }

    private function get_role_dashboard_record_url($record, $is_admin = false) {
        if (!$record) {
            return '';
        }
        switch ($record->post_type) {
            case 'dm_quote':
                return $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'quotes', 'dmx_edit_quote' => $record->ID));
            case 'dm_invoice':
                return $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'invoices', 'dmx_edit_invoice' => $record->ID));
            case 'dm_work_order':
                return $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders', 'dmx_edit_work_order' => $record->ID));
            case 'dm_supplier_request':
                return $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'supplier_requests'));
            case self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE:
                return $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'inspections', 'dmx_subtab' => 'hazard_assessments'));
            case 'dm_sales_appointment':
                return $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales_scheduler'));
            case 'dm_customer':
                return $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'customers'));
        }
        return '';
    }

    private function get_unscheduled_work_orders($limit = 5) {
        $work_orders = $this->get_accessible_work_orders(200);
        $filtered = array();
        foreach ($work_orders as $work_order) {
            if ((string) get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true) !== '') {
                continue;
            }
            $filtered[] = $work_order;
            if (count($filtered) >= $limit) {
                break;
            }
        }
        return $filtered;
    }

    private function count_unscheduled_work_orders() {
        return count($this->get_unscheduled_work_orders(200));
    }

    private function count_todays_work_orders() {
        $today = current_time('Y-m-d');
        $count = 0;
        foreach ($this->get_accessible_work_orders(200) as $work_order) {
            if ((string) get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true) === $today) {
                $count++;
            }
        }
        return $count;
    }

    private function count_this_week_sales_appointments() {
        $today = current_time('Y-m-d');
        $week_end = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+7 days', strtotime($today)));
        $count = 0;
        foreach ($this->get_accessible_sales_appointments(200) as $appointment) {
            $date = (string) get_post_meta($appointment->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', true);
            if ($date >= $today && $date <= $week_end) {
                $count++;
            }
        }
        return $count;
    }

    private function render_sales_role_dashboard($is_admin = false) {
        $cards = array(
            array('title' => 'Messages', 'desc' => 'Team messages and sales updates.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'messages')), 'badge_count' => $this->get_unread_message_count()),
            array('title' => 'New Quote', 'desc' => 'Build pricing and quote line items.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'quotes'))),

            array('title' => 'Supplier Requests', 'desc' => 'Custom door pricing requests.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'supplier_requests'))),

            array('title' => 'Technician Schedule', 'desc' => 'Technician availability and timing.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'scheduler'))),
        );
        $stats = array(
            array('label' => 'Open Quotes', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_quote', array('draft', 'pending', 'open')), 'note' => 'Quotes to finish/follow up', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'quotes'))),
            array('label' => 'Supplier Requests', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_supplier_request', array('draft', 'requested', 'pending')), 'note' => 'Waiting on supplier pricing', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'supplier_requests'))),

        );

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-role-dashboard dmx-sales-dashboard">
            <?php echo $this->render_role_dashboard_cards($cards); ?>
            <div class="dmx-role-dashboard-panels">
                <?php echo $this->render_role_dashboard_record_panel('Quotes Needing Follow-Up', $this->get_role_dashboard_records('dm_quote', 5, array('draft', 'pending', 'open')), 'Quote', 'No quotes need follow-up right now.', $is_admin); ?>
                <?php echo $this->render_role_dashboard_record_panel('Supplier Requests', $this->get_role_dashboard_records('dm_supplier_request', 5, array('draft', 'requested', 'pending')), 'Supplier Request', 'No active supplier requests right now.', $is_admin); ?>
            </div>
            <?php if ($this->company_has_feature('scheduler') && $this->current_user_can_view_sales_scheduler()) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-card dmx-dashboard-scheduler-widget dmx-dashboard-scheduler-fullwidth dmx-dashboard-sales-schedule-widget">
                    <?php echo $this->render_dashboard_sales_scheduler_widget($is_admin); ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_technician_dashboard($is_admin = false) {
