            array('label' => 'Inspections', 'value' => $this->count_posts_for_user('dm_inspection'), 'note' => 'Inspection records', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'inspections'))),
            array('label' => 'Quotes', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_quote', array('draft', 'pending', 'open')), 'note' => 'Quotes I can access', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'quotes'))),
        );

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-role-dashboard dmx-technician-dashboard">
            <?php echo $this->render_role_dashboard_cards($cards); ?>
            <?php if ($this->company_has_feature('scheduler') && $this->current_user_can_view_dashboard_technician_schedule()) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-card dmx-dashboard-scheduler-widget dmx-dashboard-scheduler-fullwidth">
                    <?php echo $this->render_dashboard_scheduler_widget($is_admin); ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            <?php echo $this->render_dashboard_active_work_orders($is_admin); ?>
            <?php echo $this->render_my_daily_timesheet_form($is_admin); ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_my_daily_timesheet_form($is_admin = false) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_submit_own_timesheet()) {
            return '';
        }

        $user = wp_get_current_user();
        if (!$user || !$user->exists()) {
            return '';
        }

        $today = $this->get_company_current_date();
        $role_label = $this->get_current_timesheet_role_label();
        $my_records = $this->get_my_employee_timesheet_records(10);
        $todays_records = array();
        $todays_record = null;

        foreach ($my_records as $record) {
            if ((string) ($record['date'] ?? '') !== $today) {
                continue;
            }
            $todays_records[] = $record;
            if (sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? '') === 'checked_in') {
                $todays_record = $record;
                break;
            }
        }

        $status = $todays_record ? sanitize_key($todays_record['status'] ?? 'checked_in') : '';
        $is_checked_in = $todays_record && $status === 'checked_in';
        $is_submitted_or_locked = false;
        $can_start_new = !$is_checked_in;
        $job_value = $todays_record ? (string) ($todays_record['work_order_ref'] ?? '') : '';
        $notes_value = $todays_record ? (string) ($todays_record['notes'] ?? '') : '';
        $break_value = $todays_record ? (string) ($todays_record['break_minutes'] ?? '0') : '0';
        $completed_today = array_values(array_filter($todays_records, function($record) {
            return sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? '') !== 'checked_in';
        }));
        $timezone_label = $this->get_company_timezone_string();

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div id="dmx-daily-timesheet" class="dmx-card dmx-daily-timesheet-card dmx-daily-timecard-card" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
            <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Daily Time Card</h4>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin:0;">Use this like an old-style punch card. Check in when you start, check out when you are done, and DoorMatrix will submit the stamped time card for manager approval and accounting review.</p>
                </div>
                <?php if ($todays_record) : ?>
                    <div><?php echo $this->status_pill($status); ?></div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-grid-3" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
                <div class="dmx-help-box" style="padding:14px;">
                    <h4 style="margin:0 0 6px;font-size:15px;">Employee</h4>
                    <p style="margin:0;color:#173253;font-weight:800;"><?php echo esc_html($user->display_name); ?></p>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin:6px 0 0;">Role: <?php echo esc_html($role_label); ?></p>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-help-box" style="padding:14px;">
                    <h4 style="margin:0 0 6px;font-size:15px;">Today</h4>
                    <p style="margin:0;color:#173253;font-weight:800;"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_company_date_string($today, 'M j, Y')); ?></p>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin:6px 0 0;">Timestamps use <?php echo esc_html($timezone_label); ?>.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-help-box" style="padding:14px;">
                    <h4 style="margin:0 0 6px;font-size:15px;">Current Time</h4>
                    <p style="margin:0;color:#173253;font-weight:800;"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_company_timestamp(time(), 'g:i A')); ?></p>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin:6px 0 0;">Refresh the dashboard if this has been open awhile.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <?php if ($is_checked_in) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-success">You are currently checked in. Click <strong>Check Out & Submit Session</strong> when this work block is complete. You can check in again later if you return.</div>
                <div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-mobile-line-stack" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
                    <table class="dmx-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Check In</th><th>Check Out</th><th>Break</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody><tr>
                            <td data-label="Check In"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_timecard_stamp($todays_record['check_in_at'] ?? ($todays_record['start_time'] ?? ''), $todays_record['check_in_ts'] ?? 0, $todays_record['check_in_timezone'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                            <td data-label="Check Out">Not checked out yet</td>
                            <td data-label="Break"><?php echo esc_html($break_value !== '' ? $break_value . ' min' : '0 min'); ?></td>
                            <td data-label="Status"><?php echo $this->status_pill('checked_in'); ?></td>
                        </tr></tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="timecard_check_out">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="overview">
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Break / Lunch Minutes</label>
                            <input type="number" step="1" min="0" name="timecard_break_minutes" value="<?php echo esc_attr($break_value); ?>" placeholder="30">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Linked Work Order / Job</label>
                            <input type="text" name="timecard_work_order_ref" value="<?php echo esc_attr($job_value); ?>" placeholder="Work order number, customer, or job reference">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Check Out Time</label>
                            <input type="text" value="Now: <?php echo esc_attr($this->format_company_timestamp(time(), 'g:i A')); ?>" readonly>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>End-of-Day Notes</label>
                        <textarea name="timecard_notes" placeholder="Jobs completed, travel time, parts delays, overtime reason, or anything the manager/accountant should know"><?php echo esc_textarea($notes_value); ?></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Check Out & Submit Session</button>
                </form>
            <?php elseif ($is_submitted_or_locked) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-success">
                    <?php if ($status === 'submitted') : ?>
                        Today’s time card has been submitted to managers and accounting. Manager approval is required before accounting uses these hours for payroll preparation.
                    <?php elseif ($status === 'approved') : ?>
                        Today’s time card has been approved by a manager and is ready for accounting review.
                    <?php else : ?>
                        Today’s time card has been marked paid/processed by accounting.
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-mobile-line-stack">
                    <table class="dmx-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Check In</th><th>Check Out</th><th>Break</th><th>Regular</th><th>OT</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody><tr>
                            <td data-label="Check In"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_timecard_stamp($todays_record['check_in_at'] ?? ($todays_record['start_time'] ?? ''), $todays_record['check_in_ts'] ?? 0, $todays_record['check_in_timezone'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                            <td data-label="Check Out"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_timecard_stamp($todays_record['check_out_at'] ?? ($todays_record['end_time'] ?? ''), $todays_record['check_out_ts'] ?? 0, $todays_record['check_out_timezone'] ?? '')); ?></td>
                            <td data-label="Break"><?php echo esc_html((string) ($todays_record['break_minutes'] ?? '0') . ' min'); ?></td>
                            <td data-label="Regular"><?php echo esc_html(number_format((float) ($todays_record['regular_hours'] ?? 0), 2)); ?></td>
                            <td data-label="OT"><?php echo esc_html(number_format((float) ($todays_record['overtime_hours'] ?? 0), 2)); ?></td>
                            <td data-label="Status"><?php echo $this->status_pill($status); ?></td>
                        </tr></tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            <?php elseif ($can_start_new) : ?>
                <?php if (!empty($completed_today)) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-success">You have <?php echo esc_html((string) count($completed_today)); ?> completed time card session<?php echo count($completed_today) === 1 ? '' : 's'; ?> today. You can check in again if you are returning to work.</div>
                <?php elseif ($status === 'rejected') : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">Today’s previous time card was rejected. You can check in again or speak with your manager if the rejected entry needs to be corrected.</div>
                <?php endif; ?>
                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="timecard_check_in">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="overview">
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Linked Work Order / Job</label>
                            <input type="text" name="timecard_work_order_ref" value="" placeholder="Optional: work order number, customer, or job reference">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Check In Time</label>
                            <input type="text" value="Now: <?php echo esc_attr($this->format_company_timestamp(time(), 'g:i A')); ?>" readonly>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Start-of-Day Notes</label>
                        <textarea name="timecard_notes" placeholder="Optional notes before starting the day"></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Check In Now</button>
                </form>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">Today’s time card cannot be changed from this dashboard. Please contact a manager or accounting.</div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <details class="dmx-mobile-scheduler-stats" style="margin-top:16px;">
                <summary>Recent Time Cards</summary>
                <div style="padding:0 16px 16px;">
                    <?php echo $this->render_employee_timesheet_table($my_records, true); ?>
                </div>
            </details>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_inventory_role_dashboard($is_admin = false) {
        $cards = array(
            array('title' => 'Messages', 'desc' => 'Stock pulls and parts questions.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'messages')), 'badge_count' => $this->get_unread_message_count()),
            array('title' => 'Daily Time Card', 'desc' => 'Check in, check out, and submit today’s stamped hours.', 'url' => '#dmx-daily-timesheet'),
            array('title' => 'Inventory', 'desc' => 'Warehouse, truck stock, and transfers.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'costs', 'dmx_subtab' => 'inventory'))),
            array('title' => 'Parts Library', 'desc' => 'Parts catalog and item details.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'costs', 'dmx_subtab' => 'inventory'))),
            array('title' => 'Technician Schedule', 'desc' => 'Jobs needing parts support.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'scheduler'))),
        );
        $stats = array(
            array('label' => 'Parts Library', 'value' => $this->count_posts_for_user(self::PART_POST_TYPE), 'note' => 'Saved part records', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'costs', 'dmx_subtab' => 'inventory'))),
            array('label' => 'Today’s Jobs', 'value' => $this->count_todays_work_orders(), 'note' => 'Jobs needing parts support', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'scheduler'))),
            array('label' => 'Open Work Orders', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_work_order', array('open', 'scheduled', 'in_progress', 'return_required')), 'note' => 'Stock/job demand', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'))),
            array('label' => 'Messages', 'value' => $this->get_unread_message_count(), 'note' => 'Unread team messages', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'messages'))),
        );

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-role-dashboard dmx-inventory-dashboard">
            <?php echo $this->render_role_dashboard_cards($cards); ?>
            <div class="dmx-card dmx-dashboard-scheduler-fullwidth">
                <?php echo $this->render_inventory_tab($is_admin); ?>
            </div>
            <?php echo $this->render_my_daily_timesheet_form($is_admin); ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_subcontractor_role_dashboard($is_admin = false) {
        $cards = array(
            array('title' => 'Messages', 'desc' => 'Office messages and job updates.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'messages')), 'badge_count' => $this->get_unread_message_count()),
            array('title' => 'Assigned Jobs', 'desc' => 'Assigned work and job details.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'subcontractors'))),
            array('title' => 'Purchase Orders', 'desc' => 'Issued purchase orders.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'subcontractors'))),
            array('title' => 'Submit Invoice', 'desc' => 'Invoices, notes, and attachments.', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'subcontractors'))),
        );
        $stats = array(
            array('label' => 'Assigned POs', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_subcontractor_po', array('draft', 'sent', 'open', 'pending', 'approved')), 'note' => 'Open purchase orders', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'subcontractors'))),
            array('label' => 'Submitted Invoices', 'value' => $this->count_role_dashboard_records('dm_subcontractor_invoice', array()), 'note' => 'Invoice records', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'subcontractors'))),
            array('label' => 'Messages', 'value' => $this->get_unread_message_count(), 'note' => 'Unread messages', 'url' => $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'messages'))),
        );

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-role-dashboard dmx-subcontractor-dashboard">
            <?php echo $this->render_role_dashboard_cards($cards); ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_mobile_app_nav($current_tab, $is_admin = false, $has_scheduler_access = false) {
        $options = array(
            'overview' => 'Dashboard',
        );

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_messages()) {
            $message_count = $this->get_unread_message_count();
            $options['messages'] = $message_count > 0 ? sprintf('Messages (%d)', $message_count) : 'Messages';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_workflow()) {
            $options['sales'] = 'Sales Workflow';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_scheduler()) {
            $options['sales_scheduler'] = 'Sales Schedule';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_scheduler()) {
            $options['scheduler'] = 'Technician Schedule';
        }
        $options['calculators'] = 'Tools';
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_inventory_and_costs()) {
            $options['costs'] = 'Inventory';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_accounting()) {
            $options['accounting'] = 'Accounting';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_reports()) {
            $options['reports'] = 'Reports';
        }
        if ($this->can_view_team_tab()) {
            $options['staff'] = 'Team';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_subcontractors()) {
            $options['subcontractors'] = 'Subcontractors';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $options['settings'] = 'Settings';
        }
        $options['help'] = 'Help';

        $company_settings = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $mobile_company_name = trim((string) ($company_settings['company_name'] ?? ''));
        if ($mobile_company_name === '') {
            $mobile_company_name = trim((string) ($company_settings['legal_name'] ?? ''));
        }
        if ($mobile_company_name === '') {
            $mobile_company_name = 'Company Portal';
        }

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-mobile-nav-wrap">
            <div class="dmx-mobile-nav-shell">
                <div class="dmx-mobile-nav-heading">
                    <span class="dmx-mobile-nav-caption">Powered by DoorMatrix</span>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-mobile-nav-control">
                    <select id="dmx-mobile-nav-select" class="dmx-mobile-nav-select" onchange="if(this.value){window.location.href=this.value;}">
                        <?php foreach ($options as $tab_key => $label) :
                            $url = $is_admin
                                ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=' . $tab_key)
                                : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => $tab_key), get_permalink());
                        ?>
                            <option value="<?php echo esc_url($url); ?>" <?php selected($current_tab, $tab_key); ?>><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </select>
                    <span class="dmx-mobile-nav-chevron" aria-hidden="true">⌄</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_mobile_dashboard_feature_blocks($is_admin = false) {
        $base_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG)
            : get_permalink();

        $items = array();

        if ($this->current_user_can_submit_own_timesheet()) {
            $items[] = array(
                'label' => 'Daily Time Card',
                'note'  => 'Check in and out',
                'tab'   => 'overview',
                'subtab'=> '',
                'hash'  => 'dmx-daily-timesheet',
                'class' => 'dmx-mobile-feature-timecard',
            );
        }

        if ($this->company_has_feature('scheduler') && $this->current_user_can_view_dashboard_technician_schedule()) {
            $items[] = array(
                'label' => 'Scheduler',
                'note'  => 'Schedule board and dispatch',
                'tab'   => 'scheduler',
                'subtab'=> '',
                'class' => 'dmx-mobile-feature-scheduler dmx-mobile-feature-wide',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('work_orders')) {
            $items[] = array(
                'label' => 'Work Orders',
                'note'  => 'Open jobs and service calls',
                'tab'   => 'sales',
                'subtab'=> 'work_orders',
                'class' => 'dmx-mobile-feature-workorders',
            );
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('quotes')) {
            $items[] = array(
                'label' => 'Quotes',
                'note'  => 'Build and manage pricing',
                'tab'   => 'sales',
                'subtab'=> 'quotes',
                'class' => 'dmx-mobile-feature-quotes',
            );
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('invoices')) {
            $items[] = array(
                'label' => 'Invoices',
                'note'  => 'Billing and customer invoices',
                'tab'   => 'sales',
                'subtab'=> 'invoices',
                'class' => 'dmx-mobile-feature-invoices',
            );
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('supplier_requests') || $this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep()) {
            $items[] = array(
                'label' => 'Supplier Requests',
                'note'  => 'Custom door pricing requests',
                'tab'   => 'sales',
                'subtab'=> 'supplier_requests',
                'class' => 'dmx-mobile-feature-supplier_requests',
            );
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('payments')) {
            $items[] = array(
                'label' => 'Payments',
                'note'  => 'Paid and pending balances',
                'tab'   => 'sales',
                'subtab'=> 'payments',
                'class' => 'dmx-mobile-feature-payments',
            );
        }
        $items[] = array(
            'label' => 'Spring Calculator',
            'note'  => 'Spring and field tools',
            'tab'   => 'calculators',
            'subtab'=> '',
            'class' => 'dmx-mobile-feature-calculators',
        );
        $items[] = array(
            'label' => 'Inspections',
            'note'  => 'Door reports and safety checks',
            'tab'   => 'inspections',
            'subtab'=> '',
            'class' => 'dmx-mobile-feature-inspections',
        );

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-mobile-overview">
            <div class="dmx-mobile-feature-grid">
                <?php foreach ($items as $item) :
                    $args = array('dmx_tab' => $item['tab']);
                    if (!empty($item['subtab'])) {
                        $args['dmx_subtab'] = $item['subtab'];
                    }
                    $url = add_query_arg($args, $base_url);
                    if (!empty($item['hash'])) {
                        $url .= '#' . sanitize_key($item['hash']);
                    }
                ?>
                    <a class="dmx-mobile-feature-card <?php echo esc_attr($item['class']); ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url($url); ?>">
                        <strong><?php echo esc_html($item['label']); ?></strong>
                        <span><?php echo esc_html($item['note']); ?></span>
                    </a>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }


    private function render_dashboard_quick_tabs($is_admin = false) {
        $base_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG)
            : get_permalink();

        $tabs = array();

        if ($this->current_user_is_coordinator() || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $tabs[] = array(
                'key' => 'customers',
                'label' => 'Add Customers',
                'note' => 'Required before work orders',
                'class' => 'dmx-dashboard-quick-tab-customers',
                'args' => array('dmx_tab' => 'customers'),
                'hash' => 'dmx-add-customer',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_see_sales_work_order_tiles()) {
            $tabs[] = array(
                'key' => 'work_orders',
                'label' => 'Work Orders',
                'note' => 'Open jobs',
                'class' => 'dmx-dashboard-quick-tab-work_orders',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('quotes')) {
            $tabs[] = array(
                'key' => 'quotes',
                'label' => 'Quotes',
                'note' => 'Build pricing',
                'class' => 'dmx-dashboard-quick-tab-quotes',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('invoices')) {
            $tabs[] = array(
                'key' => 'invoices',
                'label' => 'Invoices',
                'note' => 'Customer billing',
                'class' => 'dmx-dashboard-quick-tab-invoices',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('supplier_requests') || $this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep()) {
            $tabs[] = array(
                'key' => 'supplier_requests',
                'label' => 'Supplier Requests',
                'note' => 'Custom door pricing',
                'class' => 'dmx-dashboard-quick-tab-supplier_requests',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('payments')) {
            $tabs[] = array(
                'key' => 'payments',
                'label' => 'Payments',
                'note' => 'Payment status',
                'class' => 'dmx-dashboard-quick-tab-payments',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_accounting() || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->user_can_create_subcontractor_pos(0, false)) {
            $tabs[] = array(
                'key' => 'purchase_orders',
                'label' => 'POs',
                'note' => 'Purchase orders',
                'class' => 'dmx-dashboard-quick-tab-purchase_orders',
                'args' => array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'purchase_orders'),
            );
        }

        if (empty($tabs)) {
            return '';
        }

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-dashboard-quick-tabs" aria-label="Dashboard Quick Tabs">
            <?php foreach ($tabs as $tab) :
                $tab_args = isset($tab['args']) && is_array($tab['args']) ? $tab['args'] : array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => $tab['key']);
                $tab_href = add_query_arg($tab_args, $base_url);
                if (!empty($tab['hash'])) {
                    $tab_href .= '#' . sanitize_key($tab['hash']);
                }
            ?>
                <a class="dmx-dashboard-quick-tab <?php echo esc_attr($tab['class']); ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url($tab_href); ?>">
                    <strong><?php echo esc_html($tab['label']); ?></strong>
                    <span><?php echo esc_html($tab['note']); ?></span>
                </a>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_dashboard_sales_hub($is_admin = false, $active_tile = '') {
        $base_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG)
            : get_permalink();

        $tiles = array();

        if ($this->current_user_can_see_sales_work_order_tiles()) {
            $tiles[] = array(
                'key' => 'work_orders',
                'title' => 'Work Orders',
                'desc' => 'Open technician job sheets, service call details, and assigned field work.',
                'color' => '#8b5e3c',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_add_customers()) {
            $tiles[] = array(
                'key' => 'customers',
                'title' => 'Customers',
                'desc' => 'Add a customer record before building a quote or invoice.',
                'color' => '#0f8f86',
                'args' => array('dmx_tab' => 'customers'),
                'hash' => 'dmx-add-customer',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('quotes')) {
            $tiles[] = array(
                'key' => 'quotes',
                'title' => 'Quotes',
                'desc' => 'Build and edit customer quotes using the same quote screen you already have.',
                'color' => '#7b61ff',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('invoices')) {
            $tiles[] = array(
                'key' => 'invoices',
                'title' => 'Invoices',
                'desc' => 'Go straight into the invoice area using the same layout you were already using.',
                'color' => '#2f80ed',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('supplier_requests') || $this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep()) {
            $tiles[] = array(
                'key' => 'supplier_requests',
                'title' => 'Supplier Requests',
                'desc' => 'Request custom door supplier pricing before building the customer quote.',
                'color' => '#f59e0b',
            );
        }

        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('payments')) {
            $tiles[] = array(
                'key' => 'payments',
                'title' => 'Payments',
                'desc' => 'View paid and pending customer payment totals from the sales workflow.',
                'color' => '#2eae68',
            );
        }

        if (empty($tiles)) {
            return '';
        }

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-dashboard-hub">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-dashboard-sales-grid">';
        foreach ($tiles as $tile) {
            $tile_args = isset($tile['args']) && is_array($tile['args']) ? $tile['args'] : array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => $tile['key']);
            $url = add_query_arg($tile_args, $base_url);
            if (!empty($tile['hash'])) {
                $url .= '#' . sanitize_key($tile['hash']);
            }
            $classes = 'dmx-dashboard-sales-tile dmx-dashboard-sales-' . esc_attr($tile['key']);
            if ($active_tile === $tile['key']) {
                $classes .= ' is-active';
            }
            echo '<a class="' . esc_attr($classes) . '" href="' . esc_url($url) . '">';
            echo '<span class="dmx-dashboard-sales-title">' . esc_html($tile['title']) . '</span>';
            echo '<span class="dmx-dashboard-sales-desc">' . esc_html($tile['desc']) . '</span>';
            echo '</a>';
        }
        echo '</div>';
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_quotes_tab($is_admin = false) {
        $quotes = $this->get_posts_for_user('dm_quote', 50);
        $parts = $this->get_parts_for_quote_builder();
        $saved_items = $this->get_saved_items_for_quote_builder();
        $quote_lookup_items = array_merge($parts, $saved_items);
        $customer_lookup = $this->get_customers_for_lookup();

        $edit_quote_id = absint($_GET['dmx_edit_quote'] ?? 0);
        $edit_quote = null;
        $edit_quote_meta = array(
            'number' => '',
            'title' => '',
            'customer' => '',
            'customer_email' => '',
            'site_location' => '',
            'amount' => '',
            'status' => 'draft',
            'supplier_ref' => '',
            'markup_percent' => '',
            'notes' => '',
            'job_description' => '',
            'salesperson_name' => $this->get_current_team_member_name(),
            'tax_profile' => array(),
            'line_items' => array(),
            'site_check' => $this->get_quote_site_check_defaults(),
        );

        if ($edit_quote_id > 0 && $this->current_user_can_edit_quote_record($edit_quote_id)) {
            $edit_quote = get_post($edit_quote_id);
            if ($edit_quote) {
                $edit_quote_meta['number'] = $this->get_document_number('quote', $edit_quote_id);
                $edit_quote_meta['title'] = $edit_quote->post_title;
                $edit_quote_meta['customer'] = get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
                $edit_quote_meta['customer_email'] = get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_customer_email', true);
                $edit_quote_meta['site_location'] = get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_site_location', true);
                $edit_quote_meta['amount'] = get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_total', true) ?: get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_amount', true);
                $edit_quote_meta['status'] = get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_status', true) ?: 'draft';
                $edit_quote_meta['supplier_ref'] = get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_supplier_request_ref', true);
                $edit_quote_meta['markup_percent'] = get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_markup_percent', true);
                $edit_quote_meta['notes'] = $edit_quote->post_content;
                $edit_quote_meta['job_description'] = get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_job_description', true);
                $edit_quote_meta['salesperson_name'] = $this->get_document_salesperson_name($edit_quote_id);
                $edit_quote_meta['tax_profile'] = get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_tax_profile', true);
                $edit_quote_meta['line_items'] = array_values($this->normalize_document_line_items_for_editor(get_post_meta($edit_quote_id, '_dmx_quote_line_items', true)));
                $edit_quote_meta['site_check'] = $this->get_quote_site_check_meta($edit_quote_id);
                if (!is_array($edit_quote_meta['tax_profile'])) {
                    $edit_quote_meta['tax_profile'] = array();
                }
                if (!is_array($edit_quote_meta['line_items'])) {
                    $edit_quote_meta['line_items'] = array();
                }
            }
        }

        $can_manage_work_orders = $this->current_user_can_create_work_orders();

        $invoice_tax_profile_for_preview = $edit_invoice_meta['tax_profile'];
        if (!is_array($invoice_tax_profile_for_preview) || (empty($invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['mode']) && empty($invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['primary_label']) && empty($invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['secondary_label']))) {
            $invoice_tax_profile_for_preview = $this->get_saved_document_tax_profile($edit_invoice_id, 'invoice');
        }
        $invoice_tax_totals_for_preview = $this->calculate_document_totals($edit_invoice_meta['line_items'], $invoice_tax_profile_for_preview);
        $invoice_primary_tax_label = !empty($invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['primary_label']) ? $invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['primary_label'] : 'Tax';
        $invoice_primary_tax_rate = isset($invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['primary_rate']) && $invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['primary_rate'] !== '' ? (float) $invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['primary_rate'] : 0;
        $invoice_secondary_tax_label = !empty($invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['secondary_label']) ? $invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['secondary_label'] : '';
        $invoice_secondary_tax_rate = isset($invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['secondary_rate']) && $invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['secondary_rate'] !== '' ? (float) $invoice_tax_profile_for_preview['secondary_rate'] : 0;
        $invoice_currency_settings = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $invoice_currency_prefix = (isset($invoice_currency_settings['currency']) && $invoice_currency_settings['currency'] === 'USD') ? 'US$' : 'C$';

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Quotes</h3>
                <p>Build quotes with searchable preloaded parts, labour, travel, install, removal, templates, and custom items.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <?php if ($is_admin): ?>
                    <a class="dmx-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('post-new.php?post_type=dm_quote')); ?>">Add Quote in Admin</a>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
        </div>



        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title"><?php echo $edit_quote ? 'Edit Quote' : 'Create New Quote'; ?></h4>
            <form method="post" id="dmx-quote-builder-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="<?php echo $edit_quote ? 'update_quote' : 'create_quote'; ?>">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="quotes">
                <input type="hidden" name="quote_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote ? $edit_quote->ID : 0); ?>">

                <div class="dmx-quote-builder-tabs" data-dmx-quote-tabs>
                    <button type="button" class="dmx-quote-builder-tab is-active" data-dmx-quote-tab="overview">Overview</button>
                    <button type="button" class="dmx-quote-builder-tab" data-dmx-quote-tab="site_check">Site Check</button>
                    <button type="button" class="dmx-quote-builder-tab" data-dmx-quote-tab="attachments">Attachments</button>
                    <button type="button" class="dmx-quote-builder-tab" data-dmx-quote-tab="notes">Notes</button>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-quote-section is-active" data-dmx-quote-panel="overview">
                    <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                        <div>
                            <h5>Quote Overview</h5>
                            <p>Start with the main quote details, customer information, pricing setup, line items, and site-check verification.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Quote Number</label>
                            <input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote ? $edit_quote_meta['number'] : 'Auto-generated when saved'); ?>" readonly>
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Quote Title</label>
                            <input type="text" name="quote_title" required value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['title']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Customer</label>
                            <div class="dmx-work-order-part-lookup">
                                <input type="text" name="quote_customer" class="dmx-customer-search" data-customer-context="quote" autocomplete="off" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['customer']); ?>">
                                <div class="dmx-work-order-part-results"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Customer Email</label>
                            <input type="email" name="quote_customer_email" placeholder="customer@email.com" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['customer_email']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Sales / Team Member</label>
                            <input type="text" name="quote_salesperson_name" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['salesperson_name']); ?>" placeholder="Team member responsible for this quote">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Site Location / Install Address</label>
                        <textarea name="quote_site_location" rows="4" placeholder="Enter the job site, install address, bay number, door number, or location notes."><?php echo esc_textarea($edit_quote_meta['site_location']); ?></textarea>
                </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Amount</label>
                            <input type="text" name="quote_amount" id="dmx_quote_amount" placeholder="Auto-calculated from line items" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['amount']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Status</label>
                            <select name="quote_status">
                                <option value="draft" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['status'], 'draft'); ?>>Draft</option>
                                <option value="pending" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['status'], 'pending'); ?>>Pending</option>
                                <option value="open" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['status'], 'open'); ?>>Open</option>
                                <option value="complete" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['status'], 'complete'); ?>>Complete</option>
                                <option value="cancelled" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['status'], 'cancelled'); ?>>Cancelled</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Quick Add</label>
                            <select id="dmx_quote_add_type">
                                <option value="part">Parts</option>
                                <option value="labour">Labour</option>
                                <option value="travel">Travel</option>
                                <option value="equipment">Equipment</option>
                                <option value="install">Install</option>
                                <option value="removal">Removal</option>
                                <option value="custom">Custom Item</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Supplier Request Ref</label>
                            <input type="text" name="quote_supplier_request_ref" placeholder="SR-1001" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['supplier_ref']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Markup Percent</label>
                            <input type="text" name="quote_markup_percent" placeholder="20%" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['markup_percent']); ?>">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Job Description</label>
                        <textarea name="quote_job_description" placeholder="Describe the work being quoted."><?php echo esc_textarea($edit_quote_meta['job_description']); ?></textarea>
                </div>

                    <div class="dmx-field" style="margin-bottom:0;">
                        <label>Quote Line Items</label>
                        <div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-mobile-line-stack dmx-quote-mobile-stack">

                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-site-check-helper">
                        <div class="dmx-site-check-helper-grid">

                            <select name="site_check_status">
                                <option value="not_started" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['status'], 'not_started'); ?>>Not Started</option>
                                <option value="in_progress" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['status'], 'in_progress'); ?>>In Progress</option>
                                <option value="completed" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['status'], 'completed'); ?>>Completed</option>
                                <option value="review_needed" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['status'], 'review_needed'); ?>>Review Needed</option>

                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
