                            <input type="text" name="site_check_checked_by" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['checked_by']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Site Check Date</label>
                            <input type="date" name="site_check_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['date']); ?>">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Ready to Quote / Order</label>
                            <select name="site_check_ready_to_order">
                                <option value="no" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['ready_to_order'], 'no'); ?>>No</option>
                                <option value="yes" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['ready_to_order'], 'yes'); ?>>Yes</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Site Dimensions Verified</label>
                            <select name="site_check_dimensions_verified">
                                <option value="no" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['dimensions_verified'], 'no'); ?>>No</option>
                                <option value="yes" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['dimensions_verified'], 'yes'); ?>>Yes</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Framing and Clearances Confirmed</label>
                            <select name="site_check_framing_confirmed">
                                <option value="no" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['framing_confirmed'], 'no'); ?>>No</option>
                                <option value="yes" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['framing_confirmed'], 'yes'); ?>>Yes</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Opening Width</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_opening_width" placeholder="16' 0"" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['opening_width']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Opening Height</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_opening_height" placeholder="14' 0"" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['opening_height']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Backroom</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_backroom" placeholder="180"" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['backroom']); ?>">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Left Headroom</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_headroom_left" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['headroom_left']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Center Headroom</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_headroom_center" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['headroom_center']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Right Headroom</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_headroom_right" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['headroom_right']); ?>">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Lowest Headroom Point</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_headroom_lowest" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['headroom_lowest']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Left Sideroom</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_sideroom_left" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['sideroom_left']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Right Sideroom</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_sideroom_right" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['sideroom_right']); ?>">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Confirmed Door Width</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_confirmed_width" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['confirmed_width']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Confirmed Door Height</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_confirmed_height" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['confirmed_height']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Framing Suitable for Install</label>
                            <select name="site_check_framing_suitable">
                                <option value="no" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['framing_suitable'], 'no'); ?>>No</option>
                                <option value="yes" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['framing_suitable'], 'yes'); ?>>Yes</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Door Type Required</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_door_type_required" placeholder="Sectional, rolling steel, full-view" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['door_type_required']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Track Type Required</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_track_type_required" placeholder="Standard, high lift, vertical" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['track_type_required']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Lift Type Required</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_lift_type_required" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['lift_type_required']); ?>">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Obstructions Present</label>
                            <select name="site_check_obstructions_present">
                                <option value="no" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['obstructions_present'], 'no'); ?>>No</option>
                                <option value="yes" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['obstructions_present'], 'yes'); ?>>Yes</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Site Changes Needed</label>
                            <select name="site_check_changes_needed">
                                <option value="no" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['changes_needed'], 'no'); ?>>No</option>
                                <option value="yes" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['changes_needed'], 'yes'); ?>>Yes</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Issues Requiring Follow-Up</label>
                            <select name="site_check_follow_up_required">
                                <option value="no" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['follow_up_required'], 'no'); ?>>No</option>
                                <option value="yes" <?php selected($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['follow_up_required'], 'yes'); ?>>Yes</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Required Site Changes Before Install</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_required_changes" placeholder="Framing, electrical, obstruction removal, floor correction" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['required_changes']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Obstruction Notes</label>
                            <input type="text" name="site_check_obstruction_notes" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['obstruction_notes']); ?>">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Site Change Notes / Final Site Check Notes</label>
                        <textarea name="site_check_notes"><?php echo esc_textarea($edit_quote_meta['site_check']['notes']); ?></textarea>
                </div>

                    <div class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-bottom:12px;">Add opening, framing, obstruction, and problem-area photos here so office staff can confirm conditions before the door is ordered.</div>
                    <?php echo $this->render_document_photo_upload_field($edit_quote ? $edit_quote->ID : 0, 'quote_photos', 'Site Check Photos'); ?>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-quote-section" data-dmx-quote-panel="attachments">
                    <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                        <div>
                            <h5>Attachments</h5>
                            <p>Store supporting files such as AutoCAD drawings, PDFs, spec sheets, and other quote-related reference documents.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <?php echo $this->render_quote_documents_field($edit_quote ? $edit_quote->ID : 0); ?>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-quote-section" data-dmx-quote-panel="notes">
                    <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                        <div>
                            <h5>Quote Notes</h5>
                            <p>Add any extra internal or quote-level notes that should stay with this record.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field" style="margin-bottom:0;">
                        <label>Notes</label>
                        <textarea name="quote_notes"><?php echo esc_textarea($edit_quote_meta['notes']); ?></textarea>
                </div>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-quote-form-actions">
                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn"><?php echo $edit_quote ? 'Update Quote' : 'Save Quote'; ?></button>
                    <?php if ($edit_quote): ?>
                        <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=quotes') : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'quotes'), get_permalink())); ?>">Cancel Edit</a>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>

        <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
            var tabWrap = document.querySelector('[data-dmx-quote-tabs]');
            if (!tabWrap) {
                return;
            }
            var tabs = tabWrap.querySelectorAll('[data-dmx-quote-tab]');
            var panels = document.querySelectorAll('[data-dmx-quote-panel]');
            var activateTab = function(tabName){
                tabs.forEach(function(tab){
                    tab.classList.toggle('is-active', tab.getAttribute('data-dmx-quote-tab') === tabName);
                });
                panels.forEach(function(panel){
                    panel.classList.toggle('is-active', panel.getAttribute('data-dmx-quote-panel') === tabName);
                });
            };
            tabs.forEach(function(tab){
                tab.addEventListener('click', function(){
                    activateTab(tab.getAttribute('data-dmx-quote-tab'));
                });
            });
            var requestedQuoteTab = <?php echo wp_json_encode(isset($_GET['dmx_quote_section']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_quote_section'])) : ''); ?>;
            var defaultQuoteTab = requestedQuoteTab || 'overview';
            var hasDefaultQuoteTab = false;
            tabs.forEach(function(tab){
                if (tab.getAttribute('data-dmx-quote-tab') === defaultQuoteTab) {
                    hasDefaultQuoteTab = true;
                }
            });
            activateTab(hasDefaultQuoteTab ? defaultQuoteTab : 'overview');
        });
        </script>

        <datalist id="dmx_quote_part_list">
            <?php foreach ($quote_lookup_items as $lookup_item) : ?>
                <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($lookup_item['label']); ?>"></option>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
        </datalist>

        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Quote History</h4>        <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
            <table class="dmx-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Quote #</th>
                        <th>Quote</th>
                        <th>Customer</th>
                        <th>Status</th>
                        <th>Amount</th>
                        <th>Items</th>
                        <th>Supplier Ref</th>
                        <th>Markup %</th>
                        <th>Date</th>
                        <th>Opened</th>
                        <th>Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php if ($quotes): foreach ($quotes as $quote): ?>
                        <?php $line_items = get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_quote_line_items', true); ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('quote', $quote->ID)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($quote->post_title); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo $this->status_pill(get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_status', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_total', true) ?: get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_amount', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo is_array($line_items) ? intval(count($line_items)) : 0; ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_supplier_request_ref', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_markup_percent', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_the_date('', $quote)); ?></td>
                            <td>
                                <?php
                                $quote_view_count = (int) get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_quote_view_count', true);
                                $quote_last_open = get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_quote_last_opened_at', true);
                                ?>
                                <strong><?php echo esc_html($quote_view_count); ?> views</strong>
                                <div class="dmx-inline-note"><?php echo $quote_last_open ? esc_html('Last: ' . $quote_last_open) : 'Not opened yet'; ?></div>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="dmx-action-row" style="gap:8px;">
                                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(($is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=quotes&dmx_edit_quote=' . $quote->ID) : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'quotes', 'dmx_edit_quote' => $quote->ID), get_permalink()))); ?>">Edit</a>
                                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" target="_blank" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_document_view_url('quote', $quote->ID, true)); ?>">Preview</a>
                                    <form method="post" style="margin:0;">
                                        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="convert_quote_to_invoice">
                                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="quotes">
                                        <input type="hidden" name="quote_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($quote->ID); ?>">
                                        <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary">Convert</button>
                                    </form>
                                </div>
                                <form method="post" style="margin-top:8px;">
                                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="send_quote">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="quotes">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="document_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($quote->ID); ?>">
                                    <input type="email" name="document_email" placeholder="customer@email.com" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_customer_email', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:6px;">
                                    <input type="text" name="document_subject" placeholder="Email subject" value="<?php echo esc_attr('Quote ' . $this->get_document_number('quote', $quote->ID) . ': ' . $quote->post_title); ?>" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:6px;">
                                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Send Quote</button>
                                </form>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; else: ?>
                        <tr><td colspan="11"><div class="dmx-empty">No quotes found yet.</div></td></tr>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
        </div>

        <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            var partMap = <?php echo wp_json_encode($quote_lookup_items); ?>;
            var addBtn = document.getElementById('dmx_add_quote_row');
            var addType = document.getElementById('dmx_quote_add_type');
            var tableBody = document.querySelector('#dmx-quote-items-table tbody');
            var amountInput = document.getElementById('dmx_quote_amount');
            var sharedDatalist = document.getElementById('dmx_quote_part_list');
            var initialQuoteRows = <?php echo wp_json_encode(array_values(is_array($edit_quote_meta['line_items']) ? $edit_quote_meta['line_items'] : array())); ?>;
            var customers = <?php echo wp_json_encode(array_values($customer_lookup)); ?>;
            var quoteCustomerInput = document.querySelector('input[name="quote_customer"]');
            var quoteCustomerEmailInput = document.querySelector('input[name="quote_customer_email"]');
            var quoteSiteLocationInput = document.querySelector('textarea[name="quote_site_location"]');

            function getCustomerMatches(query) {
                var value = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();

                if (!value) {
                    return customers.slice(0, 10);
                }

                return customers.filter(function(customer) {
                    var haystack = [
                        customer.label || '',
                        customer.name || '',
                        customer.company || '',
                        customer.email || '',
                        customer.phone || '',
                        customer.address_summary || ''
                    ].join(' ').toLowerCase();

                    return haystack.indexOf(value) !== -1;
                }).slice(0, 12);
            }

            function closeCustomerLookupResults(lookupWrap) {
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }
                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (results) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                }
            }

            function fillQuoteCustomer(customer) {
                if (!customer) {
                    return;
                }

                if (quoteCustomerInput) {
                    quoteCustomerInput.value = customer.company || customer.name || customer.title || '';
                }

                if (quoteCustomerEmailInput && customer.email) {
                    quoteCustomerEmailInput.value = customer.email;
                }

                if (quoteSiteLocationInput && customer.address_summary && !String(quoteSiteLocationInput.value || '').trim()) {
                    quoteSiteLocationInput.value = customer.address_summary;
                }
            }

            function findExactCustomerMatch(value) {
                var needle = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                if (!needle) {
                    return null;
                }

                for (var i = 0; i < customers.length; i++) {
                    var customer = customers[i];
                    var fields = [customer.label, customer.name, customer.company, customer.email, customer.phone];
                    for (var j = 0; j < fields.length; j++) {
                        if (String(fields[j] || '').trim().toLowerCase() === needle) {
                            return customer;
                        }
                    }
                }

                return null;
            }

            function renderCustomerLookupResults(searchEl) {
                if (!searchEl) {
                    return;
                }

                var lookupWrap = searchEl.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup');
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }

                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (!results) {
                    return;
                }

                var matches = getCustomerMatches(searchEl.value);
                if (!matches.length) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                    return;
                }

                results.innerHTML = matches.map(function(customer) {
                    return '<button type="button" class="dmx-work-order-part-option" data-customer-id="' + escapeHtml(customer.id) + '">' +
                        '<strong>' + escapeHtml((customer.customer_number ? customer.customer_number + ' • ' : '') + (customer.company || customer.name || customer.title || '')) + '</strong>' +
                        '<span>' + escapeHtml(customer.name || '') + (customer.email ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.email) : '') + (customer.phone ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.phone) : '') + (customer.address_summary ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.address_summary) : '') + '</span>' +
                    '</button>';
                }).join('');

                results.classList.add('is-open');

                Array.prototype.slice.call(results.querySelectorAll('.dmx-work-order-part-option')).forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                    });
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        var selectedCustomer = null;
                        var targetId = String(btn.getAttribute('data-customer-id') || '');
                        customers.forEach(function(customer) {
                            if (String(customer.id || '') === targetId) {
                                selectedCustomer = customer;
                            }
                        });
                        if (selectedCustomer) {
                            fillQuoteCustomer(selectedCustomer);
                        }
                        closeCustomerLookupResults(lookupWrap);
                    });
                });
            }

            function bindQuoteCustomerLookup() {
                if (!quoteCustomerInput || quoteCustomerInput.dataset.bound === 'yes') {
                    return;
                }

                quoteCustomerInput.dataset.bound = 'yes';

                quoteCustomerInput.addEventListener('focus', function() {
                    renderCustomerLookupResults(quoteCustomerInput);
                });

                quoteCustomerInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    renderCustomerLookupResults(quoteCustomerInput);
                });

                quoteCustomerInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    var match = findExactCustomerMatch(quoteCustomerInput.value);
                    if (match) {
                        fillQuoteCustomer(match);
                    }
                });

                quoteCustomerInput.addEventListener('blur', function() {
                    window.setTimeout(function() {
                        closeCustomerLookupResults(quoteCustomerInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
                    }, 150);
                });
            }

            function money(val) {
                var num = parseFloat(val || 0);
                if (isNaN(num)) num = 0;
                return num.toFixed(2);
            }

            function normalizeInitialQuoteRows(rows) {
                if (Array.isArray(rows)) {
                    return rows;
                }
                if (rows && typeof rows === 'object') {
                    return Object.keys(rows).sort(function(a, b) {
                        return parseInt(a, 10) - parseInt(b, 10);
                    }).map(function(key) {
                        return rows[key];
                    });
                }
                return [];
            }

            function escapeHtml(str) {
                return String(str || '')
                    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
                    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
                    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
                    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
                    .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
            }

            function calculateTotals() {
                var grand = 0;
                tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(function(row) {
                    var qty = parseFloat(row.querySelector('.dmx-quote-qty').value || 0);
                    var price = parseFloat(row.querySelector('.dmx-quote-price').value || 0);
                    if (isNaN(qty)) qty = 0;
                    if (isNaN(price)) price = 0;
                    var total = qty * price;
                    row.querySelector('.dmx-quote-line-total').value = money(total);
                    grand += total;
                });
                if (!amountInput.dataset.manualOverride || amountInput.value.trim() === '') {
                    amountInput.value = money(grand);
                }
            }

            function getAllowedItems(type) {
                return partMap.filter(function(item) {
                    var itemType = item.quote_type || 'part';
                    if (type === 'custom') {
                        return false;
                    }
                    return itemType === type;
                });
            }

            function isMobileLookupMode() {
                return window.matchMedia('(max-width: 680px)').matches;
            }

            function buildDatalistForType(type, datalistId) {
                var datalist = document.getElementById(datalistId);
                if (!datalist) {
                    datalist = document.createElement('datalist');
                    datalist.id = datalistId;
                    document.body.appendChild(datalist);
                }
                var options = getAllowedItems(type).map(function(item) {
                    return '<option value="' + escapeHtml(item.label) + '"></option>';
                });
                datalist.innerHTML = options.join('');
            }

            function getQuoteLookupMatches(type, query) {
                var value = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                var items = getAllowedItems(type);

                if (!value) {
                    return items.slice(0, 10);
                }

                return items.filter(function(item) {
                    var haystack = [
                        item.label || '',
                        item.title || '',
                        item.description || '',
                        item.sku || ''
                    ].join(' ').toLowerCase();

                    return haystack.indexOf(value) !== -1;
                }).slice(0, 12);
            }

            function closeQuoteLookupResults(lookupWrap) {
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }
                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (results) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                }
            }

            function fillQuoteRowFromItem(tr, item) {
                if (!tr || !item) {
                    return;
                }

                var searchInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-search');
                var descInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-description');
                var partIdInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-part-id');
                var sourceTypeInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-source-type');
                var sourceIdInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-source-id');
                var taxableInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-taxable');
                var priceInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-price');

                if (searchInput) {
                    searchInput.value = item.label || item.title || '';
                }

                if (item.source_type === 'part') {
                    partIdInput.value = item.id || '';
                } else {
                    partIdInput.value = '';
                }

                sourceTypeInput.value = item.source_type || '';
                sourceIdInput.value = item.id || '';

                if (!descInput.value.trim()) {
                    descInput.value = item.title || item.label || '';
                }

                if (!priceInput.value.trim() && item.sell_price) {
                    priceInput.value = item.sell_price;
                }

                taxableInput.value = (item.taxable === 'no') ? 'no' : 'yes';
            }

            function renderQuoteLookupResults(searchInput, tr) {
                if (!searchInput || !tr || !isMobileLookupMode()) {
                    return;
                }

                var typeSelect = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-type');
                var selectedType = typeSelect ? (typeSelect.value || 'part') : 'part';
                if (selectedType === 'custom') {
                    closeQuoteLookupResults(searchInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
                    return;
                }

                var lookupWrap = searchInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup');
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }

                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (!results) {
                    return;
                }

                var matches = getQuoteLookupMatches(selectedType, searchInput.value);
                if (!matches.length) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                    return;
                }

                results.innerHTML = matches.map(function(item) {
                    return '<button type="button" class="dmx-work-order-part-option" data-part-id="' + escapeHtml(item.id) + '">' +
                        '<strong>' + escapeHtml(item.label || item.title || '') + '</strong>' +
                        '<span>' + escapeHtml(item.sku || '') + (item.description ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(item.description) : '') + '</span>' +
                    '</button>';
                }).join('');

                results.classList.add('is-open');

                Array.prototype.slice.call(results.querySelectorAll('.dmx-work-order-part-option')).forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                    });
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        var selectedItem = null;
                        var targetId = String(btn.getAttribute('data-part-id') || '');
                        getAllowedItems(selectedType).forEach(function(item) {
                            if (String(item.id || '') === targetId) {
                                selectedItem = item;
                            }
                        });
                        if (selectedItem) {
                            fillQuoteRowFromItem(tr, selectedItem);
                            calculateTotals();
                        }
                        closeQuoteLookupResults(lookupWrap);
                    });
                });
            }

            function getPlaceholderByType(type) {
                if (type === 'part') return 'Search preloaded part';
                if (type === 'labour') return 'Search labour item';
                if (type === 'travel') return 'Search travel item';
                if (type === 'equipment') return 'Search equipment item';
                if (type === 'install') return 'Search install item';
                if (type === 'removal') return 'Search removal item';
                return 'Type custom item';
            }

            function resetLookupFields(tr) {
                tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-part-id').value = '';
                tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-source-type').value = '';
                tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-source-id').value = '';
            }

            function refreshRowLookup(tr) {
                var typeSelect = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-type');
                var searchInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-search');
                var rowIndex = tr.getAttribute('data-row-index');
                var datalistId = 'dmx_quote_lookup_' + rowIndex;
                var type = typeSelect.value || 'part';

                if (type === 'custom' || isMobileLookupMode()) {
                    searchInput.removeAttribute('list');
                } else {
                    buildDatalistForType(type, datalistId);
                    searchInput.setAttribute('list', datalistId);
                }

                searchInput.setAttribute('placeholder', getPlaceholderByType(type));
                searchInput.value = '';
                resetLookupFields(tr);
                closeQuoteLookupResults(searchInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
            }

            function findMatchingItemByType(type, value) {
                var allowedItems = getAllowedItems(type);
                var found = null;
                allowedItems.forEach(function(item) {
                    if (item.label === value) {
                        found = item;
                    }
                });
                return found;
            }

            function applyQuoteLookupValue(tr, selectedType, value) {
                var descInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-description');
                var taxableInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-taxable');
                var found = findMatchingItemByType(selectedType, value);

                if (found) {
                    fillQuoteRowFromItem(tr, found);
                } else {
                    resetLookupFields(tr);
                    taxableInput.value = 'yes';
                    if (!descInput.value.trim()) {
                        descInput.value = value;
                    }
                }

                calculateTotals();
            }

            var canSeeTrueCosts = <?php echo $this->current_user_can_view_reports() ? 'true' : 'false'; ?>;

            function makeRow(type, index, rowData) {
                var tr = document.createElement('tr');
                tr.setAttribute('data-row-index', index);
                tr.innerHTML = ''
                    + '<td data-label="Type">'
                    + '<input type="hidden" class="dmx-quote-part-id" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][part_id]" value="">'
                    + '<input type="hidden" class="dmx-quote-source-type" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][source_type]" value="">'
                    + '<input type="hidden" class="dmx-quote-source-id" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][source_id]" value="">'
                    + '<input type="hidden" class="dmx-quote-taxable" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][taxable]" value="yes">'
                    + '<select name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][type]" class="dmx-quote-type">'
                    + '<option value="part"' + (type === 'part' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Part</option>'
                    + '<option value="labour"' + (type === 'labour' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Labour</option>'
                    + '<option value="travel"' + (type === 'travel' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Travel</option>'
                    + '<option value="equipment"' + (type === 'equipment' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Equipment</option>'
                    + '<option value="install"' + (type === 'install' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Install</option>'
                    + '<option value="removal"' + (type === 'removal' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Removal</option>'
                    + '<option value="custom"' + (type === 'custom' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Custom</option>'
                    + '</select>'
                    + '</td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Item / Service / Equipment"><div class="dmx-work-order-part-lookup"><input type="text" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][search]" class="dmx-quote-search" placeholder="" autocomplete="off"><div class="dmx-work-order-part-results"></div></div></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Description"><input type="text" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][description]" class="dmx-quote-description" placeholder="Description"></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Qty"><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][qty]" class="dmx-quote-qty" value="1"></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Unit Price"><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][unit_price]" class="dmx-quote-price" value=""></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Line Total"><input type="text" class="dmx-quote-line-total" value="0.00" readonly></td>'
                    + (canSeeTrueCosts ? '<td data-label="True Unit Cost"><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][true_unit_cost]" class="dmx-quote-true-cost" value=""></td>' : '')
                    + '<td data-label="Save Company Price" style="text-align:left;"><input type="checkbox" name="quote_line_items[' + index + '][update_default]" value="yes" class="dmx-quote-update-default"></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Remove"><button type="button" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary dmx-remove-quote-row">Remove Row</button></td>';

                tableBody.appendChild(tr);

                var searchInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-search');
                var descInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-description');
                var partIdInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-part-id');
                var sourceTypeInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-source-type');
                var sourceIdInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-source-id');
                var taxableInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-taxable');
                var priceInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-price');
                var trueCostInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-true-cost');
                var qtyInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-qty');
                var typeSelect = tr.querySelector('.dmx-quote-type');

                refreshRowLookup(tr);

                if (rowData) {
                    if (rowData.type) {
                        typeSelect.value = rowData.type;
                        refreshRowLookup(tr);
                    }
                    searchInput.value = rowData.search || '';
                    descInput.value = rowData.description || '';
                    qtyInput.value = rowData.qty || '1';
                    priceInput.value = rowData.unit_price || '';
                    if (trueCostInput) { trueCostInput.value = rowData.true_unit_cost || ''; }
                    partIdInput.value = rowData.part_id || '';
                    sourceTypeInput.value = rowData.source_type || '';
                    sourceIdInput.value = rowData.source_id || '';
                    taxableInput.value = rowData.taxable || 'yes';
                }

                searchInput.addEventListener('focus', function() {
                    if (isMobileLookupMode()) {
                        renderQuoteLookupResults(searchInput, tr);
                    }
                });

                searchInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    resetLookupFields(tr);
                    taxableInput.value = 'yes';
                    if (isMobileLookupMode()) {
                        renderQuoteLookupResults(searchInput, tr);
                    }
                });

                searchInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    var value = searchInput.value.trim();
                    var selectedType = typeSelect.value || 'custom';
                    applyQuoteLookupValue(tr, selectedType, value);
                });

                searchInput.addEventListener('blur', function() {
                    window.setTimeout(function() {
                        closeQuoteLookupResults(searchInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
                    }, 150);
                });

                qtyInput.addEventListener('input', calculateTotals);
                priceInput.addEventListener('input', calculateTotals);
                typeSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    refreshRowLookup(tr);
                    if (typeSelect.value !== 'part') {
                        partIdInput.value = '';
                    }
                    calculateTotals();
                });

                tr.querySelector('.dmx-remove-quote-row').addEventListener('click', function() {
                    tr.remove();
                    calculateTotals();
                });

                calculateTotals();
            }

            function addRow(e) {
                if (e) e.preventDefault();
                makeRow(addType.value || 'part', tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr').length);
            }

            addBtn.addEventListener('click', addRow);
            bindQuoteCustomerLookup();
            amountInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                amountInput.dataset.manualOverride = amountInput.value.trim() !== '' ? '1' : '';
            });

            if (sharedDatalist) {
                sharedDatalist.parentNode.removeChild(sharedDatalist);
            }

            initialQuoteRows = normalizeInitialQuoteRows(initialQuoteRows);

            if (initialQuoteRows.length) {
                initialQuoteRows.forEach(function(rowData, idx) {
                    makeRow((rowData && rowData.type) ? rowData.type : (addType.value || 'part'), idx, rowData);
                });
                calculateTotals();
            } else {
                addRow();
            }
        });
        </script>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_supplier_requests_tab($is_admin = false) {
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $subcontractors = $this->get_company_users($company_key, array(self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE));

                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Vendor / Supplier</label><input type="text" name="generic_po_vendor" required placeholder="Vendor, supplier, rental company, service provider"></div>

' - ' . $work_order->post_title); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>

                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Tax</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="generic_po_tax" placeholder="0.00"></div>

                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Status</label><select name="generic_po_status"><option value="draft">Draft</option><option value="issued">Issued</option><option value="ordered">Ordered</option><option value="received">Received</option><option value="cancelled">Cancelled</option></select></div>

        </div>

        <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-bottom:18px;">

                        </tr>

                    <?php endif; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_supplier_requests_for_current_user($limit = 50) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_supplier_requests()) {
            return array();
        }

        $args = array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_supplier_request',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => $limit,
            'orderby' => 'date',
            'order' => 'DESC',
        );

        if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::MANAGER_ROLE)) {
            $args['author'] = get_current_user_id();
        }

        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_supplier_request');
        return get_posts($args);
    }

    private function get_supplier_request_created_by_name($request_id) {
        $request_id = absint($request_id);
        $requested_by = absint(get_post_meta($request_id, '_dmx_requested_by_user_id', true));
        if ($requested_by <= 0) {
            $post = get_post($request_id);
            $requested_by = $post ? absint($post->post_author) : 0;
        }

        if ($requested_by > 0) {
            $user = get_userdata($requested_by);
            if ($user) {
                return $user->display_name;
            }
        }

        return '—';
    }

    private function render_sales_supplier_requests_tab($is_admin = false) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_supplier_requests()) {
            return '<div class="dmx-empty">You do not have access to supplier quote requests.</div>';
        }

        $requests = $this->get_supplier_requests_for_current_user(50);
        $customer_lookup = $this->get_customers_for_lookup();
        $lift_options = $this->get_supplier_door_lift_type_options();
        $door_type_options = $this->get_supplier_door_type_options();
        $track_size_options = $this->get_supplier_track_size_options();
        $roof_pitch_options = $this->get_supplier_roof_pitch_options();
        $spring_cycle_options = $this->get_supplier_spring_cycle_options();
        $powder_track_options = $this->get_supplier_powder_coated_track_options();
        $roller_type_options = $this->get_supplier_roller_type_options();
        $window_options = $this->get_supplier_window_type_options();
        $window_pattern_options = $this->get_supplier_window_frame_pattern_options();
        $weatherstrip_options = $this->get_supplier_weatherstrip_options();
        $weatherstrip_color_options = $this->get_supplier_weatherstrip_color_options();
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Supplier Requests</h3>
                <p>Sales reps can create supplier pricing requests. Managers can see all requests; each sales rep only sees the requests they created.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <?php if ($is_admin): ?><a class="dmx-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('post-new.php?post_type=dm_supplier_request')); ?>">Add Supplier Request in Admin</a><?php endif; ?>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
            <table class="dmx-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr><th>Request</th><th>Supplier</th><th>Door Details</th><th>Requested By</th><th>Created</th></tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php if ($requests): foreach ($requests as $request): ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($request->post_title); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($request->ID, '_dmx_supplier_name', true)); ?><br><span style="color:#61738b;"><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($request->ID, '_dmx_supplier_email', true)); ?></span></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_supplier_request_door_summary($request->ID)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_supplier_request_created_by_name($request->ID)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_the_date('M j, Y', $request)); ?></td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; else: ?>
                        <tr><td colspan="5"><div class="dmx-empty">No supplier quote requests found yet.</div></td></tr>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Create Supplier Quote Request</h4>
            <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Send the supplier the door details they need to price custom doors. Internal customer pricing, markup, and sell price are handled later on the customer quote.</p>
            <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_supplier_request">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="supplier_requests">
                <input type="hidden" name="supplier_status" value="requested">

                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Request Title</label><input type="text" name="supplier_request_title" required placeholder="Custom Black Ribbed Door - Airdrie Shop"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Supplier Name</label><input type="text" name="supplier_name" placeholder="Supplier company name"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Supplier Contact Email</label><input type="email" name="supplier_email" placeholder="supplier@example.com"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin:18px 0;background:#f8fbff;">
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-top:0;">Doors / Openings</h4>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Use quantity when multiple doors are exactly the same. Add another door when the next opening has different specs.</p>
                    <div id="dmxSupplierDoorList" class="dmx-supplier-door-list"></div>
                    <button type="button" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" id="dmxAddSupplierDoor">Add Another Door</button>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-field"><label>General Notes / Specs for Supplier</label><textarea name="supplier_notes" placeholder="Delivery requirements, supplier questions, wind load notes, special ordering instructions, quote deadline, etc."></textarea></div>
                <label style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;margin:12px 0 18px;font-weight:700;color:#102844;">
                    <input type="checkbox" name="supplier_send_email" value="1" style="margin-top:3px;">
                    Email this quote request to the supplier now
                </label>
                <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:-10px;">When emailed, the supplier reply-to will use the logged-in sales rep email.</p>
                <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Supplier Request</button>
            </form>
        </div>

        <template id="dmxSupplierDoorTemplate">
            <div class="dmx-card dmx-supplier-door-card" style="margin-bottom:14px;background:#fff;">
                <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px;">
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin:0;">Door <span class="dmx-supplier-door-number"></span></h4>
                    <button type="button" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary dmx-remove-supplier-door">Remove Door</button>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Door / Opening Label</label><input type="text" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][label]" placeholder="Bay 3, Front shop door, Door A"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Quantity</label><input type="number" min="1" step="1" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][quantity]" value="1"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Door Type</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][door_type]"><?php foreach ($door_type_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>

                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Width</label><input type="text" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][width]" placeholder="16'0&quot; or 192 in"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Height</label><input type="text" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][height]" placeholder="14'0&quot; or 168 in"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>R-Value</label><input type="text" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][r_value]" placeholder="R-12, R-16, R-18.4, non-insulated"></div>

                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Make / Manufacturer</label><input type="text" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][make]" placeholder="Steel-Craft, Garaga, Richards-Wilcox, etc."></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Model / Series</label><input type="text" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][model]" placeholder="Thermocraft, H-Tech, 138, full view, etc."></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Track Size</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][track_size]"><?php foreach ($track_size_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>

                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Door Color</label><input type="text" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][color]" placeholder="White, black, sandstone, custom colour"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Weatherstrip Color</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][weatherstrip_color]"><?php foreach ($weatherstrip_color_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Weatherstripping</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][weatherstrip]"><?php foreach ($weatherstrip_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>

                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Lift / Track Type</label><select class="dmx-supplier-lift-type" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][lift_type]"><?php foreach ($lift_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field dmx-high-lift-amount-field" style="display:none;"><label>High Lift Amount</label><input type="text" name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][high_lift_amount]" placeholder="Example: 54 in, 72 in, 8 ft"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field dmx-roof-pitch-field" style="display:none;"><label>Roof Pitch</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][roof_pitch]"><option value="">Select roof pitch</option><?php foreach ($roof_pitch_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>

                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Spring Cycle Option</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][spring_cycle]"><?php foreach ($spring_cycle_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Powder Coated Tracks</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][powder_coated_track]"><?php foreach ($powder_track_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Roller Type</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][roller_type]"><?php foreach ($roller_type_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>

                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Window / Glass Type</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][window_type]"><?php foreach ($window_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Window Frame Pattern</label><select name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][window_pattern]"><?php foreach ($window_pattern_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Door Notes</label><textarea name="supplier_doors[__INDEX__][notes]" placeholder="Window row location, track radius, low-headroom details, jamb condition, wind load, hardware/prep details, etc."></textarea></div>
            </div>
        </template>

        <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            var doorList = document.getElementById('dmxSupplierDoorList');
            var doorTemplate = document.getElementById('dmxSupplierDoorTemplate');
            var addDoorButton = document.getElementById('dmxAddSupplierDoor');
            var doorIndex = 0;

            function toggleLiftRelatedFields(card) {
                if (!card) return;
                var liftSelect = card.querySelector('.dmx-supplier-lift-type');
                var highLiftField = card.querySelector('.dmx-high-lift-amount-field');
                var roofPitchField = card.querySelector('.dmx-roof-pitch-field');
                if (!liftSelect) return;

                var showHighLift = liftSelect.value === 'high_lift';
                if (highLiftField) {
                    highLiftField.style.display = showHighLift ? '' : 'none';
                    var highLiftInput = highLiftField.querySelector('input');
                    if (highLiftInput && !showHighLift) {
                        highLiftInput.value = '';
                    }
                }

                var showRoofPitch = liftSelect.value === 'follow_roofline';
                if (roofPitchField) {
                    roofPitchField.style.display = showRoofPitch ? '' : 'none';
                    var roofPitchSelect = roofPitchField.querySelector('select');
                    if (roofPitchSelect && !showRoofPitch) {
                        roofPitchSelect.value = '';
                    }
                }
            }

            function renumberDoors() {
                if (!doorList) return;
                Array.prototype.slice.call(doorList.querySelectorAll('.dmx-supplier-door-card')).forEach(function(card, index) {
                    var number = card.querySelector('.dmx-supplier-door-number');
                    if (number) number.textContent = String(index + 1);
                    var remove = card.querySelector('.dmx-remove-supplier-door');
                    if (remove) remove.style.display = doorList.querySelectorAll('.dmx-supplier-door-card').length > 1 ? '' : 'none';
                    toggleLiftRelatedFields(card);
                });
            }

            function addSupplierDoor() {
                if (!doorList || !doorTemplate) return;
                var html = doorTemplate.innerHTML.replace(/__INDEX__/g, String(doorIndex++));
                var wrap = document.createElement('div');
                wrap.innerHTML = html;
                var card = wrap.firstElementChild;
                doorList.appendChild(card);
                toggleLiftRelatedFields(card);
                renumberDoors();
            }

            if (addDoorButton) {
                addDoorButton.addEventListener('click', addSupplierDoor);
            }

            if (doorList) {
                doorList.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
                    var remove = event.target.closest('.dmx-remove-supplier-door');
                    if (!remove) return;
                    var cards = doorList.querySelectorAll('.dmx-supplier-door-card');
                    if (cards.length <= 1) return;
                    var card = remove.closest('.dmx-supplier-door-card');
                    if (card) card.remove();
                    renumberDoors();
                });

                doorList.addEventListener('change', function(event) {
                    if (event.target && event.target.classList.contains('dmx-supplier-lift-type')) {
                        toggleLiftRelatedFields(event.target.closest('.dmx-supplier-door-card'));
                    }
                });

                addSupplierDoor();
            }
        });
        </script>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }


    private function render_receptionist_invoices_tab($is_admin = false) {
        $invoices = $this->get_posts_for_user('dm_invoice', 100);
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Invoices</h3>
                <p>Look up customer invoices, check payment status, and open invoice previews for front desk or phone payments.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'payments'))); ?>">Open Payments</a>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Company Invoices</h4>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                <table class="dmx-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Invoice #</th>
                            <th>Invoice</th>
                            <th>Customer</th>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <th>Total</th>
                            <th>Preview</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <?php if ($invoices) : foreach ($invoices as $invoice) : ?>
                            <?php
                            $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true);
                            if ($amount === '') {
                                $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_amount', true);
                            }
                            ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('invoice', $invoice->ID)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($invoice->post_title); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo $this->status_pill(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($amount)); ?></td>
                                <td><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" target="_blank" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_document_view_url('invoice', $invoice->ID, true)); ?>">Preview</a></td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; else : ?>
                            <tr><td colspan="6"><div class="dmx-empty">No invoices found yet.</div></td></tr>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_invoices_tab($is_admin = false) {
        if ($this->current_user_is_receptionist() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return $this->render_receptionist_invoices_tab($is_admin);
        }

        $invoices = $this->get_posts_for_user('dm_invoice', 50);
        $parts = $this->get_parts_for_quote_builder();
        $saved_items = $this->get_saved_items_for_quote_builder();
        $invoice_lookup_items = array_merge($parts, $saved_items);
        $customer_lookup = $this->get_customers_for_lookup();

        $edit_invoice_id = absint($_GET['dmx_edit_invoice'] ?? 0);
        $edit_invoice = null;
        $edit_invoice_meta = array(
            'number' => '',
            'title' => '',
            'customer' => '',
            'customer_email' => '',
            'site_location' => '',
            'amount' => '',
            'status' => 'draft',
            'notes' => '',
            'job_description' => '',
            'salesperson_name' => $this->get_current_team_member_name(),
            'tax_profile' => array(),
            'line_items' => array(),
            'source_quote_id' => 0,
            'source_work_order_id' => 0,
            'payment_method' => '',
            'payment_reference' => '',
            'paid_amount' => '',
            'work_order_actual_hours' => '',
            'work_order_completed_at' => '',
            'work_order_completion_notes' => '',
        );

        if ($edit_invoice_id > 0 && get_post_type($edit_invoice_id) === 'dm_invoice' && $this->current_user_can_access_invoice($edit_invoice_id)) {
            $edit_invoice = get_post($edit_invoice_id);
            if ($edit_invoice) {
                $edit_invoice_meta['number'] = $this->get_document_number('invoice', $edit_invoice_id);
                $edit_invoice_meta['title'] = $edit_invoice->post_title;
                $edit_invoice_meta['customer'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
                $edit_invoice_meta['customer_email'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_customer_email', true);
                $edit_invoice_meta['site_location'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_site_location', true);
                $edit_invoice_meta['amount'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_total', true) ?: get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_amount', true);
                $edit_invoice_meta['status'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_status', true) ?: 'draft';
                $edit_invoice_meta['notes'] = $edit_invoice->post_content;
                $edit_invoice_meta['job_description'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_job_description', true);
                $edit_invoice_meta['salesperson_name'] = $this->get_document_salesperson_name($edit_invoice_id);
                $edit_invoice_meta['tax_profile'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_tax_profile', true);
                $edit_invoice_meta['line_items'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_line_items', true);
                $edit_invoice_meta['source_quote_id'] = absint(get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_source_quote_id', true));
                $edit_invoice_meta['source_work_order_id'] = absint(get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', true));
                $edit_invoice_meta['payment_method'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_method', true);
                $edit_invoice_meta['payment_reference'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_payment_reference', true);
                $edit_invoice_meta['paid_amount'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_id, '_dmx_paid_amount', true);
                if ($edit_invoice_meta['source_work_order_id'] > 0) {
                    $edit_invoice_meta['work_order_actual_hours'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_meta['source_work_order_id'], '_dmx_work_order_actual_hours', true);
                    $edit_invoice_meta['work_order_completed_at'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_meta['source_work_order_id'], '_dmx_work_order_completed_at', true);
                    $edit_invoice_meta['work_order_completion_notes'] = get_post_meta($edit_invoice_meta['source_work_order_id'], '_dmx_work_order_completion_notes', true);
                }
                if (!is_array($edit_invoice_meta['tax_profile'])) {
                    $edit_invoice_meta['tax_profile'] = array();
                }
                if (!is_array($edit_invoice_meta['line_items'])) {
                    $edit_invoice_meta['line_items'] = array();
                }
            }
        }

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Invoices</h3>
                <p>Build invoices directly with searchable preloaded parts, labour, travel, install, removal, templates, and custom items.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <?php if ($is_admin): ?>
                    <a class="dmx-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('post-new.php?post_type=dm_invoice')); ?>">Add Invoice in Admin</a>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title"><?php echo $edit_invoice ? 'Edit Invoice' : 'Create New Invoice'; ?></h4>
            <form method="post" id="dmx-invoice-builder-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="<?php echo $edit_invoice ? 'update_invoice' : 'create_invoice'; ?>">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="invoices">
                <input type="hidden" name="invoice_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice ? $edit_invoice->ID : 0); ?>">
                <input type="hidden" name="invoice_source_quote_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['source_quote_id']); ?>">
                <input type="hidden" name="invoice_source_work_order_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['source_work_order_id']); ?>">

                <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Invoice Number</label>
                        <input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice ? $edit_invoice_meta['number'] : 'Auto-generated when saved'); ?>" readonly>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Invoice Title</label>
                        <input type="text" name="invoice_title" required value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['title']); ?>">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Customer</label>
                        <div class="dmx-work-order-part-lookup">
                            <input type="text" name="invoice_customer" class="dmx-customer-search" data-customer-context="invoice" autocomplete="off" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['customer']); ?>">
                            <div class="dmx-work-order-part-results"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Customer Email</label>
                        <input type="email" name="invoice_customer_email" placeholder="customer@email.com" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['customer_email']); ?>">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Sales / Team Member</label>
                        <input type="text" name="invoice_salesperson_name" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['salesperson_name']); ?>" placeholder="Team member responsible for this invoice">                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Site Location / Install Address</label>
                    <textarea name="invoice_site_location" rows="4" placeholder="Enter the job site, install address, bay number, door number, or location notes."><?php echo esc_textarea($edit_invoice_meta['site_location']); ?></textarea>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Amount</label>
                        <input type="text" name="invoice_amount" id="dmx_invoice_amount" placeholder="Auto-calculated from line items" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['amount']); ?>">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Status</label>
                        <select name="invoice_status">
                            <option value="draft" <?php selected($edit_invoice_meta['status'], 'draft'); ?>>Draft</option>
                            <option value="pending" <?php selected($edit_invoice_meta['status'], 'pending'); ?>>Pending</option>
                            <option value="paid" <?php selected($edit_invoice_meta['status'], 'paid'); ?>>Paid</option>
                            <option value="cancelled" <?php selected($edit_invoice_meta['status'], 'cancelled'); ?>>Cancelled</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Quick Add</label>
                        <select id="dmx_invoice_add_type">
                            <option value="part">Parts</option>
                            <option value="labour">Labour</option>
                            <option value="travel">Travel</option>
                            <option value="install">Install</option>
                            <option value="removal">Removal</option>
                            <option value="custom">Custom Item</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Job Description</label>
                    <textarea name="invoice_job_description" placeholder="Describe the work being invoiced."><?php echo esc_textarea($edit_invoice_meta['job_description']); ?></textarea>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Invoice Line Items</label>
                    <div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-mobile-line-stack dmx-invoice-mobile-stack">
                        <table class="dmx-table" id="dmx-invoice-items-table">

                                <tr>
                                    <th style="min-width:120px;">Type</th>
                                    <th style="min-width:220px;">Item / Service / Equipment</th>
                                    <th>Description</th>
                                    <th style="min-width:90px;">Qty</th>
