                                    <th style="min-width:120px;">Line Total</th>
                                    <?php if ($this->current_user_can_view_reports()) : ?><th style="min-width:130px;">True Unit Cost</th><?php endif; ?>
                                    <th style="min-width:120px;">Save Company Price</th>
                                    <th style="min-width:90px;">Remove</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody></tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-mini-links" style="margin-top:10px;">
                        <a href="#" id="dmx_add_invoice_row">Add Row</a>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-invoice-totals-card" id="dmx_invoice_totals_card">
                        <div class="dmx-invoice-totals-box">
                            <div class="dmx-invoice-total-row">
                                <span>Subtotal</span>
                                <strong id="dmx_invoice_subtotal_display"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($invoice_tax_totals_for_preview['subtotal'])); ?></strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="dmx-invoice-total-row" id="dmx_invoice_primary_tax_row" style="<?php echo $invoice_primary_tax_rate > 0 ? '' : 'display:none;'; ?>">
                                <span id="dmx_invoice_primary_tax_label"><?php echo esc_html($invoice_primary_tax_label); ?></span>
                                <strong id="dmx_invoice_primary_tax_display"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($invoice_tax_totals_for_preview['primary_tax'])); ?></strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="dmx-invoice-total-row" id="dmx_invoice_secondary_tax_row" style="<?php echo $invoice_secondary_tax_rate > 0 ? '' : 'display:none;'; ?>">
                                <span id="dmx_invoice_secondary_tax_label"><?php echo esc_html($invoice_secondary_tax_label); ?></span>
                                <strong id="dmx_invoice_secondary_tax_display"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($invoice_tax_totals_for_preview['secondary_tax'])); ?></strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="dmx-invoice-total-row">
                                <span>Total Tax</span>
                                <strong id="dmx_invoice_tax_total_display"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($invoice_tax_totals_for_preview['tax_total'])); ?></strong>
                            </div>
                            <div class="dmx-invoice-total-row is-grand">
                                <span>Total Due</span>
                                <strong id="dmx_invoice_grand_total_display"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($invoice_tax_totals_for_preview['grand_total'])); ?></strong>
                            </div>
                            <p class="dmx-invoice-total-note">This is the customer total the technician should collect or mark as still needing payment.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <?php if (!empty($edit_invoice_meta['source_work_order_id'])) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px; background:#f8fbff; border-color:#bdd7ef;">
                        <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Work Order Completion</h4>
                        <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">This invoice came from a work order. Add final parts/labour above, then log the actual job time here for technician efficiency reports.</p>
                        <div class="dmx-form-grid-2">
                            <div class="dmx-field">
                                <label>Completion Date</label>
                                <input type="date" name="invoice_work_order_completion_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['work_order_completed_at'] ?: current_time('Y-m-d')); ?>">
                            </div>
                            <div class="dmx-field">
                                <label>Actual Time to Complete (hours)</label>
                                <input type="number" step="0.25" min="0" name="invoice_work_order_actual_hours" placeholder="Example: 2.0" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['work_order_actual_hours']); ?>">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Completion Notes</label>
                            <textarea name="invoice_work_order_completion_notes" rows="3" placeholder="Final technician notes, what was completed, and anything the office should know."><?php echo esc_textarea($edit_invoice_meta['work_order_completion_notes']); ?></textarea>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>

                <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px; background:#fff;">
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Payment / Collection</h4>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Set the payment status here when payment is collected. Use Partial payment / Deposit collected when a deposit is taken and a balance remains outstanding.</p>
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-2">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Payment Status</label>
                            <select name="invoice_payment_status_helper" onchange="var s=this.form.querySelector('select[name=invoice_status]'); if(s){s.value=this.value;}">
                                <option value="pending" <?php selected($edit_invoice_meta['status'], 'pending'); ?>>Needs payment collection</option>
                                <option value="partial" <?php selected($edit_invoice_meta['status'], 'partial'); ?>>Partial payment / Deposit collected</option>
                                <option value="paid" <?php selected($edit_invoice_meta['status'], 'paid'); ?>>Paid / Collected</option>
                                <option value="draft" <?php selected($edit_invoice_meta['status'], 'draft'); ?>>Draft / not ready</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Payment Method</label>
                            <select name="invoice_payment_method">
                                <option value="">Select payment method</option>
                                <?php foreach ($this->get_enabled_sales_payment_method_labels() as $method_key => $method_label) : ?>
                                    <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($method_key); ?>" <?php selected($edit_invoice_meta['payment_method'], $method_key); ?>><?php echo esc_html($method_label); ?></option>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Amount Collected / Deposit</label>
                            <input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="invoice_paid_amount" placeholder="Deposit or full payment amount" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['paid_amount']); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Payment Reference / Notes</label>
                            <input type="text" name="invoice_payment_reference" placeholder="Receipt, transaction, e-transfer, cash note" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_invoice_meta['payment_reference']); ?>">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <?php echo $this->render_document_photo_upload_field($edit_invoice ? $edit_invoice->ID : 0, 'invoice_photos', 'Invoice Photos'); ?>

                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Notes</label>
                    <textarea name="invoice_notes"><?php echo esc_textarea($edit_invoice_meta['notes']); ?></textarea>
                </div>

                <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn"><?php echo $edit_invoice ? 'Update Invoice' : 'Save Invoice'; ?></button>
                <?php if ($edit_invoice): ?>
                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=invoices') : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'invoices'), get_permalink())); ?>" style="margin-left:8px;">Cancel Edit</a>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </form>
        </div>


        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Invoice History</h4>
        <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
            <table class="dmx-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Invoice #</th>
                        <th>Invoice</th>
                        <th>Customer</th>
                        <th>Status</th>
                        <th>Amount</th>
                        <th>Items</th>
                        <th>Source Quote</th>
                        <th>Date</th>
                        <th>Opened</th>
                        <th>Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php if ($invoices): foreach ($invoices as $invoice): ?>
                        <?php $line_items = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_invoice_line_items', true); ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('invoice', $invoice->ID)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($invoice->post_title); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo $this->status_pill(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true) ?: get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_amount', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo is_array($line_items) ? intval(count($line_items)) : 0; ?></td>
                            <td><?php $source_quote_id = absint(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_source_quote_id', true)); echo $source_quote_id > 0 ? esc_html(get_the_title($source_quote_id)) : ''; ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_the_date('', $invoice)); ?></td>
                            <td>
                                <?php
                                $invoice_view_count = (int) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_invoice_view_count', true);
                                $invoice_last_open = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_invoice_last_opened_at', true);
                                ?>
                                <strong><?php echo esc_html($invoice_view_count); ?> views</strong>
                                <div class="dmx-inline-note"><?php echo $invoice_last_open ? esc_html('Last: ' . $invoice_last_open) : 'Not opened yet'; ?></div>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <div class="dmx-action-row" style="gap:8px;">
                                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(($is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=invoices&dmx_edit_invoice=' . $invoice->ID) : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'invoices', 'dmx_edit_invoice' => $invoice->ID), get_permalink()))); ?>">Edit</a>
                                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" target="_blank" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_document_view_url('invoice', $invoice->ID, true)); ?>">Preview</a>
                                </div>
                                <form method="post" style="margin-top:8px;">
                                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="send_invoice">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="invoices">
                                    <input type="hidden" name="document_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($invoice->ID); ?>">
                                    <input type="email" name="document_email" placeholder="customer@email.com" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_email', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:6px;">
                                    <input type="text" name="document_subject" placeholder="Email subject" value="<?php echo esc_attr('Invoice ' . $this->get_document_number('invoice', $invoice->ID) . ': ' . $invoice->post_title); ?>" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:6px;">
                                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Send Invoice</button>
                                </form>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; else: ?>
                        <tr><td colspan="10"><div class="dmx-empty">No invoices found yet.</div></td></tr>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        </div>

        <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            var partMap = <?php echo wp_json_encode($invoice_lookup_items); ?>;
            var addBtn = document.getElementById('dmx_add_invoice_row');
            var addType = document.getElementById('dmx_invoice_add_type');
            var tableBody = document.querySelector('#dmx-invoice-items-table tbody');
            var amountInput = document.getElementById('dmx_invoice_amount');
            var invoiceCurrencyPrefix = <?php echo wp_json_encode($invoice_currency_prefix); ?>;
            var invoiceTaxProfile = <?php echo wp_json_encode(array(
                'primary_label' => $invoice_primary_tax_label,
                'primary_rate' => $invoice_primary_tax_rate,
                'secondary_label' => $invoice_secondary_tax_label,
                'secondary_rate' => $invoice_secondary_tax_rate,
            )); ?>;
            var initialInvoiceRows = <?php echo wp_json_encode($edit_invoice_meta['line_items']); ?>;
            var customers = <?php echo wp_json_encode(array_values($customer_lookup)); ?>;
            var invoiceCustomerInput = document.querySelector('input[name="invoice_customer"]');
            var invoiceCustomerEmailInput = document.querySelector('input[name="invoice_customer_email"]');
            var invoiceSiteLocationInput = document.querySelector('textarea[name="invoice_site_location"]');

            function getCustomerMatches(query) {
                var value = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();

                if (!value) {
                    return customers.slice(0, 10);
                }

                return customers.filter(function(customer) {
                    var haystack = [
                        customer.label || '',
                        customer.name || '',
                        customer.company || '',
                        customer.email || '',
                        customer.phone || '',
                        customer.address_summary || ''
                    ].join(' ').toLowerCase();

                    return haystack.indexOf(value) !== -1;
                }).slice(0, 12);
            }

            function closeCustomerLookupResults(lookupWrap) {
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }
                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (results) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                }
            }

            function fillInvoiceCustomer(customer) {
                if (!customer) {
                    return;
                }

                if (invoiceCustomerInput) {
                    invoiceCustomerInput.value = customer.company || customer.name || customer.title || '';
                }

                if (invoiceCustomerEmailInput && customer.email) {
                    invoiceCustomerEmailInput.value = customer.email;
                }

                if (invoiceSiteLocationInput && customer.address_summary && !String(invoiceSiteLocationInput.value || '').trim()) {
                    invoiceSiteLocationInput.value = customer.address_summary;
                }
            }

            function findExactCustomerMatch(value) {
                var needle = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                if (!needle) {
                    return null;
                }

                for (var i = 0; i < customers.length; i++) {
                    var customer = customers[i];
                    var fields = [customer.label, customer.name, customer.company, customer.email, customer.phone];
                    for (var j = 0; j < fields.length; j++) {
                        if (String(fields[j] || '').trim().toLowerCase() === needle) {
                            return customer;
                        }
                    }
                }

                return null;
            }

            function renderCustomerLookupResults(searchEl) {
                if (!searchEl) {
                    return;
                }

                var lookupWrap = searchEl.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup');
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }

                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (!results) {
                    return;
                }

                var matches = getCustomerMatches(searchEl.value);
                if (!matches.length) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                    return;
                }

                results.innerHTML = matches.map(function(customer) {
                    return '<button type="button" class="dmx-work-order-part-option" data-customer-id="' + escapeHtml(customer.id) + '">' +
                        '<strong>' + escapeHtml((customer.customer_number ? customer.customer_number + ' • ' : '') + (customer.company || customer.name || customer.title || '')) + '</strong>' +
                        '<span>' + escapeHtml(customer.name || '') + (customer.email ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.email) : '') + (customer.phone ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.phone) : '') + (customer.address_summary ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.address_summary) : '') + '</span>' +
                    '</button>';
                }).join('');

                results.classList.add('is-open');

                Array.prototype.slice.call(results.querySelectorAll('.dmx-work-order-part-option')).forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                    });
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        var selectedCustomer = null;
                        var targetId = String(btn.getAttribute('data-customer-id') || '');
                        customers.forEach(function(customer) {
                            if (String(customer.id || '') === targetId) {
                                selectedCustomer = customer;
                            }
                        });
                        if (selectedCustomer) {
                            fillInvoiceCustomer(selectedCustomer);
                        }
                        closeCustomerLookupResults(lookupWrap);
                    });
                });
            }

            function bindInvoiceCustomerLookup() {
                if (!invoiceCustomerInput || invoiceCustomerInput.dataset.bound === 'yes') {
                    return;
                }

                invoiceCustomerInput.dataset.bound = 'yes';

                invoiceCustomerInput.addEventListener('focus', function() {
                    renderCustomerLookupResults(invoiceCustomerInput);
                });

                invoiceCustomerInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    renderCustomerLookupResults(invoiceCustomerInput);
                });

                invoiceCustomerInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    var match = findExactCustomerMatch(invoiceCustomerInput.value);
                    if (match) {
                        fillInvoiceCustomer(match);
                    }
                });

                invoiceCustomerInput.addEventListener('blur', function() {
                    window.setTimeout(function() {
                        closeCustomerLookupResults(invoiceCustomerInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
                    }, 150);
                });
            }

            function money(val) {
                var num = parseFloat(val || 0);
                if (isNaN(num)) num = 0;
                return num.toFixed(2);
            }

            function escapeHtml(str) {
                return String(str || '')
                    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
                    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
                    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
                    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
                    .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
            }

            function displayMoney(val) {
                return invoiceCurrencyPrefix + money(val);
            }

            function setText(id, value) {
                var el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (el) {
                    el.textContent = value;
                }
            }

            function setRowVisible(id, visible) {
                var el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (el) {
                    el.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
                }
            }

            function calculateTotals() {
                var subtotal = 0;
                var taxableSubtotal = 0;
                tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(function(row) {
                    var qty = parseFloat(row.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-qty').value || 0);
                    var price = parseFloat(row.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-price').value || 0);
                    var taxableInput = row.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-taxable');
                    if (isNaN(qty)) qty = 0;
                    if (isNaN(price)) price = 0;
                    var total = qty * price;
                    row.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-line-total').value = money(total);
                    subtotal += total;
                    if (!taxableInput || taxableInput.value !== 'no') {
                        taxableSubtotal += total;
                    }
                });

                var primaryRate = parseFloat(invoiceTaxProfile.primary_rate || 0);
                var secondaryRate = parseFloat(invoiceTaxProfile.secondary_rate || 0);
                if (isNaN(primaryRate)) primaryRate = 0;
                if (isNaN(secondaryRate)) secondaryRate = 0;

                var primaryTax = taxableSubtotal * (primaryRate / 100);
                var secondaryTax = taxableSubtotal * (secondaryRate / 100);
                var taxTotal = primaryTax + secondaryTax;
                var grand = subtotal + taxTotal;

                setText('dmx_invoice_subtotal_display', displayMoney(subtotal));
                setText('dmx_invoice_primary_tax_label', (invoiceTaxProfile.primary_label || 'Tax') + (primaryRate > 0 ? ' (' + money(primaryRate) + '%)' : ''));
                setText('dmx_invoice_primary_tax_display', displayMoney(primaryTax));
                setText('dmx_invoice_secondary_tax_label', (invoiceTaxProfile.secondary_label || 'Tax 2') + (secondaryRate > 0 ? ' (' + money(secondaryRate) + '%)' : ''));
                setText('dmx_invoice_secondary_tax_display', displayMoney(secondaryTax));
                setText('dmx_invoice_tax_total_display', displayMoney(taxTotal));
                setText('dmx_invoice_grand_total_display', displayMoney(grand));
                setRowVisible('dmx_invoice_primary_tax_row', primaryRate > 0);
                setRowVisible('dmx_invoice_secondary_tax_row', secondaryRate > 0);

                if (!amountInput.dataset.manualOverride || amountInput.value.trim() === '') {
                    amountInput.value = money(grand);
                }
            }

            function getAllowedItems(type) {
                return partMap.filter(function(item) {
                    var itemType = item.quote_type || 'part';
                    if (type === 'custom') {
                        return false;
                    }
                    return itemType === type;
                });
            }

            function isMobileLookupMode() {
                return window.matchMedia('(max-width: 680px)').matches;
            }

            function buildDatalistForType(type, datalistId) {
                var datalist = document.getElementById(datalistId);
                if (!datalist) {
                    datalist = document.createElement('datalist');
                    datalist.id = datalistId;
                    document.body.appendChild(datalist);
                }
                var options = getAllowedItems(type).map(function(item) {
                    return '<option value="' + escapeHtml(item.label) + '"></option>';
                });
                datalist.innerHTML = options.join('');
            }

            function getInvoiceLookupMatches(type, query) {
                var value = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                var items = getAllowedItems(type);

                if (!value) {
                    return items.slice(0, 10);
                }

                return items.filter(function(item) {
                    var haystack = [
                        item.label || '',
                        item.title || '',
                        item.description || '',
                        item.sku || ''
                    ].join(' ').toLowerCase();

                    return haystack.indexOf(value) !== -1;
                }).slice(0, 12);
            }

            function closeInvoiceLookupResults(lookupWrap) {
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }
                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (results) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                }
            }

            function fillInvoiceRowFromItem(tr, item) {
                if (!tr || !item) {
                    return;
                }

                var searchInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-search');
                var descInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-description');
                var partIdInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-part-id');
                var sourceTypeInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-source-type');
                var sourceIdInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-source-id');
                var taxableInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-taxable');
                var priceInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-price');

                if (searchInput) {
                    searchInput.value = item.label || item.title || '';
                }

                if (item.source_type === 'part') {
                    partIdInput.value = item.id || '';
                } else {
                    partIdInput.value = '';
                }

                sourceTypeInput.value = item.source_type || '';
                sourceIdInput.value = item.id || '';

                if (!descInput.value.trim()) {
                    descInput.value = item.title || item.label || '';
                }

                if (!priceInput.value.trim() && item.sell_price) {
                    priceInput.value = item.sell_price;
                }

                taxableInput.value = (item.taxable === 'no') ? 'no' : 'yes';
            }

            function renderInvoiceLookupResults(searchInput, tr) {
                if (!searchInput || !tr || !isMobileLookupMode()) {
                    return;
                }

                var typeSelect = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-type');
                var selectedType = typeSelect ? (typeSelect.value || 'part') : 'part';
                if (selectedType === 'custom') {
                    closeInvoiceLookupResults(searchInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
                    return;
                }

                var lookupWrap = searchInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup');
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }

                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (!results) {
                    return;
                }

                var matches = getInvoiceLookupMatches(selectedType, searchInput.value);
                if (!matches.length) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                    return;
                }

                results.innerHTML = matches.map(function(item) {
                    return '<button type="button" class="dmx-work-order-part-option" data-part-id="' + escapeHtml(item.id) + '">' +
                        '<strong>' + escapeHtml(item.label || item.title || '') + '</strong>' +
                        '<span>' + escapeHtml(item.sku || '') + (item.description ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(item.description) : '') + '</span>' +
                    '</button>';
                }).join('');

                results.classList.add('is-open');

                Array.prototype.slice.call(results.querySelectorAll('.dmx-work-order-part-option')).forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                    });
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        var selectedItem = null;
                        var targetId = String(btn.getAttribute('data-part-id') || '');
                        getAllowedItems(selectedType).forEach(function(item) {
                            if (String(item.id || '') === targetId) {
                                selectedItem = item;
                            }
                        });
                        if (selectedItem) {
                            fillInvoiceRowFromItem(tr, selectedItem);
                            calculateTotals();
                        }
                        closeInvoiceLookupResults(lookupWrap);
                    });
                });
            }

            function getPlaceholderByType(type) {
                if (type === 'part') return 'Search preloaded part';
                if (type === 'labour') return 'Search labour item';
                if (type === 'travel') return 'Search travel item';
                if (type === 'equipment') return 'Search equipment item';
                if (type === 'install') return 'Search install item';
                if (type === 'removal') return 'Search removal item';
                return 'Type custom item';
            }

            function resetLookupFields(tr) {
                tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-part-id').value = '';
                tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-source-type').value = '';
                tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-source-id').value = '';
            }

            function refreshRowLookup(tr) {
                var typeSelect = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-type');
                var searchInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-search');
                var rowIndex = tr.getAttribute('data-row-index');
                var datalistId = 'dmx_invoice_lookup_' + rowIndex;
                var type = typeSelect.value || 'part';

                if (type === 'custom' || isMobileLookupMode()) {
                    searchInput.removeAttribute('list');
                } else {
                    buildDatalistForType(type, datalistId);
                    searchInput.setAttribute('list', datalistId);
                }

                searchInput.setAttribute('placeholder', getPlaceholderByType(type));
                searchInput.value = '';
                resetLookupFields(tr);
                closeInvoiceLookupResults(searchInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
            }

            function findMatchingItemByType(type, value) {
                var allowedItems = getAllowedItems(type);
                var found = null;
                allowedItems.forEach(function(item) {
                    if (item.label === value) {
                        found = item;
                    }
                });
                return found;
            }

            function applyInvoiceLookupValue(tr, selectedType, value) {
                var descInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-description');
                var taxableInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-taxable');
                var found = findMatchingItemByType(selectedType, value);

                if (found) {
                    fillInvoiceRowFromItem(tr, found);
                } else {
                    resetLookupFields(tr);
                    taxableInput.value = 'yes';
                    if (!descInput.value.trim()) {
                        descInput.value = value;
                    }
                }

                calculateTotals();
            }

            var canSeeTrueCosts = <?php echo $this->current_user_can_view_reports() ? 'true' : 'false'; ?>;

            function makeRow(type, index, rowData) {
                var tr = document.createElement('tr');
                tr.setAttribute('data-row-index', index);
                tr.innerHTML = ''
                    + '<td data-label="Type">'
                    + '<input type="hidden" class="dmx-invoice-part-id" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][part_id]" value="">'
                    + '<input type="hidden" class="dmx-invoice-source-type" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][source_type]" value="">'
                    + '<input type="hidden" class="dmx-invoice-source-id" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][source_id]" value="">'
                    + '<input type="hidden" class="dmx-invoice-taxable" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][taxable]" value="yes">'
                    + '<select name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][type]" class="dmx-invoice-type">'
                    + '<option value="part"' + (type === 'part' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Part</option>'
                    + '<option value="labour"' + (type === 'labour' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Labour</option>'
                    + '<option value="travel"' + (type === 'travel' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Travel</option>'
                    + '<option value="equipment"' + (type === 'equipment' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Equipment</option>'
                    + '<option value="install"' + (type === 'install' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Install</option>'
                    + '<option value="removal"' + (type === 'removal' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Removal</option>'
                    + '<option value="custom"' + (type === 'custom' ? ' selected' : '') + '>Custom</option>'
                    + '</select>'
                    + '</td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Item / Service / Equipment"><div class="dmx-work-order-part-lookup"><input type="text" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][search]" class="dmx-invoice-search" placeholder="" autocomplete="off"><div class="dmx-work-order-part-results"></div></div></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Description"><input type="text" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][description]" class="dmx-invoice-description" placeholder="Description"></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Qty"><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][qty]" class="dmx-invoice-qty" value="1"></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Unit Price"><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][unit_price]" class="dmx-invoice-price" value=""></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Line Total"><input type="text" class="dmx-invoice-line-total" value="0.00" readonly></td>'
                    + (canSeeTrueCosts ? '<td data-label="True Unit Cost"><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][true_unit_cost]" class="dmx-invoice-true-cost" value=""></td>' : '')
                    + '<td data-label="Save Company Price" style="text-align:left;"><input type="checkbox" name="invoice_line_items[' + index + '][update_default]" value="yes" class="dmx-invoice-update-default"></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Remove"><button type="button" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary dmx-remove-invoice-row">Remove Row</button></td>';

                tableBody.appendChild(tr);

                var searchInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-search');
                var descInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-description');
                var partIdInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-part-id');
                var sourceTypeInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-source-type');
                var sourceIdInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-source-id');
                var taxableInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-taxable');
                var priceInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-price');
                var trueCostInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-true-cost');
                var qtyInput = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-qty');
                var typeSelect = tr.querySelector('.dmx-invoice-type');

                refreshRowLookup(tr);

                if (rowData) {
                    if (rowData.type) {
                        typeSelect.value = rowData.type;
                        refreshRowLookup(tr);
                    }
                    searchInput.value = rowData.search || '';
                    descInput.value = rowData.description || '';
                    qtyInput.value = rowData.qty || '1';
                    priceInput.value = rowData.unit_price || '';
                    if (trueCostInput) { trueCostInput.value = rowData.true_unit_cost || ''; }
                    partIdInput.value = rowData.part_id || '';
                    sourceTypeInput.value = rowData.source_type || '';
                    sourceIdInput.value = rowData.source_id || '';
                    taxableInput.value = rowData.taxable || 'yes';
                }

                searchInput.addEventListener('focus', function() {
                    if (isMobileLookupMode()) {
                        renderInvoiceLookupResults(searchInput, tr);
                    }
                });

                searchInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    resetLookupFields(tr);
                    taxableInput.value = 'yes';
                    if (isMobileLookupMode()) {
                        renderInvoiceLookupResults(searchInput, tr);
                    }
                });

                searchInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    var value = searchInput.value.trim();
                    var selectedType = typeSelect.value || 'custom';
                    applyInvoiceLookupValue(tr, selectedType, value);
                });

                searchInput.addEventListener('blur', function() {
                    window.setTimeout(function() {
                        closeInvoiceLookupResults(searchInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
                    }, 150);
                });

                qtyInput.addEventListener('input', calculateTotals);
                priceInput.addEventListener('input', calculateTotals);
                typeSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    refreshRowLookup(tr);
                    if (typeSelect.value !== 'part') {
                        partIdInput.value = '';
                    }
                    calculateTotals();
                });

                tr.querySelector('.dmx-remove-invoice-row').addEventListener('click', function() {
                    tr.remove();
                    calculateTotals();
                });

                calculateTotals();
            }

            function addRow(e) {
                if (e) e.preventDefault();
                makeRow(addType.value || 'part', tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr').length);
            }

            addBtn.addEventListener('click', addRow);
            bindInvoiceCustomerLookup();
            amountInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                amountInput.dataset.manualOverride = amountInput.value.trim() !== '' ? '1' : '';
            });

            if (initialInvoiceRows && initialInvoiceRows.length) {
                initialInvoiceRows.forEach(function(rowData, idx) {
                    makeRow((rowData && rowData.type) ? rowData.type : (addType.value || 'part'), idx, rowData);
                });
                calculateTotals();
            } else {
                addRow();
            }
        });
        </script>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }


    
    private function render_site_check_preview_section($is_admin = false) {
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-section-head">

private function render_hazard_assessments_tab($is_admin = false) {
        return $this->render_hazard_assessment_tool($is_admin);
    }

private function render_inspections_tab($is_admin = false) {
        $subtab = sanitize_key((string) ($_GET['dmx_subtab'] ?? ''));
        $tool = sanitize_key((string) ($_GET['dmx_tool'] ?? ''));

        if ($subtab === 'hazard_assessments' || $tool === 'hazard_assessments') {
            return $this->render_hazard_assessment_tool($is_admin);
        }

        if ($subtab === 'site_check' || $tool === 'site_check') {
            return $this->render_site_check_preview_section($is_admin);
        }

        $detailed_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-inspection-detailed')
            : $this->portal_url(array('dmx_tab' => 'inspections', 'dmx_subtab' => 'detailed'));

        $quick_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-inspection-quick')
            : $this->portal_url(array('dmx_tab' => 'inspections', 'dmx_subtab' => 'quick'));

        $hazard_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-hazard-assessments')
            : $this->portal_url(array('dmx_tab' => 'inspections', 'dmx_subtab' => 'hazard_assessments'));

        $site_check_url = $this->portal_url(array('dmx_tab' => 'inspections', 'dmx_subtab' => 'site_check'));

        if ($subtab === 'detailed') {
            return do_shortcode('[garage_door_inspection_form]');
        }

        if ($subtab === 'quick') {
            return do_shortcode('[garage_door_quick_assessment_form]');
        }

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-section-head">
            <h2>Inspection Forms</h2>
            <p>Choose the inspection or field form you need. Calculator tools are kept separately under Tools.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-tool-tabs" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
            <a class="dmx-pill active" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->portal_url(array('dmx_tab' => 'inspections'))); ?>">Inspection Forms</a>
            <a class="dmx-pill" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->portal_url(array('dmx_tab' => 'calculators', 'dmx_tool' => 'spring_calculators'))); ?>">Calculator Tools</a>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-card-grid dmx-card-grid-4">
            <a class="dmx-feature-card dmx-feature-card-blue" href="<?php echo esc_url($detailed_url); ?>">
                <span class="dmx-feature-kicker">Detailed</span>
                <h3>Detailed Door Report</h3>
                <p>Full technician inspection workflow with component checks, photos, findings, recommendations, PDF/report output, and email workflow.</p>
            </a>

            <a class="dmx-feature-card dmx-feature-card-teal" href="<?php echo esc_url($quick_url); ?>">
                <span class="dmx-feature-kicker">Safety</span>
                <h3>Quick Safety Assessment</h3>
                <p>Fast field safety review for urgent hazards, unsafe conditions, priority notes, photos, and customer-facing safety summary.</p>
            </a>

            <a class="dmx-feature-card dmx-feature-card-red" href="<?php echo esc_url($hazard_url); ?>">
                <span class="dmx-feature-kicker">Hazard</span>
                <h3>Hazard Assessment</h3>
                <p>Complete a jobsite hazard assessment before work begins, including controls, risk rating, signatures, and saved safety records.</p>
            </a>

            <a class="dmx-feature-card dmx-feature-card-slate" href="<?php echo esc_url($site_check_url); ?>">
                <span class="dmx-feature-kicker">Site Check</span>
                <h3>Site Check Form</h3>
                <p>Confirm opening size, headroom, backroom, framing, site photos, and install notes before ordering doors or finalizing quotes.</p>
            </a>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-muted-note" style="margin-top:22px;">
            <strong>Inspection workflow cleanup:</strong> Inspections now contain door reports, safety assessments, hazard assessments, and site checks. Tools are calculators only.
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }


    private function render_customers_tab($is_admin = false) {
        $customers = $this->get_posts_for_user('dm_customer', 50);
        $can_add_customer = $this->current_user_can_add_customers();
        $can_manage_customer = $this->current_user_can_manage_customers();
        $edit_customer_id = $can_manage_customer ? absint($_GET['dmx_edit_customer'] ?? 0) : 0;
        $edit_customer = ($edit_customer_id > 0 && get_post_type($edit_customer_id) === 'dm_customer' && $this->post_matches_current_company($edit_customer_id)) ? get_post($edit_customer_id) : null;
        $base_url = $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'customers'));
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Customers</h3>
                <p>Customer records are shared across the company so quotes, invoices, and work orders can use the same autofill information.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <?php if ($is_admin && $can_manage_customer): ?>
                    <a class="dmx-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('post-new.php?post_type=dm_customer')); ?>">Add Customer in Admin</a>
                <?php endif; ?>
                <?php if ($can_add_customer): ?>
                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="#dmx-add-customer">Add Customer</a>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php if ($this->current_user_is_technician()) : ?>
            <div class="dmx-help-box" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
                <h4>Technician customer access</h4>
                <p>You can add new customers for quotes and invoices. Existing customer details are read-only here so customer records stay controlled by the office.</p>
            </div>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
            <table class="dmx-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Customer #</th>
                        <th>Name</th>
                        <th>Company</th>
                        <th>Email</th>
                        <th>Phone</th>
                        <th>Address</th>
                        <th>Date Added</th>
                        <?php if ($can_manage_customer) : ?><th>Action</th><?php endif; ?>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php if ($customers): foreach ($customers as $customer): ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($this->ensure_customer_number($customer->ID)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($customer->post_title); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($customer->ID, '_dmx_company_name', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($customer->ID, '_dmx_customer_email', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($customer->ID, '_dmx_customer_phone', true)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_customer_address_summary($customer->ID)); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(get_the_date('', $customer)); ?></td>
                            <?php if ($can_manage_customer) : ?>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="dmx-action-row" style="gap:6px;">
                                        <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_edit_customer' => $customer->ID), $base_url)); ?>#dmx-edit-customer">Edit</a>
                                        <form method="post" onsubmit="return confirm('Move this customer to trash?');" style="display:inline-flex;margin:0;">
                                            <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="delete_customer">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="customers">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="customer_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($customer->ID); ?>">
                                            <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary">Delete</button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; else: ?>
                        <tr><td colspan="<?php echo $can_manage_customer ? '8' : '7'; ?>"><div class="dmx-empty">No customers found yet.</div></td></tr>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        <?php if ($edit_customer && $can_manage_customer) : ?>
            <div id="dmx-edit-customer" class="dmx-form-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Edit Customer</h4>
                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="update_customer">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="customers">
                    <input type="hidden" name="customer_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_customer->ID); ?>">
                    <?php echo $this->render_customer_fields_for_form($edit_customer->ID, true); ?>
                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Update Customer</button>
                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($base_url); ?>">Cancel Edit</a>
                </form>
            </div>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <?php if ($can_add_customer) : ?>
            <div id="dmx-add-customer" class="dmx-form-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Add Customer</h4>
                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_customer">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="customers">
                    <?php echo $this->render_customer_fields_for_form(0, false); ?>
                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Customer</button>
                </form>
            </div>
        <?php else : ?>
            <div id="dmx-add-customer" class="dmx-empty">You can search and use customer records, but adding or changing customer details is handled by managers, coordinators, sales, or technicians.</div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_customer_fields_for_form($customer_id = 0, $is_edit = false) {
        $customer_id = absint($customer_id);
        $title = $customer_id ? get_the_title($customer_id) : '';
        $company = $customer_id ? get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_company_name', true) : '';
        $email = $customer_id ? get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_email', true) : '';
        $phone = $customer_id ? get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_phone', true) : '';
        $address_1 = $customer_id ? get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_address_1', true) : '';
        $address_2 = $customer_id ? get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_address_2', true) : '';
        $city = $customer_id ? get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_city', true) : '';
        $province = $customer_id ? get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_province', true) : '';
        $postal_code = $customer_id ? get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_postal_code', true) : '';
        $notes = $customer_id ? get_post_field('post_content', $customer_id) : '';
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-form-grid">
            <div class="dmx-field"><label>Customer Name</label><input type="text" name="customer_title" required value="<?php echo esc_attr($title); ?>"></div>
            <div class="dmx-field"><label>Company Name</label><input type="text" name="customer_company" value="<?php echo esc_attr($company); ?>"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-form-grid">
            <div class="dmx-field"><label>Email</label><input type="email" name="customer_email" value="<?php echo esc_attr($email); ?>"></div>
            <div class="dmx-field"><label>Phone</label><input type="text" name="customer_phone" value="<?php echo esc_attr($phone); ?>"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-form-grid">
            <div class="dmx-field"><label>Address Line 1</label><input type="text" name="customer_address_1" value="<?php echo esc_attr($address_1); ?>"></div>
            <div class="dmx-field"><label>Address Line 2</label><input type="text" name="customer_address_2" value="<?php echo esc_attr($address_2); ?>"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
            <div class="dmx-field"><label>City</label><input type="text" name="customer_city" value="<?php echo esc_attr($city); ?>"></div>
            <div class="dmx-field"><label>Province / State</label><input type="text" name="customer_province" value="<?php echo esc_attr($province); ?>"></div>
            <div class="dmx-field"><label>Postal / Zip</label><input type="text" name="customer_postal_code" value="<?php echo esc_attr($postal_code); ?>"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><textarea name="customer_notes"><?php echo esc_textarea($notes); ?></textarea></div>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_staff_tab($is_admin = false) {
        if (!$this->can_view_team_tab()) {
            return '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">You do not have permission to view team data.</div>';
        }

        if (current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode) {
            $pending_users = $this->get_pending_portal_users();
            $portal_users = get_users(array(
                'orderby' => 'display_name',
                'order' => 'ASC',
                'role__in' => $this->get_portal_role_keys(),
            ));

            ob_start(); ?>
            <div class="dmx-page-head"><div><h3>Account Approvals</h3><p>You control which companies and staff can access the DoorMatrix portal.</p></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-form-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Pending Portal Account Requests</h4>
                <?php if ($this->current_user_is_technician()) : ?>
                <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-bottom:12px;">This list only shows work orders assigned to you.</p>
            <?php endif; ?>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                    <table class="dmx-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Email</th><th>Company</th><th>Request Type</th><th>Requested Role</th><th>Plan</th><th>Status</th><th>Requested</th><th>Action</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                        <?php if (!empty($pending_users)) : foreach ($pending_users as $pending_user) : ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($pending_user->display_name); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($pending_user->user_email); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html((string) get_user_meta($pending_user->ID, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_account_request_type_label($pending_user->ID)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_role_label_from_key((string) get_user_meta($pending_user->ID, '_dmx_requested_role', true))); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <?php
                                    $pending_company_key = (string) get_user_meta($pending_user->ID, '_dmx_company_key', true);
                                    $pending_plan = $this->get_company_active_plan($pending_company_key);
                                    ?>
                                    <form method="post" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                                        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="approve_team_member">
                                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="staff">
                                        <input type="hidden" name="team_user_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($pending_user->ID); ?>">
                                        <select name="company_plan">
                                            <?php foreach ($this->get_company_plan_options() as $plan_key => $plan_label) : ?>
                                                <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($plan_key); ?>" <?php selected($pending_plan, $plan_key); ?>><?php echo esc_html($plan_label); ?></option>
                                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                                        </select>
                                        <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Approve</button>
                                    </form>
                                </td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst((string) get_user_meta($pending_user->ID, '_dmx_account_status', true))); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($pending_user->user_registered); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="dmx-action-row">
                                        <form method="post">
                                            <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="deny_team_member">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="staff">
                                            <input type="hidden" name="team_user_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($pending_user->ID); ?>">
                                            <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary">Reject</button>
                                        </form>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; else : ?>
                            <tr><td colspan="9"><div class="dmx-empty">No pending portal account requests.</div></td></tr>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Portal Users</h4>
                <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                    <table class="dmx-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Email</th><th>Company</th><th>Role</th><th>Plan</th><th>Status</th><th>Approved</th><th>Trial</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                        <?php if (!empty($portal_users)) : foreach ($portal_users as $portal_user) : $trial = $this->get_company_trial_data((string) get_user_meta($portal_user->ID, '_dmx_company_key', true)); ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($portal_user->display_name); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($portal_user->user_email); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html((string) get_user_meta($portal_user->ID, '_dmx_signup_company_name', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_role_label_from_key((string) get_user_meta($portal_user->ID, '_dmx_requested_role', true) ?: (in_array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, (array) $portal_user->roles, true) ? self::MANAGER_ROLE : self::STAFF_ROLE))); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_company_plan_label($this->get_company_active_plan((string) get_user_meta($portal_user->ID, '_dmx_company_key', true)))); ?></td>

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            var allowedPoRoles = <?php echo wp_json_encode($this->get_roles_allowed_po_permission()); ?>;
            var roleSelect = document.querySelector('.dmx-team-role-create-select');
            var poBox = document.querySelector('.dmx-po-permission-create-box');
            if (!roleSelect || !poBox) {
                return;
            }
            var poCheckbox = poBox.querySelector('input[name="team_member_can_create_pos"]');
            function updatePoCreateBox() {
                var allowed = allowedPoRoles.indexOf(roleSelect.value) !== -1;
                poBox.style.display = allowed ? '' : 'none';
                if (!allowed && poCheckbox) {
                    poCheckbox.checked = false;
                }
            }
            roleSelect.addEventListener('change', updatePoCreateBox);
            updatePoCreateBox();
        });
        </script>
