    }



    private function get_truck_location_options() {
        $options = array('' => 'No truck assigned');
        foreach ($this->get_inventory_locations() as $location) {
            if (($location['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck' || empty($location['key'])) {
                continue;
            }
            $options[$location['key']] = $this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location);
        }
        return $options;
    }

    private function get_user_assigned_truck_key($user_id) {
        return sanitize_key((string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_assigned_truck_key', true));
    }

    private function get_user_assigned_truck_label($user_id) {
        $truck_key = $this->get_user_assigned_truck_key($user_id);
        if ($truck_key === '') {
            return '—';
        }
        $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        if (empty($location_map[$truck_key]) || !is_array($location_map[$truck_key])) {
            return '—';
        }
        return $this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location_map[$truck_key]);
    }


    private function get_invoice_inventory_usage_summary($line_items) {
        $summary = array();
        if (!is_array($line_items)) {
            return $summary;
        }

        foreach ($line_items as $row) {
            if (!is_array($row)) {
                continue;
            }

            $part_id = absint($row['part_id'] ?? 0);
            $qty = isset($row['qty']) ? (float) $row['qty'] : 0;
            $type = sanitize_key((string) ($row['type'] ?? ''));

            if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE || $qty <= 0) {
                continue;
            }

            if ($type !== '' && $type !== 'part') {
                continue;
            }

            if (!isset($summary[$part_id])) {
                $summary[$part_id] = 0;
            }
            $summary[$part_id] += $qty;
        }

        return $summary;
    }

    private function get_truck_key_for_technician_user($user_id, $location_map = null) {
        $user_id = absint($user_id);
        if ($user_id <= 0) {
            return '';
        }

        if (!is_array($location_map)) {
            $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        }

        $truck_key = $this->get_user_assigned_truck_key($user_id);
        if ($truck_key === '' || empty($location_map[$truck_key]) || ($location_map[$truck_key]['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck') {
            return '';
        }

        return $truck_key;
    }

    private function resolve_invoice_inventory_usage_location_key($invoice_id, $line_items, $location_map = null) {
        $invoice_id = absint($invoice_id);
        if ($invoice_id <= 0) {
            return '';
        }

        if (!is_array($location_map)) {
            $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        }

        $existing_location_key = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_inventory_usage_location_key', true));
        if ($existing_location_key !== '' && !empty($location_map[$existing_location_key]) && ($location_map[$existing_location_key]['type'] ?? '') === 'truck') {
            return $existing_location_key;
        }

        $source_work_order_id = absint(get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', true));
        if ($source_work_order_id > 0 && get_post_type($source_work_order_id) === 'dm_work_order') {
            $work_order_technician_ids = array();
            $work_order_completed_by = absint(get_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completed_by', true));
            $work_order_primary = absint(get_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
            $work_order_additional = get_post_meta($source_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
            if (!is_array($work_order_additional)) {
                $work_order_additional = array();
            }

            if ($work_order_completed_by > 0) {
                $work_order_technician_ids[] = $work_order_completed_by;
            }
            if ($work_order_primary > 0) {
                $work_order_technician_ids[] = $work_order_primary;
            }
            foreach ($work_order_additional as $additional_id) {
                $additional_id = absint($additional_id);
                if ($additional_id > 0) {
                    $work_order_technician_ids[] = $additional_id;
                }
            }

            foreach (array_values(array_unique($work_order_technician_ids)) as $technician_id) {
                $truck_key = $this->get_truck_key_for_technician_user($technician_id, $location_map);
                if ($truck_key !== '') {
                    return $truck_key;
                }
            }
        }

        $invoice_technician_id = absint(get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_technician_id', true));
        if ($invoice_technician_id > 0) {
            $truck_key = $this->get_truck_key_for_technician_user($invoice_technician_id, $location_map);
            if ($truck_key !== '') {
                return $truck_key;
            }
        }

        $invoice_technician_name = trim((string) get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_technician_name', true));
        if ($invoice_technician_name !== '') {
            $matched_users = get_users(array(
                'search' => $invoice_technician_name,
                'search_columns' => array('display_name', 'user_nicename', 'user_login'),
                'number' => 10,
                'fields' => 'ID',
            ));
            foreach ((array) $matched_users as $matched_user_id) {
                $truck_key = $this->get_truck_key_for_technician_user($matched_user_id, $location_map);
                if ($truck_key !== '') {
                    return $truck_key;
                }
            }
        }

        $invoice_post = get_post($invoice_id);
        if ($invoice_post instanceof WP_Post) {
            $author_id = absint($invoice_post->post_author);
            if ($author_id > 0) {
                $truck_key = $this->get_truck_key_for_technician_user($author_id, $location_map);
                if ($truck_key !== '') {
                    return $truck_key;
                }
            }
        }

        if ($this->current_user_is_technician()) {
            $truck_key = $this->get_truck_key_for_technician_user(get_current_user_id(), $location_map);
            if ($truck_key !== '') {
                return $truck_key;
            }
        }

        return '';
    }

    private function sync_invoice_inventory_usage($invoice_id, $line_items) {
        $invoice_id = absint($invoice_id);
        if ($invoice_id <= 0) {
            return true;
        }

        $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        $location_key = $this->resolve_invoice_inventory_usage_location_key($invoice_id, $line_items, $location_map);

        if ($location_key === '') {
            $desired_usage = $this->get_invoice_inventory_usage_summary($line_items);
            if (!empty($desired_usage)) {
                return new WP_Error('dmx_inventory_truck_required', 'A technician truck is required to deduct invoice inventory. Assign a truck to the linked work order technician or invoice technician before saving.');
            }
            return true;
        }

        if (empty($location_map[$location_key]) || ($location_map[$location_key]['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck') {
            return true;
        }

        $balances = $this->get_inventory_balances();
        $existing = get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_inventory_usage_summary', true);
        if (!is_array($existing)) {
            $existing = array();
        }
        $desired = $this->get_invoice_inventory_usage_summary($line_items);

        $part_ids = array_unique(array_merge(array_keys($existing), array_keys($desired)));
        $shortages = array();

        foreach ($part_ids as $part_id) {
            $part_id = absint($part_id);
            if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
                continue;
            }
            $old_qty = isset($existing[$part_id]) ? (float) $existing[$part_id] : 0;
            $new_qty = isset($desired[$part_id]) ? (float) $desired[$part_id] : 0;
            $delta = $new_qty - $old_qty;
            if ($delta <= 0) {
                continue;
            }
            $current = isset($balances[$part_id][$location_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part_id][$location_key] : 0;
            if ($current < $delta) {
                $shortages[$part_id] = array(
                    'requested_quantity' => $delta,
                    'recorded_quantity' => $current,
                    'missing_quantity' => max(0, $delta - $current),
                );
            }
        }

        $invoice_number = (string) get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_invoice_number', true);
        if ($invoice_number === '') {
            $invoice_number = 'Invoice #' . $invoice_id;
        }
        $actor_name = $this->get_inventory_user_label(get_current_user_id());

        foreach ($part_ids as $part_id) {
            $part_id = absint($part_id);
            if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
                continue;
            }
            $old_qty = isset($existing[$part_id]) ? (float) $existing[$part_id] : 0;
            $new_qty = isset($desired[$part_id]) ? (float) $desired[$part_id] : 0;
            $delta = $new_qty - $old_qty;
            if (abs($delta) < 0.00001) {
                continue;
            }

            if (empty($balances[$part_id]) || !is_array($balances[$part_id])) {
                $balances[$part_id] = array();
            }
            $current = isset($balances[$part_id][$location_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part_id][$location_key] : 0;
            if ($delta > 0 && isset($shortages[$part_id])) {
                continue;
            }
            $balances[$part_id][$location_key] = max(0, $current - $delta);

            if ($delta > 0) {
                $notes = 'Auto deducted from invoice ' . $invoice_number . ' by ' . $actor_name;
                $this->add_inventory_activity('usage', $part_id, $location_key, -1 * $delta, $notes);
            } else {
                $notes = 'Inventory returned from invoice update ' . $invoice_number . ' by ' . $actor_name;
                $this->add_inventory_activity('adjust', $part_id, $location_key, abs($delta), $notes);
            }
        }

        $this->save_inventory_balances($balances);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_inventory_usage_summary', $desired);
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_inventory_usage_location_key', $location_key);

        if (!empty($shortages)) {
            $technician_user_id = $this->resolve_invoice_inventory_usage_technician_user_id($invoice_id);
            foreach ($shortages as $part_id => $shortage) {
                $this->log_invoice_inventory_exception(array(
                    'company_key' => $this->get_current_user_company_key(),
                    'invoice_id' => $invoice_id,
                    'technician_user_id' => $technician_user_id,
                    'assigned_truck_key' => $location_key,
                    'part_id' => $part_id,
                    'part_name' => get_the_title($part_id),
                    'requested_quantity' => (float) $shortage['requested_quantity'],
                    'recorded_quantity' => (float) $shortage['recorded_quantity'],
                    'missing_quantity' => (float) $shortage['missing_quantity'],
                ));
            }
        }

        return array('has_exceptions' => !empty($shortages), 'exceptions_count' => count($shortages));
    }

    private function resolve_invoice_inventory_usage_technician_user_id($invoice_id) {
        $invoice_id = absint($invoice_id);
        if ($invoice_id <= 0) {
            return 0;
        }

        $invoice_post = get_post($invoice_id);
        if ($invoice_post instanceof WP_Post) {
            return absint($invoice_post->post_author);
        }

        return 0;
    }

    private function log_invoice_inventory_exception($entry) {
        if (!is_array($entry)) {
            return;
        }

        $exceptions = get_option('dmx_inventory_invoice_exceptions', array());
        if (!is_array($exceptions)) {
            $exceptions = array();
        }

        $exceptions[] = array(
            'company_key' => sanitize_text_field((string) ($entry['company_key'] ?? '')),
            'invoice_id' => absint($entry['invoice_id'] ?? 0),
            'technician_user_id' => absint($entry['technician_user_id'] ?? 0),
            'assigned_truck_key' => sanitize_key((string) ($entry['assigned_truck_key'] ?? '')),
            'part_id' => absint($entry['part_id'] ?? 0),
            'part_name' => sanitize_text_field((string) ($entry['part_name'] ?? '')),
            'requested_quantity' => (float) ($entry['requested_quantity'] ?? 0),
            'recorded_quantity' => (float) ($entry['recorded_quantity'] ?? 0),
            'missing_quantity' => (float) ($entry['missing_quantity'] ?? 0),
            'timestamp' => current_time('mysql'),
            'status' => 'needs_review',
        );

        update_option('dmx_inventory_invoice_exceptions', $exceptions, false);
    }

    private function get_roles_allowed_po_permission() {
        return array(self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE);
    }

    private function save_user_po_permission($user_id, $role, $enabled) {
        $user_id = absint($user_id);
        if ($user_id <= 0) {
            return;
        }

        $role = (string) $role;
        $enabled = ($enabled === 'yes') ? 'yes' : 'no';
        if (!in_array($role, $this->get_roles_allowed_po_permission(), true)) {
            delete_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_permission_create_pos');
            return;
        }

        if ($enabled === 'yes') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_permission_create_pos', 'yes');
        } else {
            delete_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_permission_create_pos');
        }
    }

    private function user_can_create_subcontractor_pos($user_id = 0, $include_managers = true) {
        $user_id = absint($user_id);
        if ($user_id <= 0) {
            $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        }

        if ($include_managers && (current_user_can('manage_options') || ($user_id === get_current_user_id() && $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()))) {
            return true;
        }

        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            return false;
        }

        if (in_array(self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return true;
        }

        if ($include_managers && in_array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return true;
        }

        $allowed_roles = $this->get_roles_allowed_po_permission();
        if (empty(array_intersect((array) $user->roles, $allowed_roles))) {
            return false;
        }

        return get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_permission_create_pos', true) === 'yes';
    }

    private function get_user_special_permissions_label($user_id) {
        $labels = array();
        $user = get_userdata(absint($user_id));
        if ($user && in_array(self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            $labels[] = 'PO access included';
        } elseif ($this->user_can_create_subcontractor_pos($user_id, false)) {
            $labels[] = 'Can create POs';
        }
        return !empty($labels) ? implode(', ', $labels) : '—';
    }

    private function get_editable_team_roles() {
        return array(
            self::MANAGER_ROLE => 'Manager',
            self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE => 'Accounting',
            self::SALES_ROLE => 'Sales',
            self::COORDINATOR_ROLE => 'Coordinator',
            self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE => 'Technician',
            self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE => 'Warehouse / Shipper Receiver',
            self::PARTS_ROLE => 'Parts Representative',
            self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE => 'Receptionist',
            self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE => 'Subcontractor',
            self::STAFF_ROLE => 'Helper',
        );
    }


    private function create_team_member($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_team()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Only managers can add team members.');
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $company_name = $this->get_current_user_company_name();
        if ($company_key === '' && !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Your company profile must be set up before adding team members.');
        }

        $full_name = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['team_member_name'] ?? ''));
        $email = sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['team_member_email'] ?? ''));
        $phone = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['team_member_phone'] ?? ''));
        $password = (string) ($_POST['team_member_password'] ?? '');
        $role = sanitize_text_field($_POST['team_member_role_create'] ?? self::STAFF_ROLE);
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['team_member_status_create'] ?? 'approved');
        $truck_key = sanitize_key($_POST['team_member_truck_key_create'] ?? '');
        $note = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['team_member_note'] ?? ''));
        $can_create_pos = (isset($_POST['team_member_can_create_pos']) && $_POST['team_member_can_create_pos'] === 'yes') ? 'yes' : 'no';

        if ($full_name === '' || $email === '' || $password === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Full name, email/login, and password are required.');
        }
        if (!is_email($email)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Please enter a valid email address for the team member.');
        }
        if (email_exists($email)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'That email/login is already being used.');
        }
        if (strlen($password) < 8) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Team member password must be at least 8 characters long.');
        }

        $allowed_roles = array_keys($this->get_editable_team_roles());
        if (!in_array($role, $allowed_roles, true)) {
            $role = self::STAFF_ROLE;
        }
        if (!in_array($status, array('approved', 'inactive'), true)) {
            $status = 'approved';
        }

        $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        if ($truck_key !== '' && (empty($location_map[$truck_key]) || ($location_map[$truck_key]['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck')) {
            $truck_key = '';
        }
        if ($role !== self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE) {
            $truck_key = '';
        }

        $user_id = $this->create_portal_user_account($company_name !== '' ? $company_name : $company_key, $full_name, $email, $phone, $password, $role);
        if (is_wp_error($user_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', $user_id->get_error_message());
        }

        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_account_status', $status);
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', $role);
        $this->save_user_po_permission($user_id, $role, $can_create_pos);
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_at', current_time('mysql'));
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_role_approved_by', get_current_user_id());
        if ($note !== '') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_manager_note', $note);
        }

        if ($truck_key !== '') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_assigned_truck_key', $truck_key);
        }

        $locations = $this->get_inventory_locations();
        foreach ($locations as &$location) {
            if (($location['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck') {
                continue;
            }
            if (($location['key'] ?? '') === $truck_key) {
                $location['assigned_user_id'] = $user_id;
            }
        }
        unset($location);
        $this->save_inventory_locations($locations);

        $message = 'Team member created successfully.';
        if ($role === self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE && $truck_key !== '') {
            $message = 'Technician created with login info and assigned truck.';
        }
        $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'success', $message);
    }

    private function save_team_member_assignment($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_team()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Only managers can update team assignments.');
        }

        $user_id = absint($_POST['team_user_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($user_id <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Could not find that team member.');
        }

        $team_user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$team_user) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Could not find that team member.');
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $target_company_key = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_key', true);
            if ($company_key === '' || $target_company_key === '' || $target_company_key !== $company_key) {
                $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'You can only manage team members in your own company.');
            }
        }

        $role = sanitize_text_field($_POST['team_member_role'] ?? '');
        $allowed_roles = array_keys($this->get_editable_team_roles());
        if (!in_array($role, $allowed_roles, true)) {
            $role = self::STAFF_ROLE;
        }

        $email = sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['team_member_email'] ?? ''));
        $password = (string) ($_POST['team_member_password'] ?? '');
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['team_member_status'] ?? 'approved');
        $can_create_pos = (isset($_POST['team_member_can_create_pos']) && $_POST['team_member_can_create_pos'] === 'yes') ? 'yes' : 'no';
        if (!in_array($status, array('approved', 'inactive', 'pending'), true)) {
            $status = 'approved';
        }
        if ($email === '' || !is_email($email)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Please enter a valid email/login for that team member.');
        }
        $email_owner = email_exists($email);
        if ($email_owner && (int) $email_owner !== $user_id) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'That email/login is already in use by another account.');
        }

        $truck_key = sanitize_key($_POST['team_member_truck_key'] ?? '');
        $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        if ($truck_key !== '' && (empty($location_map[$truck_key]) || ($location_map[$truck_key]['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck')) {
            $truck_key = '';
        }

        if ($role !== self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE) {
            $truck_key = '';
        }

        wp_update_user(array(
            'ID' => $user_id,
            'user_email' => $email,
        ));
        if ($password !== '') {
            if (strlen($password) < 8) {
                $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'error', 'Passwords must be at least 8 characters long.');
            }
            wp_set_password($password, $user_id);
        }

        $wp_user = new WP_User($user_id);
        $wp_user->set_role($role);
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_requested_role', $role);
        $this->save_user_po_permission($user_id, $role, $can_create_pos);
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_account_status', $status);

        $locations = $this->get_inventory_locations();
        foreach ($locations as &$location) {
            if (($location['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck') {
                continue;
            }
            $assigned_id = isset($location['assigned_user_id']) ? absint($location['assigned_user_id']) : 0;
            if ($assigned_id === $user_id) {
                $location['assigned_user_id'] = 0;
            }
            if ($truck_key !== '' && ($location['key'] ?? '') === $truck_key) {
                $location['assigned_user_id'] = $user_id;
            }
        }
        unset($location);
        $this->save_inventory_locations($locations);

        if ($truck_key !== '') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_assigned_truck_key', $truck_key);
        } else {
            delete_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_assigned_truck_key');
        }

        $message = 'Team member login, role, and access updated successfully.';
        if ($role === self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE && $truck_key !== '') {
            $message = 'Technician login, role, and truck assignment saved.';
        } elseif ($role === self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE) {
            $message = 'Technician login and role saved. No truck assigned yet.';
        }
        if ($status === 'inactive') {
            $message = 'Team member saved and set to inactive.';
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message('staff', 'success', $message);
    }

    private function get_role_label_from_key($role_key) {
        $map = array(
            self::MANAGER_ROLE => 'Manager',
            self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE => 'Accounting',
            self::SALES_ROLE => 'Sales',
            self::COORDINATOR_ROLE => 'Coordinator',
            self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE => 'Technician',
            self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE => 'Warehouse / Shipper Receiver',
            self::PARTS_ROLE => 'Parts Representative',
            self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE => 'Receptionist',
            self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE => 'Subcontractor',
            self::STAFF_ROLE => 'Helper',
        );
        return isset($map[$role_key]) ? $map[$role_key] : 'User';
    }

    private function get_portal_role_label($user) {
        if (in_array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Manager';
        }
        if (in_array(self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Accounting';
        }
        if (in_array(self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Coordinator';
        }
        if (in_array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Technician';
        }
        if (in_array(self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Warehouse / Shipper Receiver';
        }
        if (in_array(self::PARTS_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Parts Representative';
        }
        if (in_array(self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Receptionist';
        }
        if (in_array(self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Subcontractor';
        }
        if (in_array(self::SALES_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Sales';
        }
        if (in_array(self::STAFF_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Helper';
        }
        return 'User';
    }

    private function get_portal_schedule_access_label($user) {
        if (in_array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'All schedules';
        }
        if (in_array(self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'All schedules except team role management';
        }
        if (in_array(self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Dispatch + all technicians';
        }
        if (in_array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Assigned jobs only';
        }
        if (in_array(self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Warehouse pull board only';
        }
        if (in_array(self::PARTS_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Parts / inventory only';
        }
        if (in_array(self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Front desk schedules, on-call, invoices, and messages';
        }
        if (in_array(self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Assigned jobs and messages only';
        }
        if (in_array(self::SALES_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true) || in_array(self::STAFF_ROLE, (array) $user->roles, true)) {
            return 'Own appointments only';
        }
        return 'Portal access';
    }

    private function get_user_sales_summary($user_id) {
        $quotes = get_posts(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_quote',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => -1,
            'author' => $user_id,
            'fields' => 'ids',
        ));

        $invoices = get_posts(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_invoice',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => -1,
            'author' => $user_id,
            'fields' => 'ids',
        ));

        $quote_total = 0;
        foreach ($quotes as $quote_id) {
            $quote_amount = (float) get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_total', true);
            if ($quote_amount <= 0) {
                $quote_amount = (float) get_post_meta($quote_id, '_dmx_amount', true);
            }
            $quote_total += $quote_amount;
        }

        $invoice_total = 0;
        $paid_total = 0;
        foreach ($invoices as $invoice_id) {
            $invoice_amount = (float) get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_total', true);
            if ($invoice_amount <= 0) {
                $invoice_amount = (float) get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_amount', true);
            }
            $invoice_total += $invoice_amount;
            if (get_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_status', true) === 'paid') {
                $paid_total += $invoice_amount;
            }
        }

        return array(
            'quotes_count' => count($quotes),
            'quotes_total' => $quote_total,
            'invoices_count' => count($invoices),
            'invoices_total' => $invoice_total,
            'paid_total' => $paid_total,
        );
    }

    private function stat_card($label, $number) { return '<div class="dmx-card"><div class="dmx-stat-label">' . esc_html($label) . '</div><div class="dmx-stat-number">' . intval($number) . '</div></div>'; }
    private function recent_item_list($items, $type_label) { $html = ''; foreach ($items as $item) { $html .= '<div class="dmx-list-item"><div><strong>' . esc_html($item->post_title) . '</strong><span>' . esc_html($type_label) . ' • ' . esc_html(get_the_date('', $item)) . '</span></div><div>' . $this->status_pill(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_status', true)) . '</div></div>'; } return $html; }
    private function status_pill($status) { $status = sanitize_key($status ?: 'draft'); $allowed = array('open','paid','draft','pending','complete','cancelled','requested','partial_received','received','sent','scheduled','invoicing','return_required','submitted','approved','processing','rejected','checked_in'); if (!in_array($status, $allowed, true)) { $status = 'draft'; } $class_map = array('scheduled' => 'open', 'invoicing' => 'open', 'return_required' => 'pending', 'submitted' => 'pending', 'approved' => 'complete', 'processing' => 'open', 'rejected' => 'cancelled', 'checked_in' => 'open', 'partial_received' => 'pending'); $class = $class_map[$status] ?? $status; $label_map = array('submitted' => 'Submitted', 'approved' => 'Approved', 'processing' => 'Processing', 'rejected' => 'Rejected', 'checked_in' => 'Checked In', 'partial_received' => 'Partial Received'); $label = $label_map[$status] ?? ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $status)); return '<span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-' . esc_attr($class) . '">' . esc_html($label) . '</span>'; }

    private function count_posts_for_user($post_type) {
        if ($post_type === 'dm_work_order') {
            return count($this->get_accessible_work_orders(-1));
        }

        $args = array('post_type' => $post_type,'post_status' => 'publish','posts_per_page' => 1,'fields' => 'ids');

        if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && $post_type !== self::PART_POST_TYPE && $post_type !== 'dm_customer' && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager() && !$this->current_user_is_coordinator() && !($this->current_user_is_receptionist() && $post_type === 'dm_invoice')) {
            $args['author'] = get_current_user_id();
        }

        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, $post_type);
        $query = new WP_Query($args);
        return intval($query->found_posts);
    }

    private function get_posts_for_user($post_type, $limit = 10) {
        $args = array('post_type' => $post_type,'post_status' => 'publish','posts_per_page' => $limit,'orderby' => 'date','order' => 'DESC');

        if ($post_type === self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
            return get_posts($args);
        }

        if ($post_type === 'dm_work_order') {
            return $this->get_accessible_work_orders($limit);
        }

        if ($post_type === 'dm_customer') {
            $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, $post_type);
            return get_posts($args);
        }

        if ($post_type === 'dm_supplier_request') {
            if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
                $args['author'] = get_current_user_id();
            }
        } elseif (!current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager() && !$this->current_user_is_coordinator() && !($this->current_user_is_receptionist() && $post_type === 'dm_invoice')) {
            $args['author'] = get_current_user_id();
        }

        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, $post_type);
        return get_posts($args);
    }

    public function handle_admin_supplier_request() { wp_safe_redirect(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-supplier-requests')); exit; }

    public function part_admin_columns($columns) {
        $new_columns = array();
        foreach ($columns as $key => $label) {
            if ($key === 'title') {
                $new_columns['dmx_part_image'] = 'Image';
                $new_columns['title'] = 'Part Name';
                $new_columns['taxonomy-' . self::PART_TAXONOMY] = 'Category';
                $new_columns['dmx_part_brand'] = 'Brand';
                $new_columns['dmx_part_sku'] = 'SKU';
                $new_columns['dmx_part_active'] = 'Active';
            } else {
                $new_columns[$key] = $label;
            }
        }
        return $new_columns;
    }

    public function render_part_admin_columns($column, $post_id) {
        switch ($column) {
            case 'dmx_part_image':
                if (has_post_thumbnail($post_id)) {
                    echo get_the_post_thumbnail($post_id, array(48, 48), array('style' => 'width:48px;height:48px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:8px;'));
                } else {
                    echo '&#8212;';
                }
                break;
            case 'dmx_part_brand': echo esc_html($this->get_part_meta($post_id, 'dmx_part_brand')); break;
            case 'dmx_part_sku': echo esc_html($this->get_part_meta($post_id, 'dmx_part_internal_sku')); break;
            case 'dmx_part_sell_price': echo esc_html($this->format_money($this->get_part_meta($post_id, 'dmx_part_sell_price'))); break;
            case 'dmx_part_cost': echo esc_html($this->format_money($this->get_part_meta($post_id, 'dmx_part_cost'))); break;
            case 'dmx_part_active': echo esc_html($this->get_part_meta($post_id, 'dmx_part_active', 'yes') === 'yes' ? 'Yes' : 'No'); break;
        }
    }

    private function format_money($value) {
        if ($value === '' || $value === null) { return ''; }
        $settings = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $symbol = ($settings['currency'] === 'USD') ? 'US$' : 'C$';
        return $symbol . number_format((float) $value, 2);
    }

    private function get_document_number_meta_key($document_type) {
        return isset(array('invoice' => '_dmx_invoice_number', 'quote' => '_dmx_quote_number', 'work_order' => '_dmx_work_order_number', 'subcontractor_po' => '_dmx_subcontractor_po_number', 'subcontractor_invoice' => '_dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number')[$document_type]) ? array('invoice' => '_dmx_invoice_number', 'quote' => '_dmx_quote_number', 'work_order' => '_dmx_work_order_number', 'subcontractor_po' => '_dmx_subcontractor_po_number', 'subcontractor_invoice' => '_dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number')[$document_type] : '_dmx_quote_number';
    }

    private function get_document_number_counter_option($document_type) {
        return isset(array('invoice' => 'dmx_invoice_number_counter', 'quote' => 'dmx_quote_number_counter', 'work_order' => 'dmx_work_order_number_counter', 'subcontractor_po' => 'dmx_subcontractor_po_number_counter', 'subcontractor_invoice' => 'dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number_counter')[$document_type]) ? array('invoice' => 'dmx_invoice_number_counter', 'quote' => 'dmx_quote_number_counter', 'work_order' => 'dmx_work_order_number_counter', 'subcontractor_po' => 'dmx_subcontractor_po_number_counter', 'subcontractor_invoice' => 'dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number_counter')[$document_type] : 'dmx_quote_number_counter';
    }

    private function get_document_number_prefix($document_type) {
        return isset(array('invoice' => 'INV-', 'quote' => 'QT-', 'work_order' => 'WO-', 'subcontractor_po' => 'SCPO-', 'subcontractor_invoice' => 'SCINV-')[$document_type]) ? array('invoice' => 'INV-', 'quote' => 'QT-', 'work_order' => 'WO-', 'subcontractor_po' => 'SCPO-', 'subcontractor_invoice' => 'SCINV-')[$document_type] : 'QT-';
    }

    private function get_document_number($document_type, $post_id) {
        if ($post_id <= 0) {
            return '';
        }

        return $this->ensure_document_number($document_type, $post_id);
    }

    private function ensure_document_number($document_type, $post_id) {
        if ($post_id <= 0) {
            return '';
        }

        $meta_key = $this->get_document_number_meta_key($document_type);
        $existing = get_post_meta($post_id, $meta_key, true);

        if ($existing !== '') {
            return $existing;
        }

        $counter_option = $this->get_document_number_counter_option($document_type);
        $counter = (int) get_option($counter_option, 1000);
        $counter++;
        update_option($counter_option, $counter);

        $number = $this->get_document_number_prefix($document_type) . $counter;
        update_post_meta($post_id, $meta_key, $number);

        return $number;
    }


    private function ensure_customer_number($post_id) {
        $post_id = absint($post_id);
        if ($post_id <= 0 || get_post_type($post_id) !== 'dm_customer') {
            return '';
        }

        $existing = get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_number', true);
        if ($existing !== '') {
            return $existing;
        }

        $counter = (int) get_option('dmx_customer_number_counter', 1000);
        $counter++;
        update_option('dmx_customer_number_counter', $counter);

        $number = 'CUST-' . $counter;
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_number', $number);
        return $number;
    }

    private function backfill_existing_customer_numbers() {
        $customers = get_posts(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_customer',
            'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
            'posts_per_page' => -1,
            'orderby' => 'date',
            'order' => 'ASC',
            'fields' => 'ids',
        ));

        foreach ($customers as $customer_id) {
            $this->ensure_customer_number((int) $customer_id);
        }
    }

    private function backfill_existing_document_numbers() {
        $document_map = array(
            'quote' => 'dm_quote',
            'invoice' => 'dm_invoice',
            'work_order' => 'dm_work_order',
            'subcontractor_po' => 'dm_subcontractor_po',
            'subcontractor_invoice' => 'dm_subcontractor_invoice',
        );

        foreach ($document_map as $document_type => $post_type) {
            $posts = get_posts(array(
                'post_type' => $post_type,
                'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
                'posts_per_page' => -1,
                'orderby' => 'date',
                'order' => 'ASC',
                'fields' => 'ids',
            ));

            if (empty($posts)) {
                continue;
            }

            foreach ($posts as $post_id) {
                $this->ensure_document_number($document_type, (int) $post_id);
            }
        }
    }

    public function part_sortable_columns($columns) {
        $columns['dmx_part_brand'] = 'dmx_part_brand';
        return $columns;
    }

    public function handle_part_admin_sorting($query) {
        if (!is_admin() || !$query->is_main_query()) { return; }
        if ($query->get('post_type') !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) { return; }
        $orderby = $query->get('orderby');
        if ($orderby !== 'dmx_part_brand') { return; }
        $query->set('meta_key', '_' . $orderby);
        $query->set('orderby', 'meta_value');
    }

    public function add_part_admin_filters() {
        global $typenow;
        if ($typenow !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) { return; }
        wp_dropdown_categories(array('show_option_all' => 'All Part Categories','taxonomy' => self::PART_TAXONOMY,'name' => self::PART_TAXONOMY,'orderby' => 'name','selected' => isset($_GET[self::PART_TAXONOMY]) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET[self::PART_TAXONOMY])) : '','hierarchical' => true,'depth' => 3,'hide_empty' => false,'value_field' => 'slug',));
        $brand_filter = isset($_GET['dmx_part_brand_filter']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_part_brand_filter'])) : '';
        $active_filter = isset($_GET['dmx_part_active_filter']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_part_active_filter'])) : '';
        echo '<input type="text" name="dmx_part_brand_filter" placeholder="Filter by brand" value="' . esc_attr($brand_filter) . '" style="margin-left:6px;">';
        echo '<select name="dmx_part_active_filter" style="margin-left:6px;"><option value="">Active / Inactive</option><option value="yes"' . selected($active_filter, 'yes', false) . '>Active</option><option value="no"' . selected($active_filter, 'no', false) . '>Inactive</option></select>';
    }

    public function apply_part_admin_filters($query) {
        global $pagenow, $typenow;
        if ($pagenow !== 'edit.php' || $typenow !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) { return $query; }
        $meta_query = array();
        if (!empty($_GET['dmx_part_brand_filter'])) {
            $meta_query[] = array('key' => '_dmx_part_brand','value' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_part_brand_filter'])),'compare' => 'LIKE',);
        }
        if (!empty($_GET['dmx_part_active_filter'])) {
            $meta_query[] = array('key' => '_dmx_part_active','value' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_part_active_filter'])),'compare' => '=',);
        }
        if (!empty($meta_query)) { $query->query_vars['meta_query'] = $meta_query; }
        return $query;
    }


    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // Phase 1B — Saved Items / Autofill
    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

    public function register_saved_item_post_type() {
        register_post_type(self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE, array(
            'labels' => array(
                'name' => 'Saved Items',
                'singular_name' => 'Saved Item',
                'add_new_item' => 'Add New Saved Item',
                'edit_item' => 'Edit Saved Item',
                'all_items' => 'All Saved Items',
                'menu_name' => 'Saved Items',
            ),
            'public' => false,
            'show_ui' => true,
            'show_in_menu' => false,
            'supports' => array('title', 'editor'),
            'capability_type' => 'post',
            'map_meta_cap' => true,
        ));
    }

    public function register_saved_item_taxonomy() {
        register_taxonomy(self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY, array(self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE), array(
            'labels' => array(
                'name' => 'Saved Item Categories',
                'singular_name' => 'Saved Item Category',
                'search_items' => 'Search Saved Item Categories',
                'all_items' => 'All Saved Item Categories',
                'edit_item' => 'Edit Saved Item Category',
                'update_item' => 'Update Saved Item Category',
                'add_new_item' => 'Add New Saved Item Category',
                'new_item_name' => 'New Saved Item Category',
                'menu_name' => 'Saved Item Categories',
            ),
            'public' => false,
            'show_ui' => true,
            'show_admin_column' => true,
            'hierarchical' => true,
            'rewrite' => false,
        ));

        $this->seed_saved_item_categories();
        $this->seed_preloaded_saved_items_library();
    }

    private function seed_saved_item_categories() {
        $categories = array(
            'labour-item'       => 'Labour Item',
            'service-package'   => 'Service Package',
            'parts-item'        => 'Parts Item',
            'travel-charge'     => 'Travel Charge',
            'equipment-item'    => 'Equipment Item',
            'install-item'      => 'Install Item',
            'removal-item'      => 'Removal Item',
            'custom-item'       => 'Custom Item',
            'new-door-template' => 'New Door Template',
        );

        foreach ($categories as $slug => $label) {
            if (!term_exists($slug, self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY)) {
                wp_insert_term($label, self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY, array('slug' => $slug));
            }
        }
    }


    private function seed_preloaded_saved_items_library() {
        if (!post_type_exists(self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE) || !taxonomy_exists(self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY)) {
            return;
        }

        $items = $this->get_preloaded_saved_items_catalog();

        foreach ($items as $item) {
            $this->upsert_preloaded_saved_item($item);
        }
    }

    private function upsert_preloaded_saved_item($item) {
        $item = wp_parse_args($item, array(
            'preload_key' => '',
            'title' => '',
            'category' => '',
            'notes' => '',
            'type' => 'single',
            'taxable' => 'yes',
            'active' => 'yes',
            'default_qty' => '1',
            'meta' => array(),
        ));

        if ($item['preload_key'] === '' || $item['title'] === '' || $item['category'] === '') {
            return;
        }

        $existing = get_posts(array(
            'post_type' => self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE,
            'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
            'posts_per_page' => 1,
            'fields' => 'ids',
            'meta_key' => '_dmx_saved_item_preload_key',
            'meta_value' => $item['preload_key'],
        ));

        if (!empty($existing)) {
            $post_id = (int) $existing[0];
            wp_update_post(array(
                'ID' => $post_id,
                'post_title' => $item['title'],
                'post_content' => $item['notes'],
                'post_status' => 'publish',
            ));
        } else {
            $post_id = wp_insert_post(array(
                'post_type' => self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE,
                'post_status' => 'publish',
                'post_title' => $item['title'],
                'post_content' => $item['notes'],
            ));
        }

        if (!$post_id || is_wp_error($post_id)) {
            return;
        }

        wp_set_object_terms($post_id, array($item['category']), self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY, false);

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_preload_key', $item['preload_key']);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_type', $item['type']);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_taxable', $item['taxable']);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_active', $item['active']);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_default_qty', $item['default_qty']);

        foreach ($item['meta'] as $meta_key => $meta_value) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_' . $meta_key, $meta_value);
        }
    }

            'install-commercial-high-lift' => 'Install - Commercial High Lift',
            'install-commercial-low-headroom' => 'Install - Commercial Low Headroom',
            'install-commercial-full-vertical' => 'Install - Commercial Full Vertical',
            'install-commercial-standard-lift' => 'Install - Commercial Standard Lift',
            'install-commercial-follow-the-roof' => 'Install - Commercial Follow the Roof',
            'install-commercial-16x16' => 'Install - Commercial Door 16x16',
            'install-commercial-18x16' => 'Install - Commercial Door 18x16',
            'install-commercial-20x16' => 'Install - Commercial Door 20x16',
            'install-commercial-24x16' => 'Install - Commercial Door 24x16',
        );

        foreach ($extra_install_titles as $preload_key => $title) {
            $items[] = array(
                'preload_key' => $preload_key,
                'title' => $title,
                'category' => 'install-item',
                'notes' => 'Preloaded install item.',
                'meta' => array(),
            );
        }

        return $items;
    }


    private function get_saved_item_category_slug($post_id) {
        $terms = wp_get_post_terms($post_id, self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY);
        if (!empty($terms) && !is_wp_error($terms)) {
            return $terms[0]->slug;
        }
        return '';
    }

    private function get_saved_item_parameter_meta($post_id, $key, $default = '') {
        $value = get_post_meta($post_id, '_' . $key, true);
        return ($value === '' || $value === null) ? $default : $value;
    }

    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // 5. META BOXES
    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

    public function add_saved_item_meta_boxes() {
        add_meta_box(
            'dmx_saved_item_core_meta',
            'Saved Item Details',
            array($this, 'saved_item_core_meta_box'),
            self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE,
            'normal',
            'high'
        );

        add_meta_box(
            'dmx_saved_item_package_meta',
            'Package / Bundle Items',
            array($this, 'saved_item_package_meta_box'),
            self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE,
            'normal',
            'default'
        );
    }

            .dmx-saved-param-panel.active{display:block}
        </style>
