        </p>
        <p class="dmx-small-note">Saved Items can also be preloaded. Set the price once, save it, and update it later any time.</p>

        <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            function getSavedItemCategorySlug() {
                var checked = document.querySelector('input[name="tax_input[<?php echo esc_js(self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY); ?>][]"]:checked');
                if (checked) return checked.value;
                var select = document.querySelector('#taxonomy-<?php echo esc_js(self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY); ?> select');
                if (select && select.value) return select.value;
                return '';
            }
            function refreshSavedPanels() {
                var slug = getSavedItemCategorySlug();
                document.querySelectorAll('.dmx-saved-param-panel').forEach(function(panel) {
                    panel.classList.remove('active');
                });
                if (!slug) return;
                var activePanel = document.querySelector('.dmx-saved-param-panel[data-category="' + slug + '"]');
                if (activePanel) activePanel.classList.add('active');
            }
            document.querySelectorAll('input[name="tax_input[<?php echo esc_js(self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY); ?>][]"]').forEach(function(el) {
                el.addEventListener('change', refreshSavedPanels);
            });
            var select = document.querySelector('#taxonomy-<?php echo esc_js(self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY); ?> select');
            if (select) select.addEventListener('change', refreshSavedPanels);
            refreshSavedPanels();
        });
        </script>
        <?php
    }

    public function saved_item_package_meta_box($post) {
        $rows = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_saved_item_package_rows', true);
        if (!is_array($rows)) {
            $rows = array();
        }

        $parts = get_posts(array(
            'post_type'      => 'dm_part',
            'post_status'    => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => 300,
            'orderby'        => 'title',
            'order'          => 'ASC',
        ));
        ?>
        <p>Use this section for package / bundle saved items. A package can contain manual lines and linked Parts Library items.</p>

        <table class="dmx-package-table" id="dmx-package-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th style="width:120px;">Row Type</th>
                    <th>Linked Part</th>
                    <th>Description</th>
                    <th style="width:90px;">Qty</th>
                    <th style="width:120px;">Sell Price</th>
                    <th style="width:120px;">Cost</th>
                    <th style="width:90px;">Taxable</th>
                    <th style="width:80px;">Sort</th>
                    <th style="width:70px;">Remove</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
            <?php if (!empty($rows)) : ?>
                <?php foreach ($rows as $index => $row) : ?>
                    <?php $this->render_saved_item_package_row($index, $row, $parts); ?>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            <?php endif; ?>
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <p class="dmx-add-row">
            <button type="button" class="button button-primary" id="dmx-add-package-row">Add Package Row</button>
        </p>

        <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            var btn = document.getElementById('dmx-add-package-row');
            var tbody = document.querySelector('#dmx-package-table tbody');
            if (!btn || !tbody) return;

            btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                var index = tbody.querySelectorAll('tr').length;
                var template = <?php echo wp_json_encode($this->get_saved_item_package_row_template($parts)); ?>;
                template = template.replace(/__INDEX__/g, index);
                tbody.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', template);
            });

            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target && e.target.classList.contains('dmx-remove-package-row')) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    var row = e.target.closest('tr');
                    if (row) row.remove();
                }
            });
        });
        </script>
        <?php
    }

    private function render_saved_item_package_row($index, $row, $parts) {
        $row = wp_parse_args($row, array(
            'row_type'    => 'manual',
            'part_id'     => '',
            'description' => '',
            'qty'         => '1',
            'sell_price'  => '',
            'cost'        => '',
            'taxable'     => 'yes',
            'sort_order'  => $index + 1,
        ));
        echo $this->get_saved_item_package_row_markup($index, $row, $parts);
    }

    private function get_saved_item_package_row_template($parts) {
        $row = array(
            'row_type'    => 'manual',
            'part_id'     => '',
            'description' => '',
            'qty'         => '1',
            'sell_price'  => '',
            'cost'        => '',
            'taxable'     => 'yes',
            'sort_order'  => '',
        );
        return $this->get_saved_item_package_row_markup('__INDEX__', $row, $parts);
    }

    private function get_saved_item_package_row_markup($index, $row, $parts) {
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <tr>
            <td>
                <select name="dmx_saved_package_rows[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][row_type]">
                    <option value="manual" <?php selected($row['row_type'], 'manual'); ?>>Manual</option>
                    <option value="part" <?php selected($row['row_type'], 'part'); ?>>Part Link</option>
                </select>
            </td>
            <td>
                <select name="dmx_saved_package_rows[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][part_id]">
                    <option value="">Select Part</option>
                    <?php foreach ($parts as $part) : ?>
                        <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($part->ID); ?>" <?php selected((string) $row['part_id'], (string) $part->ID); ?>>
                            <?php echo esc_html($part->post_title); ?>
                        </option>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </select>
            </td>
            <td>
                <input type="text" name="dmx_saved_package_rows[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][description]" value="<?php echo esc_attr($row['description']); ?>">
            </td>
            <td>
                <input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="dmx_saved_package_rows[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][qty]" value="<?php echo esc_attr($row['qty']); ?>">
            </td>
            <td>
                <input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="dmx_saved_package_rows[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][sell_price]" value="<?php echo esc_attr($row['sell_price']); ?>">
            </td>
            <td>
                <input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="dmx_saved_package_rows[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][cost]" value="<?php echo esc_attr($row['cost']); ?>">
            </td>
            <td>
                <select name="dmx_saved_package_rows[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][taxable]">
                    <option value="yes" <?php selected($row['taxable'], 'yes'); ?>>Yes</option>
                    <option value="no" <?php selected($row['taxable'], 'no'); ?>>No</option>
                </select>
            </td>
            <td>
                <input type="number" step="1" min="0" name="dmx_saved_package_rows[<?php echo esc_attr($index); ?>][sort_order]" value="<?php echo esc_attr($row['sort_order']); ?>">
            </td>
            <td>
                <button type="button" class="button dmx-remove-package-row">X</button>
            </td>
        </tr>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // 6. SAVE META
    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

    public function save_saved_item_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_saved_item_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_saved_item_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_type', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_saved_item_type'] ?? 'single'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_default_qty', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_saved_item_default_qty'] ?? '1'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_taxable', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_saved_item_taxable'] ?? 'yes'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_active', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_saved_item_active'] ?? 'yes'));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_notes', sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['dmx_saved_item_notes'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_sell_price', $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['dmx_saved_item_sell_price'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_cost', $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['dmx_saved_item_cost'] ?? ''));

        $parameter_decimal_fields = array(
            'dmx_labour_hourly_rate','dmx_labour_flat_rate',
            'dmx_travel_flat_rate','dmx_travel_distance_rate',
            'dmx_install_res_single_door_rate','dmx_install_res_double_door_rate','dmx_install_res_height_8_rate','dmx_install_res_height_10_rate','dmx_install_res_height_12_rate',
            'dmx_install_res_trolley_rate','dmx_install_res_sidemount_rate','dmx_install_commercial_door_sqft_rate',
            'dmx_install_commercial_trolley_upto12_rate','dmx_install_commercial_trolley_14_16_rate','dmx_install_commercial_trolley_18plus_rate',
            'dmx_install_commercial_jackshaft_rate','dmx_install_backframing_door_rate','dmx_install_backframing_opener_rate',
            'dmx_removal_flat_rate','dmx_removal_per_opening_rate'
        );
        $parameter_text_fields = array(
            'dmx_labour_rate_type','dmx_travel_rate_type','dmx_removal_rate_type'
        );

        foreach ($parameter_decimal_fields as $field) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_' . $field, $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST[$field] ?? ''));
        }
        foreach ($parameter_text_fields as $field) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_' . $field, sanitize_text_field($_POST[$field] ?? ''));
        }

        $clean_rows = array();
        $raw_rows = $_POST['dmx_saved_package_rows'] ?? array();

        if (is_array($raw_rows)) {
            foreach ($raw_rows as $row) {
                $row_type    = sanitize_text_field($row['row_type'] ?? 'manual');
                $part_id     = absint($row['part_id'] ?? 0);
                $description = sanitize_text_field($row['description'] ?? '');
                $qty         = sanitize_text_field($row['qty'] ?? '1');
                $sell_price  = $this->sanitize_decimal($row['sell_price'] ?? '');
                $cost        = $this->sanitize_decimal($row['cost'] ?? '');
                $taxable     = sanitize_text_field($row['taxable'] ?? 'yes');
                $sort_order  = intval($row['sort_order'] ?? 0);

                if ($description === '' && $part_id === 0 && $sell_price === '' && $cost === '') {
                    continue;
                }

                $clean_rows[] = array(
                    'row_type'    => $row_type,
                    'part_id'     => $part_id,
                    'description' => $description,
                    'qty'         => $qty,
                    'sell_price'  => $sell_price,
                    'cost'        => $cost,
                    'taxable'     => $taxable,
                    'sort_order'  => $sort_order,
                );
            }
        }

        usort($clean_rows, function($a, $b) {
            return intval($a['sort_order']) <=> intval($b['sort_order']);
        });

        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_saved_item_package_rows', $clean_rows);
    }

    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // 7. ADMIN COLUMNS
    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

    public function saved_item_admin_columns($columns) {
        $new_columns = array();

        foreach ($columns as $key => $label) {
            if ($key === 'title') {
                $new_columns['title'] = 'Saved Item';
                $new_columns['taxonomy-' . self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY] = 'Category';
                $new_columns['dmx_saved_item_type'] = 'Type';
                $new_columns['dmx_saved_item_sell_price'] = 'Sell Price';
                $new_columns['dmx_saved_item_cost'] = 'Cost';
                $new_columns['dmx_saved_item_active'] = 'Active';
            } else {
                $new_columns[$key] = $label;
            }
        }

        return $new_columns;
    }

    public function render_saved_item_admin_columns($column, $post_id) {
        switch ($column) {
            case 'dmx_saved_item_type':
                echo esc_html(ucfirst($this->get_saved_item_meta($post_id, 'dmx_saved_item_type', 'single')));
                break;
            case 'dmx_saved_item_sell_price':
                echo esc_html($this->format_money($this->get_saved_item_meta($post_id, 'dmx_saved_item_sell_price')));
                break;
            case 'dmx_saved_item_cost':
                echo esc_html($this->format_money($this->get_saved_item_meta($post_id, 'dmx_saved_item_cost')));
                break;
            case 'dmx_saved_item_active':
                echo esc_html($this->get_saved_item_meta($post_id, 'dmx_saved_item_active', 'yes') === 'yes' ? 'Yes' : 'No');
                break;
        }
    }

    public function saved_item_sortable_columns($columns) {
        $columns['dmx_saved_item_type'] = 'dmx_saved_item_type';
        $columns['dmx_saved_item_sell_price'] = 'dmx_saved_item_sell_price';
        $columns['dmx_saved_item_cost'] = 'dmx_saved_item_cost';
        return $columns;
    }

    public function handle_saved_item_admin_sorting($query) {
        if (!is_admin() || !$query->is_main_query()) {
            return;
        }

        if ($query->get('post_type') !== self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE) {
            return;
        }

        $orderby = $query->get('orderby');
        if (!in_array($orderby, array('dmx_saved_item_type', 'dmx_saved_item_sell_price', 'dmx_saved_item_cost'), true)) {
            return;
        }

        $query->set('meta_key', '_' . $orderby);

        if (in_array($orderby, array('dmx_saved_item_sell_price', 'dmx_saved_item_cost'), true)) {
            $query->set('orderby', 'meta_value_num');
        } else {
            $query->set('orderby', 'meta_value');
        }
    }

    public function add_saved_item_admin_filters() {
        global $typenow;
        if ($typenow !== self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE) {
            return;
        }

        wp_dropdown_categories(array(
            'show_option_all' => 'All Saved Item Categories',
            'taxonomy'        => self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY,
            'name'            => self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY,
            'orderby'         => 'name',
            'selected'        => isset($_GET[self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY]) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET[self::SAVED_ITEM_TAXONOMY])) : '',
            'hierarchical'    => true,
            'depth'           => 3,
            'hide_empty'      => false,
            'value_field'     => 'slug',
        ));

        $type_filter = isset($_GET['dmx_saved_item_type_filter']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_saved_item_type_filter'])) : '';
        $active_filter = isset($_GET['dmx_saved_item_active_filter']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_saved_item_active_filter'])) : '';

        echo '<select name="dmx_saved_item_type_filter" style="margin-left:6px;">';
        echo '<option value="">All Types</option>';
        echo '<option value="single"' . selected($type_filter, 'single', false) . '>Single</option>';
        echo '<option value="package"' . selected($type_filter, 'package', false) . '>Package</option>';
        echo '</select>';

        echo '<select name="dmx_saved_item_active_filter" style="margin-left:6px;">';
        echo '<option value="">Active / Inactive</option>';
        echo '<option value="yes"' . selected($active_filter, 'yes', false) . '>Active</option>';
        echo '<option value="no"' . selected($active_filter, 'no', false) . '>Inactive</option>';
        echo '</select>';
    }

    public function apply_saved_item_admin_filters($query) {
        global $pagenow, $typenow;

        if ($pagenow !== 'edit.php' || $typenow !== self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE) {
            return $query;
        }

        $meta_query = array();

        if (!empty($_GET['dmx_saved_item_type_filter'])) {
            $meta_query[] = array(
                'key'     => '_dmx_saved_item_type',
                'value'   => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_saved_item_type_filter'])),
                'compare' => '=',
            );
        }

        if (!empty($_GET['dmx_saved_item_active_filter'])) {
            $meta_query[] = array(
                'key'     => '_dmx_saved_item_active',
                'value'   => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_saved_item_active_filter'])),
                'compare' => '=',
            );
        }

        if (!empty($meta_query)) {
            $query->query_vars['meta_query'] = $meta_query;
        }

        return $query;
    }

    private function get_saved_item_meta($post_id, $key, $default = '') {
        $value = get_post_meta($post_id, '_' . $key, true);
        return ($value === '' || $value === null) ? $default : $value;
    }

    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    // 8. OPTIONAL HELPER FOR LATER QUOTING / AUTOFILL
    // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

    public function dmx_get_saved_item_package_rows($saved_item_id) {
        $rows = get_post_meta($saved_item_id, '_dmx_saved_item_package_rows', true);
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    }

    public function dmx_get_saved_item_payload($saved_item_id) {
        return array(
            'id'           => $saved_item_id,
            'title'        => get_the_title($saved_item_id),
            'type'         => $this->get_saved_item_meta($saved_item_id, 'dmx_saved_item_type', 'single'),
            'default_qty'  => $this->get_saved_item_meta($saved_item_id, 'dmx_saved_item_default_qty', '1'),
            'sell_price'   => $this->get_saved_item_meta($saved_item_id, 'dmx_saved_item_sell_price'),
            'cost'         => $this->get_saved_item_meta($saved_item_id, 'dmx_saved_item_cost'),
            'taxable'      => $this->get_saved_item_meta($saved_item_id, 'dmx_saved_item_taxable', 'yes'),
            'notes'        => $this->get_saved_item_meta($saved_item_id, 'dmx_saved_item_notes'),
            'package_rows' => $this->dmx_get_saved_item_package_rows($saved_item_id),
        );
    }


    private function get_saved_items_for_quote_builder() {
        $posts = get_posts(array(
            'post_type'      => self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE,
            'post_status'    => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => 500,
            'orderby'        => 'title',
            'order'          => 'ASC',
            'meta_query'     => array(
                array(
                    'key'     => '_dmx_saved_item_active',
                    'value'   => 'yes',
                    'compare' => '=',
                ),
            ),
        ));

        $items = array();

        foreach ($posts as $post) {
            $category_slug = $this->get_saved_item_category_slug($post->ID);
            $quote_type = 'custom';

            if (in_array($category_slug, array('labour-item'), true)) {
                $quote_type = 'labour';
            } elseif (in_array($category_slug, array('travel-charge'), true)) {
                $quote_type = 'travel';
            } elseif (in_array($category_slug, array('equipment-item'), true)) {
                $quote_type = 'equipment';
            } elseif (in_array($category_slug, array('install-item', 'new-door-template'), true)) {
                $quote_type = 'install';
            } elseif (in_array($category_slug, array('removal-item'), true)) {
                $quote_type = 'removal';
            } elseif (in_array($category_slug, array('parts-item'), true)) {
                $quote_type = 'part';
            }

            $items[] = array(
                'id'         => $post->ID,
                'source_type'=> 'saved_item',
                'quote_type' => $quote_type,
                'title'      => $post->post_title,
                'label'      => $post->post_title,
                'sell_price' => $this->get_saved_item_meta($post->ID, 'dmx_saved_item_sell_price'),
                'category'   => $category_slug,
                'taxable'    => $this->get_saved_item_meta($post->ID, 'dmx_saved_item_taxable', 'yes'),
            );
        }

        return $items;
    }

    private function get_parts_for_quote_builder() {
        $posts = get_posts(array(
            'post_type'      => self::PART_POST_TYPE,
            'post_status'    => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => 1000,
            'orderby'        => 'title',
            'order'          => 'ASC',
            'meta_query'     => array(
                array(
                    'key'     => '_dmx_part_active',
                    'value'   => 'yes',
                    'compare' => '=',
                ),
            ),
        ));

        $parts = array();

        foreach ($posts as $post) {
            $brand = $this->get_part_meta($post->ID, 'dmx_part_brand');
            $sku = $this->get_part_meta($post->ID, 'dmx_part_internal_sku');
            if ($sku === '') {
                $sku = $this->get_part_meta($post->ID, 'dmx_part_supplier_sku');
            }
            $sell_price = $this->get_company_part_price_value($post->ID, 'sell_price', '');
            $label = $post->post_title;

            if ($brand !== '') {
                $label .= ' | ' . $brand;
            }
            if ($sku !== '') {
                $label .= ' | SKU: ' . $sku;
            }

            $parts[] = array(
                'id'          => $post->ID,
                'title'       => $post->post_title,
                'label'       => $label,
                'sku'         => $sku,
                'description' => $post->post_title,
                'sell_price'  => $sell_price,
                'source_type' => 'part',
                'quote_type'  => 'part',
                'category'    => $this->get_part_category_slug($post->ID),
                'taxable'     => $this->get_part_meta($post->ID, 'dmx_part_taxable', 'yes'),
            );
        }

        return $parts;
    }

    private function get_customers_for_lookup() {
        $posts = $this->get_posts_for_user('dm_customer', 1000);
        $customers = array();

        foreach ($posts as $post) {
            $name = $post->post_title;
            $company = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_company_name', true);
            $email = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_customer_email', true);
            $phone = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_customer_phone', true);
            $address_1 = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_customer_address_1', true);
            $address_2 = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_customer_address_2', true);
            $city = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_customer_city', true);
            $province = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_customer_province', true);
            $postal_code = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_customer_postal_code', true);
            $address_summary = $this->get_customer_address_summary($post->ID);
            $customer_number = $this->ensure_customer_number($post->ID);

            $label_parts = array_filter(array($customer_number, $name, $company, $email, $phone));

            $customers[] = array(
                'id' => $post->ID,
                'customer_number' => $customer_number,
                'title' => $name,
                'name' => $name,
                'company' => $company,
                'label' => implode(' | ', $label_parts),
                'email' => $email,
                'phone' => $phone,
                'address_1' => $address_1,
                'address_2' => $address_2,
                'city' => $city,
                'province' => $province,
                'postal_code' => $postal_code,
                'address_summary' => $address_summary,
                'attention' => $name,
                'description' => $address_summary,
            );
        }

        return $customers;
    }

    private function get_clean_quote_line_items_from_request() {
        return $this->get_clean_line_items_from_request('quote_line_items');
    }

    private function get_clean_line_items_from_request($request_key = 'quote_line_items') {
        $raw_items = $_POST[$request_key] ?? array();
        $clean_items = array();

        if (!is_array($raw_items)) {
            return $clean_items;
        }

        foreach ($raw_items as $row) {
            $type = sanitize_text_field($row['type'] ?? 'custom');
            $part_id = absint($row['part_id'] ?? 0);
            $source_type = sanitize_text_field($row['source_type'] ?? '');
            $source_id = absint($row['source_id'] ?? 0);
            $update_default = sanitize_text_field($row['update_default'] ?? '');
            $search = sanitize_text_field($row['search'] ?? '');
            $description = sanitize_text_field($row['description'] ?? '');
            $qty = is_numeric($row['qty'] ?? '') ? (float) $row['qty'] : 0;
            $unit_price = is_numeric($row['unit_price'] ?? '') ? (float) $row['unit_price'] : 0;
            $true_unit_cost = is_numeric($row['true_unit_cost'] ?? '') ? (float) $row['true_unit_cost'] : 0;
            $taxable = sanitize_text_field($row['taxable'] ?? 'yes');

            if ($description === '' && $search !== '') {
                $description = $search;
            }

            if ($part_id > 0 && $description === '') {
                $description = get_the_title($part_id);
            }

            if ($description === '' && $part_id === 0) {
                continue;
            }

            if ($qty <= 0) {
                $qty = 1;
            }

            $clean_items[] = array(
                'type'        => $type,
                'part_id'     => $part_id,
                'source_type' => $source_type,
                'source_id'   => $source_id,
                'update_default' => ($update_default === 'yes' ? 'yes' : 'no'),
                'search'      => $search,
                'description' => $description,
                'qty'         => $qty,
                'unit_price'  => number_format($unit_price, 2, '.', ''),
                'line_total'  => number_format($qty * $unit_price, 2, '.', ''),
                'true_unit_cost' => number_format($true_unit_cost, 2, '.', ''),
                'line_true_cost' => number_format($qty * $true_unit_cost, 2, '.', ''),
                'taxable'     => ($taxable === 'no' ? 'no' : 'yes'),
            );
        }

        return $clean_items;
    }


    private function normalize_document_line_items_for_editor($items) {
        if (!is_array($items)) {
            return array();
        }

        $normalized = array();

        foreach ($items as $item) {
            if (!is_array($item)) {
                continue;
            }

            $qty_raw = $item['qty'] ?? ($item['quantity'] ?? ($item['qty_ordered'] ?? 1));
            $qty = is_numeric($qty_raw) ? (float) $qty_raw : 1;
            if ($qty <= 0) {
                $qty = 1;
            }

            $unit_price_raw = '';
            foreach (array('unit_price', 'price', 'rate', 'sell_price', 'amount', 'cost') as $price_key) {
                if (isset($item[$price_key]) && $item[$price_key] !== '') {
                    $unit_price_raw = $item[$price_key];
                    break;
                }
            }
            $unit_price = is_numeric($unit_price_raw) ? (float) $unit_price_raw : 0;
            $true_unit_cost_raw = '';
            foreach (array('true_unit_cost', 'unit_cost', 'actual_cost', 'true_cost', 'cost_price') as $cost_key) {
                if (isset($item[$cost_key]) && $item[$cost_key] !== '') { $true_unit_cost_raw = $item[$cost_key]; break; }
            }
            $true_unit_cost = is_numeric($true_unit_cost_raw) ? (float) $true_unit_cost_raw : 0;
            if ($true_unit_cost <= 0 && isset($item['line_true_cost']) && is_numeric($item['line_true_cost']) && $qty > 0) {
                $true_unit_cost = ((float) $item['line_true_cost']) / $qty;
            }

            if ($unit_price <= 0 && isset($item['line_total']) && is_numeric($item['line_total']) && $qty > 0) {
                $unit_price = ((float) $item['line_total']) / $qty;
            }

            $description = '';
            foreach (array('description', 'name', 'title', 'label', 'item', 'product_name') as $desc_key) {
                if (!empty($item[$desc_key])) {
                    $description = sanitize_text_field($item[$desc_key]);
                    break;
                }
            }

            $search = '';
            foreach (array('search', 'label', 'name', 'title', 'description', 'item', 'product_name') as $search_key) {
                if (!empty($item[$search_key])) {
                    $search = sanitize_text_field($item[$search_key]);
                    break;
                }
            }

            $part_id = absint($item['part_id'] ?? ($item['product_id'] ?? ($item['id'] ?? 0)));
            $type = sanitize_text_field($item['type'] ?? ($item['item_type'] ?? ($item['category'] ?? 'custom')));
            $allowed_types = array('part', 'labour', 'travel', 'install', 'removal', 'custom');
            if (!in_array($type, $allowed_types, true)) {
                $type = ($part_id > 0) ? 'part' : 'custom';
            }

            $source_type = sanitize_text_field($item['source_type'] ?? '');
            $source_id = absint($item['source_id'] ?? 0);
            if ($source_type === '' && $part_id > 0) {
                $source_type = 'part';
            }
            if ($source_id <= 0 && $part_id > 0) {
                $source_id = $part_id;
            }

            $taxable = sanitize_text_field($item['taxable'] ?? ($item['tax_status'] ?? 'yes'));
            $taxable = ($taxable === 'no' || $taxable === '0') ? 'no' : 'yes';

            if ($description === '' && $search === '' && $part_id === 0) {
                continue;
            }

            if ($description === '' && $search !== '') {
                $description = $search;
            }

            if ($search === '' && $description !== '') {
                $search = $description;
            }

            $normalized[] = array(
                'type' => $type,
                'part_id' => $part_id,
                'source_type' => $source_type,
                'source_id' => $source_id,
                'update_default' => (!empty($item['update_default']) && $item['update_default'] === 'yes') ? 'yes' : 'no',
                'search' => $search,
                'description' => $description,
                'qty' => $qty,
                'unit_price' => number_format($unit_price, 2, '.', ''),
                'line_total' => number_format($qty * $unit_price, 2, '.', ''),
                'true_unit_cost' => number_format($true_unit_cost, 2, '.', ''),
                'line_true_cost' => number_format($qty * $true_unit_cost, 2, '.', ''),
                'taxable' => $taxable,
            );
        }

        return $normalized;
    }

    private function calculate_quote_line_items_total($items) {
        $total = 0;

        if (!is_array($items)) {
            return $total;
        }

        foreach ($items as $item) {
            $qty = isset($item['qty']) ? (float) $item['qty'] : 0;
            $unit_price = isset($item['unit_price']) ? (float) $item['unit_price'] : 0;
            $total += ($qty * $unit_price);
        }

        return $total;
    }


    private function update_quote_builder_source_prices($items) {
        if (!is_array($items)) {
            return;
        }

        foreach ($items as $item) {
            $should_update = isset($item['update_default']) && $item['update_default'] === 'yes';
            $unit_price = isset($item['unit_price']) ? $this->sanitize_decimal($item['unit_price']) : '';
            $source_type = isset($item['source_type']) ? $item['source_type'] : '';
            $source_id = isset($item['source_id']) ? absint($item['source_id']) : 0;

            if (!$should_update || $unit_price === '' || $source_id <= 0) {
                continue;
            }

            if ($source_type === 'part' && get_post_type($source_id) === self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
                $this->update_company_part_price_value($source_id, 'sell_price', $unit_price);

                if (isset($item['true_unit_cost'])) {
                    $true_unit_cost = $this->sanitize_decimal($item['true_unit_cost']);
                    if ($true_unit_cost !== '') {
                        $this->update_company_part_price_value($source_id, 'cost', $true_unit_cost);
                    }
                }
            }

            if ($source_type === 'saved_item' && get_post_type($source_id) === self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE) {
                update_post_meta($source_id, '_dmx_saved_item_sell_price', $unit_price);
            }
        }
    }

    private function get_customer_address_summary($customer_id) {
        $parts = array_filter(array(
            get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_address_1', true),
            get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_address_2', true),
            get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_city', true),
            get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_province', true),
            get_post_meta($customer_id, '_dmx_customer_postal_code', true),
        ));

        return implode(', ', $parts);
    }

    private function get_app_section_title($tab) {
        $map = array(
            'overview' => 'Dashboard',
            'sales' => 'Sales Workflow',
            'sales_scheduler' => 'Sales Schedule',
            'scheduler' => 'Technician Schedule',
            'costs' => 'Inventory',
            'accounting' => 'Accounting',
            'reports' => 'Reports',
            'messages' => 'Messages',
            'subcontractors' => 'Subcontractors',
            'calculators' => 'Tools',
            'settings' => 'Settings',
            'inspections' => 'Inspections',
            'customers' => 'Customers',
            'help' => 'Help & Support',
            'staff' => 'Manage Team',
        );
        return isset($map[$tab]) ? $map[$tab] : 'DoorMatrix';
    }

    private function get_app_section_subtitle($tab) {
        $map = array(
            'overview' => $this->get_role_dashboard_subtitle(),
            'sales' => 'Work orders, quotes, invoices, and payments.',
            'sales_scheduler' => 'Appointments, site checks, and sales rep calendars for customer visits.',
            'scheduler' => 'Technician dispatch, helper crews, job scheduling, and warehouse pull planning.',
            'costs' => 'Warehouse inventory, truck inventory, receiving, transfers, low-stock visibility, and inventory activity.',
            'accounting' => 'Expenses, receivables, recurring costs, payments, and finance workflow.',
            'reports' => 'Business performance, team breakdowns, reporting, and export-ready summaries.',
            'messages' => 'Company-isolated internal team messaging with record-linked conversation threads.',
            'subcontractors' => 'Purchase orders, subcontractor invoices, and outside labour workflow.',
            'calculators' => 'Spring tools, inspection tools, and field level hazard assessment workflows inside DoorMatrix.',
            'settings' => 'Company setup, tax, currency, document layouts, attachments, and app defaults.',
            'inspections' => 'Inspection records and technician workflow.',
            'customers' => 'Customer records, addresses, and contact details.',
            'help' => 'Quick start guides, support contact, and help requests.',
            'staff' => 'Team members, roles, and portal access.',
        );
        return isset($map[$tab]) ? $map[$tab] : '';
    }


    private function get_support_contact_email() {
        return self::SUPPORT_EMAIL;
    }

    private function submit_help_request($tab) {
        $subject = sanitize_text_field($_POST['help_subject'] ?? '');
        $category = sanitize_text_field($_POST['help_category'] ?? 'general');
        $message = trim(wp_kses_post($_POST['help_message'] ?? ''));
        $company_name = $this->get_current_user_company_name();
        $user = wp_get_current_user();

        if ($subject === '' || $message === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('help', 'error', 'Please add a subject and message for your help request.');
        }

        $support_email = $this->get_support_contact_email();
        $reply_to_email = sanitize_email($user->user_email);
        $reply_to_name = sanitize_text_field($user->display_name);

        $category_labels = array(
            'general' => 'General Help',
            'quotes' => 'Quotes / Invoices',
            'scheduler' => 'Scheduler',
            'inspections' => 'Inspections',
            'calculators' => 'Spring Calculator',
            'billing' => 'Billing / Plans',
            'setup' => 'Company Setup',
            'bug' => 'Bug Report',
        );
        $category_label = isset($category_labels[$category]) ? $category_labels[$category] : 'General Help';

        $email_subject = '[DoorMatrix Support] ' . $category_label . ' - ' . $subject;

        $body_lines = array(
            'New DoorMatrix help request',
            '',
            'Company: ' . ($company_name !== '' ? $company_name : 'Not set'),
            'Name: ' . $reply_to_name,
            'Email: ' . $reply_to_email,
            'Category: ' . $category_label,
            'Portal tab: ' . sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_tab'] ?? 'help'),
            '',
            'Message:',
            wp_strip_all_tags($message),
        );

        $headers = array(
            'Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8',
            'From: DoorMatrix Support <' . $support_email . '>',
        );

        if ($reply_to_email !== '') {
            $headers[] = 'Reply-To: ' . $reply_to_name . ' <' . $reply_to_email . '>';
        }

        $sent = wp_mail($support_email, $email_subject, implode("\n", $body_lines), $headers);

        if ($sent) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('help', 'success', 'Your help request was sent. DoorMatrix support will reply from ' . $support_email . '.');
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message('help', 'error', 'Could not send your help request right now. Please email ' . $support_email . '.');
    }

        $support_email = $this->get_support_contact_email();

    private function render_calculator_tool_placeholder($tool_key, $tool, $base_url, $inspection_url) {
        $title = isset($tool['title']) ? (string) $tool['title'] : 'Calculator Tool';
        $summary = isset($tool['summary']) ? (string) $tool['summary'] : 'Calculator workflow preview.';

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-calculator-native-screen">
            <style>
                .dmx-calculator-native-screen{color:#10233d;}
                .dmx-calculator-switch{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin:0 0 20px;}
                .dmx-calculator-switch a{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:42px;padding:0 16px;border-radius:999px;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;font-weight:900;border:1px solid #d7e4f0;background:#eef4fa;color:#173b68;}
                .dmx-calculator-switch a.active{background:#173b68;border-color:#173b68;color:#fff;box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(15,39,74,.12);}
                .dmx-calculator-tool-panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #dce8f3;border-radius:22px;padding:24px;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(8,28,51,.06);}
                .dmx-calculator-tool-panel h2{margin:0 0 8px;color:#0c2340;font-size:30px;font-weight:900;}
                .dmx-calculator-tool-panel p{margin:0 0 18px;color:#61738b;font-size:15px;line-height:1.55;}
                .dmx-calculator-demo-form{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:14px;margin-top:18px;}
                .dmx-calculator-demo-form label{display:grid;gap:7px;font-weight:900;color:#0c2340;font-size:13px;}
                .dmx-calculator-demo-form input,.dmx-calculator-demo-form select{min-height:48px;border:1px solid #dce8f3;border-radius:14px;padding:10px 12px;color:#10233d;background:#fff;}

                .dmx-calculator-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:44px;padding:0 18px;border-radius:14px;background:#0c3b70;color:#fff;font-weight:900;text-decoration:none;border:0;}

                <a href="<?php echo esc_url($inspection_url); ?>">Inspection Forms</a>

                <p>This is a safe DoorMatrix preview panel for the selected calculator. The full calculation engine can be connected in the next pass without breaking the Tools menu.</p>

                    <label>Door Height<input type="text" placeholder="e.g. 14 ft"></label>

private function render_calculators_tab($is_admin = false) {
        $tool = sanitize_key((string) ($_GET['dmx_tool'] ?? ''));
        $base_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-tools')
            : $this->portal_url(array('dmx_tab' => 'calculators'));

        $inspection_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-inspections')
            : $this->portal_url(array('dmx_tab' => 'inspections'));

        $tools = array(
            'spring_builder' => array(
                'title' => 'Spring Builder',
                'summary' => 'Estimate spring size from door dimensions, weight, drum, lift type, and cycle target.',
                'kicker' => 'SPR',
                'class' => 'blue',
            ),
            'spring_conversion' => array(
                'title' => 'Spring Conversion',
                'summary' => 'Use existing spring measurements to compare replacement direction and matched options.',
                'kicker' => 'CON',
                'class' => 'orange',
            ),
            'ippt' => array(
                'title' => 'Springs by IPPT',
                'summary' => 'Search likely spring options by target IPPT, spring ID, quantity, and cycle target.',
                'kicker' => 'IPPT',
                'class' => 'purple',
            ),
            'weight' => array(
                'title' => 'Weight Calculator',
                'summary' => 'Calculate door weight from measured spring, drum, and lift inputs.',
                'kicker' => 'WGT',
                'class' => 'teal',
            ),
            'cable_length' => array(
                'title' => 'Cable Length',
                'summary' => 'Estimate finished cable length and recommended cable diameter from lift type and drum.',
                'kicker' => 'CAB',
                'class' => 'slate',
            ),
        );

        if (isset($tools[$tool])) {
            return $this->render_calculator_tool_placeholder($tool, $tools[$tool], $base_url, $inspection_url);
        }

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-calculator-native-screen">
            <style>
                .dmx-calculator-native-screen {
                    color: #10233d;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-native-head {
                    margin: 0 0 20px;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-native-head h2 {
                    margin: 0 0 8px;
                    color: #0c2340;
                    font-size: 32px;
                    font-weight: 900;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-native-head p {
                    margin: 0;
                    color: #61738b;
                    font-size: 16px;
                    line-height: 1.55;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-switch {
                    display: flex;
                    flex-wrap: wrap;
                    gap: 10px;
                    margin: 0 0 20px;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-switch a {
                    display: inline-flex;
                    align-items: center;
                    justify-content: center;
                    min-height: 42px;
                    padding: 0 16px;
                    border-radius: 999px;
                    text-decoration: none;
                    font-size: 13px;
                    font-weight: 900;
                    border: 1px solid #d7e4f0;
                    background: #eef4fa;
                    color: #173b68;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-switch a.active {
                    background: #173b68;
                    border-color: #173b68;
                    color: #fff;
                    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(15, 39, 74, .12);
                }

                .dmx-calculator-card-grid {
                    display: grid;
                    grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));
                    gap: 16px;
                    align-items: stretch;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-card {
                    min-height: 300px;
                    border-radius: 22px;
                    padding: 22px;
                    text-decoration: none;
                    color: #fff;
                    display: flex;
                    flex-direction: column;
                    justify-content: flex-end;
                    box-shadow: 0 18px 36px rgba(8, 28, 51, .14);
                    position: relative;
                    overflow: hidden;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-card:before {
                    content: "";
                    position: absolute;
                    inset: 0;
                    background-image:
                        linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.055) 1px, transparent 1px),
                        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,.055) 1px, transparent 1px);
                    background-size: 24px 24px;
                    opacity: .65;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-card > * {
                    position: relative;
                    z-index: 1;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-card .kicker {
                    display: inline-flex;
                    align-items: center;
                    justify-content: center;
                    width: 58px;
                    height: 58px;
                    border-radius: 16px;
                    background: rgba(255,255,255,.18);
                    color: #fff;
                    font-weight: 900;
                    margin-bottom: auto;
                    letter-spacing: .04em;
                }

                .dmx-calculator-card h3 {
                    margin: 90px 0 10px;

            </div>

                        <h3><?php echo esc_html($item['title']); ?></h3>
                        <p><?php echo esc_html($item['summary']); ?></p>
                    </a>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-calculator-note">
                <strong>Tools cleanup:</strong> This menu is calculator-only. Door reports, quick safety assessments, hazard assessments, and site checks are opened from Inspections.
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_tools_home($is_admin = false, $base_url = '') {
        if ($base_url === '') {
            $base_url = $is_admin
                ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=calculators')
                : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'calculators'), $this->get_portal_page_url());
        }

        $spring_url = add_query_arg('dmx_tool', 'spring_calculators', $base_url);

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>DoorMatrix Tools</h3>
                <p>Calculator tools for spring building, spring conversion, IPPT, door weight, and cable length. Inspection and safety forms are kept under Inspections.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-tools-grid">
            <div class="dmx-tools-card">
                <h4>Spring Calculator Tools</h4>
                <p>Open the spring builder, spring conversion, springs by IPPT, weight calculator, and cable length tools inside the DoorMatrix portal.</p>
                <div class="dmx-action-row">
                    <a class="dmx-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url($spring_url); ?>">Open Calculator Tools</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-tools-standard-note">
            <strong>Tools cleanup:</strong> Tools is now calculator-only. Detailed Door Reports, Quick Safety Assessments, Hazard Assessments, and Site Checks are under Inspections.
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_spring_calculator_embed() {
        $calculator_markup = $this->get_remote_calculator_markup();

        ob_start(); ?>
        <?php if (!empty($calculator_markup)) : ?>
            <?php echo $calculator_markup; ?>
        <?php else : ?>
            <div class="dmx-card dmx-help-box">
                <h4>Spring calculator could not load right now.</h4>
                <p>The live calculator app could not be pulled into DoorMatrix from GarageDoorSpringCalculator.com. Please try again in a minute.</p>
                <div class="dmx-mini-links">
                    <a href="https://garagedoorspringcalculator.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Open Full Calculator</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_hazard_assessment_categories() {
        return array(
            'environmental' => array('label'=>'Environmental Hazards','input'=>'hazard_environmental','meta'=>'_dmx_hazard_environmental','items'=>array('Work area clean / housekeeping','Wet / Ice / Slippery conditions','Dust / Mist / Fumes','Noise','Extreme temperature','Spill potential','Lighting / low visibility','Excavation / opening nearby','Other workers in area','Traffic or vehicle movement','Review Safety Data Sheet')),
            'ergonomic' => array('label'=>'Ergonomic Hazards','input'=>'hazard_ergonomic','meta'=>'_dmx_hazard_ergonomic','items'=>array('Awkward body position','Over extension','Prolonged twisting / repetitive motion','Bending or twisting motion','Working on hard surface','Heavy lift or awkward lift','Hands not in line of sight','Working above head')),
            'access_egress' => array('label'=>'Access and Egress Hazards','input'=>'hazard_access_egress','meta'=>'_dmx_hazard_access_egress','items'=>array('Aerial lift / man basket inspected and tagged','Scaffold inspected and tagged','Ladders tied off / secured','Scissor lift inspected','Hoisting tools / equipment','Communication alarms / phone number','Confined / restricted space entry permit required')),
            'overhead' => array('label'=>'Overhead Hazards','input'=>'hazard_overhead','meta'=>'_dmx_hazard_overhead','items'=>array('Barricades and signs in place','Head cover required','Harness / lanyard inspected','100% tie-off with harness and anchor point identified','Falling objects','Hoisting or moving loads overhead')),
            'rigging_hoisting' => array('label'=>'Rigging and Hoisting Hazards','input'=>'hazard_rigging_hoisting','meta'=>'_dmx_hazard_rigging_hoisting','items'=>array('Lift study required','Proper tools overhead / below','Tools / sling inspected','Equipment inspected','Competent rigger identified','Critical lift permit required')),
            'electrical' => array('label'=>'Electrical Hazards','input'=>'hazard_electrical','meta'=>'_dmx_hazard_electrical','items'=>array('GFI test','Low lighting level','Fire extinguisher','Hot work or electrical permit required','Exposed wiring','Lockout / tagout required')),
            'personal_limitations' => array('label'=>'Personal Limitations or Hazards','input'=>'hazard_personal_limitations','meta'=>'_dmx_hazard_personal_limitations','items'=>array('Procedure not available for task','Confusing instructions','No training for task or tools in use','First time performing task','Working alone','Fatigue / distraction / rushing')),
            'garage_door' => array('label'=>'Garage Door Specific Hazards','input'=>'hazard_garage_door','meta'=>'_dmx_hazard_garage_door','items'=>array('Broken spring','Broken cable','Door off track','Door heavy / out of balance','Door wants to shoot up','Damaged track','Damaged bottom fixture','Loose drums or shaft','Loose spring anchor bracket','Damaged rollers or hinges','Operator failure','Failed photo eyes','Failed safety edge','Exposed operator wiring','Unsafe framing / back support','Public or customer access to work area','Vehicle traffic near work area','Pinch / crush hazard','Falling door hazard','Ladder / working-at-height hazard')),
        );
    }

    private function render_hazard_checkbox_group($name, $items, $selected = array()) {
        if (!is_array($selected)) {
            $selected = array();
        }
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-hazard-check-grid">
            <?php foreach ($items as $item) : ?>
                <label class="dmx-hazard-check">
                    <input type="checkbox" name="<?php echo esc_attr($name); ?>[]" value="<?php echo esc_attr($item); ?>" <?php checked(in_array($item, $selected, true)); ?>>
                    <span><?php echo esc_html($item); ?></span>
                </label>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_hazard_worker_directory() {
        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();

        if ($company_key !== '') {
            $users = $this->get_company_users($company_key, array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE));
        } else {
            $users = get_users(array(
                'orderby' => 'display_name',
                'order' => 'ASC',
                'role__in' => array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE),
            ));
        }

        $directory = array();
        foreach ($users as $user) {
            if ((int) $user->ID === (int) $current_user_id) {
                continue;
            }

            if (!$this->is_user_portal_approved($user->ID)) {
                continue;
            }

            $roles = (array) $user->roles;
            $role_label = in_array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, $roles, true) ? 'Technician' : 'Helper';
            $name = trim((string) $user->display_name);
            if ($name === '') {
                $name = trim((string) $user->user_login);
            }

            if ($name === '') {
                continue;
            }

            $directory[] = array(
                'id' => (int) $user->ID,
                'name' => $name,
                'role' => $role_label,
            );
        }

        return $directory;
    }
    private function get_hazard_work_order_options() {
        $work_orders = $this->get_posts_for_user('dm_work_order', 100);
        $options = array();

        foreach ($work_orders as $work_order) {
            if (!$work_order || empty($work_order->ID)) {
                continue;
            }

            if (!$this->current_user_can_access_work_order((int) $work_order->ID) && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager() && !$this->current_user_is_coordinator()) {
                continue;
            }

            $number = $this->get_document_number('work_order', (int) $work_order->ID);
            $customer = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
            if ($customer === '') {
                $customer = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true);
            }

            $site_address = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_address', true);
            if ($site_address === '') {
                $site_address = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_site', true);
            }

            $task_location = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_name', true);
            $work_to_be_done = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_customer_issue', true);
            if ($work_to_be_done === '') {
                $work_to_be_done = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_pre_visit_comments', true);
            }
            if ($work_to_be_done === '') {
                $work_to_be_done = get_the_title($work_order);
            }

            $label_parts = array_filter(array($number, $customer, get_the_title($work_order)));
            $options[] = array(
                'id' => (int) $work_order->ID,
                'label' => implode(' - ', $label_parts),
                'number' => $number,
                'customer' => $customer,
                'site_address' => $site_address,
                'task_location' => $task_location,
                'work_to_be_done' => wp_strip_all_tags($work_to_be_done),
            );
        }

        return $options;
    }

    private function render_hazard_signature_pad($signature_input_name, $label, $name_input_name = '', $name_label = '', $placeholder = '') {
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-hazard-signature-card" data-dmx-signature-pad>
            <label><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></label>
            <?php if ($name_input_name !== '') : ?>
                <input type="text" name="<?php echo esc_attr($name_input_name); ?>" placeholder="<?php echo esc_attr($placeholder !== '' ? $placeholder : $name_label); ?>" aria-label="<?php echo esc_attr($name_label !== '' ? $name_label : $label); ?>">
            <?php endif; ?>
            <canvas class="dmx-hazard-signature-canvas" data-dmx-signature-canvas></canvas>
            <input type="hidden" name="<?php echo esc_attr($signature_input_name); ?>" data-dmx-signature-value value="">
            <div class="dmx-hazard-signature-actions">
                <span class="dmx-hazard-signature-status" data-dmx-signature-status>Sign or initial above</span>
                <button type="button" class="dmx-hazard-signature-clear" data-dmx-clear-signature>Clear</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_hazard_assessment_tool($is_admin = false) {
        $categories = $this->get_hazard_assessment_categories();
        $customer_lookup = $this->get_customers_for_lookup();
        $assessments = $this->get_posts_for_user(self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE, 25);
        $current_worker_name = $this->get_current_team_member_name();
        $worker_directory = $this->get_hazard_worker_directory();
        $work_order_options = $this->get_hazard_work_order_options();

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Field Level Hazard Assessment</h3>
                <p>Use this before starting work to identify tasks, hazards, risk rating, and the plan to eliminate or control hazards.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <?php if ($is_admin): ?>
                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-hazard-assessments')); ?>">Admin Hazard Records</a>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
        </div>

        <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" class="dmx-hazard-form">
            <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_hazard_assessment">
            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="inspections">
            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="hazard_assessments">
            <input type="hidden" name="hazard_status" value="complete">

            <div class="dmx-hazard-section">
                <h4>Job Information</h4>
                <p>Record the basic job details from the field level hazard assessment.</p>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Assessment Title</label><input type="text" name="hazard_title" placeholder="Hazard Assessment - Customer / Job"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Customer / Company</label><div class="dmx-work-order-part-lookup"><input type="text" name="hazard_customer" class="dmx-hazard-customer-search" autocomplete="off" placeholder="Search or enter customer name"><div class="dmx-work-order-part-results"></div></div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Connected Work Order</label><select name="hazard_work_order_id" data-dmx-hazard-work-order-select><option value="0">No linked work order</option><?php foreach ($work_order_options as $work_order_option) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order_option['id']); ?>" data-customer="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order_option['customer']); ?>" data-site="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order_option['site_address']); ?>" data-task-location="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order_option['task_location']); ?>" data-work="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order_option['work_to_be_done']); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($work_order_option['label']); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select><div class="dmx-hazard-work-order-select-note">Connect this hazard assessment to the work order/job history. Selecting a work order can auto-fill customer and site details if those fields are empty.</div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Work To Be Done</label><textarea name="hazard_work_to_be_done" rows="3" placeholder="Example: Replace broken torsion springs and inspect door balance."></textarea></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Site Location</label><textarea name="hazard_site_address" rows="3" placeholder="Site address, customer location, bay number, or door number."></textarea></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Task Location</label><input type="text" name="hazard_task_location" placeholder="Exact work area, door opening, bay, roof area, or equipment location."></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Permit / Job #</label><input type="text" name="hazard_permit_job_number"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Muster Point</label><input type="text" name="hazard_muster_point"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Emergency #</label><input type="text" name="hazard_emergency_number"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>STARS #</label><input type="text" name="hazard_stars_number"></div>
