        <script>
        (function(){
            var select = document.querySelector('[data-dmx-hazard-work-order-select]');
            if (!select) return;
            select.addEventListener('change', function(){
                var option = select.options[select.selectedIndex];
                if (!option || !option.value || option.value === '0') return;
                var customer = document.querySelector('[name="hazard_customer"]');
                var site = document.querySelector('[name="hazard_site_address"]');
                var taskLocation = document.querySelector('[name="hazard_task_location"]');
                var work = document.querySelector('[name="hazard_work_to_be_done"]');
                if (customer && !customer.value && option.getAttribute('data-customer')) customer.value = option.getAttribute('data-customer');
                if (site && !site.value && option.getAttribute('data-site')) site.value = option.getAttribute('data-site');
                if (taskLocation && !taskLocation.value && option.getAttribute('data-task-location')) taskLocation.value = option.getAttribute('data-task-location');
                if (work && !work.value && option.getAttribute('data-work')) work.value = option.getAttribute('data-work');
            });
        })();
        (function(){
            var pads = document.querySelectorAll('[data-dmx-signature-pad]');
            if (!pads.length) return;
            function setupPad(wrap){
                var canvas = wrap.querySelector('[data-dmx-signature-canvas]');
                var hidden = wrap.querySelector('[data-dmx-signature-value]');
                var clearBtn = wrap.querySelector('[data-dmx-clear-signature]');
                var status = wrap.querySelector('[data-dmx-signature-status]');
                if (!canvas || !hidden) return;
                var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                var drawing = false;
                var signed = false;
                function resize(){
                    var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                    var ratio = Math.max(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 1);
                    var width = rect.width || 600;
                    var height = rect.height || 160;
                    canvas.width = Math.floor(width * ratio);
                    canvas.height = Math.floor(height * ratio);
                    ctx.setTransform(ratio, 0, 0, ratio, 0, 0);
                    ctx.lineWidth = 2.4;
                    ctx.lineCap = 'round';
                    ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
                    ctx.strokeStyle = '#102844';
                }
                function point(e){
                    var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                    return {x: e.clientX - rect.left, y: e.clientY - rect.top};
                }
                function sync(){
                    hidden.value = signed ? canvas.toDataURL('image/png') : '';
                    if (status) status.textContent = signed ? 'Signature captured' : 'Sign or initial above';
                }
                resize();
                canvas.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e){
                    e.preventDefault();
                    drawing = true;
                    signed = true;
                    canvas.setPointerCapture && canvas.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
                    var p = point(e);
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y);
                });
                canvas.addEventListener('pointermove', function(e){
                    if (!drawing) return;
                    e.preventDefault();
                    var p = point(e);
                    ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y);
                    ctx.stroke();
                });
                function end(e){
                    if (!drawing) return;
                    drawing = false;
                    sync();
                }
                canvas.addEventListener('pointerup', end);
                canvas.addEventListener('pointercancel', end);
                canvas.addEventListener('pointerleave', end);
                if (clearBtn) {
                    clearBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){
                        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                        signed = false;
                        sync();
                    });
                }
                var form = canvas.closest('form');
                if (form) {
                    form.addEventListener('submit', sync);
                }
            }
            Array.prototype.slice.call(pads).forEach(setupPad);
        })();
        (function(){
            var customers = <?php echo wp_json_encode($customer_lookup); ?> || [];
            var input = document.querySelector('.dmx-hazard-customer-search');
            if (!input) return;
            var wrap = input.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup');
            var results = wrap ? wrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results') : null;
            function esc(str){return String(str || '').replace(/[&<>"]/g,function(s){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;'}[s];});}
            function close(){ if(results){ results.innerHTML=''; results.classList.remove('is-open'); } }
            function matches(value){var q=String(value||'').toLowerCase().trim(); if(!q) return customers.slice(0,10); return customers.filter(function(c){return [c.label,c.name,c.company,c.email,c.phone,c.address_summary].some(function(v){return String(v||'').toLowerCase().indexOf(q)!==-1;});}).slice(0,10);}
            function render(){if(!results) return; var list=matches(input.value); if(!list.length){ close(); return; } results.innerHTML=list.map(function(c){return '<button type="button" class="dmx-work-order-part-option" data-id="'+esc(c.id)+'"><strong>'+esc(c.company || c.name || c.title)+'</strong><span>'+esc(c.name || '')+(c.email ? ' • '+esc(c.email) : '')+(c.phone ? ' • '+esc(c.phone) : '')+(c.address_summary ? ' • '+esc(c.address_summary) : '')+'</span></button>';}).join(''); results.classList.add('is-open'); Array.prototype.slice.call(results.querySelectorAll('button')).forEach(function(btn){btn.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){e.preventDefault();}); btn.addEventListener('click',function(){var id=String(btn.getAttribute('data-id')||''); var c=customers.find(function(row){return String(row.id||'')===id;}); if(c){input.value=c.company || c.name || c.title || ''; var site=document.querySelector('[name="hazard_site_address"]'); if(site && c.address_summary && !site.value){site.value=c.address_summary;}} close();});});}
            input.addEventListener('focus', render); input.addEventListener('input', render); input.addEventListener('blur', function(){setTimeout(close,150);});
        })();
        (function(){
            var tbody = document.querySelector('[data-dmx-hazard-task-rows]');
            var addBtn = document.querySelector('[data-dmx-add-hazard-task]');
            if (!tbody || !addBtn) return;
            function taskSelectHtml(index){
                return '<select class="dmx-hazard-task-select" data-dmx-hazard-task-select name="hazard_task_rows['+index+'][task]">'
                    + '<option value="">Select task</option>'
                    + '<option value="Install garage door">Install garage door</option>'
                    + '<option value="Install garage door opener">Install garage door opener</option>'
                    + '<option value="Remove old door">Remove old door</option>'
                    + '<option value="Remove old opener">Remove old opener</option>'
                    + '<option value="Replace broken springs">Replace broken springs</option>'
                    + '<option value="Replace broken cables">Replace broken cables</option>'
                    + '<option value="Replace damaged panels">Replace damaged panels</option>'
                    + '<option value="Replace weatherstripping">Replace weatherstripping</option>'
                    + '<option value="Replace damaged tracks">Replace damaged tracks</option>'
                    + '<option value="Replace broken window">Replace broken window</option>'
                    + '<option value="Service operator">Service operator</option>'
                    + '<option value="Garage door inspection">Garage door inspection</option>'
                    + '<option value="Replace hinges / rollers">Replace hinges / rollers</option>'
                    + '<option value="__custom__">Other / custom task</option>'
                    + '</select>'
                    + '<input type="text" name="hazard_task_rows['+index+'][task_custom]" data-dmx-hazard-task-custom placeholder="Type custom task" style="display:none;margin-top:8px;">';
            }
            function riskSelectHtml(index){
                return '<select name="hazard_task_rows['+index+'][risk]">'
                    + '<option value="">Select risk</option>'
                    + '<option value="1A">1A - Imminent Danger / Probable</option>'
                    + '<option value="1B">1B - Imminent Danger / Reasonably Probable</option>'
                    + '<option value="1C">1C - Imminent Danger / Remote</option>'
                    + '<option value="1D">1D - Imminent Danger / Extremely Remote</option>'
                    + '<option value="2A">2A - Serious / Probable</option>'
                    + '<option value="2B">2B - Serious / Reasonably Probable</option>'
                    + '<option value="2C">2C - Serious / Remote</option>'
                    + '<option value="2D">2D - Serious / Extremely Remote</option>'
                    + '<option value="3A">3A - Minor / Probable</option>'
                    + '<option value="3B">3B - Minor / Reasonably Probable</option>'
                    + '<option value="3C">3C - Minor / Remote</option>'
                    + '<option value="3D">3D - Minor / Extremely Remote</option>'
                    + '<option value="4A">4A - Not Applicable / Probable</option>'
                    + '<option value="4B">4B - Not Applicable / Reasonably Probable</option>'
                    + '<option value="4C">4C - Not Applicable / Remote</option>'
                    + '<option value="4D">4D - Not Applicable / Extremely Remote</option>'
                    + '</select>';
            }
            function rowHtml(index){
                return '<tr data-dmx-hazard-task-row="'+index+'">'
                    + '<td data-label="Task">'+taskSelectHtml(index)+'</td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Hazards"><textarea name="hazard_task_rows['+index+'][hazards]" rows="2"></textarea></td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Risk Rating">'+riskSelectHtml(index)+'</td>'
                    + '<td data-label="Control Plan"><textarea name="hazard_task_rows['+index+'][plan]" rows="2"></textarea><button type="button" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary dmx-hazard-remove-task" style="margin-top:8px;min-height:34px;padding:8px 10px;">Remove Task</button></td>'
                    + '</tr>';
            }
            function syncCustomTask(row){
                if (!row) return;
                var select = row.querySelector('[data-dmx-hazard-task-select]');
                var custom = row.querySelector('[data-dmx-hazard-task-custom]');
                if (!select || !custom) return;
                var isCustom = select.value === '__custom__';
                custom.style.display = isCustom ? 'block' : 'none';
                custom.required = isCustom;
                if (!isCustom) custom.value = '';
            }
            addBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){
                var index = tbody.querySelectorAll('[data-dmx-hazard-task-row]').length;
                tbody.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', rowHtml(index));
            });
            tbody.addEventListener('click', function(e){
                var btn = e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('.dmx-hazard-remove-task') : null;
                if (!btn) return;
                var row = btn.closest('tr');
                if (row) row.parentNode.removeChild(row);
            });
            tbody.addEventListener('change', function(e){
                if (e.target && e.target.matches && e.target.matches('[data-dmx-hazard-task-select]')) {
                    syncCustomTask(e.target.closest('tr'));
                }
            });
            Array.prototype.slice.call(tbody.querySelectorAll('[data-dmx-hazard-task-row]')).forEach(syncCustomTask);
        })();
        (function(){
            var toggles = document.querySelectorAll('[data-dmx-hazard-toggle]');
            if (!toggles.length) return;
            function update(select){
                var key = select.getAttribute('data-dmx-hazard-toggle');
                var target = document.querySelector('[data-dmx-hazard-explain="'+key+'"]');
                if (!target) return;
                var field = target.querySelector('textarea, input');
                var yes = select.value === 'yes';
                target.style.display = yes ? 'flex' : 'none';
                if (field) {
                    field.required = yes;
                    if (!yes) field.value = '';
                }
            }
            Array.prototype.slice.call(toggles).forEach(function(select){
                select.addEventListener('change', function(){update(select);});
                update(select);
            });
        })();
        (function(){
            var builder = document.querySelector('[data-dmx-hazard-worker-builder]');
            if (!builder) return;
            var list = builder.querySelector('[data-dmx-worker-list]');
            var valueField = builder.querySelector('[data-dmx-worker-signatures-value]');
            var select = builder.querySelector('[data-dmx-worker-select]');
            var manual = builder.querySelector('[data-dmx-manual-worker-input]');
            var selectedBtn = builder.querySelector('[data-dmx-add-selected-worker]');
            var manualBtn = builder.querySelector('[data-dmx-add-manual-worker]');
            function esc(str){return String(str || '').replace(/[&<>\"]/g,function(s){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','\"':'&quot;'}[s];});}
            function getNames(){return Array.prototype.slice.call(list.querySelectorAll('[data-worker-name]')).map(function(item){return String(item.getAttribute('data-worker-name') || '').trim();}).filter(Boolean);}
            function sync(){if(valueField){valueField.value = getNames().join("\n");}}
            function addWorker(name, role){
                name = String(name || '').trim();
                role = String(role || '').trim();
                if (!name) return;
                var exists = getNames().some(function(existing){return existing.toLowerCase() === name.toLowerCase();});
                if (exists) return;
                list.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<div class="dmx-hazard-worker-chip" data-worker-name="'+esc(name)+'"><span>'+esc(name)+(role ? '<small>'+esc(role)+'</small>' : '')+'</span><button type="button" class="dmx-hazard-worker-remove" data-dmx-remove-worker>Remove</button></div>');
                sync();
            }
            if (selectedBtn && select) {
                selectedBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){
                    var option = select.options[select.selectedIndex];
                    if (!option || !option.value) return;
                    addWorker(option.value, option.getAttribute('data-role') || 'Team member');
                    select.value = '';
                });
            }
            if (manualBtn && manual) {
                manualBtn.addEventListener('click', function(){
                    addWorker(manual.value, 'Manual entry');
                    manual.value = '';
                });
                manual.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
                    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        if (manualBtn) manualBtn.click();
                    }
                });
            }
            list.addEventListener('click', function(e){
                var btn = e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('[data-dmx-remove-worker]') : null;
                if (!btn) return;
                var chip = btn.closest('[data-worker-name]');
                if (chip) chip.parentNode.removeChild(chip);
                sync();
            });
            sync();
        })();
        </script>

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_hazard_assessment_history($assessments) {
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-hazard-section">
            <h4>Recent Hazard Assessments</h4>
            <?php if (empty($assessments)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty">No hazard assessments have been saved yet.</div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-list">
                    <?php foreach ($assessments as $assessment) :
                        $risk = get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_highest_risk', true);
                        $customer = get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_customer_name', true);
                        $site = get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_site_address', true);
                        $status = get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_status', true) ?: 'draft';
                        $created_at = get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_created_at', true);
                        $photos = $this->get_document_photos($assessment->ID);
                        $linked_work_order_id = absint(get_post_meta($assessment->ID, '_dmx_hazard_work_order_id', true));
                        $linked_work_order_number = $linked_work_order_id > 0 ? $this->get_document_number('work_order', $linked_work_order_id) : '';
                    ?>
                        <div class="dmx-list-item"><div><strong><?php echo esc_html(get_the_title($assessment)); ?></strong><span><?php echo esc_html($customer); ?><?php echo $site !== '' ? ' • ' . esc_html(wp_trim_words($site, 10)) : ''; ?></span><div class="dmx-hazard-history-meta"><span>Status: <?php echo esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $status))); ?></span><?php if ($linked_work_order_number !== '') : ?><span>Work Order: <?php echo esc_html($linked_work_order_number); ?></span><?php endif; ?><?php if ($risk !== '') : ?><span>Risk: <?php echo esc_html($risk); ?></span><?php endif; ?><?php if ($created_at !== '') : ?><span><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($created_at))); ?></span><?php endif; ?><?php if (!empty($photos)) : ?><span><?php echo esc_html(count($photos)); ?> photo(s)</span><?php endif; ?></div></div><div class="dmx-mini-links"><?php if (current_user_can('edit_post', $assessment->ID)) : ?><a href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('post.php?post=' . $assessment->ID . '&action=edit')); ?>">Open Record</a><?php endif; ?></div></div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_remote_calculator_markup() {
        $cache_key = 'dmx_remote_calculator_markup_v1';
        $cached = get_transient($cache_key);
        if (is_string($cached) && $cached !== '') {
            return $cached;
        }

        $urls = array(
            'https://garagedoorspringcalculator.com/',
            'http://garagedoorspringcalculator.com/',
        );

        $body = '';
        foreach ($urls as $url) {
            $response = wp_remote_get($url, array(
                'timeout' => 20,
                'redirection' => 5,
                'user-agent' => 'DoorMatrix Calculator Loader',
                'sslverify' => false,
            ));

            if (is_wp_error($response)) {
                continue;
            }

            $code = (int) wp_remote_retrieve_response_code($response);
            $candidate = (string) wp_remote_retrieve_body($response);
            if ($code >= 200 && $code < 300 && $candidate !== '') {
                $body = $candidate;
                break;
            }
        }

        if ($body === '') {
            return '';
        }

        if (!class_exists('DOMDocument')) {
            return '';
        }

        $internal_errors = libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
        $dom = new DOMDocument();
        @$dom->loadHTML($body);
        $xpath = new DOMXPath($dom);

        $app_markup = '';
        $app_nodes = $xpath->query('//*[@id="gdsc-app"]');
        if ($app_nodes && $app_nodes->length > 0) {
            $app_markup = $dom->saveHTML($app_nodes->item(0));
        }

        if ($app_markup === '') {
            libxml_clear_errors();
            libxml_use_internal_errors($internal_errors);
            return '';
        }

        $styles = '';
        foreach ($xpath->query('//style') as $style_node) {
            $style_html = $dom->saveHTML($style_node);
            $style_text = $style_node->textContent;
            if (strpos($style_text, 'gdsc-home') !== false || strpos($style_text, 'gdsc-') !== false) {
                $styles .= $style_html;
            }
        }

        $scripts = '';
        foreach ($xpath->query('//script[not(@src)]') as $script_node) {
            $script_html = $dom->saveHTML($script_node);
            $script_text = $script_node->textContent;
            if (
                strpos($script_text, 'gdsc-app') !== false ||
                strpos($script_text, 'showScreen(') !== false ||
                strpos($script_text, 'gdsc-run-engineering') !== false ||
                strpos($script_text, 'data-open-screen') !== false
            ) {
                $scripts .= $script_html;
            }
        }

        $markup = '<div class="dmx-calculators-embed">'
            . $styles
            . '<style>' . $this->get_calculator_portal_overrides() . '</style>'
            . $app_markup
            . $scripts
            . '</div>';

        set_transient($cache_key, $markup, 15 * MINUTE_IN_SECONDS);

        libxml_clear_errors();
        libxml_use_internal_errors($internal_errors);

        return $markup;
    }

    private function get_sales_subtabs() {
        $items = array();
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('work_orders')) {
            $items['work_orders'] = 'Work Orders';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('quotes')) {
            $items['quotes'] = 'Quotes';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('invoices')) {
            $items['invoices'] = 'Invoices';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('supplier_requests')) {
            $items['supplier_requests'] = 'Supplier Requests';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('payments')) {
            $items['payments'] = 'Payments';
        }
        return $items;
    }

    private function get_costs_subtabs() {
        return array(
            'inventory' => 'Inventory',
        );
    }

    private function get_accounting_subtabs() {
        $has_full_accounting_access = current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_accounting();

        if (!$has_full_accounting_access) {
            $tabs = array();
            if ($this->user_can_create_subcontractor_pos(0, false)) {
                $tabs['purchase_orders'] = 'Purchase Orders';
            }
            return $tabs;
        }

        $tabs = array(
            'expenses' => 'Expenses',
            'timesheets' => 'Employee Timesheets',
            'commissions' => 'Sales Commissions',
            'purchase_orders' => 'Purchase Orders',
            'supplier_payments' => 'Payments',
        );

        if (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_accounting()) {
            $tabs['supplier_invoices'] = 'Supplier / Subcontractor Invoices';
        }

        return $tabs;
    }

    private function get_settings_subtabs() {
        return array(
            'settings_home' => 'Settings Home',
            'settings_startup' => 'Start-Up Setup',
            'settings_company' => 'Company Details',
            'settings_currency' => 'Currency & Payments',
            'settings_tax' => 'Tax & Accounting',
            'settings_documents' => 'Document Settings',
            'settings_attachments' => 'Attachments',
            'settings_backup' => 'Backup & Recovery',
        );
    }

    private function render_subtabs($tab_key, $items) {
        $active = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_subtab'] ?? '');
        if (!isset($items[$active])) {
            $keys = array_keys($items);
            $active = reset($keys);
        }

        $base_url = (sanitize_key($tab_key) === 'settings')
            ? $this->get_settings_base_url(is_admin())
            : (is_admin() ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG) : $this->get_portal_page_url());

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-subtabs dmx-subtabs-' . esc_attr($tab_key) . '">';
        foreach ($items as $key => $label) {
            $url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => $tab_key, 'dmx_subtab' => $key), $base_url);
            $classes = array('dmx-subtab-link', 'dmx-subtab-' . sanitize_html_class($key));
            if ($active === $key) {
                $classes[] = 'active';
            }
            echo '<a class="' . esc_attr(implode(' ', $classes)) . '" href="' . esc_url($url) . '">' . esc_html($label) . '</a>';
        }
        echo '</div>';
        return array('html' => ob_get_clean(), 'active' => $active);
    }

    private function render_sales_mobile_tabs($is_admin = false) {
        $items = $this->get_sales_subtabs();
        $active = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_subtab'] ?? '');
        $base_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG)
            : get_permalink();

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-subtabs dmx-subtabs-sales dmx-subtabs-mobile-sales">';
        foreach ($items as $key => $label) {
            $url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => $key), $base_url);
            $classes = array('dmx-subtab-link', 'dmx-subtab-' . sanitize_html_class($key));
            if ($active === $key) {
                $classes[] = 'active';
            }
            echo '<a class="' . esc_attr(implode(' ', $classes)) . '" href="' . esc_url($url) . '">' . esc_html($label) . '</a>';
        }
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_sales_section($is_admin = false) {
        $sales_subtabs = $this->get_sales_subtabs();
        if (empty($sales_subtabs)) {
            return '<div class="dmx-empty">You do not have access to Sales Workflow.</div>';
        }
        $active = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_subtab'] ?? '');
        if (!isset($sales_subtabs[$active])) {
            $keys = array_keys($sales_subtabs);
            $active = reset($keys);
        }
        $is_mobile = wp_is_mobile();

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-app-section">';

        if ($is_mobile && isset($sales_subtabs[$active])) {
            echo $this->render_sales_mobile_tabs($is_admin);

            switch ($active) {
                case 'invoices':
                    echo $this->render_invoices_tab($is_admin);
                    break;
                case 'work_orders':
                    echo $this->render_sales_work_orders();
                    break;
                case 'payments':
                    echo $this->render_sales_payments();
                    break;
                case 'supplier_requests':
                    echo $this->render_sales_supplier_requests_tab($is_admin);
                    break;
                default:
                    echo $this->render_quotes_tab($is_admin);
                    break;
            }
        } else {
            echo $this->render_dashboard_sales_hub($is_admin, $active);

            if (!$is_mobile && isset($sales_subtabs[$active])) {
                switch ($active) {
                    case 'invoices':
                        echo $this->render_invoices_tab($is_admin);
                        break;
                    case 'work_orders':
                        echo $this->render_sales_work_orders();
                        break;
                    case 'payments':
                        echo $this->render_sales_payments();
                        break;
                    case 'supplier_requests':
                        echo $this->render_sales_supplier_requests_tab($is_admin);
                        break;
                    default:
                        echo $this->render_quotes_tab($is_admin);
                        break;
                }
            }
        }

        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }


private function get_schedule_team_users($roles = array()) {
    if ($this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode) {
        $demo_roles = !empty($roles) ? $roles : array(self::SALES_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE);
        $demo_users = array();
        $demo_names = array(
            self::MANAGER_ROLE => array(array('ID' => 9101, 'display_name' => 'Demo Manager', 'user_email' => 'manager@demo.doormatrix')),
            self::SALES_ROLE => array(array('ID' => 9102, 'display_name' => 'Demo Sales Rep', 'user_email' => 'sales@demo.doormatrix')),
            self::COORDINATOR_ROLE => array(array('ID' => 9103, 'display_name' => 'Demo Coordinator', 'user_email' => 'coordinator@demo.doormatrix')),
            self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE => array(array('ID' => 9104, 'display_name' => 'Demo Technician', 'user_email' => 'tech@demo.doormatrix'), array('ID' => 9105, 'display_name' => 'Demo Helper', 'user_email' => 'helper@demo.doormatrix')),
            self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE => array(array('ID' => 9106, 'display_name' => 'Demo Warehouse', 'user_email' => 'warehouse@demo.doormatrix')),
            self::PARTS_ROLE => array(array('ID' => 9107, 'display_name' => 'Demo Parts Rep', 'user_email' => 'parts@demo.doormatrix')),
            self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE => array(array('ID' => 9108, 'display_name' => 'Demo Receptionist', 'user_email' => 'reception@demo.doormatrix')),
        );

        foreach ($demo_roles as $demo_role) {
            if (isset($demo_names[$demo_role])) {
                foreach ($demo_names[$demo_role] as $demo_user_data) {
                    $demo_user = new stdClass();
                    $demo_user->ID = $demo_user_data['ID'];
                    $demo_user->display_name = $demo_user_data['display_name'];
                    $demo_user->user_email = $demo_user_data['user_email'];
                    $demo_users[] = $demo_user;
                }
            }
        }

        if (empty($demo_users)) {
            $demo_user = new stdClass();
            $demo_user->ID = 9100;
            $demo_user->display_name = 'Demo Team Member';
            $demo_user->user_email = 'demo@demo.doormatrix';
            $demo_users[] = $demo_user;
        }

        return $demo_users;
    }

    $args = array(
        'orderby' => 'display_name',
        'order' => 'ASC',
    );

    if (!empty($roles)) {
        $args['role__in'] = $roles;
    } else {
        $args['role__in'] = array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE, self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE);
    }

    return get_users($args);
}

private function get_quote_select_options() {
    $args = array(
        'post_type' => 'dm_quote',
        'post_status' => 'publish',
        'posts_per_page' => 100,
        'orderby' => 'date',
        'order' => 'DESC',
    );

    $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_quote');
    return get_posts($args);
}

private function get_accessible_work_orders($limit = 50) {
    $args = array(
        'post_type' => 'dm_work_order',
        'post_status' => 'publish',
        'posts_per_page' => $limit,
        'orderby' => 'meta_value',
        'meta_key' => '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date',
        'order' => 'ASC',
    );

    if (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()) {
        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_work_order');
        return get_posts($args);
    }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $primary_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
        $additional = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
        if (!is_array($additional)) {
            $additional = array();
        }
        if ($primary_id === $user_id || in_array($user_id, array_map('absint', $additional), true)) {
            return true;
        }

    if ($this->current_user_is_technician()) {
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $args['meta_query'] = array(
            'relation' => 'OR',
            array(
                'key' => '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician',
                'value' => $user_id,
                'compare' => '=',
            ),
            array(
                'key' => '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians',
                'value' => '"' . $user_id . '"',
                'compare' => 'LIKE',
            ),
        );
        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_work_order');
        return get_posts($args);
    }

    if ($this->current_user_is_warehouse()) {
        $args['meta_query'] = array(
            array(
                'key' => '_dmx_work_order_requires_warehouse_pull',
                'value' => 'yes',
                'compare' => '=',
            ),
        );
        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_work_order');
        return get_posts($args);
    }

    $args['author'] = get_current_user_id();
    $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_work_order');
    return get_posts($args);
}

private function get_scheduler_visible_work_orders($limit = 150) {
    $args = array(
        'post_type' => 'dm_work_order',
        'post_status' => 'publish',
        'posts_per_page' => $limit,
        'orderby' => 'meta_value',
        'meta_key' => '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date',
        'order' => 'ASC',
    );

    if (current_user_can('manage_options')
        || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()
        || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()
        || $this->current_user_is_receptionist()
        || $this->current_user_is_supplier_request_sales_rep()) {
        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_work_order');
        return get_posts($args);
    }

    return $this->get_accessible_work_orders($limit);
}


private function get_work_order_schedule_summary($work_order_id) {
    $primary_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
    $additional = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
    if (!is_array($additional)) {
        $additional = array();
    }

    $names = array();
    if ($primary_id > 0) {
        $user = get_user_by('id', $primary_id);
        if ($user) {
            $names[] = $user->display_name;
        }
    }

    foreach ($additional as $user_id) {
        $user = get_user_by('id', absint($user_id));
        if ($user) {
            $names[] = $user->display_name;
        }
    }

    return implode(', ', array_unique(array_filter($names)));
}


private function get_scheduler_base_url($is_admin = false) {
    if ($is_admin) {
        return admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=scheduler');
    }

    return add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'scheduler'), get_permalink());
}

private function render_mobile_scheduler_stats_summary($stats = array()) {
    if (empty($stats) || !is_array($stats)) {
        return '';
    }

    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-mobile-scheduler-stats-wrap">
        <details class="dmx-mobile-scheduler-stats">
            <summary>Scheduler totals</summary>
            <div class="dmx-mobile-scheduler-stats-list">
                <?php foreach ($stats as $label => $value) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-mobile-scheduler-stat-row">
                        <span><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></span>
                        <strong><?php echo esc_html($value); ?></strong>
                    </div>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>
        </details>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}


private function get_dashboard_schedule_view_preference() {
    $view = sanitize_key((string) get_user_meta(get_current_user_id(), '_dmx_dashboard_schedule_view', true));
    $allowed = array('day', '3day', 'week');
    return in_array($view, $allowed, true) ? $view : 'day';
}

private function get_dashboard_schedule_view_label($view) {
    switch ($view) {
        case '3day':
            return 'Next 3 Days';
        case 'week':
            return 'This Week';
        case 'day':
        default:
            return 'Today';
    }
}

private function get_dashboard_schedule_dates($view) {
    $today = current_time('Y-m-d');
    $view = sanitize_key((string) $view);

    if ($view === 'week') {
        $week_start_ts = strtotime('monday this week', current_time('timestamp'));
        if ((int) date('N', current_time('timestamp')) === 7) {
            $week_start_ts = strtotime('-6 days', strtotime($today));
        }

        $dates = array();
        for ($i = 0; $i < 7; $i++) {
            $dates[] = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+' . $i . ' day', $week_start_ts));
        }
        return $dates;
    }

    $days = $view === '3day' ? 3 : 1;
    $dates = array();
    for ($i = 0; $i < $days; $i++) {
        $dates[] = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+' . $i . ' day', strtotime($today)));
    }
    return $dates;
}

private function render_dashboard_schedule_preference_form($is_admin = false) {
    $view = $this->get_dashboard_schedule_view_preference();
    ob_start(); ?>
    <form method="post" class="dmx-dashboard-schedule-pref-form">
        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="save_dashboard_schedule_preference">
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="overview">
        <label class="screen-reader-text" for="dmx-dashboard-schedule-view">Dashboard schedule view</label>
        <select id="dmx-dashboard-schedule-view" name="dmx_dashboard_schedule_view">
            <option value="day" <?php selected($view, 'day'); ?>>Today only</option>
            <option value="3day" <?php selected($view, '3day'); ?>>Next 3 days</option>
            <option value="week" <?php selected($view, 'week'); ?>>Full week</option>
        </select>
        <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary">Save View</button>
    </form>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function save_dashboard_schedule_preference($tab) {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return;
    }

    $view = isset($_POST['dmx_dashboard_schedule_view']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_dashboard_schedule_view'])) : 'day';
    if (!in_array($view, array('day', '3day', 'week'), true)) {
        $view = 'day';
    }

    update_user_meta(get_current_user_id(), '_dmx_dashboard_schedule_view', $view);
    $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'success', 'Dashboard schedule view saved.');
}

private function render_dashboard_sales_scheduler_widget($is_admin = false) {
    if (!$this->company_has_feature('scheduler') || !$this->current_user_can_view_sales_scheduler()) {
        return '';
    }

    $today = current_time('Y-m-d');
    $dashboard_schedule_view = $this->get_dashboard_schedule_view_preference();
    $dashboard_schedule_dates = $this->get_dashboard_schedule_dates($dashboard_schedule_view);
    $dashboard_schedule_label = $this->get_dashboard_schedule_view_label($dashboard_schedule_view);

    $appointments = $this->get_accessible_sales_appointments(80);
    $items_by_date = array();
    foreach ($appointments as $appointment) {
        $date_key = (string) get_post_meta($appointment->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', true);
        if ($date_key === '') {
            continue;
        }
        if (!isset($items_by_date[$date_key])) {
            $items_by_date[$date_key] = array();
        }
        $items_by_date[$date_key][] = $appointment;
    }

    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-scheduler-widget dmx-dashboard-sales-scheduler-widget-inner">
        <div class="dmx-scheduler-widget-head">
            <div>
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Sales Schedule — <?php echo esc_html($dashboard_schedule_label); ?></h4>
                <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Dashboard view defaults to today. Save your preferred range anytime.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-dashboard-schedule-actions">
                <?php echo $this->render_dashboard_schedule_preference_form($is_admin); ?>
                <div class="dmx-mini-links" style="margin-top:0;">
                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url($is_admin ? add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales_scheduler'), admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG)) : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales_scheduler'), get_permalink())); ?>">Open Sales Schedule</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php if ($dashboard_schedule_view === 'day') : ?>
            <div class="dmx-dashboard-day-hour-schedule">
                <?php echo $this->render_sales_scheduler_day_timeline_board($appointments, $today); ?>
            </div>
        <?php else : ?>
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-grid">
                <?php foreach ($dashboard_schedule_dates as $date_key) : $day_items = isset($items_by_date[$date_key]) ? $items_by_date[$date_key] : array(); ?>
                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-day <?php echo $date_key === $today ? 'is-today' : ''; ?>">
                        <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-dayname"><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('D', strtotime($date_key))); ?></div>
                        <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-date"><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('M j', strtotime($date_key))); ?></div>
                        <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-count"><?php echo esc_html(count($day_items)); ?> appointment<?php echo count($day_items) === 1 ? '' : 's'; ?></div>
                        <?php if (!empty($day_items)) : ?>
                            <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-list">
                                <?php foreach (array_slice($day_items, 0, 2) as $item) :
                                    $start = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_start_time', true);
                                    $time_label = $start !== '' ? date_i18n('g:i A', strtotime($start)) . ' • ' : '';
                                    $customer = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_customer', true);
                                ?>
                                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-chip"><?php echo esc_html($time_label . ($customer ?: $item->post_title)); ?></div>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                                <?php if (count($day_items) > 2) : ?>
                                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-more">+<?php echo esc_html(count($day_items) - 2); ?> more</div>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </div>
                        <?php else : ?>
                            <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-empty">Open</div>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                    </div>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function render_dashboard_scheduler_widget($is_admin = false) {
    if (!$this->company_has_feature('scheduler')) {
        return '';
    }

    $today = current_time('Y-m-d');
    $dashboard_schedule_view = $this->get_dashboard_schedule_view_preference();
    $dashboard_schedule_dates = $this->get_dashboard_schedule_dates($dashboard_schedule_view);
    $dashboard_schedule_label = $this->get_dashboard_schedule_view_label($dashboard_schedule_view);

    $work_orders = $this->filter_scheduler_items($this->get_accessible_work_orders(30), array('team_view' => 'all'));
    $items_by_date = $this->group_scheduler_items_by_date($work_orders, 'all');

    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-scheduler-widget">
        <div class="dmx-scheduler-widget-head">
            <div>
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Technician Schedule — <?php echo esc_html($dashboard_schedule_label); ?></h4>
                <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Dashboard view defaults to today. Save your preferred range anytime.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-dashboard-schedule-actions">
                <?php echo $this->render_dashboard_schedule_preference_form($is_admin); ?>
                <div class="dmx-mini-links" style="margin-top:0;">
                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url(current_user_can('manage_options') ? add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'scheduler'), admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG)) : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'scheduler'), get_permalink())); ?>">Open Scheduler</a>
                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url(current_user_can('manage_options') ? add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'), admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG)) : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'), get_permalink())); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($this->current_user_is_technician() ? 'Open My Work Orders' : 'Open Work Orders'); ?></a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php echo $this->render_on_call_schedule_notice($is_admin); ?>

        <?php if ($dashboard_schedule_view === 'day') : ?>
            <div class="dmx-dashboard-day-hour-schedule">
                <?php echo $this->render_scheduler_technician_day_timeline_board($work_orders, $today, $is_admin); ?>
            </div>
        <?php else : ?>
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-grid">
                <?php foreach ($dashboard_schedule_dates as $date_key) : $day_items = isset($items_by_date[$date_key]) ? $items_by_date[$date_key] : array(); ?>
                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-day <?php echo $date_key === $today ? 'is-today' : ''; ?>">
                        <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-dayname"><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('D', strtotime($date_key))); ?></div>
                        <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-date"><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('M j', strtotime($date_key))); ?></div>
                        <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-count"><?php echo esc_html(count($day_items)); ?> job<?php echo count($day_items) === 1 ? '' : 's'; ?></div>
                        <?php if (!empty($day_items)) : ?>
                            <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-list">
                                <?php foreach (array_slice($day_items, 0, 2) as $item) : ?>
                                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-chip"><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true) ?: $item->post_title); ?></div>
                                <?php endforeach; ?>
                                <?php if (count($day_items) > 2) : ?>
                                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-more">+<?php echo esc_html(count($day_items) - 2); ?> more</div>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </div>
                        <?php else : ?>
                            <div class="dmx-scheduler-mini-empty">Open</div>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                    </div>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function is_active_work_order_status($status) {
    $status = sanitize_key((string) $status);
    return !in_array($status, array('complete', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'closed'), true);
}

private function get_dashboard_active_work_orders($limit = 10) {
    $work_orders = $this->get_accessible_work_orders(100);
    $active = array();

    foreach ($work_orders as $work_order) {
        $status = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_status', true);
        if ($this->is_active_work_order_status($status)) {
            $active[] = $work_order;
        }
    }

    usort($active, function($a, $b) {
        $ad = get_post_meta($a->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
        $bd = get_post_meta($b->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
        $at = get_post_meta($a->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true);
        $bt = get_post_meta($b->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true);

        if ($ad === '') {
            $ad = '9999-12-31';
        }
        if ($bd === '') {
            $bd = '9999-12-31';
        }

        if ($ad === $bd) {
            return strcmp((string) $at, (string) $bt);
        }

        return strcmp((string) $ad, (string) $bd);
    });

    return array_slice($active, 0, max(1, absint($limit)));
}

private function render_dashboard_active_work_orders($is_admin = false) {
    if (!$this->current_user_can_view_sales_subtab('work_orders')) {
        return '';
    }

    $work_orders = $this->get_dashboard_active_work_orders(10);
    $title = $this->current_user_is_technician() ? 'My Active Work Orders' : 'Active Work Orders';
    $description = $this->current_user_is_technician()
        ? 'Only work orders assigned to you are shown here.'
        : 'Managers and coordinators see all active company work orders here.';
    $all_work_orders_url = $is_admin
        ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=work_orders')
        : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'), get_permalink());

    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-card dmx-dashboard-active-workorders-card">
        <div class="dmx-dashboard-active-workorders-head">
            <div>
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;"><?php echo esc_html($title); ?></h4>
                <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;"><?php echo esc_html($description); ?></p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-mini-links" style="margin-top:0;">
                <a href="<?php echo esc_url($all_work_orders_url); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($this->current_user_is_technician() ? 'Open My Work Orders' : 'Open All Work Orders'); ?></a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php if (!empty($work_orders)) : ?>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-dashboard-active-workorders-table-wrap">
                <table class="dmx-table dmx-dashboard-active-workorders-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>WO #</th>
                            <th>Work Order</th>
                            <th>Customer</th>
                            <th>Site</th>
                            <th>Scheduled</th>
                            <th>Technician / Crew</th>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <th>Action</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <?php foreach ($work_orders as $work_order) :
                            $work_order_open_url = $is_admin
                                ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=work_orders&dmx_edit_work_order=' . $work_order->ID)
                                : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders', 'dmx_edit_work_order' => $work_order->ID), get_permalink());
                            $schedule_date = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
                            $schedule_start = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true);
                            $schedule_end = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_end_time', true);
                            $schedule_bits = array();
                            if ($schedule_date !== '') {
                                $schedule_bits[] = date_i18n('M j, Y', strtotime($schedule_date));
                            }
                            $time_range = trim((string) ($schedule_start . ' - ' . $schedule_end), ' -');
                            if ($time_range !== '') {
                                $schedule_bits[] = $time_range;
                            }
                            $scheduled_text = !empty($schedule_bits) ? implode(' • ', $schedule_bits) : 'Needs scheduling';
                            $customer = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true);
                            if ($customer === '') {
                                $customer = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
                            }
                            $site = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_name', true);
                            if ($site === '') {
                                $site = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_site', true);
                            }
                        ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td data-label="WO #"><a href="<?php echo esc_url($work_order_open_url); ?>"><strong><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order->ID)); ?></strong></a></td>
                                <td data-label="Work Order"><a href="<?php echo esc_url($work_order_open_url); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($work_order->post_title); ?></a></td>
                                <td data-label="Customer"><?php echo esc_html($customer); ?></td>
                                <td data-label="Site"><?php echo esc_html($site); ?></td>
                                <td data-label="Scheduled"><?php echo esc_html($scheduled_text); ?></td>
                                <td data-label="Technician / Crew"><?php echo esc_html($this->get_work_order_schedule_summary($work_order->ID)); ?></td>
                                <td data-label="Status"><?php echo $this->status_pill(get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_status', true)); ?></td>
                                <td data-label="Action"><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($work_order_open_url); ?>">Open</a></td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        <?php else : ?>
            <div class="dmx-empty"><?php echo esc_html($this->current_user_is_technician() ? 'No active work orders are assigned to you right now.' : 'No active work orders found right now.'); ?></div>
        <?php endif; ?>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}


private 
function render_scheduler_tab($is_admin = false) {
    if (!$this->company_has_feature('scheduler')) {
        return '<div class="dmx-app-section"><div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">Scheduler access is available on the Growth, Operations, and Enterprise plans.</div></div>';
    }

    $scheduler_base_url = $this->get_scheduler_base_url($is_admin);
    $work_orders = $this->get_scheduler_visible_work_orders(150);
    $default_schedule_view = (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()) ? 'week' : 'month';
    $view = isset($_GET['dmx_schedule_view']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_schedule_view'])) : $default_schedule_view;
    if (!in_array($view, array('month', 'week', '3day', 'day'), true)) {
        $view = $default_schedule_view;
    }

    $reference_date = isset($_GET['dmx_schedule_date']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_schedule_date'])) : current_time('Y-m-d');
    if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $reference_date)) {
        $reference_date = current_time('Y-m-d');
    }

    $default_team_view = 'all';
    if ($this->current_user_is_sales()) {
        $default_team_view = 'sales';
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $primary_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
        $additional = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
        if (!is_array($additional)) {
            $additional = array();
        }
        if ($primary_id === $user_id || in_array($user_id, array_map('absint', $additional), true)) {
            return true;
        }

    } elseif ($this->current_user_is_technician()) {
        $default_team_view = 'technician';
    } elseif ($this->current_user_is_warehouse()) {
        $default_team_view = 'warehouse';
    }

    $team_view = isset($_GET['dmx_schedule_team']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_schedule_team'])) : $default_team_view;
    if (!in_array($team_view, array('all', 'sales', 'technician', 'warehouse', 'unscheduled'), true)) {
        $team_view = $default_team_view;
    }

    $tech_filter = absint($_GET['dmx_schedule_technician'] ?? 0);
    $status_filter = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_schedule_status'] ?? ''));
    $job_type_filter = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_schedule_job_type'] ?? ''));
    $search_filter = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_schedule_search'] ?? ''));

    $board_items = $this->filter_scheduler_items($work_orders, array(
        'team_view' => $team_view,
        'technician_id' => $tech_filter,
        'status' => $status_filter,
        'job_type' => $job_type_filter,
        'search' => $search_filter,
    ));

    usort($board_items, function($a, $b) use ($team_view) {
        $ad = $this->get_scheduler_item_board_date($a, $team_view);
        $bd = $this->get_scheduler_item_board_date($b, $team_view);
        if ($ad === $bd) {
            return strcmp((string) get_post_meta($a->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true), (string) get_post_meta($b->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true));
        }
        return strcmp((string) $ad, (string) $bd);
    });

    $unscheduled_items = $this->filter_scheduler_items($work_orders, array('team_view' => 'unscheduled'));

    $team_users = $this->get_schedule_team_users(array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE));
    $job_type_options = array();
    foreach ($work_orders as $work_order) {
        $job_type = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_job_type', true);
        if ($job_type !== '') {
            $job_type_options[$job_type] = ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $job_type));
        }
    }
    ksort($job_type_options);

    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-app-inline-actions">
        <?php if ($this->current_user_can_create_work_orders()) : ?><a class="dmx-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url($is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=work_orders') : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'), get_permalink())); ?>">Create / Schedule Work Order</a><?php endif; ?>
    </div>

    <?php echo $this->render_on_call_schedule_notice($is_admin); ?>

    <?php echo $this->render_equipment_schedule_panel($is_admin); ?>

    <div class="dmx-card dmx-scheduler-filter-card">
        <form method="get" class="dmx-scheduler-filter-form dmx-scheduler-filter-topbar">
            <?php if ($is_admin) : ?>
                <input type="hidden" name="page" value="<?php echo esc_attr(self::MENU_SLUG); ?>">
            <?php endif; ?>
            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="scheduler">
            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_schedule_view" value="<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>">
            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_schedule_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($reference_date); ?>">

            <div class="dmx-field dmx-scheduler-filter-field">
                <label>View Mode</label>
                <select name="dmx_schedule_team">
                    <option value="all" <?php selected($team_view, 'all'); ?>>All Scheduled Work</option>
                    <option value="sales" <?php selected($team_view, 'sales'); ?>>Sales Appointments</option>
                    <option value="technician" <?php selected($team_view, 'technician'); ?>>Technician Jobs</option>
                    <option value="warehouse" <?php selected($team_view, 'warehouse'); ?>>Warehouse Pulls</option>
                    <option value="unscheduled" <?php selected($team_view, 'unscheduled'); ?>>Unscheduled Work</option>
                </select>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-field dmx-scheduler-filter-field">
                <label>Technician / Helper</label>
                <select name="dmx_schedule_technician">
                    <option value="0">All Team Members</option>
                    <?php foreach ($team_users as $team_user) : ?>
                        <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($team_user->ID); ?>" <?php selected($tech_filter, $team_user->ID); ?>><?php echo esc_html($team_user->display_name); ?></option>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </select>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-field dmx-scheduler-filter-field">
                <label>Job Type</label>
                <select name="dmx_schedule_job_type">
                    <option value="">All Job Types</option>
                    <?php foreach ($job_type_options as $job_key => $job_label) : ?>
                        <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($job_key); ?>" <?php selected($job_type_filter, $job_key); ?>><?php echo esc_html($job_label); ?></option>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </select>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-field dmx-scheduler-filter-field">
                <label>Status</label>
                <select name="dmx_schedule_status">
                    <option value="">All Statuses</option>
                    <option value="scheduled" <?php selected($status_filter, 'scheduled'); ?>>Scheduled</option>
                    <option value="dispatched" <?php selected($status_filter, 'dispatched'); ?>>Dispatched</option>
                    <option value="on_site" <?php selected($status_filter, 'on_site'); ?>>On Site</option>
                    <option value="completed" <?php selected($status_filter, 'completed'); ?>>Completed</option>
                    <option value="follow_up" <?php selected($status_filter, 'follow_up'); ?>>Follow-up</option>
                    <option value="cancelled" <?php selected($status_filter, 'cancelled'); ?>>Cancelled</option>
                </select>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-field dmx-scheduler-filter-field dmx-scheduler-search-field">
                <label>Search</label>
                <input type="text" name="dmx_schedule_search" value="<?php echo esc_attr($search_filter); ?>" placeholder="Customer, work order, site, issue">
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-action-row dmx-scheduler-filter-actions">
                <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Apply</button>
                <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($scheduler_base_url); ?>">Reset</a>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>

    <div class="dmx-scheduler-shell dmx-scheduler-shell-full">
        <div class="dmx-scheduler-main">
            <?php echo $this->render_scheduler_board($board_items, $team_view, $view, $reference_date, $is_admin); ?>

            <div class="dmx-panels" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <div class="dmx-card">
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title"><?php echo esc_html($team_view === 'warehouse' ? 'Warehouse Pull Detail' : 'Selected Schedule Detail'); ?></h4>
                    <?php echo $this->render_scheduler_table($board_items, $team_view === 'warehouse' ? 'warehouse' : 'technician', $is_admin); ?>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-card">
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Needs Scheduling</h4>
                    <?php echo $this->render_scheduler_table($unscheduled_items, 'unscheduled', $is_admin); ?>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}



private function get_sales_scheduler_base_url($is_admin = false) {
    if ($is_admin) {
        return admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales_scheduler');
    }
    return add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales_scheduler'), get_permalink());
}

private function get_sales_scheduler_users() {
    return get_users(array(
        'role__in' => array(self::SALES_ROLE),
        'orderby' => 'display_name',
        'order' => 'ASC',
    ));
}

private function get_sales_appointment_type_options() {
    return array(
        'new_customer_meeting' => 'New Customer Meeting',
        'site_check' => 'Site Check',
        'estimate' => 'Estimate / Quote Visit',
        'quote_follow_up' => 'Quote Follow-up',
        'customer_meeting' => 'Customer Meeting',
        'other' => 'Other',
    );
}

private function get_sales_appointment_status_options() {
    return array(
        'scheduled' => 'Scheduled',
        'completed' => 'Completed',
        'follow_up' => 'Follow-up Required',
        'cancelled' => 'Cancelled',
    );
}

private function sales_user_can_access_appointment($appointment_id) {
    $appointment_id = absint($appointment_id);
    if ($appointment_id <= 0 || get_post_type($appointment_id) !== 'dm_sales_appointment') {
        return false;
    }
    if (!$this->post_matches_current_company($appointment_id)) {
        return false;
    }
    if (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()) {
        return true;
    }
    if (current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE)) {
        $rep_id = absint(get_post_meta($appointment_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_rep_id', true));
        return $rep_id === get_current_user_id() || (int) get_post_field('post_author', $appointment_id) === get_current_user_id();
    }
    return false;
}

private function get_accessible_sales_appointments($limit = 250) {
    $args = array(
        'post_type' => 'dm_sales_appointment',
        'post_status' => 'publish',
        'posts_per_page' => $limit,
        'orderby' => 'meta_value',
        'meta_key' => '_dmx_sales_appointment_date',
        'order' => 'ASC',
    );
    if (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator()) {
        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_sales_appointment');
        return get_posts($args);
    }
    if (current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE)) {
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $args['meta_query'] = array(
            'relation' => 'OR',
            array('key' => '_dmx_sales_appointment_rep_id', 'value' => $user_id, 'compare' => '='),
            array('key' => '_dmx_sales_appointment_created_by', 'value' => $user_id, 'compare' => '='),
        );
        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_sales_appointment');
        return get_posts($args);
    }
    return array();
}

private function create_sales_appointment($tab) {
    if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_sales_appointments()) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You are not allowed to create sales appointments.');
    }
    $title = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_title'] ?? ''));
    if ($title === '') { $title = 'Sales Appointment'; }
    $rep_id = absint($_POST['sales_appointment_rep_id'] ?? 0);
    if (current_user_can(self::SALES_ROLE) && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager() && !$this->current_user_is_coordinator() && !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
        $rep_id = get_current_user_id();
    }
    if ($rep_id <= 0) { $rep_id = get_current_user_id(); }
    $types = $this->get_sales_appointment_type_options();
    $statuses = $this->get_sales_appointment_status_options();
    $type = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_type'] ?? 'new_customer_meeting'));
    $status = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_status'] ?? 'scheduled'));
    if (!isset($types[$type])) { $type = 'other'; }
    if (!isset($statuses[$status])) { $status = 'scheduled'; }
    $date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_date'] ?? ''));
    if ($date !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $date)) { $date = ''; }
    $start_time = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_start_time'] ?? ''));
    $end_time = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_end_time'] ?? ''));
    if ($start_time !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $start_time)) { $start_time = ''; }
    if ($end_time !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $end_time)) { $end_time = ''; }
    $notes = wp_kses_post(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_notes'] ?? ''));
    $post_id = wp_insert_post(array(
        'post_type' => 'dm_sales_appointment',
        'post_status' => 'publish',
        'post_title' => $title,
        'post_content' => $notes,
        'post_author' => get_current_user_id(),
    ));
    if (!$post_id || is_wp_error($post_id)) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not create the sales appointment.');
    }
    $customer = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_customer'] ?? ''));
    $site = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_site'] ?? ''));
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_rep_id', $rep_id);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_customer', $customer);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_email', sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_email'] ?? '')));
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_phone', sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_phone'] ?? '')));
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_site', $site);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_type', $type);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_status', $status);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', $date);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_start_time', $start_time);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_end_time', $end_time);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_notes', $notes);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_created_by', get_current_user_id());
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_customer_name', $customer);
    update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site', $site);
    $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
    $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Sales appointment created.');
}

private function reschedule_sales_appointment($tab) {
    if (!$this->current_user_can_reschedule_sales_appointments()) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You are not allowed to reschedule sales appointments.');
    }
    $appointment_id = absint($_POST['sales_appointment_id'] ?? 0);
    if (!$this->sales_user_can_access_appointment($appointment_id)) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that sales appointment.');
    }
    $date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_date'] ?? ''));
    if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $date)) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'A valid appointment date is required.');
    }
    $start_time = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_start_time'] ?? ''));
    $end_time = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_end_time'] ?? ''));
    if ($start_time !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $start_time)) { $start_time = ''; }
    if ($end_time !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $end_time)) { $end_time = ''; }
    $new_rep = absint($_POST['sales_appointment_rep_id'] ?? 0);
    update_post_meta($appointment_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', $date);
    update_post_meta($appointment_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_start_time', $start_time);
    update_post_meta($appointment_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_end_time', $end_time);
    update_post_meta($appointment_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_status', 'scheduled');
    update_post_meta($appointment_id, '_dmx_status', 'scheduled');
    if ($new_rep > 0 && (current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator())) {
        update_post_meta($appointment_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_rep_id', $new_rep);
    }
    $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Sales appointment rescheduled.');
}

private function update_sales_appointment_status($tab) {
    if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_sales_appointments()) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You are not allowed to update sales appointments.');
    }
    $appointment_id = absint($_POST['sales_appointment_id'] ?? 0);
    if (!$this->sales_user_can_access_appointment($appointment_id)) {
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that sales appointment.');
    }
    $statuses = $this->get_sales_appointment_status_options();
    $status = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['sales_appointment_status'] ?? 'scheduled'));
    if (!isset($statuses[$status])) { $status = 'scheduled'; }
    update_post_meta($appointment_id, '_dmx_sales_appointment_status', $status);
    update_post_meta($appointment_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
    $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Sales appointment updated.');
}

private function render_sales_scheduler_tab($is_admin = false) {
    if (!$this->company_has_feature('scheduler')) {
        return '<div class="dmx-app-section"><div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">Sales Schedule access is available on the Growth, Operations, and Enterprise plans.</div></div>';
    }
    if (!$this->current_user_can_view_sales_scheduler()) {
        return '<div class="dmx-app-section"><div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">You do not have permission to view the Sales Schedule.</div></div>';
    }
    $base_url = $this->get_sales_scheduler_base_url($is_admin);
    $view = isset($_GET['dmx_sales_schedule_view']) ? sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_sales_schedule_view'])) : 'week';
    if (!in_array($view, array('month', 'week', '3day', 'day'), true)) { $view = 'week'; }
    $reference_date = isset($_GET['dmx_sales_schedule_date']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_sales_schedule_date'])) : current_time('Y-m-d');
    if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $reference_date)) { $reference_date = current_time('Y-m-d'); }
    $rep_filter = absint($_GET['dmx_sales_schedule_rep'] ?? 0);
    $status_filter = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_sales_schedule_status'] ?? ''));
    $type_filter = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_sales_schedule_type'] ?? ''));
    $search_filter = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_sales_schedule_search'] ?? ''));
    $appointments = $this->get_accessible_sales_appointments(250);
    $appointments = $this->filter_sales_scheduler_items($appointments, array('rep_id' => $rep_filter, 'status' => $status_filter, 'appointment_type' => $type_filter, 'search' => $search_filter));
    usort($appointments, function($a, $b) {
        $ad = get_post_meta($a->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', true);
        $bd = get_post_meta($b->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', true);
        if ($ad === $bd) { return strcmp((string) get_post_meta($a->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_start_time', true), (string) get_post_meta($b->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_start_time', true)); }
        return strcmp((string) $ad, (string) $bd);
    });
    $reps = $this->get_sales_scheduler_users();
    $types = $this->get_sales_appointment_type_options();
    $statuses = $this->get_sales_appointment_status_options();
    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-card dmx-scheduler-filter-card">
        <form method="get" class="dmx-scheduler-filter-form dmx-scheduler-filter-topbar">
            <?php if ($is_admin) : ?><input type="hidden" name="page" value="<?php echo esc_attr(self::MENU_SLUG); ?>"><?php endif; ?>
            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales_scheduler"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_sales_schedule_view" value="<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_sales_schedule_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($reference_date); ?>">
            <div class="dmx-field dmx-scheduler-filter-field"><label>Sales Rep</label><select name="dmx_sales_schedule_rep"><option value="0">All Sales Reps</option><?php foreach ($reps as $rep) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($rep->ID); ?>" <?php selected($rep_filter, $rep->ID); ?>><?php echo esc_html($rep->display_name); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
            <div class="dmx-field dmx-scheduler-filter-field"><label>Appointment Type</label><select name="dmx_sales_schedule_type"><option value="">All Appointment Types</option><?php foreach ($types as $key => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($key); ?>" <?php selected($type_filter, $key); ?>><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
            <div class="dmx-field dmx-scheduler-filter-field"><label>Status</label><select name="dmx_sales_schedule_status"><option value="">All Statuses</option><?php foreach ($statuses as $key => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($key); ?>" <?php selected($status_filter, $key); ?>><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
            <div class="dmx-field dmx-scheduler-filter-field dmx-scheduler-search-field"><label>Search</label><input type="text" name="dmx_sales_schedule_search" value="<?php echo esc_attr($search_filter); ?>" placeholder="Customer, site, appointment notes"></div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row dmx-scheduler-filter-actions"><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Apply</button><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($base_url); ?>">Reset</a></div>
        </form>
    </div>
    <details class="dmx-card" style="margin-bottom:18px;" <?php echo empty($appointments) ? 'open' : ''; ?>><summary style="cursor:pointer;font-weight:800;color:#102844;font-size:18px;">Create Sales Appointment / Site Check</summary>
        <form method="post" style="margin-top:16px;"><?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?><input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_sales_appointment"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales_scheduler">
            <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Appointment Title</label><input type="text" name="sales_appointment_title" placeholder="Site check, quote visit, new customer meeting"></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Sales Rep</label><select name="sales_appointment_rep_id"><?php foreach ($reps as $rep) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($rep->ID); ?>" <?php selected(get_current_user_id(), $rep->ID); ?>><?php echo esc_html($rep->display_name); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
