                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Appointment Type</label><select name="sales_appointment_type"><?php foreach ($types as $key => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($key); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Date</label><input type="date" name="sales_appointment_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($reference_date); ?>"></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Start Time</label><input type="time" name="sales_appointment_start_time" value="09:00"></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>End Time</label><input type="time" name="sales_appointment_end_time" value="10:00"></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Customer / Lead Name</label><input type="text" name="sales_appointment_customer"></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Customer Email</label><input type="email" name="sales_appointment_email"></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Customer Phone</label><input type="text" name="sales_appointment_phone"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-form-grid"><div class="dmx-field"><label>Site Location / Address</label><textarea name="sales_appointment_site" placeholder="Install address, bay number, door number, meeting location, or site notes"></textarea></div><div class="dmx-field"><label>Appointment Notes</label><textarea name="sales_appointment_notes" placeholder="What the sales rep needs to confirm, measure, or follow up on."></textarea></div></div>
            <div class="dmx-field" style="max-width:280px;"><label>Status</label><select name="sales_appointment_status"><?php foreach ($statuses as $key => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($key); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Create Appointment</button>
        </form>
    </details>
    <div class="dmx-scheduler-shell dmx-scheduler-shell-full"><div class="dmx-scheduler-main"><?php echo $this->render_sales_scheduler_board($appointments, $view, $reference_date, $is_admin); ?><div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Sales Appointment Detail</h4><?php echo $this->render_sales_scheduler_table($appointments); ?></div></div></div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function filter_sales_scheduler_items($items, $filters = array()) {
    $filters = wp_parse_args($filters, array('rep_id' => 0, 'status' => '', 'appointment_type' => '', 'search' => ''));
    $out = array();
    foreach ($items as $item) {
        $rep_id = absint(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_rep_id', true));
        $status = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_status', true));
        $type = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_type', true));
        if ((int) $filters['rep_id'] > 0 && $rep_id !== (int) $filters['rep_id']) { continue; }
        if ($filters['status'] !== '' && $status !== $filters['status']) { continue; }
        if ($filters['appointment_type'] !== '' && $type !== $filters['appointment_type']) { continue; }
        if ($filters['search'] !== '') {
            $haystack = strtolower(implode(' ', array($item->post_title, get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_customer', true), get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_site', true), get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_notes', true))));
            if (strpos($haystack, strtolower($filters['search'])) === false) { continue; }
        }
        $out[] = $item;
    }
    return $out;
}

private function render_sales_scheduler_board($items, $view, $reference_date, $is_admin = false) {
    $base_url = $this->get_sales_scheduler_base_url($is_admin);
    $reference_ts = strtotime($reference_date);
    if ($view === 'month') { $prev_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-1 month', $reference_ts)); $next_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+1 month', $reference_ts)); $board_title = date_i18n('F Y', $reference_ts); }
    elseif ($view === 'week') { $prev_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-7 days', $reference_ts)); $next_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+7 days', $reference_ts)); $dates = $this->get_scheduler_range_dates($reference_date, 'week'); $board_title = date_i18n('M j', strtotime(reset($dates))) . ' - ' . date_i18n('M j, Y', strtotime(end($dates))); }
    elseif ($view === '3day') { $prev_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-3 days', $reference_ts)); $next_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+3 days', $reference_ts)); $dates = $this->get_scheduler_range_dates($reference_date, '3day'); $board_title = date_i18n('M j', strtotime(reset($dates))) . ' - ' . date_i18n('M j, Y', strtotime(end($dates))); }
    else { $prev_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-1 day', $reference_ts)); $next_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+1 day', $reference_ts)); $board_title = date_i18n('l, F j, Y', $reference_ts); }
    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-card dmx-scheduler-board-card"><div class="dmx-scheduler-board-toolbar"><div class="dmx-scheduler-nav"><a href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_sales_schedule_view'=>$view,'dmx_sales_schedule_date'=>$prev_date), $base_url)); ?>">&lsaquo;</a><a href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_sales_schedule_view'=>$view,'dmx_sales_schedule_date'=>$next_date), $base_url)); ?>">&rsaquo;</a><a class="dmx-scheduler-today-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_sales_schedule_view'=>$view,'dmx_sales_schedule_date'=>current_time('Y-m-d')), $base_url)); ?>">today</a></div><div class="dmx-scheduler-board-title"><?php echo esc_html($board_title); ?></div><div class="dmx-scheduler-view-switch"><a class="<?php echo $view === 'month' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_sales_schedule_view'=>'month','dmx_sales_schedule_date'=>$reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">month</a><a class="<?php echo $view === 'week' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_sales_schedule_view'=>'week','dmx_sales_schedule_date'=>$reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">week</a><a class="<?php echo $view === '3day' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_sales_schedule_view'=>'3day','dmx_sales_schedule_date'=>$reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">3 day</a><a class="<?php echo $view === 'day' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_sales_schedule_view'=>'day','dmx_sales_schedule_date'=>$reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">day</a></div></div><?php echo $view === 'month' ? '<div class="dmx-scheduler-month-scroll">' . $this->render_sales_scheduler_month_board($items, $reference_date) . '</div>' : $this->render_sales_scheduler_rep_row_board($items, $reference_date, $view); ?></div>
    <?php if ($this->current_user_can_reschedule_sales_appointments()) : ?><form method="post" id="dmx-sales-scheduler-reschedule-form" style="display:none;"><?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?><input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="reschedule_sales_appointment"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales_scheduler"><input type="hidden" name="sales_appointment_id"><input type="hidden" name="sales_appointment_date"><input type="hidden" name="sales_appointment_start_time"><input type="hidden" name="sales_appointment_end_time"><input type="hidden" name="sales_appointment_rep_id"></form><script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var f=document.getElementById('dmx-sales-scheduler-reschedule-form');if(!f){return;}var a=null;function c(){document.querySelectorAll('.is-drop-target').forEach(function(n){n.classList.remove('is-drop-target');});}document.querySelectorAll('.dmx-sales-scheduler-event[draggable="true"]').forEach(function(card){card.addEventListener('dragstart',function(e){a=card;card.classList.add('is-dragging');if(e.dataTransfer){e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move';e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain',card.getAttribute('data-sales-appointment-id')||'');}});card.addEventListener('dragend',function(){card.classList.remove('is-dragging');c();});});document.querySelectorAll('[data-sales-scheduler-dropzone]').forEach(function(z){z.addEventListener('dragover',function(e){e.preventDefault();z.classList.add('is-drop-target');});z.addEventListener('dragleave',function(){z.classList.remove('is-drop-target');});z.addEventListener('drop',function(e){e.preventDefault();z.classList.remove('is-drop-target');if(!a){return;}var d=z.getAttribute('data-sales-date')||a.getAttribute('data-sales-date')||'';if(!d){return;}f.querySelector('[name="sales_appointment_id"]').value=a.getAttribute('data-sales-appointment-id')||'';f.querySelector('[name="sales_appointment_date"]').value=d;f.querySelector('[name="sales_appointment_start_time"]').value=z.getAttribute('data-sales-start')||a.getAttribute('data-sales-start')||'';f.querySelector('[name="sales_appointment_end_time"]').value=z.getAttribute('data-sales-end')||a.getAttribute('data-sales-end')||'';f.querySelector('[name="sales_appointment_rep_id"]').value=z.getAttribute('data-sales-rep')||a.getAttribute('data-sales-rep')||'';f.submit();});});});</script><?php endif; ?>
    <?php return ob_get_clean();
}

private function render_sales_scheduler_rep_row_board($items, $reference_date, $view = 'week') {
    if ($view === 'day') { return $this->render_sales_scheduler_day_timeline_board($items, $reference_date); }
    $range_dates = $this->get_scheduler_range_dates($reference_date, $view); $reps = $this->get_sales_scheduler_users(); $slots = $this->get_scheduler_half_hour_slots(7, 18); $can_drag = $this->current_user_can_reschedule_sales_appointments();
    if (empty($reps)) { return '<div class="dmx-empty">No sales users have been added yet. Add sales team members in the Team area before using the Sales Schedule.</div>'; }
    ob_start(); ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-board dmx-scheduler-tech-board-<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>"><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-date-heads"><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-name-head">Sales Rep</div><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-date-grid dmx-scheduler-range-<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>"><?php foreach ($range_dates as $date_key) : ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-date-head"><strong><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('D', strtotime($date_key))); ?></strong><span><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('M j', strtotime($date_key))); ?></span></div><?php endforeach; ?></div></div><?php foreach ($reps as $rep) : $color = $this->get_scheduler_user_color_class($rep->ID); ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-row <?php echo esc_attr($color); ?>"><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-name"><strong><?php echo esc_html($rep->display_name); ?></strong><span>Sales Rep</span></div><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-days dmx-scheduler-range-<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>"><?php foreach ($range_dates as $date_key) : ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-day"><?php foreach ($slots as $slot) : $slot_items = $this->get_sales_scheduler_items_for_rep_date_slot($items, $rep->ID, $date_key, $slot['start']); ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-slot <?php echo !empty($slot_items) ? 'has-job' : ''; ?>" <?php echo $can_drag ? 'data-sales-scheduler-dropzone="slot" data-sales-date="' . esc_attr($date_key) . '" data-sales-start="' . esc_attr($slot['start']) . '" data-sales-end="' . esc_attr($slot['end']) . '" data-sales-rep="' . esc_attr($rep->ID) . '"' : ''; ?>><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-slot-time"><?php echo esc_html($slot['label']); ?></div><div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-slot-content"><?php if (!empty($slot_items)) : foreach ($slot_items as $item) : echo $this->render_sales_scheduler_event_card($item, true, $rep->ID); endforeach; else : ?><span>Open</span><?php endif; ?></div></div><?php endforeach; ?></div><?php endforeach; ?></div></div><?php endforeach; ?></div><?php return ob_get_clean();
}

private function render_sales_scheduler_day_timeline_board($items, $reference_date) {
    $date_key = date('Y-m-d', strtotime($reference_date)); $reps = $this->get_sales_scheduler_users(); $slots = $this->get_scheduler_half_hour_slots(7, 18); $can_drag = $this->current_user_can_reschedule_sales_appointments();
    if (empty($reps)) { return '<div class="dmx-empty">No sales users have been added yet. Add sales team members in the Team area before using the Sales Schedule.</div>'; }
    ob_start(); ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-board"><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-scroll"><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-headrow"><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-name-head">Sales Rep</div><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-time-grid"><?php foreach ($slots as $slot) : ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-time-head"><?php echo esc_html($slot['label']); ?></div><?php endforeach; ?></div></div><?php foreach ($reps as $rep) : $color = $this->get_scheduler_user_color_class($rep->ID); ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-row <?php echo esc_attr($color); ?>"><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-name"><strong><?php echo esc_html($rep->display_name); ?></strong><span>Sales Rep</span></div><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-slots"><?php foreach ($slots as $slot) : $slot_items = $this->get_sales_scheduler_items_for_rep_date_slot($items, $rep->ID, $date_key, $slot['start']); ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-slot <?php echo !empty($slot_items) ? 'has-job' : ''; ?>" <?php echo $can_drag ? 'data-sales-scheduler-dropzone="slot" data-sales-date="' . esc_attr($date_key) . '" data-sales-start="' . esc_attr($slot['start']) . '" data-sales-end="' . esc_attr($slot['end']) . '" data-sales-rep="' . esc_attr($rep->ID) . '"' : ''; ?>><?php if (!empty($slot_items)) : foreach ($slot_items as $item) : echo $this->render_sales_scheduler_event_card($item, true, $rep->ID); endforeach; else : ?><span>Open</span><?php endif; ?></div><?php endforeach; ?></div></div><?php endforeach; ?></div></div><?php return ob_get_clean();
}

private function render_sales_scheduler_month_board($items, $reference_date) {
    $items_by_date = array(); foreach ($items as $item) { $d = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', true); if ($d === '') { $d = 'unscheduled'; } $items_by_date[$d][] = $item; }
    $current_month = date('m', strtotime($reference_date)); $first_day = date('Y-m-01', strtotime($reference_date)); $start = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('sunday this week', strtotime($first_day))); $can_drag = $this->current_user_can_reschedule_sales_appointments();
    ob_start(); ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-board-days"><?php foreach (array('Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat') as $day) : ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-day-head"><?php echo esc_html($day); ?></div><?php endforeach; ?></div><div class="dmx-scheduler-month-grid"><?php for ($i=0;$i<42;$i++) : $date_key = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+' . $i . ' days', strtotime($start))); $day_items = $items_by_date[$date_key] ?? array(); ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-month-cell <?php echo date('m', strtotime($date_key)) === $current_month ? '' : 'is-muted'; ?> <?php echo $date_key === current_time('Y-m-d') ? 'is-today' : ''; ?>" <?php echo $can_drag ? 'data-sales-scheduler-dropzone="date" data-sales-date="' . esc_attr($date_key) . '"' : ''; ?>><div class="dmx-scheduler-cell-date"><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('j', strtotime($date_key))); ?></div><div class="dmx-scheduler-cell-events"><?php if (!empty($day_items)) : foreach ($day_items as $item) : echo $this->render_sales_scheduler_event_card($item, true); endforeach; else : ?><div class="dmx-scheduler-open-slot">Open</div><?php endif; ?></div></div><?php endfor; ?></div><?php return ob_get_clean();
}

private function get_sales_scheduler_items_for_rep_date_slot($items, $rep_id, $date_key, $slot_start = '') {
    $matches = array();
    foreach ($items as $item) {
        if (absint(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_rep_id', true)) !== absint($rep_id)) { continue; }
        if ((string) get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', true) !== (string) $date_key) { continue; }
        $item_time = $this->normalize_scheduler_time_value(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_start_time', true));
        if ($slot_start === '') { if ($item_time === '') { $matches[] = $item; } continue; }
        if ($item_time === '') { continue; }
        $item_minutes = $this->scheduler_time_to_minutes($item_time); $slot_minutes = $this->scheduler_time_to_minutes($slot_start);
        if ($item_minutes >= $slot_minutes && $item_minutes < ($slot_minutes + 30)) { $matches[] = $item; }
    }
    return $matches;
}

private function render_sales_scheduler_event_card($appointment, $compact = false, $color_user_id = 0) {
    $rep_id = $color_user_id ? absint($color_user_id) : absint(get_post_meta($appointment->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_rep_id', true)); $color_class = $this->get_scheduler_user_color_class($rep_id);
    $date = get_post_meta($appointment->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', true); $start = get_post_meta($appointment->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_start_time', true); $end = get_post_meta($appointment->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_end_time', true); $customer = get_post_meta($appointment->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_customer', true); $type = get_post_meta($appointment->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_type', true); $types = $this->get_sales_appointment_type_options(); $time_text = $start !== '' ? date_i18n('g:i', strtotime($start)) . ($end !== '' ? ' - ' . date_i18n('g:i', strtotime($end)) : '') : 'Time not set'; $can_drag = $this->current_user_can_reschedule_sales_appointments() && $this->sales_user_can_access_appointment($appointment->ID);
    ob_start(); ?><a class="dmx-scheduler-event dmx-sales-scheduler-event <?php echo esc_attr($color_class); ?> <?php echo $compact ? 'is-compact' : ''; ?>" href="#sales-appointment-<?php echo esc_attr($appointment->ID); ?>" <?php echo $can_drag ? 'draggable="true"' : ''; ?> data-sales-appointment-id="<?php echo esc_attr($appointment->ID); ?>" data-sales-date="<?php echo esc_attr($date); ?>" data-sales-start="<?php echo esc_attr($start); ?>" data-sales-end="<?php echo esc_attr($end); ?>" data-sales-rep="<?php echo esc_attr($rep_id); ?>"><strong><?php echo esc_html($appointment->post_title); ?></strong><span class="dmx-scheduler-event-time"><?php echo esc_html($time_text); ?></span><?php if ($customer !== '') : ?><span><?php echo esc_html($customer); ?></span><?php endif; ?><?php if (isset($types[$type])) : ?><span><?php echo esc_html($types[$type]); ?></span><?php endif; ?></a><?php return ob_get_clean();
}

private function render_sales_scheduler_table($items) {
    $types = $this->get_sales_appointment_type_options(); $statuses = $this->get_sales_appointment_status_options();
    if (empty($items)) { return '<div class="dmx-empty">No sales appointments found.</div>'; }
    ob_start(); ?><div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-mobile-line-stack"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Time</th><th>Sales Rep</th><th>Customer</th><th>Type</th><th>Site</th><th>Status</th><th>Update</th></tr></thead><tbody><?php foreach ($items as $item) : $rep_id = absint(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_rep_id', true)); $rep = $rep_id ? get_user_by('id', $rep_id) : null; $status = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_status', true); $type = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_type', true); $date = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_date', true); $start = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_start_time', true); $end = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_end_time', true); $time = trim(($start ? date_i18n('g:i A', strtotime($start)) : '') . ($end ? ' - ' . date_i18n('g:i A', strtotime($end)) : '')); ?><tr id="sales-appointment-<?php echo esc_attr($item->ID); ?>"><td data-label="Date"><?php echo esc_html($date); ?></td><td data-label="Time"><?php echo esc_html($time !== '' ? $time : '—'); ?></td><td data-label="Sales Rep"><?php echo esc_html($rep ? $rep->display_name : '—'); ?></td><td data-label="Customer"><strong><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_customer', true) ?: $item->post_title); ?></strong><br><span style="color:#61738b;"><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_phone', true)); ?></span></td><td data-label="Type"><?php echo esc_html($types[$type] ?? ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $type))); ?></td><td data-label="Site"><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_sales_appointment_site', true)); ?></td><td data-label="Status"><?php echo $this->status_pill($status); ?></td><td data-label="Update"><?php if ($this->sales_user_can_access_appointment($item->ID)) : ?><form method="post" style="display:grid;gap:8px;min-width:170px;"><?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?><input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="update_sales_appointment_status"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales_scheduler"><input type="hidden" name="sales_appointment_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($item->ID); ?>"><select name="sales_appointment_status"><?php foreach ($statuses as $key => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($key); ?>" <?php selected($status, $key); ?>><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select><button class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" type="submit">Save</button></form><?php else : ?>—<?php endif; ?></td></tr><?php endforeach; ?></tbody></table></div><?php return ob_get_clean();
}


private function get_scheduler_item_board_date($work_order, $team_view = 'all') {
    if ($team_view === 'warehouse') {
        return get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_warehouse_pull_date', true);
    }
    return get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
}

private function filter_scheduler_items($items, $filters = array()) {
    $filters = wp_parse_args($filters, array(
        'team_view' => 'all',
        'technician_id' => 0,
        'status' => '',
        'job_type' => '',
        'search' => '',
    ));

    $filtered = array();

    foreach ($items as $work_order) {
        $job_type = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_job_type', true);
        $status = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_status', true);
        $schedule_date = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
        $pull_date = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_warehouse_pull_date', true);
        $requires_pull = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_requires_warehouse_pull', true);
        $primary = absint(get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
        $additional = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
        if (!is_array($additional)) {
            $additional = array();
        }

        if ($filters['team_view'] === 'sales' && $job_type !== 'sales_appointment') {
            continue;
        }

        if ($filters['team_view'] === 'technician' && $job_type === 'sales_appointment') {
            continue;
        }

        if ($filters['team_view'] === 'warehouse' && ($requires_pull !== 'yes' || $pull_date === '')) {
            continue;
        }

        if ($filters['team_view'] === 'unscheduled' && $schedule_date !== '') {
            continue;
        }

        if ($filters['team_view'] !== 'unscheduled' && $filters['team_view'] !== 'warehouse' && $schedule_date === '') {
            continue;
        }

        if ($filters['status'] !== '' && $status !== $filters['status']) {
            continue;
        }

        if ($filters['job_type'] !== '' && $job_type !== $filters['job_type']) {
            continue;
        }

        if ($filters['technician_id'] > 0) {
            $crew_ids = array_map('absint', array_merge(array($primary), $additional));
            if (!in_array((int) $filters['technician_id'], $crew_ids, true) && $primary !== (int) $filters['technician_id']) {
                continue;
            }
        }

        if ($filters['search'] !== '') {
            $needle = strtolower($filters['search']);
            $haystack = strtolower(implode(' ', array(
                $work_order->post_title,
                get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true),
                get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_name', true),
                get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_customer_issue', true),
                $this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order->ID),
            )));
            if (strpos($haystack, $needle) === false) {
                continue;
            }
        }

        $filtered[] = $work_order;
    }

    return $filtered;
}

private function group_scheduler_items_by_date($items, $team_view = 'all') {
    $grouped = array();
    foreach ($items as $item) {
        $date_key = $this->get_scheduler_item_board_date($item, $team_view);
        if ($date_key === '') {
            continue;
        }
        if (!isset($grouped[$date_key])) {
            $grouped[$date_key] = array();
        }
        $grouped[$date_key][] = $item;
    }

    foreach ($grouped as $date_key => $date_items) {
        usort($date_items, function($a, $b) {
            return strcmp((string) get_post_meta($a->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true), (string) get_post_meta($b->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true));
        });
        $grouped[$date_key] = $date_items;
    }

    return $grouped;
}

private function render_scheduler_board($items, $team_view, $view, $reference_date, $is_admin = false) {
    $base_url = $this->get_scheduler_base_url($is_admin);
    $reference_ts = strtotime($reference_date);
    $prev_date = $reference_date;
    $next_date = $reference_date;
    $tech_filter = absint($_GET['dmx_schedule_technician'] ?? 0);
    $status_filter = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_schedule_status'] ?? ''));
    $job_type_filter = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_schedule_job_type'] ?? ''));
    $search_filter = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_schedule_search'] ?? ''));

    if ($view === 'month') {
        $prev_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-1 month', $reference_ts));
        $next_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+1 month', $reference_ts));
        $board_title = date_i18n('F Y', $reference_ts);
    } elseif ($view === 'week') {
        $prev_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-7 days', $reference_ts));
        $next_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+7 days', $reference_ts));
        $week_dates = $this->get_scheduler_range_dates($reference_date, 'week');
        $board_title = date_i18n('M j', strtotime(reset($week_dates))) . ' - ' . date_i18n('M j, Y', strtotime(end($week_dates)));
    } elseif ($view === '3day') {
        $prev_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-3 days', $reference_ts));
        $next_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+3 days', $reference_ts));
        $range_dates = $this->get_scheduler_range_dates($reference_date, '3day');
        $board_title = date_i18n('M j', strtotime(reset($range_dates))) . ' - ' . date_i18n('M j, Y', strtotime(end($range_dates)));
    } else {
        $prev_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-1 day', $reference_ts));
        $next_date = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+1 day', $reference_ts));
        $board_title = date_i18n('l, F j, Y', $reference_ts);
    }

    $items_by_date = $this->group_scheduler_items_by_date($items, $team_view);
    $show_technician_rows = $this->should_render_technician_schedule_rows($team_view, $view);

    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-card dmx-scheduler-board-card">
        <div class="dmx-scheduler-board-tabs">
            <a class="active" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => $team_view, 'dmx_schedule_view' => $view, 'dmx_schedule_date' => $reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">Calendar</a>
            <a href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => 'unscheduled', 'dmx_schedule_view' => 'week', 'dmx_schedule_date' => $reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">Open Capacity</a>
            <a href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => 'technician', 'dmx_schedule_view' => $view, 'dmx_schedule_date' => $reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">Technician Shifts</a>
            <a href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => 'warehouse', 'dmx_schedule_view' => $view, 'dmx_schedule_date' => $reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">Capacity Planning</a>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-scheduler-board-toolbar">
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-nav">
                <a href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => $team_view, 'dmx_schedule_view' => $view, 'dmx_schedule_date' => $prev_date), $base_url)); ?>">&lsaquo;</a>
                <a href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => $team_view, 'dmx_schedule_view' => $view, 'dmx_schedule_date' => $next_date), $base_url)); ?>">&rsaquo;</a>
                <a class="dmx-scheduler-today-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => $team_view, 'dmx_schedule_view' => $view, 'dmx_schedule_date' => current_time('Y-m-d')), $base_url)); ?>">today</a>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-board-title"><?php echo esc_html($board_title); ?></div>
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-view-switch">
                <a class="<?php echo $view === 'month' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => $team_view, 'dmx_schedule_view' => 'month', 'dmx_schedule_date' => $reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">month</a>
                <a class="<?php echo $view === 'week' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => $team_view, 'dmx_schedule_view' => 'week', 'dmx_schedule_date' => $reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">week</a>
                <a class="<?php echo $view === '3day' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => $team_view, 'dmx_schedule_view' => '3day', 'dmx_schedule_date' => $reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">3 day</a>
                <a class="<?php echo $view === 'day' ? 'active' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_schedule_team' => $team_view, 'dmx_schedule_view' => 'day', 'dmx_schedule_date' => $reference_date), $base_url)); ?>">day</a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php
        if ($team_view === 'unscheduled') {
            echo '<div class="dmx-empty">Unscheduled work orders stay below in the Needs Scheduling panel so the board stays date-based.</div>';
        } elseif ($show_technician_rows) {
            echo $this->render_scheduler_technician_row_board($items, $reference_date, $view, $is_admin);
        } elseif ($view === 'month') {
            echo '<div class="dmx-scheduler-month-scroll">' . $this->render_scheduler_month_board($items_by_date, $reference_date, $team_view, $is_admin) . '</div>';
        } else {
            echo $this->render_scheduler_range_board($items_by_date, $reference_date, $team_view, $view, $is_admin);
        }
        ?>
    </div>

    <?php if ($this->current_user_can_reschedule_work_orders()) : ?>
    <form method="post" id="dmx-scheduler-reschedule-form" style="display:none;">
        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="reschedule_work_order">
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="scheduler">
        <input type="hidden" name="work_order_id" value="">
        <input type="hidden" name="work_order_schedule_date" value="">
        <input type="hidden" name="work_order_schedule_start_time" value="">
        <input type="hidden" name="work_order_schedule_end_time" value="">
        <input type="hidden" name="work_order_primary_technician" value="">
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_schedule_view" value="<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>">
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_schedule_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($reference_date); ?>">
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_schedule_team" value="<?php echo esc_attr($team_view); ?>">
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_schedule_technician" value="<?php echo esc_attr($tech_filter); ?>">
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_schedule_status" value="<?php echo esc_attr($status_filter); ?>">
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_schedule_job_type" value="<?php echo esc_attr($job_type_filter); ?>">
        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_schedule_search" value="<?php echo esc_attr($search_filter); ?>">
    </form>
    <script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        var form = document.getElementById('dmx-scheduler-reschedule-form');
        if (!form) {
            return;
        }

        var activeCard = null;
        var dragStarted = false;
        var workOrderInput = form.querySelector('input[name="work_order_id"]');
        var dateInput = form.querySelector('input[name="work_order_schedule_date"]');
        var startInput = form.querySelector('input[name="work_order_schedule_start_time"]');
        var endInput = form.querySelector('input[name="work_order_schedule_end_time"]');
        var technicianInput = form.querySelector('input[name="work_order_primary_technician"]');

        function clearTargets() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.is-drop-target').forEach(function(node) {
                node.classList.remove('is-drop-target');
            });
        }

        document.querySelectorAll('.dmx-scheduler-event[draggable="true"]').forEach(function(card) {
            card.addEventListener('dragstart', function(e) {
                activeCard = card;
                dragStarted = true;
                card.classList.add('is-dragging');
                if (e.dataTransfer) {
                    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
                    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', card.getAttribute('data-work-order-id') || '');
                }
            });

            card.addEventListener('dragend', function() {
                card.classList.remove('is-dragging');
                clearTargets();
                window.setTimeout(function() {
                    dragStarted = false;
                }, 10);
            });

            card.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (dragStarted) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                }
            });
        });

        document.querySelectorAll('[data-scheduler-dropzone]').forEach(function(zone) {
            zone.addEventListener('dragover', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                zone.classList.add('is-drop-target');
                if (e.dataTransfer) {
                    e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
                }
            });

            zone.addEventListener('dragleave', function() {
                zone.classList.remove('is-drop-target');
            });

            zone.addEventListener('drop', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                zone.classList.remove('is-drop-target');
                if (!activeCard) {
                    return;
                }

                var newDate = zone.getAttribute('data-schedule-date') || activeCard.getAttribute('data-schedule-date') || '';
                var newStart = zone.getAttribute('data-schedule-start') || activeCard.getAttribute('data-schedule-start') || '';
                var newEnd = zone.getAttribute('data-schedule-end') || activeCard.getAttribute('data-schedule-end') || '';
                var newTechnician = zone.getAttribute('data-schedule-technician') || '';

                if (!newDate) {
                    return;
                }

                workOrderInput.value = activeCard.getAttribute('data-work-order-id') || '';
                dateInput.value = newDate;
                startInput.value = newStart;
                endInput.value = newEnd;
                if (technicianInput) {
                    technicianInput.value = newTechnician;
                }
                form.submit();
            });
        });
    });
    </script>
    <?php endif; ?>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function should_render_technician_schedule_rows($team_view, $view) {
    if (!in_array($team_view, array('all', 'technician'), true)) {
        return false;
    }

    if (!in_array($view, array('week', '3day', 'day'), true)) {
        return false;
    }

    return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_coordinator();
}

private function get_scheduler_half_hour_slots($start_hour = 7, $end_hour = 18) {
    $slots = array();
    $start_minutes = max(0, (int) $start_hour * 60);
    $end_minutes = max($start_minutes + 30, (int) $end_hour * 60);

    for ($minutes = $start_minutes; $minutes < $end_minutes; $minutes += 30) {
        $end = $minutes + 30;
        $start_value = sprintf('%02d:%02d', floor($minutes / 60), $minutes % 60);
        $end_value = sprintf('%02d:%02d', floor($end / 60), $end % 60);
        $slots[] = array(
            'start' => $start_value,
            'end' => $end_value,
            'label' => date_i18n('g:i A', strtotime($start_value)),
        );
    }

    return $slots;
}

private function normalize_scheduler_time_value($time) {
    $time = trim((string) $time);
    if ($time === '') {
        return '';
    }

    if (preg_match('/^\d{1,2}:\d{2}/', $time, $matches)) {
        $parts = explode(':', $matches[0]);
        return sprintf('%02d:%02d', (int) $parts[0], (int) $parts[1]);
    }

    $ts = strtotime($time);
    if ($ts) {
        return date('H:i', $ts);
    }

    return '';
}

private function scheduler_time_to_minutes($time) {
    $time = $this->normalize_scheduler_time_value($time);
    if ($time === '') {
        return null;
    }

    $parts = explode(':', $time);
    if (count($parts) < 2) {
        return null;
    }

    return ((int) $parts[0] * 60) + (int) $parts[1];
}


private function get_work_order_assigned_user_ids($work_order_id) {
    $ids = array();
    $primary_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
    if ($primary_id > 0) {
        $ids[] = $primary_id;
    }

    $additional = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
    if (!is_array($additional)) {
        $additional = array();
    }

    foreach ($additional as $user_id) {
        $user_id = absint($user_id);
        if ($user_id > 0) {
            $ids[] = $user_id;
        }
    }

    return array_values(array_unique($ids));
}

private function scheduler_item_is_assigned_to_user($work_order, $user_id) {
    $user_id = absint($user_id);
    if ($user_id <= 0 || !$work_order) {
        return false;
    }

    return in_array($user_id, $this->get_work_order_assigned_user_ids($work_order->ID), true);
}

private function get_scheduler_items_for_technician_date_slot($items, $technician_id, $date_key, $slot_start = '') {
    $matches = array();
    $slot_start = $this->normalize_scheduler_time_value($slot_start);
    $slot_start_minutes = $this->scheduler_time_to_minutes($slot_start);
    $slot_end_minutes = ($slot_start_minutes === null) ? null : $slot_start_minutes + 30;

    foreach ($items as $item) {
        if (!$this->scheduler_item_is_assigned_to_user($item, $technician_id)) {
            continue;
        }

        $item_date = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
        if ($item_date !== $date_key) {
            continue;
        }

        $item_start = $this->normalize_scheduler_time_value(get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true));
        if ($slot_start === '') {
            if ($item_start === '') {
                $matches[] = $item;
            }
            continue;
        }

        $item_minutes = $this->scheduler_time_to_minutes($item_start);
        if ($item_minutes === null || $slot_start_minutes === null || $slot_end_minutes === null) {
            continue;
        }

        if ($item_minutes >= $slot_start_minutes && $item_minutes < $slot_end_minutes) {
            $matches[] = $item;
        }
    }

    return $matches;
}


private function get_scheduler_assignable_field_users() {
    return $this->get_schedule_team_users(array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE));
}

private function get_scheduler_user_role_label($user) {
    $roles = isset($user->roles) ? (array) $user->roles : array();
    if (in_array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, $roles, true)) {
        return 'Technician';
    }
    if (in_array(self::STAFF_ROLE, $roles, true)) {
        return 'Helper';
    }
    if (in_array(self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, $roles, true)) {
        return 'Coordinator';
    }
    if (in_array(self::SALES_ROLE, $roles, true)) {
        return 'Sales';
    }
    return 'Team Member';
}

private function get_scheduler_user_color_class($user_id) {
    $user_id = absint($user_id);
    if ($user_id <= 0) {
        return 'dmx-scheduler-person-color-0';
    }
    return 'dmx-scheduler-person-color-' . (($user_id % 8) + 1);
}

private function get_scheduler_primary_color_user_id($work_order_id) {
    $primary_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
    if ($primary_id > 0) {
        return $primary_id;
    }

    $additional = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
    if (!is_array($additional)) {
        $additional = array();
    }

    foreach ($additional as $user_id) {
        $user_id = absint($user_id);
        if ($user_id > 0) {
            return $user_id;
        }
    }

    return 0;
}

private function render_scheduler_technician_row_board($items, $reference_date, $view = 'week', $is_admin = false) {
    if ($view === 'day') {
        return $this->render_scheduler_technician_day_timeline_board($items, $reference_date, $is_admin);
    }

    $range_dates = $this->get_scheduler_range_dates($reference_date, $view);
    $technicians = $this->get_scheduler_assignable_field_users();
    $time_slots = $this->get_scheduler_half_hour_slots(7, 18);
    $can_drag = $this->current_user_can_reschedule_work_orders();

    if (empty($technicians)) {
        return '<div class="dmx-empty">No technician or helper users have been added yet. Add team members in the Team area before using the technician schedule board.</div>';
    }

    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-board dmx-scheduler-tech-board-<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>">
        <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-date-heads">
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-name-head">Tech / Helper</div>
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-date-grid dmx-scheduler-range-<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>">
                <?php foreach ($range_dates as $date_key) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-date-head">
                        <strong><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('D', strtotime($date_key))); ?></strong>
                        <span><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('M j', strtotime($date_key))); ?></span>
                    </div>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php foreach ($technicians as $technician) : ?>
            <?php $person_color_class = $this->get_scheduler_user_color_class($technician->ID); ?>
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-row <?php echo esc_attr($person_color_class); ?>">
                <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-name">
                    <strong><?php echo esc_html($technician->display_name); ?></strong>
                    <span><?php echo esc_html($this->get_scheduler_user_role_label($technician)); ?></span>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-days dmx-scheduler-range-<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>">
                    <?php foreach ($range_dates as $date_key) : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-day">
                            <?php foreach ($time_slots as $slot) : ?>
                                <?php $slot_items = $this->get_scheduler_items_for_technician_date_slot($items, $technician->ID, $date_key, $slot['start']); ?>
                                <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-slot <?php echo !empty($slot_items) ? 'has-job' : ''; ?>" <?php echo $can_drag ? 'data-scheduler-dropzone="slot" data-schedule-date="' . esc_attr($date_key) . '" data-schedule-start="' . esc_attr($slot['start']) . '" data-schedule-end="' . esc_attr($slot['end']) . '" data-schedule-technician="' . esc_attr($technician->ID) . '"' : ''; ?>>
                                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-slot-time"><?php echo esc_html($slot['label']); ?></div>
                                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-slot-content">
                                        <?php if (!empty($slot_items)) : ?>
                                            <?php foreach ($slot_items as $item) : ?>
                                                <?php echo $this->render_scheduler_event_card($item, 'technician', $is_admin, true, $technician->ID); ?>
                                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                                        <?php else : ?>
                                            <span>Open</span>
                                        <?php endif; ?>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>

                            <?php $no_time_items = $this->get_scheduler_items_for_technician_date_slot($items, $technician->ID, $date_key, ''); ?>
                            <?php if (!empty($no_time_items)) : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-scheduler-tech-no-time">
                                    <strong>No time set</strong>
                                    <?php foreach ($no_time_items as $item) : ?>
                                        <?php echo $this->render_scheduler_event_card($item, 'technician', $is_admin, true, $technician->ID); ?>
                                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                                </div>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            </div>
        <?php endforeach; ?>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function render_scheduler_technician_day_timeline_board($items, $reference_date, $is_admin = false) {
    $date_key = date('Y-m-d', strtotime($reference_date));
    $technicians = $this->get_scheduler_assignable_field_users();
    $time_slots = $this->get_scheduler_half_hour_slots(7, 18);
    $can_drag = $this->current_user_can_reschedule_work_orders();

    if (empty($technicians)) {
        return '<div class="dmx-empty">No technician or helper users have been added yet. Add team members in the Team area before using the technician day board.</div>';
    }

    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-board">
        <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-scroll">
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-headrow">
                <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-name-head">Tech / Helper</div>
                <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-time-grid">
                    <?php foreach ($time_slots as $slot) : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-time-head"><?php echo esc_html($slot['label']); ?></div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            </div>

            <?php foreach ($technicians as $technician) : ?>
                <?php $person_color_class = $this->get_scheduler_user_color_class($technician->ID); ?>
                <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-row <?php echo esc_attr($person_color_class); ?>">
                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-name">
                        <strong><?php echo esc_html($technician->display_name); ?></strong>
                        <span><?php echo esc_html($this->get_scheduler_user_role_label($technician)); ?></span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-slots">
                        <?php foreach ($time_slots as $slot) : ?>
                            <?php $slot_items = $this->get_scheduler_items_for_technician_date_slot($items, $technician->ID, $date_key, $slot['start']); ?>
                            <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-timeline-slot <?php echo !empty($slot_items) ? 'has-job' : ''; ?>" <?php echo $can_drag ? 'data-scheduler-dropzone="slot" data-schedule-date="' . esc_attr($date_key) . '" data-schedule-start="' . esc_attr($slot['start']) . '" data-schedule-end="' . esc_attr($slot['end']) . '" data-schedule-technician="' . esc_attr($technician->ID) . '"' : ''; ?>>
                                <?php if (!empty($slot_items)) : ?>
                                    <?php foreach ($slot_items as $item) : ?>
                                        <?php echo $this->render_scheduler_event_card($item, 'technician', $is_admin, true, $technician->ID); ?>
                                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                                <?php else : ?>
                                    <span>Open</span>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </div>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </div>
                </div>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
        </div>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}


private function get_scheduler_range_dates($reference_date, $view = 'week') {
    $reference_ts = strtotime($reference_date);
    $dates = array();

    if ($view === 'day') {
        return array(date('Y-m-d', $reference_ts));
    }

    if ($view === '3day') {
        for ($i = 0; $i < 3; $i++) {
            $dates[] = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+' . $i . ' day', $reference_ts));
        }
        return $dates;
    }

    $week_start = strtotime('sunday this week', $reference_ts);
    if ((int) date('w', $reference_ts) === 0) {
        $week_start = strtotime('today', $reference_ts);
    }

    for ($i = 0; $i < 7; $i++) {
        $dates[] = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+' . $i . ' day', $week_start));
    }
    return $dates;
}

private function render_scheduler_month_board($items_by_date, $reference_date, $team_view, $is_admin = false) {
    $month_ts = strtotime(date('Y-m-01', strtotime($reference_date)));
    $grid_start = strtotime('sunday this week', $month_ts);
    if ((int) date('w', $month_ts) === 0) {
        $grid_start = $month_ts;
    }

    $current_month = date('m', $month_ts);
    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-scheduler-month-board">
        <div class="dmx-scheduler-board-days">
            <?php foreach (array('Sun', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat') as $day_name) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-scheduler-day-head"><?php echo esc_html($day_name); ?></div>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-scheduler-month-grid">
            <?php for ($cell = 0; $cell < 42; $cell++) : $date_key = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+' . $cell . ' day', $grid_start)); $day_items = isset($items_by_date[$date_key]) ? $items_by_date[$date_key] : array(); ?>
                <div class="dmx-scheduler-month-cell <?php echo date('m', strtotime($date_key)) === $current_month ? '' : 'is-muted'; ?> <?php echo $date_key === current_time('Y-m-d') ? 'is-today' : ''; ?>" <?php echo $this->current_user_can_reschedule_work_orders() ? 'data-scheduler-dropzone="date" data-schedule-date="' . esc_attr($date_key) . '"' : ''; ?>>
                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-cell-date"><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('j', strtotime($date_key))); ?></div>
                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-cell-events">
                        <?php if (!empty($day_items)) : ?>
                            <?php foreach (array_slice($day_items, 0, 4) as $item) : ?>
                                <?php echo $this->render_scheduler_event_card($item, $team_view, $is_admin, true); ?>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                            <?php if (count($day_items) > 4) : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-scheduler-more-link">+<?php echo esc_html(count($day_items) - 4); ?> more</div>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        <?php else : ?>
                            <div class="dmx-scheduler-open-slot">Open</div>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                    </div>
                </div>
            <?php endfor; ?>
        </div>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function render_scheduler_range_board($items_by_date, $reference_date, $team_view, $view = 'week', $is_admin = false) {
    $range_dates = $this->get_scheduler_range_dates($reference_date, $view);
    $can_drag = $this->current_user_can_reschedule_work_orders();
    $time_slots = $this->get_scheduler_half_hour_slots(7, 18);

    ob_start(); ?>
    <div class="dmx-scheduler-range-board dmx-scheduler-range-<?php echo esc_attr($view); ?>">
        <?php foreach ($range_dates as $date_key) : $day_items = isset($items_by_date[$date_key]) ? $items_by_date[$date_key] : array(); ?>
            <div class="dmx-scheduler-range-column">
                <div class="dmx-scheduler-range-head">
                    <strong><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('D', strtotime($date_key))); ?></strong>
                    <span><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('M j', strtotime($date_key))); ?></span>
                </div>
                <?php if ($can_drag && $team_view !== 'warehouse' && $team_view !== 'unscheduled') : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-scheduler-drop-slot-list">
                        <?php foreach ($time_slots as $slot) : ?>
                            <div class="dmx-scheduler-drop-slot" data-scheduler-dropzone="slot" data-schedule-date="<?php echo esc_attr($date_key); ?>" data-schedule-start="<?php echo esc_attr($slot['start']); ?>" data-schedule-end="<?php echo esc_attr($slot['end']); ?>">
                                <?php echo esc_html($slot['label']); ?>
                                <span>Drop here to move and set time</span>
                            </div>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </div>
                <?php endif; ?>
                <div class="dmx-scheduler-range-events">
                    <?php if (!empty($day_items)) : ?>
                        <?php foreach ($day_items as $item) : ?>
                            <?php echo $this->render_scheduler_event_card($item, $team_view, $is_admin, false); ?>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    <?php else : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-scheduler-open-slot">Open time</div>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </div>
            </div>
        <?php endforeach; ?>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function render_scheduler_event_card($work_order, $team_view = 'all', $is_admin = false, $compact = false, $color_user_id = 0) {
    $date_key = $this->get_scheduler_item_board_date($work_order, $team_view);
    $start_time = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true);
    $end_time = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_end_time', true);
    $customer = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true);
    $site = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_name', true);
    $job_type = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_job_type', true);
    $billing = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_billing_type', true);
    $status = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_status', true);
    $crew = $this->get_work_order_schedule_summary($work_order->ID);
    $color_user_id = absint($color_user_id);
    $card_class = $color_user_id > 0 ? $this->get_scheduler_user_color_class($color_user_id) : $this->get_scheduler_event_color_class($work_order, $team_view);
    $time_label = $team_view === 'warehouse' ? 'Pull ' . date_i18n('M j', strtotime($date_key)) : trim($start_time . ' - ' . $end_time, ' -');
    if ($time_label === '') {
        $time_label = $team_view === 'warehouse' ? 'Warehouse' : 'Scheduled';
    }

    $work_order_title = trim((string) $work_order->post_title);
    $primary_label = $work_order_title !== '' ? $work_order_title : ($customer !== '' ? $customer : 'Work Order');
    $secondary_label = '';
    if ($customer !== '' && $customer !== $primary_label) {
        $secondary_label = $customer;
    } elseif ($site !== '' && $site !== $primary_label) {
        $secondary_label = $site;
    }

    $url = $is_admin
        ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=work_orders&dmx_edit_work_order=' . $work_order->ID)
        : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders', 'dmx_edit_work_order' => $work_order->ID), get_permalink());

    ob_start(); ?>
    <?php $can_drag = $this->current_user_can_reschedule_work_orders(); ?>
    <a class="dmx-scheduler-event <?php echo esc_attr($card_class); ?> <?php echo $compact ? 'is-compact' : ''; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url($url); ?>" <?php echo $can_drag ? 'draggable="true" data-work-order-id="' . esc_attr($work_order->ID) . '" data-schedule-date="' . esc_attr($date_key) . '" data-schedule-start="' . esc_attr($start_time) . '" data-schedule-end="' . esc_attr($end_time) . '"' : ''; ?>>
        <span class="dmx-scheduler-event-time"><?php echo esc_html($time_label); ?></span>
        <strong><?php echo esc_html($primary_label); ?></strong>
        <?php if ($secondary_label !== '') : ?>
            <span><?php echo esc_html($secondary_label); ?></span>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php if (!$compact) : ?>
            <?php if ($site !== '' && $site !== $secondary_label && $site !== $primary_label) : ?><span><?php echo esc_html($site); ?></span><?php endif; ?>
            <span><?php echo esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $job_type ?: 'work order'))); ?><?php echo $billing !== '' ? ' • ' . esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $billing))) : ''; ?></span>
            <?php if ($crew !== '') : ?><span><?php echo esc_html($crew); ?></span><?php endif; ?>
            <?php $equipment_label = $this->format_work_order_equipment_label($work_order->ID, false); ?>
            <?php if ($equipment_label !== '') : ?><span>Equipment: <?php echo esc_html($equipment_label); ?></span><?php endif; ?>
            <span><?php echo esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $status ?: 'scheduled'))); ?></span>
        <?php endif; ?>
    </a>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function get_scheduler_event_color_class($work_order, $team_view = 'all') {
    if ($team_view === 'warehouse') {
        return 'dmx-scheduler-event-blue';
    }

    $person_id = $this->get_scheduler_primary_color_user_id($work_order->ID);
    if ($person_id > 0) {
        return $this->get_scheduler_user_color_class($person_id);
    }

    $job_type = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_job_type', true);
    $billing = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_billing_type', true);

    if ($job_type === 'sales_appointment') {
        return 'dmx-scheduler-event-orange';
    }

    if ($billing === 'warranty') {
        return 'dmx-scheduler-event-gold';
    }

    return 'dmx-scheduler-event-green';
}


private function render_scheduler_table($items, $mode = 'technician', $is_admin = false) {
    ob_start();

    if (empty($items)) {
        echo '<div class="dmx-empty">No scheduled items yet.</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    $scheduler_table_class = 'dmx-table-wrap dmx-scheduler-table-wrap dmx-scheduler-table-' . sanitize_html_class($mode);
    echo '<div class="' . esc_attr($scheduler_table_class) . '"><table class="dmx-table dmx-scheduler-detail-table"><thead><tr>';
    if ($mode === 'warehouse') {
        echo '<th>Pull Date</th><th>Job Date</th><th>Work Order</th><th>Customer</th><th>Technician / Crew</th><th>Items to Pull</th><th>Status</th><th>Action</th>';
    } elseif ($mode === 'unscheduled') {
        echo '<th>Work Order</th><th>Customer</th><th>Job Type</th><th>Billing</th><th>Issue / Requested Work</th><th>Action</th>';
    } else {
        echo '<th>Date</th><th>Time</th><th>Work Order</th><th>Customer</th><th>Job Type</th><th>Billing</th><th>Technician / Crew</th><th>Site</th><th>Status</th><th>Action</th>';
    }
    echo '</tr></thead><tbody>';

    foreach ($items as $work_order) {
        $schedule_date = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true);
        $start_time = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true);
        $end_time = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_end_time', true);
        $job_type = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_job_type', true);
        $billing = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_billing_type', true);
        $status = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_status', true);
        $site = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_name', true);
        $customer = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true);
        $crew = $this->get_work_order_schedule_summary($work_order->ID);
        $pull_date = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_warehouse_pull_date', true);
        $issue = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_customer_issue', true);

        $edit_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=work_orders&dmx_edit_work_order=' . $work_order->ID)
            : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders', 'dmx_edit_work_order' => $work_order->ID), get_permalink());

        echo '<tr>';
        if ($mode === 'warehouse') {
            echo '<td data-label="Pull Date">' . esc_html($pull_date) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Date">' . esc_html($schedule_date) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Work Order"><strong>' . esc_html($this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order->ID)) . '</strong><br>' . esc_html($work_order->post_title) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Customer">' . esc_html($customer) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Technician / Crew">' . esc_html($crew) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Items to Pull">' . wp_kses_post($this->get_work_order_items_summary_html($work_order->ID)) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Status"><span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-pending">' . esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $status ?: 'scheduled'))) . '</span></td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Action"><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="' . esc_url($edit_url) . '">Open</a></td>';
        } elseif ($mode === 'unscheduled') {
            echo '<td data-label="Work Order"><strong>' . esc_html($this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order->ID)) . '</strong><br>' . esc_html($work_order->post_title) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Customer">' . esc_html($customer) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Job Type">' . esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $job_type))) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Billing">' . esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $billing))) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Issue / Requested Work">' . esc_html($issue) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Action"><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="' . esc_url($edit_url) . '">Schedule</a></td>';
        } else {
            echo '<td data-label="Date">' . esc_html($schedule_date) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Time">' . esc_html(trim($start_time . ' - ' . $end_time, ' -')) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Work Order"><strong>' . esc_html($this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order->ID)) . '</strong><br>' . esc_html($work_order->post_title) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Customer">' . esc_html($customer) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Job Type">' . esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $job_type))) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Billing">' . esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $billing))) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Technician / Crew">' . esc_html($crew) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Site">' . esc_html($site) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Status"><span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-open">' . esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $status ?: 'scheduled'))) . '</span></td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Action"><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="' . esc_url($edit_url) . '">Open</a></td>';
        }
        echo '</tr>';
    }

    echo '</tbody></table></div>';
    return ob_get_clean();
}

private function get_work_order_items_summary_html($work_order_id) {
    $rows = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_item_rows', true);
    if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) {
        return 'No parts listed yet.';
    }

    $out = array();
    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        $description = sanitize_text_field($row['description'] ?? '');
        $qty = sanitize_text_field($row['qty_ord'] ?? '');
        if ($description !== '') {
            $out[] = ($qty !== '' ? $qty . ' x ' : '') . $description;
        }
    }
    return implode('<br>', array_slice($out, 0, 8));
}

    private function render_accounting_section($is_admin = false) {
        $items = $this->get_accounting_subtabs();
        if (empty($items)) {
            return '<div class="dmx-empty">You do not have access to Accounting.</div>';
        }
        $active = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_subtab'] ?? 'expenses');
        if (!isset($items[$active])) {
            $keys = array_keys($items);
            $active = reset($keys);
        }

        $base_url = $is_admin
            ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG)
            : $this->get_portal_page_url();

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-app-tabs dmx-accounting-tabs">';
        foreach ($items as $key => $label) {
            $url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => $key), $base_url);
            echo '<a class="' . esc_attr($active === $key ? 'active' : '') . '" href="' . esc_url($url) . '">' . esc_html($label) . '</a>';
        }
        echo '</div><div class="dmx-app-section dmx-accounting-section">';

        if ($active === 'expenses') {
            echo str_replace('name="dmx_tab" value="costs"', 'name="dmx_tab" value="accounting"', $this->render_costs_expenses());
        } elseif ($active === 'timesheets') {
            echo $this->render_accounting_timesheets($is_admin);
        } elseif ($active === 'commissions') {
            echo $this->render_accounting_commissions($is_admin);
        } elseif ($active === 'supplier_payments') {
            echo str_replace('name="dmx_tab" value="costs"', 'name="dmx_tab" value="accounting"', $this->render_costs_payments());
        } elseif ($active === 'supplier_invoices') {
            echo str_replace('name="dmx_tab" value="costs"', 'name="dmx_tab" value="accounting"', $this->render_costs_supplier_invoices());
        } elseif ($active === 'purchase_orders') {
            echo $this->render_supplier_requests_tab($is_admin);
        } else {
            echo str_replace('name="dmx_tab" value="costs"', 'name="dmx_tab" value="accounting"', $this->render_costs_expenses());
        }

        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_costs_section($is_admin = false) {
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-app-section dmx-inventory-section">';
        echo $this->render_inventory_tab($is_admin);
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function is_admin_inventory_workspace_request() {
        if (!is_admin() || !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return false;
        }

        if ($this->dmx_admin_live_preview_mode && $this->dmx_admin_live_preview_company_key === self::ADMIN_INVENTORY_COMPANY_KEY) {
            return true;
        }

        $page = '';
        if (isset($_REQUEST['page'])) {
            $page = sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_REQUEST['page']));
        }

        if ($page === 'doormatrix-preview-inventory') {
            return true;
        }

        if (!empty($_POST['dmx_admin_inventory_workspace']) && sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_admin_inventory_workspace'])) === 'yes') {
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    private function get_inventory_company_key() {
        if ($this->is_admin_inventory_workspace_request()) {
            return self::ADMIN_INVENTORY_COMPANY_KEY;
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        return $company_key !== '' ? $company_key : 'global';
    }

    private function get_inventory_locations() {
        $all = get_option('dmx_inventory_locations', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_inventory_company_key();
        $locations = isset($all[$company_key]) && is_array($all[$company_key]) ? $all[$company_key] : array(
            array('key' => 'warehouse_main', 'name' => 'Main Warehouse', 'type' => 'warehouse'),
            array('key' => 'truck_1', 'name' => 'Truck 1', 'type' => 'truck', 'assigned_user_id' => 0),
        );
        return array_values($locations);
    }

    private function save_inventory_locations($locations) {
        $all = get_option('dmx_inventory_locations', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_inventory_company_key();
        $all[$company_key] = array_values($locations);
        update_option('dmx_inventory_locations', $all);
    }

    private function get_inventory_balances() {
        $all = get_option('dmx_inventory_balances', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_inventory_company_key();
        return isset($all[$company_key]) && is_array($all[$company_key]) ? $all[$company_key] : array();
    }

    private function save_inventory_balances($balances) {
        $all = get_option('dmx_inventory_balances', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_inventory_company_key();
        $all[$company_key] = $balances;
        update_option('dmx_inventory_balances', $all);
    }

    private function get_inventory_activity() {
        $all = get_option('dmx_inventory_activity', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_inventory_company_key();
        return isset($all[$company_key]) && is_array($all[$company_key]) ? $all[$company_key] : array();
    }

    private function save_inventory_activity($rows) {
        $all = get_option('dmx_inventory_activity', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_inventory_company_key();
        $all[$company_key] = array_slice(array_values($rows), 0, 150);
        update_option('dmx_inventory_activity', $all);
    }

    private function add_inventory_activity($type, $part_id, $location_key, $quantity, $notes = '', $to_location_key = '') {
        $activity = $this->get_inventory_activity();
        array_unshift($activity, array(
            'type' => sanitize_key($type),
            'part_id' => absint($part_id),
            'location_key' => sanitize_key($location_key),
            'to_location_key' => sanitize_key($to_location_key),
            'quantity' => (float) $quantity,
            'notes' => sanitize_text_field($notes),
            'user_id' => get_current_user_id(),
            'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        ));
        $this->save_inventory_activity($activity);
    }

    private function get_inventory_location_map() {
        $map = array();
        foreach ($this->get_inventory_locations() as $location) {
            if (!empty($location['key'])) {
                $map[$location['key']] = $location;
            }
        }
        return $map;
    }

    private function get_inventory_truck_display_name($location) {
        $location = is_array($location) ? $location : array();
        $base_name = isset($location['name']) && $location['name'] !== '' ? (string) $location['name'] : 'Truck';
        $assigned_user_id = isset($location['assigned_user_id']) ? absint($location['assigned_user_id']) : 0;
        if ($assigned_user_id <= 0) {
            return $base_name;
        }
        $user = get_userdata($assigned_user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            return $base_name;
        }
        $user_name = $user->display_name !== '' ? $user->display_name : $user->user_login;
        if ($user_name === '') {
            return $base_name;
        }
        return $user_name . ' - ' . $base_name;
    }

    private function get_inventory_location_display_name($location) {
        $location = is_array($location) ? $location : array();
        if (($location['type'] ?? '') === 'truck') {
            return $this->get_inventory_truck_display_name($location);
        }
        return isset($location['name']) && $location['name'] !== '' ? (string) $location['name'] : 'Location';
    }

    private function get_inventory_low_stock_threshold($part_id) {
        $threshold = get_post_meta($part_id, '_dmx_inventory_low_stock_threshold', true);
        if ($threshold === '') {
            return 2.0;
        }
        return max(0, (float) $threshold);
    }

    private function get_inventory_activity_type_label($type) {
        switch (sanitize_key($type)) {
            case 'receive':
                return 'Received';
            case 'transfer':
                return 'Transferred';
            case 'adjust':
                return 'Adjusted';
            case 'usage':
                return 'Used';
            default:
                return ucfirst((string) $type);
        }
    }

    private function get_inventory_user_label($user_id) {
        $user_id = absint($user_id);
        if ($user_id <= 0) {
            return 'System';
        }
        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        if (!$user) {
            return 'User #' . $user_id;
        }
        return $user->display_name !== '' ? $user->display_name : $user->user_login;
    }

    private function create_inventory_location($tab) {
        if (!$this->can_manage_inventory()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to manage inventory.');
        }
        $name = sanitize_text_field($_POST['inventory_location_name'] ?? '');
        $type = sanitize_key($_POST['inventory_location_type'] ?? 'warehouse');
        $assigned_user_id = absint($_POST['inventory_assigned_user_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($name === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Location name is required.');
        }
        if (!in_array($type, array('warehouse', 'truck'), true)) {
            $type = 'warehouse';
        }
        $locations = $this->get_inventory_locations();
        $key = sanitize_title($type . '-' . $name);
        foreach ($locations as $location) {
            if (($location['key'] ?? '') === $key) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'That inventory location already exists.');
            }
        }
        if ($type !== 'truck') {
            $assigned_user_id = 0;
        }
        $locations[] = array('key' => $key, 'name' => $name, 'type' => $type, 'assigned_user_id' => $assigned_user_id);
        $this->save_inventory_locations($locations);
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Inventory location added.');
    }

    private function receive_inventory_stock($tab) {
        if (!$this->can_manage_inventory()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to manage inventory.');
        }
        $part_id = absint($_POST['inventory_part_id'] ?? 0);
        $location_key = sanitize_key($_POST['inventory_location_key'] ?? '');
        $quantity = isset($_POST['inventory_quantity']) ? (float) wp_unslash($_POST['inventory_quantity']) : 0;
        $notes = sanitize_text_field($_POST['inventory_notes'] ?? '');
        $linked_supplier_request_id = absint($_POST['inventory_supplier_request_id'] ?? 0);
        $door_order_receiving_status = sanitize_key($_POST['door_order_receiving_status'] ?? '');
        $door_order_receiving_notes = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['door_order_receiving_notes'] ?? ''));

        if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Select a valid part.');
        }
        if ($location_key === '' || $quantity <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Location and quantity are required.');
        }

        $balances = $this->get_inventory_balances();
        if (empty($balances[$part_id]) || !is_array($balances[$part_id])) {
            $balances[$part_id] = array();
        }
        $balances[$part_id][$location_key] = isset($balances[$part_id][$location_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part_id][$location_key] + $quantity : $quantity;
        $this->save_inventory_balances($balances);
        $this->add_inventory_activity('receive', $part_id, $location_key, $quantity, $notes);

        if ($linked_supplier_request_id > 0 && get_post_type($linked_supplier_request_id) === 'dm_supplier_request' && in_array($door_order_receiving_status, array('partial_received', 'received'), true)) {
            update_post_meta($linked_supplier_request_id, '_dmx_status', $door_order_receiving_status);
            update_post_meta($linked_supplier_request_id, '_dmx_receiving_status', $door_order_receiving_status);
            update_post_meta($linked_supplier_request_id, '_dmx_received_last_at', current_time('mysql'));
            if ($door_order_receiving_notes !== '') {
                update_post_meta($linked_supplier_request_id, '_dmx_received_notes', $door_order_receiving_notes);
            }
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Inventory received successfully.');
    }

    private function transfer_inventory_stock($tab) {
        if (!$this->can_manage_inventory()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to manage inventory.');
        }
        $part_id = absint($_POST['inventory_part_id'] ?? 0);
        $from_location_key = sanitize_key($_POST['inventory_from_location_key'] ?? '');
        $to_location_key = sanitize_key($_POST['inventory_to_location_key'] ?? '');
        $quantity = isset($_POST['inventory_quantity']) ? (float) wp_unslash($_POST['inventory_quantity']) : 0;
        $notes = sanitize_text_field($_POST['inventory_notes'] ?? '');

        if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Select a valid part.');
        }
        if ($from_location_key === '' || $to_location_key === '' || $from_location_key === $to_location_key || $quantity <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Choose valid source and destination locations and enter a quantity.');
        }

        $balances = $this->get_inventory_balances();
        $current = isset($balances[$part_id][$from_location_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part_id][$from_location_key] : 0;
        if ($current < $quantity) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Not enough stock in the source location.');
        }
        $balances[$part_id][$from_location_key] = $current - $quantity;
        $balances[$part_id][$to_location_key] = isset($balances[$part_id][$to_location_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part_id][$to_location_key] + $quantity : $quantity;
        $this->save_inventory_balances($balances);
