        $this->add_inventory_activity('transfer', $part_id, $from_location_key, $quantity, $notes, $to_location_key);

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Inventory transferred successfully.');
    }

    private function adjust_inventory_stock($tab) {
        if (!$this->can_manage_inventory()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to manage inventory.');
        }
        $part_id = absint($_POST['inventory_part_id'] ?? 0);
        $location_key = sanitize_key($_POST['inventory_location_key'] ?? '');
        $quantity = isset($_POST['inventory_quantity']) ? (float) wp_unslash($_POST['inventory_quantity']) : 0;
        $direction = sanitize_key($_POST['inventory_adjustment_direction'] ?? 'increase');
        $notes = sanitize_text_field($_POST['inventory_notes'] ?? '');

        if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Select a valid part.');
        }
        if ($location_key === '' || $quantity <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Location and quantity are required.');
        }
        if (!in_array($direction, array('increase', 'decrease'), true)) {
            $direction = 'increase';
        }

        $balances = $this->get_inventory_balances();
        $current = isset($balances[$part_id][$location_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part_id][$location_key] : 0;
        $signed_quantity = $direction === 'decrease' ? -1 * $quantity : $quantity;

        if ($direction === 'decrease' && $current < $quantity) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Cannot decrease below zero at this location.');
        }

        $balances[$part_id][$location_key] = max(0, $current + $signed_quantity);
        $this->save_inventory_balances($balances);
        $this->add_inventory_activity('adjust', $part_id, $location_key, $signed_quantity, $notes);

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Inventory adjustment saved.');
    }

    private function use_inventory_stock($tab) {
        if (!$this->can_manage_inventory()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to manage inventory.');
        }
        $part_id = absint($_POST['inventory_part_id'] ?? 0);
        $location_key = sanitize_key($_POST['inventory_location_key'] ?? '');
        $quantity = isset($_POST['inventory_quantity']) ? (float) wp_unslash($_POST['inventory_quantity']) : 0;
        $notes = sanitize_text_field($_POST['inventory_notes'] ?? '');

        if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Select a valid part.');
        }
        if ($location_key === '' || $quantity <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Location and quantity are required.');
        }

        $balances = $this->get_inventory_balances();
        $current = isset($balances[$part_id][$location_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part_id][$location_key] : 0;
        if ($current < $quantity) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Not enough stock at this location.');
        }

        $balances[$part_id][$location_key] = max(0, $current - $quantity);
        $this->save_inventory_balances($balances);
        $this->add_inventory_activity('usage', $part_id, $location_key, -1 * $quantity, $notes);

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Inventory usage recorded.');
    }

    private function render_inventory_tab($is_admin = false) {
        $locations = $this->get_inventory_locations();
        $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        $balances = $this->get_inventory_balances();
        $activity = $this->get_inventory_activity();
        $technicians = $this->get_schedule_team_users(array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE));
        $parts = get_posts(array(
            'post_type' => self::PART_POST_TYPE,
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => 250,
            'orderby' => 'title',
            'order' => 'ASC',
            'fields' => 'all',
        ));

        $warehouse_count = 0;
        $truck_count = 0;
        foreach ($locations as $location) {
            if (($location['type'] ?? '') === 'truck') {
                $truck_count++;
            } else {
                $warehouse_count++;
            }
        }

        $can_manage_inventory = $this->can_manage_inventory();
        $door_order_receiving_options = $this->get_customer_door_orders_for_scheduling('', 100);

        $stock_lines = array();
        $low_stock_count = 0;
        foreach ($parts as $part) {
            $part_balances = isset($balances[$part->ID]) && is_array($balances[$part->ID]) ? $balances[$part->ID] : array();
            $total_qty = array_sum(array_map('floatval', $part_balances));
            if ($total_qty <= 0) {
                continue;
            }
            $threshold = $this->get_inventory_low_stock_threshold($part->ID);
            $is_low = $total_qty <= $threshold;
            if ($is_low) {
                $low_stock_count++;
            }
            $stock_lines[] = array(
                'part_id' => $part->ID,
                'part_name' => $part->post_title,
                'total_qty' => $total_qty,
                'threshold' => $threshold,
                'is_low' => $is_low,
                'by_location' => $part_balances,
            );
        }

        ob_start();

        $inventory_view = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_inventory_view'] ?? '');
        if ($this->current_user_is_technician() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            echo $this->render_technician_assigned_truck_inventory_view($locations, $balances, $parts, $is_admin);
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        if ($inventory_view === 'truck_scheduling' && $this->current_user_is_coordinator() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            echo $this->render_coordinator_truck_inventory_scheduling_view($locations, $balances, $parts, $is_admin);
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        if ($can_manage_inventory) {
            echo '<div class="dmx-form-grid-3">';
            echo '<div class="dmx-form-card"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Add Inventory Location</h4><form method="post">';
            wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_inventory_location"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Location Name</label><input type="text" name="inventory_location_name" placeholder="Main Warehouse or Truck 2"></div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Location Type</label><select name="inventory_location_type"><option value="warehouse">Warehouse</option><option value="truck">Truck</option></select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Assigned Technician (for trucks)</label><select name="inventory_assigned_user_id"><option value="0">No technician assigned yet</option>';
            foreach ($technicians as $technician) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($technician->ID) . '">' . esc_html($technician->display_name) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-inline-note">Truck labels will show as Technician Name - Truck Name when a technician is assigned.</div>';
            echo '<button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Location</button></form></div>';

            echo '<div class="dmx-form-card"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Receive Stock</h4><form method="post">';
            wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="receive_inventory_stock"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Part</label><select name="inventory_part_id"><option value="">Select part</option>';
            foreach ($parts as $part) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($part->ID) . '">' . esc_html($part->post_title) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Location</label><select name="inventory_location_key"><option value="">Select location</option>';
            foreach ($locations as $location) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($location['key']) . '">' . esc_html($this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location)) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Quantity</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0.01" name="inventory_quantity"></div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><input type="text" name="inventory_notes" placeholder="PO, supplier, bin, etc."></div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Linked Customer Door / Supplier Order</label><select name="inventory_supplier_request_id"><option value="0">No linked door order</option>';
            foreach ($door_order_receiving_options as $door_order) {
                $customer_name = get_post_meta($door_order->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
                $customer_number = $this->get_customer_number_by_name($customer_name);
                $label = trim(($customer_number !== '' ? $customer_number . ' - ' : '') . ($customer_name !== '' ? $customer_name . ' - ' : '') . $door_order->post_title);
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($door_order->ID) . '">' . esc_html($label) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select><div class="dmx-inline-note">Use this when receiving doors or supplier order items for a customer job.</div></div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Door Order Receiving Status</label><select name="door_order_receiving_status"><option value="">Stock only / no door order change</option><option value="partial_received">Partial order received - waiting on remaining product</option><option value="received">Full order received - ready to schedule</option></select></div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Partial / Receiving Notes</label><input type="text" name="door_order_receiving_notes" placeholder="Example: sections received, waiting on track / springs / hardware"></div>';
            echo '<button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Receive Stock</button></form></div>';

            echo '<div class="dmx-form-card"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Transfer Stock</h4><form method="post">';
            wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="transfer_inventory_stock"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Part</label><select name="inventory_part_id"><option value="">Select part</option>';
            foreach ($parts as $part) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($part->ID) . '">' . esc_html($part->post_title) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>From</label><select name="inventory_from_location_key"><option value="">Select location</option>';
            foreach ($locations as $location) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($location['key']) . '">' . esc_html($this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location)) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>To</label><select name="inventory_to_location_key"><option value="">Select location</option>';
            foreach ($locations as $location) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($location['key']) . '">' . esc_html($this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location)) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Quantity</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0.01" name="inventory_quantity"></div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><input type="text" name="inventory_notes" placeholder="Truck restock, transfer, etc."></div>';
            echo '<button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Transfer Stock</button></form></div>';
            echo '</div>';

            echo '<div class="dmx-form-grid">';
            echo '<div class="dmx-form-card"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Adjust Stock</h4><form method="post">';
            wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="adjust_inventory_stock"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Part</label><select name="inventory_part_id"><option value="">Select part</option>';
            foreach ($parts as $part) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($part->ID) . '">' . esc_html($part->post_title) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Location</label><select name="inventory_location_key"><option value="">Select location</option>';
            foreach ($locations as $location) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($location['key']) . '">' . esc_html($this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location)) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Adjustment</label><select name="inventory_adjustment_direction"><option value="increase">Increase</option><option value="decrease">Decrease</option></select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Quantity</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0.01" name="inventory_quantity"></div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><input type="text" name="inventory_notes" placeholder="Cycle count correction, shrinkage, damage, etc."></div>';
            echo '<button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Adjustment</button></form></div>';

            echo '<div class="dmx-form-card"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Use Stock on Job</h4><form method="post">';
            wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="use_inventory_stock"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Part</label><select name="inventory_part_id"><option value="">Select part</option>';
            foreach ($parts as $part) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($part->ID) . '">' . esc_html($part->post_title) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Location</label><select name="inventory_location_key"><option value="">Select location</option>';
            foreach ($locations as $location) {
                echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($location['key']) . '">' . esc_html($this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location)) . '</option>';
            }
            echo '</select>
                    </div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Quantity Used</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0.01" name="inventory_quantity"></div>';
            echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Job / Notes</label><input type="text" name="inventory_notes" placeholder="WO-123, service call, install, etc."></div>';
            echo '<button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Record Usage</button></form></div>';
            echo '</div>';
        } else {
            echo '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">You have read-only inventory access. A manager, warehouse user, or parts user is required to receive, transfer, adjust, or use stock.</div>';
        }

        if ($this->can_process_truck_inventory_requests()) {
            $requests = get_option('dmx_truck_inventory_requests', array());
            if (!is_array($requests)) {
                $requests = array();
            }
            $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
            $requests = array_values(array_filter($requests, function($row) use ($company_key) {
                return ($row['company_key'] ?? '') === $company_key;
            }));
            usort($requests, function($a, $b) {
                return strtotime((string) ($b['created_at'] ?? '')) <=> strtotime((string) ($a['created_at'] ?? ''));
            });

            echo '<div class="dmx-form-card"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Technician Truck Replenishment Requests</h4>';
            if (empty($requests)) {
                echo '<div class="dmx-empty">No truck replenishment requests submitted yet.</div>';
            } else {
                echo '<div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Requested</th><th>Technician</th><th>Truck</th><th>Part</th><th>Qty</th><th>Notes</th><th>Status</th><th>Actions</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
                foreach ($requests as $request) {
                    $status = sanitize_key((string) ($request['status'] ?? 'requested'));
                    $request_id = (string) ($request['id'] ?? '');
                    $date_text = !empty($request['created_at']) ? date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), strtotime((string) $request['created_at'])) : '';
                    echo '<tr>';
                    echo '<td>' . esc_html($date_text) . '</td>';
                    echo '<td>' . esc_html((string) ($request['requested_by_name'] ?? 'Technician')) . '</td>';
                    echo '<td>' . esc_html((string) ($request['truck_label'] ?? '')) . '</td>';
                    echo '<td>' . esc_html((string) ($request['part_name'] ?? '')) . '</td>';
                    echo '<td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) ($request['quantity'] ?? 0), 2)) . '</td>';
                    echo '<td>' . esc_html((string) ($request['notes'] ?? '')) . '</td>';
                    echo '<td>' . esc_html(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $status))) . '</td>';
                    echo '<td>';

                    if (!in_array($status, array('rejected', 'fulfilled'), true)) {
                        echo '<form method="post" style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;">';
                        wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
                        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="process_truck_inventory_request"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">';
                        echo '<input type="hidden" name="truck_inventory_request_id" value="' . esc_attr($request_id) . '">';
                        echo '<input type="text" name="truck_inventory_request_decision_notes" placeholder="Decision note (optional)" style="min-width:180px;">';
                        echo '<button type="submit" class="dmx-btn" name="truck_inventory_request_decision" value="approve">Approve</button>';
                        echo '<button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" name="truck_inventory_request_decision" value="reject">Reject</button>';
                        echo '</form>';
                    }

                    if ($status === 'approved') {
                        echo '<form method="post" style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-top:6px;">';
                        wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
                        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="process_truck_inventory_request"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">';
                        echo '<input type="hidden" name="truck_inventory_request_id" value="' . esc_attr($request_id) . '">';
                        echo '<input type="hidden" name="truck_inventory_request_decision" value="fulfill">';
                        echo '<select name="truck_inventory_request_from_location_key"><option value="">Warehouse location</option>';
                        foreach ($locations as $location) {
                            if (($location['type'] ?? '') !== 'warehouse') {
                                continue;
                            }
                            echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($location['key']) . '">' . esc_html($this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location)) . '</option>';
                        }
                        echo '</select>';
                        echo '<input type="text" name="truck_inventory_request_transfer_notes" placeholder="Transfer notes (optional)" style="min-width:180px;">';
                        echo '<button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Fulfill</button>';
                        echo '</form>';
                    }

                    echo '</td>';
                    echo '</tr>';
                }
                echo '</tbody></table></div>';
            }
            echo '</div>';
        }

        echo '<div class="dmx-form-card"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Current Inventory</h4>';
        if (empty($stock_lines)) {
            echo '<div class="dmx-empty">No inventory balances yet. Receive stock into a warehouse or truck to begin tracking inventory.</div>';
        } else {
            echo '<div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Part</th><th>Total Qty</th><th>Low Stock Threshold</th><th>Status</th>';
            foreach ($locations as $location) {
                echo '<th>' . esc_html($this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location)) . '</th>';
            }
            echo '</tr></thead><tbody>';
            foreach ($stock_lines as $line) {
                $status_badge = $line['is_low'] ? '<span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-cancelled">Low Stock</span>' : '<span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-complete">Healthy</span>';
                echo '<tr><td>' . esc_html($line['part_name']) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $line['total_qty'], 2)) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $line['threshold'], 2)) . '</td><td>' . $status_badge . '</td>';
                foreach ($locations as $location) {
                    $qty = isset($line['by_location'][$location['key']]) ? (float) $line['by_location'][$location['key']] : 0;
                    echo '<td>' . esc_html(number_format($qty, 2)) . '</td>';
                }
                echo '</tr>';
            }
            echo '</tbody></table></div>';
        }
        echo '</div>';

        echo '<div class="dmx-form-card"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Inventory Ledger / Recent Activity</h4>';
        if (empty($activity)) {
            echo '<div class="dmx-empty">No inventory activity logged yet.</div>';
        } else {
            echo '<div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Type</th><th>Part</th><th>From</th><th>To</th><th>Qty</th><th>Performed By</th><th>Notes</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
            foreach (array_slice($activity, 0, 50) as $row) {
                $part_name = get_the_title((int) ($row['part_id'] ?? 0));
                $from_name = !empty($location_map[$row['location_key'] ?? '']) ? $this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location_map[$row['location_key']]) : '';
                $to_name = !empty($location_map[$row['to_location_key'] ?? '']) ? $this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location_map[$row['to_location_key']]) : '';
                $performed_by = $this->get_inventory_user_label((int) ($row['user_id'] ?? 0));
                echo '<tr>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html(!empty($row['created_at']) ? date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), strtotime($row['created_at'])) : '') . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($this->get_inventory_activity_type_label((string) ($row['type'] ?? ''))) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($part_name) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($from_name) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($to_name) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) ($row['quantity'] ?? 0), 2)) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($performed_by) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html((string) ($row['notes'] ?? '')) . '</td>';
                echo '</tr>';
            }
            echo '</tbody></table></div>';
        }        echo '</div>';

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function submit_truck_inventory_request($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_is_technician() || current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Only technicians can submit truck inventory requests from this view.');
        }

        $truck_key = $this->get_user_assigned_truck_key(get_current_user_id());
        $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        if ($truck_key === '' || empty($location_map[$truck_key]) || ($location_map[$truck_key]['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck') {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'No assigned truck was found for your account. Ask your manager to assign your truck first.');
        }

        $part_id = absint($_POST['truck_inventory_request_part_id'] ?? 0);
        $quantity = (float) ($_POST['truck_inventory_request_quantity'] ?? 0);
        $notes = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['truck_inventory_request_notes'] ?? ''));

        if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please select a valid part for the truck request.');
        }
        if ($quantity <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please enter a requested quantity greater than zero.');
        }

        $requests = get_option('dmx_truck_inventory_requests', array());
        if (!is_array($requests)) {
            $requests = array();
        }

        $requests[] = array(
            'id' => uniqid('truck_req_', true),
            'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
            'company_key' => $this->get_current_user_company_key(),
            'requested_by_user_id' => get_current_user_id(),
            'requested_by_name' => wp_get_current_user()->display_name,
            'part_id' => $part_id,
            'part_name' => get_the_title($part_id),
            'truck_key' => $truck_key,
            'truck_label' => $this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location_map[$truck_key]),
            'quantity' => $quantity,
            'notes' => $notes,
            'status' => 'requested',
        );

        update_option('dmx_truck_inventory_requests', $requests, false);
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Truck inventory replenishment request submitted.');
    }

    private function can_process_truck_inventory_requests() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options')
            || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager()
            || $this->current_user_is_warehouse()
            || $this->current_user_is_parts()
            || $this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::MANAGER_ROLE);
    }

    private function process_truck_inventory_request($tab) {
        if (!$this->can_process_truck_inventory_requests()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to process truck replenishment requests.');
        }

        $request_id = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['truck_inventory_request_id'] ?? ''));
        $decision = sanitize_key($_POST['truck_inventory_request_decision'] ?? '');
        $decision_notes = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['truck_inventory_request_decision_notes'] ?? ''));
        $from_location_key = sanitize_key($_POST['truck_inventory_request_from_location_key'] ?? '');
        $transfer_notes = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['truck_inventory_request_transfer_notes'] ?? ''));

        if ($request_id === '' || !in_array($decision, array('approve', 'reject', 'fulfill'), true)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Invalid request action.');
        }

        $requests = get_option('dmx_truck_inventory_requests', array());
        if (!is_array($requests)) {
            $requests = array();
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $request_index = -1;
        foreach ($requests as $index => $request_row) {
            if (($request_row['id'] ?? '') !== $request_id) {
                continue;
            }
            if (($request_row['company_key'] ?? '') !== $company_key) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'This request is outside your company scope.');
            }
            $request_index = (int) $index;
            break;
        }

        if ($request_index < 0 || empty($requests[$request_index])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Truck replenishment request not found.');
        }

        $request = $requests[$request_index];
        $current_status = sanitize_key((string) ($request['status'] ?? 'requested'));
        $now = current_time('mysql');
        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();

        if ($decision === 'approve') {
            if ($current_status !== 'requested') {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Only requested truck replenishment requests can be approved.');
            }
            $requests[$request_index]['status'] = 'approved';
            $requests[$request_index]['approved_by'] = $current_user_id;
            $requests[$request_index]['approved_at'] = $now;
            if ($decision_notes !== '') {
                $requests[$request_index]['decision_notes'] = $decision_notes;
            }
            update_option('dmx_truck_inventory_requests', $requests, false);
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Truck replenishment request approved.');
        }

        if ($decision === 'reject') {
            if (!in_array($current_status, array('requested', 'approved'), true)) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Only requested or approved truck replenishment requests can be rejected.');
            }
            $requests[$request_index]['status'] = 'rejected';
            $requests[$request_index]['rejected_by'] = $current_user_id;
            $requests[$request_index]['rejected_at'] = $now;
            if ($decision_notes !== '') {
                $requests[$request_index]['decision_notes'] = $decision_notes;
            }
            update_option('dmx_truck_inventory_requests', $requests, false);
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Truck replenishment request rejected.');
        }

        if ($current_status !== 'approved') {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Only approved requests can be fulfilled.');
        }
        if ($from_location_key === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Select a warehouse location for fulfillment.');
        }

        $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        if (empty($location_map[$from_location_key]) || ($location_map[$from_location_key]['type'] ?? '') !== 'warehouse') {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Select a valid warehouse location.');
        }
        $truck_key = sanitize_key((string) ($request['truck_key'] ?? ''));
        if ($truck_key === '' || empty($location_map[$truck_key]) || ($location_map[$truck_key]['type'] ?? '') !== 'truck') {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'This request truck is no longer valid.');
        }

        $part_id = absint($request['part_id'] ?? 0);
        $quantity = (float) ($request['quantity'] ?? 0);
        if ($part_id <= 0 || get_post_type($part_id) !== self::PART_POST_TYPE || $quantity <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'This request has invalid part or quantity data.');
        }

        $balances = $this->get_inventory_balances();
        $available = isset($balances[$part_id][$from_location_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part_id][$from_location_key] : 0;
        if ($available < $quantity) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Not enough stock in the selected warehouse location to fulfill this request.');
        }

        $balances[$part_id][$from_location_key] = $available - $quantity;
        $balances[$part_id][$truck_key] = isset($balances[$part_id][$truck_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part_id][$truck_key] + $quantity : $quantity;
        $this->save_inventory_balances($balances);

        $ledger_notes = $transfer_notes !== '' ? $transfer_notes : ('Truck request ' . $request_id);
        $this->add_inventory_activity('transfer', $part_id, $from_location_key, $quantity, $ledger_notes, $truck_key);

        $requests[$request_index]['status'] = 'fulfilled';
        $requests[$request_index]['fulfilled_by'] = $current_user_id;
        $requests[$request_index]['fulfilled_at'] = $now;
        if ($transfer_notes !== '') {
            $requests[$request_index]['transfer_notes'] = $transfer_notes;
        }
        update_option('dmx_truck_inventory_requests', $requests, false);
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Truck replenishment request fulfilled and inventory transferred.');
    }

    private function render_technician_assigned_truck_inventory_view($locations, $balances, $parts, $is_admin = false) {
        $truck_key = $this->get_user_assigned_truck_key(get_current_user_id());
        $location_map = $this->get_inventory_location_map();
        $truck = ($truck_key !== '' && !empty($location_map[$truck_key]) && ($location_map[$truck_key]['type'] ?? '') === 'truck') ? $location_map[$truck_key] : null;

        $inventory_search = '';
        if (isset($_GET['dmx_inventory_search'])) {
            $inventory_search = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_inventory_search']));
        }

        $stock_rows = array();
        if ($truck) {
            foreach ($parts as $part) {
                $qty = isset($balances[$part->ID][$truck_key]) ? (float) $balances[$part->ID][$truck_key] : 0;
                if ($qty <= 0) {
                    continue;
                }
                $internal_sku = (string) get_post_meta($part->ID, '_dmx_part_internal_sku', true);
                $supplier_sku = (string) get_post_meta($part->ID, '_dmx_part_supplier_sku', true);
                $haystack = strtolower($part->post_title . ' ' . $internal_sku . ' ' . $supplier_sku);
                if ($inventory_search !== '' && strpos($haystack, strtolower($inventory_search)) === false) {
                    continue;
                }
                $stock_rows[] = array(
                    'part_id' => $part->ID,
                    'part_name' => $part->post_title,
                    'internal_sku' => $internal_sku,
                    'supplier_sku' => $supplier_sku,
                    'qty' => $qty,
                    'is_low' => $qty <= $this->get_inventory_low_stock_threshold($part->ID),
                );
            }
        }

        $inventory_search_action = $is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php') : $this->get_portal_page_url();
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>My Assigned Truck Inventory</h3>
                <p>Read-only truck stock view. Receiving, transfers, adjustments, and manual stock deductions are managed by managers, warehouse, or parts roles.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php if (!$truck) : ?>
            <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">No truck is assigned to your account yet. Ask your manager to assign your truck before using inventory and part replenishment requests.</div>
        <?php else : ?>
            <div class="dmx-form-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Assigned Truck</h4>
                <p><strong><?php echo esc_html($this->get_inventory_location_display_name($truck)); ?></strong></p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-form-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Search My Truck Stock</h4>
                <form method="get" action="<?php echo esc_url($inventory_search_action); ?>" class="dmx-form-grid-3" style="align-items:end;">
                    <?php if ($is_admin) : ?><input type="hidden" name="page" value="<?php echo esc_attr(self::MENU_SLUG); ?>"><?php endif; ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">
                    <div class="dmx-field" style="grid-column:span 2;"><label>Part / SKU Search</label><input type="text" name="dmx_inventory_search" value="<?php echo esc_attr($inventory_search); ?>" placeholder="Part name, internal SKU, supplier SKU"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-action-row" style="margin-bottom:14px;"><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Search</button></div>
                </form>
                <?php if (empty($stock_rows)) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-empty"><?php echo $inventory_search === '' ? 'No stock is currently recorded on your assigned truck.' : 'No matching parts were found on your assigned truck.'; ?></div>
                <?php else : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Part</th><th>Internal SKU</th><th>Supplier SKU</th><th>Qty</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead><tbody>
                        <?php foreach ($stock_rows as $row) : ?><tr><td><?php echo esc_html($row['part_name']); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html($row['internal_sku'] ?: '—'); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html($row['supplier_sku'] ?: '—'); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html(number_format((float) $row['qty'], 2)); ?></td><td><?php echo $row['is_low'] ? '<span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-cancelled">Low</span>' : '<span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-complete">OK</span>'; ?></td></tr><?php endforeach; ?>
                    </tbody></table></div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-form-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Request Truck Replenishment</h4>
                <form method="post" class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="submit_truck_inventory_request"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Part</label><select name="truck_inventory_request_part_id"><option value="">Select part</option><?php foreach ($parts as $part) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($part->ID); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($part->post_title); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Requested Qty</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0.01" name="truck_inventory_request_quantity"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><input type="text" name="truck_inventory_request_notes" placeholder="Why needed / job reference"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-action-row"><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Submit Request</button></div>
                </form>
            </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_received_door_orders_ready_to_schedule($limit = 12) {
        return $this->get_customer_door_orders_for_scheduling('', $limit);
    }

    private function get_customer_door_orders_for_scheduling($search = '', $limit = 25) {
        $args = array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_supplier_request',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => absint($limit),
            'orderby' => 'date',
            'order' => 'DESC',
            'meta_query' => array(
                array(
                    'key' => '_dmx_status',
                    'value' => array('requested', 'partial_received', 'received'),
                    'compare' => 'IN',
                ),
            ),
        );
        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, 'dm_supplier_request');
        $orders = get_posts($args);

        $search = trim((string) $search);
        if ($search === '') {
            return $orders;
        }

        $filtered = array();
        foreach ($orders as $order) {
            $customer_name = get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
            $customer_number = $this->get_customer_number_by_name($customer_name);
            $haystack = implode(' ', array(
                $order->post_title,
                $customer_name,
                $customer_number,
                get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_supplier_name', true),
                get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_door_type', true),
                get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_door_size', true),
                $this->get_supplier_request_door_summary($order->ID),
            ));
            if (stripos($haystack, $search) !== false) {
                $filtered[] = $order;
            }
        }
        return $filtered;
    }

    private function get_customer_number_by_name($customer_name) {
        $customer_name = trim((string) $customer_name);
        if ($customer_name === '') {
            return '';
        }

        $posts = $this->get_posts_for_user('dm_customer', 25);
        foreach ($posts as $post) {
            if (strcasecmp($post->post_title, $customer_name) === 0 || strcasecmp((string) get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_company_name', true), $customer_name) === 0) {
                return $this->ensure_customer_number($post->ID);
            }
        }
        return '';
    }

    private function render_coordinator_truck_inventory_scheduling_view($locations, $balances, $parts, $is_admin = false) {
        $truck_locations = array();
        $warehouse_locations = array();

        foreach ($locations as $location) {
            if (($location['type'] ?? '') === 'truck') {
                $truck_locations[] = $location;
            } else {
                $warehouse_locations[] = $location;
            }
        }

        $truck_stock = array();
        foreach ($truck_locations as $truck) {
            $truck_key = (string) ($truck['key'] ?? '');
            if ($truck_key === '') {
                continue;
            }
            $truck_stock[$truck_key] = array(
                'location' => $truck,
                'rows' => array(),
                'total_items' => 0,
            );
        }

        foreach ($parts as $part) {
            $part_balances = isset($balances[$part->ID]) && is_array($balances[$part->ID]) ? $balances[$part->ID] : array();
            foreach ($truck_stock as $truck_key => $truck_data) {
                $qty = isset($part_balances[$truck_key]) ? (float) $part_balances[$truck_key] : 0;
                if ($qty <= 0) {
                    continue;
                }
                $threshold = $this->get_inventory_low_stock_threshold($part->ID);
                $truck_stock[$truck_key]['rows'][] = array(
                    'part_name' => $part->post_title,
                    'qty' => $qty,
                    'threshold' => $threshold,
                    'is_low' => $qty <= $threshold,
                );
                $truck_stock[$truck_key]['total_items'] += $qty;
            }
        }

        $inventory_search = '';
        if (isset($_GET['dmx_inventory_search'])) {
            $inventory_search = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_inventory_search']));
        }

        $door_order_search = '';
        if (isset($_GET['dmx_door_order_search'])) {
            $door_order_search = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['dmx_door_order_search']));
        }

        $stock_search_rows = array();
        if ($inventory_search !== '') {
            foreach ($parts as $part) {
                $part_title = (string) $part->post_title;
                $part_sku = (string) get_post_meta($part->ID, '_dmx_part_internal_sku', true);
                $supplier_sku = (string) get_post_meta($part->ID, '_dmx_part_supplier_sku', true);
                $haystack = $part_title . ' ' . $part_sku . ' ' . $supplier_sku;

                if (stripos($haystack, $inventory_search) === false) {
                    continue;
                }

                $part_balances = isset($balances[$part->ID]) && is_array($balances[$part->ID]) ? $balances[$part->ID] : array();
                $warehouse_total = 0;
                $truck_total = 0;
                $where_in_stock = array();

                foreach ($locations as $location) {
                    $location_key = (string) ($location['key'] ?? '');
                    if ($location_key === '') {
                        continue;
                    }

                    $qty = isset($part_balances[$location_key]) ? (float) $part_balances[$location_key] : 0;
                    if ($qty <= 0) {
                        continue;
                    }

                    if (($location['type'] ?? '') === 'truck') {
                        $truck_total += $qty;
                    } else {
                        $warehouse_total += $qty;
                    }

                    $where_in_stock[] = $this->get_inventory_location_display_name($location) . ': ' . number_format($qty, 2);
                }

                if ($warehouse_total <= 0 && $truck_total <= 0) {
                    continue;
                }

                $stock_search_rows[] = array(
                    'part_name' => $part_title,
                    'warehouse_total' => $warehouse_total,
                    'truck_total' => $truck_total,
                    'total' => $warehouse_total + $truck_total,
                    'where_in_stock' => $where_in_stock,
                );
            }
        }

        $ready_orders = $this->get_customer_door_orders_for_scheduling($door_order_search, 50);
        $scheduler_url = $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'scheduler'));
        $work_order_url = $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'));
        $inventory_search_action = $is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php') : $this->get_portal_page_url();

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Warehouse & Truck Inventory</h3>
                <p>Search warehouse and truck stock before dispatching, moving, or scheduling a job.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($scheduler_url); ?>">Open Scheduler</a>
                <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($work_order_url); ?>">Open Work Orders</a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                <div>
                    <h5>Part Stock Search</h5>
                    <p>Search a spring, cable, operator, hardware item, SKU, or part name to see what is available in the warehouse and on technician trucks.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <form method="get" action="<?php echo esc_url($inventory_search_action); ?>" class="dmx-form-grid-3" style="align-items:end;">
                <?php if ($is_admin) : ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="page" value="<?php echo esc_attr(self::MENU_SLUG); ?>">
                <?php endif; ?>
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_inventory_view" value="truck_scheduling">
                <div class="dmx-field" style="grid-column:span 2;">
                    <label>Search Inventory</label>
                    <div class="dmx-work-order-part-lookup">
                        <input type="text" name="dmx_inventory_search" class="dmx-coordinator-inventory-search" value="<?php echo esc_attr($inventory_search); ?>" placeholder="Start typing part, SKU, spring, cable, shaft, opener" autocomplete="off">
                        <div class="dmx-work-order-part-results"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-action-row" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Search Stock</button>
                    <?php if ($inventory_search !== '') : ?>
                        <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'costs', 'dmx_subtab' => 'inventory', 'dmx_inventory_view' => 'truck_scheduling'))); ?>">Clear</a>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </div>
            </form>

            <?php if ($inventory_search === '') : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty">Start by searching for the part you need. Results will show warehouse quantity, truck quantity, and where the stock is located.</div>
            <?php elseif (empty($stock_search_rows)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty">No in-stock parts matched “<?php echo esc_html($inventory_search); ?>”.</div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                    <table class="dmx-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Part</th><th>Warehouse</th><th>Trucks</th><th>Total</th><th>Where In Stock</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                        <?php foreach ($stock_search_rows as $row) : ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($row['part_name']); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(number_format((float) $row['warehouse_total'], 2)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(number_format((float) $row['truck_total'], 2)); ?></td>
                                <td><strong><?php echo esc_html(number_format((float) $row['total'], 2)); ?></strong></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(implode(' • ', $row['where_in_stock'])); ?></td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                <div>
                    <h5>Customer Door Orders</h5>
                    <p>Search orders that are requested, partially received, waiting on supplier product, or ready to schedule.</p>
                </div>
                <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($work_order_url); ?>">Schedule from Work Orders</a>
            </div>
            <form method="get" action="<?php echo esc_url($inventory_search_action); ?>" class="dmx-form-grid-3" style="align-items:end;margin-bottom:14px;">
                <?php if ($is_admin) : ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="page" value="<?php echo esc_attr(self::MENU_SLUG); ?>">
                <?php endif; ?>
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="inventory">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_inventory_view" value="truck_scheduling">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_inventory_search" value="<?php echo esc_attr($inventory_search); ?>">
                <div class="dmx-field" style="grid-column:span 2;">
                    <label>Search Customer Door Orders</label>
                    <div class="dmx-work-order-part-lookup">
                        <input type="text" name="dmx_door_order_search" class="dmx-coordinator-door-order-search" value="<?php echo esc_attr($door_order_search); ?>" placeholder="Customer #, customer name, supplier, door type, PO, order" autocomplete="off">
                        <div class="dmx-work-order-part-results"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-action-row" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Search Orders</button>
                    <?php if ($door_order_search !== '') : ?>
                        <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'costs', 'dmx_subtab' => 'inventory', 'dmx_inventory_view' => 'truck_scheduling', 'dmx_inventory_search' => $inventory_search))); ?>">Clear</a>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </div>
            </form>
            <?php if (empty($ready_orders)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty">No matching customer door orders found right now.</div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                    <table class="dmx-table">
                        <thead><tr><th>Order / Request</th><th>Customer #</th><th>Customer / Project</th><th>Supplier</th><th>Door Details</th><th>Status</th><th>Notes</th><th>Action</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                        <?php foreach ($ready_orders as $order) : ?>
                            <?php $order_customer_name = get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true); $order_customer_number = $this->get_customer_number_by_name($order_customer_name); $order_status = get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_status', true) ?: get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_receiving_status', true); ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($order->post_title); ?><br><span style="color:#61738b;">#<?php echo esc_html($order->ID); ?></span></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($order_customer_number ?: '—'); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($order_customer_name ?: 'Not assigned'); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_supplier_name', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_supplier_request_door_summary($order->ID)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo $this->status_pill($order_status); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_received_notes', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($work_order_url); ?>">Create / Update WO</a></td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                <div>
                    <h5>Truck Stock at a Glance</h5>
                    <p>Current inventory carried on technician trucks for quick field scheduling decisions.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <?php if (empty($truck_stock)) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-empty">No truck inventory locations have been set up yet.</div>
            <?php else : ?>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                    <?php foreach ($truck_stock as $truck_key => $truck_data) : ?>
                        <?php $truck = $truck_data['location']; $rows = $truck_data['rows']; ?>
                        <div class="dmx-card">
                            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title"><?php echo esc_html($this->get_inventory_location_display_name($truck)); ?></h4>
                            <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:-6px;margin-bottom:12px;">Total truck items: <?php echo esc_html(number_format((float) $truck_data['total_items'], 2)); ?></p>
                            <?php if (empty($rows)) : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-empty">No stock currently recorded on this truck.</div>
                            <?php else : ?>
                                <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                                    <table class="dmx-table">
                                        <thead><tr><th>Part</th><th>Qty</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>
                                        <tbody>
                                        <?php foreach ($rows as $row) : ?>
                                            <tr>
                                                <td><?php echo esc_html($row['part_name']); ?></td>
                                                <td><?php echo esc_html(number_format((float) $row['qty'], 2)); ?></td>
                                                <td><?php echo $row['is_low'] ? '<span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-cancelled">Low</span>' : '<span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-complete">OK</span>'; ?></td>
                                            </tr>
                                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                                        </tbody>
                                    </table>
                                </div>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            var partItems = <?php echo wp_json_encode(array_map(function($part) use ($balances) {
                $internal_sku = (string) get_post_meta($part->ID, '_dmx_part_internal_sku', true);
                $supplier_sku = (string) get_post_meta($part->ID, '_dmx_part_supplier_sku', true);
                $part_balances = isset($balances[$part->ID]) && is_array($balances[$part->ID]) ? $balances[$part->ID] : array();
                $total = 0;
                foreach ($part_balances as $qty) { $total += (float) $qty; }
                return array('label' => trim($part->post_title . ($internal_sku !== '' ? ' | SKU: ' . $internal_sku : '') . ($supplier_sku !== '' ? ' | Supplier SKU: ' . $supplier_sku : '') . ' | Available: ' . number_format($total, 2)), 'value' => $part->post_title);
            }, $parts)); ?>;
            var orderItems = <?php echo wp_json_encode(array_map(function($order) {
                $customer_name = get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true);
                $customer_number = $this->get_customer_number_by_name($customer_name);
                return array('label' => trim(($customer_number !== '' ? $customer_number . ' | ' : '') . ($customer_name !== '' ? $customer_name . ' | ' : '') . $order->post_title . ' | ' . get_post_meta($order->ID, '_dmx_supplier_name', true)), 'value' => $customer_number !== '' ? $customer_number : ($customer_name !== '' ? $customer_name : $order->post_title));
            }, $this->get_customer_door_orders_for_scheduling('', 100))); ?>;

            function escapeHtml(value) {
                return String(value || '').replace(/[&<>"']/g, function(ch) { return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#039;'}[ch]; });
            }
            function bindLookup(input, items) {
                if (!input) return;
                var wrap = input.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup');
                var results = wrap ? wrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results') : null;
                if (!wrap || !results) return;
                function close(){ results.classList.remove('is-open'); results.innerHTML = ''; }
                function render(){
                    var q = input.value.trim().toLowerCase();
                    if (q.length < 1) { close(); return; }
                    var matches = items.filter(function(item){ return (item.label || '').toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1 || (item.value || '').toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1; }).slice(0, 10);
                    if (!matches.length) { close(); return; }
                    results.innerHTML = matches.map(function(item){ return '<button type="button" class="dmx-work-order-part-option" data-value="' + escapeHtml(item.value) + '"><strong>' + escapeHtml(item.label) + '</strong><span>Click to search</span></button>'; }).join('');
                    results.classList.add('is-open');
                }
                input.addEventListener('input', render);
                input.addEventListener('focus', render);
                results.addEventListener('click', function(event){
                    var btn = event.target.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-option');
                    if (!btn) return;
                    input.value = btn.getAttribute('data-value') || '';
                    close();
                    if (input.form) { input.form.submit(); }
                });
                document.addEventListener('click', function(event){ if (!wrap.contains(event.target)) close(); });
            }
            bindLookup(document.querySelector('.dmx-coordinator-inventory-search'), partItems);
            bindLookup(document.querySelector('.dmx-coordinator-door-order-search'), orderItems);
        });
        </script>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_reports_section($is_admin = false) {
        $active_tab = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_report_tab'] ?? 'business');
        if (!in_array($active_tab, array('business', 'charts', 'reports', 'export'), true)) {
            $active_tab = 'business';
        }

        $period = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_period'] ?? 'monthly');
        if (!in_array($period, array('monthly', 'annual'), true)) {
            $period = 'monthly';
        }

        $base_url = $is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG) : $this->get_portal_page_url();
        $tabs = array('business' => 'Business Performance', 'charts' => 'Performance Breakdown', 'reports' => 'Reports', 'export' => 'Accounts Export');

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-app-tabs dmx-report-tabs">';
        foreach ($tabs as $key => $label) {
            $url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'reports', 'dmx_report_tab' => $key, 'dmx_period' => $period), $base_url);
            echo '<a class="' . esc_attr($active_tab === $key ? 'active' : '') . '" href="' . esc_url($url) . '">' . esc_html($label) . '</a>';
        }
        echo '</div><div class="dmx-app-section dmx-reports-finance-section">';

        if ($active_tab === 'charts') {
            echo $this->render_reports_charts_tab($period, $base_url);
        } elseif ($active_tab === 'reports') {
            echo $this->render_reports_detail_tab($period, $base_url);
        } elseif ($active_tab === 'export') {
            echo $this->render_reports_export_tab($period, $base_url);
        } else {
            echo $this->render_reports_business_tab($period, $base_url);
        }

        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_reports_period_links($active_tab, $period, $base_url) {
        $monthly_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'reports', 'dmx_report_tab' => $active_tab, 'dmx_period' => 'monthly'), $base_url);
        $annual_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'reports', 'dmx_report_tab' => $active_tab, 'dmx_period' => 'annual'), $base_url);
        return '<div class="dmx-subtabs dmx-report-period-tabs"><a class="' . esc_attr($period === 'monthly' ? 'active' : '') . '" href="' . esc_url($monthly_url) . '">Monthly View</a><a class="' . esc_attr($period === 'annual' ? 'active' : '') . '" href="' . esc_url($annual_url) . '">Annual View</a></div>';
    }

    private function render_reports_business_tab($period, $base_url) {
        $totals = $this->get_reports_finance_totals();
        $rows = $this->get_reports_period_summary_rows($period);
        ob_start();
        echo $this->render_reports_period_links('business', $period, $base_url);
        echo '<div class="dmx-report-grid"><div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Business Snapshot</h3>';
        foreach (array('Quoted' => $totals['quoted'], 'Accepted Quotes' => $totals['accepted'], 'Invoiced' => $totals['invoiced'], 'Paid' => $totals['paid'], 'Supplier / Direct Item Costs' => $totals['supplier'], 'Expense' => $totals['expense'], 'Profit' => $totals['profit'], 'Estimated Hours' => $totals['estimated_hours'], 'Actual Hours' => $totals['actual_hours']) as $label => $value) {
            $display = (strpos($label, 'Hours') !== false) ? number_format((float) $value, 2) : $this->format_money($value);
            echo '<div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>' . esc_html($label) . '</strong><span>' . esc_html($display) . '</span></div>';
        }
        echo '</div><div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">' . esc_html($period === 'annual' ? 'Annual Summary' : 'Monthly Summary') . '</h3>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-simple-table"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Quoted</th><th>Accepted</th><th>Invoiced</th><th>Paid</th><th>Supplier / Direct Costs</th><th>Expense</th><th>Profit</th><th>Est. Hours</th><th>Actual Hours</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            echo '<tr><td>' . esc_html($row['label']) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money($row['quoted'])) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money($row['accepted'])) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money($row['invoiced'])) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money($row['paid'])) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money($row['supplier'])) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money($row['expense'])) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money($row['profit'])) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['estimated_hours'], 2)) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['actual_hours'], 2)) . '</td></tr>';
        }
        echo '</tbody></table></div></div></div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_reports_charts_tab($period, $base_url) {
        $quote_rows = $this->get_sales_rep_report_rows('quotes');
        $paid_rows = $this->get_sales_rep_report_rows('paid');
        $tech_rows = $this->get_technician_efficiency_report_rows();
        ob_start();
        echo $this->render_reports_period_links('charts', $period, $base_url);
        echo '<div class="dmx-report-chart-grid">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-report-panel dmx-chart-panel"><h3>Quote Value Breakdown</h3><p>Total quote value split by the sales rep attached to each quote.</p>' . $this->render_contribution_donut_chart($quote_rows, 'Total Quote Value', 'quotes') . '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-report-panel dmx-chart-panel"><h3>Total Sales Breakdown</h3><p>Total paid sales split by each team member&rsquo;s contribution.</p>' . $this->render_contribution_donut_chart($paid_rows, 'Total Paid Sales', 'paid jobs') . '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-report-panel dmx-chart-panel dmx-chart-panel-wide"><h3>Technician Efficiency</h3><p>Scheduled/estimated hours compared against actual labour hours recorded on completed work orders.</p>' . $this->render_efficiency_bar_chart($tech_rows) . '</div>';
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_reports_detail_tab($period, $base_url) {
        $quote_rows = $this->get_sales_rep_report_rows('quotes');
        $paid_rows = $this->get_sales_rep_report_rows('paid');
        $tech_rows = $this->get_technician_efficiency_report_rows();
        $combined = array();
        foreach ($quote_rows as $row) { $combined[$row['name']]['quote_count'] = $row['count']; $combined[$row['name']]['quote_total'] = $row['total']; }
        foreach ($paid_rows as $row) { $combined[$row['name']]['paid_count'] = $row['count']; $combined[$row['name']]['paid_total'] = $row['total']; }
        ksort($combined);
        ob_start();
        echo $this->render_reports_period_links('reports', $period, $base_url);
        echo '<div class="dmx-report-panel" style="margin-bottom:18px;"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Sales Team Report</h3><div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-simple-table"><thead><tr><th>Sales Rep</th><th>Quotes</th><th>Quote Value</th><th>Paid Jobs</th><th>Paid Value</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        if (empty($combined)) {
            echo '<tr><td colspan="5">No sales data yet.</td></tr>';
        } else {
            foreach ($combined as $name => $row) {
                echo '<tr><td>' . esc_html($name) . '</td><td>' . esc_html((int) ($row['quote_count'] ?? 0)) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money($row['quote_total'] ?? 0)) . '</td><td>' . esc_html((int) ($row['paid_count'] ?? 0)) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money($row['paid_total'] ?? 0)) . '</td></tr>';
            }
        }
        echo '</tbody></table></div></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Technician Efficiency Report</h3><div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-simple-table"><thead><tr><th>Technician</th><th>Completed Work Orders</th><th>Est. Hours</th><th>Actual Hours</th><th>Hours Saved</th><th>Efficiency</th><th>On Target</th><th>Bonus View</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        if (empty($tech_rows)) {
            echo '<tr><td colspan="8">No completed technician work orders with time data yet.</td></tr>';
        } else {
            foreach ($tech_rows as $row) {
                $status = $row['bonus_ready'] ? '<span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-complete">Eligible Review</span>' : '<span class="dmx-pill dmx-pill-pending">Needs Review</span>';
                echo '<tr><td>' . esc_html($row['name']) . '</td><td>' . esc_html((int) $row['work_orders']) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['estimated_hours'], 2)) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['actual_hours'], 2)) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['hours_saved'], 2)) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($row['efficiency_label']) . '</td><td>' . esc_html((int) $row['on_target_count']) . '/' . esc_html((int) $row['measured_count']) . '</td><td>' . $status . '</td></tr>';
            }
        }
        echo '</tbody></table></div><p class="dmx-inline-note">Efficiency uses completed work orders where scheduled start/end time and actual labour hours are available. Actual hours come from the work order labour rows.</p></div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_reports_export_tab($period, $base_url) {
        $rows = $this->get_reports_period_summary_rows($period);
        ob_start();
        echo $this->render_reports_period_links('export', $period, $base_url);
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-report-panel" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
            <h3 style="margin-top:0;">CSV Downloads for Bookkeeping</h3>
            <p>Download clean CSV files for accountants, bookkeeping imports, spreadsheets, and future integrations. Each file is company-scoped and only includes records this account is allowed to see.</p>
            <div class="dmx-csv-export-grid">
                <?php
                $exports = array(
                    'summary' => array('title' => 'Financial Summary CSV', 'desc' => 'Period totals for quotes, invoices, paid amounts, expenses, direct costs, profit, and hours.'),
                    'invoices' => array('title' => 'Invoices & Payments CSV', 'desc' => 'Invoice-level sales, paid amounts, deposits, balances, payment method, sales rep, and technician.'),
                    'expenses' => array('title' => 'Expenses CSV', 'desc' => 'Expense / true-cost records including category, vendor, tax, total, status, recurring flag, and reference.'),
                    'subcontractor_pos' => array('title' => 'Subcontractor POs CSV', 'desc' => 'Subcontractor purchase orders, linked work orders, labour, materials, tax, total, and status.'),
                    'bookkeeping_ledger' => array('title' => 'Bookkeeping Ledger CSV', 'desc' => 'Combined income and cost ledger for easier spreadsheet review or import mapping.'),
                );
                foreach ($exports as $export_key => $export) :
                ?>
                    <form method="post" class="dmx-csv-export-card">
                        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="download_accounting_csv">
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="reports">
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_report_tab" value="export">
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_period" value="<?php echo esc_attr($period); ?>">
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_csv_export_type" value="<?php echo esc_attr($export_key); ?>">
                        <strong><?php echo esc_html($export['title']); ?></strong>
                        <span><?php echo esc_html($export['desc']); ?></span>
                        <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary">Download CSV</button>
                    </form>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        echo '<div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Accounts Export Preview</h3><p>This preview matches the Financial Summary CSV. Use the buttons above for bookkeeping-ready downloads.</p><div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-simple-table"><thead><tr><th>Period</th><th>Quoted</th><th>Accepted</th><th>Invoiced</th><th>Paid</th><th>Supplier / Direct Costs</th><th>Expenses</th><th>Profit</th><th>Estimated Hours</th><th>Actual Hours</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            echo '<tr><td>' . esc_html($row['label']) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['quoted'], 2, '.', '')) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['accepted'], 2, '.', '')) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['invoiced'], 2, '.', '')) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['paid'], 2, '.', '')) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['supplier'], 2, '.', '')) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['expense'], 2, '.', '')) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['profit'], 2, '.', '')) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['estimated_hours'], 2, '.', '')) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['actual_hours'], 2, '.', '')) . '</td></tr>';
        }
        echo '</tbody></table></div></div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function download_accounting_csv() {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_reports()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('reports', 'error', 'You do not have permission to export accounting data.');
        }

        $export_type = sanitize_key($_POST['dmx_csv_export_type'] ?? 'summary');
        $period = sanitize_key($_POST['dmx_period'] ?? 'monthly');
        if (!in_array($period, array('monthly', 'annual'), true)) {
            $period = 'monthly';
        }

        $allowed_types = array('summary', 'invoices', 'expenses', 'subcontractor_pos', 'bookkeeping_ledger');
        if (!in_array($export_type, $allowed_types, true)) {
            $export_type = 'summary';
        }

        $filename = 'doormatrix-' . $export_type . '-' . $period . '-' . date_i18n('Y-m-d') . '.csv';

        while (ob_get_level()) {
            ob_end_clean();
        }

        nocache_headers();
        header('Content-Type: text/csv; charset=utf-8');
        header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . sanitize_file_name($filename) . '"');
        header('Pragma: no-cache');
        header('Expires: 0');

        $out = fopen('php://output', 'w');

        switch ($export_type) {
            case 'invoices':
                $this->write_invoices_payments_csv($out);
                break;
            case 'expenses':
                $this->write_expenses_csv($out);
                break;
            case 'subcontractor_pos':
                $this->write_subcontractor_pos_csv($out);
                break;
            case 'bookkeeping_ledger':
                $this->write_bookkeeping_ledger_csv($out);
                break;
            case 'summary':
            default:
                $this->write_financial_summary_csv($out, $period);
                break;
        }

        fclose($out);
        exit;
    }

    private function write_financial_summary_csv($out, $period = 'monthly') {
        fputcsv($out, array('Period', 'Quoted', 'Accepted', 'Invoiced', 'Paid', 'Supplier / Direct Costs', 'Expenses', 'Profit', 'Estimated Hours', 'Actual Hours'));
        foreach ($this->get_reports_period_summary_rows($period) as $row) {
            fputcsv($out, array(
                $row['label'],
                $this->csv_money($row['quoted']),
                $this->csv_money($row['accepted']),
                $this->csv_money($row['invoiced']),
                $this->csv_money($row['paid']),
                $this->csv_money($row['supplier']),
                $this->csv_money($row['expense']),
                $this->csv_money($row['profit']),
                $this->csv_number($row['estimated_hours']),
                $this->csv_number($row['actual_hours']),
            ));
        }
    }

    private function write_invoices_payments_csv($out) {
        fputcsv($out, array('Invoice #', 'Date', 'Customer', 'Email', 'Status', 'Subtotal', 'Tax', 'Total', 'Paid / Deposits', 'Balance Due', 'Payment Method', 'Payment Reference', 'Paid Date', 'Sales / Created By', 'Technician', 'True Cost', 'Gross Margin', 'Source Work Order', 'Site Location'));
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_invoice') as $invoice) {
            $items = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_invoice_line_items', true);
            if (!is_array($items)) { $items = array(); }
            $tax_profile = $this->get_saved_document_tax_profile($invoice->ID, 'invoice');
            $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($items, $tax_profile);
            $total = (float) ($totals['grand_total'] ?? $this->get_report_document_total($invoice->ID));
            $paid = (float) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_paid_amount', true);
            $balance = max(0, $total - $paid);
            $true_cost = (float) $this->get_invoice_true_cost_total($invoice->ID);
            $payment_method = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_payment_method', true));
            $payment_labels = $this->get_payment_method_labels();
            $source_work_order_id = absint(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_source_work_order_id', true));
            fputcsv($out, array(
                $this->get_document_number('invoice', $invoice->ID),
                get_the_date('Y-m-d', $invoice),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_email', true)),
                $this->get_invoice_payment_status_label(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true)),
                $this->csv_money($totals['subtotal'] ?? 0),
