                $this->csv_money($totals['tax_total'] ?? 0),
                $this->csv_money($total),
                $this->csv_money($paid),
                $this->csv_money($balance),
                $payment_method !== '' && isset($payment_labels[$payment_method]) ? $payment_labels[$payment_method] : $payment_method,
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_payment_reference', true)),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_paid_at', true)),
                $this->csv_text($this->get_report_salesperson_name_for_post($invoice->ID)),
                $this->csv_text($this->get_document_technician_name($invoice->ID)),
                $this->csv_money($true_cost),
                $this->csv_money($total - $true_cost),
                $source_work_order_id > 0 ? $this->get_document_number('work_order', $source_work_order_id) : '',
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_site_location', true)),
            ));
        }
    }

    private function write_expenses_csv($out) {
        fputcsv($out, array('Date', 'Due Date', 'Category', 'Vendor / Payee', 'Amount Before Tax', 'Tax Paid', 'Total Cost', 'Status', 'Payment Method', 'Recurring', 'Linked Job / WO / Invoice', 'Reference / Receipt #', 'Notes'));
        $payment_labels = $this->get_payment_method_labels();
        foreach ($this->get_company_expense_records() as $row) {
            $method = sanitize_key((string) ($row['payment_method'] ?? ''));
            fputcsv($out, array(
                $this->csv_text($row['date'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['due_date'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['category_label'] ?? $row['category'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['vendor'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_money($row['amount'] ?? 0),
                $this->csv_money($row['tax'] ?? 0),
                $this->csv_money($row['total'] ?? 0),
                $this->csv_text($row['status'] ?? ''),
                $method !== '' && isset($payment_labels[$method]) ? $payment_labels[$method] : $method,
                $this->csv_text($row['recurring'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['linked_record'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['reference'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['notes'] ?? ''),
            ));
        }
    }

    private function write_subcontractor_pos_csv($out) {
        fputcsv($out, array('PO #', 'Issue Date', 'Scheduled Date', 'Subcontractor', 'Title', 'Status', 'Linked Work Order', 'Site Address', 'Labour Amount', 'Material Allowance', 'Subtotal', 'Tax', 'Total', 'Notes'));
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_subcontractor_po') as $po) {
            $subcontractor_user_id = absint(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', true));
            $subcontractor = $subcontractor_user_id > 0 ? $this->get_report_user_display_name($subcontractor_user_id) : '';
            $work_order_id = absint(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_linked_work_order_id', true));
            fputcsv($out, array(
                $this->get_document_number('subcontractor_po', $po->ID),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_issue_date', true)),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_scheduled_date', true)),
                $this->csv_text($subcontractor),
                $this->csv_text($po->post_title),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_status', true)),
                $work_order_id > 0 ? $this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order_id) : '',
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_site_address', true)),
                $this->csv_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_labour_amount', true)),
                $this->csv_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_material_allowance', true)),
                $this->csv_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_subtotal', true)),
                $this->csv_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_tax', true)),
                $this->csv_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_total', true)),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_notes', true)),
            ));
        }
    }

    private function write_bookkeeping_ledger_csv($out) {
        fputcsv($out, array('Date', 'Transaction Type', 'Document #', 'Customer / Vendor', 'Category', 'Description', 'Status', 'Income', 'Cost / Expense', 'Tax', 'Total', 'Paid / Deposits', 'Balance Due', 'Payment Method', 'Reference', 'Linked Record'));
        $payment_labels = $this->get_payment_method_labels();

        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_invoice') as $invoice) {
            $items = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_invoice_line_items', true);
            if (!is_array($items)) { $items = array(); }
            $totals = $this->calculate_document_totals($items, $this->get_saved_document_tax_profile($invoice->ID, 'invoice'));
            $total = (float) ($totals['grand_total'] ?? $this->get_report_document_total($invoice->ID));
            $paid = (float) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_paid_amount', true);
            $method = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_payment_method', true));
            fputcsv($out, array(
                get_the_date('Y-m-d', $invoice),
                'Invoice / Sales Income',
                $this->get_document_number('invoice', $invoice->ID),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)),
                'Sales',
                $this->csv_text($invoice->post_title),
                $this->get_invoice_payment_status_label(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true)),
                $this->csv_money($total),
                $this->csv_money($this->get_invoice_true_cost_total($invoice->ID)),
                $this->csv_money($totals['tax_total'] ?? 0),
                $this->csv_money($total),
                $this->csv_money($paid),
                $this->csv_money(max(0, $total - $paid)),
                $method !== '' && isset($payment_labels[$method]) ? $payment_labels[$method] : $method,
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_payment_reference', true)),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_site_location', true)),
            ));
        }

        foreach ($this->get_company_expense_records() as $row) {
            $method = sanitize_key((string) ($row['payment_method'] ?? ''));
            fputcsv($out, array(
                $this->csv_text($row['date'] ?? ''),
                'Expense / True Cost',
                $this->csv_text($row['id'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['vendor'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['category_label'] ?? $row['category'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['notes'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['status'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_money(0),
                $this->csv_money($row['amount'] ?? 0),
                $this->csv_money($row['tax'] ?? 0),
                $this->csv_money($row['total'] ?? 0),
                $this->csv_money($row['status'] === 'paid' ? ($row['total'] ?? 0) : 0),
                $this->csv_money($row['status'] === 'paid' ? 0 : ($row['total'] ?? 0)),
                $method !== '' && isset($payment_labels[$method]) ? $payment_labels[$method] : $method,
                $this->csv_text($row['reference'] ?? ''),
                $this->csv_text($row['linked_record'] ?? ''),
            ));
        }

        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_subcontractor_po') as $po) {
            $subcontractor_user_id = absint(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', true));
            $subcontractor = $subcontractor_user_id > 0 ? $this->get_report_user_display_name($subcontractor_user_id) : '';
            $work_order_id = absint(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_linked_work_order_id', true));
            fputcsv($out, array(
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_issue_date', true) ?: get_the_date('Y-m-d', $po)),
                'Subcontractor PO / Committed Cost',
                $this->get_document_number('subcontractor_po', $po->ID),
                $this->csv_text($subcontractor),
                'Subcontracted Services / Outside Labour',
                $this->csv_text($po->post_title),
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_status', true)),
                $this->csv_money(0),
                $this->csv_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_subtotal', true)),
                $this->csv_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_tax', true)),
                $this->csv_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_total', true)),
                $this->csv_money(0),
                $this->csv_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_total', true)),
                '',
                $this->csv_text(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_notes', true)),
                $work_order_id > 0 ? $this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order_id) : '',
            ));
        }
    }

    private function csv_text($value) {
        return trim(wp_strip_all_tags((string) $value));
    }

    private function csv_money($value) {
        return number_format((float) $value, 2, '.', '');
    }

    private function csv_number($value) {
        return number_format((float) $value, 2, '.', '');
    }

    private function get_reports_finance_totals() {
        $quoted = $accepted = $invoiced = $paid = $supplier = $estimated_hours = $actual_hours = 0;
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_quote') as $quote) {
            $value = $this->get_report_document_total($quote->ID);
            $quoted += $value;
            $status = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_status', true));
            if (in_array($status, array('accepted', 'approved', 'open', 'complete', 'completed'), true)) { $accepted += $value; }
        }
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_invoice') as $invoice) {
            $value = $this->get_report_document_total($invoice->ID);
            $invoiced += $value;
            if (get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true) === 'paid') { $paid += $value; }
        }
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_supplier_request') as $supplier_request) { $supplier += (float) get_post_meta($supplier_request->ID, '_dmx_supplier_price', true); }
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_work_order') as $work_order) { $estimated_hours += $this->get_work_order_estimated_hours($work_order->ID); $actual_hours += $this->get_work_order_actual_hours($work_order->ID); }
        $direct_item_cost = $this->get_invoice_true_cost_total();
        $expense = 0;
        foreach ($this->get_company_expense_records() as $expense_row) { $expense += (float) ($expense_row['total'] ?? 0); }
        return array('quoted' => $quoted, 'accepted' => $accepted, 'invoiced' => $invoiced, 'paid' => $paid, 'supplier' => ($supplier + $direct_item_cost), 'expense' => $expense, 'profit' => ($paid - $supplier - $direct_item_cost - $expense), 'estimated_hours' => $estimated_hours, 'actual_hours' => $actual_hours);
    }

    private function get_reports_period_summary_rows($period = 'monthly') {
        $rows = array();
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_quote') as $quote) {
            $key = $this->get_report_period_key($quote->post_date, $period);
            if (!isset($rows[$key])) { $rows[$key] = $this->get_empty_report_period_row($key); }
            $value = $this->get_report_document_total($quote->ID);
            $rows[$key]['quoted'] += $value;
            $status = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($quote->ID, '_dmx_status', true));
            if (in_array($status, array('accepted', 'approved', 'open', 'complete', 'completed'), true)) { $rows[$key]['accepted'] += $value; }
        }
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_invoice') as $invoice) {
            $date = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_paid_at', true); if ($date === '') { $date = $invoice->post_date; }
            $key = $this->get_report_period_key($date, $period);
            if (!isset($rows[$key])) { $rows[$key] = $this->get_empty_report_period_row($key); }
            $value = $this->get_report_document_total($invoice->ID);
            $rows[$key]['invoiced'] += $value;
            if (get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true) === 'paid') { $rows[$key]['paid'] += $value; }
        }
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_supplier_request') as $supplier_request) {
            $key = $this->get_report_period_key($supplier_request->post_date, $period);
            if (!isset($rows[$key])) { $rows[$key] = $this->get_empty_report_period_row($key); }
            $rows[$key]['supplier'] += (float) get_post_meta($supplier_request->ID, '_dmx_supplier_price', true);
        }
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_work_order') as $work_order) {
            $date = get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_date', true); if ($date === '') { $date = $work_order->post_date; }
            $key = $this->get_report_period_key($date, $period);
            if (!isset($rows[$key])) { $rows[$key] = $this->get_empty_report_period_row($key); }
            $rows[$key]['estimated_hours'] += $this->get_work_order_estimated_hours($work_order->ID);
            $rows[$key]['actual_hours'] += $this->get_work_order_actual_hours($work_order->ID);
        }
        foreach ($this->get_company_expense_records() as $expense_row) {
            $date = $expense_row['date'] ?? current_time('mysql');
            $key = $this->get_report_period_key($date, $period);
            if (!isset($rows[$key])) { $rows[$key] = $this->get_empty_report_period_row($key); }
            $rows[$key]['expense'] += (float) ($expense_row['total'] ?? 0);
        }
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_invoice') as $invoice_cost) {
            $date = get_post_meta($invoice_cost->ID, '_dmx_paid_at', true); if ($date === '') { $date = $invoice_cost->post_date; }
            $key = $this->get_report_period_key($date, $period);
            if (!isset($rows[$key])) { $rows[$key] = $this->get_empty_report_period_row($key); }
            $rows[$key]['supplier'] += $this->get_invoice_true_cost_total($invoice_cost->ID);
        }
        if (empty($rows)) { $key = $this->get_report_period_key(current_time('mysql'), $period); $rows[$key] = $this->get_empty_report_period_row($key); }
        foreach ($rows as &$row) { $row['profit'] = $row['paid'] - $row['supplier'] - $row['expense']; }
        unset($row);
        ksort($rows);
        return array_values($rows);
    }

    private function get_empty_report_period_row($key) { return array('key' => $key, 'label' => $key, 'quoted' => 0, 'accepted' => 0, 'invoiced' => 0, 'paid' => 0, 'supplier' => 0, 'expense' => 0, 'profit' => 0, 'estimated_hours' => 0, 'actual_hours' => 0); }

    private function get_report_period_key($date, $period) {
        $timestamp = strtotime((string) $date);
        if (!$timestamp) { $timestamp = current_time('timestamp'); }
        return $period === 'annual' ? date_i18n('Y', $timestamp) : date_i18n('Y-m', $timestamp);
    }

    private function get_report_scoped_posts($post_type, $limit = -1) {
        $args = array('post_type' => $post_type, 'post_status' => 'publish', 'posts_per_page' => $limit, 'orderby' => 'date', 'order' => 'DESC');
        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, $post_type);
        return get_posts($args);
    }

    private function get_report_document_total($post_id) {
        $total = (float) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_total', true);
        if ($total <= 0) { $total = (float) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_amount', true); }
        return $total;
    }

    private function get_report_salesperson_name_for_post($post_id) {
        $name = trim((string) get_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_salesperson_name', true));
        if ($name !== '') { return $name; }
        $author_id = (int) get_post_field('post_author', $post_id);
        if ($author_id > 0) { $user = get_userdata($author_id); if ($user) { $display = trim((string) $user->display_name); return $display !== '' ? $display : $user->user_login; } }
        return 'Unassigned';
    }

    private function get_sales_rep_report_rows($type = 'quotes') {
        $post_type = $type === 'paid' ? 'dm_invoice' : 'dm_quote';
        $rows = array();
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts($post_type) as $post) {
            if ($type === 'paid' && get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_status', true) !== 'paid') { continue; }
            $name = $this->get_report_salesperson_name_for_post($post->ID);
            if (!isset($rows[$name])) { $rows[$name] = array('name' => $name, 'count' => 0, 'total' => 0); }
            $rows[$name]['count']++;
            $rows[$name]['total'] += $this->get_report_document_total($post->ID);
        }
        uasort($rows, function($a, $b) { return $b['total'] <=> $a['total']; });
        return array_values($rows);
    }

    private function get_technician_efficiency_report_rows() {
        $rows = array();
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_work_order') as $work_order) {
            $status = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_status', true));
            $wo_status = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_status', true));
            if (!in_array($status, array('complete', 'completed'), true) && !in_array($wo_status, array('complete', 'completed'), true)) { continue; }
            $tech_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_primary_technician', true));
            $name = $tech_id > 0 ? $this->get_report_user_display_name($tech_id) : 'Unassigned Technician';
            if (!isset($rows[$name])) { $rows[$name] = array('name' => $name, 'work_orders' => 0, 'estimated_hours' => 0, 'actual_hours' => 0, 'measured_count' => 0, 'on_target_count' => 0); }
            $estimated = $this->get_work_order_estimated_hours($work_order->ID);
            $actual = $this->get_work_order_actual_hours($work_order->ID);
            $rows[$name]['work_orders']++;
            $rows[$name]['estimated_hours'] += $estimated;
            $rows[$name]['actual_hours'] += $actual;
            if ($estimated > 0 && $actual > 0) { $rows[$name]['measured_count']++; if ($actual <= $estimated) { $rows[$name]['on_target_count']++; } }
        }
        foreach ($rows as &$row) {
            $row['hours_saved'] = $row['estimated_hours'] - $row['actual_hours'];
            if ($row['estimated_hours'] > 0 && $row['actual_hours'] > 0) { $row['efficiency_percent'] = ($row['estimated_hours'] / $row['actual_hours']) * 100; $row['efficiency_label'] = number_format((float) $row['efficiency_percent'], 0) . '%'; }
            else { $row['efficiency_percent'] = 0; $row['efficiency_label'] = 'Needs time data'; }
            $row['bonus_ready'] = $row['measured_count'] > 0 && $row['on_target_count'] >= $row['measured_count'];
        }
        unset($row);
        uasort($rows, function($a, $b) { return $b['hours_saved'] <=> $a['hours_saved']; });
        return array_values($rows);
    }

    private function get_report_user_display_name($user_id) {
        $user = get_userdata(absint($user_id));
        if (!$user) { return 'Unknown User'; }
        $name = trim((string) $user->display_name);
        return $name !== '' ? $name : $user->user_login;
    }

    private function get_work_order_estimated_hours($work_order_id) {
        $start = trim((string) get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_start_time', true));
        $end = trim((string) get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_schedule_end_time', true));
        if (preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $start) && preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $end)) {
            $start_minutes = $this->time_string_to_minutes($start);
            $end_minutes = $this->time_string_to_minutes($end);
            if ($end_minutes > $start_minutes) { return round(($end_minutes - $start_minutes) / 60, 2); }
        }
        return 0;
    }

    private function get_work_order_actual_hours($work_order_id) {
        $rows = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_labour_rows', true);
        if (!is_array($rows)) { return 0; }
        $hours = 0;
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $row_hours = isset($row['hours']) ? (float) $row['hours'] : 0;
            if ($row_hours <= 0) { $row_hours = (isset($row['reg']) ? (float) $row['reg'] : 0) + (isset($row['ot']) ? (float) $row['ot'] : 0); }
            $hours += max(0, $row_hours);
        }
        return round($hours, 2);
    }

    private function time_string_to_minutes($time) {
        $parts = explode(':', (string) $time);
        if (count($parts) !== 2) { return 0; }
        return ((int) $parts[0] * 60) + (int) $parts[1];
    }

    private function render_money_bar_chart($rows, $label_key, $value_key, $count_key, $count_label) {
        if (empty($rows)) { return '<div class="dmx-empty">No data yet.</div>'; }
        $max = 0;
        foreach ($rows as $row) { $max = max($max, (float) $row[$value_key]); }
        $max = $max > 0 ? $max : 1;
        $html = '<div class="dmx-report-bar-list">';
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $value = (float) $row[$value_key];
            $width = max(3, min(100, ($value / $max) * 100));
            $html .= '<div class="dmx-report-bar-row"><div class="dmx-report-bar-label"><strong>' . esc_html($row[$label_key]) . '</strong><span>' . esc_html((int) $row[$count_key] . ' ' . $count_label . ' • ' . $this->format_money($value)) . '</span></div><div class="dmx-report-bar-track"><div class="dmx-report-bar-fill" style="width:' . esc_attr($width) . '%;"></div></div></div>';
        }
        return $html . '</div>';
    }


    private function render_contribution_donut_chart($rows, $center_label, $count_label) {
        if (empty($rows)) { return '<div class="dmx-empty">No data yet.</div>'; }
        $palette = array('#173b68', '#2f7ae5', '#23a36d', '#f3b301', '#8b5cf6', '#ef6a3a', '#14b8a6', '#64748b');
        $total = 0;
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $total += (float) ($row['total'] ?? 0);
        }
        if ($total <= 0) { return '<div class="dmx-empty">No total value recorded yet.</div>'; }
        $segments = array();
        $legend = '';
        $offset = 0;
        $i = 0;
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $value = (float) ($row['total'] ?? 0);
            if ($value <= 0) { continue; }
            $color = $palette[$i % count($palette)];
            $percent = ($value / $total) * 100;
            $end = $offset + $percent;
            $segments[] = $color . ' ' . round($offset, 2) . '% ' . round($end, 2) . '%';
            $legend .= '<div class="dmx-donut-legend-row">'
                . '<span class="dmx-donut-swatch" style="background:' . esc_attr($color) . ';"></span>'
                . '<div class="dmx-donut-legend-copy">'
                . '<strong>' . esc_html($row['name']) . '</strong>'
                . '<span>' . esc_html((int) ($row['count'] ?? 0) . ' ' . $count_label . ' • ' . number_format($percent, 1) . '% of total') . '</span>'
                . '</div>'
                . '<div class="dmx-donut-legend-value">' . esc_html($this->format_money($value)) . '</div>'
                . '</div>';
            $offset = $end;
            $i++;
        }
        if (empty($segments)) { return '<div class="dmx-empty">No total value recorded yet.</div>'; }
        $gradient = 'conic-gradient(' . implode(', ', $segments) . ')';
        $html = '<div class="dmx-donut-card">';
        $html .= '<div class="dmx-donut-wrap"><div class="dmx-donut-chart" style="background:' . esc_attr($gradient) . ';"><div class="dmx-donut-center"><small>' . esc_html($center_label) . '</small><strong>' . esc_html($this->format_money($total)) . '</strong></div></div></div>';
        $html .= '<div class="dmx-donut-legend">' . $legend . '</div>';
        $html .= '</div>';
        return $html;
    }

    private function render_efficiency_bar_chart($rows) {
        if (empty($rows)) { return '<div class="dmx-empty">No completed work order time data yet.</div>'; }
        $html = '<div class="dmx-report-bar-list">';
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $target_width = $row['estimated_hours'] > 0 ? 100 : 0;
            $actual_width = ($row['estimated_hours'] > 0 && $row['actual_hours'] > 0) ? min(140, max(3, ($row['actual_hours'] / $row['estimated_hours']) * 100)) : 0;
            $html .= '<div class="dmx-report-bar-row dmx-efficiency-row"><div class="dmx-report-bar-label"><strong>' . esc_html($row['name']) . '</strong><span>Estimated ' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['estimated_hours'], 2)) . ' hrs • Actual ' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['actual_hours'], 2)) . ' hrs • Saved ' . esc_html(number_format((float) $row['hours_saved'], 2)) . ' hrs</span></div><div class="dmx-report-bar-track dmx-efficiency-track"><div class="dmx-report-bar-fill dmx-report-bar-estimate" style="width:' . esc_attr($target_width) . '%;"></div><div class="dmx-report-bar-fill dmx-report-bar-actual" style="width:' . esc_attr($actual_width) . '%;"></div></div><div class="dmx-efficiency-legend"><span>Estimate</span><span>Actual</span><strong>' . esc_html($row['efficiency_label']) . '</strong></div></div>';
        }
        return $html . '</div>';
    }


    private function get_backup_company_key($company_key = '') {
        $company_key = sanitize_title((string) $company_key);
        if ($company_key !== '') {
            return $company_key;
        }

        $current_company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($current_company_key !== '') {
            return sanitize_title($current_company_key);
        }

        return current_user_can('manage_options') ? 'global' : '';
    }

    private function get_company_backup_history($company_key = '') {
        $company_key = $this->get_backup_company_key($company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return array();
        }

        $all = get_option('dmx_company_backup_history', array());
        if (!is_array($all)) {
            $all = array();
        }

        $history = isset($all[$company_key]) && is_array($all[$company_key]) ? $all[$company_key] : array();
        return array_values($history);
    }

    private function save_company_backup_history($history, $company_key = '') {
        $company_key = $this->get_backup_company_key($company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return;
        }

        $all = get_option('dmx_company_backup_history', array());
        if (!is_array($all)) {
            $all = array();
        }

        $all[$company_key] = array_slice(array_values($history), 0, 75);
        update_option('dmx_company_backup_history', $all, false);
    }

    private function add_company_backup_history_record($record, $company_key = '') {
        $company_key = $this->get_backup_company_key($company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return;
        }

        $record = wp_parse_args(is_array($record) ? $record : array(), array(
            'id' => uniqid('dmx_backup_', true),
            'type' => 'manual_data_export',
            'status' => 'complete',
            'created_at' => $this->get_company_current_mysql(),
            'created_by' => get_current_user_id(),
            'created_by_name' => wp_get_current_user()->display_name,
            'format' => 'JSON',
            'note' => '',
            'record_count' => 0,
            'file_count' => 0,
        ));

        $history = $this->get_company_backup_history($company_key);
        array_unshift($history, $record);
        $this->save_company_backup_history($history, $company_key);
    }

    private function get_company_restore_requests($company_key = '') {
        $company_key = $this->get_backup_company_key($company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return array();
        }

        $all = get_option('dmx_company_restore_requests', array());
        if (!is_array($all)) {
            $all = array();
        }

        $rows = isset($all[$company_key]) && is_array($all[$company_key]) ? $all[$company_key] : array();
        return array_values($rows);
    }

    private function save_company_restore_requests($requests, $company_key = '') {
        $company_key = $this->get_backup_company_key($company_key);
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return;
        }

        $all = get_option('dmx_company_restore_requests', array());
        if (!is_array($all)) {
            $all = array();
        }

        $all[$company_key] = array_slice(array_values($requests), 0, 50);
        update_option('dmx_company_restore_requests', $all, false);
    }

    private function get_backup_last_known_file_count($history = array()) {
        if (is_array($history)) {
            foreach ($history as $row) {
                if (isset($row['file_count'])) {
                    return (int) $row['file_count'];
                }
            }
        }
        return 0;
    }

    private function get_backup_status_summary() {
        $history = $this->get_company_backup_history();
        $last_backup = !empty($history) ? $history[0] : array();
        $next_timestamp = strtotime('tomorrow 2:00');

        return array(
            'last_backup_label' => !empty($last_backup['created_at']) ? $this->format_company_date_string($last_backup['created_at'], 'M j, Y g:i A') : 'No company backup export has been recorded yet.',
            'last_backup_status' => !empty($last_backup['status']) ? ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', (string) $last_backup['status'])) : 'Not Started',
            'next_backup_label' => 'Phase 2 scheduled automation not active yet',
            'backup_mode' => 'Phase 1: manual company data exports and restore requests',
            'timezone' => $this->get_company_timezone(),
            'recommended_schedule' => $next_timestamp ? date_i18n('g:i A', $next_timestamp) . ' company local time once automation is enabled' : 'Daily after-hours once automation is enabled',
        );
    }

    private function build_company_backup_export_data($export_type = 'full') {
        global $wpdb;

        $company_key = $this->get_backup_company_key();
        $company_name = $this->get_current_user_company_name();
        if ($company_name === '') {
            $profile = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
            $company_name = (string) ($profile['company_name'] ?? 'DoorMatrix Company');
        }

        $export = array(
            'export_meta' => array(
                'system' => 'DoorMatrix Company Portal',
                'plugin_version' => self::VERSION,
                'export_type' => $export_type,
                'company_key' => $company_key,
                'company_name' => $company_name,
                'generated_at' => $this->get_company_current_mysql(),
                'generated_by_user_id' => get_current_user_id(),
                'generated_by_name' => wp_get_current_user()->display_name,
                'note' => 'Phase 1 export. This file stores structured company data and file references. Full ZIP/offsite backup automation is planned for later phases.',
            ),
            'settings' => array(
                'company_profile' => $this->get_company_profile_settings(),
                'startup_setup' => $this->get_startup_setup_settings(),
                'document_layout' => $this->get_document_layout_settings(),
                'attachment_settings' => $this->get_attachment_settings(),
                'tax_rates' => $this->get_tax_rates_settings(),
                'active_plan' => $this->get_company_active_plan($company_key),
            ),
            'team_users' => array(),
            'records' => array(),
            'inventory' => array(
                'locations' => $this->get_inventory_locations(),
                'balances' => $this->get_inventory_balances(),
                'activity' => $this->get_inventory_activity(),
            ),
            'messages' => array(
                'threads' => array(),
                'participants' => array(),
                'messages' => array(),
            ),
            'parts_library' => array(),
            'saved_items_library' => array(),
            'file_index' => array(),
            'counts' => array(
                'records' => 0,
                'team_users' => 0,
                'message_threads' => 0,
                'message_rows' => 0,
                'files' => 0,
                'parts' => 0,
                'saved_items' => 0,
            ),
        );

        if ($company_key !== '') {
            $users = $this->get_company_users($company_key, array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE, self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE));
            foreach ($users as $user) {
                $export['team_users'][] = array(
                    'id' => (int) $user->ID,
                    'display_name' => $user->display_name,
                    'email' => $user->user_email,
                    'roles' => array_values((array) $user->roles),
                    'status' => (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_account_status', true),
                    'requested_role' => (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_requested_role', true),
                    'assigned_truck_key' => (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_assigned_truck_key', true),
                    'can_create_purchase_orders' => (string) get_user_meta($user->ID, '_dmx_can_create_pos', true),
                );
            }
        }

        foreach ($this->get_company_owned_post_types() as $post_type) {
            $args = array(
                'post_type' => $post_type,
                'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
                'posts_per_page' => -1,
                'orderby' => 'ID',
                'order' => 'ASC',
            );
            if ($company_key !== '' && $company_key !== 'global') {
                $args['meta_query'] = array(array('key' => '_dmx_company_key', 'value' => $company_key, 'compare' => '='));
            }
            $posts = get_posts($args);
            $export['records'][$post_type] = array();
            foreach ($posts as $post) {
                $row = $this->serialize_backup_post_record($post);
                $export['records'][$post_type][] = $row;
                $export['file_index'] = array_merge($export['file_index'], $this->extract_backup_file_references_from_meta($post->ID, $row['meta']));
            }
            $export['counts']['records'] += count($posts);
        }

        foreach (array(self::PART_POST_TYPE => 'parts_library', self::SAVED_ITEM_POST_TYPE => 'saved_items_library') as $post_type => $bucket) {
            $posts = get_posts(array(
                'post_type' => $post_type,
                'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
                'posts_per_page' => -1,
                'orderby' => 'ID',
                'order' => 'ASC',
            ));
            foreach ($posts as $post) {
                $export[$bucket][] = $this->serialize_backup_post_record($post, true);
            }
            if ($bucket === 'parts_library') {
                $export['counts']['parts'] = count($posts);
            } else {
                $export['counts']['saved_items'] = count($posts);
            }
        }

        if ($company_key !== '' && $company_key !== 'global') {
            $threads_table = $this->get_message_threads_table();
            $participants_table = $this->get_message_participants_table();
            $messages_table = $this->get_messages_table();
            $threads = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$threads_table} WHERE company_key = %s ORDER BY id ASC", $company_key), ARRAY_A);
            $thread_ids = array_map('intval', wp_list_pluck($threads, 'id'));
            $export['messages']['threads'] = $threads;
            if (!empty($thread_ids)) {
                $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($thread_ids), '%d'));
                $export['messages']['participants'] = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$participants_table} WHERE thread_id IN ({$placeholders}) ORDER BY id ASC", $thread_ids), ARRAY_A);
                $export['messages']['messages'] = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$messages_table} WHERE thread_id IN ({$placeholders}) ORDER BY id ASC", $thread_ids), ARRAY_A);
            }
        }

        $export['counts']['team_users'] = count($export['team_users']);
        $export['counts']['message_threads'] = count($export['messages']['threads']);
        $export['counts']['message_rows'] = count($export['messages']['messages']);
        $export['file_index'] = $this->dedupe_backup_file_index($export['file_index']);
        $export['counts']['files'] = count($export['file_index']);

        if ($export_type === 'file_index') {
            return array(
                'export_meta' => $export['export_meta'],
                'file_index' => $export['file_index'],
                'counts' => array('files' => $export['counts']['files']),
            );
        }

        return $export;
    }

    private function serialize_backup_post_record($post, $include_terms = false) {
        $meta = array();
        $raw_meta = get_post_meta($post->ID);
        if (is_array($raw_meta)) {
            foreach ($raw_meta as $key => $values) {
                $meta[$key] = array();
                foreach ((array) $values as $value) {
                    $meta[$key][] = maybe_unserialize($value);
                }
            }
        }

        $row = array(
            'id' => (int) $post->ID,
            'post_type' => $post->post_type,
            'post_status' => $post->post_status,
            'post_title' => $post->post_title,
            'post_content' => $post->post_content,
            'post_excerpt' => $post->post_excerpt,
            'post_author' => (int) $post->post_author,
            'post_date' => $post->post_date,
            'post_modified' => $post->post_modified,
            'meta' => $meta,
        );

        if ($include_terms) {
            $taxonomies = get_object_taxonomies($post->post_type);
            $row['terms'] = array();
            foreach ($taxonomies as $taxonomy) {
                $terms = wp_get_post_terms($post->ID, $taxonomy, array('fields' => 'all'));
                $row['terms'][$taxonomy] = array();
                if (!is_wp_error($terms)) {
                    foreach ($terms as $term) {
                        $row['terms'][$taxonomy][] = array(
                            'term_id' => (int) $term->term_id,
                            'slug' => $term->slug,
                            'name' => $term->name,
                        );
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return $row;
    }

    private function extract_backup_file_references_from_meta($post_id, $meta) {
        $files = array();
        $file_meta_keys = array('_dmx_quote_documents', '_dmx_document_photos');

        foreach ($file_meta_keys as $meta_key) {
            $entries = isset($meta[$meta_key][0]) ? $meta[$meta_key][0] : array();
            if (!is_array($entries)) {
                continue;
            }
            foreach ($entries as $entry) {
                if (!is_array($entry)) {
                    continue;
                }
                $attachment_id = absint($entry['id'] ?? 0);
                $url = $attachment_id ? wp_get_attachment_url($attachment_id) : esc_url_raw($entry['url'] ?? '');
                $file_path = $attachment_id ? get_attached_file($attachment_id) : '';
                $files[] = array(
                    'source_post_id' => (int) $post_id,
                    'meta_key' => $meta_key,
                    'attachment_id' => $attachment_id,
                    'name' => sanitize_text_field($entry['name'] ?? 'File'),
                    'url' => $url,
                    'file_path' => $file_path,
                    'category' => sanitize_text_field($entry['category'] ?? ''),
                    'notes' => sanitize_textarea_field($entry['notes'] ?? ''),
                );
            }
        }

        return $files;
    }

    private function dedupe_backup_file_index($files) {
        $seen = array();
        $out = array();
        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $key = !empty($file['attachment_id']) ? 'id_' . $file['attachment_id'] : 'url_' . ($file['url'] ?? '');
            if (isset($seen[$key])) {
                continue;
            }
            $seen[$key] = true;
            $out[] = $file;
        }
        return $out;
    }

    private function download_backup_json_payload($payload, $filename, $history_type, $history_note = '') {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'Only managers can download DoorMatrix company backups.');
        }

        $record_count = isset($payload['counts']['records']) ? (int) $payload['counts']['records'] : 0;
        $file_count = isset($payload['counts']['files']) ? (int) $payload['counts']['files'] : 0;
        $this->add_company_backup_history_record(array(
            'type' => $history_type,
            'status' => 'complete',
            'created_at' => $this->get_company_current_mysql(),
            'created_by' => get_current_user_id(),
            'created_by_name' => wp_get_current_user()->display_name,
            'format' => 'JSON',
            'note' => $history_note,
            'record_count' => $record_count,
            'file_count' => $file_count,
        ));

        nocache_headers();
        header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
        header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . sanitize_file_name($filename) . '"');
        echo wp_json_encode($payload, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        exit;
    }

    private function download_company_backup_json() {
        $payload = $this->build_company_backup_export_data('full');
        $company_key = $this->get_backup_company_key();
        $filename = 'doormatrix-' . ($company_key !== '' ? $company_key : 'company') . '-data-backup-' . date_i18n('Y-m-d-His') . '.json';
        $this->download_backup_json_payload($payload, $filename, 'manual_data_export', 'Manual structured company data export downloaded by manager.');
    }

    private function download_company_backup_file_index() {
        $payload = $this->build_company_backup_export_data('file_index');
        $company_key = $this->get_backup_company_key();
        $filename = 'doormatrix-' . ($company_key !== '' ? $company_key : 'company') . '-file-index-' . date_i18n('Y-m-d-His') . '.json';
        $this->download_backup_json_payload($payload, $filename, 'manual_file_index_export', 'Manual company file index export downloaded by manager. Full file ZIP export will be added in a later phase.');
    }

    private function submit_restore_request($tab = 'settings') {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'Only managers can submit restore requests.');
        }

        $restore_type = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_restore_type'] ?? ''));
        $urgency = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_restore_urgency'] ?? 'normal'));
        $details = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['dmx_restore_details'] ?? ''));

        if ($details === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'Please explain what needs to be restored before submitting the request.');
        }

        $company_key = $this->get_backup_company_key();
        $company_name = $this->get_current_user_company_name();
        if ($company_name === '') {
            $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
            $company_name = (string) ($company['company_name'] ?? 'DoorMatrix Company');
        }

        $request = array(
            'id' => uniqid('dmx_restore_', true),
            'status' => 'submitted',
            'restore_type' => $restore_type,
            'urgency' => in_array($urgency, array('normal', 'urgent'), true) ? $urgency : 'normal',
            'details' => $details,
            'submitted_at' => $this->get_company_current_mysql(),
            'submitted_by' => get_current_user_id(),
            'submitted_by_name' => wp_get_current_user()->display_name,
            'company_key' => $company_key,
            'company_name' => $company_name,
        );

        $requests = $this->get_company_restore_requests($company_key);
        array_unshift($requests, $request);
        $this->save_company_restore_requests($requests, $company_key);

        $subject = 'DoorMatrix Restore Request - ' . $company_name;
        $body = "A restore request was submitted inside DoorMatrix.\n\n";
        $body .= "Company: " . $company_name . "\n";
        $body .= "Company Key: " . $company_key . "\n";
        $body .= "Submitted By: " . wp_get_current_user()->display_name . "\n";
        $body .= "Restore Type: " . $restore_type . "\n";
        $body .= "Urgency: " . $request['urgency'] . "\n\n";
        $body .= "Details:\n" . $details . "\n";
        $this->send_portal_notification_email(self::OWNER_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL, $subject, nl2br(esc_html($body)));

        $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'success', 'Restore request submitted. DoorMatrix will review it before any restore work is completed.');
    }

    private function get_recovery_post_type_labels() {
        return array(
            'dm_customer' => 'Customer',
            'dm_quote' => 'Quote',
            'dm_invoice' => 'Invoice',
            'dm_work_order' => 'Work Order',
            'dm_supplier_request' => 'Supplier Request',
            'dm_sales_appointment' => 'Sales Appointment',
            'dm_inspection' => 'Inspection',
            self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE => 'Hazard Assessment',
            'dm_subcontractor_po' => 'Subcontractor PO',
            'dm_subcontractor_invoice' => 'Subcontractor Invoice',
        );
    }

    private function get_recovery_bin_items($limit = 25) {
        $args = array(
            'post_type' => array_keys($this->get_recovery_post_type_labels()),
            'post_status' => 'trash',
            'posts_per_page' => absint($limit),
            'orderby' => 'modified',
            'order' => 'DESC',
        );

        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, $args['post_type']);
        return get_posts($args);
    }

    private function restore_recovery_record($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'Only company managers can restore records.');
        }

        $record_id = absint($_POST['recovery_record_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($record_id <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'Recovery record could not be found.');
        }

        $post = get_post($record_id);
        if (!$post || !in_array($post->post_type, array_keys($this->get_recovery_post_type_labels()), true)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'Recovery record could not be found.');
        }

        if ($post->post_status !== 'trash') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'This record is not currently in the Recovery Bin.');
        }

        if (!$this->post_matches_current_company($record_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'This record does not belong to your company.');
        }

        $restore_related = !empty($_POST['restore_related']);
        $restored_ids = array();

        $restored = wp_untrash_post($record_id);
        if (!$restored || is_wp_error($restored)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'The selected record could not be restored.');
        }

        $restored_ids[] = $record_id;
        update_post_meta($record_id, '_dmx_restored_by_user_id', get_current_user_id());
        update_post_meta($record_id, '_dmx_restored_by_user_name', wp_get_current_user()->display_name);
        update_post_meta($record_id, '_dmx_restored_at', current_time('mysql'));

        if ($restore_related && $post->post_type === 'dm_customer') {
            $related_ids = $this->find_trashed_customer_related_records($record_id, $post->post_title);
            foreach ($related_ids as $related_id) {
                if ($related_id === $record_id) {
                    continue;
                }

                if (!$this->post_matches_current_company($related_id)) {
                    continue;
                }

                $related_post = get_post($related_id);
                if (!$related_post || $related_post->post_status !== 'trash') {
                    continue;
                }

                $related_restored = wp_untrash_post($related_id);
                if ($related_restored && !is_wp_error($related_restored)) {
                    $restored_ids[] = $related_id;
                    update_post_meta($related_id, '_dmx_restored_by_user_id', get_current_user_id());
                    update_post_meta($related_id, '_dmx_restored_by_user_name', wp_get_current_user()->display_name);
                    update_post_meta($related_id, '_dmx_restored_at', current_time('mysql'));
                }
            }
        }

        $count = count(array_unique($restored_ids));
        $message = $count > 1 ? $count . ' records restored from the Recovery Bin.' : 'Record restored from the Recovery Bin.';
        $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'success', $message);
    }

    private function find_trashed_customer_related_records($customer_id, $customer_name = '') {
        $customer_id = absint($customer_id);
        $customer_name = trim((string) $customer_name);
        $ids = array();

        if ($customer_id <= 0) {
            return $ids;
        }

        $post_types = array(
            'dm_quote',
            'dm_invoice',
            'dm_work_order',
            'dm_supplier_request',
            'dm_sales_appointment',
            'dm_inspection',
            self::HAZARD_ASSESSMENT_POST_TYPE,
        );

        $meta_query = array('relation' => 'OR');
        $meta_query[] = array(
            'key' => '_dmx_work_order_customer_id',
            'value' => $customer_id,
            'compare' => '=',
        );

        if ($customer_name !== '') {
            $meta_query[] = array(
                'key' => '_dmx_customer_name',
                'value' => $customer_name,
                'compare' => '=',
            );
            $meta_query[] = array(
                'key' => '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company',
                'value' => $customer_name,
                'compare' => '=',
            );
            $meta_query[] = array(
                'key' => '_dmx_sales_appointment_customer',
                'value' => $customer_name,
                'compare' => '=',
            );
            $meta_query[] = array(
                'key' => '_dmx_hazard_customer_name',
                'value' => $customer_name,
                'compare' => '=',
            );
        }

        $args = array(
            'post_type' => $post_types,
            'post_status' => 'trash',
            'posts_per_page' => -1,
            'fields' => 'ids',
            'meta_query' => $meta_query,
        );

        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, $post_types);
        $ids = get_posts($args);

        return array_map('absint', $ids);
    }

    private function render_recovery_bin_table() {
        $items = $this->get_recovery_bin_items(30);
        $labels = $this->get_recovery_post_type_labels();

        ob_start();

        echo '<div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">';
        echo '<h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Recovery Bin</h4>';
        echo '<p>Recently deleted DoorMatrix records appear here before they are permanently removed from WordPress trash. Managers can restore deleted records without asking the customer to download or upload backup files.</p>';

        if (empty($items)) {
            echo '<div class="dmx-empty" style="margin-top:14px;">No recoverable records are currently in the Recovery Bin.</div>';
            echo '</div>';
            return ob_get_clean();
        }

        echo '<div class="dmx-table-wrap" style="margin-top:14px;">';
        echo '<table class="dmx-table">';
        echo '<thead><tr><th>Deleted Record</th><th>Type</th><th>Deleted</th><th>Deleted By</th><th>Restore</th></tr></thead>';
        echo '<tbody>';

        foreach ($items as $item) {
            $type_label = $labels[$item->post_type] ?? $item->post_type;
            $deleted_at = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_deleted_at', true);
            if ($deleted_at === '') {
                $deleted_at = $item->post_modified;
            }

            $deleted_by = get_post_meta($item->ID, '_dmx_deleted_by_user_name', true);
            if ($deleted_by === '') {
                $deleted_by = 'Unknown';
            }

            $is_customer = $item->post_type === 'dm_customer';

            echo '<tr>';
            echo '<td data-label="Deleted Record"><strong>' . esc_html(get_the_title($item)) . '</strong><br><span style="color:#61738b;">ID #' . esc_html($item->ID) . '</span></td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Type">' . esc_html($type_label) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Deleted">' . esc_html($deleted_at) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Deleted By">' . esc_html($deleted_by) . '</td>';
            echo '<td data-label="Restore">';
            echo '<form method="post" style="display:grid;gap:8px;min-width:190px;">';
            wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="restore_recovery_record">';
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="settings">';
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="settings_backup">';
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="recovery_record_id" value="' . esc_attr($item->ID) . '">';

            if ($is_customer) {
                echo '<label style="display:flex;gap:7px;align-items:flex-start;font-size:12px;color:#61738b;font-weight:700;"><input type="checkbox" name="restore_related" value="1" checked>Restore linked trashed history when found</label>';
            }

            echo '<button class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" type="submit">Restore</button>';
            echo '</form>';
            echo '</td>';
            echo '</tr>';
        }

        echo '</tbody></table></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-inline-note">Recovery Bin restore is for records still available in WordPress trash. Larger data-loss events should use the full restore request below so DoorMatrix can review backup recovery options.</div>';
        echo '</div>';

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_settings_backup_page() {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            return '<div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error">Only company managers can view Backup &amp; Recovery.</div>';
        }

        $company_name = '';
        if (method_exists($this, 'get_current_user_company_name')) {
            $company_name = trim((string) $this->get_current_user_company_name());
        }

        if ($company_name === '') {
            $profile = array();
            if (method_exists($this, 'get_company_profile_settings')) {
                $profile = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
            }
            if (is_array($profile) && !empty($profile['company_name'])) {
                $company_name = trim((string) $profile['company_name']);
            }
        }

        if ($company_name === '') {
            $company_name = 'Your company';
        }

        ob_start();

        echo '<div class="dmx-card">';
        echo '<h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Backup &amp; Recovery</h3>';
        echo '<p>DoorMatrix backup and recovery tools are designed so your company does not need to download, store, or upload backup files to recover lost records. If something is accidentally deleted, managers can use the Recovery Bin or submit a restore request for DoorMatrix review.</p>';

        echo '<div class="dmx-form-grid" style="margin-top:18px;">';

        echo '<div class="dmx-help-box">';
        echo '<h4>Backup Protection Status</h4>';
        echo '<p><strong>Company:</strong> ' . esc_html($company_name) . '</p>';
        echo '<p><strong>Recovery Bin:</strong> Active for deleted DoorMatrix records</p>';
        echo '<p><strong>Restore requests:</strong> Available for larger recovery needs</p>';
        echo '<p><strong>Customer responsibility:</strong> No backup downloads required for normal restore requests</p>';
        echo '</div>';

        echo '<div class="dmx-help-box">';
        echo '<h4>What DoorMatrix Protects</h4>';
        echo '<p>Customer records, quotes, invoices, work orders, supplier requests, inspections, hazard assessments, inventory records, time cards, settings, documents, and related company history are part of the backup and recovery planning.</p>';
        echo '</div>';

        echo '</div>';

        echo $this->render_recovery_bin_table();

        echo '<div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">';
        echo '<h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Request Record Restore or Full Restore Review</h4>';
        echo '<p>Use this when a record is not visible in the Recovery Bin, multiple records were deleted, an employee damaged important data, or a larger company restore review is needed.</p>';
        echo '<form method="post">';
        wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="submit_restore_request">';
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="settings">';
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="settings_backup">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-form-grid">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Restore Type</label><select name="dmx_restore_type"><option value="deleted_customer_history">Deleted customer and related history</option><option value="single_record">Single quote, invoice, work order, or document</option><option value="files_photos">Files or photos</option><option value="inventory_history">Inventory or truck stock history</option><option value="employee_deleted_records">Employee deleted multiple records</option><option value="company_settings">Company settings</option><option value="full_company_review">Full company restore review</option><option value="not_sure">Not sure</option></select></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Urgency</label><select name="dmx_restore_urgency"><option value="normal">Normal</option><option value="urgent">Urgent</option></select></div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>What needs to be restored?</label><textarea name="dmx_restore_details" rows="5" placeholder="Example: A sales person deleted customer ABC Doors and their work order history. Please restore the customer, invoices, quotes, work orders, photos, and related records from before the deletion. Include customer name, customer number, document numbers, dates, or anything that helps DoorMatrix find the correct information." required></textarea></div>';
        echo '<button class="dmx-btn" type="submit">Submit Restore Request</button>';
        echo '</form>';
        echo '</div>';

        echo '<div class="dmx-backup-policy-box" style="margin-top:18px;">';
        echo '<h3>Restore Notice</h3>';
        echo '<p>Small accidental deletions can often be restored from the Recovery Bin. Larger restores are reviewed before changes are applied so DoorMatrix can protect company data and avoid overwriting good records by mistake.</p>';
        echo '</div>';

        echo '</div>';

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_settings_section($is_admin = false) {
        $tabs = $this->render_subtabs('settings', $this->get_settings_subtabs());
        $settings_base_url = $this->get_settings_base_url($is_admin);
        ob_start();
        if ($tabs['active'] !== 'settings_home') {
            echo '<a class="dmx-settings-back" href="' . esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'settings', 'dmx_subtab' => 'settings_home'), $settings_base_url)) . '">&larr; Back to Settings</a>';
        }
        echo '<div class="dmx-app-section">';
        switch ($tabs['active']) {
            case 'settings_startup':
                echo $this->render_settings_startup_page();
                break;
            case 'settings_company':
                echo $this->render_settings_company_page();
                break;
            case 'settings_currency':
                echo $this->render_settings_currency_page();
                break;
            case 'settings_tax':
                echo $this->render_settings_tax_page();
                break;
            case 'settings_documents':
                echo $this->render_settings_document_page();
                break;
            case 'settings_attachments':
                echo $this->render_settings_attachments_page();
                break;
            case 'settings_backup':
                echo $this->render_settings_backup_page();
                break;
            default:
                echo $this->render_settings_home($is_admin);
                break;
        }
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_settings_home($is_admin = false) {
        $tiles = array(
            array('key' => 'settings_startup', 'title' => 'Start-Up Setup', 'desc' => 'Guided manager setup for timezone, tax, users, time cards, commissions, documents, numbering, inventory, equipment, and suppliers.', 'color' => '#0f274a'),
            array('key' => 'settings_company', 'title' => 'Company Details', 'desc' => 'Company name, logo, address, email, phone, and startup setup.', 'color' => '#8e44ad'),
            array('key' => 'settings_currency', 'title' => 'Currency & Payments', 'desc' => 'CAD / USD, payment terms, paid stamp, and payment methods.', 'color' => '#f39c12'),
            array('key' => 'settings_tax', 'title' => 'Tax & Accounting', 'desc' => 'Canada and U.S. tax rates, defaults, and future accounting mapping.', 'color' => '#e74c3c'),
            array('key' => 'settings_documents', 'title' => 'Document Settings', 'desc' => 'Quote and invoice layout visibility, numbering, terms, and branding.', 'color' => '#3498db'),
            array('key' => 'settings_attachments', 'title' => 'Attachments', 'desc' => 'Upload warranty sheets, brochures, spec sheets, and assign them to documents.', 'color' => '#16a085'),
            array('key' => 'settings_backup', 'title' => 'Backup & Recovery', 'desc' => 'View backup status, export company data, download a file index, and submit restore requests.', 'color' => '#2c3e50'),
            array('key' => 'staff', 'title' => 'Manage Team', 'desc' => 'Preview the team setup screen door companies use to add users, assign roles, and manage truck access.', 'color' => '#e67e22'),
        );
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-app-grid-tiles">';
        $settings_base_url = $this->get_settings_base_url($is_admin);
        foreach ($tiles as $tile) {
            if ($tile['key'] === 'staff' && !$this->can_view_team_tab()) {
                continue;

            if ($tile['key'] === 'staff') {
                $url = $is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=doormatrix-preview-team') : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'staff'), $this->get_portal_page_url());

            }
            echo '<a class="dmx-settings-tile" href="' . esc_url($url) . '"><div class="dmx-settings-tile-head" style="background:' . esc_attr($tile['color']) . ';">' . esc_html($tile['title']) . '</div><div class="dmx-settings-tile-body"><strong>' . esc_html($tile['title']) . '</strong><span>' . esc_html($tile['desc']) . '</span></div></a>';
        }
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

'" alt="Current company logo" style="display:block;max-width:220px;max-height:90px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #dbe5ef;border-radius:14px;padding:10px;">' : '<div class="dmx-inline-note">No logo saved yet.</div>') .                 </div>';
