'">Open Document Settings</a></div></div>';
        echo '<button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Company Details</button></form></div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_currency_payment_settings() {
        $defaults = array(
            'currency' => 'CAD',
            'show_paid_stamp' => 'yes',
            'payment_methods' => array(
                'cash' => array('sales' => 'yes', 'expense' => 'no', 'supplier' => 'no'),
                'cheque' => array('sales' => 'yes', 'expense' => 'yes', 'supplier' => 'yes'),
                'bank_transfer' => array('sales' => 'yes', 'expense' => 'yes', 'supplier' => 'yes'),
                'paypal' => array('sales' => 'no', 'expense' => 'no', 'supplier' => 'no'),
                'etransfer' => array('sales' => 'yes', 'expense' => 'yes', 'supplier' => 'no'),
                'credit_card' => array('sales' => 'yes', 'expense' => 'no', 'supplier' => 'no'),
                'debit_card' => array('sales' => 'yes', 'expense' => 'no', 'supplier' => 'no'),
            ),
        );
        $saved = get_option('dmx_currency_payment_settings', array());
        return wp_parse_args($saved, $defaults);
    }

    private function save_currency_payment_settings($tab = 'settings') {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'You do not have permission to save company settings.');
        }

        $settings = $this->get_currency_payment_settings();
        $methods = array();
        foreach (array('cash', 'cheque', 'bank_transfer', 'paypal', 'etransfer', 'credit_card', 'debit_card') as $method) {
            $methods[$method] = array(
                'sales' => !empty($_POST['dmx_payment_methods'][$method]['sales']) ? 'yes' : 'no',
                'expense' => !empty($_POST['dmx_payment_methods'][$method]['expense']) ? 'yes' : 'no',
                'supplier' => !empty($_POST['dmx_payment_methods'][$method]['supplier']) ? 'yes' : 'no',
            );
        }
        $settings['currency'] = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_currency'] ?? 'CAD');
        $settings['show_paid_stamp'] = !empty($_POST['dmx_show_paid_stamp']) ? 'yes' : 'no';
        $settings['payment_methods'] = $methods;
        update_option('dmx_currency_payment_settings', $settings);
        $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'success', 'Currency and payment settings saved.');
    }

    private function render_settings_currency_page() {
        $settings = $this->get_currency_payment_settings();
        $labels = array(
            'cash' => 'Cash',
            'cheque' => 'Cheque / Check',
            'bank_transfer' => 'Bank Transfer',
            'paypal' => 'PayPal',
            'etransfer' => 'E-Transfer',
            'credit_card' => 'Credit Card',
            'debit_card' => 'Debit Card',
        );
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-card"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Currency & Payments Settings</h3><form method="post">';
        wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="save_currency_payments"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="settings"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="settings_currency">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-form-grid"><div class="dmx-field"><label>Currency</label><select name="dmx_currency"><option value="CAD"' . selected($settings['currency'],'CAD',false) . '>CAD</option><option value="USD"' . selected($settings['currency'],'USD',false) . '>USD</option></select>
                    </div><div class="dmx-field"><label>Enable paid stamp on invoices</label><label class="dmx-pill-toggle"><span>Show Paid Stamp</span><input type="checkbox" name="dmx_show_paid_stamp" value="yes"' . checked($settings['show_paid_stamp'],'yes',false) . '></label></div></div>';
        echo '<h4>Payment Options</h4><table class="dmx-simple-table"><thead><tr><th>Payment Type</th><th>Sales Payments</th><th>Expense Payments</th><th>Supplier Invoice Payments</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        foreach ($labels as $key => $label) {
            echo '<tr><td>' . esc_html($label) . '</td>';
            foreach (array('sales','expense','supplier') as $scope) {
                $checked = isset($settings['payment_methods'][$key][$scope]) ? $settings['payment_methods'][$key][$scope] : 'no';
                echo '<td><label class="dmx-pill-toggle"><span>On</span><input type="checkbox" name="dmx_payment_methods[' . esc_attr($key) . '][' . esc_attr($scope) . ']" value="yes"' . checked($checked,'yes',false) . '></label></td>';
            }
            echo '</tr>';
        }
        echo '</tbody></table><div style="margin-top:16px;"><button class="dmx-btn" type="submit">Save Currency & Payments</button></div></form></div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_default_tax_rate_rows() {
        $rows = array();
        foreach ($this->get_canada_region_options() as $code => $name) {
            $preset = $this->get_tax_preset_for_mode('canada', 'Canada', $code, '');
            $rate = (float) ($preset['primary_rate'] === '' ? 0 : $preset['primary_rate']) + (float) ($preset['secondary_rate'] === '' ? 0 : $preset['secondary_rate']);
            $rows[] = array('key' => $code, 'name' => $name, 'rate' => (string) $rate, 'enabled' => 'yes');
        }
        foreach ($this->get_usa_region_options() as $code => $name) {
            $rows[] = array('key' => $code, 'name' => $name, 'rate' => '0', 'enabled' => 'no');
        }
        return $rows;
    }

    private function get_tax_rates_settings() {
        $saved = get_option('dmx_tax_rates_settings', array());
        if (!is_array($saved) || empty($saved)) {
            $saved = $this->get_default_tax_rate_rows();
        }
        return $saved;
    }

    private function save_tax_rates_settings($tab = 'settings') {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'You do not have permission to save company settings.');
        }

        $rows = array();
        if (!empty($_POST['dmx_tax_rows']) && is_array($_POST['dmx_tax_rows'])) {
            foreach ($_POST['dmx_tax_rows'] as $row) {
                $name = sanitize_text_field($row['name'] ?? '');
                if ($name === '') {
                    continue;
                }
                $rows[] = array(
                    'key' => sanitize_text_field($row['key'] ?? strtolower($name)),
                    'name' => $name,
                    'rate' => $this->sanitize_percentage($row['rate'] ?? '0'),
                    'enabled' => !empty($row['enabled']) ? 'yes' : 'no',
                );
            }
        }
        if (empty($rows)) {
            $rows = $this->get_default_tax_rate_rows();
        }
        update_option('dmx_tax_rates_settings', $rows);
        $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'success', 'Tax and accounting settings saved.');
    }

    private function render_settings_tax_page() {
        $rows = $this->get_tax_rates_settings();
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-card"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Tax & Accounting</h3><div class="dmx-subtabs"><a class="active" href="#">General</a><a href="#">Tax Rates</a><a href="#">Accounting Integrations</a></div><form method="post">';
        wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="save_tax_accounting"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="settings"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="settings_tax">';
        echo '<table class="dmx-simple-table"><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Value (%)</th><th>Enabled</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        foreach ($rows as $i => $row) {
            echo '<tr><td><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tax_rows[' . $i . '][key]" value="' . esc_attr($row['key']) . '"><input type="text" name="dmx_tax_rows[' . $i . '][name]" value="' . esc_attr($row['name']) . '"></td>';
            echo '<td><input type="number" step="0.001" min="0" name="dmx_tax_rows[' . $i . '][rate]" value="' . esc_attr($row['rate']) . '"></td>';
            echo '<td><label class="dmx-pill-toggle"><span>Enabled</span><input type="checkbox" name="dmx_tax_rows[' . $i . '][enabled]" value="yes"' . checked($row['enabled'],'yes',false) . '></label></td></tr>';
        }
        echo '</tbody></table><div style="margin-top:16px;"><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Tax Rates</button></div></form></div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_document_layout_settings() {
        $defaults = array(
            'quote' => array('show_title' => 'yes', 'show_description' => 'yes', 'show_job_description' => 'yes', 'show_headers' => 'yes', 'show_sku' => 'no', 'show_qty' => 'yes', 'show_unit_cost' => 'yes', 'show_amount' => 'yes', 'show_subtotal' => 'yes', 'show_tax' => 'yes', 'show_total' => 'yes'),
            'invoice' => array('show_title' => 'yes', 'show_description' => 'yes', 'show_job_description' => 'yes', 'show_headers' => 'yes', 'show_sku' => 'no', 'show_qty' => 'yes', 'show_unit_cost' => 'yes', 'show_amount' => 'yes', 'show_subtotal' => 'yes', 'show_tax' => 'yes', 'show_total' => 'yes'),
        );
        $saved = get_option('dmx_document_layout_settings', array());
        if (!is_array($saved)) {
            $saved = array();
        }

        $settings = $defaults;
        foreach (array('quote', 'invoice') as $doc) {
            if (!empty($saved[$doc]) && is_array($saved[$doc])) {
                $settings[$doc] = wp_parse_args($saved[$doc], $defaults[$doc]);
            }
        }

        return $settings;
    }

    private function get_document_layout_safe_defaults($document_type = 'quote') {
        return array(
            'show_title' => 'yes',
            'show_description' => 'yes',
            'show_job_description' => 'yes',
            'show_headers' => 'yes',
            'show_sku' => 'no',
            'show_qty' => 'yes',
            'show_unit_cost' => 'yes',
            'show_amount' => 'yes',
            'show_subtotal' => 'yes',
            'show_tax' => 'yes',
            'show_total' => 'yes',
        );
    }

    private function normalize_document_settings_for_customer_document($doc_settings, $document_type = 'quote') {
        $defaults = $this->get_document_layout_safe_defaults($document_type);
        if (!is_array($doc_settings)) {
            return $defaults;
        }

        $doc_settings = wp_parse_args($doc_settings, $defaults);
        $pricing_fields = array('show_qty', 'show_unit_cost', 'show_amount', 'show_subtotal', 'show_tax', 'show_total');
        $has_pricing_visible = false;

        foreach ($pricing_fields as $field) {
            if (($doc_settings[$field] ?? 'no') === 'yes') {
                $has_pricing_visible = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        $line_money_fields = array('show_qty', 'show_unit_cost', 'show_amount', 'show_tax', 'show_total');
        $has_line_money_visible = false;
        foreach ($line_money_fields as $field) {
            if (($doc_settings[$field] ?? 'no') === 'yes') {
                $has_line_money_visible = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        /*
         * Safety repair for older saved settings that were created while the
         * document toggle script was broken. Those records could leave the
         * customer-facing invoice showing only Description with an empty total box.
         * Quotes/invoices should never lose the money columns and totals by accident.
         */
        if (!$has_pricing_visible || !$has_line_money_visible) {
            $doc_settings['show_headers'] = 'yes';
            foreach ($pricing_fields as $field) {
                $doc_settings[$field] = 'yes';
            }
        }

        return $doc_settings;
    }

    private function repair_document_layout_settings() {
        $settings = $this->get_document_layout_settings();
        $changed = false;

        foreach (array('quote', 'invoice') as $doc_type) {
            $current = isset($settings[$doc_type]) && is_array($settings[$doc_type]) ? $settings[$doc_type] : array();
            $normalized = $this->normalize_document_settings_for_customer_document($current, $doc_type);

            foreach ($normalized as $key => $value) {
                if (!isset($settings[$doc_type][$key]) || $settings[$doc_type][$key] !== $value) {
                    $settings[$doc_type][$key] = $value;
                    $changed = true;
                }
            }
        }

        if ($changed) {
            update_option('dmx_document_layout_settings', $settings);
        }
    }

    private function save_document_layout_settings($tab = 'settings') {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'You do not have permission to save company settings.');
        }

        $settings = $this->get_document_layout_settings();
        $submitted_doc = sanitize_key($_POST['dmx_doc_type'] ?? '');
        $docs_to_save = in_array($submitted_doc, array('quote', 'invoice'), true) ? array($submitted_doc) : array('quote', 'invoice');
        foreach ($docs_to_save as $doc) {
            foreach (array('show_title','show_description','show_job_description','show_headers','show_sku','show_qty','show_unit_cost','show_amount','show_subtotal','show_tax','show_total') as $field) {
                $settings[$doc][$field] = !empty($_POST['dmx_doc'][$doc][$field]) ? 'yes' : 'no';
            }
        }
        update_option('dmx_document_layout_settings', $settings);

        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $company['document_accent_color'] = sanitize_hex_color($_POST['dmx_company_document_accent_color'] ?? '') ?: $company['document_accent_color'];
        $company['document_header_color'] = sanitize_hex_color($_POST['dmx_company_document_header_color'] ?? '') ?: $company['document_header_color'];
        $company['document_body_bg'] = sanitize_hex_color($_POST['dmx_company_document_body_bg'] ?? '') ?: $company['document_body_bg'];
        $company['document_base_font_size'] = max(12, min(18, (int) ($_POST['dmx_company_document_base_font_size'] ?? $company['document_base_font_size'])));
        $company['document_heading_font_size'] = max(18, min(34, (int) ($_POST['dmx_company_document_heading_font_size'] ?? $company['document_heading_font_size'])));
        $company['document_logo_size'] = max(60, min(260, (int) ($_POST['dmx_company_document_logo_size'] ?? $company['document_logo_size'])));
        $company['default_quote_terms'] = wp_kses_post($_POST['dmx_company_default_quote_terms'] ?? $company['default_quote_terms']);
        $company['default_invoice_terms'] = wp_kses_post($_POST['dmx_company_default_invoice_terms'] ?? $company['default_invoice_terms']);
        $company['document_preview_notes'] = wp_kses_post($_POST['dmx_company_document_preview_notes'] ?? $company['document_preview_notes']);
        $this->update_company_profile_settings($company);

        $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'success', 'Document settings saved.');
    }

    private function render_settings_document_page() {
        $doc = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_doc_type'] ?? 'quote');
        if (!in_array($doc, array('quote','invoice'), true)) {
            $doc = 'quote';
        }
        $settings_base_url = $this->get_settings_base_url(is_admin());
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-card"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Document Settings</h3><p style="margin-top:0;color:#61738b;">Control how customer-facing quotes and invoices look, and use the live preview to see design changes instantly before saving.</p>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-subtabs"><a class="active" href="#">Layout & Design</a><a href="#">Terminology</a><a href="#">Pricing Layout</a><a href="#">Attachments</a><a href="#">Numbering Rules</a></div>';
        echo '<form method="post" id="dmx-document-settings-form">';
        wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="save_document_settings"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="settings"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="settings_documents"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_doc_type" value="' . esc_attr($doc) . '">';
        echo $this->render_document_settings_editor_inner($doc, $settings_base_url, 'settings', true);
        echo '</form>';
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_document_settings_editor_inner($doc = 'quote', $settings_base_url = '', $context = 'settings', $include_submit_button = true) {
        $settings = $this->get_document_layout_settings();
        $company = $this->get_company_profile_settings();
        $doc = sanitize_key($doc);
        if (!in_array($doc, array('quote','invoice'), true)) {
            $doc = 'quote';
        }
        if ($settings_base_url === '') {
            $settings_base_url = $this->get_settings_base_url(is_admin());
        }
        $context = sanitize_key($context);
        if ($context === '') {
            $context = 'settings';
        }
        $uid = 'dmx-doc-editor-' . $context . '-' . $doc;
        $fields = array(
            'show_title' => 'Title',
            'show_description' => 'Description',
            'show_job_description' => 'Job Description',
            'show_headers' => 'Headers',
            'show_sku' => 'SKU',
            'show_qty' => 'Quantity',
            'show_unit_cost' => 'Unit Price',
            'show_amount' => 'Amount',
            'show_subtotal' => 'Sub-Total',
            'show_tax' => 'Tax',
            'show_total' => 'Total',
        );
        $live_company_name = $company['company_name'] !== '' ? $company['company_name'] : 'Your Company Name';
        $live_company_city_line = trim((string) ($company['city'] ?? '') . (!empty($company['province_state']) ? ', ' . (string) $company['province_state'] : ''));
        $live_company_meta_lines = array();
        $live_company_meta_lines[] = $company['email'] !== '' ? $company['email'] : 'hello@company.com';
        $live_company_meta_lines[] = $company['phone'] !== '' ? $company['phone'] : '403-555-1212';
        $live_address = $company['address_1'] !== '' ? (string) $company['address_1'] : '123 Example Ave';
        if ($live_company_city_line !== '') {
            $live_address .= ($live_address !== '' ? ', ' : '') . $live_company_city_line;
        } else {
            $live_address .= ', Calgary, AB';
        }
        $live_company_meta_lines[] = $live_address;
        $live_company_meta_html = implode('<br>', array_map('esc_html', array_filter($live_company_meta_lines)));
        $live_logo_url = !empty($company['logo_url']) ? (string) $company['logo_url'] : '';
        $live_logo_size = !empty($company['document_logo_size']) ? max(60, min(260, (int) $company['document_logo_size'])) : 150;
        $live_logo_max_height = max(42, (int) round($live_logo_size * 0.55));
        $live_brand_logo_html = $live_logo_url !== '' ? '<img id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '-brand-logo" class="dmx-live-brand-logo" src="' . esc_url($live_logo_url) . '" alt="' . esc_attr($live_company_name) . ' logo" style="max-width:' . esc_attr($live_logo_size) . 'px;max-height:' . esc_attr($live_logo_max_height) . 'px;" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\';">' : '';

        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-doc-editor-shared" id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '" data-dmx-doc-editor="1">';
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_doc_type" value="' . esc_attr($doc) . '">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-doc-chip-wrap">';
        foreach (array('quote' => 'Quote', 'invoice' => 'Invoice') as $key => $label) {
            $args = array('dmx_tab' => 'settings', 'dmx_doc_type' => $key);
            if ($context === 'startup') {
                $args['dmx_subtab'] = 'settings_startup';
                $args['dmx_setup_step'] = 'branding_documents';
            } else {
                $args['dmx_subtab'] = 'settings_documents';
            }
            $url = add_query_arg($args, $settings_base_url);
            echo '<a class="dmx-doc-chip ' . esc_attr($doc === $key ? 'active' : '') . '" href="' . esc_url($url) . '">' . esc_html($label) . '</a>';
        }
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-doc-settings-grid">';
        echo '<div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-bottom:18px;">';
        echo '<h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Document Style & Color</h4>';
        echo '<p style="margin-top:0;color:#61738b;">Use the color picker below to choose the accent style your customers will see on quotes and invoices. The live preview updates instantly as you change settings.</p>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-form-grid-3">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Accent Color</label><input type="color" data-dmx-preview="accent" name="dmx_company_document_accent_color" value="' . esc_attr($company['document_accent_color']) . '"><small style="display:block;margin-top:6px;color:#7b8aa0;">Main accent used for highlights, totals, and badges.</small></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Header / Text Color</label><input type="color" data-dmx-preview="header" name="dmx_company_document_header_color" value="' . esc_attr($company['document_header_color']) . '"><small style="display:block;margin-top:6px;color:#7b8aa0;">Used for headings and strong text.</small></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Page Background</label><input type="color" data-dmx-preview="pagebg" name="dmx_company_document_body_bg" value="' . esc_attr($company['document_body_bg']) . '"><small style="display:block;margin-top:6px;color:#7b8aa0;">Background behind the document card.</small></div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-form-grid-3">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Base Font Size (px)</label><input type="number" min="12" max="18" data-dmx-preview="basefont" name="dmx_company_document_base_font_size" value="' . esc_attr($company['document_base_font_size']) . '"></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Heading Font Size (px)</label><input type="number" min="18" max="34" data-dmx-preview="headingfont" name="dmx_company_document_heading_font_size" value="' . esc_attr($company['document_heading_font_size']) . '"></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Logo Size (px)</label><input type="number" min="60" max="260" step="5" data-dmx-preview="logosize" name="dmx_company_document_logo_size" value="' . esc_attr($company['document_logo_size']) . '"><small style="display:block;margin-top:6px;color:#7b8aa0;">Controls the logo size in the live preview and customer-facing quote/invoice header.</small></div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-form-grid">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Default Quote Terms</label><textarea data-dmx-preview="quote_terms" name="dmx_company_default_quote_terms">' . esc_textarea($company['default_quote_terms']) . '</textarea></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Default Invoice Terms</label><textarea data-dmx-preview="invoice_terms" name="dmx_company_default_invoice_terms">' . esc_textarea($company['default_invoice_terms']) . '</textarea></div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-field"><label>Sample Preview Notes</label><textarea data-dmx-preview="notes" name="dmx_company_document_preview_notes">' . esc_textarea($company['document_preview_notes']) . '</textarea><small style="display:block;margin-top:6px;color:#7b8aa0;">This controls the sample notes area in the live preview.</small></div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-help-box" style="margin-bottom:16px;"><h4>Field visibility</h4><p>Turn fields on or off for quote and invoice layouts without changing the data stored in DoorMatrix. The sample document on the right updates instantly.</p></div>';
        echo '<table class="dmx-simple-table"><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Visible on ' . esc_html(ucfirst($doc)) . '</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        foreach ($fields as $key => $label) {
            echo '<tr><td>' . esc_html($label) . '</td><td><label class="dmx-pill-toggle"><span>' . ($settings[$doc][$key] === 'yes' ? 'Visible' : 'Hidden') . '</span><input data-dmx-preview-toggle="' . esc_attr($key) . '" type="checkbox" name="dmx_doc[' . esc_attr($doc) . '][' . esc_attr($key) . ']" value="yes"' . checked($settings[$doc][$key], 'yes', false) . '></label></td></tr>';
        }
        echo '</tbody></table>';
        if ($include_submit_button) {
            echo '<div style="margin-top:16px;"><button class="dmx-btn" type="submit">Save Document Settings</button></div>';
        }
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-preview-card" id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '-card">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-preview-topbar" id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '-topbar"></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-preview-toolbar"><strong>Live Sample Preview</strong></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-preview-wrap" id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '-wrap">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-preview-doc" id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '-doc">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-preview-head">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-brand-lockup">' . $live_brand_logo_html . '<div class="dmx-live-brand-copy"><div class="dmx-live-brand-title" id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '-brand-title">' . esc_html($live_company_name) . '</div><div class="dmx-live-brand-meta">' . $live_company_meta_html . '</div><div class="dmx-live-title-wrap" data-row="show_title"><div class="dmx-live-title-label" id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '-doc-label">' . esc_html(ucfirst($doc)) . '</div><div id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '-doc-title" class="dmx-live-doc-title">16 x 7 White Residential Door</div></div></div></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-badge"><small>' . esc_html(ucfirst($doc)) . ' Number</small><strong id="' . esc_attr($uid) . '-doc-number">' . esc_html($doc === 'invoice' ? 'INV-1004' : 'QT-1004') . '</strong><div class="dmx-live-badge-row"><strong style="display:inline;font-size:13px;">Date:</strong> Apr 14, 2026</div><div class="dmx-live-badge-row"><strong style="display:inline;font-size:13px;">Status:</strong> Draft</div><div class="dmx-live-badge-row"><strong style="display:inline;font-size:13px;">Team Member:</strong> Jordan Lee</div></div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-grid">';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-box"><h5>Customer / Business Details</h5><div><strong>Andrea Holdings</strong>Andrea<br>andrea@email.com<br>403-555-8800<br>Calgary, AB</div></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-box"><h5>Site Location Details</h5><div><strong>Install Address</strong>456 Example Industrial Rd SE<br>Calgary, AB<br>Door #3 - South Bay</div></div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-copy dmx-live-job-description" data-row="show_job_description"><h5>Job Description</h5><div>Confirm door size, supply and install the listed garage door materials, complete installation labour, test operation, and review finished work with the customer.</div></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-live-table"><thead data-row="show_headers"><tr>';
        echo '<th data-col="show_description">Description</th><th class="dmx-live-center" data-col="show_qty">Qty</th><th class="dmx-live-right" data-col="show_unit_cost">Unit Price</th><th class="dmx-live-right" data-col="show_amount">Amount</th><th class="dmx-live-right" data-col="show_tax">Tax</th><th class="dmx-live-right" data-col="show_total">Total</th>';
        echo '</tr></thead><tbody>';

        echo '</tbody></table></div>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-live-bottom">';

        echo '</div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<script>(function(){var root=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid) . ');if(!root){return;}var form=root.closest("form");if(!form){return;}var topbar=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-topbar') . ');var wrap=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-wrap') . ');var doc=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-doc') . ');var head=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-total-head') . ');var brandTitle=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-brand-title') . ');var docLabel=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-doc-label') . ');var docNumber=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-doc-number') . ');var docTitle=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-doc-title') . ');var summaryLabel=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-summary-label') . ');var summaryTitle=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-summary-title') . ');var liveTerms=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-terms') . ');var liveNotes=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-notes') . ');var logo=document.getElementById(' . wp_json_encode($uid . '-brand-logo') . ');var currentDoc=' . wp_json_encode($doc) . ';function q(sel){return root.querySelector(sel)||form.querySelector(sel);}function nl2br(str){return String(str||"").replace(/\r?\n/g,"<br>");}function refresh(){var base=parseInt((q("[data-dmx-preview=basefont]")||{}).value||14,10);var heading=parseInt((q("[data-dmx-preview=headingfont]")||{}).value||28,10);var logoSize=parseInt((q("[data-dmx-preview=logosize]")||{}).value||150,10);logoSize=Math.max(60,Math.min(260,logoSize));var quoteTerms=(q("[data-dmx-preview=quote_terms]")||{}).value||"Quotes are valid for 30 days unless otherwise stated.";var invoiceTerms=(q("[data-dmx-preview=invoice_terms]")||{}).value||"Payment due on receipt unless otherwise stated.";var notes=(q("[data-dmx-preview=notes]")||{}).value||"Thank you for the opportunity to quote this project.";if(topbar){topbar.style.background=accent;}if(wrap){wrap.style.background=pagebg;}if(doc){doc.style.fontSize=base+"px";doc.querySelectorAll(".dmx-live-box").forEach(function(el){el.style.borderLeftColor=accent;});doc.querySelectorAll(".dmx-live-brand-title,.dmx-live-badge strong,.dmx-live-copy h5,.dmx-live-total-head strong,.dmx-live-box strong,.dmx-live-doc-title").forEach(function(el){el.style.color=header;});doc.querySelectorAll(".dmx-live-brand-meta,.dmx-live-copy,.dmx-live-table td,.dmx-live-table th,.dmx-live-total-row span,.dmx-live-total-row strong,.dmx-live-box div,.dmx-live-box h5").forEach(function(el){el.style.fontSize=base+"px";});doc.querySelectorAll(".dmx-live-table th,.dmx-live-total-head small,.dmx-live-title-label,.dmx-live-box h5,.dmx-live-badge small").forEach(function(el){el.style.fontSize=Math.max(base-2,11)+"px";});doc.querySelectorAll(".dmx-live-total-row.is-grand").forEach(function(el){el.style.background=accent;});}if(brandTitle){brandTitle.style.fontSize=heading+"px";}if(logo){logo.style.maxWidth=logoSize+"px";logo.style.maxHeight=Math.max(42,Math.round(logoSize*0.55))+"px";}if(head){head.style.borderBottomColor=accent;}root.querySelectorAll("[data-dmx-preview-toggle]").forEach(function(toggle){var key=toggle.getAttribute("data-dmx-preview-toggle");var show=toggle.checked;if(toggle.parentNode){var label=toggle.parentNode.querySelector("span");if(label){label.textContent=show?"Visible":"Hidden";}}if(doc){doc.querySelectorAll("[data-col="+key+"],[data-row="+key+"]").forEach(function(el){el.style.display=show?"":"none";});}});if(docLabel){docLabel.textContent=currentDoc==="invoice"?"Invoice":"Quote";}if(docNumber){docNumber.textContent=currentDoc==="invoice"?"INV-1004":"QT-1004";}if(docTitle){docTitle.textContent=currentDoc==="invoice"?"Residential         echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_attachment_settings() {
        $saved = get_option('dmx_attachment_settings', array());
        if (!is_array($saved)) {
            $saved = array();
        }
        return $saved;
    }

    private function save_attachment_settings($tab = 'settings') {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_settings()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'error', 'You do not have permission to save company settings.');
        }

        $rows = array();
        if (!empty($_POST['dmx_attachment']) && is_array($_POST['dmx_attachment']['name'])) {
            $count = count($_POST['dmx_attachment']['name']);
            for ($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) {
                $name = sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_attachment']['name'][$i] ?? '');
                if ($name === '') {
                    continue;
                }
                $rows[] = array(
                    'name' => $name,
                    'date' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_attachment']['date'][$i] ?? ''),
                    'size' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_attachment']['size'][$i] ?? ''),
                    'quote' => !empty($_POST['dmx_attachment']['quote'][$i]) ? 'yes' : 'no',
                    'invoice' => !empty($_POST['dmx_attachment']['invoice'][$i]) ? 'yes' : 'no',
                    'job' => !empty($_POST['dmx_attachment']['job'][$i]) ? 'yes' : 'no',
                );
            }
        }
        update_option('dmx_attachment_settings', $rows);
        $this->redirect_with_message('settings', 'success', 'Attachment settings saved.');
    }

    private function render_settings_attachments_page() {
        $rows = $this->get_attachment_settings();
        if (empty($rows)) {
            $rows = array(
                array('name' => 'Warranty PDF', 'date' => date_i18n('Y-m-d'), 'size' => '240 KB', 'quote' => 'yes', 'invoice' => 'yes', 'job' => 'no'),
                array('name' => 'Care and Maintenance', 'date' => date_i18n('Y-m-d'), 'size' => '180 KB', 'quote' => 'yes', 'invoice' => 'no', 'job' => 'yes'),
            );
        }
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-card"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Attachment Settings</h3><p>Upload files later if needed, but you can already assign attachment names to quotes, invoices, and job sheets here.</p>';
        echo '<div class="dmx-action-row" style="margin-bottom:16px;"><a class="dmx-btn" href="#">Upload Files</a><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="#">Google Drive</a><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="#">Dropbox</a></div>';
        echo '<form method="post">';
        wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="save_attachment_settings"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="settings"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="settings_attachments">';
        echo '<table class="dmx-simple-table"><thead><tr><th>File Name</th><th>Add Date</th><th>File Size</th><th>Q</th><th>I</th><th>J</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        foreach ($rows as $i => $row) {
            echo '<tr>';
            echo '<td><input type="text" name="dmx_attachment[name][]" value="' . esc_attr($row['name']) . '"></td>';
            echo '<td><input type="text" name="dmx_attachment[date][]" value="' . esc_attr($row['date']) . '"></td>';
            echo '<td><input type="text" name="dmx_attachment[size][]" value="' . esc_attr($row['size']) . '"></td>';
            echo '<td><input type="checkbox" name="dmx_attachment[quote][' . $i . ']" value="yes"' . checked($row['quote'],'yes',false) . '></td>';
            echo '<td><input type="checkbox" name="dmx_attachment[invoice][' . $i . ']" value="yes"' . checked($row['invoice'],'yes',false) . '></td>';
            echo '<td><input type="checkbox" name="dmx_attachment[job][' . $i . ']" value="yes"' . checked($row['job'],'yes',false) . '></td>';
            echo '</tr>';
        }
        echo '</tbody></table><div style="margin-top:16px;"><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Attachments</button></div></form></div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_sales_draft_invoices() {
        $invoices = $this->get_posts_for_user('dm_invoice', 50);
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-card"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Draft / Upcoming Invoices</h3><div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Invoice</th><th>Customer</th><th>Status</th><th>Total</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        $count = 0;
        foreach ($invoices as $invoice) {
            $status = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true);
            if (!in_array($status, array('draft','pending'), true)) { continue; }
            $count++;
            echo '<tr><td>' . esc_html($invoice->post_title) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)) . '</td><td>' . $this->status_pill($status) . '</td><td>' . esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true)) . '</td></tr>';
        }
        if ($count === 0) {
            echo '<tr><td colspan="4"><div class="dmx-empty">No draft or upcoming invoices yet.</div></td></tr>';
        }
        echo '</tbody></table></div></div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }


    private function render_sales_work_orders() {
        $work_orders = $this->get_posts_for_user('dm_work_order', 50);
        $technicians = $this->get_schedule_team_users(array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE));
        $crew_members = $this->get_schedule_team_users(array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE));
        $salespeople = $this->get_schedule_team_users(array(self::SALES_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::MANAGER_ROLE));
        $can_manage_work_orders = $this->current_user_can_create_work_orders();
        $quote_options = $this->get_quote_select_options();
        $work_order_parts = $this->get_parts_for_quote_builder();
        $customer_lookup = $this->get_customers_for_lookup();
        $equipment_type_options = $this->get_work_order_equipment_type_options();
        $equipment_source_options = $this->get_work_order_equipment_source_options();
        $work_order_part_options_html = '';
        $work_order_part_lookup = array();
        foreach ($work_order_parts as $work_order_part) {
            $work_order_part_lookup[(string) $work_order_part['id']] = $work_order_part;
            $work_order_part_options_html .= '<option value="' . esc_attr($work_order_part['label']) . '"></option>';
        }

        $edit_work_order_id = absint($_GET['dmx_edit_work_order'] ?? 0);
        $edit_work_order = null;
        $edit_work_order_meta = array(
            'number' => '',
            'title' => '',
            'work_order_date' => date('Y-m-d'),
            'work_order_order_date' => date('Y-m-d'),
            'work_order_status' => 'draft',
            'work_order_job_type' => 'service_call',
            'work_order_billing_type' => 'billable',
            'work_order_linked_quote_id' => '',
            'work_order_schedule_date' => '',
            'work_order_schedule_start_time' => '',
            'work_order_schedule_end_time' => '',
            'work_order_schedule_note' => '',
            'work_order_primary_technician' => '',
            'work_order_additional_technicians' => array(),
            'work_order_requires_warehouse_pull' => 'yes',
            'work_order_equipment_required' => 'no',
            'work_order_equipment_type' => '',
            'work_order_equipment_source' => 'owned',
            'work_order_equipment_unit' => '',
            'work_order_equipment_vendor' => '',
            'work_order_equipment_notes' => '',
            'work_order_customer_id' => '',
            'work_order_bill_to_company' => '',
            'work_order_service_location_name' => '',
            'work_order_bill_to_address' => '',
            'work_order_service_location_address' => '',
            'work_order_bill_to_phone' => '',
            'work_order_bill_to_attention' => '',
            'work_order_service_location_phone' => '',
            'work_order_service_location_attention' => '',
            'work_order_pre_visit_comments' => '',
            'work_order_customer_issue' => '',
            'work_order_po_number' => '',
            'work_order_customer_number' => '',
            'work_order_salesperson' => '',
            'work_order_ship_via' => '',
            'work_order_terms' => '',
            'work_order_onsite_comments' => '',
            'work_order_customer_signature' => '',
            'item_rows' => array(),
            'labour_rows' => array(),
        );

        if ($edit_work_order_id > 0 && $this->current_user_can_access_work_order($edit_work_order_id)) {
            $edit_work_order = get_post($edit_work_order_id);
            if ($edit_work_order) {
                $edit_work_order_meta['number'] = $this->get_document_number('work_order', $edit_work_order_id);
                $edit_work_order_meta['title'] = $edit_work_order->post_title;
                $meta_fields = array(
                    'work_order_date',
                    'work_order_order_date',
                    'work_order_status',
                    'work_order_job_type',
                    'work_order_billing_type',
                    'work_order_linked_quote_id',
                    'work_order_schedule_date',
                    'work_order_schedule_start_time',
                    'work_order_schedule_end_time',
                    'work_order_schedule_note',
                    'work_order_equipment_required',
                    'work_order_equipment_type',
                    'work_order_equipment_source',
                    'work_order_equipment_unit',
                    'work_order_equipment_vendor',
                    'work_order_equipment_notes',
                    'work_order_primary_technician',
                    'work_order_requires_warehouse_pull',
                    'work_order_customer_id',
                    'work_order_bill_to_company',
                    'work_order_service_location_name',
                    'work_order_bill_to_address',
                    'work_order_service_location_address',
                    'work_order_bill_to_phone',
                    'work_order_bill_to_attention',
                    'work_order_service_location_phone',
                    'work_order_service_location_attention',
                    'work_order_pre_visit_comments',
                    'work_order_customer_issue',
                    'work_order_po_number',
                    'work_order_customer_number',
                    'work_order_salesperson',
                    'work_order_ship_via',
                    'work_order_terms',
                    'work_order_customer_signature',
                );
                foreach ($meta_fields as $meta_field) {
                    $value = get_post_meta($edit_work_order_id, '_dmx_' . $meta_field, true);
                    if (is_array($value)) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    if ($value !== '') {
                        $edit_work_order_meta[$meta_field] = $value;
                    }
                }
                $edit_work_order_meta['work_order_onsite_comments'] = get_post_meta($edit_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_onsite_comments', true);
                $edit_work_order_meta['work_order_additional_technicians'] = get_post_meta($edit_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_additional_technicians', true);
                $edit_work_order_meta['item_rows'] = get_post_meta($edit_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_item_rows', true);
                $edit_work_order_meta['labour_rows'] = get_post_meta($edit_work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_labour_rows', true);

                if (!is_array($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_additional_technicians'])) {
                    $edit_work_order_meta['work_order_additional_technicians'] = array();
                }
                if (!is_array($edit_work_order_meta['item_rows'])) {
                    $edit_work_order_meta['item_rows'] = array();
                }
                if (!is_array($edit_work_order_meta['labour_rows'])) {
                    $edit_work_order_meta['labour_rows'] = array();
                }
            }
        }

        if (empty($edit_work_order_meta['item_rows'])) {
            $edit_work_order_meta['item_rows'] = array(
                array('part_id' => '', 'qty_ord' => '', 'uom' => '', 'qty_ship' => '', 'item_number' => '', 'description' => ''),
            );
        }

        if (empty($edit_work_order_meta['labour_rows'])) {
            $edit_work_order_meta['labour_rows'] = array(
                array('date' => '', 'employee' => '', 'hours' => '', 'reg' => '', 'ot' => ''),
            );
        }

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Work Orders</h3>
                <p>Use the same key fields from your paper work order: bill to, service site, customer problem, pre-visit comments, parts used, labour hours, on-site comments, and customer signature.</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <?php if ($edit_work_order && !$can_manage_work_orders) : ?>
        <?php echo $this->render_work_order_readonly_view($edit_work_order, $edit_work_order_meta, $is_admin); ?>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <?php if ($can_manage_work_orders) : ?>
        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title"><?php echo $edit_work_order ? 'Edit Work Order' : 'Create New Work Order'; ?></h4>
            <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="<?php echo $edit_work_order ? 'update_work_order' : 'create_work_order'; ?>">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="work_orders">
                <input type="hidden" name="work_order_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_work_order ? $edit_work_order->ID : 0); ?>">

                <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Work Order Number</label>
                        <input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_work_order ? $edit_work_order_meta['number'] : 'Auto-generated when saved'); ?>" readonly>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Work Order Title</label>
                        <input type="text" name="work_order_title" placeholder="Annual service - Calgary #16" required value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_work_order_meta['title']); ?>">
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Date</label>
                        <input type="date" name="work_order_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_date']); ?>">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Order Date</label>
                        <input type="date" name="work_order_order_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_order_date']); ?>">
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Status</label>
                        <select name="work_order_status">
                            <option value="draft" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_status'], 'draft'); ?>>Draft</option>
                            <option value="pending" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_status'], 'pending'); ?>>Pending</option>
                            <option value="scheduled" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_status'], 'scheduled'); ?>>Scheduled</option>
                            <option value="invoicing" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_status'], 'invoicing'); ?>>Converted to Invoice</option>
                            <option value="return_required" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_status'], 'return_required'); ?>>Return Required / Needs Reschedule</option>
                            <option value="complete" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_status'], 'complete'); ?>>Complete</option>
                            <option value="cancelled" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_status'], 'cancelled'); ?>>Cancelled</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Job Type</label>
                        <select name="work_order_job_type">
                            <option value="service_call" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_job_type'], 'service_call'); ?>>Service Call</option>
                            <option value="install" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_job_type'], 'install'); ?>>Install</option>
                            <option value="warranty" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_job_type'], 'warranty'); ?>>Warranty</option>
                            <option value="callback" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_job_type'], 'callback'); ?>>Callback</option>
                            <option value="inspection" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_job_type'], 'inspection'); ?>>Inspection</option>
                            <option value="sales_appointment" <?php selected($edit_work_order_meta['work_order_job_type'], 'sales_appointment'); ?>>Sales Appointment</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Billing Type</label>

'&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=work_orders') : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'), get_permalink())); ?>" style="margin-left:8px;">Cancel Edit</a>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </form>
        </div>

        <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            var workOrderParts = <?php echo wp_json_encode(array_values($work_order_parts)); ?>;
            var customers = <?php echo wp_json_encode(array_values($customer_lookup)); ?>;
            var workOrderCustomerSelect = document.getElementById('dmx_work_order_customer_select');
            var workOrderCustomerSearchInput = document.querySelector('input[name="work_order_customer_search"]');
            var workOrderBillToInput = document.querySelector('input[name="work_order_bill_to_company"]');
            var workOrderBillToAddressInput = document.querySelector('textarea[name="work_order_bill_to_address"]');
            var workOrderBillToPhoneInput = document.querySelector('input[name="work_order_bill_to_phone"]');
            var workOrderBillToAttentionInput = document.querySelector('input[name="work_order_bill_to_attention"]');
            var workOrderServiceLocationNameInput = document.querySelector('input[name="work_order_service_location_name"]');
            var workOrderServiceLocationAddressInput = document.querySelector('textarea[name="work_order_service_location_address"]');
            var workOrderServiceLocationPhoneInput = document.querySelector('input[name="work_order_service_location_phone"]');
            var workOrderServiceLocationAttentionInput = document.querySelector('input[name="work_order_service_location_attention"]');
            var workOrderAddressInputs = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('.dmx-work-order-address-search'));
            var workOrderPartMap = {};

            workOrderParts.forEach(function(part) {
                workOrderPartMap[String(part.id)] = part;
            });

            function escapeHtml(str) {
                return String(str || '')
                    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
                    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
                    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
                    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
                    .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');
            }

            function getCustomerMatches(query) {
                var value = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();

                if (!value) {
                    return customers.slice(0, 10);
                }

                return customers.filter(function(customer) {
                    var haystack = [
                        customer.label || '',
                        customer.name || '',
                        customer.company || '',
                        customer.email || '',
                        customer.phone || '',
                        customer.address_summary || ''
                    ].join(' ').toLowerCase();

                    return haystack.indexOf(value) !== -1;
                }).slice(0, 12);
            }

            function closeCustomerLookupResults(lookupWrap) {
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }
                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (results) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                }
            }

            function fillWorkOrderCustomer(customer, options) {
                if (!customer) {
                    return;
                }

                options = options || {};
                var force = options.force === true;
                var companyOrName = customer.company || customer.name || customer.title || '';
                var personName = customer.name || customer.title || customer.company || '';
                var addressSummary = customer.address_summary || '';

                if (workOrderCustomerSelect && customer.id) {
                    workOrderCustomerSelect.value = String(customer.id);
                }
                if (workOrderCustomerSearchInput) {
                    workOrderCustomerSearchInput.value = companyOrName;
                }
                if (workOrderBillToInput) {
                    workOrderBillToInput.value = companyOrName;
                }
                if (workOrderBillToAddressInput && addressSummary) {
                    workOrderBillToAddressInput.value = addressSummary;
                }
                if (workOrderBillToPhoneInput && customer.phone) {
                    workOrderBillToPhoneInput.value = customer.phone;
                }
                if (workOrderBillToAttentionInput) {
                    workOrderBillToAttentionInput.value = personName;
                }

                if (workOrderServiceLocationNameInput && (force || !workOrderServiceLocationNameInput.value.trim())) {
                    workOrderServiceLocationNameInput.value = companyOrName;
                }
                if (workOrderServiceLocationAddressInput && addressSummary && (force || !workOrderServiceLocationAddressInput.value.trim())) {
                    workOrderServiceLocationAddressInput.value = addressSummary;
                }
                if (workOrderServiceLocationPhoneInput && customer.phone && (force || !workOrderServiceLocationPhoneInput.value.trim())) {
                    workOrderServiceLocationPhoneInput.value = customer.phone;
                }
                if (workOrderServiceLocationAttentionInput && (force || !workOrderServiceLocationAttentionInput.value.trim())) {
                    workOrderServiceLocationAttentionInput.value = personName;
                }
            }

            function findExactCustomerMatch(value) {
                var needle = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                if (!needle) {
                    return null;
                }

                for (var i = 0; i < customers.length; i++) {
                    var customer = customers[i];
                    var fields = [customer.label, customer.name, customer.company, customer.email, customer.phone];
                    for (var j = 0; j < fields.length; j++) {
                        if (String(fields[j] || '').trim().toLowerCase() === needle) {
                            return customer;
                        }
                    }
                }

                return null;
            }

            function findCustomerById(id) {
                var targetId = String(id || '');
                if (!targetId) {
                    return null;
                }
                for (var i = 0; i < customers.length; i++) {
                    if (String(customers[i].id || '') === targetId) {
                        return customers[i];
                    }
                }
                return null;
            }

            function getAddressMatches(query) {
                var value = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                if (!value) {
                    return customers.filter(function(customer) {
                        return String(customer.address_summary || '').trim() !== '';
                    }).slice(0, 10);
                }

                return customers.filter(function(customer) {
                    var haystack = [
                        customer.address_summary || '',
                        customer.address_1 || '',
                        customer.address_2 || '',
                        customer.city || '',
                        customer.province || '',
                        customer.postal_code || '',
                        customer.company || '',
                        customer.name || ''
                    ].join(' ').toLowerCase();

                    return String(customer.address_summary || '').trim() !== '' && haystack.indexOf(value) !== -1;
                }).slice(0, 12);
            }

            function findExactAddressMatch(value) {
                var needle = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                if (!needle) {
                    return null;
                }

                for (var i = 0; i < customers.length; i++) {
                    var customer = customers[i];
                    var fields = [customer.address_summary, customer.address_1];
                    for (var j = 0; j < fields.length; j++) {
                        if (String(fields[j] || '').trim().toLowerCase() === needle) {
                            return customer;
                        }
                    }
                }

                return null;
            }

            function renderAddressLookupResults(addressEl) {
                if (!addressEl) {
                    return;
                }

                var lookupWrap = addressEl.closest('.dmx-work-order-address-lookup');
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }

                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (!results) {
                    return;
                }

                var matches = getAddressMatches(addressEl.value);
                if (!matches.length) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                    return;
                }

                results.innerHTML = matches.map(function(customer) {
                    return '<button type="button" class="dmx-work-order-part-option" data-customer-id="' + escapeHtml(customer.id) + '">' +
                        '<strong>' + escapeHtml(customer.address_summary || '') + '</strong>' +
                        '<span>' + escapeHtml(customer.company || customer.name || customer.title || '') + (customer.phone ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.phone) : '') + '</span>' +
                    '</button>';
                }).join('');

                results.classList.add('is-open');

                Array.prototype.slice.call(results.querySelectorAll('.dmx-work-order-part-option')).forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                    });
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        var selectedCustomer = findCustomerById(btn.getAttribute('data-customer-id'));
                        if (selectedCustomer) {
                            fillWorkOrderCustomer(selectedCustomer, { force: true });
                        }
                        closeCustomerLookupResults(lookupWrap);
                    });
                });
            }

            function renderCustomerLookupResults(searchEl) {
                if (!searchEl) {
                    return;
                }

                var lookupWrap = searchEl.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup');
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }

                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (!results) {
                    return;
                }

                var matches = getCustomerMatches(searchEl.value);
                if (!matches.length) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                    return;
                }

                results.innerHTML = matches.map(function(customer) {
                    return '<button type="button" class="dmx-work-order-part-option" data-customer-id="' + escapeHtml(customer.id) + '">' +
                        '<strong>' + escapeHtml((customer.customer_number ? customer.customer_number + ' • ' : '') + (customer.company || customer.name || customer.title || '')) + '</strong>' +
                        '<span>' + escapeHtml(customer.name || '') + (customer.email ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.email) : '') + (customer.phone ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.phone) : '') + (customer.address_summary ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(customer.address_summary) : '') + '</span>' +
                    '</button>';
                }).join('');

                results.classList.add('is-open');

                Array.prototype.slice.call(results.querySelectorAll('.dmx-work-order-part-option')).forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                    });
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        var selectedCustomer = null;
                        var targetId = String(btn.getAttribute('data-customer-id') || '');
                        customers.forEach(function(customer) {
                            if (String(customer.id || '') === targetId) {
                                selectedCustomer = customer;
                            }
                        });
                        if (selectedCustomer) {
                            fillWorkOrderCustomer(selectedCustomer, { force: true });
                        }
                        closeCustomerLookupResults(lookupWrap);
                    });
                });
            }

            function bindWorkOrderCustomerLookup() {
                if (workOrderCustomerSelect && workOrderCustomerSelect.dataset.bound !== 'yes') {
                    workOrderCustomerSelect.dataset.bound = 'yes';
                    workOrderCustomerSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
                        var selectedCustomer = findCustomerById(workOrderCustomerSelect.value);
                        if (selectedCustomer) {
                            fillWorkOrderCustomer(selectedCustomer, { force: true });
                        }
                    });
                }

                if (workOrderCustomerSearchInput && workOrderCustomerSearchInput.dataset.bound !== 'yes') {
                    workOrderCustomerSearchInput.dataset.bound = 'yes';

                    workOrderCustomerSearchInput.addEventListener('focus', function() {
                        renderCustomerLookupResults(workOrderCustomerSearchInput);
                    });

                    workOrderCustomerSearchInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                        renderCustomerLookupResults(workOrderCustomerSearchInput);
                    });

                    workOrderCustomerSearchInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
                        var match = findExactCustomerMatch(workOrderCustomerSearchInput.value);
                        if (match) {
                            fillWorkOrderCustomer(match, { force: true });
                        }
                    });

                    workOrderCustomerSearchInput.addEventListener('blur', function() {
                        window.setTimeout(function() {
                            closeCustomerLookupResults(workOrderCustomerSearchInput.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
                        }, 150);
                    });
                }

                workOrderAddressInputs.forEach(function(addressEl) {
                    if (!addressEl || addressEl.dataset.bound === 'yes') {
                        return;
                    }
                    addressEl.dataset.bound = 'yes';

                    addressEl.addEventListener('focus', function() {
                        renderAddressLookupResults(addressEl);
                    });

                    addressEl.addEventListener('input', function() {
                        renderAddressLookupResults(addressEl);
                    });

                    addressEl.addEventListener('change', function() {
                        var match = findExactAddressMatch(addressEl.value);
                        if (match) {
                            fillWorkOrderCustomer(match, { force: true });
                        }
                    });

                    addressEl.addEventListener('blur', function() {
                        window.setTimeout(function() {
                            closeCustomerLookupResults(addressEl.closest('.dmx-work-order-address-lookup'));
                        }, 150);
                    });
                });
            }

            function updateWorkOrderRowNames(tableBody, prefix, fields) {
                Array.prototype.slice.call(tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr')).forEach(function(row, index) {
                    row.setAttribute('data-row-index', index);
                    fields.forEach(function(field) {
                        var input = row.querySelector('[data-field="' + field + '"]');
                        if (input) {
                            input.name = prefix + '[' + index + '][' + field + ']';
                        }
                    });
                });
            }

            function fillWorkOrderRowFromPart(row, part) {
                if (!row || !part) {
                    return;
                }

                var partIdInput = row.querySelector('[data-field="part_id"]');
                var searchInput = row.querySelector('[data-field="search"]');
                var itemNumberInput = row.querySelector('[data-field="item_number"]');
                var descriptionInput = row.querySelector('[data-field="description"]');
                var uomInput = row.querySelector('[data-field="uom"]');

                if (partIdInput) {
                    partIdInput.value = part.id || '';
                }
                if (searchInput) {
                    searchInput.value = part.label || part.title || '';
                }
                if (itemNumberInput) {
                    itemNumberInput.value = part.sku || '';
                }
                if (descriptionInput) {
                    descriptionInput.value = part.description || part.title || '';
                }
                if (uomInput && !uomInput.value) {
                    uomInput.value = 'EA';
                }
            }

            function getWorkOrderPartMatches(query) {
                var value = String(query || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                var items = workOrderParts.slice(0);

                if (!value) {
                    return items.slice(0, 10);
                }

                return items.filter(function(part) {
                    var haystack = [
                        part.label || '',
                        part.title || '',
                        part.description || '',
                        part.sku || ''
                    ].join(' ').toLowerCase();

                    return haystack.indexOf(value) !== -1;
                }).slice(0, 12);
            }

            function closeWorkOrderResults(lookupWrap) {
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }
                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (results) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                }
            }

            function renderWorkOrderResults(searchEl) {
                if (!searchEl) {
                    return;
                }

                var lookupWrap = searchEl.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup');
                if (!lookupWrap) {
                    return;
                }

                var results = lookupWrap.querySelector('.dmx-work-order-part-results');
                if (!results) {
                    return;
                }

                var matches = getWorkOrderPartMatches(searchEl.value);
                if (!matches.length) {
                    results.innerHTML = '';
                    results.classList.remove('is-open');
                    return;
                }

                results.innerHTML = matches.map(function(part) {
                    return '<button type="button" class="dmx-work-order-part-option" data-part-id="' + escapeHtml(part.id) + '">' +
                        '<strong>' + escapeHtml(part.label || part.title || '') + '</strong>' +
                        '<span>' + escapeHtml(part.sku || '') + (part.description ? ' • ' + escapeHtml(part.description) : '') + '</span>' +
                    '</button>';
                }).join('');

                results.classList.add('is-open');

                Array.prototype.slice.call(results.querySelectorAll('.dmx-work-order-part-option')).forEach(function(btn) {
                    btn.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                    });
                    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        var part = workOrderPartMap[String(btn.getAttribute('data-part-id') || '')];
                        var row = searchEl.closest('tr');
                        fillWorkOrderRowFromPart(row, part);
                        closeWorkOrderResults(lookupWrap);
                    });
                });
            }

            function bindWorkOrderPartSelectors(tbody) {
                Array.prototype.slice.call(tbody.querySelectorAll('.dmx-work-order-part-search')).forEach(function(searchEl) {
                    if (searchEl.dataset.bound === 'yes') {
                        return;
                    }
                    searchEl.dataset.bound = 'yes';

                    searchEl.addEventListener('focus', function() {
                        renderWorkOrderResults(searchEl);
                    });

                    searchEl.addEventListener('input', function() {
                        var row = searchEl.closest('tr');
                        var partIdInput = row ? row.querySelector('[data-field="part_id"]') : null;
                        if (partIdInput) {
                            partIdInput.value = '';
                        }
                        renderWorkOrderResults(searchEl);
                    });

                    searchEl.addEventListener('blur', function() {
                        var row = searchEl.closest('tr');
                        var partIdInput = row ? row.querySelector('[data-field="part_id"]') : null;

                        window.setTimeout(function() {
                            if (partIdInput && !partIdInput.value && !searchEl.value.trim()) {
                                searchEl.value = '';
                            }
                            closeWorkOrderResults(searchEl.closest('.dmx-work-order-part-lookup'));
                        }, 150);
                    });
                });
            }

            function setupDynamicWorkOrderTable(tableId, addBtnId, prefix, rowTemplate, fields, afterBind) {
                var table = document.getElementById(tableId);
                var addBtn = document.getElementById(addBtnId);
                if (!table || !addBtn) {
                    return;
                }
                var tbody = table.querySelector('tbody');

                function bindRemoveButtons() {
                    Array.prototype.slice.call(tbody.querySelectorAll('.dmx-remove-work-order-row')).forEach(function(btn) {
                        btn.onclick = function() {
                            if (tbody.querySelectorAll('tr').length <= 1) {
                                var row = btn.closest('tr');
                                Array.prototype.slice.call(row.querySelectorAll('input, textarea, select')).forEach(function(field) {
                                    if (field.tagName === 'SELECT') {
                                        field.selectedIndex = 0;
                                    } else {
                                        field.value = '';
                                    }
                                });
                                return;
                            }
                            btn.closest('tr').remove();
                            updateWorkOrderRowNames(tbody, prefix, fields);
                        };
                    });
                }

                addBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    var nextIndex = tbody.querySelectorAll('tr').length;
                    var html = rowTemplate.replace(/__INDEX__/g, String(nextIndex));
                    tbody.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html);
                    updateWorkOrderRowNames(tbody, prefix, fields);
                    bindRemoveButtons();
                    if (typeof afterBind === 'function') {
                        afterBind(tbody);
                    }
                });

                updateWorkOrderRowNames(tbody, prefix, fields);
                bindRemoveButtons();
                if (typeof afterBind === 'function') {
                    afterBind(tbody);
                }
            }

            bindWorkOrderCustomerLookup();

            setupDynamicWorkOrderTable(
                'dmx-work-order-items-table',
                'dmx_add_work_order_item_row',
                'work_order_item_rows',
                '<tr data-row-index="__INDEX__">' +
                    '<td data-label="Qty. Ord."><input type="text" data-field="qty_ord" name="work_order_item_rows[__INDEX__][qty_ord]"></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="UOM"><input type="text" data-field="uom" name="work_order_item_rows[__INDEX__][uom]"></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="Qty. Ship"><input type="text" data-field="qty_ship" name="work_order_item_rows[__INDEX__][qty_ship]"></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="Parts Library"><div class="dmx-work-order-part-lookup"><input type="hidden" data-field="part_id" class="dmx-work-order-part-id" name="work_order_item_rows[__INDEX__][part_id]"><input type="text" data-field="search" class="dmx-work-order-part-search" name="work_order_item_rows[__INDEX__][search]" placeholder="Search Parts Library" autocomplete="off"><div class="dmx-work-order-part-results"></div></div></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="Item Number"><input type="text" data-field="item_number" name="work_order_item_rows[__INDEX__][item_number]"></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="Description / Service Technician Notes"><textarea data-field="description" name="work_order_item_rows[__INDEX__][description]" rows="2" placeholder="Please describe all work done."></textarea></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="Remove"><button type="button" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary dmx-remove-work-order-row">Remove</button></td>' +
                '</tr>',
                ['qty_ord', 'uom', 'qty_ship', 'part_id', 'search', 'item_number', 'description'],
                function(tbody) {
                    bindWorkOrderPartSelectors(tbody);
                }
            );

            setupDynamicWorkOrderTable(
                'dmx-work-order-labour-table',
                'dmx_add_work_order_labour_row',
                'work_order_labour_rows',
                '<tr data-row-index="__INDEX__">' +
                    '<td data-label="Date"><input type="date" data-field="date" name="work_order_labour_rows[__INDEX__][date]"></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="Employee"><input type="text" data-field="employee" name="work_order_labour_rows[__INDEX__][employee]"></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="Hours"><input type="text" data-field="hours" name="work_order_labour_rows[__INDEX__][hours]"></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="Reg."><input type="text" data-field="reg" name="work_order_labour_rows[__INDEX__][reg]"></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="OT"><input type="text" data-field="ot" name="work_order_labour_rows[__INDEX__][ot]"></td>' +
                    '<td data-label="Remove"><button type="button" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary dmx-remove-work-order-row">Remove</button></td>' +
                '</tr>',
                ['date', 'employee', 'hours', 'reg', 'ot']
            );
        });
        </script>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title"><?php echo $this->current_user_is_technician() ? 'My Assigned Work Orders' : 'Work Order History'; ?></h4>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                <table class="dmx-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>WO #</th>
                            <th>Work Order</th>
                            <th>Bill To</th>
                            <th>Service Site</th>
                            <th>Order Date</th>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <th>Equipment</th>
                            <th>Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <?php if ($work_orders) : foreach ($work_orders as $work_order) : ?>
                            <tr>
                                <?php $work_order_open_url = ($is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=work_orders&dmx_edit_work_order=' . $work_order->ID) : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders', 'dmx_edit_work_order' => $work_order->ID), get_permalink())); ?>
                                <td><a href="<?php echo esc_url($work_order_open_url); ?>"><strong><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order->ID)); ?></strong></a></td>
                                <td><a href="<?php echo esc_url($work_order_open_url); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($work_order->post_title); ?></a></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_bill_to_company', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_service_location_name', true)); ?></td>
