                                <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_order_date', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo $this->status_pill(get_post_meta($work_order->ID, '_dmx_work_order_status', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php $history_equipment_label = $this->format_work_order_equipment_label($work_order->ID, false); echo esc_html($history_equipment_label !== '' ? $history_equipment_label : ''); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="dmx-action-row" style="gap:8px;">
                                        <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($work_order_open_url); ?>"><?php echo $can_manage_work_orders ? 'Open / Edit' : 'Open'; ?></a>
                                        <?php if ($is_admin): ?>
                                            <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('post.php?post=' . $work_order->ID . '&action=edit')); ?>">Open in Admin</a>
                                        <?php endif; ?>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; else : ?>
                            <tr><td colspan="8"><div class="dmx-empty">No work orders found yet.</div></td></tr>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }


    private function render_work_order_readonly_view($work_order, $work_order_meta = array(), $is_admin = false) {
        if (!$work_order) {
            return '';
        }

        $work_order_id = (int) $work_order->ID;
        $number = $work_order_meta['number'] ?? $this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order_id);
        $item_rows = isset($work_order_meta['item_rows']) && is_array($work_order_meta['item_rows']) ? $work_order_meta['item_rows'] : array();
        $labour_rows = isset($work_order_meta['labour_rows']) && is_array($work_order_meta['labour_rows']) ? $work_order_meta['labour_rows'] : array();
        $crew = $this->get_work_order_schedule_summary($work_order_id);
        $schedule_bits = array_filter(array(
            $work_order_meta['work_order_schedule_date'] ?? '',
            trim((string) (($work_order_meta['work_order_schedule_start_time'] ?? '') . ' - ' . ($work_order_meta['work_order_schedule_end_time'] ?? '')), ' -'),
        ));

        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <div class="dmx-page-head" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Work Order Details</h4>
                    <p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin-top:0;">Viewing <?php echo esc_html($number); ?>.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-action-row">
                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG . '&dmx_tab=sales&dmx_subtab=work_orders') : add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'work_orders'), get_permalink())); ?>">Back to Work Orders</a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Work Order Number</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr($number); ?>" readonly></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Work Order Title</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order->post_title); ?>" readonly></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Status</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $work_order_meta['work_order_status'] ?? 'draft'))); ?>" readonly></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Bill To</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order_meta['work_order_bill_to_company'] ?? ''); ?>" readonly></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Service Site</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order_meta['work_order_service_location_name'] ?? ''); ?>" readonly></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Scheduled</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr(implode(' • ', $schedule_bits)); ?>" readonly></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Job Type</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $work_order_meta['work_order_job_type'] ?? 'service_call'))); ?>" readonly></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Billing Type</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $work_order_meta['work_order_billing_type'] ?? 'billable'))); ?>" readonly></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Technician / Crew</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr($crew); ?>" readonly></div>
                <?php $readonly_equipment_label = $this->format_work_order_equipment_label($work_order_id); ?>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Equipment Needed</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr($readonly_equipment_label !== '' ? $readonly_equipment_label : 'No equipment selected'); ?>" readonly></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Equipment Notes</label><input type="text" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_equipment_notes', true)); ?>" readonly></div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Customer Issue</label>
                    <textarea rows="4" readonly><?php echo esc_textarea($work_order_meta['work_order_customer_issue'] ?? ''); ?></textarea>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Pre-Visit Comments</label>
                    <textarea rows="4" readonly><?php echo esc_textarea($work_order_meta['work_order_pre_visit_comments'] ?? ''); ?></textarea>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Schedule Note</label>
                    <textarea rows="3" readonly><?php echo esc_textarea($work_order_meta['work_order_schedule_note'] ?? ''); ?></textarea>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>On-Site Comments</label>
                    <textarea rows="3" readonly><?php echo esc_textarea($work_order_meta['work_order_onsite_comments'] ?? ''); ?></textarea>
                </div>
            </div>

            <?php
            $work_order_status_key = sanitize_key((string) ($work_order_meta['work_order_status'] ?? get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_status', true)));
            $existing_invoice_id = absint(get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_converted_invoice_id', true));
            $actual_hours_saved = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_actual_hours', true);
            $completed_at_saved = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completed_at', true);
            $completion_notes_saved = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_completion_notes', true);
            $enabled_payment_methods = $this->get_enabled_sales_payment_method_labels();
            ?>
            <?php
            $return_required = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_required', true);
            $return_reason = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_reason', true);
            $return_parts_needed = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_parts_needed', true);
            $return_notes = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_notes', true);
            $return_suggested_date = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_suggested_date', true);
            $return_suggested_time = get_post_meta($work_order_id, '_dmx_work_order_return_suggested_time', true);
            ?>
            <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px; border-color:#bdd7ef; background:#f8fbff;">
                <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                    <div>
                        <h5 class="dmx-panel-title" style="font-size:16px; margin-bottom:6px;">Convert Work Order to Invoice</h5>
                        <p>This is the technician closeout flow. Convert the work order first, then add final parts used, actual time, and payment status on the invoice.</p>
                    </div>
                    <?php if ($existing_invoice_id > 0 && get_post_type($existing_invoice_id) === 'dm_invoice') : ?>
                        <a class="dmx-btn" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_sales_invoice_edit_url($existing_invoice_id)); ?>">Open Invoice</a>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </div>

                <?php if ($existing_invoice_id > 0 && get_post_type($existing_invoice_id) === 'dm_invoice') : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-success" style="margin-bottom:14px;">This work order has already been converted to an invoice. Open the invoice to add final parts, actual hours, and payment details.</div>
                <?php else : ?>
                    <form method="post">
                        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="convert_work_order_to_invoice">
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="work_orders">
                        <input type="hidden" name="work_order_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order_id); ?>">
                        <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Convert Work Order to Invoice</button>
                    </form>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px; border-color:#f0d49b; background:#fffaf1;">
                <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                    <div>
                        <h5 class="dmx-panel-title" style="font-size:16px; margin-bottom:6px;">Need to Go Back / Return Required</h5>
                        <p>Use this when the job cannot be completed because parts are missing, wrong, not on the truck, or the customer needs a new appointment.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <?php if ($return_required === 'yes') : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-message dmx-message-error" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Return visit is flagged for this work order.</div>
                <?php endif; ?>

                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="mark_work_order_return_required">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="work_orders">
                    <input type="hidden" name="work_order_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order_id); ?>">

                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Reason</label>
                            <select name="work_order_return_reason">
                                <option value="parts_not_on_truck" <?php selected($return_reason, 'parts_not_on_truck'); ?>>Parts not on truck</option>
                                <option value="supplier_missing_parts" <?php selected($return_reason, 'supplier_missing_parts'); ?>>Supplier missed parts</option>
                                <option value="wrong_parts_supplied" <?php selected($return_reason, 'wrong_parts_supplied'); ?>>Wrong parts supplied</option>
                                <option value="customer_needs_reschedule" <?php selected($return_reason, 'customer_needs_reschedule'); ?>>Customer needs reschedule</option>
                                <option value="end_of_day_overtime" <?php selected($return_reason, 'end_of_day_overtime'); ?>>End of day / avoid overtime</option>
                                <option value="other" <?php selected($return_reason, 'other'); ?>>Other</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Suggested Return Date</label>
                            <input type="date" name="work_order_return_suggested_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($return_suggested_date); ?>">
                        </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Suggested Return Time</label>
                            <input type="time" name="work_order_return_suggested_time" value="<?php echo esc_attr($return_suggested_time); ?>">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Parts / Materials Needed</label>
                        <textarea name="work_order_return_parts_needed" rows="3" placeholder="List missing parts, wrong parts, supplier issue, or what needs to be picked up from the shop."><?php echo esc_textarea($return_parts_needed); ?></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Return Notes</label>
                        <textarea name="work_order_return_notes" rows="3" placeholder="Explain why the job needs another visit and what the office/coordinator should know."><?php echo esc_textarea($return_notes); ?></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary">Flag Return Visit Needed</button>
                </form>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <h5 class="dmx-panel-title" style="font-size:16px;">Parts / Work Performed</h5>
                <?php if (!empty($item_rows)) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                        <table class="dmx-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>Qty</th><th>Item Number</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <?php foreach ($item_rows as $row) : ?>
                                <?php $description = trim((string) ($row['description'] ?? '')); ?>
                                <?php if (($row['qty_ord'] ?? '') === '' && ($row['item_number'] ?? '') === '' && $description === '') { continue; } ?>
                                <tr>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($row['qty_ord'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($row['item_number'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($description); ?></td>
                                </tr>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                <?php else : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-empty">No parts or work lines have been added yet.</div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <h5 class="dmx-panel-title" style="font-size:16px;">Labour</h5>
                <?php if (!empty($labour_rows)) : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                        <table class="dmx-table">
                            <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Employee</th><th>Hours</th><th>Reg.</th><th>OT</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <?php foreach ($labour_rows as $row) : ?>
                                <?php if (($row['date'] ?? '') === '' && ($row['employee'] ?? '') === '' && ($row['hours'] ?? '') === '' && ($row['reg'] ?? '') === '' && ($row['ot'] ?? '') === '') { continue; } ?>
                                <tr>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($row['date'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($row['employee'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($row['hours'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($row['reg'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo esc_html($row['ot'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                </tr>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    </div>
                <?php else : ?>
                    <div class="dmx-empty">No labour rows have been logged yet.</div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_sales_payments() {
        $sent_unpaid_invoice_args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_invoice',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => -1,
            'orderby' => 'date',
            'order' => 'DESC',
            'meta_query' => array(
                array(
                    'key' => '_dmx_status',
                    'value' => array('sent', 'open', 'pending'),
                    'compare' => 'IN',
                ),
            ),
        ), 'dm_invoice');
        $sent_unpaid_invoices = get_posts($sent_unpaid_invoice_args);

        $paid_invoice_args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_invoice',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => -1,
            'orderby' => 'date',
            'order' => 'DESC',
            'meta_key' => '_dmx_status',
            'meta_value' => 'paid',
        ), 'dm_invoice');
        $paid_invoices = get_posts($paid_invoice_args);

        $paid_total = 0;
        foreach ($paid_invoices as $invoice) {
            $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true);
            if ($amount === '') {
                $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_amount', true);
            }
            $paid_total += (float) $amount;
        }

        $outstanding_total = 0;
        foreach ($sent_unpaid_invoices as $invoice) {
            $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true);
            if ($amount === '') {
                $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_amount', true);
            }
            $outstanding_total += (float) $amount;
        }

        $payment_methods = $this->get_enabled_sales_payment_method_labels();
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-page-head">
            <div>
                <h3>Payments</h3>
                <p>Track sent invoices, keep a paid invoice history, and mark invoices as paid.</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-grid" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));">
            <div class="dmx-card">
                <div class="dmx-stat-label">Sent / Unpaid Invoices</div>
                <div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo intval(count($sent_unpaid_invoices)); ?></div>
                <div class="dmx-inline-note"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($outstanding_total)); ?> outstanding</div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-card">
                <div class="dmx-stat-label">Paid Invoices</div>
                <div class="dmx-stat-number"><?php echo intval(count($paid_invoices)); ?></div>
                <div class="dmx-inline-note"><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($paid_total)); ?> paid</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Sent / Unpaid Invoice List</h4>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                <table class="dmx-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Invoice #</th>
                            <th>Invoice</th>
                            <th>Customer</th>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <th>Amount</th>
                            <th>Sent</th>
                            <th>Paid</th>
                            <th>Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <?php if ($sent_unpaid_invoices) : foreach ($sent_unpaid_invoices as $invoice) : ?>
                            <?php
                            $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true);
                            if ($amount === '') {
                                $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_amount', true);
                            }
                            $sent_at = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_last_sent_at', true);
                            ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('invoice', $invoice->ID)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($invoice->post_title); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo $this->status_pill(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($amount)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($sent_at ? $sent_at : 'Not sent from app'); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_paid_at', true) ?: 'Not paid'); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="dmx-action-row" style="gap:8px;">
                                        <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" target="_blank" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_document_view_url('invoice', $invoice->ID, true)); ?>">Preview</a>
                                    </div>
                                    <form method="post" style="margin-top:8px;">
                                        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="mark_invoice_paid">
                                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="sales">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="payments">
                                        <input type="hidden" name="invoice_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($invoice->ID); ?>">
                                        <div class="dmx-field" style="margin-bottom:8px;"><label>Payment Method</label><select name="payment_method"><option value="">Select</option><?php foreach ($payment_methods as $method_key => $method_label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($method_key); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($method_label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                                        <div class="dmx-field" style="margin-bottom:8px;"><label>Paid Amount</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="paid_amount" value="<?php echo esc_attr($amount); ?>"></div>
                                        <div class="dmx-field" style="margin-bottom:8px;"><label>Reference / Notes</label><input type="text" name="payment_reference" placeholder="Optional payment note"></div>
                                        <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Mark Paid</button>
                                    </form>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; else : ?>
                            <tr><td colspan="8"><div class="dmx-empty">No sent or unpaid invoices right now.</div></td></tr>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-form-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Paid Invoice History</h4>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
                <table class="dmx-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Invoice #</th>
                            <th>Invoice</th>
                            <th>Customer</th>
                            <th>Amount</th>
                            <th>Paid Date</th>
                            <th>Payment Method</th>
                            <th>Paid Amount</th>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <th>Preview</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <?php if ($paid_invoices) : foreach ($paid_invoices as $invoice) : ?>
                            <?php
                            $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true);
                            if ($amount === '') {
                                $amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_amount', true);
                            }
                            $paid_at = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_paid_at', true);
                            $payment_method_key = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_payment_method', true);
                            $payment_method_label = isset($payment_methods[$payment_method_key]) ? $payment_methods[$payment_method_key] : ($payment_method_key !== '' ? ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $payment_method_key)) : '—');
                            $paid_amount = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_paid_amount', true);
                            ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('invoice', $invoice->ID)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($invoice->post_title); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($amount)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($paid_at ? $paid_at : get_the_date('', $invoice)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($payment_method_label); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($paid_amount !== '' ? $paid_amount : $amount)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo $this->status_pill('paid'); ?></td>
                                <td><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" target="_blank" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_document_view_url('invoice', $invoice->ID, true)); ?>">Preview</a></td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; else : ?>
                            <tr><td colspan="9"><div class="dmx-empty">No paid invoices yet.</div></td></tr>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }


    private function render_costs_supplier_invoices() {
        $records = array_filter($this->get_company_expense_records(), function($row) {
            return isset($row['category']) && in_array($row['category'], array('subcontractor_invoices','parts_materials','doors_sections'), true);
        });
        return '<div class="dmx-card"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Supplier / Subcontractor Invoices</h3><p class="dmx-inline-note">Supplier, door, parts, and subcontractor costs entered from Expenses summarize here.</p>' . $this->render_accounting_expense_table($records, true) . '</div>';
    }

    private function render_costs_expenses() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            return '<div class="dmx-card"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Expenses</h3><div class="dmx-empty">You do not have access to company expense tracking.</div></div>';
        }
        $categories = $this->get_accounting_expense_categories();
        $payment_methods = $this->get_payment_method_labels();
        $records = $this->get_company_expense_records();
        $totals = $this->get_accounting_dashboard_totals();
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-card" id="dmx-new-expense">
            <h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Add Expense / True Cost</h3>
            <p class="dmx-inline-note">Track expenses using accountant-friendly groups: cost of sales, subcontracted services, vehicles/equipment, payroll, occupancy, marketing/travel, administration, fees, and taxes.</p>
            <form method="post">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_company_expense">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="costs">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="expenses">
                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Expense Category</label><select name="expense_category" required><?php foreach ($this->get_accounting_expense_category_groups() as $group_label => $group_categories) : ?><optgroup label="<?php echo esc_attr($group_label); ?>"><?php foreach ($group_categories as $key => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($key); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></optgroup><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Vendor / Payee</label><input type="text" name="expense_vendor" placeholder="Supplier, landlord, employee, hotel, fuel station"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Expense Date</label><input type="date" name="expense_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr(current_time('Y-m-d')); ?>"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Amount Before Tax</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="expense_amount" required placeholder="0.00"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Tax Paid</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="expense_tax" placeholder="0.00"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Total Cost</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="expense_total" placeholder="Leave blank to auto-calculate"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Status</label><select name="expense_status"><option value="paid">Paid</option><option value="unpaid">Unpaid / Outstanding</option><option value="upcoming">Upcoming</option></select></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Due Date</label><input type="date" name="expense_due_date"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Payment Method</label><select name="expense_payment_method"><option value="">Select</option><?php foreach ($payment_methods as $key => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($key); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Recurring Payment</label><select name="expense_recurring"><option value="none">No</option><option value="weekly">Weekly</option><option value="monthly">Monthly</option><option value="quarterly">Quarterly</option><option value="annual">Annual</option></select></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Linked Job / WO / Invoice</label><input type="text" name="expense_linked_record" placeholder="WO-1002, INV-1005, job name"></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Reference / Receipt #</label><input type="text" name="expense_reference" placeholder="Receipt, invoice, cheque, e-transfer note"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><textarea name="expense_notes" rows="3"></textarea></div>
                <div class="dmx-action-row"><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Expense</button></div>
            </form>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-report-grid" style="margin-top:18px;">
            <div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Expense Snapshot</h3>
                <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Total Expenses</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($totals['expense_total'])); ?></span></div>
                <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Outstanding Expenses</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($totals['expense_outstanding'])); ?></span></div>
                <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Upcoming 45 Days</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($totals['expense_upcoming'])); ?></span></div>
                <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Recurring Monthly Estimate</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($totals['recurring_monthly'])); ?></span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Expense Categories</h3><?php echo $this->render_expense_category_summary($records); ?></div>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Expense Ledger</h3><?php echo $this->render_accounting_expense_table($records, false); ?></div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_costs_payments() {
        $records = $this->get_company_expense_records();

        $outstanding = array_filter($records, function($row) {
            return in_array($row['status'] ?? '', array('unpaid','upcoming'), true) || (($row['recurring'] ?? 'none') !== 'none');
        });

        $paid = array_filter($records, function($row) {
            return ($row['status'] ?? '') === 'paid';
        });

        $html = '<div class="dmx-card" style="margin-bottom:18px;"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Outstanding / Upcoming Cost Payments</h3><p class="dmx-inline-note">Rent, truck payments, insurance, supplier bills, subscriptions, and recurring costs that accounting still needs to watch.</p>' . $this->render_accounting_expense_table($outstanding, true, 'No outstanding or upcoming cost payments right now.') . '</div>';
        $html .= '<div class="dmx-card"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Paid Cost Payment History</h3><p class="dmx-inline-note">Paid supplier invoices, subcontractor invoices, materials, overhead expenses, and other paid cost records show here for bookkeeping history.</p>' . $this->render_accounting_expense_table($paid, true, 'No paid cost payments have been entered yet.') . '</div>';
        return $html;
    }

    private function get_accounting_expense_category_groups() {
        return array(
            'Cost of Sales / Direct Job Costs' => array(
                'parts_materials' => 'Parts & Job Materials',
                'doors_sections' => 'Doors / Sections / Supplier Materials',
                'hardware_consumables' => 'Hardware & Shop Consumables',
            ),
            'Subcontracted Services / Outside Labour' => array(
                'subcontractor_invoices' => 'Subcontractor Invoices',
            ),
            'Vehicles & Field Equipment' => array(
                'vehicle_fuel' => 'Vehicle Fuel',
                'vehicle_maintenance' => 'Vehicle Maintenance & Repairs',
                'vehicle_lease_payment' => 'Vehicle Lease / Payments',
                'equipment_rentals' => 'Equipment Rentals',
                'tools_equipment' => 'Tools & Equipment Purchases',
            ),
            'Payroll, Benefits & Staff Costs' => array(
                'wages_payroll' => 'Wages / Payroll',
                'employee_benefits' => 'Employee Benefits / Healthcare',
                'vacation_pay' => 'Vacation Pay',
                'bonuses' => 'Bonuses / Incentives',
                'uniforms_ppe' => 'Uniforms / PPE',
            ),
            'Occupancy, Utilities & Insurance' => array(
                'building_rent' => 'Building Rent / Lease',
                'utilities' => 'Utilities',
                'building_insurance' => 'Building Insurance',
                'equipment_insurance' => 'Equipment Insurance',
            ),
            'Sales, Marketing & Travel' => array(
                'advertising_marketing' => 'Advertising & Marketing',
                'printing_materials' => 'Printing / Marketing Materials',
                'travel_meals_lodging' => 'Travel, Meals & Lodging',
            ),
            'Office, Software & Administration' => array(
                'office_supplies' => 'Office Supplies',
                'software_subscriptions' => 'Software / Subscriptions',
                'professional_services' => 'Accounting / Legal / Professional Fees',
                'licenses_permits' => 'Licenses / Permits',
            ),
            'Banking, Taxes & Other' => array(
                'bank_merchant_fees' => 'Bank / Merchant Fees',
                'taxes_government_fees' => 'Taxes / Government Fees',
                'miscellaneous' => 'Miscellaneous / Other',
            ),
        );
    }
    private function get_accounting_expense_categories() {
        $flat = array();
        foreach ($this->get_accounting_expense_category_groups() as $group_categories) {
            foreach ($group_categories as $key => $label) {
                $flat[$key] = $label;
            }
        }
        return $flat;
    }

    private function get_accounting_company_key() {
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        return $company_key !== '' ? $company_key : 'global';
    }

    private function get_company_expense_records() {
        $all = get_option('dmx_company_expense_records', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_accounting_company_key();
        $records = isset($all[$company_key]) && is_array($all[$company_key]) ? $all[$company_key] : array();
        usort($records, function($a, $b) {
            return strcmp((string) ($b['date'] ?? ''), (string) ($a['date'] ?? ''));
        });
        return $records;
    }

    private function save_company_expense_records($records) {
        $all = get_option('dmx_company_expense_records', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_accounting_company_key();
        $all[$company_key] = array_values($records);
        update_option('dmx_company_expense_records', $all);
    }

    private function create_company_expense($tab) {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to add company expenses.');
        }
        $categories = $this->get_accounting_expense_categories();
        $category = sanitize_key($_POST['expense_category'] ?? 'miscellaneous');
        if (!isset($categories[$category])) { $category = 'miscellaneous'; }
        $amount = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['expense_amount'] ?? '0');
        $tax = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['expense_tax'] ?? '0');
        $total = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['expense_total'] ?? '');
        $amount_float = is_numeric($amount) ? (float) $amount : 0;
        $tax_float = is_numeric($tax) ? (float) $tax : 0;
        $total_float = is_numeric($total) && $total !== '' ? (float) $total : ($amount_float + $tax_float);
        if ($total_float <= 0) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please enter an expense amount.'); }
        $status = sanitize_key($_POST['expense_status'] ?? 'paid');
        if (!in_array($status, array('paid','unpaid','upcoming'), true)) { $status = 'paid'; }
        $recurring = sanitize_key($_POST['expense_recurring'] ?? 'none');
        if (!in_array($recurring, array('none','weekly','monthly','quarterly','annual'), true)) { $recurring = 'none'; }
        $date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['expense_date'] ?? current_time('Y-m-d'));
        if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $date)) { $date = current_time('Y-m-d'); }
        $due_date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['expense_due_date'] ?? '');
        if ($due_date !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $due_date)) { $due_date = ''; }
        $records = $this->get_company_expense_records();
        array_unshift($records, array(
            'id' => uniqid('dmx_exp_', true),
            'company_key' => $this->get_accounting_company_key(),
            'category' => $category,
            'category_label' => $categories[$category],
            'vendor' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['expense_vendor'] ?? '')),
            'date' => $date,
            'due_date' => $due_date,
            'amount' => number_format($amount_float, 2, '.', ''),
            'tax' => number_format($tax_float, 2, '.', ''),
            'total' => number_format($total_float, 2, '.', ''),
            'status' => $status,
            'payment_method' => sanitize_key($_POST['expense_payment_method'] ?? ''),
            'recurring' => $recurring,
            'linked_record' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['expense_linked_record'] ?? '')),
            'reference' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['expense_reference'] ?? '')),
            'notes' => sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['expense_notes'] ?? '')),
            'created_by' => get_current_user_id(),
            'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        ));
        $this->save_company_expense_records($records);
        $this->redirect_with_message('costs&dmx_subtab=expenses', 'success', 'Expense saved.');
    }


    private function current_user_can_submit_own_timesheet() {
        $is_helper_role = $this->current_user_is_helper() || ($this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::STAFF_ROLE) && !$this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::SALES_ROLE));
        return $this->current_user_is_technician()
            || $this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE)
            || $is_helper_role
            || $this->current_user_is_warehouse()
            || $this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE)
            || $this->current_user_is_parts()
            || $this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::PARTS_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::MANAGER_ROLE);
    }

    private function current_user_can_process_employee_timesheets() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_accounting() || $this->current_user_has_role_or_requested_role(self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE);
    }

    private function get_current_timesheet_role_label() {
        if ($this->current_user_is_technician()) {
            return 'Technician';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_is_helper()) {
            return 'Helper';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_is_warehouse()) {
            return 'Warehouse Staff';
        }
        if ($this->current_user_is_parts()) {
            return 'Parts Representative';
        }
        return 'Hourly Employee';
    }

    private function get_my_employee_timesheet_records($limit = 7) {
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        if (!$user_id) {
            return array();
        }

        $records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        $records = array_values(array_filter($records, function($record) use ($user_id) {
            return (int) ($record['employee_id'] ?? 0) === (int) $user_id;
        }));

        if ($limit > 0) {
            $records = array_slice($records, 0, (int) $limit);
        }

        return $records;
    }

    private function count_timesheets_pending_manager_approval() {
        $count = 0;
        foreach ($this->get_employee_timesheet_records() as $record) {
            if (sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? 'submitted') === 'submitted') {
                $count++;
            }
        }
        return $count;
    }

    private function count_timesheets_ready_for_accounting() {
        $count = 0;
        foreach ($this->get_employee_timesheet_records() as $record) {
            if (sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? 'submitted') === 'approved') {
                $count++;
            }
        }
        return $count;
    }

    private function get_timesheet_notification_recipients() {
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $roles = array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE);
        $users = $company_key !== '' ? $this->get_company_users($company_key, $roles) : get_users(array('role__in' => $roles));
        $emails = array();

        foreach ($users as $user) {
            if (!$user || empty($user->user_email)) {
                continue;
            }
            $email = sanitize_email($user->user_email);
            if ($email !== '') {
                $emails[] = $email;
            }
        }

        $owner_email = sanitize_email($this->get_portal_owner_email());
        if ($owner_email !== '') {
            $emails[] = $owner_email;
        }

        return array_values(array_unique($emails));
    }

    private function notify_timesheet_submitted($record) {
        $recipients = $this->get_timesheet_notification_recipients();
        if (empty($recipients)) {
            return;
        }

        $employee_name = (string) ($record['employee_name'] ?? 'Employee');
        $date = (string) ($record['date'] ?? current_time('Y-m-d'));
        $regular_hours = number_format((float) ($record['regular_hours'] ?? 0), 2);
        $overtime_hours = number_format((float) ($record['overtime_hours'] ?? 0), 2);
        $work_order_ref = (string) ($record['work_order_ref'] ?? '');
        $notes = (string) ($record['notes'] ?? '');
        $check_in = $this->format_timecard_stamp($record['check_in_at'] ?? ($record['start_time'] ?? ''), $record['check_in_ts'] ?? 0, $record['check_in_timezone'] ?? '');
        $check_out = $this->format_timecard_stamp($record['check_out_at'] ?? ($record['end_time'] ?? ''), $record['check_out_ts'] ?? 0, $record['check_out_timezone'] ?? '');
        $break_minutes = (string) ($record['break_minutes'] ?? '0');
        $portal_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'timesheets'), $this->get_portal_page_url());

        $subject = 'DoorMatrix Time Card Submitted - ' . $employee_name . ' - ' . $date;
        $body = "A DoorMatrix employee time card has been checked out and submitted.\n\n";
        $body .= 'Employee: ' . $employee_name . "\n";
        $body .= 'Date Worked: ' . $date . "\n";
        $body .= 'Check In: ' . $check_in . "\n";
        $body .= 'Check Out: ' . $check_out . "\n";
        $body .= 'Break Minutes: ' . $break_minutes . "\n";
        $body .= 'Regular Hours: ' . $regular_hours . "\n";
        $body .= 'Overtime Hours: ' . $overtime_hours . "\n";
        if ($work_order_ref !== '') {
            $body .= 'Linked Work Order / Job: ' . $work_order_ref . "\n";
        }
        if ($notes !== '') {
            $body .= "\nNotes:\n" . $notes . "\n";
        }
        $body .= "\nManager approval is required before accounting uses these hours for payroll preparation.\n";
        $body .= "Open timesheets: " . $portal_url . "\n";

        foreach ($recipients as $email) {
            $this->send_portal_notification_email($email, $subject, $body);
        }
    }

    private function format_timecard_stamp($value, $timestamp = 0, $timezone_string = '') {
        $timezone_string = $timezone_string !== '' ? $this->sanitize_company_timezone($timezone_string) : $this->get_company_timezone_string();
        $timestamp = (int) $timestamp;

        if ($timestamp > 0) {
            return $this->format_company_timestamp($timestamp, 'M j, Y g:i A', $timezone_string);
        }

        $value = trim((string) $value);
        if ($value === '') {
            return '—';
        }

        try {
            $datetime = new DateTimeImmutable($value, new DateTimeZone($timezone_string));
            return $datetime->format('M j, Y g:i A');
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            // Fall through to simple time-only handling below.
        }

        if (preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $value)) {
            return $this->format_company_timestamp(time(), 'M j, Y', $timezone_string) . ' ' . $value;
        }

        return $value;
    }

    private function calculate_timecard_hours_from_timestamps($check_in_ts, $check_out_ts, $break_minutes = 0) {
        $check_in_ts = (int) $check_in_ts;
        $check_out_ts = (int) $check_out_ts;
        $break_minutes = max(0, absint($break_minutes));

        if ($check_in_ts <= 0 || $check_out_ts <= 0 || $check_out_ts <= $check_in_ts) {
            return array('total_hours' => 0.00, 'regular_hours' => 0.00, 'overtime_hours' => 0.00);
        }

        $worked_seconds = max(0, ($check_out_ts - $check_in_ts) - ($break_minutes * 60));
        $total_hours = round($worked_seconds / 3600, 2);
        $regular_hours = min(8.00, $total_hours);
        $overtime_hours = max(0.00, round($total_hours - 8.00, 2));

        return array(
            'total_hours' => $total_hours,
            'regular_hours' => $regular_hours,
            'overtime_hours' => $overtime_hours,
        );
    }

    private function get_current_employee_timecard_for_date($employee_id, $date, &$records = null, &$record_index = null) {
        if ($records === null) {
            $records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        }

        $record_index = null;

        foreach ($records as $index => $record) {
            if ((int) ($record['employee_id'] ?? 0) !== (int) $employee_id) {
                continue;
            }
            if ((string) ($record['date'] ?? '') !== (string) $date) {
                continue;
            }
            if (sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? '') === 'checked_in') {
                $record_index = $index;
                return $record;
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    private function handle_my_timecard_check_in($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_submit_own_timesheet()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'You do not have permission to use the time card.');
        }

        $employee_id = get_current_user_id();
        $employee = get_user_by('id', $employee_id);
        if (!$employee) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'Could not find your employee profile.');
        }

        $date = $this->get_company_current_date();
        $records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        $record_index = null;
        $existing = $this->get_current_employee_timecard_for_date($employee_id, $date, $records, $record_index);

        if ($existing && sanitize_key($existing['status'] ?? '') === 'checked_in') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'You are already checked in. Please check out before starting another time card session.');
        }

        $now_ts = $this->get_company_timestamp();
        $now_mysql = $this->get_company_current_mysql($now_ts);
        $company_timezone = $this->get_company_timezone_string();
        $hourly_rate = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal(get_user_meta($employee_id, '_dmx_hourly_rate', true));
        $role_label = $this->get_current_timesheet_role_label();

        $record = array(
            'id' => $existing ? (string) ($existing['id'] ?? uniqid('dmx_time_', true)) : uniqid('dmx_time_', true),
            'company_key' => $this->get_accounting_company_key(),
            'employee_id' => $employee_id,
            'employee_name' => $employee->display_name,
            'employee_role' => $role_label,
            'date' => $date,
            'check_in_at' => $now_mysql,
            'check_in_ts' => (string) $now_ts,
            'check_in_timezone' => $company_timezone,
            'start_time' => $this->format_company_timestamp($now_ts, 'H:i', $company_timezone),
            'check_out_at' => '',
            'check_out_ts' => '',
            'check_out_timezone' => '',
            'end_time' => '',
            'break_minutes' => '0',
            'regular_hours' => '0.00',
            'overtime_hours' => '0.00',
            'hourly_rate' => number_format($hourly_rate, 2, '.', ''),
            'total_pay' => '0.00',
            'status' => 'checked_in',
            'work_order_ref' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timecard_work_order_ref'] ?? '')),
            'notes' => sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timecard_notes'] ?? '')),
            'source' => 'employee_timecard',
            'created_by' => $employee_id,
            'created_at' => $existing ? (string) ($existing['created_at'] ?? $now_mysql) : $now_mysql,
            'updated_at' => $now_mysql,
            'submitted_at' => '',
            'approved_by' => '',
            'approved_at' => '',
            'paid_by' => '',
            'paid_date' => '',
            'paid_at' => '',
            'rejected_by' => '',
            'rejected_at' => '',
        );

        if ($record_index !== null) {
            $records[$record_index] = $record;
        } else {
            array_unshift($records, $record);
        }

        $this->save_employee_timesheet_records($records);
        $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'success', 'You are checked in. DoorMatrix stamped your start time.');
    }

    private function handle_my_timecard_check_out($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_submit_own_timesheet()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'You do not have permission to use the time card.');
        }

        $employee_id = get_current_user_id();
        $employee = get_user_by('id', $employee_id);
        if (!$employee) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'Could not find your employee profile.');
        }

        $date = $this->get_company_current_date();
        $records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        $record_index = null;
        $record = $this->get_current_employee_timecard_for_date($employee_id, $date, $records, $record_index);

        if (!$record || $record_index === null) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'You need to check in before you can check out.');
        }

        $current_status = sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? 'submitted');
        if ($current_status !== 'checked_in') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'This time card is not open for check out. It may already be submitted, approved, or processed.');
        }

        $check_in_ts = isset($record['check_in_ts']) ? (int) $record['check_in_ts'] : 0;
        if ($check_in_ts <= 0 && !empty($record['check_in_at'])) {
            $parsed = strtotime((string) $record['check_in_at']);
            $check_in_ts = $parsed ? (int) $parsed : 0;
        }
        if ($check_in_ts <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'Could not find a valid check-in timestamp. Please contact a manager.');
        }

        $now_ts = $this->get_company_timestamp();
        $now_mysql = $this->get_company_current_mysql($now_ts);
        $company_timezone = $this->get_company_timezone_string();
        $break_minutes = absint($_POST['timecard_break_minutes'] ?? 0);
        $hours = $this->calculate_timecard_hours_from_timestamps($check_in_ts, $now_ts, $break_minutes);
        $hourly_rate = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal(get_user_meta($employee_id, '_dmx_hourly_rate', true));
        $total_pay = ($hours['regular_hours'] * $hourly_rate) + ($hours['overtime_hours'] * $hourly_rate * 1.5);

        $existing_notes = trim((string) ($record['notes'] ?? ''));
        $new_notes = sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timecard_notes'] ?? ''));
        $notes = $new_notes !== '' ? $new_notes : $existing_notes;

        $work_order_ref = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timecard_work_order_ref'] ?? ''));
        if ($work_order_ref === '') {
            $work_order_ref = (string) ($record['work_order_ref'] ?? '');
        }

        $record['employee_name'] = $employee->display_name;
        $record['employee_role'] = (string) ($record['employee_role'] ?? $this->get_current_timesheet_role_label());
        $record['check_out_at'] = $now_mysql;
        $record['check_out_ts'] = (string) $now_ts;
        $record['check_out_timezone'] = $company_timezone;
        if (empty($record['check_in_timezone'])) {
            $record['check_in_timezone'] = $company_timezone;
        }
        $record['end_time'] = $this->format_company_timestamp($now_ts, 'H:i', $company_timezone);
        $record['break_minutes'] = (string) $break_minutes;
        $record['regular_hours'] = number_format($hours['regular_hours'], 2, '.', '');
        $record['overtime_hours'] = number_format($hours['overtime_hours'], 2, '.', '');
        $record['hourly_rate'] = number_format($hourly_rate, 2, '.', '');
        $record['total_pay'] = number_format($total_pay, 2, '.', '');
        $record['status'] = 'submitted';
        $record['work_order_ref'] = $work_order_ref;
        $record['notes'] = $notes;
        $record['updated_at'] = $now_mysql;
        $record['submitted_at'] = $now_mysql;

        $records[$record_index] = $record;
        $this->save_employee_timesheet_records($records);
        $this->notify_timesheet_submitted($record);
        $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'success', 'Checked out. Your stamped time card session has been submitted for manager approval and accounting review. You can check in again later if you return to work.');
    }

    private function submit_my_timesheet($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_submit_own_timesheet()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'You do not have permission to submit this timesheet.');
        }

        $employee_id = get_current_user_id();
        $employee = get_user_by('id', $employee_id);
        if (!$employee) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'Could not find your employee profile.');
        }

        $date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['timesheet_date'] ?? $this->get_company_current_date());
        if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $date)) {
            $date = $this->get_company_current_date();
        }

        $regular_hours = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['timesheet_regular_hours'] ?? '0');
        $overtime_hours = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['timesheet_overtime_hours'] ?? '0');
        $break_minutes = absint($_POST['timesheet_break_minutes'] ?? 0);
        $start_time = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timesheet_start_time'] ?? ''));
        $end_time = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timesheet_end_time'] ?? ''));

        if ($start_time !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $start_time)) {
            $start_time = '';
        }
        if ($end_time !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/', $end_time)) {
            $end_time = '';
        }
        if (($regular_hours + $overtime_hours) <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'Please enter your regular hours, overtime hours, or both before submitting your timesheet.');
        }

        $hourly_rate = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal(get_user_meta($employee_id, '_dmx_hourly_rate', true));
        $total_pay = ($regular_hours * $hourly_rate) + ($overtime_hours * $hourly_rate * 1.5);
        $role_label = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timesheet_employee_role'] ?? $this->get_current_timesheet_role_label()));
        if ($role_label === '') {
            $role_label = $this->get_current_timesheet_role_label();
        }

        $records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        $record = array(
            'id' => uniqid('dmx_time_', true),
            'company_key' => $this->get_accounting_company_key(),
            'employee_id' => $employee_id,
            'employee_name' => $employee->display_name,
            'employee_role' => $role_label,
            'date' => $date,
            'start_time' => $start_time,
            'end_time' => $end_time,
            'break_minutes' => (string) $break_minutes,
            'regular_hours' => number_format($regular_hours, 2, '.', ''),
            'overtime_hours' => number_format($overtime_hours, 2, '.', ''),
            'hourly_rate' => number_format($hourly_rate, 2, '.', ''),
            'total_pay' => number_format($total_pay, 2, '.', ''),
            'status' => 'submitted',
            'work_order_ref' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timesheet_work_order_ref'] ?? '')),
            'notes' => sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timesheet_notes'] ?? '')),
            'source' => 'employee_daily_submission',
            'created_by' => $employee_id,
            'created_at' => $this->get_company_current_mysql(),
            'submitted_at' => $this->get_company_current_mysql(),
        );

        $updated_existing = false;
        foreach ($records as &$existing_record) {
            if ((int) ($existing_record['employee_id'] ?? 0) !== (int) $employee_id || (string) ($existing_record['date'] ?? '') !== $date) {
                continue;
            }

            $existing_status = sanitize_key($existing_record['status'] ?? 'submitted');
            if (in_array($existing_status, array('approved', 'paid'), true)) {
                $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'That timesheet has already been approved or processed. Ask your manager or accounting before making changes.');
            }

            $record['id'] = (string) ($existing_record['id'] ?? $record['id']);
            $record['created_at'] = (string) ($existing_record['created_at'] ?? $record['created_at']);
            $record['updated_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
            $existing_record = $record;
            $updated_existing = true;
            break;
        }
        unset($existing_record);

        if (!$updated_existing) {
            array_unshift($records, $record);
        }

        $this->save_employee_timesheet_records($records);
        $this->notify_timesheet_submitted($record);
        $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'success', 'Timesheet submitted. It has been sent for manager approval and accounting review.');
    }

    private function current_user_can_manage_accounting_records() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->current_user_is_accounting();
    }

    private function get_employee_timesheet_records() {
        $all = get_option('dmx_employee_timesheet_records', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_accounting_company_key();
        $records = isset($all[$company_key]) && is_array($all[$company_key]) ? $all[$company_key] : array();
        usort($records, function($a, $b) { return strcmp((string) ($b['date'] ?? ''), (string) ($a['date'] ?? '')); });
        return $records;
    }

    private function save_employee_timesheet_records($records) {
        $all = get_option('dmx_employee_timesheet_records', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_accounting_company_key();
        $all[$company_key] = array_values($records);
        update_option('dmx_employee_timesheet_records', $all);
    }

    private function get_sales_commission_records() {
        $all = get_option('dmx_sales_commission_records', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_accounting_company_key();
        $records = isset($all[$company_key]) && is_array($all[$company_key]) ? $all[$company_key] : array();
        usort($records, function($a, $b) { return strcmp((string) ($b['sale_date'] ?? ''), (string) ($a['sale_date'] ?? '')); });
        return $records;
    }

    private function save_sales_commission_records($records) {
        $all = get_option('dmx_sales_commission_records', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_accounting_company_key();
        $all[$company_key] = array_values($records);
        update_option('dmx_sales_commission_records', $all);
    }

    private function get_timesheet_employee_users() {
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $roles = array(self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE);
        return $company_key !== '' ? $this->get_company_users($company_key, $roles) : get_users(array('role__in' => $roles, 'orderby' => 'display_name', 'order' => 'ASC'));
    }

    private function get_commission_sales_users() {
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $roles = array(self::SALES_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::MANAGER_ROLE);
        return $company_key !== '' ? $this->get_company_users($company_key, $roles) : get_users(array('role__in' => $roles, 'orderby' => 'display_name', 'order' => 'ASC'));
    }

    private function get_timesheet_status_options() {
        return array('submitted' => 'Submitted', 'approved' => 'Approved', 'processing' => 'Processing', 'paid' => 'Paid', 'rejected' => 'Rejected', 'checked_in' => 'Checked In');
    }

    private function get_commission_status_options() {
        return array('pending' => 'Pending', 'approved' => 'Approved', 'paid' => 'Paid', 'void' => 'Void / Cancelled');
    }

    private function create_employee_timesheet($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_accounting_records()) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to add employee timesheets.'); }
        $employee_id = absint($_POST['timesheet_employee_id'] ?? 0);
        $employee = $employee_id > 0 ? get_user_by('id', $employee_id) : false;
        if (!$employee) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please select an employee for the timesheet.'); }
        $date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['timesheet_date'] ?? $this->get_company_current_date());
        if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $date)) { $date = $this->get_company_current_date(); }
        $regular_hours = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['timesheet_regular_hours'] ?? '0');
        $overtime_hours = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['timesheet_overtime_hours'] ?? '0');
        $hourly_rate = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['timesheet_hourly_rate'] ?? '0');
        if (($regular_hours + $overtime_hours) <= 0) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please enter regular hours, overtime hours, or both.'); }
        $status_options = $this->get_timesheet_status_options();
        $status = sanitize_key($_POST['timesheet_status'] ?? 'submitted');
        if (!isset($status_options[$status])) { $status = 'submitted'; }
        $total_pay = ($regular_hours * $hourly_rate) + ($overtime_hours * $hourly_rate * 1.5);
        $records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        array_unshift($records, array(
            'id' => uniqid('dmx_time_', true), 'company_key' => $this->get_accounting_company_key(),
            'employee_id' => $employee_id, 'employee_name' => $employee->display_name,
            'employee_role' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timesheet_employee_role'] ?? 'Hourly Employee')),
            'date' => $date, 'regular_hours' => number_format($regular_hours, 2, '.', ''), 'overtime_hours' => number_format($overtime_hours, 2, '.', ''),
            'hourly_rate' => number_format($hourly_rate, 2, '.', ''), 'total_pay' => number_format($total_pay, 2, '.', ''),
            'status' => $status, 'work_order_ref' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timesheet_work_order_ref'] ?? '')),
            'notes' => sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timesheet_notes'] ?? '')), 'created_by' => get_current_user_id(), 'created_at' => $this->get_company_current_mysql(),
        ));
        $this->save_employee_timesheet_records($records);
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Employee timesheet saved.');
    }

    private function update_employee_timesheet_status($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets() && !$this->current_user_can_process_employee_timesheets()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to update employee timesheets.');
        }

        $record_id = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['timesheet_record_id'] ?? ''));
        $status_options = $this->get_timesheet_status_options();
        $new_status = sanitize_key($_POST['timesheet_new_status'] ?? 'submitted');
        if (!isset($status_options[$new_status])) {
            $new_status = 'submitted';
        }

        $records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        $updated = false;

        foreach ($records as &$record) {
            if ((string) ($record['id'] ?? '') !== $record_id) {
                continue;
            }

            $current_status = sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? 'submitted');

            if (in_array($new_status, array('approved', 'rejected'), true) && !$this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets()) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Manager approval is required before accounting can process this timesheet.');
            }

            if (in_array($new_status, array('processing', 'paid'), true) && !$this->current_user_can_process_employee_timesheets()) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to update accounting status for this timesheet.');
            }

            if (in_array($new_status, array('processing', 'paid'), true) && !in_array($current_status, array('approved', 'processing'), true)) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'This timesheet must be approved by a manager before accounting can process or mark it paid.');
            }

            if ($new_status === 'submitted' && !$this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets()) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Only managers can move a timesheet back to submitted.');
            }

            $record['status'] = $new_status;
            $record['updated_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
            $record['updated_by'] = get_current_user_id();

            if ($new_status === 'approved') {
                $record['approved_by'] = get_current_user_id();
                $record['approved_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
                $record['rejected_by'] = '';
                $record['rejected_at'] = '';
            } elseif ($new_status === 'rejected') {
                $record['rejected_by'] = get_current_user_id();
                $record['rejected_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
            } elseif ($new_status === 'processing') {
                $record['processing_by'] = get_current_user_id();
                $record['processing_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
                $record['paid_by'] = '';
                $record['paid_date'] = '';
                $record['paid_at'] = '';
            } elseif ($new_status === 'paid') {
                $record['paid_by'] = get_current_user_id();
                $record['paid_date'] = $this->get_company_current_date();
                $record['paid_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
                if (empty($record['processing_at'])) {
                    $record['processing_by'] = get_current_user_id();
                    $record['processing_at'] = $this->get_company_current_mysql();
                }
            } elseif ($new_status === 'submitted') {
                $record['approved_by'] = '';
                $record['approved_at'] = '';
                $record['paid_by'] = '';
                $record['paid_date'] = '';
                $record['paid_at'] = '';
                $record['processing_by'] = '';
                $record['processing_at'] = '';
                $record['rejected_by'] = '';
                $record['rejected_at'] = '';
            }

            $updated = true;
            break;
        }
        unset($record);

        if ($updated) {
            $this->save_employee_timesheet_records($records);
            $message = $new_status === 'approved' ? 'Timesheet approved. Accounting can now use these approved hours for payroll preparation.' : 'Timesheet status updated.';
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', $message);
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that timesheet entry.');
    }

    private function create_sales_commission($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_accounting_records()) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to add sales commission records.'); }
        $salesperson_id = absint($_POST['commission_salesperson_id'] ?? 0);
        $salesperson = $salesperson_id > 0 ? get_user_by('id', $salesperson_id) : false;
        if (!$salesperson) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please select a salesperson.'); }
        $sale_date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['commission_sale_date'] ?? current_time('Y-m-d'));
        if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $sale_date)) { $sale_date = current_time('Y-m-d'); }
        $sale_amount = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['commission_sale_amount'] ?? '0');
        $commission_percent = (float) $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['commission_percent'] ?? '0');
        $manual_amount = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['commission_amount'] ?? '');
        $commission_amount = ($manual_amount !== '' && is_numeric($manual_amount)) ? (float) $manual_amount : ($sale_amount * ($commission_percent / 100));
        if ($sale_amount <= 0 && $commission_amount <= 0) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please enter a sale amount or commission amount.'); }
        $status_options = $this->get_commission_status_options();
        $status = sanitize_key($_POST['commission_status'] ?? 'pending');
        if (!isset($status_options[$status])) { $status = 'pending'; }
        $records = $this->get_sales_commission_records();
        array_unshift($records, array(
            'id' => uniqid('dmx_comm_', true), 'company_key' => $this->get_accounting_company_key(), 'salesperson_id' => $salesperson_id, 'salesperson_name' => $salesperson->display_name,
            'sale_date' => $sale_date, 'customer' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['commission_customer'] ?? '')),
            'linked_document' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['commission_linked_document'] ?? '')),
            'sale_amount' => number_format($sale_amount, 2, '.', ''), 'commission_percent' => number_format($commission_percent, 3, '.', ''),
            'commission_amount' => number_format($commission_amount, 2, '.', ''), 'status' => $status, 'paid_date' => $status === 'paid' ? current_time('Y-m-d') : '',
            'notes' => sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['commission_notes'] ?? '')), 'created_by' => get_current_user_id(), 'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        ));
        $this->save_sales_commission_records($records);
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Sales commission record saved.');
    }

    private function update_sales_commission_status($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_accounting_records()) { $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You do not have permission to update sales commission records.'); }
        $record_id = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['commission_record_id'] ?? ''));
        $status_options = $this->get_commission_status_options();
        $new_status = sanitize_key($_POST['commission_new_status'] ?? 'pending');
        if (!isset($status_options[$new_status])) { $new_status = 'pending'; }
        $records = $this->get_sales_commission_records();
        $updated = false;
        foreach ($records as &$record) {
            if ((string) ($record['id'] ?? '') === $record_id) {
                $record['status'] = $new_status;
                $record['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
                $record['paid_date'] = $new_status === 'paid' ? current_time('Y-m-d') : '';
                $updated = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        unset($record);
        if ($updated) { $this->save_sales_commission_records($records); $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Commission status updated.'); }
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not find that commission record.');
    }

    private function get_employee_timesheet_summary($records = null) {
        if ($records === null) {
            $records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        }

        $summary = array(
            'regular_hours' => 0,
            'overtime_hours' => 0,
            'total_hours' => 0,
            'estimated_wages' => 0,
            'unpaid_wages' => 0,
            'paid_wages' => 0,
            'submitted_count' => 0,
            'approved_count' => 0,
            'paid_count' => 0,
            'processing_count' => 0,
            'rejected_count' => 0,
            'checked_in_count' => 0,
            'approved_wages' => 0,
            'processing_wages' => 0,
        );

        foreach ($records as $row) {
            $regular = (float) ($row['regular_hours'] ?? 0);
            $ot = (float) ($row['overtime_hours'] ?? 0);
            $pay = (float) ($row['total_pay'] ?? 0);
            $status = sanitize_key($row['status'] ?? 'submitted');

            $summary['regular_hours'] += $regular;
            $summary['overtime_hours'] += $ot;
            $summary['total_hours'] += $regular + $ot;
            $summary['estimated_wages'] += $pay;

            if ($status === 'checked_in') {
                $summary['checked_in_count']++;
            } elseif ($status === 'submitted') {
                $summary['submitted_count']++;
                $summary['unpaid_wages'] += $pay;
            } elseif ($status === 'approved') {
                $summary['approved_count']++;
                $summary['approved_wages'] += $pay;
                $summary['unpaid_wages'] += $pay;
            } elseif ($status === 'processing') {
                $summary['processing_count']++;
                $summary['processing_wages'] += $pay;
                $summary['unpaid_wages'] += $pay;
            } elseif ($status === 'paid') {
                $summary['paid_count']++;
                $summary['paid_wages'] += $pay;
            } elseif ($status === 'rejected') {
                $summary['rejected_count']++;
            } else {
                $summary['unpaid_wages'] += $pay;
            }
        }

        return $summary;
    }

    private function get_sales_commission_summary($records = null) {
        if ($records === null) { $records = $this->get_sales_commission_records(); }
        $summary = array('sale_total' => 0, 'commission_total' => 0, 'commission_owed' => 0, 'commission_paid' => 0, 'open_count' => 0);
        foreach ($records as $row) {
            $sale = (float) ($row['sale_amount'] ?? 0); $commission = (float) ($row['commission_amount'] ?? 0); $status = sanitize_key($row['status'] ?? 'pending');
            $summary['sale_total'] += $sale;
            if ($status !== 'void') { $summary['commission_total'] += $commission; }
            if ($status === 'paid') { $summary['commission_paid'] += $commission; } elseif ($status !== 'void') { $summary['commission_owed'] += $commission; $summary['open_count']++; }
        }
        return $summary;
    }
