    private function render_accounting_timesheets($is_admin = false) {
        $records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        $summary = $this->get_employee_timesheet_summary($records);
        $employees = $this->get_timesheet_employee_users();
        $status_options = $this->get_timesheet_status_options();
        $today = $this->get_company_current_date();
        $base_url = $this->get_dashboard_url($is_admin, array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'timesheets'));
        $selected_employee_id = absint($_GET['dmx_employee_id'] ?? 0);
        $selected_employee = $selected_employee_id > 0 ? get_user_by('id', $selected_employee_id) : false;
        $checked_in_records = array_values(array_filter($records, function($record) {
            return sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? '') === 'checked_in';
        }));
        $action_records = array_values(array_filter($records, function($record) {
            $status = sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? 'submitted');
            if ($this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets() && $status === 'submitted') {
                return true;
            }
            if ($this->current_user_can_process_employee_timesheets() && in_array($status, array('approved', 'processing'), true)) {
                return true;
            }
            return false;
        }));
        $employee_history = array();
        if ($selected_employee_id > 0) {
            $employee_history = array_values(array_filter($records, function($record) use ($selected_employee_id) {
                return (int) ($record['employee_id'] ?? 0) === (int) $selected_employee_id;
            }));
        }
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-accounting-timesheets">
            <div class="dmx-report-grid">
                <div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Time Card Snapshot</h3>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Currently Checked In</strong><span><?php echo esc_html((string) count($checked_in_records)); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Waiting for Manager Approval</strong><span><?php echo esc_html((string) $summary['submitted_count']); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Ready for Accounting</strong><span><?php echo esc_html((string) $summary['approved_count']); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Processing</strong><span><?php echo esc_html((string) $summary['processing_count']); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Total Hours Logged</strong><span><?php echo esc_html(number_format($summary['total_hours'], 2)); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Estimated Open Wage Cost</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($summary['unpaid_wages'])); ?></span></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-help-box"><h4>Today’s checked-in hourly employees</h4>
                    <?php if (empty($checked_in_records)) : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-empty" style="margin-top:10px;">No hourly employees are currently checked in.</div>
                    <?php else : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-list" style="margin-top:10px;">
                            <?php foreach ($checked_in_records as $record) : ?>
                                <?php $employee_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_employee_id' => (int) ($record['employee_id'] ?? 0)), $base_url); ?>
                                <a class="dmx-list-item" href="<?php echo esc_url($employee_url); ?>" style="text-decoration:none;">
                                    <div><strong><?php echo esc_html($record['employee_name'] ?? 'Employee'); ?></strong><span><?php echo esc_html(($record['employee_role'] ?? 'Hourly Employee') . ' • Checked in ' . $this->format_timecard_stamp($record['check_in_at'] ?? '', $record['check_in_ts'] ?? 0, $record['check_in_timezone'] ?? '')); ?></span></div>
                                    <div><?php echo $this->status_pill('checked_in'); ?></div>
                                </a>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </div>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                    <div><h3 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Hourly Employees</h3><p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin:0;">Tap an employee to open their time card history.</p></div>
                    <?php if ($selected_employee_id > 0) : ?><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($base_url); ?>">Clear Employee View</a><?php endif; ?>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-grid dmx-timesheet-employee-grid" style="margin-bottom:0;">
                    <?php if (empty($employees)) : ?>
                        <div class="dmx-empty" style="grid-column:1/-1;">No hourly employees have been added yet.</div>
                    <?php else : ?>
                        <?php foreach ($employees as $employee) : ?>
                            <?php
                            $employee_records = array_values(array_filter($records, function($record) use ($employee) { return (int) ($record['employee_id'] ?? 0) === (int) $employee->ID; }));
                            $employee_open = array_values(array_filter($employee_records, function($record) { return sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? '') === 'checked_in'; }));
                            $employee_pending = count(array_filter($employee_records, function($record) { return sanitize_key($record['status'] ?? '') === 'submitted'; }));
                            $latest = !empty($employee_records) ? $employee_records[0] : null;
                            $employee_url = add_query_arg(array('dmx_employee_id' => (int) $employee->ID), $base_url);
                            $card_style = $selected_employee_id === (int) $employee->ID ? 'border-color:#173b68;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(23,59,104,.12);' : '';
                            ?>
                            <a class="dmx-card dmx-timesheet-employee-card" href="<?php echo esc_url($employee_url); ?>" style="text-decoration:none;padding:16px;<?php echo esc_attr($card_style); ?>">
                                <strong style="display:block;color:#102844;font-size:15px;margin-bottom:6px;"><?php echo esc_html($employee->display_name); ?></strong>
                                <span style="display:block;color:#61738b;font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;">
                                    <?php if (!empty($employee_open)) : ?>Currently checked in<?php elseif ($employee_pending > 0) : ?><?php echo esc_html((string) $employee_pending); ?> waiting approval<?php elseif ($latest) : ?>Last card: <?php echo esc_html($latest['date'] ?? ''); ?><?php else : ?>No time cards yet<?php endif; ?>
                                </span>
                                <span style="display:block;margin-top:10px;"><?php echo !empty($employee_open) ? $this->status_pill('checked_in') : ($employee_pending > 0 ? $this->status_pill('pending') : $this->status_pill('draft')); ?></span>
                            </a>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </div>
            </div>

            <?php if ($selected_employee_id > 0) : ?>
                <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                    <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                        <div><h3 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Employee Time Card Folder<?php echo $selected_employee ? ' — ' . esc_html($selected_employee->display_name) : ''; ?></h3><p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin:0;">Approved, processing, paid, rejected, and submitted sessions stay organized under the employee.</p></div>
                    </div>
                    <?php echo $this->render_employee_timesheet_table($employee_history); ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <div class="dmx-card dmx-timecard-action-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <div class="dmx-quote-section-head">
                    <div><h3 class="dmx-panel-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Time Cards Needing Action</h3><p class="dmx-inline-note" style="margin:0;">Submitted cards wait for approval. Approved cards wait for accounting.</p></div>
                </div>
                <?php echo $this->render_employee_timesheet_table($action_records); ?>
                <?php echo $this->render_employee_timesheet_mobile_action_list($action_records); ?>
            </div>

            <details class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <summary style="cursor:pointer;font-weight:800;color:#173253;">Manual adjustment / add missed time card</summary>
                <form method="post" style="margin-top:16px;">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?><input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_employee_timesheet"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="accounting"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="timesheets">
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Employee</label><select name="timesheet_employee_id" required><option value="">Select hourly employee</option><?php foreach ($employees as $employee) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($employee->ID); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($employee->display_name); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Role / Crew Type</label><select name="timesheet_employee_role"><option value="Technician">Technician</option><option value="Helper">Helper</option><option value="Warehouse Staff">Warehouse Staff</option><option value="Parts Representative">Parts Representative</option><option value="Other Hourly Employee">Other Hourly Employee</option></select></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Date Worked</label><input type="date" name="timesheet_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr($today); ?>" required></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid-3">
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Regular Hours</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="timesheet_regular_hours" placeholder="8.00"></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Overtime Hours</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="timesheet_overtime_hours" placeholder="0.00"></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Hourly Rate</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="timesheet_hourly_rate" placeholder="Internal wage rate"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid"><div class="dmx-field"><label>Linked Work Order / Job</label><input type="text" name="timesheet_work_order_ref" placeholder="Work order number, customer, or job reference"></div><div class="dmx-field"><label>Status</label><select name="timesheet_status"><?php foreach ($status_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div></div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><textarea name="timesheet_notes" placeholder="Reason for manual adjustment, job notes, approved overtime reason, or accounting notes"></textarea></div><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Manual Time Card</button>
                </form>
            </details>
        </div>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_employee_timesheet_mobile_action_list($records) {
        $status_options = $this->get_timesheet_status_options();
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-mobile-timecard-actions">';
        if (empty($records)) {
            echo '<div class="dmx-empty">No time cards need action right now.</div>';
        } else {
            foreach ($records as $row) {
                $status = sanitize_key($row['status'] ?? 'submitted');
                $display_status = $status === 'submitted' ? 'pending' : ($status === 'rejected' ? 'cancelled' : $status);
                $employee_name = $row['employee_name'] ?? 'Employee';
                $check_in_display = $this->format_timecard_stamp($row['check_in_at'] ?? ($row['start_time'] ?? ''), $row['check_in_ts'] ?? 0, $row['check_in_timezone'] ?? '');
                $check_out_display = $this->format_timecard_stamp($row['check_out_at'] ?? ($row['end_time'] ?? ''), $row['check_out_ts'] ?? 0, $row['check_out_timezone'] ?? '');
                if ($status === 'checked_in' && ($check_out_display === '—' || $check_out_display === '')) {
                    $check_out_display = 'Still checked in';
                }
                $time_details = trim((string) ($row['work_order_ref'] ?? ''));
                $break_minutes = (string) ($row['break_minutes'] ?? '');
                if ($break_minutes !== '') {
                    $time_details .= ($time_details !== '' ? ' | ' : '') . 'Break: ' . $break_minutes . ' min';
                }
                $hours_summary = number_format((float) ($row['regular_hours'] ?? 0), 2) . ' reg / ' . number_format((float) ($row['overtime_hours'] ?? 0), 2) . ' OT';

                echo '<details class="dmx-mobile-timecard-action">';
                echo '<summary><span class="dmx-mobile-timecard-person"><strong>' . esc_html($employee_name) . '</strong><small>' . esc_html($row['date'] ?? '') . '</small></span><span class="dmx-mobile-timecard-status">' . $this->status_pill($display_status) . '</span></summary>';
                echo '<div class="dmx-mobile-timecard-action-body">';
                echo '<div class="dmx-mobile-timecard-row"><span>Role</span><strong>' . esc_html($row['employee_role'] ?? '') . '</strong></div>';
                echo '<div class="dmx-mobile-timecard-row"><span>Time</span><strong>' . esc_html($check_in_display . ' — ' . $check_out_display) . '</strong></div>';
                echo '<div class="dmx-mobile-timecard-row"><span>Hours</span><strong>' . esc_html($hours_summary) . '</strong></div>';
                echo '<div class="dmx-mobile-timecard-row"><span>Est. Pay</span><strong>' . esc_html($this->format_money((float) ($row['total_pay'] ?? 0))) . '</strong></div>';
                if ($time_details !== '') {
                    echo '<div class="dmx-mobile-timecard-row"><span>Job / Break</span><strong>' . esc_html($time_details) . '</strong></div>';
                }
                echo '<form method="post" class="dmx-mobile-timecard-action-form">';
                wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
                echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="update_employee_timesheet_status"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="accounting"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="timesheets"><input type="hidden" name="timesheet_record_id" value="' . esc_attr($row['id'] ?? '') . '"><select name="timesheet_new_status">';
                $row_status_options = $status_options;
                if ($status === 'checked_in') {
                    $row_status_options = array('checked_in' => 'Checked In');
                    if ($this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets()) { $row_status_options['rejected'] = 'Rejected'; }
                } elseif (!$this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets() && $this->current_user_is_accounting()) {
                    $row_status_options = array($status => $status_options[$status] ?? ucwords($status));
                    if ($status === 'approved') {
                        $row_status_options['processing'] = 'Processing';
                        $row_status_options['paid'] = 'Paid';
                    } elseif ($status === 'processing') {
                        $row_status_options['paid'] = 'Paid';
                    }
                } elseif ($this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets() && !$this->current_user_can_process_employee_timesheets()) {
                    unset($row_status_options['processing']);
                    unset($row_status_options['paid']);
                    unset($row_status_options['checked_in']);
                }
                foreach ($row_status_options as $value => $label) {
                    echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($value) . '" ' . selected($status, $value, false) . '>' . esc_html($label) . '</option>';
                }
                echo '</select><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary">Update</button></form>';
                echo '</div></details>';
            }
        }
        echo '</div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    private function render_employee_timesheet_table($records, $compact = false) {
        $status_options = $this->get_timesheet_status_options(); ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-mobile-line-stack dmx-timesheet-action-table"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Employee</th><th>Role</th><th>Check In</th><th>Check Out</th><th>Reg</th><th>OT</th><th>Rate</th><th>Est. Pay</th><th>Status</th>' . ($compact ? '' : '<th>Linked Job</th><th>Action</th>') . '</tr></thead><tbody>';
        if (empty($records)) {
            echo '<tr><td colspan="' . ($compact ? '10' : '12') . '"><div class="dmx-empty">No employee time cards have been entered yet.</div></td></tr>';
        } else {
            foreach ($records as $row) {
                $status = sanitize_key($row['status'] ?? 'submitted');
                $check_in_display = $this->format_timecard_stamp($row['check_in_at'] ?? ($row['start_time'] ?? ''), $row['check_in_ts'] ?? 0, $row['check_in_timezone'] ?? '');
                $check_out_display = $this->format_timecard_stamp($row['check_out_at'] ?? ($row['end_time'] ?? ''), $row['check_out_ts'] ?? 0, $row['check_out_timezone'] ?? '');
                if ($status === 'checked_in' && ($check_out_display === '—' || $check_out_display === '')) {
                    $check_out_display = 'Still checked in';
                }
                echo '<tr><td data-label="Date">' . esc_html($row['date'] ?? '') . '</td><td data-label="Employee">' . esc_html($row['employee_name'] ?? 'Employee') . '</td><td data-label="Role">' . esc_html($row['employee_role'] ?? '') . '</td><td data-label="Check In">' . esc_html($check_in_display) . '</td><td data-label="Check Out">' . esc_html($check_out_display) . '</td><td data-label="Reg">' . esc_html(number_format((float) ($row['regular_hours'] ?? 0), 2)) . '</td><td data-label="OT">' . esc_html(number_format((float) ($row['overtime_hours'] ?? 0), 2)) . '</td><td data-label="Rate">' . esc_html($this->format_money((float) ($row['hourly_rate'] ?? 0))) . '</td><td data-label="Est. Pay">' . esc_html($this->format_money((float) ($row['total_pay'] ?? 0))) . '</td><td data-label="Status">' . $this->status_pill($status === 'submitted' ? 'pending' : ($status === 'rejected' ? 'cancelled' : $status)) . '</td>';
                if (!$compact) {
                    $time_details = trim((string) ($row['work_order_ref'] ?? ''));
                    $break_minutes = (string) ($row['break_minutes'] ?? '');
                    if ($break_minutes !== '') {
                        $time_details .= ($time_details !== '' ? ' | ' : '') . 'Break: ' . $break_minutes . ' min';
                    }
                    echo '<td data-label="Linked Job">' . esc_html($time_details) . '</td><td data-label="Action"><form method="post">'; wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
                    echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="update_employee_timesheet_status"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="accounting"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="timesheets"><input type="hidden" name="timesheet_record_id" value="' . esc_attr($row['id'] ?? '') . '"><select name="timesheet_new_status">';
                    $row_status_options = $status_options;
                    if ($status === 'checked_in') {
                        $row_status_options = array('checked_in' => 'Checked In');
                        if ($this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets()) { $row_status_options['rejected'] = 'Rejected'; }
                    } elseif (!$this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets() && $this->current_user_is_accounting()) {
                        $row_status_options = array($status => $status_options[$status] ?? ucwords($status));
                        if ($status === 'approved') {
                            $row_status_options['processing'] = 'Processing';
                            $row_status_options['paid'] = 'Paid';
                        } elseif ($status === 'processing') {
                            $row_status_options['paid'] = 'Paid';
                        }
                    } elseif ($this->current_user_can_approve_employee_timesheets() && !$this->current_user_can_process_employee_timesheets()) {
                        unset($row_status_options['processing']);
                        unset($row_status_options['paid']);
                        unset($row_status_options['checked_in']);
                    }
                    foreach ($row_status_options as $value => $label) { echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($value) . '" ' . selected($status, $value, false) . '>' . esc_html($label) . '</option>'; }
                    echo '</select><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" style="margin-top:8px;width:100%;">Update</button></form></td>';
                }
                echo '</tr>';
            }
        }
        echo '</tbody></table></div>'; return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_accounting_commissions($is_admin = false) {
        $records = $this->get_sales_commission_records(); $summary = $this->get_sales_commission_summary($records); $sales_users = $this->get_commission_sales_users(); $status_options = $this->get_commission_status_options();
        ob_start(); ?>

            </div>
            <div class="dmx-form-card"><h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Add Sales Commission Record</h4><form method="post">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?><input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_sales_commission"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="accounting"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="commissions">
                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3"><div class="dmx-field"><label>Salesperson</label><select name="commission_salesperson_id" required><option value="">Select salesperson</option><?php foreach ($sales_users as $sales_user) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($sales_user->ID); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($sales_user->display_name); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div><div class="dmx-field"><label>Sale Date</label><input type="date" name="commission_sale_date" value="<?php echo esc_attr(current_time('Y-m-d')); ?>" required></div><div class="dmx-field"><label>Status</label><select name="commission_status"><?php foreach ($status_options as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select></div></div>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid"><div class="dmx-field"><label>Customer / Project</label><input type="text" name="commission_customer" placeholder="Customer or project name"></div><div class="dmx-field"><label>Linked Quote / Invoice</label><input type="text" name="commission_linked_document" placeholder="Quote number, invoice number, or job reference"></div></div>
                <div class="dmx-form-grid-3"><div class="dmx-field"><label>Sale Amount</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="commission_sale_amount" placeholder="Customer sale amount"></div><div class="dmx-field"><label>Commission %</label><input type="number" step="0.001" min="0" name="commission_percent" placeholder="Example: 5"></div><div class="dmx-field"><label>Manual Commission Amount</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="commission_amount" placeholder="Optional override"></div></div>
                <div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><textarea name="commission_notes" placeholder="Payment terms, split commission notes, manager approval, or payout notes"></textarea></div><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Save Commission Record</button>
            </form></div>
            <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Sales Commission History</h3><?php echo $this->render_sales_commission_table($records); ?></div>
        </div>
        <?php return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_sales_commission_table($records, $compact = false) {
        $status_options = $this->get_commission_status_options(); ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-table-wrap dmx-mobile-line-stack"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Salesperson</th><th>Customer</th><th>Sale</th><th>%</th><th>Commission</th><th>Status</th>' . ($compact ? '' : '<th>Linked Doc</th><th>Paid Date</th><th>Action</th>') . '</tr></thead><tbody>';
        if (empty($records)) {
            echo '<tr><td colspan="' . ($compact ? '7' : '10') . '"><div class="dmx-empty">No sales commission records have been entered yet.</div></td></tr>';
        } else {
            foreach ($records as $row) {
                $status = sanitize_key($row['status'] ?? 'pending');
                echo '<tr><td data-label="Date">' . esc_html($row['sale_date'] ?? '') . '</td><td data-label="Salesperson">' . esc_html($row['salesperson_name'] ?? 'Salesperson') . '</td><td data-label="Customer">' . esc_html($row['customer'] ?? '') . '</td><td data-label="Sale">' . esc_html($this->format_money((float) ($row['sale_amount'] ?? 0))) . '</td><td data-label="%">' . esc_html(number_format((float) ($row['commission_percent'] ?? 0), 3)) . '%</td><td data-label="Commission">' . esc_html($this->format_money((float) ($row['commission_amount'] ?? 0))) . '</td><td data-label="Status">' . $this->status_pill($status === 'void' ? 'cancelled' : ($status === 'pending' ? 'pending' : $status)) . '</td>';
                if (!$compact) {
                    echo '<td data-label="Linked Doc">' . esc_html($row['linked_document'] ?? '') . '</td><td data-label="Paid Date">' . esc_html($row['paid_date'] ?? '') . '</td><td data-label="Action"><form method="post">'; wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce');
                    echo '<input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="update_sales_commission_status"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="accounting"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="commissions"><input type="hidden" name="commission_record_id" value="' . esc_attr($row['id'] ?? '') . '"><select name="commission_new_status">';
                    foreach ($status_options as $value => $label) { echo '<option value="' . esc_attr($value) . '" ' . selected($status, $value, false) . '>' . esc_html($label) . '</option>'; }
                    echo '</select><button type="submit" class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" style="margin-top:8px;width:100%;">Update</button></form></td>';
                }
                echo '</tr>';
            }
        }
        echo '</tbody></table></div>'; return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_accounting_dashboard_totals() {
        $expense_total = $expense_outstanding = $expense_upcoming = $recurring_monthly = 0;
        $today = strtotime(current_time('Y-m-d'));
        $future = strtotime('+45 days', $today);
        foreach ($this->get_company_expense_records() as $row) {
            $total = (float) ($row['total'] ?? 0);
            $expense_total += $total;
            $status = sanitize_key($row['status'] ?? 'paid');
            if (in_array($status, array('unpaid','upcoming'), true)) { $expense_outstanding += $total; }
            $due_ts = !empty($row['due_date']) ? strtotime($row['due_date']) : 0;
            if ($due_ts && $due_ts >= $today && $due_ts <= $future) { $expense_upcoming += $total; }
            switch ($row['recurring'] ?? 'none') {
                case 'weekly': $recurring_monthly += $total * 4.333; break;
                case 'monthly': $recurring_monthly += $total; break;
                case 'quarterly': $recurring_monthly += $total / 3; break;
                case 'annual': $recurring_monthly += $total / 12; break;
            }
        }
        $ar_total = 0;
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_invoice') as $invoice) {
            $status = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true));
            if (!in_array($status, array('paid','cancelled'), true)) { $ar_total += $this->get_report_document_total($invoice->ID); }
        }
        return array('expense_total' => $expense_total, 'expense_outstanding' => $expense_outstanding, 'expense_upcoming' => $expense_upcoming, 'recurring_monthly' => $recurring_monthly, 'accounts_receivable' => $ar_total);
    }

    private function render_accounting_dashboard($is_admin = false) {
        $base_url = $is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG) : $this->get_portal_page_url();
        $totals = $this->get_accounting_dashboard_totals();
        $expenses = $this->get_company_expense_records();
        $upcoming = array_slice(array_filter($expenses, function($row) { return in_array($row['status'] ?? '', array('unpaid','upcoming'), true) || (($row['recurring'] ?? 'none') !== 'none'); }), 0, 8);
        $open_invoices = array();
        foreach ($this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_invoice', 30) as $invoice) {
            $status = sanitize_key((string) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true));
            if (!in_array($status, array('paid','cancelled'), true)) { $open_invoices[] = $invoice; }
        }
        $timesheet_records = $this->get_employee_timesheet_records();
        $timesheet_summary = $this->get_employee_timesheet_summary($timesheet_records);
        $commission_records = $this->get_sales_commission_records();
        $commission_summary = $this->get_sales_commission_summary($commission_records);
        $cards = array(
            array('title' => 'Messages', 'desc' => 'Team messages and finance updates.', 'url' => add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'messages'), $base_url), 'badge_count' => $this->get_unread_message_count()),
            array('title' => 'Expenses', 'desc' => 'True costs and expenses.', 'url' => add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'expenses'), $base_url)),
            array('title' => 'Timesheets', 'desc' => 'Employee time cards, approvals, and payroll prep.', 'url' => add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'timesheets'), $base_url), 'badge_count' => $this->count_timesheets_ready_for_accounting()),
            array('title' => 'Commissions', 'desc' => 'Sales commission owed and paid.', 'url' => add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'commissions'), $base_url)),
            array('title' => 'Receivables', 'desc' => 'Customer payments and balances.', 'url' => add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'payments'), $base_url)),
            array('title' => 'Reports', 'desc' => 'Finance summaries and reports.', 'url' => add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'reports'), $base_url)),
            array('title' => 'Payments', 'desc' => 'Recurring and upcoming payments.', 'url' => add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'supplier_payments'), $base_url)),
            array('title' => 'Purchase Orders', 'desc' => 'Supplier, rental, and subcontractor POs.', 'url' => add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'purchase_orders'), $base_url)),
        );
        ob_start(); ?>
        <div class="dmx-accounting-dashboard dmx-role-dashboard">
            <?php echo $this->render_role_dashboard_cards($cards); ?>
            <div class="dmx-report-grid">
                <div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Accounting Snapshot</h3>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Outstanding Customer Payments</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($totals['accounts_receivable'])); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Total Expenses Logged</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($totals['expense_total'])); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Outstanding Expenses</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($totals['expense_outstanding'])); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Recurring Monthly Estimate</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($totals['recurring_monthly'])); ?></span></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Upcoming Expenses</h3><?php echo $this->render_accounting_expense_table($upcoming, true); ?></div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-report-grid" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Payroll / Timesheet Snapshot</h3>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Total Employee Hours</strong><span><?php echo esc_html(number_format($timesheet_summary['total_hours'], 2)); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Pending Manager Approval</strong><span><?php echo esc_html((string) $timesheet_summary['submitted_count']); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Approved for Payroll</strong><span><?php echo esc_html((string) $timesheet_summary['approved_count']); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Processing</strong><span><?php echo esc_html((string) $timesheet_summary['processing_count']); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Approved Wage Cost</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($timesheet_summary['approved_wages'])); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-mini-links"><a href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'timesheets'), $base_url)); ?>">Open Timesheets</a></div>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-report-panel"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">Sales Commission Snapshot</h3>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Tracked Sales</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($commission_summary['sale_total'])); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Commissions Owed</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($commission_summary['commission_owed'])); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-report-kpi"><strong>Commissions Paid</strong><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($commission_summary['commission_paid'])); ?></span></div>
                    <div class="dmx-mini-links"><a href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'accounting', 'dmx_subtab' => 'commissions'), $base_url)); ?>">Open Commissions</a></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;"><h3 class="dmx-panel-title">Outstanding Customer Payments</h3><div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Invoice</th><th>Customer</th><th>Status</th><th>Total</th><th>Action</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <?php if (!empty($open_invoices)) : foreach (array_slice($open_invoices, 0, 10) as $invoice) : ?>
                <tr><td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('invoice', $invoice->ID)); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_customer_name', true)); ?></td><td><?php echo $this->status_pill(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true)); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($this->get_report_document_total($invoice->ID))); ?></td><td><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url(add_query_arg(array('dmx_tab' => 'sales', 'dmx_subtab' => 'invoices', 'dmx_edit_invoice' => $invoice->ID), $base_url)); ?>">Open</a></td></tr>
            <?php endforeach; else : ?>
                <tr><td colspan="5"><div class="dmx-empty">No outstanding customer invoices right now.</div></td></tr>
            <?php endif; ?>
            </tbody></table></div></div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_accounting_expense_table($records, $compact = false, $empty_message = 'No expenses have been entered yet.') {
        $categories = $this->get_accounting_expense_categories();
        ob_start();
        echo '<div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Category</th><th>Vendor</th><th>Total</th><th>Status</th>' . ($compact ? '' : '<th>Due</th><th>Recurring</th><th>Linked Job</th><th>Reference</th>') . '</tr></thead><tbody>';
        if (empty($records)) {
            echo '<tr><td colspan="' . ($compact ? '5' : '9') . '"><div class="dmx-empty">' . esc_html($empty_message) . '</div></td></tr>';
        } else {
            foreach ($records as $row) {
                $cat = $row['category'] ?? 'other';
                $status = sanitize_key($row['status'] ?? 'paid');
                echo '<tr><td>' . esc_html($row['date'] ?? '') . '</td><td>' . esc_html($categories[$cat] ?? ($row['category_label'] ?? 'Other')) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($row['vendor'] ?? '') . '</td><td>' . esc_html($this->format_money((float) ($row['total'] ?? 0))) . '</td><td>' . $this->status_pill($status === 'unpaid' ? 'pending' : ($status === 'upcoming' ? 'open' : 'paid')) . '</td>';
                if (!$compact) {
                    echo '<td>' . esc_html($row['due_date'] ?? '') . '</td><td>' . esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $row['recurring'] ?? 'none'))) . '</td><td>' . esc_html($row['linked_record'] ?? '') . '</td><td>' . esc_html($row['reference'] ?? '') . '</td>';
                }
                echo '</tr>';
            }
        }
        echo '</tbody></table></div>';
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_expense_category_summary($records) {
        $categories = $this->get_accounting_expense_categories();
        $summary = array();
        foreach ($records as $row) {
            $cat = $row['category'] ?? 'other';
            if (!isset($summary[$cat])) { $summary[$cat] = 0; }
            $summary[$cat] += (float) ($row['total'] ?? 0);
        }
        arsort($summary);
        if (empty($summary)) { return '<div class="dmx-empty">No expense categories yet.</div>'; }
        $out = '<div class="dmx-list">';
        foreach (array_slice($summary, 0, 12, true) as $cat => $total) {
            $out .= '<div class="dmx-list-item"><div><strong>' . esc_html($categories[$cat] ?? 'Other') . '</strong><span>Tracked accountant category</span></div><strong>' . esc_html($this->format_money($total)) . '</strong></div>';
        }
        return $out . '</div>';
    }

    private function get_invoice_true_cost_total($invoice_id = 0) {
        $total = 0;
        $invoices = $invoice_id > 0 ? array(get_post($invoice_id)) : $this->get_report_scoped_posts('dm_invoice');
        foreach ($invoices as $invoice) {
            if (!$invoice) { continue; }
            $items = get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_invoice_line_items', true);
            if (!is_array($items)) { continue; }
            foreach ($items as $item) { $total += (float) ($item['line_true_cost'] ?? 0); }
        }
        return $total;
    }

    private function get_message_threads_table() {
        global $wpdb;
        return $wpdb->prefix . 'dmx_message_threads';
    }

    private function get_message_participants_table() {
        global $wpdb;
        return $wpdb->prefix . 'dmx_message_participants';
    }

    private function get_messages_table() {
        global $wpdb;
        return $wpdb->prefix . 'dmx_messages';
    }

    private function create_message_tables() {
        global $wpdb;

        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php';

        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        $threads_table = $this->get_message_threads_table();
        $participants_table = $this->get_message_participants_table();
        $messages_table = $this->get_messages_table();

        $sql_threads = "CREATE TABLE {$threads_table} (
            id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            company_key varchar(190) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            subject varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            linked_record_type varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            linked_record_id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            created_by_user_id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            created_at datetime NOT NULL,
            updated_at datetime NOT NULL,
            is_archived tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            PRIMARY KEY  (id),
            KEY company_key (company_key),
            KEY linked_record (linked_record_type,linked_record_id),
            KEY updated_at (updated_at)
        ) {$charset_collate};";

        $sql_participants = "CREATE TABLE {$participants_table} (
            id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            thread_id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            user_id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            role_key varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            joined_at datetime NOT NULL,
            last_read_at datetime NULL DEFAULT NULL,
            is_hidden tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            PRIMARY KEY  (id),
            UNIQUE KEY thread_user (thread_id,user_id),
            KEY user_id (user_id),
            KEY thread_id (thread_id)
        ) {$charset_collate};";

        $sql_messages = "CREATE TABLE {$messages_table} (
            id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            thread_id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            sender_user_id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            message_body longtext NOT NULL,
            created_at datetime NOT NULL,
            edited_at datetime NULL DEFAULT NULL,
            has_attachments tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            PRIMARY KEY  (id),
            KEY thread_id (thread_id),
            KEY sender_user_id (sender_user_id),
            KEY created_at (created_at)
        ) {$charset_collate};";

        dbDelta($sql_threads);
        dbDelta($sql_participants);
        dbDelta($sql_messages);
    }

    private function user_can_oversee_all_company_messages($user_id = 0) {
        $user_id = $user_id ? absint($user_id) : get_current_user_id();
        if ($user_id <= 0) {
            return false;
        }
        if (user_can($user_id, 'manage_options') || user_can($user_id, self::MANAGER_ROLE) || user_can($user_id, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE)) {
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    private function user_can_access_message_thread($thread_id, $user_id = 0) {
        global $wpdb;

        $thread_id = absint($thread_id);
        $user_id = $user_id ? absint($user_id) : get_current_user_id();
        if ($thread_id <= 0 || $user_id <= 0) {
            return false;
        }

        $thread = $this->get_message_thread($thread_id);
        if (!$thread) {
            return false;
        }

        $user_company_key = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_key', true);
        if ($user_company_key === '' || $user_company_key !== (string) $thread->company_key) {
            return false;
        }

        if ($this->user_can_oversee_all_company_messages($user_id)) {
            return true;
        }

        $participants_table = $this->get_message_participants_table();
        $participant_id = (int) $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT id FROM {$participants_table} WHERE thread_id = %d AND user_id = %d LIMIT 1", $thread_id, $user_id));
        return $participant_id > 0;
    }

    private function get_message_thread($thread_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        $thread_id = absint($thread_id);
        if ($thread_id <= 0) {
            return null;
        }
        $table = $this->get_message_threads_table();
        return $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$table} WHERE id = %d LIMIT 1", $thread_id));
    }

    private function get_message_thread_participants($thread_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        $thread_id = absint($thread_id);
        if ($thread_id <= 0) {
            return array();
        }
        $participants_table = $this->get_message_participants_table();
        $rows = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$participants_table} WHERE thread_id = %d ORDER BY id ASC", $thread_id));
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    }

    private function get_message_thread_messages($thread_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        $thread_id = absint($thread_id);
        if ($thread_id <= 0) {
            return array();
        }
        $table = $this->get_messages_table();
        $rows = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$table} WHERE thread_id = %d ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC", $thread_id));
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    }

    private function get_company_message_recipients() {
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($company_key === '') {
            return array();
        }
        $roles = array(self::MANAGER_ROLE, self::ACCOUNTING_ROLE, self::STAFF_ROLE, self::SALES_ROLE, self::COORDINATOR_ROLE, self::TECHNICIAN_ROLE, self::WAREHOUSE_ROLE, self::PARTS_ROLE, self::RECEPTIONIST_ROLE, self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE);
        $users = $this->get_company_users($company_key, $roles, 'approved');
        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
        return array_values(array_filter($users, function($user) use ($current_user_id) {
            return (int) $user->ID !== (int) $current_user_id;
        }));
    }

    private function get_message_threads_for_user($mode = 'inbox', $limit = 50) {
        global $wpdb;

        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        if ($company_key === '' || $user_id <= 0) {
            return array();
        }

        $threads_table = $this->get_message_threads_table();
        $participants_table = $this->get_message_participants_table();
        $limit = max(1, min(200, (int) $limit));

        if ($this->user_can_oversee_all_company_messages()) {
            if ($mode === 'sent') {
                $sql = $wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$threads_table} WHERE company_key = %s AND created_by_user_id = %d AND is_archived = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT %d", $company_key, $user_id, $limit);
            } else {
                $sql = $wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$threads_table} WHERE company_key = %s AND is_archived = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT %d", $company_key, $limit);
            }
            $rows = $wpdb->get_results($sql);
            return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
        }

        if ($mode === 'sent') {
            $sql = $wpdb->prepare("SELECT t.* FROM {$threads_table} t INNER JOIN {$participants_table} p ON p.thread_id = t.id WHERE t.company_key = %s AND t.created_by_user_id = %d AND p.user_id = %d AND t.is_archived = 0 ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC LIMIT %d", $company_key, $user_id, $user_id, $limit);
        } else {
            $sql = $wpdb->prepare("SELECT t.* FROM {$threads_table} t INNER JOIN {$participants_table} p ON p.thread_id = t.id WHERE t.company_key = %s AND p.user_id = %d AND t.is_archived = 0 ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC LIMIT %d", $company_key, $user_id, $limit);
        }

        $rows = $wpdb->get_results($sql);
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    }

    private function get_unread_message_count() {
        global $wpdb;

        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        if ($company_key === '' || $user_id <= 0) {
            return 0;
        }

        $threads_table = $this->get_message_threads_table();
        $participants_table = $this->get_message_participants_table();

        // Only show the dashboard red dot for message threads that are actually unread
        // for the current user. Managers/accounting can still view company threads,
        // but opened/read threads should not keep the Messages tile flagged forever.
        return (int) $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$threads_table} t INNER JOIN {$participants_table} p ON p.thread_id = t.id WHERE t.company_key = %s AND p.user_id = %d AND t.is_archived = 0 AND (p.last_read_at IS NULL OR p.last_read_at < t.updated_at)", $company_key, $user_id));
    }

    private function mark_message_thread_read($thread_id, $user_id = 0) {
        global $wpdb;
        $thread_id = absint($thread_id);
        $user_id = $user_id ? absint($user_id) : get_current_user_id();
        if ($thread_id <= 0 || $user_id <= 0) {
            return;
        }

        $thread = $this->get_message_thread($thread_id);
        if (!$thread) {
            return;
        }

        $user_company_key = (string) get_user_meta($user_id, '_dmx_company_key', true);
        if ($user_company_key === '' || $user_company_key !== (string) $thread->company_key) {
            return;
        }

        $participants_table = $this->get_message_participants_table();
        $now = current_time('mysql');
        $existing_participant_id = (int) $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT id FROM {$participants_table} WHERE thread_id = %d AND user_id = %d LIMIT 1", $thread_id, $user_id));

        if ($existing_participant_id > 0) {
            $wpdb->update(
                $participants_table,
                array('last_read_at' => $now),
                array('thread_id' => $thread_id, 'user_id' => $user_id),
                array('%s'),
                array('%d', '%d')
            );
            return;
        }

        // Managers/accounting can oversee company messages even when they were not
        // original recipients. Add a quiet participant record when they open a thread
        // so future replies can be tracked as read/unread for that manager/accountant.
        if (!$this->user_can_oversee_all_company_messages($user_id)) {
            return;
        }

        $participant_user = get_userdata($user_id);
        $wpdb->insert(
            $participants_table,
            array(
                'thread_id' => $thread_id,
                'user_id' => $user_id,
                'role_key' => $participant_user && !empty($participant_user->roles[0]) ? $participant_user->roles[0] : '',
                'joined_at' => $now,
                'last_read_at' => $now,
                'is_hidden' => 0,
            ),
            array('%d', '%d', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%d')
        );
    }

    private function insert_message_thread(array $data) {
        global $wpdb;

        $threads_table = $this->get_message_threads_table();
        $participants_table = $this->get_message_participants_table();
        $messages_table = $this->get_messages_table();

        $subject = sanitize_text_field($data['subject'] ?? '');
        $body = wp_kses_post($data['body'] ?? '');
        $company_key = sanitize_title($data['company_key'] ?? '');
        $linked_record_type = sanitize_key($data['linked_record_type'] ?? '');
        $linked_record_id = absint($data['linked_record_id'] ?? 0);
        $created_by_user_id = absint($data['created_by_user_id'] ?? 0);
        $recipient_ids = array_values(array_unique(array_filter(array_map('absint', (array) ($data['recipient_ids'] ?? array())))));

        if ($subject === '' || $body === '' || $company_key === '' || $created_by_user_id <= 0) {
            return new WP_Error('dmx_message_invalid', 'Please complete the message subject, recipients, and body.');
        }

        $recipient_ids = array_values(array_filter($recipient_ids, function($recipient_id) use ($company_key) {
            return (string) get_user_meta($recipient_id, '_dmx_company_key', true) === $company_key;
        }));

        if (empty($recipient_ids)) {
            return new WP_Error('dmx_message_no_recipients', 'Please choose at least one valid recipient in your company.');
        }

        $now = current_time('mysql');

        $inserted = $wpdb->insert(
            $threads_table,
            array(
                'company_key' => $company_key,
                'subject' => $subject,
                'linked_record_type' => $linked_record_type,
                'linked_record_id' => $linked_record_id,
                'created_by_user_id' => $created_by_user_id,
                'created_at' => $now,
                'updated_at' => $now,
                'is_archived' => 0,
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s', '%d', '%d', '%s', '%s', '%d')
        );

        if (!$inserted) {
            return new WP_Error('dmx_message_save_failed', 'Could not create the message thread.');
        }

        $thread_id = (int) $wpdb->insert_id;

        $participant_ids = array_values(array_unique(array_merge(array($created_by_user_id), $recipient_ids)));
        foreach ($participant_ids as $participant_id) {
            $participant_user = get_userdata($participant_id);
            $wpdb->insert(
                $participants_table,
                array(
                    'thread_id' => $thread_id,
                    'user_id' => $participant_id,
                    'role_key' => $participant_user && !empty($participant_user->roles[0]) ? $participant_user->roles[0] : '',
                    'joined_at' => $now,
                    'last_read_at' => $participant_id === $created_by_user_id ? $now : null,
                    'is_hidden' => 0,
                ),
                array('%d', '%d', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%d')
            );
        }

        $wpdb->insert(
            $messages_table,
            array(
                'thread_id' => $thread_id,
                'sender_user_id' => $created_by_user_id,
                'message_body' => $body,
                'created_at' => $now,
                'edited_at' => null,
                'has_attachments' => 0,
            ),
            array('%d', '%d', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%d')
        );

        return $thread_id;
    }

    private function append_message_to_thread($thread_id, $sender_user_id, $body) {
        global $wpdb;

        $thread_id = absint($thread_id);
        $sender_user_id = absint($sender_user_id);
        $body = wp_kses_post($body);
        if ($thread_id <= 0 || $sender_user_id <= 0 || trim(wp_strip_all_tags($body)) === '') {
            return new WP_Error('dmx_message_invalid_reply', 'Please add a message before sending your reply.');
        }

        if (!$this->user_can_access_message_thread($thread_id, $sender_user_id)) {
            return new WP_Error('dmx_message_access_denied', 'You do not have access to that message thread.');
        }

        $messages_table = $this->get_messages_table();
        $threads_table = $this->get_message_threads_table();
        $participants_table = $this->get_message_participants_table();
        $now = current_time('mysql');

        $inserted = $wpdb->insert(
            $messages_table,
            array(
                'thread_id' => $thread_id,
                'sender_user_id' => $sender_user_id,
                'message_body' => $body,
                'created_at' => $now,
                'edited_at' => null,
                'has_attachments' => 0,
            ),
            array('%d', '%d', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%d')
        );

        if (!$inserted) {
            return new WP_Error('dmx_message_reply_failed', 'Could not send that reply.');
        }

        $wpdb->update($threads_table, array('updated_at' => $now), array('id' => $thread_id), array('%s'), array('%d'));
        $wpdb->update($participants_table, array('last_read_at' => $now), array('thread_id' => $thread_id, 'user_id' => $sender_user_id), array('%s'), array('%d', '%d'));

        return true;
    }

    private function get_message_tab_url($subtab = 'inbox', $thread_id = 0, $extra_args = array(), $is_admin = null) {
        if ($is_admin === null) {
            $is_admin = is_admin() && current_user_can('manage_options');
        }
        $args = array(
            'dmx_tab' => 'messages',
            'dmx_subtab' => sanitize_key($subtab),
        );
        if ($thread_id > 0) {
            $args['dmx_thread_id'] = absint($thread_id);
        }
        if (!empty($extra_args)) {
            $args = array_merge($args, $extra_args);
        }
        $base = $is_admin ? admin_url('admin.php?page=' . self::MENU_SLUG) : $this->get_portal_page_url();
        return add_query_arg($args, $base);
    }

    private function redirect_to_messages($subtab = 'inbox', $type = 'success', $message = '', $thread_id = 0) {
        $args = array();
        if ($message !== '') {
            $args['dmx_msg_type'] = sanitize_key($type);
            $args['dmx_msg'] = rawurlencode($message);
        }
        $redirect_url = $this->get_message_tab_url($subtab, $thread_id, $args);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect_url);
        exit;
    }

    private function handle_create_message_thread($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_view_messages()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('overview', 'error', 'You do not have access to the message center.');
        }

        $recipient_ids = isset($_POST['message_recipient_ids']) ? (array) wp_unslash($_POST['message_recipient_ids']) : array();
        $result = $this->insert_message_thread(array(
            'subject' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['message_subject'] ?? '')),
            'body' => wp_unslash($_POST['message_body'] ?? ''),
            'company_key' => $this->get_current_user_company_key(),
            'linked_record_type' => sanitize_key(wp_unslash($_POST['message_linked_record_type'] ?? '')),
            'linked_record_id' => absint($_POST['message_linked_record_id'] ?? 0),
            'created_by_user_id' => get_current_user_id(),
            'recipient_ids' => $recipient_ids,
        ));

        if (is_wp_error($result)) {
            $this->redirect_to_messages('compose', 'error', $result->get_error_message());
        }

        $this->redirect_to_messages('thread', 'success', 'Message sent successfully.', (int) $result);
    }

    private function handle_reply_message_thread($tab) {
        $thread_id = absint($_POST['message_thread_id'] ?? 0);
        $result = $this->append_message_to_thread($thread_id, get_current_user_id(), wp_unslash($_POST['message_body'] ?? ''));
        if (is_wp_error($result)) {
            $this->redirect_to_messages('thread', 'error', $result->get_error_message(), $thread_id);
        }
        $this->redirect_to_messages('thread', 'success', 'Reply sent.', $thread_id);
    }

    private function handle_mark_message_read($tab) {
        $thread_id = absint($_POST['message_thread_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($thread_id > 0 && $this->user_can_access_message_thread($thread_id)) {
            $this->mark_message_thread_read($thread_id);
        }
        $this->redirect_to_messages('thread', 'success', 'Message marked as read.', $thread_id);
    }

    private function render_messages_section($is_admin = false) {
        $subtab = sanitize_key($_GET['dmx_subtab'] ?? 'inbox');
        if (!in_array($subtab, array('inbox', 'sent', 'compose', 'thread'), true)) {
            $subtab = 'inbox';
        }

        $thread_id = absint($_GET['dmx_thread_id'] ?? 0);

        if ($subtab === 'thread' && $thread_id > 0 && $this->user_can_access_message_thread($thread_id)) {
            $this->mark_message_thread_read($thread_id);
        }

        $inbox_url = $this->get_message_tab_url('inbox', 0, array(), $is_admin);
        $sent_url = $this->get_message_tab_url('sent', 0, array(), $is_admin);
        $compose_url = $this->get_message_tab_url('compose', 0, array(), $is_admin);

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-card">
            <div class="dmx-action-row" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
                <a class="dmx-btn <?php echo $subtab === 'inbox' ? '' : 'dmx-btn-secondary'; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url($inbox_url); ?>">Inbox</a>
                <a class="dmx-btn <?php echo $subtab === 'sent' ? '' : 'dmx-btn-secondary'; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url($sent_url); ?>">Sent</a>
                <a class="dmx-btn <?php echo $subtab === 'compose' ? '' : 'dmx-btn-secondary'; ?>" href="<?php echo esc_url($compose_url); ?>">Compose</a>
            </div>

            <?php
            if ($subtab === 'compose') {
                echo $this->render_messages_compose_form();
            } elseif ($subtab === 'thread') {
                echo $this->render_message_thread_screen($thread_id, $is_admin);
            } elseif ($subtab === 'sent') {
                echo $this->render_message_thread_list('sent', $is_admin);
            } else {
                echo $this->render_message_thread_list('inbox', $is_admin);
            }
            ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_message_thread_list($mode = 'inbox', $is_admin = false) {
        $threads = $this->get_message_threads_for_user($mode, 100);
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-table-wrap">
            <table class="dmx-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Subject</th>
                        <th>Related</th>
                        <th>Participants</th>
                        <th>Last Activity</th>
                        <th>Status</th>
                        <th>Open</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php if (!empty($threads)) : ?>
                        <?php foreach ($threads as $thread) : ?>
                            <?php
                            $participants = $this->get_message_thread_participants($thread->id);
                            $participant_names = array();
                            $is_unread = false;
                            foreach ($participants as $participant) {
                                $user = get_userdata((int) $participant->user_id);
                                if ($user) {
                                    $participant_names[] = $user->display_name;
                                }
                                if ((int) $participant->user_id === get_current_user_id() && (empty($participant->last_read_at) || strtotime((string) $participant->last_read_at) < strtotime((string) $thread->updated_at))) {
                                    $is_unread = true;
                                }
                            }
                            $related = '—';
                            if (!empty($thread->linked_record_type) && !empty($thread->linked_record_id)) {
                                $related = ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', (string) $thread->linked_record_type)) . ' #' . absint($thread->linked_record_id);
                            }
                            ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><strong><?php echo esc_html($thread->subject); ?></strong></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($related); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(implode(', ', array_slice($participant_names, 0, 4))); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($thread->updated_at); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo $is_unread ? $this->status_pill('open', 'Unread') : $this->status_pill('complete', 'Read'); ?></td>
                                <td><a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_message_tab_url('thread', (int) $thread->id, array(), $is_admin)); ?>">Open</a></td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    <?php else : ?>
                        <tr><td colspan="6"><div class="dmx-empty">No message threads found yet.</div></td></tr>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_messages_compose_form() {
        $recipients = $this->get_company_message_recipients();
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <form method="post" class="dmx-form-card">
            <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_message_thread">
            <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="messages">

            <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Recipients</label>
                    <select name="message_recipient_ids[]" multiple size="8" required>
                        <?php foreach ($recipients as $recipient) : ?>
                            <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($recipient->ID); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($recipient->display_name . ' — ' . $this->get_portal_role_label($recipient)); ?></option>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </select>
                    <div class="dmx-inline-note">Hold Ctrl or Command to select more than one teammate.</div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <div class="dmx-field">
                        <label>Subject</label>
                        <input type="text" name="message_subject" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Linked Record Type</label>
                            <select name="message_linked_record_type">
                                <option value="">None</option>
                                <option value="customer">Customer</option>
                                <option value="work_order">Work Order</option>
                                <option value="quote">Quote</option>
                                <option value="invoice">Invoice</option>
                                <option value="inspection">Inspection</option>
                                <option value="inventory">Inventory</option>
                                <option value="receipt">Receipt / Expense</option>
                            </select>
                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field">
                            <label>Linked Record ID</label>
                            <input type="number" min="0" name="message_linked_record_id" placeholder="Optional ID">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-field">
                <label>Message</label>
                <textarea name="message_body" rows="8" required></textarea>
                </div>

            <div class="dmx-action-row">
                <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Send Message</button>
            </div>
        </form>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function render_message_thread_screen($thread_id, $is_admin = false) {
        $thread = $this->get_message_thread($thread_id);
        if (!$thread || !$this->user_can_access_message_thread($thread_id)) {
            return '<div class="dmx-empty">That message thread could not be found or you do not have permission to view it.</div>';
        }

        $messages = $this->get_message_thread_messages($thread_id);
        $participants = $this->get_message_thread_participants($thread_id);
        $participant_names = array();
        foreach ($participants as $participant) {
            $user = get_userdata((int) $participant->user_id);
            if ($user) {
                $participant_names[] = $user->display_name . ' (' . $this->get_portal_role_label($user) . ')';
            }
        }

        $related = '';
        if (!empty($thread->linked_record_type) && !empty($thread->linked_record_id)) {
            $related = ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', (string) $thread->linked_record_type)) . ' #' . absint($thread->linked_record_id);
        }

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-form-card" style="margin-top:0;">
            <div class="dmx-page-head" style="margin-bottom:12px;">
                <div>
                    <h3 style="font-size:24px;margin-bottom:6px;"><?php echo esc_html($thread->subject); ?></h3>
                    <p><?php echo esc_html(implode(', ', $participant_names)); ?></p>
                    <?php if ($related !== '') : ?><p style="margin-top:6px;"><strong>Related:</strong> <?php echo esc_html($related); ?></p><?php endif; ?>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-action-row">
                    <a class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" href="<?php echo esc_url($this->get_message_tab_url('inbox', 0, array(), $is_admin)); ?>">Back to Inbox</a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dmx-list">
                <?php foreach ($messages as $message) : ?>
                    <?php $sender = get_userdata((int) $message->sender_user_id); ?>
                    <div class="dmx-list-item" style="display:block;">
                        <strong><?php echo esc_html($sender ? $sender->display_name : 'Unknown User'); ?></strong>
                        <span><?php echo esc_html($message->created_at); ?></span>
                        <div style="margin-top:10px;color:#173253;line-height:1.6;"><?php echo wpautop(wp_kses_post($message->message_body)); ?></div>
                    </div>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>

            <form method="post" style="margin-top:18px;">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="reply_message_thread">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="messages">
                <input type="hidden" name="dmx_subtab" value="thread">
                <input type="hidden" name="message_thread_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($thread_id); ?>">
                <div class="dmx-field">
                    <label>Reply</label>
                    <textarea name="message_body" rows="6" required></textarea>
                </div>
                <div class="dmx-action-row">
                    <button type="submit" class="dmx-btn">Send Reply</button>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function sum_meta_for_posts($post_type, $meta_key, $filters = array()) {
        $args = array(
            'post_type' => $post_type,
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'posts_per_page' => -1,
            'fields' => 'ids',
        );
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && $post_type !== self::PART_POST_TYPE && $post_type !== 'dm_customer' && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager() && !$this->current_user_is_coordinator()) {
            $args['author'] = get_current_user_id();
        }
        if (!empty($filters)) {
            $meta_query = array();
            foreach ($filters as $key => $value) {
                $meta_query[] = array('key' => $key, 'value' => $value, 'compare' => '=');
            }
            $args['meta_query'] = $meta_query;
        }
        $args = $this->apply_company_scope_to_query_args($args, $post_type);
        $ids = get_posts($args);
        $total = 0;
        foreach ($ids as $id) {
            $val = get_post_meta($id, $meta_key, true);
            $total += (float) $val;
        }
        return $total;
    }



    private function current_user_can_view_subcontractors() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_accounting() || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager() || $this->user_can_create_subcontractor_pos() || $this->current_user_is_subcontractor();
    }

    private function current_user_can_manage_subcontractors() {
        return current_user_can('manage_options') || $this->current_user_is_accounting() || $this->current_user_is_portal_manager();
    }

    private function get_subcontractor_po_status_options() {
        return array(
            'draft' => 'Draft',
            'issued' => 'Issued',
            'accepted' => 'Accepted',
            'in_progress' => 'In Progress',
            'completed' => 'Completed',
            'closed' => 'Closed',
            'cancelled' => 'Cancelled',
        );
    }

    private function get_subcontractor_invoice_status_options() {
        return array(
            'draft' => 'Draft',
            'submitted' => 'Submitted',
            'under_review' => 'Under Review',
            'approved' => 'Approved',
            'rejected' => 'Rejected',
            'paid' => 'Paid',
        );
    }

    public function subcontractor_po_meta_box($post) {
        wp_nonce_field('dmx_subcontractor_po_meta_nonce', 'dmx_subcontractor_po_meta_nonce_field');
        $subcontractor_id = (int) get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', true);
        ?>
        <p><label><strong>Subcontractor User ID</strong></label><br><input type="number" name="dmx_subcontractor_user_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($subcontractor_id); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
        <p><label><strong>Linked Work Order ID</strong></label><br><input type="number" name="dmx_linked_work_order_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_linked_work_order_id', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
        <p><label><strong>Site Address</strong></label><br><input type="text" name="dmx_site_address" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_site_address', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
        <p><label><strong>Scope of Work</strong></label><br><textarea name="dmx_scope_of_work" style="width:100%;min-height:120px;"><?php echo esc_textarea(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_scope_of_work', true)); ?></textarea></p>
        <p><label><strong>Status</strong></label><br>
            <select name="dmx_status" style="width:100%;">
                <?php foreach ($this->get_subcontractor_po_status_options() as $value => $label) : ?>
                    <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>" <?php selected(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_status', true), $value); ?>><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </select>
        </p>
        <?php
    }

    public function subcontractor_invoice_meta_box($post) {
        wp_nonce_field('dmx_subcontractor_invoice_meta_nonce', 'dmx_subcontractor_invoice_meta_nonce_field');
        ?>
        <p><label><strong>Linked PO ID</strong></label><br><input type="number" name="dmx_po_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_po_id', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
        <p><label><strong>Invoice Number</strong></label><br><input type="text" name="dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number_manual" value="<?php echo esc_attr(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number_manual', true)); ?>" style="width:100%;"></p>
        <p><label><strong>Status</strong></label><br>
            <select name="dmx_status" style="width:100%;">
                <?php foreach ($this->get_subcontractor_invoice_status_options() as $value => $label) : ?>
                    <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>" <?php selected(get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_status', true), $value); ?>><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            </select>
        </p>
        <?php
    }

    public function save_subcontractor_po_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_subcontractor_po_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_subcontractor_po_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', absint($_POST['dmx_subcontractor_user_id'] ?? 0));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_linked_work_order_id', absint($_POST['dmx_linked_work_order_id'] ?? 0));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site_address', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_site_address'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_scope_of_work', wp_kses_post($_POST['dmx_scope_of_work'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', sanitize_key($_POST['dmx_status'] ?? 'draft'));
        $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
        $this->ensure_document_number('subcontractor_po', $post_id);
    }

    public function save_subcontractor_invoice_meta($post_id) {
        if (!$this->can_save_meta($post_id, 'dmx_subcontractor_invoice_meta_nonce_field', 'dmx_subcontractor_invoice_meta_nonce')) {
            return;
        }
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_po_id', absint($_POST['dmx_po_id'] ?? 0));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number_manual', sanitize_text_field($_POST['dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number_manual'] ?? ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', sanitize_key($_POST['dmx_status'] ?? 'draft'));
        $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
        $this->ensure_document_number('subcontractor_invoice', $post_id);
    }

    private function get_generic_purchase_order_type_labels() {
        return array(
            'materials' => 'Materials / Parts',
            'supplier_order' => 'Supplier Order',
            'equipment_rental' => 'Equipment Rental',
            'tools_equipment' => 'Tools / Equipment',
            'vehicle_truck' => 'Vehicle / Truck',
            'office_admin' => 'Office / Admin',
            'other' => 'Other',
        );
    }

    private function get_generic_purchase_order_type_label($type) {
        $labels = $this->get_generic_purchase_order_type_labels();
        $type = sanitize_key((string) $type);
        return $labels[$type] ?? 'Other';
    }

    private function get_generic_purchase_order_records() {
        $all = get_option('dmx_generic_purchase_order_records', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $records = isset($all[$company_key]) && is_array($all[$company_key]) ? $all[$company_key] : array();
        usort($records, function($a, $b) {
            return strcmp((string) ($b['created_at'] ?? $b['issue_date'] ?? ''), (string) ($a['created_at'] ?? $a['issue_date'] ?? ''));
        });
        return $records;
    }

    private function save_generic_purchase_order_records($records) {
        $all = get_option('dmx_generic_purchase_order_records', array());
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $all[$company_key] = array_values($records);
        update_option('dmx_generic_purchase_order_records', $all);
    }

    private function get_next_generic_purchase_order_number() {
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $option_key = 'dmx_generic_purchase_order_next_number';
        $all = get_option($option_key, array());
        $next = isset($all[$company_key]) ? max(1001, (int) $all[$company_key]) : 1001;
        $all[$company_key] = $next + 1;
        update_option($option_key, $all);
        return 'PO-' . $next;
    }

    private function create_generic_purchase_order($tab) {
        if (!$this->user_can_create_subcontractor_pos() && !current_user_can('manage_options') && !$this->current_user_is_portal_manager()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You are not allowed to create purchase orders.');
        }

        $title = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['generic_po_title'] ?? ''));
