        $vendor = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['generic_po_vendor'] ?? ''));
        if ($title === '' || $vendor === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please enter a PO title and vendor.');
        }

        $type = sanitize_key($_POST['generic_po_type'] ?? 'other');
        $type_labels = $this->get_generic_purchase_order_type_labels();
        if (!isset($type_labels[$type])) {
            $type = 'other';
        }

        $subtotal = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['generic_po_subtotal'] ?? '0');
        $tax = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['generic_po_tax'] ?? '0');
        $total = $this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['generic_po_total'] ?? '');
        $subtotal_float = is_numeric($subtotal) ? (float) $subtotal : 0;
        $tax_float = is_numeric($tax) ? (float) $tax : 0;
        $total_float = is_numeric($total) && $total !== '' ? (float) $total : ($subtotal_float + $tax_float);

        $status = sanitize_key($_POST['generic_po_status'] ?? 'draft');
        if (!in_array($status, array('draft','issued','ordered','received','cancelled'), true)) {
            $status = 'draft';
        }

        $issue_date = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['generic_po_issue_date'] ?? current_time('Y-m-d')));
        if (!preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $issue_date)) {
            $issue_date = current_time('Y-m-d');
        }

        $needed_by = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['generic_po_needed_by'] ?? ''));
        if ($needed_by !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $needed_by)) {
            $needed_by = '';
        }

        $records = $this->get_generic_purchase_order_records();
        array_unshift($records, array(
            'id' => uniqid('dmx_gpo_', true),
            'po_number' => $this->get_next_generic_purchase_order_number(),
            'company_key' => $this->get_current_user_company_key(),
            'title' => $title,
            'vendor' => $vendor,
            'type' => $type,
            'type_label' => $type_labels[$type],
            'work_order_id' => absint($_POST['generic_po_work_order_id'] ?? 0),
            'issue_date' => $issue_date,
            'needed_by' => $needed_by,
            'subtotal' => number_format($subtotal_float, 2, '.', ''),
            'tax' => number_format($tax_float, 2, '.', ''),
            'total' => number_format($total_float, 2, '.', ''),
            'status' => $status,
            'reference' => sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['generic_po_reference'] ?? '')),
            'notes' => sanitize_textarea_field(wp_unslash($_POST['generic_po_notes'] ?? '')),
            'created_by' => get_current_user_id(),
            'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        ));

        $this->save_generic_purchase_order_records($records);
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'General purchase order created successfully.');
    }

    private function create_subcontractor_po($tab) {
        if (!$this->user_can_create_subcontractor_pos()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'You are not allowed to create subcontractor POs.');
        }
        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['scpo_title'] ?? '');
        $subcontractor_user_id = absint($_POST['scpo_subcontractor_user_id'] ?? 0);
        $work_order_id = absint($_POST['scpo_work_order_id'] ?? 0);
        $issue_date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['scpo_issue_date'] ?? '');
        $scheduled_date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['scpo_scheduled_date'] ?? '');
        $site_address = sanitize_text_field($_POST['scpo_site_address'] ?? '');
        $scope_of_work = wp_kses_post($_POST['scpo_scope_of_work'] ?? '');
        $labour_amount = (float) ($this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['scpo_labour_amount'] ?? '0') ?: 0);
        $material_allowance = (float) ($this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['scpo_material_allowance'] ?? '0') ?: 0);
        $tax = (float) ($this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['scpo_tax'] ?? '0') ?: 0);
        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['scpo_notes'] ?? '');
        if ($title === '' || $subcontractor_user_id <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Please add a PO title and choose a subcontractor.');
        }
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ($company_key === '' || (string) get_user_meta($subcontractor_user_id, '_dmx_company_key', true) !== $company_key) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'That subcontractor is not in your company.');
        }
        $post_id = wp_insert_post(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_subcontractor_po',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_title' => $title,
            'post_content' => $scope_of_work,
            'post_author' => get_current_user_id(),
        ));
        if (!$post_id || is_wp_error($post_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'error', 'Could not create subcontractor PO.');
        }
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', $subcontractor_user_id);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_linked_work_order_id', $work_order_id);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_issue_date', $issue_date);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_scheduled_date', $scheduled_date);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_site_address', $site_address);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_scope_of_work', $scope_of_work);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_labour_amount', number_format($labour_amount, 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_material_allowance', number_format($material_allowance, 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_subtotal', number_format($labour_amount + $material_allowance, 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_tax', number_format($tax, 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_total', number_format($labour_amount + $material_allowance + $tax, 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_notes', $notes);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', 'issued');
        $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
        $this->ensure_document_number('subcontractor_po', $post_id);
        $this->redirect_with_message($tab, 'success', 'Subcontractor PO created successfully.');
    }

    private function submit_subcontractor_invoice($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_is_subcontractor() && !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'You are not allowed to submit subcontractor invoices.');
        }
        $title = sanitize_text_field($_POST['scinv_title'] ?? '');
        $po_id = absint($_POST['scinv_po_id'] ?? 0);
        $invoice_number = sanitize_text_field($_POST['scinv_invoice_number'] ?? '');
        $invoice_date = sanitize_text_field($_POST['scinv_invoice_date'] ?? '');
        $subtotal = (float) ($this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['scinv_subtotal'] ?? '0') ?: 0);
        $tax = (float) ($this->sanitize_decimal($_POST['scinv_tax'] ?? '0') ?: 0);
        $notes = wp_kses_post($_POST['scinv_notes'] ?? '');
        if ($title === '' || $po_id <= 0 || $invoice_number === '') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'Please complete the invoice title, PO, and invoice number.');
        }
        $po = get_post($po_id);
        if (!$po || $po->post_type !== 'dm_subcontractor_po') {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'Could not find that subcontractor PO.');
        }
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        if ((string) get_post_meta($po_id, '_dmx_company_key', true) !== $company_key) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'You do not have access to that PO.');
        }
        $assigned_subcontractor_id = (int) get_post_meta($po_id, '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', true);
        if ($this->current_user_is_subcontractor() && $assigned_subcontractor_id !== get_current_user_id()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'You can only invoice against your own assigned PO.');
        }
        $post_id = wp_insert_post(array(
            'post_type' => 'dm_subcontractor_invoice',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_title' => $title,
            'post_content' => $notes,
            'post_author' => get_current_user_id(),
        ));
        if (!$post_id || is_wp_error($post_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'Could not submit subcontractor invoice.');
        }
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_po_id', $po_id);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_linked_work_order_id', (int) get_post_meta($po_id, '_dmx_linked_work_order_id', true));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', $assigned_subcontractor_id);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_invoice_date', $invoice_date);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number_manual', $invoice_number);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_subtotal', number_format($subtotal, 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_tax', number_format($tax, 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_total', number_format($subtotal + $tax, 2, '.', ''));
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_notes', $notes);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_dmx_status', 'submitted');
        $this->stamp_company_key_on_post($post_id);
        $this->ensure_document_number('subcontractor_invoice', $post_id);
        $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'success', 'Subcontractor invoice submitted successfully.');
    }

    private function update_subcontractor_po_status($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_subcontractors() && !$this->user_can_create_subcontractor_pos()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'You are not allowed to update subcontractor POs.');
        }
        $po_id = absint($_POST['scpo_id'] ?? 0);
        $status = sanitize_key($_POST['scpo_status'] ?? 'draft');
        if ($po_id <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'Could not find that PO.');
        }
        update_post_meta($po_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
        $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'success', 'Subcontractor PO status updated.');
    }

    private function update_subcontractor_invoice_status($tab) {
        if (!$this->current_user_can_manage_subcontractors()) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'You are not allowed to update subcontractor invoices.');
        }
        $invoice_id = absint($_POST['scinv_id'] ?? 0);
        $status = sanitize_key($_POST['scinv_status'] ?? 'submitted');
        if ($invoice_id <= 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'error', 'Could not find that subcontractor invoice.');
        }
        update_post_meta($invoice_id, '_dmx_status', $status);
        $this->redirect_with_message('subcontractors', 'success', 'Subcontractor invoice status updated.');
    }

    private function get_company_scoped_posts($post_type, $limit = -1, $extra_meta = array()) {
        $args = array(
            'post_type' => $post_type,
            'post_status' => array('publish', 'draft', 'pending', 'private'),
            'posts_per_page' => $limit,
            'orderby' => 'date',
            'order' => 'DESC',
            'meta_query' => array(
                array(
                    'key' => '_dmx_company_key',
                    'value' => $this->get_current_user_company_key(),
                    'compare' => '=',
                ),
            ),
        );
        foreach ($extra_meta as $row) {
            $args['meta_query'][] = $row;
        }
        return get_posts($args);
    }

    private function render_subcontractors_section($is_admin = false) {
        $can_review_subcontractor_invoices = $this->current_user_can_manage_subcontractors() || current_user_can('manage_options');
        $is_manager_side = $this->user_can_create_subcontractor_pos() || $can_review_subcontractor_invoices;
        $company_key = $this->get_current_user_company_key();
        $subcontractors = $this->get_company_users($company_key, array(self::SUBCONTRACTOR_ROLE));
        $work_orders = $this->get_company_scoped_posts('dm_work_order', 200);
        $manager_pos = $this->get_company_scoped_posts('dm_subcontractor_po', 200);
        $manager_invoices = $this->get_company_scoped_posts('dm_subcontractor_invoice', 200);
        $my_pos = $this->get_company_scoped_posts('dm_subcontractor_po', 200, array(array('key' => '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', 'value' => get_current_user_id(), 'compare' => '=')));
        $my_invoices = $this->get_company_scoped_posts('dm_subcontractor_invoice', 200, array(array('key' => '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', 'value' => get_current_user_id(), 'compare' => '=')));
        $available_po_for_invoice = $this->current_user_is_subcontractor() ? $my_pos : $manager_pos;
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Subcontractor Workflow</h4>
            <p style="margin:0;color:#61738b;">Create purchase orders for subcontractors, let subcontractors submit invoices against assigned work, and compare PO totals against invoice totals.</p>
        </div>

        <?php if ($is_manager_side) : ?>
        <div class="dmx-panels" style="margin-bottom:18px;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;">
            <div class="dmx-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Create Subcontractor PO</h4>
                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="create_subcontractor_po">
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="subcontractors">
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>PO Title</label><input type="text" name="scpo_title" required></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Subcontractor</label><select name="scpo_subcontractor_user_id" required><option value="">Select</option><?php foreach ($subcontractors as $sub_user) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($sub_user->ID); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($sub_user->display_name); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select>
                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Linked Work Order</label><select name="scpo_work_order_id"><option value="">Select</option><?php foreach ($work_orders as $work_order) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($work_order->ID); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('work_order', $work_order->ID) . ' - ' . $work_order->post_title); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select>
                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Issue Date</label><input type="date" name="scpo_issue_date"></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Scheduled Date</label><input type="date" name="scpo_scheduled_date"></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Site Address</label><input type="text" name="scpo_site_address"></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Labour Amount</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="scpo_labour_amount"></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Material Allowance</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="scpo_material_allowance"></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Tax</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="scpo_tax"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Scope of Work</label><textarea name="scpo_scope_of_work"></textarea>
                </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><textarea name="scpo_notes"></textarea>
                </div>
                    <button class="dmx-btn" type="submit">Create Subcontractor PO</button>
                </form>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-card">
                <?php if ($can_review_subcontractor_invoices) : ?>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Subcontractor Invoices Waiting Review</h4>
                    <?php $submitted = array_filter($manager_invoices, function($post){ return get_post_meta($post->ID, '_dmx_status', true) === 'submitted'; }); ?>
                    <?php if (!empty($submitted)) : ?><div class="dmx-list"><?php foreach ($submitted as $invoice) : ?><div class="dmx-list-item"><div><strong><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('subcontractor_invoice', $invoice->ID)); ?></strong><span><?php echo esc_html($invoice->post_title); ?></span></div><div><span><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true))); ?></span></div></div><?php endforeach; ?></div><?php else : ?><div class="dmx-empty">No subcontractor invoices are waiting review right now.</div><?php endif; ?>
                <?php else : ?>
                    <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">PO Access</h4>
                    <div class="dmx-empty">You can create and update subcontractor purchase orders. Invoice approval stays with managers.</div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Subcontractor POs</h4>
            <?php if (!empty($manager_pos)) : ?>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>PO</th><th>Subcontractor</th><th>Work Order</th><th>Total</th><th>Status</th><th>Update</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <?php foreach ($manager_pos as $po) : $sub_user = get_userdata((int) get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', true)); $wo_id=(int)get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_linked_work_order_id', true); ?>
            <tr>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('subcontractor_po', $po->ID)); ?><br><span style="color:#61738b;"><?php echo esc_html($po->post_title); ?></span></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($sub_user ? $sub_user->display_name : '—'); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($wo_id ? $this->get_document_number('work_order', $wo_id) : '—'); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_total', true))); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_subcontractor_po_status_options()[get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_status', true)] ?? ucfirst((string)get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_status', true))); ?></td>
                <td>
                    <form method="post" style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
                        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="update_subcontractor_po_status"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="subcontractors"><input type="hidden" name="scpo_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($po->ID); ?>">
                        <select name="scpo_status"><?php foreach ($this->get_subcontractor_po_status_options() as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>" <?php selected(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_status', true), $value); ?>><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select>
                        <button class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" type="submit">Save</button>
                    </form>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
            </tbody></table></div>
            <?php else : ?><div class="dmx-empty">No subcontractor POs yet.</div><?php endif; ?>
        </div>

        <?php if ($can_review_subcontractor_invoices) : ?>
        <div class="dmx-card">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Subcontractor Invoices</h4>
            <?php if (!empty($manager_invoices)) : ?>
            <div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Invoice</th><th>Subcontractor</th><th>PO</th><th>Invoice Total</th><th>Variance</th><th>Status</th><th>Update</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <?php foreach ($manager_invoices as $invoice) :
                $sub_user = get_userdata((int) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_subcontractor_user_id', true));
                $po_id = (int) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_po_id', true);
                $po_total = (float) get_post_meta($po_id, '_dmx_total', true);
                $invoice_total = (float) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true);
                $variance = $invoice_total - $po_total;
            ?>
            <tr>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('subcontractor_invoice', $invoice->ID)); ?><br><span style="color:#61738b;"><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number_manual', true)); ?></span></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($sub_user ? $sub_user->display_name : '—'); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($po_id ? $this->get_document_number('subcontractor_po', $po_id) : '—'); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money($invoice_total)); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html(($variance >= 0 ? '+' : '') . number_format($variance, 2)); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_subcontractor_invoice_status_options()[get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true)] ?? ucfirst((string)get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true))); ?></td>
                <td>
                    <form method="post" style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
                        <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                        <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="update_subcontractor_invoice_status"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="subcontractors"><input type="hidden" name="scinv_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($invoice->ID); ?>">
                        <select name="scinv_status"><?php foreach ($this->get_subcontractor_invoice_status_options() as $value => $label) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($value); ?>" <?php selected(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true), $value); ?>><?php echo esc_html($label); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select>
                        <button class="dmx-btn dmx-btn-secondary" type="submit">Save</button>
                    </form>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
            </tbody></table></div>
            <?php else : ?><div class="dmx-empty">No subcontractor invoices submitted yet.</div><?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php endif; ?>

        <?php if ($this->current_user_is_subcontractor() || current_user_can('manage_options')) : ?>
        <div class="dmx-panels" style="margin-top:18px;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;">
            <div class="dmx-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">My POs</h4>
                <?php if (!empty($my_pos)) : ?><div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>PO</th><th>Issue Date</th><th>Scheduled</th><th>Total</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead><tbody><?php foreach ($my_pos as $po) : ?><tr><td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('subcontractor_po', $po->ID)); ?><br><span style="color:#61738b;"><?php echo esc_html($po->post_title); ?></span></td><td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_issue_date', true)); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_scheduled_date', true)); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money(get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_total', true))); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_subcontractor_po_status_options()[get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_status', true)] ?? ucfirst((string)get_post_meta($po->ID, '_dmx_status', true))); ?></td></tr><?php endforeach; ?></tbody></table></div><?php else : ?><div class="dmx-empty">No assigned subcontractor POs yet.</div><?php endif; ?>
            </div>
            <div class="dmx-card">
                <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">Submit Invoice</h4>
                <form method="post">
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('dmx_portal_submit', 'dmx_nonce'); ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="dmx_portal_action" value="submit_subcontractor_invoice"><input type="hidden" name="dmx_tab" value="subcontractors">
                    <div class="dmx-form-grid">
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Invoice Title</label><input type="text" name="scinv_title" required></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>PO</label><select name="scinv_po_id" required><option value="">Select</option><?php foreach ($available_po_for_invoice as $po) : ?><option value="<?php echo esc_attr($po->ID); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('subcontractor_po', $po->ID) . ' - ' . $po->post_title); ?></option><?php endforeach; ?></select>
                    </div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Invoice Number</label><input type="text" name="scinv_invoice_number" required></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Invoice Date</label><input type="date" name="scinv_invoice_date"></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Subtotal</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="scinv_subtotal" required></div>
                        <div class="dmx-field"><label>Tax</label><input type="number" step="0.01" min="0" name="scinv_tax"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dmx-field"><label>Notes</label><textarea name="scinv_notes"></textarea>
                </div>
                    <button class="dmx-btn" type="submit">Submit Invoice</button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dmx-card" style="margin-top:18px;">
            <h4 class="dmx-panel-title">My Submitted Invoices</h4>
            <?php if (!empty($my_invoices)) : ?><div class="dmx-table-wrap"><table class="dmx-table"><thead><tr><th>Invoice</th><th>PO</th><th>Total</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead><tbody><?php foreach ($my_invoices as $invoice) : $po_id = (int) get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_po_id', true); ?><tr><td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_document_number('subcontractor_invoice', $invoice->ID)); ?><br><span style="color:#61738b;"><?php echo esc_html(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_subcontractor_invoice_number_manual', true)); ?></span></td><td><?php echo esc_html($po_id ? $this->get_document_number('subcontractor_po', $po_id) : '—'); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html($this->format_money(get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_total', true))); ?></td><td><?php echo esc_html($this->get_subcontractor_invoice_status_options()[get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true)] ?? ucfirst((string)get_post_meta($invoice->ID, '_dmx_status', true))); ?></td></tr><?php endforeach; ?></tbody></table></div><?php else : ?><div class="dmx-empty">No subcontractor invoices submitted yet.</div><?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

new DoorMatrix_Company_Portal();

/**
 * DoorMatrix Quick Assessment Form
 * Shortcode: [garage_door_quick_assessment_form]
 */

add_action('init', function () {
    register_post_type('gdi_quick_assessment_submission', [
        'labels' => [
            'name' => 'Quick Assessment Submissions',
            'singular_name' => 'Quick Assessment Submission',
        ],
        'public' => false,
        'show_ui' => true,
        'menu_icon' => 'dashicons-shield-alt',
        'supports' => ['title'],
    ]);
});

add_action('add_meta_boxes', function () {
    add_meta_box(
        'gdi_quick_assessment_submission_details',
        'Quick Assessment Submission Details',
        function ($post) {
            $recipient      = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_qa_recipient', true);
            $customer_email = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_qa_customer_email', true);
            $subject        = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_qa_subject', true);
            $summary        = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_qa_summary', true);
            $status         = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_qa_status', true);
            $sent_at        = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_qa_sent_at', true);
            $form_data      = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_qa_form_data', true);

            echo '<p><strong>Door Company Email:</strong> ' . esc_html($recipient) . '</p>';
            echo '<p><strong>Customer Email:</strong> ' . esc_html($customer_email) . '</p>';
            echo '<p><strong>Status:</strong> ' . esc_html($status) . '</p>';
            echo '<p><strong>Sent At:</strong> ' . esc_html($sent_at) . '</p>';
            echo '<p><strong>Subject:</strong> ' . esc_html($subject) . '</p>';

            if (!empty($summary)) {
                echo '<h4>Summary</h4>';
                echo '<pre style="white-space: pre-wrap; background: #f8fafc; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 8px;">' . esc_html($summary) . '</pre>';
            }

            if (is_array($form_data) && !empty($form_data)) {
                echo '<h4>Form Data</h4>';
                echo '<table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse;">';
                foreach ($form_data as $key => $value) {
                    if (is_array($value)) {
                        $value = implode(', ', $value);
                    }
                    echo '<tr>';
                    echo '<td style="width:260px; padding:8px; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; font-weight:bold; vertical-align:top;">' . esc_html($key) . '</td>';
                    echo '<td style="padding:8px; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; white-space:pre-wrap;">' . esc_html((string) $value) . '</td>';
                    echo '</tr>';
                }
                echo '</table>';
            }
        },
        'gdi_quick_assessment_submission',
        'normal',
        'high'
    );
});

add_action('wp_ajax_gdi_send_quick_assessment_email', 'gdi_send_quick_assessment_email');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_gdi_send_quick_assessment_email', 'gdi_send_quick_assessment_email');

function gdi_qa_make_pdf_attachment($base64_data, $filename = 'quick-assessment-report.pdf') {
    if (empty($base64_data)) {
        return '';
    }

    if (strpos($base64_data, 'base64,') !== false) {
        $parts = explode('base64,', $base64_data, 2);
        $base64_data = $parts[1];
    }

    $pdf_binary = base64_decode($base64_data);
    if (!$pdf_binary) {
        return '';
    }

    $safe_filename = sanitize_file_name($filename);
    if (substr($safe_filename, -4) !== '.pdf') {
        $safe_filename .= '.pdf';
    }

    $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
    if (empty($upload_dir['basedir'])) {
        return '';
    }

    $dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . 'gdi-temp';
    if (!file_exists($dir)) {
        wp_mkdir_p($dir);
    }

    $file_path = trailingslashit($dir) . uniqid('gdi_qa_', true) . '_' . $safe_filename;
    $written = file_put_contents($file_path, $pdf_binary);

    if ($written === false) {
        return '';
    }

    return $file_path;
}

function gdi_qa_make_uploaded_image_attachments($files) {
    $result = [
        'paths' => [],
        'labels' => [],
    ];

    if (empty($files) || !is_array($files)) {
        return $result;
    }

    if (!function_exists('wp_handle_upload')) {
        require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
    }

    $allowed_mimes = [
        'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
        'png'          => 'image/png',
        'gif'          => 'image/gif',
        'webp'         => 'image/webp',
        'bmp'          => 'image/bmp',
        'heic'         => 'image/heic',
        'heif'         => 'image/heif',
    ];

    $upload_overrides = [
        'test_form' => false,
        'mimes'     => $allowed_mimes,
    ];

    foreach ($files as $field_key => $file_group) {
        if (!isset($file_group['name'])) {
            continue;
        }

        $names     = is_array($file_group['name']) ? $file_group['name'] : [$file_group['name']];
        $types     = is_array($file_group['type']) ? $file_group['type'] : [$file_group['type']];
        $tmp_names = is_array($file_group['tmp_name']) ? $file_group['tmp_name'] : [$file_group['tmp_name']];
        $errors    = is_array($file_group['error']) ? $file_group['error'] : [$file_group['error']];
        $sizes     = is_array($file_group['size']) ? $file_group['size'] : [$file_group['size']];

        foreach ($names as $index => $original_name) {
            if (empty($original_name)) {
                continue;
            }

            $tmp_name = isset($tmp_names[$index]) ? $tmp_names[$index] : '';
            $error    = isset($errors[$index]) ? (int) $errors[$index] : UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE;
            $type     = isset($types[$index]) ? $types[$index] : '';
            $size     = isset($sizes[$index]) ? (int) $sizes[$index] : 0;

            if ($error !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK || empty($tmp_name) || !is_uploaded_file($tmp_name)) {
                continue;
            }

            $single_file = [
                'name'     => sanitize_file_name($original_name),
                'type'     => $type,
                'tmp_name' => $tmp_name,
                'error'    => $error,
                'size'     => $size,
            ];

            $moved = wp_handle_upload($single_file, $upload_overrides);

            if (!empty($moved['file']) && file_exists($moved['file'])) {
                $clean_field_key = sanitize_text_field((string) $field_key);
                $result['paths'][] = $moved['file'];

                if (!isset($result['labels'][$clean_field_key])) {
                    $result['labels'][$clean_field_key] = [];
                }

                $result['labels'][$clean_field_key][] = basename($moved['file']);
            }
        }
    }

    return $result;
}

function gdi_send_quick_assessment_email() {
    if (!isset($_POST['nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['nonce'])), 'gdi_quick_assessment_email_nonce')) {
        wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Security check failed. Please refresh the page and try again.']);
    }

    $door_company_email   = isset($_POST['door_company_email']) ? sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['door_company_email'])) : '';
    $customer_email       = isset($_POST['customer_email']) ? sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['customer_email'])) : '';
    $send_to_door_company = isset($_POST['send_to_door_company']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['send_to_door_company'])) : 'Yes';
    $send_to_customer     = isset($_POST['send_to_customer']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['send_to_customer'])) : 'No';
    $subject              = isset($_POST['subject']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['subject'])) : 'Quick Door Assessment';
    $summary              = isset($_POST['summary']) ? wp_unslash($_POST['summary']) : '';
    $company              = isset($_POST['company_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['company_name'])) : '';
    $door                 = isset($_POST['door_number']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['door_number'])) : '';
    $door_company_name    = isset($_POST['door_company_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['door_company_name'])) : '';
    $technician_name      = isset($_POST['technician_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['technician_name'])) : '';
    $inspection_date      = isset($_POST['inspection_date']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['inspection_date'])) : '';
    $overall_condition    = isset($_POST['overall_condition']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['overall_condition'])) : '';
    $recommended_action   = isset($_POST['recommended_action']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['recommended_action'])) : '';
    $priority_level       = isset($_POST['priority_level']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['priority_level'])) : '';
    $hazard_present       = isset($_POST['hazard_present']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['hazard_present'])) : '';
    $pdf_base64           = isset($_POST['pdf_base64']) ? wp_unslash($_POST['pdf_base64']) : '';
    $pdf_filename         = isset($_POST['pdf_filename']) ? sanitize_file_name(wp_unslash($_POST['pdf_filename'])) : 'quick-assessment-report.pdf';

    if (empty($door_company_name)) {
        wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Please enter the door company name.']);
    }

    if (empty($door_company_email) || !is_email($door_company_email)) {
        wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Please enter a valid door company email address.']);
    }

    if ($send_to_customer === 'Yes' && (empty($customer_email) || !is_email($customer_email))) {
        wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Please enter a valid customer email address.']);
    }

    if (empty(trim($summary))) {
        wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'No summary was generated.']);
    }

    if (empty($pdf_base64)) {
        wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'PDF file was not generated.']);
    }

    $form_data = [];
    if (isset($_POST['form_data']) && is_array($_POST['form_data'])) {
        foreach (wp_unslash($_POST['form_data']) as $key => $value) {
            $clean_key = sanitize_text_field((string) $key);
            if (is_array($value)) {
                $form_data[$clean_key] = array_map('sanitize_text_field', $value);
            } else {
                $form_data[$clean_key] = sanitize_text_field((string) $value);
            }
        }
    }

    $uploaded_images = gdi_qa_make_uploaded_image_attachments($_FILES);
    $uploaded_image_paths = !empty($uploaded_images['paths']) ? $uploaded_images['paths'] : [];
    $uploaded_image_labels = !empty($uploaded_images['labels']) ? $uploaded_images['labels'] : [];

    if (!empty($uploaded_image_labels)) {
        $form_data['uploaded_image_attachments'] = $uploaded_image_labels;
    }

    $quick_summary = [];
    if (!empty($company)) $quick_summary[] = 'Customer / Company: ' . $company;
    if (!empty($door)) $quick_summary[] = 'Door Number / Opening ID: ' . $door;
    if (!empty($inspection_date)) $quick_summary[] = 'Inspection Date: ' . $inspection_date;
    if (!empty($technician_name)) $quick_summary[] = 'Technician: ' . $technician_name;
    if (!empty($overall_condition)) $quick_summary[] = 'Overall Door Condition: ' . $overall_condition;
    if (!empty($recommended_action)) $quick_summary[] = 'Recommended Action: ' . $recommended_action;
    if (!empty($priority_level)) $quick_summary[] = 'Priority Level: ' . $priority_level;
    if (!empty($hazard_present)) $quick_summary[] = 'Immediate Safety Hazard Present: ' . $hazard_present;

    $quick_summary_html = '';
    if (!empty($quick_summary)) {
        $quick_summary_html .= '<ul style="margin:12px 0 0 18px; padding:0; color:#334155; font-size:14px; line-height:1.6;">';
        foreach ($quick_summary as $line) {
            $quick_summary_html .= '<li>' . esc_html($line) . '</li>';
        }
        $quick_summary_html .= '</ul>';
    }

    $image_attachment_note = '';
    if (!empty($uploaded_image_paths)) {
        $image_attachment_note = '<div style="margin-top:12px; padding:14px; background:#eff6ff; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius:12px; color:#1e3a8a; font-size:14px;"><strong>Assessment photos attached:</strong> ' . count($uploaded_image_paths) . ' image file(s) were included with this report email.</div>';
    }

    $email_message = '
    <html>
    <body style="margin:0; padding:0; background:#eef2f7; font-family:Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;">
      <div style="max-width:760px; margin:0 auto; padding:30px 16px;">
        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e3a8a); border-radius:18px 18px 0 0; padding:24px 28px; color:#ffffff;">
          <div style="font-size:14px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; opacity:.9;">Powered by DoorMatrix</div>
          <h1 style="margin:10px 0 8px; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;">Quick Door Assessment Report</h1>
          <p style="margin:0; font-size:15px; line-height:1.6; color:rgba(255,255,255,.92);">The completed assessment PDF is attached to this email.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="background:#ffffff; border:1px solid #dbe3ef; border-top:none; border-radius:0 0 18px 18px; padding:24px;">
          <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px; color:#0f172a; font-size:18px;">Quick Overview</h3>
          ' . $quick_summary_html . '
          <div style="margin-top:18px; padding:14px; background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:12px; color:#334155; font-size:14px;">
            A PDF copy of the quick assessment report is attached for your records.
          </div>
          ' . $image_attachment_note . '
        </div>
      </div>
    </body>
    </html>';

    $pdf_attachment = gdi_qa_make_pdf_attachment($pdf_base64, $pdf_filename);
    $attachments = [];
    if (!empty($pdf_attachment) && file_exists($pdf_attachment)) {
        $attachments[] = $pdf_attachment;
    }
    if (!empty($uploaded_image_paths)) {
        foreach ($uploaded_image_paths as $image_path) {
            if (!empty($image_path) && file_exists($image_path)) {
                $attachments[] = $image_path;
            }
        }
    }

    $headers = [
        'Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8',
        'Reply-To: ' . (!empty($door_company_email) ? $door_company_email : 'info@garagedoorinspection.com'),
        'Cc: info@garagedoorinspection.com',
    ];

    $door_company_sent = true;
    if ($send_to_door_company === 'Yes' && !empty($door_company_email) && is_email($door_company_email)) {
        $door_company_sent = wp_mail($door_company_email, $subject, $email_message, $headers, $attachments);
    }

    $customer_sent = true;
    if ($send_to_customer === 'Yes' && !empty($customer_email) && is_email($customer_email)) {
        $customer_sent = wp_mail($customer_email, $subject, $email_message, $headers, $attachments);
    }

    $internal_sent = wp_mail(
        'info@garagedoorinspection.com',
        'DoorMatrix Lead Record - ' . $subject,
        $email_message,
        [
            'Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8',
            'Reply-To: ' . (!empty($door_company_email) ? $door_company_email : 'info@garagedoorinspection.com'),
        ],
        $attachments
    );

    $overall_sent = $door_company_sent && $customer_sent && $internal_sent;

    $post_id = wp_insert_post([
        'post_type'   => 'gdi_quick_assessment_submission',
        'post_status' => 'publish',
        'post_title'  => 'Quick Assessment - ' . ($company ?: 'Unknown Company') . ' - ' . ($door ?: 'Unknown Door') . ' - ' . current_time('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
    ]);

    if ($post_id && !is_wp_error($post_id)) {
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_qa_recipient', $door_company_email);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_qa_customer_email', $customer_email);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_qa_subject', $subject);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_qa_summary', $summary);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_qa_form_data', $form_data);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_qa_uploaded_images', $uploaded_image_labels);
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_qa_status', $overall_sent ? 'sent' : 'failed');
        update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_qa_sent_at', current_time('mysql'));
    }

    if (!empty($pdf_attachment) && file_exists($pdf_attachment)) {
        @unlink($pdf_attachment);
    }

    if (!empty($uploaded_image_paths)) {
        foreach ($uploaded_image_paths as $image_path) {
            if (!empty($image_path) && file_exists($image_path)) {
                @unlink($image_path);
            }
        }
    }

    if ($overall_sent) {
        wp_send_json_success(['message' => 'Quick assessment PDF emailed successfully.']);
    }

    wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'One or more emails failed to send. Please check WP Mail SMTP settings.']);
}

add_shortcode('garage_door_quick_assessment_form', function () {
    $door_size_options = range(5, 40);
    ob_start();
?>
