                <label class="checkbox-inline"><input type="checkbox" name="qaHazardItems[]" value="Rollers Out of the Track"> Rollers Out of the Track</label>
                <label class="checkbox-inline"><input type="checkbox" name="qaHazardItems[]" value="Track Damage"> Track Damage</label>
                <label class="checkbox-inline"><input type="checkbox" name="qaHazardItems[]" value="Door Off Track"> Door Off Track</label>
                <label class="checkbox-inline"><input type="checkbox" name="qaHazardItems[]" value="Failed Safety Device"> Failed Safety Device</label>
                <label class="checkbox-inline"><input type="checkbox" name="qaHazardItems[]" value="Unsafe Balance Condition"> Unsafe Balance Condition</label>
                <label class="checkbox-inline"><input type="checkbox" name="qaHazardItems[]" value="Bottom Fixture Failure"> Bottom Fixture Failure</label>
                <label class="checkbox-inline"><input type="checkbox" name="qaHazardItems[]" value="Impact Damage"> Impact Damage</label>
                <label class="checkbox-inline"><input type="checkbox" name="qaHazardItems[]" value="Other Immediate Hazard"> Other Immediate Hazard</label>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="field">
              <label for="qaOverallCondition">Overall Door Condition</label>
              <select id="qaOverallCondition" name="qaOverallCondition">
                <option value="">Select</option>
                <option>Good</option>
                <option>Fair</option>
                <option>Poor</option>
                <option>Critical</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="field">
              <label for="qaRecommendedAction">Recommended Action</label>
              <select id="qaRecommendedAction" name="qaRecommendedAction">
                <option value="">Select</option>
                <option>No Action Needed</option>
                <option>Monitor Condition</option>
                <option>Schedule Repair</option>
                <option>Priority Repair Recommended</option>
                <option>Disable Until Repaired</option>
                <option>Recommend Replacement</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="field">
              <label for="qaPriorityLevel">Priority Level</label>
              <select id="qaPriorityLevel" name="qaPriorityLevel">
                <option value="">Select</option>
                <option>Low</option>
                <option>Medium</option>
                <option>High</option>
                <option>Immediate</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="field full">
              <label for="qaSafetyComments">Technician Safety Comments</label>
              <textarea id="qaSafetyComments" name="qaSafetyComments"></textarea>
            </div>
            <div class="field full">
              <label for="qaRecommendationNotes">Recommendation Notes</label>
              <textarea id="qaRecommendationNotes" name="qaRecommendationNotes" placeholder="Write the clear customer-facing action items here."></textarea>
            </div>
            <div class="field">
              <label for="qaTechSignoff">Technician Signoff</label>
              <input id="qaTechSignoff" name="qaTechSignoff" type="text">
            </div>
            <div class="field">
              <label for="qaCustomerSignoff">Customer / Site Rep Signoff</label>
              <input id="qaCustomerSignoff" name="qaCustomerSignoff" type="text">
            </div>
            <div class="field full">
              <label for="qaSection5Images">Hazard / Recommendation Images</label>
              <input id="qaSection5Images" name="qaSection5Images[]" type="file" accept="image/*" multiple>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="card subcard mt16 email-delivery-card">
            <h3 class="sub-title">Door Company Email & Delivery</h3>
            <div class="grid">
              <div class="field">
                <label for="qaFinalDoorCompanyEmail">Door Company Email *</label>
                <input id="qaFinalDoorCompanyEmail" name="qaFinalDoorCompanyEmail" type="email" placeholder="Door company report email" required>
              </div>
              <div class="field">
                <label for="qaFinalCustomerEmail">Customer Email</label>
                <input id="qaFinalCustomerEmail" name="qaFinalCustomerEmail" type="email" placeholder="Customer copy email">
              </div>
              <div class="field full">
                <label class="checkbox-inline">
                  <input type="checkbox" id="qaSendToDoorCompany" name="qaSendToDoorCompany" checked>
                  Send report to door company
                </label>
              </div>
              <div class="field full">
                <label class="checkbox-inline">
                  <input type="checkbox" id="qaSendToCustomer" name="qaSendToCustomer">
                  Send report to customer
                </label>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="actions final-actions">
            <button type="button" class="btn-secondary qa-prev-step">Back</button>
            <button type="button" class="btn-primary" onclick="generateQuickAssessmentSummary()">Generate Summary</button>
            <button type="button" class="btn-secondary" onclick="emailQuickAssessment()">Email Summary</button>
            <button type="button" class="btn-dark" onclick="emailQuickAssessmentAndStartNewDoor()">Email + New Door</button>
            <button type="reset" class="btn-danger" onclick="clearQuickAssessmentSummary()">Clear Form</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>

    <div class="sidebar">
      <div class="card report">
        <h3>Quick Assessment Summary</h3>
        <p class="muted">Click “Generate Summary” to create a fast customer-ready overview.</p>
        <div id="qaSummaryOutput" class="summary-box">No summary generated yet.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="qaVoiceStatus" class="voice-status idle">Voice input ready.</div>

<script>
window.gdiQuickAssessmentMailConfig = {
  ajaxUrl: "<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin-ajax.php')); ?>",
  nonce: "<?php echo esc_js(wp_create_nonce('gdi_quick_assessment_email_nonce')); ?>"
};

(function () {
  if (window.gdiQuickAssessmentInitialized) return;
  window.gdiQuickAssessmentInitialized = true;

  function initQuickAssessmentForm() {
    const steps = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#quickAssessmentForm .form-step'));
    const nextBtns = document.querySelectorAll('#quickAssessmentForm .qa-next-step');
    const prevBtns = document.querySelectorAll('#quickAssessmentForm .qa-prev-step');
    const stepIndicator = document.getElementById('qaStepIndicator');
    const progressBar = document.getElementById('qaStepProgressBar');
    const hazardPresentField = document.getElementById('qaHazardPresent');
    const hazardOptionsWrap = document.getElementById('qaHazardOptionsWrap');
    const finalActions = document.querySelector('#quickAssessmentForm .final-actions');

    if (!steps.length || !stepIndicator || !progressBar) {
      return;
    }

    let currentStep = 0;
    const stepTitles = steps.map(function (step, index) {
      const titleEl = step.querySelector('.section-title');
      return titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : 'Step ' + (index + 1);
    });
    const stepJumpLabels = ['Site Info', 'Door ID', 'Critical Safety', 'Operator Safety', 'Final'];

    function markFieldInvalid(field) {
      if (!field) return;
      field.style.borderColor = '#dc2626';
    }

    function clearFieldInvalid(field) {
      if (!field) return;
      field.style.borderColor = '#cbd5e1';
    }

    function validateStep(index) {
      if (index === 0) {
        const inspectorCompanyField = document.getElementById('qaInspectorCompany');
        const doorNumberField = document.getElementById('qaDoorNumber');
        const companyValue = inspectorCompanyField ? inspectorCompanyField.value.trim() : '';
        const doorNumberValue = doorNumberField ? doorNumberField.value.trim() : '';

        if (!companyValue) {
          alert('Please enter the Door Company Name before moving to the next section.');
          if (inspectorCompanyField) {
            inspectorCompanyField.focus();
            markFieldInvalid(inspectorCompanyField);
          }
          return false;
        }

        if (!doorNumberValue) {
          alert('Please enter the Door Number / Opening ID before moving to the next section.');
          if (doorNumberField) {
            doorNumberField.focus();
            markFieldInvalid(doorNumberField);
          }
          clearFieldInvalid(inspectorCompanyField);
          return false;
        }

        clearFieldInvalid(inspectorCompanyField);
        clearFieldInvalid(doorNumberField);
      }

      if (index === 1) {
        const widthField = document.getElementById('qaWidth');
        const heightField = document.getElementById('qaHeight');
        const widthValue = widthField ? widthField.value.trim() : '';
        const heightValue = heightField ? heightField.value.trim() : '';

        if (!widthValue || !heightValue) {
          alert('Please select both Width and Height before moving to the next section.');

          if (!widthValue && widthField) {
            widthField.focus();
            markFieldInvalid(widthField);
          }

          if (!heightValue && heightField) {
            markFieldInvalid(heightField);
          }

          return false;
        }

        clearFieldInvalid(widthField);
        clearFieldInvalid(heightField);
      }

      return true;
    }

    function hasDoorCompanyName() {
      return !!(document.getElementById('qaInspectorCompany') && document.getElementById('qaInspectorCompany').value.trim());
    }

    function hasDoorNumberValue() {
      return !!(document.getElementById('qaDoorNumber') && document.getElementById('qaDoorNumber').value.trim());
    }

    function hasDoorSizeValues() {
      const widthField = document.getElementById('qaWidth');
      const heightField = document.getElementById('qaHeight');
      const widthValue = widthField ? widthField.value.trim() : '';
      const heightValue = heightField ? heightField.value.trim() : '';
      return !!widthValue && !!heightValue;
    }

    function canUseSectionJump(index) {
      if (index <= 1) {
        return true;
      }
      return hasDoorCompanyName() && hasDoorNumberValue() && hasDoorSizeValues();
    }

    function updateHazardOptions() {
      if (!hazardPresentField || !hazardOptionsWrap) return;
      const showHazards = hazardPresentField.value === 'Yes';
      hazardOptionsWrap.style.display = showHazards ? '' : 'none';
      if (!showHazards) {
        hazardOptionsWrap.querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(function (cb) {
          cb.checked = false;
        });
      }
    }

    function updateSectionJumpControls() {
      document.querySelectorAll('#quickAssessmentForm .section-jump-tab').forEach(function (button) {
        const buttonIndex = parseInt(button.dataset.stepIndex || '0', 10);
        const jumpAllowed = canUseSectionJump(buttonIndex);
        button.classList.toggle('active', buttonIndex === currentStep);
        button.disabled = !jumpAllowed;
        button.title = jumpAllowed ? '' : 'Select the door company name, door number, and both door size fields first.';
      });

      const activeTab = document.querySelector('#quickAssessmentForm .section-jump-tab.active');
      if (activeTab && typeof activeTab.scrollIntoView === 'function') {
        activeTab.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest', inline: 'center' });
      }
    }

    function setActiveStep(index) {
      steps.forEach(function (step, i) {
        step.classList.toggle('active', i === index);
      });
      currentStep = index;
      stepIndicator.textContent = 'Step ' + (index + 1) + ' of ' + steps.length;
      progressBar.style.width = (((index + 1) / steps.length) * 100) + '%';
      window.gdiQuickAssessmentCurrentStep = index;
      updateSectionJumpControls();
      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
      return true;
    }

    function canNavigateToStep(index) {
      if (index <= currentStep) return true;

      for (let i = 0; i < index; i++) {
        if (!validateStep(i)) {
          setActiveStep(i);
          return false;
        }
      }

      return true;
    }

    function showStep(index) {
      if (index < 0 || index >= steps.length) {
        return false;
      }

      if (!canNavigateToStep(index)) {
        return false;
      }

      return setActiveStep(index);
    }

    function buildSectionJumpControl() {
      const wrap = document.createElement('div');
      wrap.className = 'step-jump-wrap';

      const tabs = document.createElement('div');
      tabs.className = 'step-jump-tabs section-jump-tabs';

      stepTitles.forEach(function (title, index) {
        const button = document.createElement('button');
        button.type = 'button';
        button.className = 'step-jump-tab section-jump-tab';
        button.dataset.stepIndex = String(index);
        button.textContent = stepJumpLabels[index] || title.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '');
        button.title = title.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '');
        button.addEventListener('click', function () {
          if (!canUseSectionJump(index)) {
            alert('Please enter the door company name, door number, and select both door size fields before jumping to other sections.');
            if (!hasDoorCompanyName() || !hasDoorNumberValue()) {
              setActiveStep(0);
            } else {
              setActiveStep(1);
            }
            return;
          }
          showStep(index);
        });
        tabs.appendChild(button);
      });

      wrap.appendChild(tabs);
      return wrap;
    }

    function injectSectionJumpControls() {
      document.querySelectorAll('#quickAssessmentForm .step-nav').forEach(function (nav) {
        if (nav.dataset.jumpReady === 'yes') return;
        nav.dataset.jumpReady = 'yes';
        const jumpControl = buildSectionJumpControl();
        const insertBeforeEl = nav.lastElementChild;
        if (insertBeforeEl) {
          nav.insertBefore(jumpControl, insertBeforeEl);
        } else {
          nav.appendChild(jumpControl);
        }
      });

      if (finalActions && finalActions.dataset.jumpReady !== 'yes') {
        finalActions.dataset.jumpReady = 'yes';
        const jumpControl = buildSectionJumpControl();
        const insertBeforeEl = finalActions.children.length > 1 ? finalActions.children[1] : null;
        if (insertBeforeEl) {
          finalActions.insertBefore(jumpControl, insertBeforeEl);
        } else {
          finalActions.appendChild(jumpControl);
        }
      }
    }

    nextBtns.forEach(function (btn) {
      if (btn.dataset.boundNext === 'yes') return;
      btn.dataset.boundNext = 'yes';
      btn.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (!validateStep(currentStep)) return;
        if (currentStep < steps.length - 1) {
          showStep(currentStep + 1);
        }
      });
    });

    prevBtns.forEach(function (btn) {
      if (btn.dataset.boundPrev === 'yes') return;
      btn.dataset.boundPrev = 'yes';
      btn.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (currentStep > 0) {
          showStep(currentStep - 1);
        }
      });
    });

    if (hazardPresentField && !hazardPresentField.dataset.boundChange) {
      hazardPresentField.dataset.boundChange = 'yes';
      hazardPresentField.addEventListener('change', updateHazardOptions);
    }

    injectSectionJumpControls();
    updateHazardOptions();
    showStep(0);
    window.gdiQuickAssessmentShowStep = showStep;
    window.gdiQuickAssessmentUpdateSectionJumpControls = updateSectionJumpControls;
    setupQuickAssessmentVoiceInput();
  }

  function setupQuickAssessmentVoiceInput() {
    const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    const statusEl = document.getElementById('qaVoiceStatus');

    function setVoiceStatus(message, mode) {
      if (!statusEl) return;
      statusEl.textContent = message;
      statusEl.className = 'voice-status show ' + mode;
      clearTimeout(statusEl._hideTimer);
      if (mode !== 'listening') {
        statusEl._hideTimer = setTimeout(function () {
          statusEl.className = 'voice-status ' + mode;
        }, 2600);
      }
    }

    function disableAllVoiceButtons() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.voice-btn').forEach(function (btn) {
        btn.disabled = true;
      });
    }

    if (!SpeechRecognition) {
      setVoiceStatus('Voice input is not supported on this browser/device.', 'error');
      disableAllVoiceButtons();
      return;
    }

    let recognition = null;
    let activeField = null;
    let activeButton = null;
    let finalTranscriptBuffer = '';

    function createRecognition() {
      const rec = new SpeechRecognition();
      rec.lang = 'en-CA';
      rec.continuous = false;
      rec.interimResults = true;
      rec.maxAlternatives = 1;
      return rec;
    }

    function normalizeTranscript(text) {
      return String(text || '')
        .replace(/\bat symbol\b/gi, '@')
        .replace(/\bdot com\b/gi, '.com')
        .replace(/\bdot ca\b/gi, '.ca')
        .replace(/\bnew line\b/gi, '\n')
        .replace(/\bnext line\b/gi, '\n')
        .replace(/\s+\n/g, '\n')
        .replace(/\n\s+/g, '\n')
        .replace(/[ ]{2,}/g, ' ')
        .trim();
    }

    function setActiveMicButton(button) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.voice-btn').forEach(function (btn) {
        btn.classList.remove('active');
      });
      if (button) button.classList.add('active');
    }

    function stopListening(showIdle) {
      if (recognition) {
        try { recognition.stop(); } catch (e) {}
      }
      recognition = null;
      activeField = null;
      activeButton = null;
      finalTranscriptBuffer = '';
      setActiveMicButton(null);
      if (showIdle) setVoiceStatus('Voice input stopped.', 'idle');
    }

    function insertTextAtCursor(field, text) {
      if (!field || !text) return;

      const normalizedText = normalizeTranscript(text);
      if (!normalizedText) return;

      const isTextArea = field.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'textarea';
      const currentValue = field.value || '';
      const start = typeof field.selectionStart === 'number' ? field.selectionStart : currentValue.length;
      const end = typeof field.selectionEnd === 'number' ? field.selectionEnd : currentValue.length;

      let prefix = currentValue.slice(0, start);
      let suffix = currentValue.slice(end);
      let insertion = normalizedText;

      if (prefix && !prefix.endsWith(' ') && !prefix.endsWith('\n')) {
        insertion = (isTextArea && normalizedText.startsWith('\n')) ? normalizedText : ' ' + insertion;
      }

      if (isTextArea && prefix && !prefix.endsWith('\n') && normalizedText.includes('\n')) {
        insertion = insertion.replace(/^ /, '');
      }

      field.value = prefix + insertion + suffix;

      const cursorPos = (prefix + insertion).length;
      field.focus();
      if (typeof field.setSelectionRange === 'function') {
        field.setSelectionRange(cursorPos, cursorPos);
      }

      field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
      field.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
    }

    function handleVoiceCommand(commandText) {
      const text = String(commandText || '').toLowerCase().trim();
      const activeStepEl = document.querySelector('#quickAssessmentForm .form-step.active');

      if (text.includes('next section') || text.includes('next step')) {
        const nextBtn = activeStepEl ? activeStepEl.querySelector('.qa-next-step') : null;
        if (nextBtn) nextBtn.click();
        setVoiceStatus('Moved to next section.', 'success');
        return true;
      }

      if (text.includes('previous section') || text.includes('previous step') || text.includes('go back') || text === 'back') {
        const prevBtn = activeStepEl ? activeStepEl.querySelector('.qa-prev-step') : null;
        if (prevBtn) prevBtn.click();
        setVoiceStatus('Moved to previous section.', 'success');
        return true;
      }

      if (text.includes('clear field')) {
        if (activeField) {
          activeField.value = '';
          activeField.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
          activeField.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
          setVoiceStatus('Field cleared.', 'success');
        }
        return true;
      }

      if (text.includes('stop listening') || text === 'stop') {
        stopListening(true);
        return true;
      }

      return false;
    }

    function startListening(field, button) {
      if (!field || !button) return;

      if (activeField === field && recognition) {
        stopListening(true);
        return;
      }

      if (recognition) {
        stopListening(false);
      }

      activeField = field;
      activeButton = button;
      finalTranscriptBuffer = '';
      recognition = createRecognition();
      setActiveMicButton(button);

      recognition.onstart = function () {
        setVoiceStatus('Listening… Speak now.', 'listening');
      };

      recognition.onresult = function (event) {
        let interimText = '';
        let finalText = '';

        for (let i = event.resultIndex; i < event.results.length; i++) {
          const transcript = event.results[i][0].transcript || '';
          if (event.results[i].isFinal) {
            finalText += ' ' + transcript;
          } else {
            interimText += ' ' + transcript;
          }
        }

        const cleanedFinal = normalizeTranscript(finalText);
        const cleanedInterim = normalizeTranscript(interimText);

        if (cleanedFinal) {
          if (!handleVoiceCommand(cleanedFinal)) {
            insertTextAtCursor(activeField, cleanedFinal);
            setVoiceStatus('Voice text added.', 'success');
          }
          finalTranscriptBuffer += ' ' + cleanedFinal;
        } else if (cleanedInterim) {
          setVoiceStatus('Listening… "' + cleanedInterim + '"', 'listening');
        }
      };

      recognition.onerror = function (event) {
        const code = event && event.error ? event.error : 'unknown';
        let message = 'Voice input error.';

        if (code === 'not-allowed') {
          message = 'Microphone permission was blocked. Please allow microphone access.';
        } else if (code === 'no-speech') {
          message = 'No speech detected. Try again.';
        } else if (code === 'audio-capture') {
          message = 'No microphone was found on this device.';
        } else if (code === 'network') {
          message = 'Voice service network error.';
        }

        setVoiceStatus(message, 'error');
        setActiveMicButton(null);
        recognition = null;
        activeField = null;
        activeButton = null;
      };

      recognition.onend = function () {
        setActiveMicButton(null);
        recognition = null;
        activeField = null;
        activeButton = null;

        if (finalTranscriptBuffer.trim()) {
          setVoiceStatus('Voice input complete.', 'success');
        } else {
          setVoiceStatus('Voice input stopped.', 'idle');
        }

        finalTranscriptBuffer = '';
      };

      try {
        recognition.start();
      } catch (e) {
        setVoiceStatus('Could not start voice input.', 'error');
        stopListening(false);
      }
    }

    function addVoiceButtons(scope) {
      const container = scope || document;
      const fields = container.querySelectorAll('#quickAssessmentForm input[type="text"], #quickAssessmentForm textarea');

      fields.forEach(function (field) {
        if (!field || field.dataset.voiceEnhanced === 'yes') return;
        if (field.readOnly || field.disabled) return;

        const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
        wrapper.className = 'voice-input-wrap';

        field.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, field);
        wrapper.appendChild(field);

        const btn = document.createElement('button');
        btn.type = 'button';
        btn.className = 'voice-btn';
        btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Start voice input');
        btn.setAttribute('title', 'Tap to dictate');
        btn.innerHTML = '';

        btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
          startListening(field, btn);
        });

        wrapper.appendChild(btn);
        field.dataset.voiceEnhanced = 'yes';
      });
    }

    addVoiceButtons(document);
    setVoiceStatus('Voice input ready. Tap a mic beside any text field.', 'idle');

    const formEl = document.getElementById('quickAssessmentForm');
    if (formEl) {
      const observer = new MutationObserver(function () {
        addVoiceButtons(document);
      });

      observer.observe(formEl, {
        childList: true,
        subtree: true
      });
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initQuickAssessmentForm);
  } else {
    initQuickAssessmentForm();
  }

  window.addEventListener('load', initQuickAssessmentForm);
})();

function getQuickAssessmentFieldValue(id) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!el) return '';
  if (el.type === 'checkbox') return el.checked ? 'Yes' : 'No';
  return (el.value || '').trim();
}

function getQuickAssessmentDoorSizeValue() {
  const width = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaWidth');
  const height = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaHeight');
  if (width && height) return width + ' x ' + height;
  return width || height || '';
}

function getQuickAssessmentCheckedValues(name) {
  return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[name="' + name + '"]:checked')).map(function (el) {
    return el.value;
  });
}

function addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, label, value) {
  if (String(value || '').trim()) {
    lines.push(label + ': ' + value);
  }
}

function generateQuickAssessmentSummary() {
  const lines = [];
  const hazards = getQuickAssessmentCheckedValues('qaHazardItems[]');

  lines.push('QUICK DOOR ASSESSMENT SUMMARY');
  lines.push('Powered by DoorMatrix');
  lines.push('='.repeat(36));
  lines.push('');

  lines.push('DOOR COMPANY INFORMATION');
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Door Company Name', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectorCompany'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Door Company Email', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaFinalDoorCompanyEmail'));
  lines.push('');

  lines.push('1. SITE INFORMATION');
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Customer / Company Name', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCompanyName'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Contact Name', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaContactName'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Site Address', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSiteAddress'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Contact Phone', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPhone'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Inspection Date', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectionDate'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Technician Name', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTechnicianName'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Building Area / Location', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBuildingArea'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Door Number / Opening ID', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaDoorNumber'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Work Order / Job Number', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaJobNumber'));
  lines.push('');

  lines.push('2. DOOR IDENTIFICATION');
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Door Type', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaDoorType'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Operation Type', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOperationType'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Manufacturer', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaManufacturer'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Approximate Door Size', getQuickAssessmentDoorSizeValue());
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Approximate Age', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaApproxAge'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Traffic / Usage Level', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTrafficLevel'));
  lines.push('');

  lines.push('3. CRITICAL DOOR / LIFT SYSTEM SAFETY');
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Door / Curtain Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaDoorCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Door Off Track', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOffTrack'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Track Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTrackCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Cable Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCableCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Spring Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSpringCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Bottom Fixture Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBottomFixtureCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Left End Bearing Plate', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaLeftEndBearingPlateCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Right End Bearing Plate', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRightEndBearingPlateCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Center Bearing', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCenterBearingCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Rollers / Hinges Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRollerHingeCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Door Balance Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBalanceCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Impact Damage', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaImpactDamage'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Broken Window / Glass Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBrokenWindowCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Perimeter / Bottom Seal Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaWeatherSealCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Pusher Springs / Bumpers', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPusherSpringCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Critical Safety Notes', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCriticalSafetyNotes'));
  lines.push('');

  lines.push('4. OPERATOR / ENTRAPMENT SAFETY');
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Operator / Hoist Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOperatorCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Operator Mounting / Brackets', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOperatorMounting'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Photo Eyes', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPhotoEyes'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Safety Edge', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSafetyEdge'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Bearing Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBearingCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Traveler Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTravelerCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Chain Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaChainCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Wall Station / Controls', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaWallStation'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Audible / Visual Warning Devices', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaWarningDevices'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Manual Release / Disconnect', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaManualRelease'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Operator / Safety Device Notes', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOperatorSafetyNotes'));
  lines.push('');

  lines.push('5. IMMEDIATE HAZARDS, RECOMMENDATIONS AND DELIVERY');
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Immediate Safety Hazard Present', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaHazardPresent'));
  if (getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaHazardPresent') === 'Yes') {
    addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Hazard List', hazards.length ? hazards.join(', ') : 'None selected');
  }
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Overall Door Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOverallCondition'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Recommended Action', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRecommendedAction'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Priority Level', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Technician Safety Comments', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSafetyComments'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Recommendation Notes', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRecommendationNotes'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Technician Signoff', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTechSignoff'));
  addQuickAssessmentLine(lines, 'Customer / Site Rep Signoff', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCustomerSignoff'));

  document.getElementById('qaSummaryOutput').textContent = lines.join('\n');
}

function clearQuickAssessmentSummary() {
  setTimeout(function () {
    const summaryEl = document.getElementById('qaSummaryOutput');
    if (summaryEl) {
      summaryEl.textContent = 'No summary generated yet.';
    }
  }, 50);
}

function cleanQaPdfValue(value, maxLen) {
  const text = String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
  if (!text) return '';
  const safeMax = maxLen || 500;
  if (text.length <= safeMax) return text;
  return text.substring(0, safeMax - 3).trim() + '...';
}

function qaMeaningfulValue(value) {
  const v = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!v) return '';
  if (v === 'select') return '';
  return String(value || '').trim();
}

function qaSafeJoin(parts, separator) {
  return parts.map(function (v) {
    return qaMeaningfulValue(cleanQaPdfValue(v));
  }).filter(Boolean).join(separator || ', ');
}

function qaGetConditionBadge(value) {
  const raw = String(value || '').trim();
  const v = raw.toLowerCase();

  if (!raw) {
    return { label: '-', fill: [203, 213, 225], text: [15, 23, 42], key: 'empty' };
  }

  if (v === 'not applicable') {
    return { label: raw, fill: [203, 213, 225], text: [15, 23, 42], key: 'na' };
  }

  if (v === 'good' || v === 'balanced' || v === 'passed' || v === 'no') {
    return { label: raw, fill: [34, 197, 94], text: [255, 255, 255], key: 'green' };
  }

  if (
    v === 'unsafe' ||
    v === 'broken' ||
    v === 'failed' ||
    v === 'yes' ||
    v === 'critical' ||
    v === 'immediate' ||
    v === 'disable until repaired' ||
    v === 'missing' ||
    v === 'broken glass' ||
    v === 'bent / damaged' ||
    v === 'rollers out of the track'
  ) {
    return { label: raw, fill: [239, 68, 68], text: [255, 255, 255], key: 'red' };
  }

  return { label: raw, fill: [245, 158, 11], text: [255, 255, 255], key: 'orange' };
}

function qaGetPriorityFromCondition(value) {
  const raw = String(value || '').trim();
  const v = raw.toLowerCase();

  if (!raw) return '';
  if (v === 'not applicable') return 'Not Applicable';
  if (v === 'good' || v === 'balanced' || v === 'passed' || v === 'no') return 'Low';
  if (
    v === 'unsafe' ||
    v === 'broken' ||
    v === 'failed' ||
    v === 'yes' ||
    v === 'critical' ||
    v === 'immediate' ||
    v === 'disable until repaired' ||
    v === 'missing' ||
    v === 'broken glass' ||
    v === 'bent / damaged' ||
    v === 'rollers out of the track'
  ) {
    return 'High';
  }

  return 'Medium';
}

function qaGetPriorityBadge(value) {
  const raw = String(value || '').trim() || 'Monitor';
  const v = raw.toLowerCase();

  if (v === 'not applicable') {
    return { label: raw, fill: [203, 213, 225], text: [15, 23, 42] };
  }

  if (v === 'low' || v === 'monitor' || v === 'monitor condition' || v === 'good' || v === 'no action needed') {
    return { label: raw, fill: [34, 197, 94], text: [255, 255, 255] };
  }

  if (v === 'high' || v === 'immediate' || v === 'critical' || v === 'disable until repaired') {
    return { label: raw, fill: [239, 68, 68], text: [255, 255, 255] };
  }

  return { label: raw, fill: [245, 158, 11], text: [255, 255, 255] };
}

function qaAddPdfRow(target, component, condition, notes, priority) {
  const cleanComponent = cleanQaPdfValue(component, 90);
  const cleanCondition = qaMeaningfulValue(cleanQaPdfValue(condition, 80));
  const cleanNotes = qaMeaningfulValue(cleanQaPdfValue(notes, 400));
  const requestedPriority = qaMeaningfulValue(priority);
  const overallSelectedPriority = qaMeaningfulValue(getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  const derivedPriority = cleanCondition ? qaGetPriorityFromCondition(cleanCondition) : '';

  if (!cleanComponent) return;
  if (!cleanCondition && !cleanNotes) return;

  let finalPriority = requestedPriority || derivedPriority || '';
  if (!requestedPriority || requestedPriority === overallSelectedPriority) {
    finalPriority = derivedPriority || requestedPriority || '';
  }

  target.push({
    component: cleanComponent,
    condition: cleanCondition || '',
    notes: cleanNotes || '-',
    priority: finalPriority
  });
}

function buildQuickAssessmentPdfData() {
  const hazards = getQuickAssessmentCheckedValues('qaHazardItems[]');

  const siteInfo = [
    ['Customer / Company Name', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCompanyName')],
    ['Site Contact', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaContactName')],
    ['Property Address', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSiteAddress')],
    ['Door Location', qaSafeJoin([getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBuildingArea'), getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaDoorNumber')], ' - ')],
    ['Inspection Date', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectionDate')],
    ['Technician', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTechnicianName')],
    ['Work Order / Job Number', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaJobNumber')]
  ].filter(function (item) { return item[1]; });

  const doorInfo = [
    ['Door Type', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaDoorType')],
    ['Operation Type', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOperationType')],
    ['Manufacturer', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaManufacturer')],
    ['Approximate Door Size', getQuickAssessmentDoorSizeValue()],
    ['Approximate Age', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaApproxAge')],
    ['Traffic / Usage Level', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTrafficLevel')]
  ].filter(function (item) { return item[1]; });

  const criticalRows = [];
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Door / Curtain Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaDoorCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Door Off Track', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOffTrack'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Track Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTrackCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Cable Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCableCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Spring Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSpringCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Bottom Fixture Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBottomFixtureCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Left End Bearing Plate', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaLeftEndBearingPlateCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Right End Bearing Plate', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRightEndBearingPlateCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Center Bearing', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCenterBearingCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Rollers / Hinges Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRollerHingeCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Door Balance Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBalanceCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Impact Damage', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaImpactDamage'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Broken Window / Glass Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBrokenWindowCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Perimeter / Bottom Seal', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaWeatherSealCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(criticalRows, 'Pusher Springs / Bumpers', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPusherSpringCondition'), getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCriticalSafetyNotes'), getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));

  const operatorRows = [];
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Operator / Hoist Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOperatorCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Operator Mounting / Brackets', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOperatorMounting'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Photo Eyes', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPhotoEyes'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Safety Edge', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSafetyEdge'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Bearing Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBearingCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Traveler Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTravelerCondition'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Chain Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaChainCondition'), getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOperatorSafetyNotes'), getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Wall Station / Controls', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaWallStation'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Audible / Visual Warning Devices', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaWarningDevices'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  qaAddPdfRow(operatorRows, 'Manual Release / Disconnect', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaManualRelease'), '', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));

  const actionInfo = [
    ['Immediate Safety Hazard Present', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaHazardPresent')],
    ['Hazard List', hazards.length ? hazards.join(', ') : (getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaHazardPresent') === 'Yes' ? 'None selected' : '')],
    ['Overall Door Condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOverallCondition')],
    ['Recommended Action', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRecommendedAction')],
    ['Priority Level', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel')],
    ['Technician Safety Comments', cleanQaPdfValue(getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSafetyComments'), 700)],
    ['Recommendation Notes', cleanQaPdfValue(getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRecommendationNotes'), 700)]
  ].filter(function (item) { return item[1]; });

  const customerSummary = cleanQaPdfValue(
    getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRecommendationNotes') ||
    getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSafetyComments') ||
    (hazards.length ? ('Immediate hazards identified: ' + hazards.join(', ')) : ''),
    1000
  );

  return {
    overallCondition: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOverallCondition'),
    recommendedAction: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRecommendedAction'),
    priorityLevel: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'),
    siteInfo: siteInfo,
    doorInfo: doorInfo,
    criticalRows: criticalRows,
    operatorRows: operatorRows,
    actionInfo: actionInfo,
    customerSummary: customerSummary,
    techSignoff: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTechSignoff'),
    customerSignoff: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCustomerSignoff')
  };
}

function qaDrawPdfHeader(doc, pageWidth, pageNumber) {
  doc.setFillColor(9, 23, 62);
  doc.rect(12, 12, pageWidth - 24, 56, 'F');

  doc.setTextColor(255, 255, 255);
  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
  doc.setFontSize(20);
  doc.text('Quick Door Assessment Report', 28, 38);

  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
  doc.setFontSize(10);
  doc.text('Powered by DoorMatrix', 28, 56);

  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
  doc.setFontSize(10);
  doc.text('Page ' + pageNumber, pageWidth - 62, 46);
}

function qaDrawPdfFooter(doc, pageWidth, pageHeight, pageNumber) {
  doc.setDrawColor(220, 226, 235);
  doc.line(16, pageHeight - 18, pageWidth - 16, pageHeight - 18);
  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
  doc.setFontSize(8);
  doc.setTextColor(120, 120, 120);
  doc.text('Powered by DoorMatrix - garagedoorinspection.com', 16, pageHeight - 8);
  doc.text('Page ' + pageNumber, pageWidth - 46, pageHeight - 8);
}

function qaDrawSectionBar(doc, title, x, y, w) {
  doc.setFillColor(30, 64, 175);
  doc.rect(x, y, w, 16, 'F');
  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
  doc.setFontSize(10);
  doc.setTextColor(255, 255, 255);
  doc.text(title, x + 8, y + 11);
  return y + 16;
}

function qaDrawInfoTable(doc, title, items, x, y, w, state) {
  const pageHeight = doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight();
  const bottomLimit = pageHeight - 38;
  const rows = (items && items.length) ? items : [['', '']];
  const labelW = 160;
  const valueW = w - labelW;

  if (y + 70 > bottomLimit) {
    qaDrawPdfFooter(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), pageHeight, state.pageNumber);
    doc.addPage();
    state.pageNumber++;
    qaDrawPdfHeader(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), state.pageNumber);
    y = 78;
  }

  y = qaDrawSectionBar(doc, title, x, y, w);
  doc.setFontSize(8.5);

  rows.forEach(function (item) {
    const label = String(item[0] || '');
    const value = String(item[1] || '');
    const valueLines = value ? doc.splitTextToSize(value, valueW - 12) : [''];
    const rowH = Math.max(18, (valueLines.length * 10) + 6);

    if (y + rowH > bottomLimit) {
      qaDrawPdfFooter(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), pageHeight, state.pageNumber);
      doc.addPage();
      state.pageNumber++;
      qaDrawPdfHeader(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), state.pageNumber);
      y = 78;
      y = qaDrawSectionBar(doc, title + ' (continued)', x, y, w);
    }

    doc.setDrawColor(210, 214, 220);
    doc.setFillColor(248, 250, 252);
    doc.rect(x, y, labelW, rowH, 'FD');
    doc.rect(x + labelW, y, valueW, rowH, 'S');

    if (label) {
      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
      doc.setTextColor(31, 41, 55);
      doc.text(label, x + 6, y + 11);
    }

    if (value) {
      doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
      doc.setTextColor(55, 65, 81);
      doc.text(valueLines, x + labelW + 6, y + 11);
    }

    y += rowH;
  });

  return y + 10;
}

function qaDrawBadge(doc, text, x, y, w, h, fill, color) {
  doc.setFillColor(fill[0], fill[1], fill[2]);
  doc.roundedRect(x, y, w, h, 2, 2, 'F');
  doc.setTextColor(color[0], color[1], color[2]);
  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
  doc.setFontSize(7.5);

  const safeText = String(text || '-');
  const textWidth = doc.getTextWidth(safeText);
  const textX = x + Math.max(4, (w - textWidth) / 2);
  const textY = y + (h / 2) + 2.8;
  doc.text(safeText, textX, textY);
}

function qaDrawInspectionTable(doc, title, rows, x, y, w, state) {
  const safeRows = (rows && rows.length) ? rows : [];
  const pageHeight = doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight();
  const bottomLimit = pageHeight - 38;
  const c1 = 150;
  const c2 = 84;
  const c4 = 92;
  const c3 = w - c1 - c2 - c4;

  function drawHeader(sectionTitle) {
    y = qaDrawSectionBar(doc, sectionTitle, x, y, w);

    doc.setDrawColor(210, 214, 220);
    doc.setFillColor(232, 236, 241);
    doc.rect(x, y, c1, 18, 'FD');
    doc.rect(x + c1, y, c2, 18, 'FD');
    doc.rect(x + c1 + c2, y, c3, 18, 'FD');
    doc.rect(x + c1 + c2 + c3, y, c4, 18, 'FD');

    doc.setTextColor(31, 41, 55);
    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
    doc.setFontSize(8.5);
    doc.text('Component', x + 6, y + 12);
    doc.text('Condition', x + c1 + 6, y + 12);
    doc.text('Notes', x + c1 + c2 + 6, y + 12);
    doc.text('Priority', x + c1 + c2 + c3 + 6, y + 12);

    y += 18;
  }

  if (y + 70 > bottomLimit) {
    qaDrawPdfFooter(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), pageHeight, state.pageNumber);
    doc.addPage();
    state.pageNumber++;
    qaDrawPdfHeader(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), state.pageNumber);
    y = 78;
  }

  drawHeader(title);

  if (!safeRows.length) {
    const rowH = 24;
    doc.setDrawColor(210, 214, 220);
    doc.rect(x, y, c1, rowH);
    doc.rect(x + c1, y, c2, rowH);
    doc.rect(x + c1 + c2, y, c3, rowH);
    doc.rect(x + c1 + c2 + c3, y, c4, rowH);
    return y + rowH + 10;
  }

  safeRows.forEach(function (row) {
    const notesLines = doc.splitTextToSize(String(row.notes || '-'), c3 - 12);
    const rowH = Math.max(24, (notesLines.length * 9) + 8);

    if (y + rowH > bottomLimit) {
      qaDrawPdfFooter(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), pageHeight, state.pageNumber);
      doc.addPage();
      state.pageNumber++;
      qaDrawPdfHeader(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), state.pageNumber);
      y = 78;
      drawHeader(title + ' (continued)');
    }

    doc.setDrawColor(210, 214, 220);
    doc.rect(x, y, c1, rowH);
    doc.rect(x + c1, y, c2, rowH);
    doc.rect(x + c1 + c2, y, c3, rowH);
    doc.rect(x + c1 + c2 + c3, y, c4, rowH);

    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
    doc.setTextColor(55, 65, 81);
    doc.setFontSize(8.3);
    doc.text(doc.splitTextToSize(String(row.component || '-'), c1 - 12), x + 6, y + 11);

    const conditionBadge = qaGetConditionBadge(row.condition);
    qaDrawBadge(doc, conditionBadge.label, x + c1 + 8, y + 5, c2 - 16, 12, conditionBadge.fill, conditionBadge.text);

    doc.setTextColor(55, 65, 81);
    doc.text(notesLines, x + c1 + c2 + 6, y + 11);

    const priorityBadge = qaGetPriorityBadge(row.priority || 'Monitor');
    qaDrawBadge(doc, priorityBadge.label, x + c1 + c2 + c3 + 6, y + 5, c4 - 12, 12, priorityBadge.fill, priorityBadge.text);

    y += rowH;
  });

  return y + 10;
}

function qaDrawSummaryTop(doc, data, x, y, w) {
  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
  doc.setFontSize(8.5);
  doc.setTextColor(55, 65, 81);

  const intro = doc.splitTextToSize(
    'This quick assessment highlights immediate safety concerns and critical items that should be addressed by the building owner or property manager.',
    w
  );
  doc.text(intro, x, y);
  y += (intro.length * 9) + 8;

  const boxW = (w - 12) / 3;
  const boxH = 40;
  const boxes = [
    ['Overall Condition', data.overallCondition || '-'],
    ['Recommended Action', data.recommendedAction || '-'],
    ['Priority', data.priorityLevel || '-']
  ];

  boxes.forEach(function (box, i) {
    const bx = x + (i * (boxW + 6));
    doc.setFillColor(248, 250, 252);
    doc.setDrawColor(210, 214, 220);
    doc.roundedRect(bx, y, boxW, boxH, 4, 4, 'FD');

    doc.setTextColor(15, 23, 42);
    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold');
    doc.setFontSize(8);
    doc.text(box[0], bx + 8, y + 12);

    doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
    doc.setFontSize(9);
    const lines = doc.splitTextToSize(String(box[1] || '-'), boxW - 16);
    doc.text(lines, bx + 8, y + 24);
  });

  return y + boxH + 12;
}

function qaDrawParagraphSection(doc, title, body, x, y, w, state) {
  const pageHeight = doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight();
  const bottomLimit = pageHeight - 38;
  const lines = doc.splitTextToSize(String(body || ''), w - 12);
  const needed = 16 + 12 + (lines.length * 9) + 10;

  if (y + needed > bottomLimit) {
    qaDrawPdfFooter(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), pageHeight, state.pageNumber);
    doc.addPage();
    state.pageNumber++;
    qaDrawPdfHeader(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), state.pageNumber);
    y = 78;
  }

  y = qaDrawSectionBar(doc, title, x, y, w);
  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
  doc.setFontSize(8.4);
  doc.setTextColor(55, 65, 81);
  doc.text(lines.length ? lines : ['-'], x, y + 12);
  return y + 12 + ((lines.length ? lines.length : 1) * 9) + 10;
}

function qaDrawSignoff(doc, data, x, y, w, state) {
  const pageHeight = doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight();
  const bottomLimit = pageHeight - 38;
  const needed = 52;

  if (y + needed > bottomLimit) {
    qaDrawPdfFooter(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), pageHeight, state.pageNumber);
    doc.addPage();
    state.pageNumber++;
    qaDrawPdfHeader(doc, doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth(), state.pageNumber);
    y = 78;
  }

  y = qaDrawSectionBar(doc, '7. Signoff', x, y, w);
  doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal');
  doc.setFontSize(8.5);
  doc.setTextColor(31, 41, 55);
  doc.text('Technician: ' + (data.techSignoff || '__________________________'), x, y + 16);
  doc.text('Customer / Site Rep: ' + (data.customerSignoff || '__________________________'), x + 220, y + 16);
  doc.text('Company: ' + (getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectorCompany') || '__________________________'), x, y + 32);
  doc.text('Date: ' + (getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectionDate') || '__________________________'), x + 220, y + 32);
  return y + 42;
}

function buildQuickAssessmentPdfDocument() {
  generateQuickAssessmentSummary();

  const doorCompanyName = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectorCompany');
  if (!doorCompanyName) {
    alert('Please enter the Door Company Name.');
    return null;
  }

  const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf;
  const doc = new jsPDF({
    orientation: 'p',
    unit: 'pt',
    format: 'letter'
  });

  const data = buildQuickAssessmentPdfData();
  const pageWidth = doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
  const x = 16;
  const width = pageWidth - 32;
  const state = { pageNumber: 1 };

  qaDrawPdfHeader(doc, pageWidth, state.pageNumber);

  let y = 78;
  y = qaDrawSummaryTop(doc, data, x, y, width);
  y = qaDrawInfoTable(doc, '1. Site Information', data.siteInfo, x, y, width, state);
  y = qaDrawInfoTable(doc, '2. Door Identification', data.doorInfo, x, y, width, state);
  y = qaDrawInspectionTable(doc, '3. Critical Door / Lift System Safety', data.criticalRows, x, y, width, state);
  y = qaDrawInspectionTable(doc, '4. Operator / Entrapment Safety', data.operatorRows, x, y, width, state);
  y = qaDrawInfoTable(doc, '5. Immediate Hazards and Required Actions', data.actionInfo, x, y, width, state);
  y = qaDrawParagraphSection(doc, '6. Quick Assessment Summary', data.customerSummary || 'No additional summary notes provided.', x, y, width, state);
  y = qaDrawSignoff(doc, data, x, y, width, state);

  qaDrawPdfFooter(doc, pageWidth, doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight(), state.pageNumber);
  return doc;
}

function resetQuickAssessmentForNextDoor(preserveContactInfo) {
  const formEl = document.getElementById('quickAssessmentForm');
  const preserved = preserveContactInfo ? {
    qaInspectorCompany: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectorCompany'),
    qaCompanyName: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCompanyName'),
    qaContactName: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaContactName'),
    qaSiteAddress: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSiteAddress'),
    qaPhone: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPhone'),
    qaInspectionDate: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectionDate'),
    qaTechnicianName: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTechnicianName'),
    qaBuildingArea: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaBuildingArea'),
    qaJobNumber: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaJobNumber'),
    qaFinalDoorCompanyEmail: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaFinalDoorCompanyEmail'),
    qaFinalCustomerEmail: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaFinalCustomerEmail'),
    qaSendToDoorCompany: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSendToDoorCompany') === 'Yes',
    qaSendToCustomer: getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSendToCustomer') === 'Yes'
  } : null;

  if (formEl) {
    formEl.reset();
  }

  if (preserved) {
    Object.keys(preserved).forEach(function (key) {
      const el = document.getElementById(key);
      if (!el) return;
      if (el.type === 'checkbox') {
        el.checked = !!preserved[key];
      } else {
        el.value = preserved[key] || '';
      }
    });
  }

  const summaryEl = document.getElementById('qaSummaryOutput');
  if (summaryEl) {
    summaryEl.textContent = 'No summary generated yet.';
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('#quickAssessmentForm input, #quickAssessmentForm select, #quickAssessmentForm textarea').forEach(function (field) {
    field.style.borderColor = '#cbd5e1';
  });

  if (typeof window.gdiQuickAssessmentShowStep === 'function') {
    window.gdiQuickAssessmentShowStep(0);
  } else {
    const steps = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#quickAssessmentForm .form-step'));
    const indicator = document.getElementById('qaStepIndicator');
    const progressBar = document.getElementById('qaStepProgressBar');
    steps.forEach(function (step, i) {
      step.classList.toggle('active', i === 0);
    });
    if (indicator) indicator.textContent = 'Step 1 of ' + steps.length;
    if (progressBar) progressBar.style.width = (100 / steps.length) + '%';
  }

  if (typeof window.gdiQuickAssessmentUpdateSectionJumpControls === 'function') {
    window.gdiQuickAssessmentUpdateSectionJumpControls();
  }

  const hazardOptionsWrap = document.getElementById('qaHazardOptionsWrap');
  if (hazardOptionsWrap) hazardOptionsWrap.style.display = 'none';

  const doorNumberField = document.getElementById('qaDoorNumber');
  if (doorNumberField) {
    doorNumberField.value = '';
    setTimeout(function () { doorNumberField.focus(); }, 100);
  }
}

async function emailQuickAssessment(startNewDoorAfterSend) {
  generateQuickAssessmentSummary();

  const doorCompanyName = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectorCompany');
  const doorNumber = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaDoorNumber');
  const doorCompanyEmail = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaFinalDoorCompanyEmail');
  const customerEmail = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaFinalCustomerEmail');
  const sendToDoorCompany = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSendToDoorCompany');
  const sendToCustomer = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaSendToCustomer');
  const summary = document.getElementById('qaSummaryOutput').textContent;
  const company = getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaCompanyName') || 'Quick Door Assessment';
  const door = doorNumber || 'Door';

  if (!doorCompanyName) {
    alert('Please enter the Door Company Name.');
    return;
  }

  if (!doorNumber) {
    alert('Please enter the Door Number / Opening ID.');
    const doorNumberField = document.getElementById('qaDoorNumber');
    if (doorNumberField) doorNumberField.focus();
    return;
  }

  const emailPattern = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;

  if (!doorCompanyEmail || !emailPattern.test(doorCompanyEmail)) {
    alert('Please enter a valid Door Company Email.');
    return;
  }

  if (sendToCustomer === 'Yes' && (!customerEmail || !emailPattern.test(customerEmail))) {
    alert('Please enter a valid Customer Email.');
    return;
  }

  const doc = buildQuickAssessmentPdfDocument();
  if (!doc) return;

  const pdfDataUri = doc.output('datauristring');
  const pdfFileName = (company + '-' + door + '-' + (getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectionDate') || 'report') + '.pdf').replace(/[^a-z0-9\-_\.]/gi, '_');

  const postData = new FormData();
  postData.append('action', 'gdi_send_quick_assessment_email');
  postData.append('nonce', window.gdiQuickAssessmentMailConfig.nonce);
  postData.append('door_company_email', doorCompanyEmail);
  postData.append('customer_email', customerEmail);
  postData.append('send_to_door_company', sendToDoorCompany);
  postData.append('send_to_customer', sendToCustomer);
  postData.append('subject', 'Quick Assessment - ' + company + ' - ' + door);
  postData.append('summary', summary);
  postData.append('company_name', company);
  postData.append('door_number', door);
  postData.append('door_company_name', doorCompanyName);
  postData.append('technician_name', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaTechnicianName'));
  postData.append('inspection_date', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaInspectionDate'));
  postData.append('overall_condition', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaOverallCondition'));
  postData.append('recommended_action', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaRecommendedAction'));
  postData.append('priority_level', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaPriorityLevel'));
  postData.append('hazard_present', getQuickAssessmentFieldValue('qaHazardPresent'));
  postData.append('pdf_base64', pdfDataUri);
  postData.append('pdf_filename', pdfFileName);

  const formEl = document.getElementById('quickAssessmentForm');
  const formFields = new FormData(formEl);
  for (const [key, value] of formFields.entries()) {
    if (value instanceof File) {
      if (value && value.name) {
        postData.append(key, value);
      }
    } else {
      postData.append('form_data[' + key + ']', value);
    }
  }

  let result;
  try {
    const response = await fetch(window.gdiQuickAssessmentMailConfig.ajaxUrl, {
      method: 'POST',
      body: postData
    });

    result = await response.json();
  } catch (error) {
    alert('Something went wrong while sending the email.');
    return;
  }

  if (!result || !result.success) {
    alert(result && result.data && result.data.message ? result.data.message : 'Email failed to send.');
    return;
  }

  if (startNewDoorAfterSend) {
    alert('Quick assessment PDF and any uploaded images were emailed successfully. Loading a new door assessment now.');
    resetQuickAssessmentForNextDoor(true);
    return;
  }

  alert('Quick assessment PDF and any uploaded images were emailed successfully.');
}

function emailQuickAssessmentAndStartNewDoor() {
  return emailQuickAssessment(true);
}
</script>
<?php
    return ob_get_clean();
});


/**
 * DoorMatrix Detailed Door Report Form
 * Shortcode: [garage_door_inspection_form]
 */

add_action('init', function () {
    if (post_type_exists('gdi_inspection_submission')) {
        return;
    }

    register_post_type('gdi_inspection_submission', [
        'labels' => [
            'name' => 'Inspection Submissions',
            'singular_name' => 'Inspection Submission',
        ],
        'public' => false,
        'show_ui' => true,
        'menu_icon' => 'dashicons-clipboard',
        'supports' => ['title'],
    ]);
});

add_action('add_meta_boxes', function () {
    add_meta_box(
        'gdi_inspection_submission_details',
        'Inspection Submission Details',
        function ($post) {
            $recipient      = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_recipient', true);
            $customer_email = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_customer_email', true);
            $subject        = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_subject', true);
            $summary        = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_summary', true);
            $status         = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_status', true);
            $sent_at        = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_sent_at', true);
            $form_data      = get_post_meta($post->ID, '_gdi_form_data', true);

            echo '<p><strong>Door Company Email:</strong> ' . esc_html($recipient) . '</p>';
            echo '<p><strong>Customer Email:</strong> ' . esc_html($customer_email) . '</p>';
            echo '<p><strong>Status:</strong> ' . esc_html($status) . '</p>';
            echo '<p><strong>Sent At:</strong> ' . esc_html($sent_at) . '</p>';
            echo '<p><strong>Subject:</strong> ' . esc_html($subject) . '</p>';

            if (!empty($summary)) {
                echo '<h4>Summary</h4>';
                echo '<pre style="white-space: pre-wrap; background: #f8fafc; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 8px;">' . esc_html($summary) . '</pre>';
            }

            if (is_array($form_data) && !empty($form_data)) {
                echo '<h4>Form Data</h4>';
                echo '<table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse;">';
                foreach ($form_data as $key => $value) {
                    if (is_array($value)) {
                        $value = implode(', ', $value);
                    }
                    echo '<tr>';
                    echo '<td style="width:260px; padding:8px; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; font-weight:bold; vertical-align:top;">' . esc_html($key) . '</td>';
                    echo '<td style="padding:8px; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; white-space:pre-wrap;">' . esc_html((string) $value) . '</td>';
                    echo '</tr>';
                }
                echo '</table>';
            }
        },
        'gdi_inspection_submission',
        'normal',
        'high'
    );
});

add_action('wp_ajax_gdi_send_inspection_email', 'gdi_send_inspection_email');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_gdi_send_inspection_email', 'gdi_send_inspection_email');

if (!function_exists('gdi_dm_make_pdf_attachment')) {
    function gdi_dm_make_pdf_attachment($base64_data, $filename = 'inspection-report.pdf') {
        if (empty($base64_data)) {
            return '';
        }

        if (strpos($base64_data, 'base64,') !== false) {
            $parts = explode('base64,', $base64_data, 2);
            $base64_data = $parts[1];
        }

        $pdf_binary = base64_decode($base64_data);
        if (!$pdf_binary) {
            return '';
        }

        $safe_filename = sanitize_file_name($filename);
        if (substr($safe_filename, -4) !== '.pdf') {
            $safe_filename .= '.pdf';
        }

        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        if (empty($upload_dir['basedir'])) {
            return '';
        }

        $dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . 'gdi-temp';
        if (!file_exists($dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($dir);
        }

        $file_path = trailingslashit($dir) . uniqid('gdi_', true) . '_' . $safe_filename;
        $written = file_put_contents($file_path, $pdf_binary);

        if ($written === false) {
            return '';
        }

        return $file_path;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('gdi_dm_make_uploaded_image_attachments')) {
    function gdi_dm_make_uploaded_image_attachments($files) {
        $result = [
            'paths' => [],
            'labels' => [],
        ];

        if (empty($files) || !is_array($files)) {
            return $result;
        }

        if (!function_exists('wp_handle_upload')) {
            require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
        }

        $allowed_mimes = [
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png'          => 'image/png',
            'gif'          => 'image/gif',
            'webp'         => 'image/webp',
            'bmp'          => 'image/bmp',
            'heic'         => 'image/heic',
            'heif'         => 'image/heif',
        ];

        $upload_overrides = [
            'test_form' => false,
            'mimes'     => $allowed_mimes,
        ];

        foreach ($files as $field_key => $file_group) {
            if (!isset($file_group['name'])) {
                continue;
            }

            $names     = is_array($file_group['name']) ? $file_group['name'] : [$file_group['name']];
            $types     = is_array($file_group['type']) ? $file_group['type'] : [$file_group['type']];
            $tmp_names = is_array($file_group['tmp_name']) ? $file_group['tmp_name'] : [$file_group['tmp_name']];
            $errors    = is_array($file_group['error']) ? $file_group['error'] : [$file_group['error']];
            $sizes     = is_array($file_group['size']) ? $file_group['size'] : [$file_group['size']];

            foreach ($names as $index => $original_name) {
                if (empty($original_name)) {
                    continue;
                }

                $tmp_name = isset($tmp_names[$index]) ? $tmp_names[$index] : '';
                $error    = isset($errors[$index]) ? (int) $errors[$index] : UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE;
                $type     = isset($types[$index]) ? $types[$index] : '';
                $size     = isset($sizes[$index]) ? (int) $sizes[$index] : 0;

                if ($error !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK || empty($tmp_name) || !is_uploaded_file($tmp_name)) {
                    continue;
                }

                $single_file = [
                    'name'     => sanitize_file_name($original_name),
                    'type'     => $type,
                    'tmp_name' => $tmp_name,
                    'error'    => $error,
                    'size'     => $size,
                ];

                $moved = wp_handle_upload($single_file, $upload_overrides);

                if (!empty($moved['file']) && file_exists($moved['file'])) {
                    $clean_field_key = sanitize_text_field((string) $field_key);
                    $result['paths'][] = $moved['file'];

                    if (!isset($result['labels'][$clean_field_key])) {
                        $result['labels'][$clean_field_key] = [];
                    }

                    $result['labels'][$clean_field_key][] = basename($moved['file']);
                }
            }
        }

        return $result;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('gdi_send_inspection_email')) {
    function gdi_send_inspection_email() {
        if (!isset($_POST['nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['nonce'])), 'gdi_email_nonce')) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Security check failed. Please refresh the page and try again.']);
        }

        $door_company_email   = isset($_POST['door_company_email']) ? sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['door_company_email'])) : '';
        $customer_email       = isset($_POST['customer_email']) ? sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['customer_email'])) : '';
        $send_to_door_company = isset($_POST['send_to_door_company']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['send_to_door_company'])) : 'Yes';
        $send_to_customer     = isset($_POST['send_to_customer']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['send_to_customer'])) : 'No';
        $subject              = isset($_POST['subject']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['subject'])) : 'Inspection Summary';
        $summary              = isset($_POST['summary']) ? wp_unslash($_POST['summary']) : '';
        $company              = isset($_POST['company_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['company_name'])) : '';
        $door                 = isset($_POST['door_number']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['door_number'])) : '';
        $door_company_name    = isset($_POST['door_company_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['door_company_name'])) : '';
        $technician_name      = isset($_POST['technician_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['technician_name'])) : '';
        $inspection_date      = isset($_POST['inspection_date']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['inspection_date'])) : '';
        $overall_condition    = isset($_POST['overall_condition']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['overall_condition'])) : '';
        $recommended_action   = isset($_POST['recommended_action']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['recommended_action'])) : '';
        $priority_level       = isset($_POST['priority_level']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['priority_level'])) : '';
        $pdf_base64           = isset($_POST['pdf_base64']) ? wp_unslash($_POST['pdf_base64']) : '';
        $pdf_filename         = isset($_POST['pdf_filename']) ? sanitize_file_name(wp_unslash($_POST['pdf_filename'])) : 'inspection-report.pdf';

        if (empty($door_company_name)) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Please enter the door company name.']);
        }

        if (empty($door_company_email) || !is_email($door_company_email)) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Please enter a valid door company email address.']);
        }

        if ($send_to_customer === 'Yes' && (empty($customer_email) || !is_email($customer_email))) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Please enter a valid customer email address.']);
        }

        if (empty(trim($summary))) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'No summary was generated.']);
        }

        if (empty($pdf_base64)) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'PDF file was not generated.']);
        }

        $form_data = [];
        if (isset($_POST['form_data']) && is_array($_POST['form_data'])) {
            foreach (wp_unslash($_POST['form_data']) as $key => $value) {
                $clean_key = sanitize_text_field((string) $key);
                if (is_array($value)) {
                    $form_data[$clean_key] = array_map('sanitize_text_field', $value);
                } else {
                    $form_data[$clean_key] = sanitize_text_field((string) $value);
                }
            }
        }

        $uploaded_images = gdi_dm_make_uploaded_image_attachments($_FILES);
        $uploaded_image_paths = !empty($uploaded_images['paths']) ? $uploaded_images['paths'] : [];
        $uploaded_image_labels = !empty($uploaded_images['labels']) ? $uploaded_images['labels'] : [];

        if (!empty($uploaded_image_labels)) {
            $form_data['uploaded_image_attachments'] = $uploaded_image_labels;
        }

        $quick_summary = [];
        if (!empty($company)) $quick_summary[] = 'Customer / Company: ' . $company;
        if (!empty($door)) $quick_summary[] = 'Door Number / Opening ID: ' . $door;
        if (!empty($inspection_date)) $quick_summary[] = 'Inspection Date: ' . $inspection_date;
        if (!empty($technician_name)) $quick_summary[] = 'Technician: ' . $technician_name;
        if (!empty($overall_condition)) $quick_summary[] = 'Overall Door Condition: ' . $overall_condition;
        if (!empty($recommended_action)) $quick_summary[] = 'Recommended Action: ' . $recommended_action;
        if (!empty($priority_level)) $quick_summary[] = 'Priority Level: ' . $priority_level;

        $quick_summary_html = '';
        if (!empty($quick_summary)) {
            $quick_summary_html .= '<ul style="margin:12px 0 0 18px; padding:0; color:#334155; font-size:14px; line-height:1.6;">';
            foreach ($quick_summary as $line) {
                $quick_summary_html .= '<li>' . esc_html($line) . '</li>';
            }
            $quick_summary_html .= '</ul>';
        }

        $image_attachment_note = '';
        if (!empty($uploaded_image_paths)) {
            $image_attachment_note = '<div style="margin-top:12px; padding:14px; background:#eff6ff; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius:12px; color:#1e3a8a; font-size:14px;"><strong>Inspection photos attached:</strong> ' . count($uploaded_image_paths) . ' image file(s) were included with this report email.</div>';
        }

        $email_message = '
        <html>
        <body style="margin:0; padding:0; background:#eef2f7; font-family:Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;">
          <div style="max-width:760px; margin:0 auto; padding:30px 16px;">
            <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e3a8a); border-radius:18px 18px 0 0; padding:24px 28px; color:#ffffff;">
              <div style="font-size:14px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; opacity:.9;">Powered by DoorMatrix</div>
              <h1 style="margin:10px 0 8px; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;">Commercial Door Inspection Report</h1>
              <p style="margin:0; font-size:15px; line-height:1.6; color:rgba(255,255,255,.92);">The completed inspection PDF is attached to this email.</p>
            </div>
            <div style="background:#ffffff; border:1px solid #dbe3ef; border-top:none; border-radius:0 0 18px 18px; padding:24px;">
              <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px; color:#0f172a; font-size:18px;">Quick Summary</h3>
              ' . $quick_summary_html . '
              <div style="margin-top:18px; padding:14px; background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:12px; color:#334155; font-size:14px;">
                A PDF copy of the full inspection report is attached for your records.
              </div>
              ' . $image_attachment_note . '
            </div>
          </div>
        </body>
        </html>';

        $pdf_attachment = gdi_dm_make_pdf_attachment($pdf_base64, $pdf_filename);
        $attachments = [];
        if (!empty($pdf_attachment) && file_exists($pdf_attachment)) {
            $attachments[] = $pdf_attachment;
        }
        if (!empty($uploaded_image_paths)) {
            foreach ($uploaded_image_paths as $image_path) {
                if (!empty($image_path) && file_exists($image_path)) {
                    $attachments[] = $image_path;
                }
            }
        }

        $cc_header = 'Cc: info@garagedoorinspection.com';

        $headers = [
            'Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8',
            'Reply-To: ' . (!empty($door_company_email) ? $door_company_email : 'info@garagedoorinspection.com'),
            $cc_header,
        ];

        $door_company_sent = true;
        if ($send_to_door_company === 'Yes' && !empty($door_company_email) && is_email($door_company_email)) {
            $door_company_sent = wp_mail($door_company_email, $subject, $email_message, $headers, $attachments);
        }

        $customer_sent = true;
        if ($send_to_customer === 'Yes' && !empty($customer_email) && is_email($customer_email)) {
            $customer_sent = wp_mail($customer_email, $subject, $email_message, $headers, $attachments);
        }

        $internal_sent = wp_mail(
            'info@garagedoorinspection.com',
            'DoorMatrix Lead Record - ' . $subject,
            $email_message,
            [
                'Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8',
                'Reply-To: ' . (!empty($door_company_email) ? $door_company_email : 'info@garagedoorinspection.com'),
            ],
            $attachments
        );

        $overall_sent = $door_company_sent && $customer_sent && $internal_sent;

        $post_id = wp_insert_post([
            'post_type'   => 'gdi_inspection_submission',
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_title'  => 'Inspection - ' . ($company ?: 'Unknown Company') . ' - ' . ($door ?: 'Unknown Door') . ' - ' . current_time('Y-m-d H:i:s'),
        ]);

        if ($post_id && !is_wp_error($post_id)) {
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_recipient', $door_company_email);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_customer_email', $customer_email);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_subject', $subject);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_summary', $summary);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_form_data', $form_data);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_uploaded_images', $uploaded_image_labels);
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_status', $overall_sent ? 'sent' : 'failed');
            update_post_meta($post_id, '_gdi_sent_at', current_time('mysql'));
        }

        if (!empty($pdf_attachment) && file_exists($pdf_attachment)) {
            @unlink($pdf_attachment);
        }

        if (!empty($uploaded_image_paths)) {
            foreach ($uploaded_image_paths as $image_path) {
                if (!empty($image_path) && file_exists($image_path)) {
                    @unlink($image_path);
                }
            }
        }

        if ($overall_sent) {
            wp_send_json_success(['message' => 'Inspection PDF emailed successfully.']);
        }

        wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'One or more emails failed to send. Please check WP Mail SMTP settings.']);
    }
}

    ob_start();
?>
