          <div class="gdi-actions"><button class="gdi-btn secondary" type="button" data-prev-step="8">Back</button><button class="gdi-btn" type="button" data-next-step="10">Next</button></div>
        </div>

        <div class="gdi-card gdi-step" data-step="10">
          <h2 class="gdi-section-title">10. Hazards, Recommendations and Signoff</h2>
          <div class="gdi-grid">
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Immediate Safety Hazard Present?</label><select id="gdiHazardPresent"><option value="">Select</option><option>No</option><option>Yes</option></select>
                    </div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Lock Out Recommended?</label><select id="gdiLockOut"><option value="">Select</option><option>No</option><option>Yes</option></select>
                    </div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Hazard List</label><div class="gdi-checkrow"><label><input type="checkbox" name="gdiHazards" value="None"> None</label><label><input type="checkbox" name="gdiHazards" value="Broken Spring"> Broken Spring</label><label><input type="checkbox" name="gdiHazards" value="Broken Cable"> Broken Cable</label><label><input type="checkbox" name="gdiHazards" value="Rollers Out of the Track"> Rollers Out of the Track</label></div></div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Overall Door Condition</label><select id="gdiOverallCondition"><option value="">Select</option><option>Good</option><option>Fair</option><option>Poor</option><option>Critical</option></select>
                    </div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Recommended Action</label><select id="gdiRecommendedAction"><option value="">Select</option><option>No Action Needed</option><option>Monitor Condition</option><option>Schedule Repair</option><option>Recommend Replacement</option><option>Disable Until Repaired</option></select>
                    </div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Priority Level</label><select id="gdiPriorityLevel"><option value="">Select</option><option>Low</option><option>Medium</option><option>High</option><option>Immediate</option></select>
                    </div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Technician Safety Comments</label><textarea id="gdiSafetyComments"></textarea>
                </div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Recommendation Notes</label><textarea id="gdiRecommendationNotes"></textarea>
                </div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Technician Signoff</label><input type="text" id="gdiTechnicianSignoff"></div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Customer / Site Rep Signoff</label><input type="text" id="gdiCustomerSignoff"></div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Send report to door company</label><select id="gdiSendDoorCompany"><option>Yes</option><option>No</option></select>
                    </div>
            <div class="gdi-field"><label>Send report to customer</label><select id="gdiSendCustomer"><option>No</option><option>Yes</option></select>
                    </div>
          </div>
          <div class="gdi-actions"><button class="gdi-btn secondary" type="button" data-prev-step="9">Back</button><button class="gdi-btn secondary" type="button" id="gdiGenerateSummaryBtn">Generate Summary</button><button class="gdi-btn" type="button" id="gdiEmailBtn">Email Summary</button><button class="gdi-btn" type="button" id="gdiEmailNewDoorBtn">Email + New Door</button><button class="gdi-btn ghost" type="button" id="gdiClearBtn">Clear Form</button></div>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
    <div class="gdi-sidebar">
      <div class="gdi-card">
        <h3 class="gdi-section-title" style="font-size:20px;">Inspection Summary</h3>
        <div class="gdi-summary" id="gdiSummaryOutput">Click “Generate Summary” to create a technician report overview.</div>
        <div class="gdi-note">This native DoorMatrix version keeps the full Detailed Door Report inside the one plugin.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
(function(){
  const TOTAL_STEPS = 10;
  const form = document.getElementById('gdiInspectionForm');
  if (!form) return;
  const steps = Array.from(form.querySelectorAll('.gdi-step'));
  const indicator = document.getElementById('gdiStepIndicator');
  const progress = document.getElementById('gdiProgressBar');
  const jumpWrap = document.getElementById('gdiJumpTabs');
  const summaryOutput = document.getElementById('gdiSummaryOutput');
  let currentStep = 1;

  function setStep(step){
    currentStep = Math.max(1, Math.min(TOTAL_STEPS, step));
    steps.forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', Number(el.dataset.step) === currentStep));
    indicator.textContent = 'Step ' + currentStep + ' of ' + TOTAL_STEPS;
    progress.style.width = ((currentStep / TOTAL_STEPS) * 100) + '%';
    Array.from(jumpWrap.querySelectorAll('button')).forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('active', Number(btn.dataset.step) === currentStep));
    window.scrollTo({top: form.offsetTop - 20, behavior: 'smooth'});
  }

  for (let i = 1; i <= TOTAL_STEPS; i++) {
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.type = 'button';
    btn.textContent = i;
    btn.dataset.step = String(i);
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => setStep(i));
    jumpWrap.appendChild(btn);
  }
  setStep(1);

  form.querySelectorAll('[data-next-step]').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => setStep(Number(btn.dataset.nextStep))));
  form.querySelectorAll('[data-prev-step]').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => setStep(Number(btn.dataset.prevStep))));

  function makeIssueRow(side){
    const row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'gdi-issue-row';
    row.innerHTML = `
      <div class="gdi-field"><label>Component Type</label><select class="issue-type"><option>Hinge</option><option>Roller</option></select>
                    </div>
      <div class="gdi-field"><label>Number</label><select class="issue-number">${Array.from({length:12}, (_,i) => `<option>#${i+1}</option>`).join('')}</select>
                    </div>
      <div class="gdi-field"><label>Condition</label><select class="issue-condition"><option>Bent</option><option>Needs lubrication</option><option>Needs replacing</option></select>
                    </div>
      <div class="gdi-field"><label>Notes</label><input type="text" class="issue-notes"></div>
      <button class="gdi-btn secondary issue-remove" type="button">Remove</button>`;
    row.querySelector('.issue-remove').addEventListener('click', () => row.remove());
    document.getElementById(side === 'left' ? 'gdiLeftIssueList' : 'gdiRightIssueList').appendChild(row);
  }
  document.getElementById('gdiAddLeftIssue').addEventListener('click', () => makeIssueRow('left'));
  document.getElementById('gdiAddRightIssue').addEventListener('click', () => makeIssueRow('right'));
  makeIssueRow('left');
  makeIssueRow('right');

  function value(id){ const el = document.getElementById(id); return el ? (el.value || '').trim() : ''; }
  function checked(id){ const el = document.getElementById(id); return !!(el && el.checked); }
  function checkedValues(name){ return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[name="'+name+'"]:checked')).map(el => el.value); }
  function addLine(lines, label, val){ if(String(val || '').trim()) lines.push(label + ': ' + val); }
  function issueSummary(side){
    const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#' + (side === 'left' ? 'gdiLeftIssueList' : 'gdiRightIssueList') + ' .gdi-issue-row'));
    return rows.map(row => {
      const type = row.querySelector('.issue-type').value;
      const number = row.querySelector('.issue-number').value;
      const condition = row.querySelector('.issue-condition').value;
      const notes = row.querySelector('.issue-notes').value.trim();
      return [type, number, condition, notes].filter(Boolean).join(' - ');
    }).filter(Boolean);
  }

  function buildSummary(){
    const lines = [];
    lines.push('COMMERCIAL DOOR INSPECTION SUMMARY');
    lines.push('Powered by DoorMatrix');
    lines.push('='.repeat(38));
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('1. SITE INFORMATION');
    addLine(lines,'Door Company Name', value('gdiDoorCompanyName'));
    addLine(lines,'Door Company Email', value('gdiDoorCompanyEmail'));
    addLine(lines,'Customer / Company Name', value('gdiCompanyName'));
    addLine(lines,'Contact Name', value('gdiContactName'));
    addLine(lines,'Site Address', value('gdiSiteAddress'));
    addLine(lines,'Contact Phone', value('gdiPhone'));
    addLine(lines,'Inspection Date', value('gdiInspectionDate'));
    addLine(lines,'Technician Name', value('gdiTechnicianName'));
    addLine(lines,'Work Order / Job Number', value('gdiJobNumber'));
    addLine(lines,'Building Area / Location', value('gdiBuildingArea'));
    addLine(lines,'Door Number / Opening ID', value('gdiDoorNumber'));
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('2. DOOR IDENTIFICATION');
    addLine(lines,'Door Type', value('gdiDoorType'));
    addLine(lines,'Lift / Track Type', value('gdiLiftType'));
    addLine(lines,'Operation Type', value('gdiOperationType'));
    addLine(lines,'Manufacturer', value('gdiManufacturer'));
    addLine(lines,'Model', value('gdiModel'));
    addLine(lines,'Door Color', value('gdiDoorColor'));
    addLine(lines,'Window', value('gdiWindow'));
    addLine(lines,'Door Thickness', value('gdiDoorThickness'));
    addLine(lines,'Door Size', [value('gdiWidth'), value('gdiHeight')].filter(Boolean).join(' x '));
    addLine(lines,'Approximate Age', value('gdiApproxAge'));
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('3. GENERAL DOOR CONDITION');
    addLine(lines,'General Door Condition', value('gdiGeneralCondition'));
    addLine(lines,'Window Condition', value('gdiWindowCondition'));
    addLine(lines,'General Notes', value('gdiGeneralNotes'));
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('4. LEFT SIDE COMPONENTS');
    addLine(lines,'All Left Rollers Good', checked('gdiLeftRollersGood') ? 'Yes' : 'No');
    addLine(lines,'All Left Hinges Good', checked('gdiLeftHingesGood') ? 'Yes' : 'No');
    const leftIssues = issueSummary('left');
    if (leftIssues.length) lines.push('Items: ' + leftIssues.join(' | '));
    addLine(lines,'Left Side Notes', value('gdiLeftNotes'));
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('5. RIGHT SIDE COMPONENTS');
    addLine(lines,'All Right Rollers Good', checked('gdiRightRollersGood') ? 'Yes' : 'No');
    addLine(lines,'All Right Hinges Good', checked('gdiRightHingesGood') ? 'Yes' : 'No');
    const rightIssues = issueSummary('right');
    if (rightIssues.length) lines.push('Items: ' + rightIssues.join(' | '));
    addLine(lines,'Right Side Notes', value('gdiRightNotes'));
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('6. COUNTERBALANCE SYSTEM');
    addLine(lines,'Door Balance Condition', value('gdiBalanceCondition'));
    addLine(lines,'Balance Severity', value('gdiBalanceSeverity'));
    addLine(lines,'Counterbalance Type', value('gdiCounterbalanceType'));
    addLine(lines,'Spring Condition', value('gdiSpringCondition'));
    addLine(lines,'Balance / Manual Lift Notes', value('gdiBalanceNotes'));
    addLine(lines,'Counterbalance Notes', value('gdiCounterbalanceNotes'));
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('7. WEATHERSTRIP / SEALS');
    addLine(lines,'Left Jamb Weatherstrip', value('gdiLeftJambSeal'));
    addLine(lines,'Right Jamb Weatherstrip', value('gdiRightJambSeal'));
    addLine(lines,'Header Seal', value('gdiHeaderSeal'));
    addLine(lines,'Bottom Seal', value('gdiBottomSeal'));
    addLine(lines,'Seal Notes', value('gdiSealNotes'));
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('8. OPERATOR / HOIST INSPECTION');
    ['gdiOperatorYear','gdiOperatorMake','gdiOperatorModel','gdiOperatorSerial','gdiCycleCount','gdiMountingCondition','gdiBearings','gdiOperatorChainCondition','gdiChainSize','gdiBeltCondition','gdiBeltType','gdiBeltSize','gdiLimitSettings','gdiRailCondition','gdiTravelerCondition','gdiTrolleyArm','gdiDisconnect','gdiDriveChain','gdiSpreaderBars','gdiBearingPlate','gdiShaftCoupler','gdiOperatorNotes'].forEach(function(id){
      const labels = {
        gdiOperatorYear:'Operator Year',gdiOperatorMake:'Operator Make',gdiOperatorModel:'Operator Model',gdiOperatorSerial:'Operator Serial Number',gdiCycleCount:'Cycle Count',gdiMountingCondition:'Mounting Condition',gdiBearings:'Bearings',gdiOperatorChainCondition:'Operator Chain Condition',gdiChainSize:'Chain Size',gdiBeltCondition:'Operator Belt Condition',gdiBeltType:'Belt Type',gdiBeltSize:'Belt Size / Part Number',gdiLimitSettings:'Limits / Travel Settings',gdiRailCondition:'Rail / T-Rail Condition',gdiTravelerCondition:'Traveler / Carriage Condition',gdiTrolleyArm:'Trolley Arm / J-Arm Condition',gdiDisconnect:'Disconnect / Release Condition',gdiDriveChain:'Direct Drive Chain',gdiSpreaderBars:'Spreader Bars',gdiBearingPlate:'Bearing Plate',gdiShaftCoupler:'Shaft Coupler / Drive Connection',gdiOperatorNotes:'General Operator / Hoist Notes'
      };
      addLine(lines, labels[id], value(id));
    });
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('9. SAFETY DEVICES');
    addLine(lines,'Photo Eyes', value('gdiPhotoEyes'));
    addLine(lines,'Safety Edge', value('gdiSafetyEdge'));
    addLine(lines,'Warning Labels', value('gdiWarningLabels'));
    addLine(lines,'Audible / Visual Warning', value('gdiWarningDevices'));
    addLine(lines,'Safety Device Notes', value('gdiSafetyNotes'));
    lines.push('');
    lines.push('10. HAZARDS, RECOMMENDATIONS AND SIGNOFF');
    addLine(lines,'Immediate Safety Hazard Present?', value('gdiHazardPresent'));
    addLine(lines,'Lock Out Recommended?', value('gdiLockOut'));
    const hazards = checkedValues('gdiHazards'); if (hazards.length) lines.push('Hazard List: ' + hazards.join(', '));
    addLine(lines,'Overall Door Condition', value('gdiOverallCondition'));
    addLine(lines,'Recommended Action', value('gdiRecommendedAction'));
    addLine(lines,'Priority Level', value('gdiPriorityLevel'));
    addLine(lines,'Technician Safety Comments', value('gdiSafetyComments'));
    addLine(lines,'Recommendation Notes', value('gdiRecommendationNotes'));
    addLine(lines,'Technician Signoff', value('gdiTechnicianSignoff'));
    addLine(lines,'Customer / Site Rep Signoff', value('gdiCustomerSignoff'));
    return lines.join('\n');
  }

  function gatherFormDataMap(){
    return {
      door_company_name: value('gdiDoorCompanyName'),
      door_company_email: value('gdiDoorCompanyEmail'),
      company_name: value('gdiCompanyName'),
      contact_name: value('gdiContactName'),
      site_address: value('gdiSiteAddress'),
      contact_phone: value('gdiPhone'),
      inspection_date: value('gdiInspectionDate'),
      technician_name: value('gdiTechnicianName'),
      job_number: value('gdiJobNumber'),
      building_area: value('gdiBuildingArea'),
      door_number: value('gdiDoorNumber'),
      customer_email: value('gdiCustomerEmail'),
      door_type: value('gdiDoorType'),
      lift_type: value('gdiLiftType'),
      operation_type: value('gdiOperationType'),
      manufacturer: value('gdiManufacturer'),
      model: value('gdiModel'),
      door_color: value('gdiDoorColor'),
      window: value('gdiWindow'),
      door_thickness: value('gdiDoorThickness'),
      door_size: [value('gdiWidth'), value('gdiHeight')].filter(Boolean).join(' x '),
      approximate_age: value('gdiApproxAge'),
      general_condition: value('gdiGeneralCondition'),
      general_notes: value('gdiGeneralNotes'),
      left_rollers_good: checked('gdiLeftRollersGood') ? 'Yes' : 'No',
      left_hinges_good: checked('gdiLeftHingesGood') ? 'Yes' : 'No',
      left_items: issueSummary('left'),
      left_notes: value('gdiLeftNotes'),
      right_rollers_good: checked('gdiRightRollersGood') ? 'Yes' : 'No',
      right_hinges_good: checked('gdiRightHingesGood') ? 'Yes' : 'No',
      right_items: issueSummary('right'),
      right_notes: value('gdiRightNotes'),
      balance_condition: value('gdiBalanceCondition'),
      balance_severity: value('gdiBalanceSeverity'),
      counterbalance_type: value('gdiCounterbalanceType'),
      spring_condition: value('gdiSpringCondition'),
      balance_notes: value('gdiBalanceNotes'),
      counterbalance_notes: value('gdiCounterbalanceNotes'),
      left_jamb_seal: value('gdiLeftJambSeal'),
      right_jamb_seal: value('gdiRightJambSeal'),
      header_seal: value('gdiHeaderSeal'),
      bottom_seal: value('gdiBottomSeal'),
      seal_notes: value('gdiSealNotes'),
      operator_year: value('gdiOperatorYear'),
      operator_make: value('gdiOperatorMake'),
      operator_model: value('gdiOperatorModel'),
      operator_serial: value('gdiOperatorSerial'),
      cycle_count: value('gdiCycleCount'),
      mounting_condition: value('gdiMountingCondition'),
      bearings: value('gdiBearings'),
      operator_chain_condition: value('gdiOperatorChainCondition'),
      chain_size: value('gdiChainSize'),
      belt_condition: value('gdiBeltCondition'),
      belt_type: value('gdiBeltType'),
      belt_size: value('gdiBeltSize'),
      limits_settings: value('gdiLimitSettings'),
      rail_condition: value('gdiRailCondition'),
      traveler_condition: value('gdiTravelerCondition'),
      trolley_arm: value('gdiTrolleyArm'),
      disconnect_release: value('gdiDisconnect'),
      drive_chain: value('gdiDriveChain'),
      spreader_bars: value('gdiSpreaderBars'),
      bearing_plate: value('gdiBearingPlate'),
      shaft_coupler: value('gdiShaftCoupler'),
      operator_notes: value('gdiOperatorNotes'),
      photo_eyes: value('gdiPhotoEyes'),
      safety_edge: value('gdiSafetyEdge'),
      warning_labels: value('gdiWarningLabels'),
      warning_devices: value('gdiWarningDevices'),
      safety_notes: value('gdiSafetyNotes'),
      hazard_present: value('gdiHazardPresent'),
      lock_out_recommended: value('gdiLockOut'),
      hazard_list: checkedValues('gdiHazards'),
      overall_condition: value('gdiOverallCondition'),
      recommended_action: value('gdiRecommendedAction'),
      priority_level: value('gdiPriorityLevel'),
      safety_comments: value('gdiSafetyComments'),
      recommendation_notes: value('gdiRecommendationNotes'),
      technician_signoff: value('gdiTechnicianSignoff'),
      customer_signoff: value('gdiCustomerSignoff')
    };
  }

  function generatePdfData(summary){
    const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf;
    const doc = new jsPDF({ unit:'pt', format:'letter' });
    const lines = doc.splitTextToSize(summary, 520);
    let y = 40;
    doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');
    doc.setFontSize(11);
    lines.forEach(line => {
      if (y > 740) { doc.addPage(); y = 40; }
      doc.text(line, 40, y);
      y += 15;
    });
    return doc.output('datauristring');
  }

  document.getElementById('gdiGenerateSummaryBtn').addEventListener('click', function(){
    const summary = buildSummary();
    summaryOutput.textContent = summary;
    setStep(10);
  });

  document.getElementById('gdiClearBtn').addEventListener('click', function(){
    form.reset();
    document.getElementById('gdiLeftIssueList').innerHTML = '';
    document.getElementById('gdiRightIssueList').innerHTML = '';
    makeIssueRow('left');
    makeIssueRow('right');
    summaryOutput.textContent = 'Click “Generate Summary” to create a technician report overview.';
    setStep(1);
  });

  function resetForNewDoor(){
    const keep = {
      company: value('gdiDoorCompanyName'),
      email: value('gdiDoorCompanyEmail'),
      tech: value('gdiTechnicianName'),
      customer: value('gdiCompanyName'),
      customerEmail: value('gdiCustomerEmail')
    };
    form.reset();
    document.getElementById('gdiLeftIssueList').innerHTML = '';
    document.getElementById('gdiRightIssueList').innerHTML = '';
    makeIssueRow('left');
    makeIssueRow('right');
    document.getElementById('gdiDoorCompanyName').value = keep.company;
    document.getElementById('gdiDoorCompanyEmail').value = keep.email;
    document.getElementById('gdiTechnicianName').value = keep.tech;
    document.getElementById('gdiCompanyName').value = keep.customer;
    document.getElementById('gdiCustomerEmail').value = keep.customerEmail;
    summaryOutput.textContent = 'Click “Generate Summary” to create a technician report overview.';
    setStep(1);
  }

  async function emailInspection(startNewDoor){
    const summary = buildSummary();
    summaryOutput.textContent = summary;
    const fd = new FormData();
    fd.append('action','gdi_send_inspection_email');
    fd.append('nonce', '<?php echo esc_js(wp_create_nonce('gdi_email_nonce')); ?>');
    fd.append('door_company_name', value('gdiDoorCompanyName'));
    fd.append('door_company_email', value('gdiDoorCompanyEmail'));
    fd.append('customer_email', value('gdiCustomerEmail'));
    fd.append('send_to_door_company', value('gdiSendDoorCompany') || 'Yes');
    fd.append('send_to_customer', value('gdiSendCustomer') || 'No');
    fd.append('subject', 'Inspection Report - ' + (value('gdiCompanyName') || 'Site') + ' - ' + (value('gdiDoorNumber') || 'Door'));
    fd.append('summary', summary);
    fd.append('company_name', value('gdiCompanyName'));
    fd.append('door_number', value('gdiDoorNumber'));
    fd.append('technician_name', value('gdiTechnicianName'));
    fd.append('inspection_date', value('gdiInspectionDate'));
    fd.append('overall_condition', value('gdiOverallCondition'));
    fd.append('recommended_action', value('gdiRecommendedAction'));
    fd.append('priority_level', value('gdiPriorityLevel'));
    fd.append('pdf_base64', generatePdfData(summary));
    fd.append('pdf_filename', 'inspection-report-' + (value('gdiDoorNumber') || 'door') + '.pdf');

    const map = gatherFormDataMap();
    Object.keys(map).forEach(key => {
      const val = map[key];
      if (Array.isArray(val)) {
        val.forEach(v => fd.append('form_data[' + key + '][]', v));
      } else {
        fd.append('form_data[' + key + ']', val || '');
      }
    });

    ['gdiDoorImages','gdiGeneralImages','gdiLeftImages','gdiRightImages','gdiCounterbalanceImages','gdiSealImages','gdiOperatorImages','gdiSafetyImages'].forEach(function(id){
      const input = document.getElementById(id);
      if (!input || !input.files) return;
      Array.from(input.files).forEach(file => fd.append(input.name, file));
    });

    let result = null;
    try {
      const response = await fetch('<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin-ajax.php')); ?>', { method:'POST', body:fd });
      result = await response.json();
    } catch (err) {
      alert('Something went wrong while sending the email.');
      return;
    }

    if (!result || !result.success) {
      alert(result && result.data && result.data.message ? result.data.message : 'Email failed to send.');
      return;
    }

    if (startNewDoor) {
      alert('Inspection PDF and any uploaded images were emailed successfully. Loading a new door now.');
      resetForNewDoor();
      return;
    }

    alert('Inspection PDF and any uploaded images were emailed successfully.');
  }

  document.getElementById('gdiEmailBtn').addEventListener('click', () => emailInspection(false));
  document.getElementById('gdiEmailNewDoorBtn').addEventListener('click', () => emailInspection(true));
})();
</script>

  #dmxDetailVoiceToast {

    color: #fff;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, .24);
  }

  #dmxDetailVoiceToast.show { display: block; }
  #dmxDetailVoiceToast.idle { background: #334155; }
  #dmxDetailVoiceToast.listening { background: #dc2626; }
  #dmxDetailVoiceToast.success { background: #166534; }
  #dmxDetailVoiceToast.error { background: #991b1b; }

  @keyframes dmxDetailMicPulse {
    0% { transform: scale(1); }
    60% { transform: scale(1.045); }
    100% { transform: scale(1); }
  }

  @media (max-width: 700px) {
    .dmx-detail-voice-row {
      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 56px !important;
      gap: 8px !important;
    }
    .dmx-detail-mic-button {
      width: 56px !important;
      height: 56px !important;
      min-width: 56px !important;
      min-height: 56px !important;
      background-size: 52px 52px !important;
    }
    #dmxDetailVoiceToast {
      left: 14px;
      right: 14px;
      bottom: 14px;
      max-width: none;
    }
  }
</style>

<div id="dmxDetailVoiceToast" class="idle">Voice input ready.</div>

<script>
(function(){
  if (window.dmxDetailMicUniversalReady) return;
  window.dmxDetailMicUniversalReady = true;

  var micIconUrl = "https://garagedoorinspection.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/ChatGPT-Image-Mar-27-2026-06_53_30-PM.png";
  var recognition = null;
  var activeField = null;
  var activeButton = null;

  function toast(message, mode) {
    var el = document.getElementById('dmxDetailVoiceToast');
    if (!el) return;
    el.textContent = message;
    el.className = 'show ' + (mode || 'idle');
    clearTimeout(el._timer);
    if (mode !== 'listening') {
      el._timer = setTimeout(function(){ el.className = mode || 'idle'; }, 2800);
    }
  }

  function cleanText(text) {
    return String(text || '')
      .replace(/\bat symbol\b/gi, '@')
      .replace(/\bdot com\b/gi, '.com')
      .replace(/\bdot ca\b/gi, '.ca')
      .replace(/\bnew line\b/gi, '\n')
      .replace(/\bnext line\b/gi, '\n')
      .replace(/\s+\n/g, '\n')
      .replace(/\n\s+/g, '\n')
      .replace(/[ ]{2,}/g, ' ')
      .trim();
  }

  function getDetailedRoot() {
    return document.getElementById('inspectionForm') ||
      document.querySelector('.dmx-native-inspection-shell') ||
      document.querySelector('.dmx-admin-inspection-preview-wrap') ||
      document.body;
  }

  function clearActive() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.dmx-detail-mic-button.active').forEach(function(btn){
      btn.classList.remove('active');
    });
  }

  function stopListening(message) {
    if (recognition) {
      try { recognition.stop(); } catch(e) {}
    }
    recognition = null;
    activeField = null;
    activeButton = null;
    clearActive();
    if (message) toast(message, 'idle');
  }

  function insertText(field, text) {
    var cleaned = cleanText(text);
    if (!field || !cleaned) return;

    var value = field.value || '';
    var start = typeof field.selectionStart === 'number' ? field.selectionStart : value.length;
    var end = typeof field.selectionEnd === 'number' ? field.selectionEnd : value.length;
    var before = value.slice(0, start);
    var after = value.slice(end);
    var insertion = cleaned;

    if (before && !before.endsWith(' ') && !before.endsWith('\n') && !insertion.startsWith('\n')) {
      insertion = ' ' + insertion;
    }

    field.value = before + insertion + after;
    var cursor = (before + insertion).length;
    field.focus();

    if (typeof field.setSelectionRange === 'function') {
      field.setSelectionRange(cursor, cursor);
    }

    field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
    field.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
  }

  function commandHandled(text, field) {
    var lower = String(text || '').toLowerCase().trim();
    var root = getDetailedRoot();
    var activeStep = root.querySelector('.form-step.active') || root.querySelector('.step.active') || root;

    if (lower.indexOf('next section') !== -1 || lower.indexOf('next step') !== -1) {
      var next = activeStep.querySelector('.next-step, [data-next], .next, button.next, .btn-next');
      if (next) {
        next.click();
        toast('Moved to next section.', 'success');
        return true;
      }
    }

    if (lower.indexOf('previous section') !== -1 || lower.indexOf('previous step') !== -1 || lower === 'back' || lower.indexOf('go back') !== -1) {
      var prev = activeStep.querySelector('.prev-step, [data-prev], .previous, .prev, button.prev, .btn-prev');
      if (prev) {
        prev.click();
        toast('Moved to previous section.', 'success');
        return true;
      }
    }

    if (lower.indexOf('clear field') !== -1) {
      if (field) {
        field.value = '';
        field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
        field.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
        toast('Field cleared.', 'success');
      }
      return true;
    }

    return false;
  }

  function startListening(field, button) {
    var SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;

    if (!SpeechRecognition) {
      toast('Voice input is not supported on this browser/device.', 'error');
      return;
    }

    if (recognition && activeField === field) {
      stopListening('Voice input stopped.');
      return;
    }

    stopListening();

    recognition = new SpeechRecognition();
    recognition.lang = 'en-CA';
    recognition.continuous = false;
    recognition.interimResults = true;
    recognition.maxAlternatives = 1;

    activeField = field;
    activeButton = button;
    clearActive();
    button.classList.add('active');

    recognition.onstart = function(){
      toast('Listening… speak now.', 'listening');
    };

    recognition.onresult = function(event){
      var finalText = '';
      var interimText = '';

      for (var i = event.resultIndex; i < event.results.length; i++) {
        var transcript = event.results[i][0].transcript || '';
        if (event.results[i].isFinal) {
          finalText += ' ' + transcript;
        } else {
          interimText += ' ' + transcript;
        }
      }

      var cleanedFinal = cleanText(finalText);
      var cleanedInterim = cleanText(interimText);

      if (cleanedFinal) {
        if (cleanedFinal.toLowerCase().indexOf('stop listening') !== -1 || cleanedFinal.toLowerCase() === 'stop') {
          stopListening('Voice input stopped.');
          return;
        }

        if (!commandHandled(cleanedFinal, field)) {
          insertText(field, cleanedFinal);
          toast('Voice text added.', 'success');
        }
      } else if (cleanedInterim) {
        toast('Listening… "' + cleanedInterim + '"', 'listening');
      }
    };

    recognition.onerror = function(event){
      var err = event && event.error ? event.error : '';
      var message = 'Voice input error.';

      if (err === 'not-allowed') {
        message = 'Microphone permission was blocked. Please allow microphone access.';
      } else if (err === 'no-speech') {
        message = 'No speech detected. Try again.';
      } else if (err === 'audio-capture') {
        message = 'No microphone found on this device.';
      } else if (err === 'network') {
        message = 'Voice service network error.';
      }

      recognition = null;
      activeField = null;
      activeButton = null;
      clearActive();
      toast(message, 'error');
    };

    recognition.onend = function(){
      recognition = null;
      activeField = null;
      activeButton = null;
      clearActive();
    };

    try {
      recognition.start();
    } catch(e) {
      recognition = null;
      activeField = null;
      activeButton = null;
      clearActive();
      toast('Could not start voice input.', 'error');
    }
  }

  function isEligibleField(field) {
    if (!field || field.disabled || field.readOnly) return false;
    if (field.closest('.dmx-detail-voice-row')) return false;
    if (field.closest('#dmxDetailVoiceToast')) return false;

    var tag = String(field.tagName || '').toLowerCase();
    var type = String(field.getAttribute('type') || '').toLowerCase();

    if (tag === 'textarea') return true;

    if (tag === 'input') {
      if (!type || type === 'text' || type === 'search' || type === 'tel') return true;
    }

    return false;
  }

  function enhanceField(field) {
    if (!isEligibleField(field)) return;

    field.dataset.dmxVoiceEnhanced = '1';

    var parent = field.parentNode;
    if (!parent) return;

    var row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'dmx-detail-voice-row';

    parent.insertBefore(row, field);
    row.appendChild(field);

    var button = document.createElement('button');
    button.type = 'button';
    button.className = 'dmx-detail-mic-button';
    button.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Start voice input');
    button.setAttribute('title', 'Tap to dictate into this field');
    button.style.backgroundImage = 'url("' + micIconUrl + '")';

    button.addEventListener('click', function(){
      startListening(field, button);
    });

    row.appendChild(button);
  }

  function enhanceAllFields() {
    var root = getDetailedRoot();
    if (!root) return;

    var fields = root.querySelectorAll('input, textarea');
    fields.forEach(function(field){
      if (field.dataset.dmxVoiceEnhanced === '1') return;
      enhanceField(field);
    });
  }

  function init() {
    enhanceAllFields();
    toast('Voice input ready. Tap a mic beside any text field.', 'idle');
  }

  window.dmxDetailInspectionRefreshMics = enhanceAllFields;

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }

  window.addEventListener('load', function(){
    enhanceAllFields();
    setTimeout(enhanceAllFields, 400);
    setTimeout(enhanceAllFields, 1200);
    setTimeout(enhanceAllFields, 2500);
  });

  var observer = new MutationObserver(function(){
    enhanceAllFields();
  });

  observer.observe(document.documentElement || document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
})();
</script>

DMX_DETAIL_VOICE_UNIVERSAL;

    return ob_get_clean();
});
